We ordered 3 lasagna /2 crispy chicken burgers/ chicken pasta and 5 milk shake. Burger was okay but lasagna is too much salty n full of sauce, pasta is horrible no tasty at all. Milk shakes are too much sweet can't drink it no tast of chocolate or milk only you can feel sugar taste.
My bill was around 16,000/= but not worthy at all.

Name: The Counter Cafe
Author: Lahiru Ekanayaka
Review: Taste food. Not dine in. U can deliver through Uber Eats app or web. Quick service. I like Counter cafe promotions.

Name: The Counter Cafe
Author: Sajjath Samly
Review: Ordered a paratha wrap which is worth of 650/- through Uber eats. Not at all worth the money.

Name: The Counter Cafe
Author: Faiz Mohamed
Review: Very good food. Just like home cooked. Tried many varieties. Great food. 👍

Name: The Counter Cafe
Author: Ryan Algama
Review: Shawarma not worth for 650. We got a buy one get one free . Otherwise it's not

Name: The Counter Cafe
Author: Denham Kern
Review: Useless service on Uber

Name: Brew 1867 by Dilmah – World Trade Center
Address: Level 03 West Block World Trade Center, Colombo
Author: Kim M
Review: They have a good selection of items. Rice and curry starting at Rs.300/- pastas at Rs.420, sandwiches at Rs.320/- and a bunch of sweet items. Hope they maintain the food quality and don't increase prices. Good juices and different tea combination also available but a little experience for a small bottle of juice. Overall good experience.

Name: Brew 1867 by Dilmah – World Trade Center
Address: Level 03 West Block World Trade Center, Colombo
Author: Sanc
Review: Food and beverages are reasonably priced and the quality is well maintained. Ideal to hang out with a friend or to have some alone time. They have got the plunges and other equipments for brewing tea. The staff is warm and friendly. They were so generous to make a fresh Amberella drink for me as I preferred a sugar free drink even when there were plenty available on the display.

Name: Brew 1867 by Dilmah – World Trade Center
Address: Level 03 West Block World Trade Center, Colombo
Author: Sudheera Senaratne
Review: Excellent food and beverages at reasonable prices. Active and responsive staff. Nice and cozy design and good vibes. Above all the variety of delicious Dilmah tea and coffee. All the best!

Name: Brew 1867 by Dilmah – World Trade Center
Address: Level 03 West Block World Trade Center, Colombo
Author: Janice Corera
Review:
Lovely tea cafe with an interesting variety of teas and snacks. I am not able to rate them totally on the food as I am a selective diner always opting for single origin or unflavoured tea.
But just for kicks I did try their Masala Chai and WOW I can vouch for the stellar creation they came up with. I am still to get over the feel good vibes it left me with !!!

Name: Brew 1867 by Dilmah – World Trade Center
Address: Level 03 West Block World Trade Center, Colombo
Author: Shashiprabha Madubhashani
Review: Various fruit drinks, tea, coffee available. Snacks, cupcakes available. Rice and curry also serve. We tried Moroccan Mojito Mocktail (Passion fruit) and Granola Strawberry pot. Taste is superb. Nicely packed. Highly recommended.

Name: Cafe 113
Author: Rahul Sankrithya
Review: A beautiful pocket friendly restaurant right next to the gangaramya vihara road and opposite City centre , I was tired after having just arrived and had an early lunch . Service was as excellent as the food! The Pol roti was so fresh !! The gentleman was kind enough to offer me a mixed meal as he figured I was tired . Parking is fine . Kids can feel at home . What attracted me the most was the vintage architecture and cleanliness they have pursued to maintain.

Name: Cafe 113
Author: Sameer Kulkarni
Review: They provide high quality food at such reasonable prices. The cafe is so pretty and in the heart of the city. They have kept it so clean and they are so sweet and give food with so much love. We are very impressed with Srilanka and thanks to these experiences

Name: Cafe 113
Author: Susmita Bishnu
Review:
This is a very clean and hygienic hotel.
I had breakfast from here and the owners were so helpful to suggest me food and interact in a friendly manner.
The food is very tasty and homely.
I loved their string hoppers , egg hoppers ,daal and coconut sambol.
Given a chance I would visit again.
Hope they continue to make such tasty food.

Name: Cafe 113
Author: Alex Janssen
Review: Really good food at reasonable prices. Rice was flavorful, friendly people!

Name: Loop Restaurant and Cafe
Author: damith gt
Review:
Poor Experience at Loop Cafe

I recently ordered the roast chicken kottu and spaghetti from this restaurant, and unfortunately, it was a very disappointing experience. The roast chicken kottu was extremely salty, to the point that it was almost inedible. The chicken pieces also tasted old and stale, as if the dish had been prepared in the morning and left to sit for hours before being served.

This was far from the quality I expected, and I found it quite difficult to enjoy the meal. I hope the restaurant takes this feedback seriously and improves the freshness and seasoning of their dishes in the future.

Name: Loop Restaurant and Cafe
Author: Jagath Jayasekera
Review: One of the top restaurant, pastry, and food outlets around Kandana. Their pastry collection rivals five-star quality, offering a wide range of selections. The blackberry croissant is a must-try—delicious! Their takeaway food corner also has an excellent variety. It does get a bit crowded in the evenings, which speaks to the quality they offer. While prices are slightly on the higher side, the exceptional quality makes it well worth it.

Name: Loop Restaurant and Cafe
Author: Devon Perera
Review: Great place for a small gathering or for a family dinner out. The service was satisfactory and they readily have their recommendations about food options and portion sizes. Prices were fair and the portion sizes were great as well. The ambience was good too. Parking can be a bit tight if you are going there on a busy night but apart from that I've got no complains. Overall it's a nice place and recommended for families or small group of friends.

Name: Loop Restaurant and Cafe
Author: Oshan Nanayakkara
Review:
Summary: This place is 10/10. Delicious food. Huge portions. Good pricing. Awesome service. Highly recommended.

Okay this place has the best food in the area. I went in there expecting just some generic tasting food with typical service but I was blown away by the quality of the food and the service. Like hands down best food in the area. The portion size is huge. I went with my girlfriend and her brother and her brother is vegan so her ordered a vegetable fried noodles and me and my girlfriend ordered a large chicken fried rice. It wasn’t anything fancy we just wanted to have a quick lunch and go. But the manager insisted that the large portion is too much for us and insisted to order a normal chicken fried rice. So we did and the “Normal” was bigger than the large portion size of some of the restaurants. And it’s not quantity over quality. It is one of the tastiest chicken fried rice I’ve ever had. Not too oily not too dry or anything just “PERFECT” had a good amount of chicken and egg. Super delicious. And the price is soo worth it. It’s not expensive at all. Compared to other places portion size and quality I could say this place is actually cheaper. You get so much for what you are paying.

My girlfriend’s brother couldn’t finish his vegan fried noodles by himself since the portions are huge so we had some of that and to my surprise it was super delicious. I’ve never had any vegan fried noodles actually taste good like that.

Also we made a request to the chef to make us a vegan hot butter mushrooms without dipping in egg batter. He accepted that offer but we did not had the time and we were full so we declined.

Overall this place is definitely worth it. I’ll always go to this place whenever I’m in the area.

Name: Loop Restaurant and Cafe
Author: Hasitha Samaraweera
Review: We went to this place for dinner. The staff is not very friendly. There was only one waiter for the services of the upstairs restaurant. He is middle-aged and quite rough. Most of the items on the menu were finished by 8.30pm. So we ordered a pasta, a cuttlefish devil and a chicken fried rice. The pasta is not very tasty. The chicken fried rice is a bit better. Cuttlefish is good. Even the prices have gone up a lot. However, the quality of the food is not that high. Bad Experience..

Name: KANGROW CAFE & BAKERS
Author: Charith Chathuranga
Review:
Tasty foods with friendly service. Good parking space Also available . reasonable prices with good portion . Nice eco friendly place with nice views. Close to the main road. Modern clean  kitchen inside.
Everything going fine.

Name: KANGROW CAFE & BAKERS
Author: Yasitha Anuranga
Review: Foods are good and location also attractive . The crew is little bit slow while serving

Name: KANGROW CAFE & BAKERS
Author: Isuru Abeyratne
Review: Alright so I normally don't like to complain about food places and like to enjoy the food and just leave at the end of the meal. However this place has given me a unique experience, so let me tell you all what happened. Me and a few friends went here for lunch it was maybe around 12ish or 12:30pm, when we went the lady in front told "the guy that cooks isn't here yet so your order might be late" that's fine, what's a few minutes delay we think, so we go upstairs and then have a drink and chill a bit. One hour goes by, still no food so we go back down to check up on the food, then the lady says "sir the food is ready it's just the guy who bring the food upstairs is not here yet" and just like that my memory of this place want be soon forgotten, however things get "better" ones we pick up our own order and take it to our place we asked for plats and cups.......and you guessed it! That dude is also "not here yet" so we had to clean our own plats and cups, and still on the bill they ask for a service charge (that we didn't pay for obvious reasons)

Name: KANGROW CAFE & BAKERS
Author: Niduk Binaara
Review: I've purchased a chicken cheese kottu for rs.700/=.it was a fresh & creamy portion as I expected but it did not contain a single piece of chicken like some kind of a vegetarian dish.

Name: KANGROW CAFE & BAKERS
Author: Emmanuel
Review: their rice and curry is the most expensive around this area (Rs. 280) even more than the leading restaurants but quanty wise it's average, they started off well with decent size portions but didn't see that contine so I have stopped buying because there are better options. Now I visit them only when I have to make a quick purchase because it's closer to my place.

Name: Cafe Seventy Seven
Author: Dharshika B
Review: Today I went to cafe seventy seven nawaloka branch and I ordered some food through the cashier counter and paid. Somehow ordered food is not avalailable with them, the person who took my order bill his behaviour was awful he treats me like a fool and asked me to cancel the order through the cashier counter. Then I went to cashier counter the person who handled the cashier at the he is very unrespectful. I ask him to exchange my order to any other foods not to return my money. But he cancelled the bill and returned my money by blaming me. Very ridiculous service given by those 2 people. Please consider this as a serious issue.Customer service is the best important to thing success. I hope I'll get a better solution from the management.

Name: Cafe Seventy Seven
Author: Sarani Jayasooriya
Review: They do not have a return policy. Once you purchase and that's it. No change of mind or whatsoever. Bad customer services. Yells at customers by just simply asking for a price clarification at the counter. Had to wait hours to get to the order. Foods here are not worth the price. Very disappointed in their service.

Name: Cafe Seventy Seven
Author: Kelum Roshana
Review: Do not recommend you buying the Chocolate eclair'... The eclair is stale, the chocolate tastes more like clay and the filling is literally icing....

Name: Cafe Seventy Seven
Author: Johan Perera
Review: Overrated. Couldn't find any chicken piece in the chicken sandwich 😅

Name: Cafe Seventy Seven
Author: Iroshan Rupasinghe
Review: Food was ok but prices are a bit high. They have a good range of food though.

Name: Letona Cafe
Author: Amoda Indeewari
Review: My most favorite take away from Letona is Mixed fried rice. It is a full rice comes with chili paste as a condiment. But that very small amount of chili paste they give for that full rice is not enough for one person. And that’s the only this comes with the rice portion. When we request to add more chili paste, they charge extra for it. But when you dine in, it’s unlimited. I think you should be able to add larger/ enough portion of chili paste to any of delivery/take away dishes.

Name: Letona Cafe
Author: Reshan Chathuranga
Review:
I have mixed feelings about this restaurant.

We went for brunch, and the restaurant is located on the second floor. The place itself is very nice, the seating is comfortable, and the modern ambiance and cleanliness are great. I especially loved the atmosphere.

We were the only customers at the time, and the service was attentive. However, we felt the server could have given us a bit more space to browse the menu before hovering to see what we'd choose. It wasn't a major issue, though.

We started with drinks - a chocolate milkshake and an iced coffee. Both were delicious. Unfortunately, the chicken sandwiches we ordered later were disappointing. I'd heard good things about this place in the past, so I hope the food quality improves in the future.

Name: Letona Cafe
Author: R O S H A N
Review: The best in Gampaha. Been there for ages without compromising quality and taste… Great price too! Ask for Mohan. He’s the best guy in there!

Name: Letona Cafe
Author: Rajitha Dissanayake
Review:
☙ Letona Cafe is a fantastic place to enjoy a delicious meal.

☙ The food here tastes amazing, and I really enjoyed every dish I tried.

☙ The environment is very clean, calm, and quiet, with nice background music that enhances the pleasant atmosphere.

☙ The staff is polite and friendly, which made the experience even better.

☙ The food is not only tasty but also served in adequate portions. We had a very nice ambiance and comfortable seating.

☙ However, the service was a bit slow, and it took some time for our food to arrive.

☙ Overall, Letona Cafe is a wonderful spot to hang out with friends and family.
♨ I would definitely recommend it! ♨

Name: Letona Cafe
Author: Hiru W
Review: Letona has to be the best restaurant around gampaha. The food here tastes amazing. You MUST try their “chop suey”. For me that’s their best dish. 👌❤️

Name: Reef House Cafe
Author: oOOo
Review: Never go to this place. Charged 500 rupees for a bottle of water and the worst customer service we have ever experienced. So many other better restaurants on the beach and everywhere else the same bottle of water cost 150 rupees. No morals or values, it's a shame. Avoid this place!!!

Name: Reef House Cafe
Author: TatyanKA G
Review: Great place to sit at sunset and have a beer.  The host is hospitable, it seems that he looked to visit a friend.

Name: Reef House Cafe
Author: Dakota Stutz
Review:
Be VERY careful. I was shaken down by a "friend" of the owner and he physically grabbed me and threatened me to hurt me. The bartender witnessed this and did nothing to help.
STAY AWAY.

Name: Reef House Cafe
Author: Channa Nanayakkara
Review: Very nice economical place to have a beer.  The owner is really nice a well

Name: Pit Stop Cafe
Address: 370,, High Level Road, Colombo - Batticaloa Hwy, Pannipitiya
Author: Thiran Ediriweera
Review: This place is situated within the Lanka IOC Fuel Station. There is an electric vehicle charging point there too. You can have authentic Sri Lankan Rice and Curry or any other pastry items here while your electric vehicle is being charged. Pricing also reasonable.

Name: Pit Stop Cafe
Address: 370,, High Level Road, Colombo - Batticaloa Hwy, Pannipitiya
Author: Pahan Madusha

Name: Pit Stop Cafe
Address: 370,, High Level Road, Colombo - Batticaloa Hwy, Pannipitiya
Author: Malinda Punchihewa

Name: Pit Stop Cafe
Address: 370,, High Level Road, Colombo - Batticaloa Hwy, Pannipitiya
Author: Pamindu Anupama

Name: Pit Stop Cafe
Address: 370,, High Level Road, Colombo - Batticaloa Hwy, Pannipitiya
Author: nashpaw pawp

Name: Wheelys Café 80
Author: manisha weerasinghe
Review: Good place for a quick snack. Yet to taste the coffee. Loved the Cinnamon baked rice (veg ). Sorry but the Cinnamon baked rice with chicken was not worth the price (Rs 520) Had only a malnourished leg. It was tasty hence my ☆☆☆☆☆.

Name: Wheelys Café 80
Author: Miyuru Kularathne
Review: Friendly staff  and fresh foods.... Prices are little bit high but the taste of the foods are very great .. I enjoyed iced coffee for 400 and chicken and chease spaghetti for 650.

Name: Wheelys Café 80
Author: Sadira de Mel
Review: Great coffee, great service, great vibe. Best coffee in Sri Lanka! and its all handmade. Their cart is also very cool and very organic - complete with a solar panel on its roof. Recommend this place to anyone who likes coffee.

Name: Wheelys Café 80
Author: Dharini Pushparaj
Review: Very quiet place with amazing jazz music. People there are nice and would recommend menu to your liking. The experience you get there is intriguing. Anyone passing jawatta road and wants to have coffee or a cold drink, you should stop by wheely's café.

Name: Wheelys Café 80
Author: John Pereira
Review: It's a lovely place and has been newly refurbished. We stopped by for some beer and food. There's a giant lawn with outside seating and lots of cozy rooms and a bar inside as well. Prices are on par for Colombo. A glass of beer was around 400 or so and food is prices between 800 and 1300 and they have a pretty large selection. Requires a membership to dine.

Name: Cafe Lab
Author: Kalani Diddeniya
Review:
Super cute vibes.
The food was tasty and the atmosphere was very calm and chill. Highly recommended.

Name: Cafe Lab
Author: Kanchana Ranasinghe
Review: This seems to be a new cafe/ coffee shop next to the Lanka. Adjoining the petrol shed next door. It is a tiny place with various pastries and patties etc. And cupcakes and other dessert stuff. Orange juice and iced coffee were also available. Staff is learning the ropes, but already are at a good customer service level. You can eat in, sitting in one of the tables inside, or use the outside seating. Upstairs is also available. The short eats were heated before handing over to us, to take away. The interior is decorated with various masks on the wall. The hospital cafeteria was closed at the time so this café came in handy.

Name: Cafe Lab
Author: Prabhani TG
Review: Such a nice cafe with a delicious food. Wonderful ambience. Even it’s a small cafe they have managed the space very well.

Name: Cafe Lab
Author: Isura Amarasinghe
Review: Food was fine . Small cofee shop with few seating . But having good vibe .

Name: Cafe Lab
Author: Isuru Yapa
Review: Ambiance is nice. But never worth the money. Potions are not sufficient and very unreasonable prices.  And the cheese kottu i had is so avarage

Name: Thanuk's Vegg Cafe
Address: 260/3, 5th Lane, sudharshana Mw, Suhada Pl, Malabe
Author: Nadeesha Chamani
Review:
Ordered several times from here. Food is really tasty and worth the price.
This time the cheesy Noodle is the best. ❤️
Even non vegans can enjoy the variety of food. The portion is actually enough for two persons.

Name: Thanuk's Vegg Cafe
Address: 260/3, 5th Lane, sudharshana Mw, Suhada Pl, Malabe
Author: Krishantha Gunawardana
Review: it is really tasty and cheesy, one of the best cheese kottus i have ever ate, ice coffees are really good. The food looks very clean as well. Will recommend definitely, will buy more in the future and happy to see a vegetarian restaurant in Malabe.

Name: Thanuk's Vegg Cafe
Address: 260/3, 5th Lane, sudharshana Mw, Suhada Pl, Malabe
Author: bimal yasasvi
Review: Have tried their Kottu, noodles and pasta several times. The taste is great which can be recommended for non vegans as well. The portion size and the price are also reasonable.

Name: Thanuk's Vegg Cafe
Address: 260/3, 5th Lane, sudharshana Mw, Suhada Pl, Malabe
Author: Prabodha Theekshana
Review: Highly recommended.... you should try this vegetarian café.... best quality ingredients... very fresh and tasty foods... ♥️🔥

Name: Thanuk's Vegg Cafe
Address: 260/3, 5th Lane, sudharshana Mw, Suhada Pl, Malabe
Author: Nimasha Sewwandi
Review: Great new online vegetarian restaurant. We have tried couple of their dishes. Their Kottu is very different from other places, in a great way! Its just the right potion size and tastes really good and healthy too! Hoping to try more new dishes from Thanuks. I am a vegetarian, so seeing more businesses like this prioritizing cruelty free food is always a delight.

Name: Chocoholics - Duplication Road
Address: 357A R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Sangeetha D Packiyarajah
Review:
A specious place in a good spot serving one of the best hot chocolate in town.
Tried their dark hot chocolate, was such divine. Also had the milkshake and chocolate waffles with  fruits.. all of them were delectable.
The ambience is good, groups of people come in and share the desserts, the portions are really huge.
A great place to have a meet up

Name: Chocoholics - Duplication Road
Address: 357A R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chamikara Kariyapperuma
Review: They offer a fantastic selection of waffles, crepes, pancakes, and cheesecakes, all of which are unique and reasonably priced. The portion sizes and quality of the food are excellent. The staff is friendly and attentive, making the experience even better.there’s no dedicated parking. Definitely recommended!

Name: Chocoholics - Duplication Road
Address: 357A R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chanuka Dinuwan
Review: I had three chocolate desserts there. They were very tasty. It cost me around 2000 per dessert. It’s more than enough per person. The chocolate desserts look beautiful and tasty, and it was a unique experience. I recommend this place to people who are obsessed with chocolate. They can get the best experience for sure.

Name: Chocoholics - Duplication Road
Address: 357A R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Ahmed Mansoor
Review:
This place was amazing!! Went there for the first time ever to be greeted with a nice ambiance. The interior was decent and the location was easy to find. The staff were AMAZING, and so friendly and very interactive. I really appreciate them being helpful when choosing from the menu.

I ordered the fettuccine crepe with ice cream topped with strawberries and they were nothing more than magical. Definitely filling for a person. The chocolate they use is ADDICTIVE. That’s some quality chocolate right there. So far this place tops in terms of chocolate based deserts.

Name: Chocoholics - Duplication Road
Address: 357A R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Pepper Buttérfly
Review: I blown away by their delicious pancakes, cheesecakes, and waffles. The pancakes were fluffy and flavorful, the cheesecakes were rich and creamy, and the waffles were perfectly crispy. The staff was friendly and the ambiance was cozy. Highly recommend for anyone with a sweet tooth!"

Name: කියුපිඩ් mini cafe 1 (Cupid mini cafe 1)
Author: Shiyan Sirisena (sam)
Review: Went there with my friends, and ordered chicken biriyani and Nasi gooran food was really delicious. There was good size chicken pieces and potion size really good hard to finish it alone. It is really worth the price and atmosphere good and the vibe is good but it could have been better if it was air conditioned. Staff was really friendly and helpful overall good place and highly recommended

Name: කියුපිඩ් mini cafe 1 (Cupid mini cafe 1)
Author: Madurangi Guruge
Review: Delicious foods for reasonable prices. This place is located in roadside but very calm and quiet place. One position is more than enough for one person. Quality was so good. They are providing a quick service. There is a free parking slot for customers.

Name: කියුපිඩ් mini cafe 1 (Cupid mini cafe 1)
Author: Dinuka Niroshan
Review:
We had a visit last night and it was not a quality environment that you expect from a well marketed brand. But it is sufficient to have a good meal at a very good price.
I would recommend take-out rather than dining in.

Name: කියුපිඩ් mini cafe 1 (Cupid mini cafe 1)
Author: Dileesha Fernando
Review: The restaurant was not clean and the food was disappointing..the mixed rice we ordered was lacked flavor and also not enough meat and seafoods in rice.There are only some little number of chicken pieces,prawns and sausages in the mixed rice..And also the prices were too high for the quality of food and potion sizes..👎

Name: කියුපිඩ් mini cafe 1 (Cupid mini cafe 1)
Author: Shirantha
Review:
The Place has a variety of food to match your expectations. The food preparation area is visible to the customer which I believe is a good sign. They offer dine-in and takeaway options.  Dinner options are available from LKR 500/- onwards.

Have the option to dine in for about five groups ( 5-6 tables). But the space is limited. Also, the dining area is bit noisy which I believe is a disadvantage.

Overall, the place is quite interesting compared to other outlets in the area as their processes are well organised. For example, their menu prices are updated, and you are getting a token( for takeaway). The orders are processed on a first come first serve basis.

The Interior and tables are clean and nicely organised. parking space is limited but can be managed with roadside parking.

Name: MoMo Cafe
Author: Ahinsa Karunathilaka
Review: The food is delicious. I tried the pork fried rice, chicken kottu, and wood apple juice. The prices are reasonable compared to other cafes. Highly recommended.

Name: MoMo Cafe
Author: shehan jay
Review:
i rarely leave 5/5 on restaurants but these people deserves it all .
Their staff is the best in the neighborhood .
Very large portions , no extra service charges , very reasonable pricings .
Kitchen is divided by a glass screen , and it seems to be very clean too.

Name: MoMo Cafe
Author: Yasas Gamage
Review: It's a great place to grab a bite. However, the chicken fried rice I ordered had a few shreds of chicken. For the price it was not enough, I've had way better fried rice in Colombo for the same price.

Name: MoMo Cafe
Author: Yatharththan Kokulan
Review: We ordered keeri samba fried rice, the portion is very large and recommend

Name: MoMo Cafe
Author: Sachi Antany
Review: It is a nice place with friendly staff. I asked for a milkshake, which was good, but it wasn't cold enough, so I requested additional ice to make it colder. Hope to visit again 😊

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: r2thebizel
Review: Stunningly decorated the atmosphere is peaceful and welcoming. Excellent service with superb food and smoothies are incredibly tasty. Great place to spend some time.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Hideho
Review:
So many teas to choose from.
Our server took great pride in ensuring that our teas were brewed to perfection.
We purchased several speciality teas to take home.
Not,the cheapest but worth it for the experience.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Pleaxent IM
Review:
Nice experience.
Good custom service.
Nice architecture.
Drinks are tasty but bit in expensive side.
You can buy tea gift boxes in here.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Oceanman Gurung
Review: Beautiful ambience, nice food and drinks and super wonderful service from the very kind lady Lanka (she made my Club Sandwich so beautifully) and gentleman Chandeepa. They go all out to serve you with lots of joy and patience !!!

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Benjamin Mathew (Ben)
Review: Excellent Tea, Excellent experience. A bit expensive catering to a foreign crowd. Excellent service.

Name: TORENA CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Antoine Blondel
Review:
We came here since itas recommended by the host of our hostel.
It was not a disappointment as the food was really good as well as the fresh juices!
Another thing is that the place was full of locals (we were the only tourists) meaning that it is good local food.

Name: TORENA CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Paulomi Roy
Review: The kottu was really good, the fried rice looked good too. But the Biriyani, not so much. Decent crowd was seen which means food must be decent as well. The staff didn’t seem very bothered though. But I’d not highly recommend this place except for good Kottu.

Name: TORENA CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Laura Atienza
Review:
If you’re looking for a quick and authentic Sri Lanka bite, this is your place to go.

The portions are quite big and the food is great. We tried the fried rice and the kottu for 2 girls and they’re both very tasty.

Really good quality price ratio too.

Name: TORENA CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Julen Olascoaga Villar
Review: Very cheap, very big and tasty portions. Best cheese&chicken kottu we had in a month. We ate at this place 4 times in 2 days. Waiters are very nice and kind. Can't recommend it enough. Go give it a try, won't regret

Name: TORENA CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Poppy IA Nowicki
Review: Saw the good reviews on here so decided to check it out. However there was a very weird and off putting smell in the restaurant. The toilets are up some very steep and dark stairs and when I put one foot on the bottom step at least 2 rats scurried up the stairs so we left before ordering any food

Name: The Fab - Nugegoda
Address: The Fab, 155 High Level Rd, Nugegoda
Author: Piyumi Thakshila
Review: The Fan in Nugegoda is such a delightful spot—definitely one of the sweetest places in town. Their variety of cakes and savory items is impressive, making it a go-to for anyone with a sweet tooth or craving a quick bite. The only area that could use a little improvement is the staff. While some are incredibly friendly, others seem to reserve their warmth for loyal customers. A little more consistency in service would make the experience even better!

Name: The Fab - Nugegoda
Address: The Fab, 155 High Level Rd, Nugegoda
Author: Udara S. Arachchi
Review: Quality food served here. But extremely long waiting time which is not acceptable for the types of foods which are already made. Prices are reasonable with the quality of products specially the cakes which are best in the market. Paid parking available. Worth a repeat visit.

Name: The Fab - Nugegoda
Address: The Fab, 155 High Level Rd, Nugegoda
Author: Sachinthya Sandamith
Review: This is one of my favourite Fab outlets. Food quality and variety are pretty good. Service is not fast but acceptable. Average space inside to dine in. Have to pay for parking.

Name: The Fab - Nugegoda
Address: The Fab, 155 High Level Rd, Nugegoda
Author: Ashan Gunaratne
Review: One of worse outlet in fab. There are about 10 people in the staff but no one is working properly other than talking with other staff members. It took around 20mins to buy a chocolate donut when there was no queue. Since it took time just to put the cardboard box to a bag ,i  asked to give the donut with the card board wrapping and guess what,  with the staff members talking he has missed to wrap the cardboard box properly and it fell in the middle of the payment.

Name: The Fab - Nugegoda
Address: The Fab, 155 High Level Rd, Nugegoda
Author: Kavinda Domenico
Review:
The dining tables were clean and neatly arranged🪑🛋️
There was a good variety of short eats🌭🥪🥖
Prices were little bit lower than the other bakeries in the area💲✅
Starf service need to be improved since they serve wrong food items to the customers😬
There was a huge collection of cake items🎂🍰🥮🧁
It's better if they reheat the food before it served to the customers♨️

Name: One Zero Zero
Author: Mehar Abs
Review:
Comfortable, clean and place with friendly staff.
Both Open and indoor sitting area.
And they have a karaoke room which is very cool.

Name: One Zero Zero
Author: Yohan Ranathunga
Review:
I went there with few of my work mate to have a drink. The atmosphere was peaceful and eye catching. We took bottles from the cargills food city which was the next door. (No corkage chages)We partied in private ac room.(they didn't charge extra for private ac room)

The food was tasty and the portion was good and enough. Specially the black pepper pork, hot butter cuttle fish and the mixed rice(mixed rice is enough for 3-4 people). All the dishes were delicious.

The service was amazing. I cannot remember the waiter's name. But his service was beyond our expectations.

The prices are also reasonable (please check my photo of the bill for better idea) and I recommend this BYOB place for anyone and I'll visit again for sure

Name: One Zero Zero
Author: Natalia Stauaffry
Review: This one of the best places on Sri Lanka I have ever bee to.Out of mind taste!!!. I would strongly recommend this place for everyone who wanna have a fantastic dinner with lovely staff and incredible chef. 2nd time here during our short stay here. But will visit this place anytime we are on Srilanka.

Name: One Zero Zero
Author: Kasun S
Review: Excellent dining experience.Good price for high standard experience. Best option for family gatherings and friends meetups. Meals were served hot and excellent taste. Manager and staff were very friendly and helpful.

Name: One Zero Zero
Author: Wilko ten Bloemendal
Review: I’m 67 years old. And this was the best beef burger I ever had.

Name: Chocoholics - Havelock Road
Author: Chamikara Kariyapperuma
Review: I tried the cheesecake at chocoholics and had an authentic experience. The cheesecake, available in 50ml and 75ml sizes, was served hot with a delicious chocolate dip. It tasted great and is highly recommended! Parking is not an issue, and the menu is similar to the outlet on Duplication Road.

Name: Chocoholics - Havelock Road
Author: Chathurika Liyanage
Review:
Loved the chocolate waffle. The crispy waffle is overloaded with thick and milky chocolate.
Have also tried waffle sticks with the chocolate dip.
Have been going there since a few years.
Recently the service is not great as it used to be.

Name: Chocoholics - Havelock Road
Author: ND Studio
Review: Was the first time I tried Chocoholics and As soon as we entered they warmly welcomed us. The Chocolate taste was marvelous and the pancake was very tasty. Especially Nimsara explained us about their dishes very well and was a very nice person. Recommended

Name: Chocoholics - Havelock Road
Author: Leandra Don
Review: It was my first time visiting chocoholics. I ordered the Choco waffle and Passionfruit mojito. It was really good. The choco waffle is 10/10 and the mojito was 9/10. The staff was very friendly and supportive. Had a really good time. Highly recommend this place to satisfy your sweet cravings❤️

Name: Chocoholics - Havelock Road
Author: Gazzaz Thaha (Guzzy)
Review:
Ordered
cookies brownie pan 3.5/5
Taste was good. Brownie was hardly found. Not worth the price. Very small piece. The highlight is melted chocolate.

Strawberry crepe roll thingy 2/5
soggy, not great. Again not worth the price.

Yes, taste is important, but quantity is considerably important as well.

There is a 10% service charge as well.

My opinion: not recommended for families (unless spending 5 to 10k for a family of 3 is just biscuits 😁) , but ok for hang outs or couples maybe.  Genuine thoughts.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Joanna B
Review: I had a stuffed roti for 100 rupees. I'm pretty sure that that's a tourist price, but I was happy to pay this anyway as that's what I paid everywhere else in Sri Lanka. Really delicious, and the staff are very kind. I will come back again to stock up before setting out on a longer journey.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Jagdeep Dugar
Review:
Tea is good and in Good Qty. They Charge Rs 50 for 80% of filling
and Rs 60, for fully filled.

Fully filled should be 250ml aprox.

I think the 3 wheelers or Tuk Tuk riders take Tea and poll roty in the morning around 9AM. I saw a line of Tuk tuk at that time on this place.

I dint tried poll roty, but Tea was good, in terms of Quality and Quantity.

But ambiance is zero. Smelly inside.
Hygenic can be a problem here.

Opens in the morning by 6 AM and they serve tea till 7.00 pm.
After 7.00, depends on availability.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Krishan Jayakody
Review: Food is okay. Reasonable prices

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Rishard Sheriff
Review: Super POLROTI with KOCHCHI sambola, not excellent in quality but good for an Evening Snack.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Kushan Weeratunge
Review: The Roti Kade... Tasty Hot Roti... Superb Tea...

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: Pinithi Jayathilake
Review: I love their food so much! Especially the Nutella Waffles and the Burgers! But I wish they would renovate the place a bit especially upstairs has lost its upkeep. Maybe a fresh coat of paint and some new furniture but other than that the food is amazing!!

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: Bhanuka Senerath
Review:
Nice place right in the heart of colombo. Decent amount of parking available. Indoor and outdoor seating also available.
I went here to meet up with a friend for a chat. The interior was nice, but unfortunately I didn't have enough time to check-out the whole place.
They have nice selection of drinks and food.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: E.D.L. Nisansala
Review: This is one of the places where there is the most friendly and considerate customer service. They’ re very nice to the customers. Their dishes are top notch. Very tasty and fresh. Also if you’re a tea lover, this is the place for it. Nice surrounding. Good to spend an evening with a cup of tea and a nice book. Parking space is available. Loved this place.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: ARA ASOKAN
Review: Great and accommodating and friendly staff. Food was good. Atmosphere was nice. I visited the havelock location daily for over month while I stayed in Colombo. Added a couple photos.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: r2thebizel
Review: Beautiful from the outside but gets less well kept the deeper you go inside. Service is excellent and friendly. The food is fairly good but they didn’t have quite a bit in later on in the day.

Name: A+ Tea shop
Address: 4 B 77 L Sigithi Uyana Mawatha, Katunayake
Author: Anita perera

Name: Labookellie Tea Lounge - Marino Food Emporium
Author: Chanuka Nadun
Review:
If you’re a tea lover, Labookellie Tea Lounge is a fantastic place to explore a wide variety of local teas at reasonable prices. The cakes are decent but not extraordinary.

What really stands out is the friendly staff, who took the time to explain the entire menu. It’s a great spot for tea enthusiasts looking for a cozy experience.

Name: Labookellie Tea Lounge - Marino Food Emporium
Author: Firoze Mistry
Review:
A quiet and quaint tea lounge that is fairly reasonable and a wonderful place to have a short meeting.

They have an excellent choice of tea and snacks. I usually prefer the strong blends with milk which are excellent. A cup of tea easily serves two making it value for money.

Another excellent product is their fresh and delicious tea cake.

The only downside is they have several tables for 4 in a small area making it difficult to get a seat as most are occupied by single occupants.

Overall an excellent place to visit.

Name: Labookellie Tea Lounge - Marino Food Emporium
Author: Sathyan Dharmakumar
Review: The view from the balcony is amazing especially during sunset. The teas taste lovely too. However the service is in need of some serious improvement. The wait staff seem so lost when you ask them any questions. Furthermore they are not attentive to the customers either. Price is fairly reasonable.

Name: Labookellie Tea Lounge - Marino Food Emporium
Author: S . Sarujan
Review:
It's a place to get a variety of teas in colombo.
Tea pot ( for 2 persons) prices between 550-960 .
I tried vanilla 😋,rosehip  tea 😔 . vanilla flavoured tea taste's fine but rosehip taste's disappointed because it felt like plain tea.

Name: Labookellie Tea Lounge - Marino Food Emporium
Author: Bashitha Kariyawasam
Review:
Putting ice cream in Lemon Ice Tea isn’t a good idea! It tasted horrible and the ice cream got scattered!

Nice tea lounge but a long way to go. Will not return.

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Chishimba Simutowe
Review: Had I not just visited an amazing teach lounge prior to my visit at Longden I probably would have given this place four stars. I felt as though it was ok but way too overpriced for what they offer. The tea and the meal I ordered weren't anything out of the ordinary, the customer service was alright and the building's interior was just ok. I doubt you'd be disappointed if you go here but expect to spend a pretty penny.

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Aadil Fawme
Review: This is a cosy, family run business. Sometimes there's a friendly aunty at the shop who happily makes you tea or coffee and sometimes her husband is there, great person to ask directions from. The place is also convenient with ample parking space and easy access to all major roads. Visit them! And don't forget to smile because they definitely will :)

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: abheeth kotelawala
Review: Eat access, with a big car park

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Sadun Nalaka
Review: Good ☕ shop

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Sisira Dissanayake
Review: Fantastic

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Ryley Barbe
Review: "My stay at TeaTalk Hotel was absolutely delightful. The ambiance was warm and cozy, making it the perfect place to relax. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, always ensuring that I had everything I needed. The rooms were clean and comfortable, and the tea selection was a fantastic touch. I highly recommend TeaTalk Hotel for anyone looking for a peaceful and enjoyable stay!"

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Z N
Review:
Two stars only because the room was clean, and staff and security guard were friendly, but the bed sheets were torn.
The side mirrors of our car were stolen while we were parked on their driveway, the CCTV cameras don’t work and the manager never even contacted us. The lack of courtesy is really disappointing.

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Sanura Naveen
Review: Place really nice with great staff. Room are extremely worth the price (don’t expect 5 star quality rooms but for the price they are awesome clean and nice I hope they will do a bit of renovations soon to level up the overall quality of the room). They have a limited but superb food that I think you must try.

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Rohan Dahale
Review: Wonderful place to stay, nice helping service offered!

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Asmi Baig
Review: It's a beautiful cafe plus restaurant I just visit that yesterday that was awesome experience 🙂.the food and the environment ambiance amazing 😍.it's very peaceful place and home like feeling.they have Pakistani food like famous Nihari,kata kat,Haleem,sweet dish kheer and so many other things which r hard to find in Srilanka food pace.And the Restaurant name that is emerged in Cafe is " Kafe Karachi"....

Name: Golden Tea House
Author: chamila Pathiraja
Review: Good food

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sure Ma
Review: Highly recommended for best tea collection and spices. Loved the shop. Got some high quality organic spices such as white pepper, curry powder, chili powder, turmeric and others. Tried some the spices before purchasing. Also got the best grade of freshly packed cinnamon sticks. Dylan was so knowledgeable and honest.

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: ar sagor
Review: It was a great experience to been there. Different kinds of tea leaves are available in this place directly from factory. Sales uncle's were great. Overall the place and it's vibe was a superb.

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Purusoth
Review: Excellent customer service and nicely arranged shop. They have their own brand with different flavours. Further strong, mild and green tea also available. You can taste the sample also.  No parking available. Don’t forget to ask the discount 😜

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: fi marshall
Review: Dillan gave us a great lesson in tea, culture and even suggested amazing places to visit in Sri Lanka! The teas were delicious and I've learnt a lot, and bought some great stuff to take home. Bohoma sthuthi!

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Shizi Jay
Review: Discovering Ceylon Tea Gate was an absolute delight! Introduced by a friend, I was treated to a memorable tea tasting experience unlike any other. As a fervent aficionado of authentic Ceylon black tea, I was pleasantly surprised to also indulge in the rarity of white tea. The staff exuded warmth and hospitality, ensuring every moment was enjoyable. What truly impressed me was their meticulous attention to preserving the freshness of the tea leaves, from packaging to serving. Without hesitation, I wholeheartedly recommend Ceylon Tea Gate to fellow tea enthusiasts seeking an exquisite journey through the world of fine teas. Kudos to Ceylon Tea Gate :)

Name: Colombo Chaiwala

Review: Colombo Chaiwala is a fantastic spot for tea lovers! The ambiance is cozy and welcoming, perfect for a casual hangout. They serve a variety of teas, and the flavors are truly authentic and refreshing. I particularly enjoyed their masala chai—it’s rich and aromatic! The snacks complement the drinks well, making it a great place to relax with friends. The staff is friendly and attentive, adding to the overall positive experience. If you're in Colombo and looking for a great place to enjoy some tea, Colombo Chaiwala is definitely worth a visit!

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Mohamed Amhar
Review:
Colombo Chaiwala - A Delightful Tea Experience

I recently visited Colombo Chaiwala and was thoroughly impressed by the experience. This charming tea spot offers a cozy and inviting atmosphere, perfect for enjoying a relaxing cup of chai. The decor is vibrant and welcoming, making it a great place to unwind.

The highlight, of course, is the tea. Colombo Chaiwala serves a variety of chai options, each brewed to perfection. The Tandoori Chai, served in a clay cup, has a bold and spicy flavor that is simply delightful. The Masala Chai is another favorite, with its rich, wholesome taste and just the right amount of sweetness. For those looking for something refreshing, the Sulaimani Tea with mint leaves is a must-try.

In addition to the excellent tea, Colombo Chaiwala offers a selection of delicious snacks. The Beef Samosas are crispy and packed with savory filling, making them a perfect accompaniment to the chai. The Babath Patty, filled with well-curried beef, is another standout item.

The service at Colombo Chaiwala is top-notch. The staff are friendly, accommodating, and always ready to make recommendations. Their dedication to providing a great customer experience is evident in every interaction.

Overall, Colombo Chaiwala is a fantastic place to enjoy a cup of chai and some tasty snacks. Whether you’re a tea enthusiast or just looking for a cozy spot to relax, this place is definitely worth a visit. Highly recommended!

Review: Colombo Chaiwala this tea joint was an experience filled with delightful flavors and a vibrant atmosphere. Their tea varieties are indeed tasty, and their chocolate tea is truly extraordinary, offering a unique taste. You can play carrom. Review:
The Bubble Tea House delivers on the good stuff: friendly service, fair prices, and tasty bubble tea that hits the spot. Finding parking was easy, which is a big win. However, the small space gets loud with staff chatter and the blender, making conversation a challenge.

Overall, it's a good option for bubble tea fans, but some noise reduction would make it a more relaxing hangout.

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: Sadesh Abeysinghe
Review:
I recently visited The Bubble Tea House, and here's my detailed review:

Parking and Accessibility
I was pleased to find ample parking space available, which is always a plus when visiting a busy establishment. It made the whole experience more convenient from the start.

Staff and Service
The staff at The Bubble Tea House were kind and courteous, contributing positively to the overall atmosphere. Their friendly demeanor added to the enjoyment of the visit.

Beverage Quality
The drinks we ordered were flavorful and tasty, living up to the expectations I've had from previous bubble tea experiences. The quality was on par with what I've come to expect from similar establishments.

Ambiance and Noise Levels
One aspect that detracted from the overall experience was the loud chatter among the staff. While it's understandable that evening shifts can be tiring, the noise level was quite distracting. Additionally, the noise from the blender during drink preparation filled the tiny shop, making it difficult to hold a conversation. We had to pause our discussion multiple times due to the high noise levels.

Price
The prices at The Bubble Tea House were reasonable, which is always appreciated, especially for a treat like bubble tea.

Overall
In summary, The Bubble Tea House offers a satisfying bubble tea experience, with courteous staff and reasonable prices. However, there are some areas that need improvement, particularly the noise levels within the shop. I would recommend this establishment to bubble tea enthusiasts but hope that they can address the issues I've mentioned to enhance the overall customer experience.

Review:
Our visit to the tarlton tea shop and cafe was far from pleasant.
We were greeted upon entry by possibly the manager, there was no way of knowing as he promptly sat down and continued a business meeting. There were no other customers in.
I wanted to try a speciality tea, all that was on the menu was a ceylon black tea.
I specifically wanted a light tea, I was advised to go into the shop and see what they suggested. The server had no knowledge of the teas.
Eventually the tea arrived, it had been brewing for so long it had stewed.
Not at all a pleasant experience. So glad we didn't eat here.

Name: Ruk House
Author: Flex-N- Fly
Review: This is a best kept secret cafe and market in Sri Lanka. It's in a neighborhood not far from colombo. I was craving some fresh fruits and a nice atmosphere after my long trip from the south.  I found this beautiful cafe and it's also a small market. Every produce comes straight from their farm. You can have a smoothie, a sandwich, a fruit salad, fresh juices, and also shop some fresh produce. The atmosphere is so relaxing. They have AC. You can do some quick work while you have your lunch.  I did not want to leave here. The owner and his wife were so kind.  They are determined to offer consistent healthy farm to table food to their customers and it was a dream. I highly recommend you stop here for their fresh fruit salad, their famous cheese sandwich, and their fruit juices. It's a must.

Name: Sri Lanka Tea Board
Author: Kanchana Ranasinghe
Review: The Sri Lanka Tea Board (SLTB) is a body owned by the Sri Lankan government established in 1976 to improve and promote tea cultivation, marketing and sales of world famous Sri Lanka tea or “Ceylon Tea”. It works with cultivators, sales people, plantation workers, sales people and distributors and more; the Colpetty main office has a tea sales centre as well as the administrative offices, along the by-road. The SLTB is responsible for monitoring and controlling the quality and purity of tea exported from Sri Lanka, amongst other things. So if you are keen to buy an original pouch of tea, this is the place to go to. You can also get any information on tea in Sri Lanka at this place. There’s parking at the front of the showroom and you can also use roadside parking. Security and other staff are kind and helpful.

Review: In 1976 the Srilanka Tea Board was set-up as the apex regulatory and administrative body of the Sri Lankan Tea industry comprising representatives from both private and government bodies involved in the industry, including cultivators and manufacturers, traders, exporters and plantation employees.
