It's true that the front desk staff when spoken to are very courteous, but they are not at the counter half the time and because the music is loud they can't hear you. You have to walk around finding a staff member and they just leave you alone in the cafe and do their own thing or eat back in the kitchen. I had an offensive experience because of one such kitchen staff and I stopped visiting the outlet after this incident because she didn't even have the common courtesy to apologize to me, she just kept laughing.

Talking about the food, they have further cut down on the veg options which is such a shame. The only tasty thing for a vegetarian there is the polos sandwich which is actually great; the pasta is horrible, just horrible and bland.

Tea is nice as always.

They have replaced the uncomfortable chairs after I once suggested it, which is good, but I won't be really visiting this outlet, unless I REALLY HAVE to, because its kitchen staff screams as if they saw some ghost when they see its customers.

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Sanuka Marasinghe
Review: Tea Avenue Malabe is a great place to relax with a coffee or tea. Spacious seating, plenty of parking, and friendly staff make it a comfortable spot. Good variety of food and drinks too!

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Chandima Mithuni
Review:
I went to tea avenue , kotte on 22/08/2024.
I had a cafe latte small which was rs 940.
I had a tiramisu cake slice which was rs 1250.
The total was rs 2190/-  There were no service charges. The atmosphere was good. Washroom facilities are available.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Mahenn .-.
Review: Tea Avenue captivated me with its serene ambiance and impeccable service. From the moment I stepped in, the aroma of freshly brewed teas enveloped me, creating a tranquil retreat from the bustling city outside. Their extensive menu boasts a delightful array of teas, each served with grace and expertise. I particularly enjoyed their peach tea, a delicate blend that left a lingering floral sweetness on my palate. The staff were knowledgeable and eager to guide me through their offerings, enhancing my experience. Tea Avenue is a haven for tea enthusiasts seeking quality brews in a soothing environment—truly deserving of seven stars. Love the staff!! Absolutely amazing.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Lasith Jayalath
Review: I was looking for a calm place to have a fruit juice while watching some random stuff on you tube. Suddenly I came across this place. I must say it was ideal for what I was searching for. Atmosphere was very calm and clean. You can go upstairs if you want more privacy. There was a room like place on upstairs which is ideal for a group of friends to enjoy some food while not disturbing the others. If you go through their menu without visiting this place, you will feel that the prices are high. But with all the value additions they have done on top of the food experience, it is really worth. But I am bit disappointed with the service, because I had to order and again I had to come to the cashier to collect the food. It is really uncomfortable if you have to carry the food to upstairs. Parking was only sufficient for three vehicles. Anyway the food experience was great.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Oshadie kudagoda
Review:
The place is not too large, but it provides enough space to spend time without getting interrupted. Like in every tea avenue, they offer many food and beverage options. Usually, I enjoy their food, but today I was served some over-fried chips. However, their Latte and Sandwich are good. I highly recommend trying their ginger beer, one of their signature drinks, which is truly amazing.

I also noticed they have a meeting room here, which can be very useful. If you intend to use it, they have mentioned to call and make a reservation in advance.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Dushie Fernando
Review: Ordered waffle with prawn and  creamy sauce or something and ..although it said creamy I didn't see anything creamy 😔. Ordered fish and chips , they served sweet potato chips and it was charred and they served without any problem until we said we can't eat it ..very poor quality.. also ordered tandoori chicken sandwich had only tandoori and no butter or sauce or mayo inside ..very dry .. but the chocolate cake I think ow was mud chocolate cake was good ... Have been to kohuwala tea avenue..the food quality is much better there . This place need improvement

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Chanuka Dinuwan
Review: When compared to other restaurants, this place is quite expensive. However, I had the chicken burger and it was delicious. The presentation of the food was good and the atmosphere was nice. They have a variety of teas including peach tea, but I didn't find the black currant peach tea to be very tasty. If you are a tea lover or are looking for a delicious dinner in a calm environment, this is the place for you.

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Fathima
Review:
There's limited parking available. Tea Avenue offers a solid variety of options to select from. This includes meals, beverages, and desserts. The ambience isn't anything special, and there's average seating space available.

Their pancakes with salted caramel sauce tasted quite average, and the pancakes were dry, which was disappointing.

Salted caramel pancake - 2/5
Chicken Omelette - 4/5
Vanilla Milkshake - 3/5

Customer service - 4/5
Cleanliness - 3.5/5

Although the visit was disappointing, hoping to try other items from them soon. Thank you for your service..!

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Priyanga K
Review:
Not recommended for those looking to enjoy a calm and relaxed atmosphere or for anyone hoping to grab a coffee and focus on their work. The place is congested, with tables set too close together. It’s noisy, and the constant sounds from the blender and coffee machines are more disturbing.
On top of that family discussions with their unattended kids screaming and running around and still the staff kept quiet.
Worst experience!

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Nathasha Wijayarathne
Review:
I really dont recommend this exact branch. I odered a chicken pasta and an ice latte. Ice latte was too watery i had to go twice to the counter to add milk and then sugar.
Then the plate that they served me was had black patches it was unpleasant actually and they served me without a trey.  (It was a very old plate with some dark stains)

I dont recommend to dine in here

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Umm D
Review:
Easily accessible from Dehiwala, Mount Lavinia and the surrounding areas.
The customer service was ok not great.
The interior was average with a few pieces of artwork. It didn’t give me the cozy vibe at all.
We got a portion of Egg Benedicts with Spinach which lacked in flavor, pancake with kithul treacle, classic omelette, Tuna Sandwich (my personal preference, it was excellent) and creamy prawn pasta all tasted great. Try their Tiramisu cake which was heavenly. And they brew quality coffee as well.
Do recommend the food here.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Joanna B
Review: I had a stuffed roti for 100 rupees. I'm pretty sure that that's a tourist price, but I was happy to pay this anyway as that's what I paid everywhere else in Sri Lanka. Really delicious, and the staff are very kind. I will come back again to stock up before setting out on a longer journey.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Jagdeep Dugar
Review:
Tea is good and in Good Qty. They Charge Rs 50 for 80% of filling
and Rs 60, for fully filled.

Fully filled should be 250ml aprox.

I think the 3 wheelers or Tuk Tuk riders take Tea and poll roty in the morning around 9AM. I saw a line of Tuk tuk at that time on this place.

I dint tried poll roty, but Tea was good, in terms of Quality and Quantity.

But ambiance is zero. Smelly inside.
Hygenic can be a problem here.

Opens in the morning by 6 AM and they serve tea till 7.00 pm.
After 7.00, depends on availability.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Krishan Jayakody
Review: Food is okay. Reasonable prices

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Rishard Sheriff
Review: Super POLROTI with KOCHCHI sambola, not excellent in quality but good for an Evening Snack.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Kushan Weeratunge
Review: The Roti Kade... Tasty Hot Roti... Superb Tea...

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31 New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Thusith perera
Review:
Tea Burst at Monarch Imperial offers a delightful culinary experience that tantalizes the taste buds and soothes the soul. Every dish ordered surpassed expectations, boasting exceptional flavors that left a lasting impression. The banana cake, in particular, stood out for its delectable taste, a testament to the skill and craftsmanship of the chefs.

Not only were the food offerings outstanding, but the beverages also met the highest standards. The cappuccino and tea pot delighted the palate with their rich flavors and aromatic profiles, ensuring a satisfying drinking experience.

The staff at Tea Burst epitomize hospitality, displaying warmth and attentiveness at every interaction. Their efficiency in serving orders promptly to the designated areas further enhances the dining experience, allowing guests to enjoy their meals without delay.

The ambiance of the place is serene and environmentally conscious, providing a peaceful retreat for guests to unwind. Watching the rain while nestled in the cozy confines of Tea Burst is a truly blissful experience, adding an extra layer of tranquility to the dining experience.

Overall, Tea Burst at Monarch Imperial is a haven for food enthusiasts seeking exceptional flavors, impeccable service, and a serene atmosphere. It's the perfect destination to indulge in culinary delights while immersing oneself in the beauty of nature.

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31 New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Lakshith Mahagamage
Review:
We visited here expecting that it'll either match the usual experience at Barista or Java Lounge or be better and nothing less. So that was the baseline but what was actually delivered was not upto the expected standard.

1st of all, almost any decent food item would cost on average 900+ and for that we thought okay, it'll at least taste good and the portion would be sizable enough but that was not the case. Chicken Sandwich which was about Rs. 900 was just like 2 piecs of bread with an extremely thin layer of chicken paste. It was not worth 900 at all, and Salmon bun was also just way too small for the price. Basically everything is just overpriced for without any reason. If you charge charge high prices then it should have a higher quality. The sandwiches at 171 Maharagama is so much more tastier than this and it cost about 50% less than this. + The cheap plastic tomato sauce makes the food feel even more  cheaper.

Also, the table we wanted wasn't cleaned so we asked them very politely to clean it and the guy who came and cleaned it just took away the previously used dishes and didn't even bother to wipe the table like they do at most restaurants. It was not a pleasant experience.

Overall we'd rate this place 2/10 and the 2 is only cause of the vibe, it's a nice place if they actually had good food and good service.

Many people have given good ratings, but the honest opinion is that you'd be served much better if you visit a Java Lounge or Barista for the same price. This is not worth it.

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31 New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Dilini Ranasinghe
Review:
Very nice cafe at Monarch Imperial.
Chocolate Croissant was amazing 😍 very soft and chocolate filling and drizzle was just adequate!
Range of ice creams, cakes and ajorteata available as well, with a tea and coffee menu.
Staff is helpful.
Nice and clean.

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31 New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Emali De Silva
Review:
This the Coffee shop at Monarch Imperial.
Really like the interior of this place.
Looks small from out but it’s a great place to chill and sip a coffee.
We had a few snacks and our friend has a chicken lamprais.
The food and drinks were delicious. We will definitely visit this place again.
The restaurant was very well kept, clean and nice.

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31 New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Thilini
Review: This is a perfect cafe to have a hot foamy latte while enjoying a delicious dessert in any evening. Nice cozy environment. Relaxing vibes. I have tried their baked blueberry cheese cake, berry opera cake, passion fruit tart and baked Alaska. All of them were really good. But I also tried their caramel eclair and another dessert which was a banana mouse with a chocolate and peanut covering. They were soggy , wet and Awful. Their chocolate and strawberry milkshakes were also fine. You must visit them once and have that experience 🥳

Name: A+ Tea shop
Address: 4 B 77 L Sigithi Uyana Mawatha, Katunayake
Author: Anita perera

Name: Island Tea Co. & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: Deegayu Rajanayake
Review: good location, good coffee, good music... Perfect place to have a coffee

Name: Kumari Tea Shop
Author: Daniel Douglas
Review: Recommended!

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Joel S
Review:
Good place to have a meeting or hangout. Loved the pure white chocolate ice blend. The ambience is very nice and chill.
We tried their Tandoori Chicken puff and Mushroom puff. Tandoori chicken puff was tasty but the mushroom puff was not so flavourful.
But the food is highly overpriced and therefore is not value for money at all.
Very limited power outlets.
Service was OK.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Farid Baber
Review: We went there to have Coffee and Tea with light snacks. Very nice place to relax and enjoy beverages and drinks. The quality of all items was excellent. The only thing is that you have to go to get your order from the counter. In a leisure place it’s not comfortable to go to get your stuff. Fully recommended for friends and family.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Sheshan Narada
Review:
I recently visited Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves for the first time. The interior of the cafe was pleasing, creating a calm and quiet atmosphere. The comfortable seating arrangements and spacious layout added to the overall cafe vibe. The staff members were decent.

decided to try the caramel latte and the mocha latte, accompanied by an Oreo cheesecake. It was my first experience with an Oreo cheesecake, and I must say, it was absolutely delicious. As for the lattes, the mocha latte didn't quite meet my expectations, as it had an intense chocolate flavor that might be overpowering for some. However, the caramel latte was enjoyable and well-made. It's worth mentioning that the prices at Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves are slightly on the expensive side, with the lattes priced around rs:1000. Cheesecake also around rs:1000.

In conclusion, my overall experience was positive.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Ranudhi Fernando
Review: My favourite cafe out of every other.. no place can satisfy my taste buds like their Ice Blend drinks, one of my favourites being the Cookies & Cream Ice Blend (which is shown in the picture) which they previously had on the menu but not anymore which I got to know by my recent revisit but I tried out their Mocha (added chocolate) Ice Blend which is as good as the cookies and cream flavour therefore it did not disappoint me. I highly recommend trying it out ❤️👍🏼

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Abdul Basith
Review: Good atmosphere. A nice place to hangout with friends. Would recommend if you are a coffee lover😊

Name: 7 tea
Author: Romance C
Review: The best place I experienced in Colombo, I like the peanut butter toast and the strawberry mike shake mostly, the hospitality is really warm!!!

Name: 7 tea
Author: Oma “Charlie” zan
Review: Amazing place to hang out with friends. Ordered the pudding and a bunch more stuff including the bubble tea premium which is by far the best place in this country.

Name: 7 tea
Author: Sithija De Silva
Review: Great place to hang out.... Amazing atmosphere and vibe. Food and beverages are really good. I would highly  recommend this place. Try out their Lychee Iced tea and Cappuccino Frap. I loved it.Thumbs up. I’ll be visiting again. 🕺🏼🕺🏼🕺🏼

Name: 7 tea
Author: Shazwin Nifath
Review: It's little expensive to drink but staff's are very good and friendly.. place was very neat and beautiful.. I've spent a little more time there. ☺️

Name: 7 tea
Author: Sandy chen
Review: Warm welcome from nice host, foods are tasty and unique. I'd premiere milk bubble tea which is superb!!

Name: Tea Avenue - Union Place
Address: Tea Avenue Pvt, 304 Union Pl, Colombo
Author: Varuna Kapuge
Review: Had a great experience at this restaurant! The staff was friendly and attentive, and the food was delicious. We were the only ones in the shop at the time, so it felt like we had the place to ourselves. When we couldn't finish our meal, they kindly wrapped up the leftovers for us to take home. Highly recommended!

Name: Tea Avenue - Union Place
Address: Tea Avenue Pvt, 304 Union Pl, Colombo
Author: Anuradha Fernando
Review: I ordered an ice coffee not the first time and surprisingly they have add a small cup for a delivery’s. When i address this they apologized and send me a free drink for the same size of cup. May be they have misunderstood the issue. Its about the size of the cup. I dont mind spend the price for the ice coffee if you maintain the same size of the cup… anyway thanks for the drink. But i will not ordered again…

Name: Tea Avenue - Union Place
Address: Tea Avenue Pvt, 304 Union Pl, Colombo
Author: Maliya Creations
Review: Best

Name: Tea Avenue - Union Place
Address: Tea Avenue Pvt, 304 Union Pl, Colombo
Author: Disni Kumari
Review: Friendly staff❤️

Name: Tea Avenue - Union Place
Address: Tea Avenue Pvt, 304 Union Pl, Colombo
Author: Muneef Mohammed

Name: Buddy's Tea Shop
Author: kamal karunaratne
Review: Enjoy the best & delicious Milk Tea  & Milk coffee  @ buddy's ...Madiwela

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: r2thebizel
Review: Stunningly decorated the atmosphere is peaceful and welcoming. Excellent service with superb food and smoothies are incredibly tasty. Great place to spend some time.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Hideho
Review:
So many teas to choose from.
Our server took great pride in ensuring that our teas were brewed to perfection.
We purchased several speciality teas to take home.
Not,the cheapest but worth it for the experience.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Pleaxent IM
Review:
Nice experience.
Good custom service.
Nice architecture.
Drinks are tasty but bit in expensive side.
You can buy tea gift boxes in here.

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Oceanman Gurung
Review: Beautiful ambience, nice food and drinks and super wonderful service from the very kind lady Lanka (she made my Club Sandwich so beautifully) and gentleman Chandeepa. They go all out to serve you with lots of joy and patience !!!

Name: t-lounge by Dilmah – Chatham Street ️
Author: Benjamin Mathew (Ben)
Review: Excellent Tea, Excellent experience. A bit expensive catering to a foreign crowd. Excellent service.

Name: Cafe 111 by tea
Author: Sana Sheriff
Review: Perfect

Name: Island Tea Co & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Tea & Food Shop
Author: Kasun Kumarasinghe
Review: Nice place. good food

Name: Sashika Tea Shop
Author: Travel Bro
Review: Best Village experience

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Buddhika Jayawardena
Review:
Not the best experience at this location.

- Service : It used to be a lot better.  No one in the counter spoke. Service used to be more friendly.

-the ground floor area looked clean.  However, the upstairs outdoor area, the slide door doesn't work. How it was opened and closed was a task. They should put some kind of handle if the door does not work or even a sign,

-The upstairs area counter with straws, sugar, and tissues were empty.

-The toilet for men; it did not have a commode seat.  I'm not sure what's going on, if coffee bean is going out of business.

Need some improvement for the price of the products they sell, they need to have some basic facilities.  I hope they do improve their service quality like before and maintain some facilities.  It's a prime location.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Shanila Thirimanne
Review:
Coffee & crossaints and nice place to chill. It's a bit on the expensive side though.

Tandoori pastry is in good overall taste as well. (They had no sauce when I was there)  Again, the price doesn't justify though.

Got a great selection of cheesecakes and pastries. Quite a good ambiance as well.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Lahiru Ellepola
Review: Had to hang out here until we got confirmation on a meeting location. Had a quick coffee before we left. Hot day and the inside was pretty chill. Would visit again.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Love this coffee spot! The cozy atmosphere sets the perfect vibe for work, dates, or relaxation. Their coffee is delicious every time. Highly recommend it for the caffeine lovers!

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: May lorraine Gutierrez
Review:
We used to love coffee/s here even before the pandemic. But lately we noticed that something change on the taste or quality of some beverage/s and pastry. Dont get me wrong but im not saying all..just Some.
Yesterday we had was out of our expectations specially the red velvet cake..kinda dry and seems old for the price of 1k..🤦 Other pastry custard and blueberry danish is all good as well as the swiss roll. Coffee/s 7/10..too sweet.

Ambience/washroom well maintained.
staffs serves well with wide smile. Enough parking when we got there.

Name: Pure Ceylon Black Tea
Author: Omesh Abeysekera
Review: This is some awesome tea right here. Got to try it, for the tea lovers!! Ceylon tea at its best.

Name: Rawatawatte Street tea stall
Author: Nazlin
Review: Cheep and good shop. Evening hoppers and ginger plain tea are well known to customers.

Name: Swashakthi Bakery & Tea Room
Author: Samadara Pahalawaththa Arachchige
Review: Highly recommend this nice and clean place, great customer service nice food and beautiful surroundings. Relaxing place.

Name: Swashakthi Bakery & Tea Room
Author: Tharanga Hewawasam
Review: I recommend this place  highly,  Good and clean food and surround... good friendly staff. Best food, best place for take your lunch , dinner with your loved ones.

Name: Swashakthi Bakery & Tea Room
Author: Tharaka Jayasinghe
Review:
Excellent place for a snack in the area... Love this place... Different types of foods available... You can have your meals with a nice view...
Superb place...

Name: Swashakthi Bakery & Tea Room
Author: Simple Mcq Book
Review: Greate place to visit. Fresh Foods and greate Privacy . Good service

Name: Swashakthi Bakery & Tea Room
Author: prashan nilaksha
Review: Lovely little shop, great atmosphere and friendly service.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Address: 261 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Damisha Bandara
Review: Best place to drink chai tea with real taste in this area... Highly recommend! 👌

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Kavinda Domenico
Review:
Prices are little bit lower than other bubble tea shops💲✅
Quick Service 👍
You can also use credit/debit cards payments💳
There were a good variety of bubble tea🧋
It's better to increase the portion size🆙

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: STS Palmtop Media Network
Review: This ripmoff joint charge separatly for bubbles… exorbitant prices for the tea or cofee on tip of that they charge for bubbles too. Cofee or the tea was also average nothing nice or specia to say.. must not go rip off place…

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Selvaharan Prabuddha
Review: Very fast and delicious milk tea

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Ashirwada Manamudali
Review: Not worth at all

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Ramidu Ranashanka
Review: Tea story is located at One Galle Face mall and their beverages are exceptional. The most important part is the packaging. The cup that they give us comes in handy because it is reusable.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Chamikara Kariyapperuma
Review:
Found this bubble tea spot on the LG floor. Tried the Classic milk tea with blueberry boba. it was a tasty mix. and the prices were fair. However, I wish they had more options available.

The service was okay, but I was disappointed that they didn't ask about sugar levels. Overall, I would say it's worth a visit if you're looking for a decent bubble tea.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: You can select the type of boba you want to add here. The base options are good but it would be great if they had some crushes as well in this hot weather with flavored iced tea. The staff is friendly, but there was a considerable waiting line. No place to sit by which was another draw back. The bubble tea is of good quality and the cup looks cute. But the prices were a bit too expensive

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: S.M.A Angela
Review:
I recently purchased a pineapple orange mix fruit bubble tea from your store, and unfortunately, my experience was quite disappointing. The drink was extremely sweet, to the point where it was almost undrinkable. The excessive sweetness overpowered any natural flavors of the fruit, making it a very unpleasant beverage.

Additionally, the staff's attitude was really poor. They were unhelpful and seemed uninterested in providing good customer service. He acted like we are buying for free, i think extra sweetness was on purpose. This added to the overall negative experience. I hope the sweetness levels can be adjusted in the future, and that staff can be trained to offer better service.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Divyath Fernando
Review: I enjoyed the refreshing bubble tea with its perfect blend of flavours at your store in One Galle Face. The packaging was impressive, and the variety of tea-based drinks offered is fantastic. Prices are reasonable, making it a great value. While the customer service was average, the overall atmosphere was good, creating a pleasant experience. Keep up the great work!

Name: Weliweriya Tea Dena Gedara
Author: madusanka senadeera
Review: Good

Name: Samithu Tea
Address: 591/2, Pitipana south, Kiriwatthuduwa, Pitipana - Thalagala Rd
Author: Thushara Rathnaweera
Review: Quite bad tea experience..

Name: Samithu Tea
Address: 591/2, Pitipana south, Kiriwatthuduwa, Pitipana - Thalagala Rd
Author: Ishara sampath

Author: Tharusha Lakmal
Review: Appa lunumiris pelentiya supiri

Name: Nandani tea kade
Author: Sahan Nishshanka
Review: Good

Name: Sydney Tea Center
Author: Krishna Rajah
Review: My house

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Shabeer Hydrod
Review: Colombo Chaiwala is a fantastic spot for tea lovers! The ambiance is cozy and welcoming, perfect for a casual hangout. They serve a variety of teas, and the flavors are truly authentic and refreshing. I particularly enjoyed their masala chai—it’s rich and aromatic! The snacks complement the drinks well, making it a great place to relax with friends. The staff is friendly and attentive, adding to the overall positive experience. If you're in Colombo and looking for a great place to enjoy some tea, Colombo Chaiwala is definitely worth a visit!

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Mohamed Amhar
Review:
Colombo Chaiwala - A Delightful Tea Experience

I recently visited Colombo Chaiwala and was thoroughly impressed by the experience. This charming tea spot offers a cozy and inviting atmosphere, perfect for enjoying a relaxing cup of chai. The decor is vibrant and welcoming, making it a great place to unwind.

The highlight, of course, is the tea. Colombo Chaiwala serves a variety of chai options, each brewed to perfection. The Tandoori Chai, served in a clay cup, has a bold and spicy flavor that is simply delightful. The Masala Chai is another favorite, with its rich, wholesome taste and just the right amount of sweetness. For those looking for something refreshing, the Sulaimani Tea with mint leaves is a must-try.

In addition to the excellent tea, Colombo Chaiwala offers a selection of delicious snacks. The Beef Samosas are crispy and packed with savory filling, making them a perfect accompaniment to the chai. The Babath Patty, filled with well-curried beef, is another standout item.

The service at Colombo Chaiwala is top-notch. The staff are friendly, accommodating, and always ready to make recommendations. Their dedication to providing a great customer experience is evident in every interaction.

Overall, Colombo Chaiwala is a fantastic place to enjoy a cup of chai and some tasty snacks. Whether you’re a tea enthusiast or just looking for a cozy spot to relax, this place is definitely worth a visit. Highly recommended!

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Kirushanth Shanthiralingam
Review: Colombo Chaiwala this tea joint was an experience filled with delightful flavors and a vibrant atmosphere. Their tea varieties are indeed tasty, and their chocolate tea is truly extraordinary, offering a unique taste. You can play carrom. However, it's worth noting that the prices here are a bit on the higher side.

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Dinindu Jayasekara
Review:
The place offers 3 types of Chai Tea. The tea tastes good and the price is also quite reasonable. Staff is also quite friendly. The place is quite small but has a nice ambiance inside.
However you'll have to wait a bit to get your order

Name: Colombo Chaiwala
Author: Thivanka Tharaka
Review: Tried their thandoori chai and chicken samosas. Chai came in a small clay pot and the taste was really nice! Samosas were fresh and hot. Nice atmosphere with wall arts and decors. A good place to hangout with friends to have a good snack and chai.

Name: THE TEA HUB
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Gayan Dasanayake
Review: Boba bubbles are like rubber balls, not original. Service is good.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Dilruk Kannangara
Review: Please teach your staff girls & ladies are not visiting there to flirt with them. Pretty bad attitude by the staff.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Vasana Gunasekera
Review: Love the chocolate bube tea alot

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Zid S
Review: You have to pay extra 330 rupees for boba bubbles. Tea is tasty.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Sehas Anuththara
Review: I tried a bubble tea from bubbluscious for the first time today. I bought a mango smoothie from the Nugegoda outlet.. It's really tasty than I thought. It has a really amazing taste. It's not too expensive. It's normal. Their customer service is also excellent 👍

Name: M Tea Head Office
Author: Thimathi Silva
Review:
Perfect Tea and friendly place.
It's really feels like a friendly and helpful mart place to get a Great Premium quality tea.
Best Tea product ever.🍃✌💯

Name: M Tea Head Office
Author: Malinda Pinto
Review: Good quality🌱 taste is perfect❤️‍🔥 Higly recommended

Name: M Tea Head Office
Author: Shakila thushan Tharaka
Review: Very delicious Tea ever had 💯🍃☕

Name: M Tea Head Office
Author: Buwaneka Chandrarathne
Review: Highly recommended better than the dust🔥

Name: M Tea Head Office
Author: Mahela chiran
Review: Highly recommended ❤️🔥

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Navin Perera
Review:
* The place is nice with nice people
* Was there somewhat early in the morning and the short eats were fresh (Fish buns were worth the price Rs.50/=)
* Ordered waffles but it was half baked - told them about it and they re-baked, but still came out half baked. Might be a one-off incident but that was a little disappointing
* Has parking space for about 4-5 vehicles
* Nice interior
* 500ml mineral water bottle was sold at Rs.90/= although the marked retail price was Rs. 85/=

UPDATED 03/03/18
* Fish buns were Rs.100/= each (not Rs.50/=)

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Prasadee Jayasuriya
Review: Nice place situated near the main road. Price is reasonable and the food is tasty but the portions are a bit too much for a single person. Had a chicken submarine, a chicken burger and a strawberry bubble tea between 2 ppl. The food was served with spicy crispy onion rings. The food was tasty.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Thivanka Manjula (TMV)
Review: A great place to enjoy a tasty meal to a reasonable price. Do not miss to stop and enjoy if you are traveling towards Colombo on the baseline road.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Kavindu Tennakoon
Review: Tea Blog is managed by some of the nicest people you’ll ever meet. They’re very friendly, and attentive but unfortunately, they took around good 40 minutes to deliver our food and drinks to the table. Tip : Try Ice creams they have uniquely tastes.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Dimith Jayasinghe
Review: Good food and drinks. not too expensive

Name: Tea Breeze Cafe at Beira Lake
Author: Waruna Gomis
Review:
Probably when this place started it was very chic. However the place in 2019 appears morbid and unkept. The place is dusty, unmaintained and unserviced.

Need for a place like this in the context 5/5
Ambience 3/5
Cleanliness of interior 1/5
Selection of food 2/5
Presentation of food 1/5
Service 2/5
Maintenance of interior 1/5
Cleanliness and amenities in toilet 1/5

I think the owner should make a visit and ask him)her self the question if they would come and sit here proudly.

Name: Tea Breeze Cafe at Beira Lake
Author: Asitha Goonewardena
Review:
This was a nice place to hangout few years ago. I used to walk to this place many times and relax with the service and the ambiance. Gradually they started to cut down the quality First gone the A/C and open the doors filling with dust all over and with lesser choices ...

Have not gone this place after they lower the standards.

I hope the owners would take a good look at the place and try to improve all around.

Name: Tea Breeze Cafe at Beira Lake
Author: Mohan Seneviratne
Review: The tea is perfect. But far too expensive. They charged me 450 LKR for a pot and since I was alone it was far too much for a cup of tea. Their Tuna sandwiches are delectable and well worth trying out.

Name: Tea Breeze Cafe at Beira Lake
Author: sachintha peiris
Review: They make really good impressive black tea which is great with milk and sugar ( and carry a fascinating range ) but they don't always have snacks which is a shame.

Name: Tea Breeze Cafe at Beira Lake
Author: veronica perera
Review:
The waiter who served me was  rude.not friendly.
And those days the waiters are nice and they were flexible with what they serve.
At this moment I am here and I just put the order.
The flexible way they used to cater cusotmer requirement those days were not visible.
:(

Name: Kalubowitiyana Tea Shop
Author: SNV EvENTS - Colombo
Review: Newly opened Tea Shop located infront of Wickramasinhapura. Recommend.

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sure Ma
Review: Highly recommended for best tea collection and spices. Loved the shop. Got some high quality organic spices such as white pepper, curry powder, chili powder, turmeric and others. Tried some the spices before purchasing. Also got the best grade of freshly packed cinnamon sticks. Dylan was so knowledgeable and honest.

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: ar sagor
Review: It was a great experience to been there. Different kinds of tea leaves are available in this place directly from factory. Sales uncle's were great. Overall the place and it's vibe was a superb.

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Purusoth
Review: Excellent customer service and nicely arranged shop. They have their own brand with different flavours. Further strong, mild and green tea also available. You can taste the sample also.  No parking available. Don’t forget to ask the discount 😜

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: fi marshall
Review: Dillan gave us a great lesson in tea, culture and even suggested amazing places to visit in Sri Lanka! The teas were delicious and I've learnt a lot, and bought some great stuff to take home. Bohoma sthuthi!

Name: Ceylon Tea Gate
Address: Glen aber place, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Shizi Jay
Review: Discovering Ceylon Tea Gate was an absolute delight! Introduced by a friend, I was treated to a memorable tea tasting experience unlike any other. As a fervent aficionado of authentic Ceylon black tea, I was pleasantly surprised to also indulge in the rarity of white tea. The staff exuded warmth and hospitality, ensuring every moment was enjoyable. What truly impressed me was their meticulous attention to preserving the freshness of the tea leaves, from packaging to serving. Without hesitation, I wholeheartedly recommend Ceylon Tea Gate to fellow tea enthusiasts seeking an exquisite journey through the world of fine teas. Kudos to Ceylon Tea Gate :)

Name: Serendiva Tea House & Boutique
Author: Ishard Majeed
Review: Good and nicest tea centre in Sri Lanka

Name: Serendiva Tea House & Boutique
Author: Mohiyadeen Ismail
Review: Super collection of teas of high quality

Name: Serendiva Tea House & Boutique
Author: Disala Sondapperuma
Review: Great variety of tea.

Name: Serendiva Tea House & Boutique
Author: Syed Mohammed Ali
Review: Very nice place

Name: Serendiva Tea House & Boutique
Author: Andrey L
Review: Permanently closed

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Anastasia Niveus
Review: Very nice place with friendly staff. The tea is natural, without any strange additives. We came here 3 times during our trip to Sri Lanka, tried almost the entire menu, all positions are worthy and suitable for different people. There are both milk teas and fruit teas. I highly recommend visiting this place :)

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Kero Chan
Review: We enjoyed both the 'KARUTHA COLUMBAN' & KITHUL HAKURU DAYDREAM very much. Staff made them with less sugar so it was not too sweet and would not make you thirsty afterwards.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Tharanee K Chandran
Review:
Tea Tang at One Galle Face Mall offers a delightful bubble tea experience. The Wattalappan bubble tea stood out with its rich flavors, chewy tapioca pearls, and crunchy cashews, making it a top-notch choice. In contrast, the Tin Milk bubble tea fell short of expectations, lacking the same depth of flavor.

The shop also features an impressive selection of export-grade teas, with 100g packs priced at Rs 1980, allowing customers to smell various fragrances before purchase. Currently, they have a promotion of any two bubble teas for Rs 1500, providing us a savings of Rs 600, making it a great deal for tea lovers.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Katie
Review: Great bubble tea! It was clean and that view of tea estates really brightened up my bubble tea experience! Will go there more often! Was my first time there last week, wished i visited there sooner.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Homoud Alhajri, PMP, RMP
Review: Tea Tang, nestled in the heart of the city, is a haven for tea enthusiasts seeking delightful concoctions. Offering an array of amazing drinks, from classic brews to innovative blends, it caters to diverse palates. Mr. Kumara and Miss Kasuni epitomize exceptional customer service, with their warmth and attentiveness enhancing the overall experience. Whether it's a refreshing iced tea or a soothing hot brew, patrons are treated to unparalleled quality and hospitality. Step into Tea Tang to indulge in a journey of flavors, guided by the expertise of its dedicated staff.

Name: Blue Field Tea Center
Author: Isabel Duggan
Review: Recommend this as a stop off. We did a tour of the factory which was very informative and interesting. Our tour guide, nathmini, was incredible and very knowledgeable. We enjoyed a tea and pastries in the cafe as well.

Name: Blue Field Tea Center
Author: Dulanjana Piyumantha
Review: This is not a busy place and lot of foreigners are visiting. Lot of varieties of Sri Lankan tea with different flavors are available. There is a tea lounge and nice place for enjoy a tea

Name: Blue Field Tea Center
Author: Summer L
Review: The place to get top grade tea that don’t use flavoring. Bergamot flowers floating in my cup of Earl grey tea is a beautiful experience. The staff are very experience in explaining the different grades of tea and how the altitude produce different types of tea aroma and taste.

Name: Blue Field Tea Center
Author: Riadh Taher
Review: Place is good, it's like same place in novara aliya, you can buy everything even if you dont go to novara aliya, and there is nice gentilman who knows about tea and history of tea and explains in simple and nice way😊

Name: Blue Field Tea Center
Author: Ramith Antony
Review: Exotic collection of teas(white,green,black) at affordable prices. Tea sourced from shop owned world class estates near Nuwara Eliya. Sri Lankan hospitality and quality at its best.

Name: R&D & Tea
Address: City Centre, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Lan Lili
Review: Bad quality tea.  The price is very high.  But the quality is so bad.  Has varieties of tea.  Infusions are ok.  Pure flowers are ok but you can buy the same through online with half the price.  They sell matcha too.  Very bad quality.  Worse I have ever tasted.  Very dissapointed.  They don't seem to know what good quality tea is.  If you want to show off buying expensive tea, this is the place.  But you will not experience the taste of a good tea.

Name: R&D & Tea
Address: City Centre, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Mohammed
Review: Good tea shop but maybe the price is little bet high

Name: R&D & Tea
Address: City Centre, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Abhay Powle
Review: Overpriced products. There are better products for much less in most places

Name: R&D & Tea
Address: City Centre, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Amalan Meganathan
Review: Good tea shop

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Ryley Barbe
Review: "My stay at TeaTalk Hotel was absolutely delightful. The ambiance was warm and cozy, making it the perfect place to relax. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, always ensuring that I had everything I needed. The rooms were clean and comfortable, and the tea selection was a fantastic touch. I highly recommend TeaTalk Hotel for anyone looking for a peaceful and enjoyable stay!"

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Z N
Review:
Two stars only because the room was clean, and staff and security guard were friendly, but the bed sheets were torn.
The side mirrors of our car were stolen while we were parked on their driveway, the CCTV cameras don’t work and the manager never even contacted us. The lack of courtesy is really disappointing.

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Sanura Naveen
Review: Place really nice with great staff. Room are extremely worth the price (don’t expect 5 star quality rooms but for the price they are awesome clean and nice I hope they will do a bit of renovations soon to level up the overall quality of the room). They have a limited but superb food that I think you must try.

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Rohan Dahale
Review: Wonderful place to stay, nice helping service offered!

Name: TeaTalk
Author: Asmi Baig
Review: It's a beautiful cafe plus restaurant I just visit that yesterday that was awesome experience 🙂.the food and the environment ambiance amazing 😍.it's very peaceful place and home like feeling.they have Pakistani food like famous Nihari,kata kat,Haleem,sweet dish kheer and so many other things which r hard to find in Srilanka food pace.And the Restaurant name that is emerged in Cafe is " Kafe Karachi"....

Name: Tea pot
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Tea Burst
Address: 31A New Hospital Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Hendricks Tea
Author: sahan Derulo
Review: Best place to buy BOPF tea in colombo city. All are in export quality.

Name: Hendricks Tea
Author: Saniru Randiv Perera
Review: Best green tea i've ever had. And very good friendly service too. I ve hot some products delivered and the service is so good. Highly recommended ✨️

Name: Hendricks Tea
Author: Nishanthi Gamage
Review: One of the best 👍 in  Sri Lanka🌹🌹

Name: Hendricks Tea
Author: newcastletea
Review: Hendricks owned tea factory at kandy and produced tea by them in the past.

Name: Hendricks Tea
Author: Jayantha Jude
Review: Very good taste.

Name: Tea Talk Office
Author: Gihan Pasindu Bandara
Review: My Working Place & Giving Super Service.

Name: Tea Talk Office
Author: Jagadeesan Thangaraj
Review: Onwer of chamara

Name: R&D&TEA
Address: One Galle Face Mall Shangri-La, Galle Rd, Colombo
Author: Maria Fernando
Review: Rude customer service. We were interested in buying some tea and we were asked to leave the pram outside with the baby. The woman either has no kids or has some serious mental health issues. Get rid of her! She will only drive your customers away.

Name: R&D&TEA
Address: One Galle Face Mall Shangri-La, Galle Rd, Colombo
Author: Kesavanth De Silva
Review:
The lady at the service desk was beyond horrible. We wanted to buy some tea for our mates overseas, but immediately walked out as she asked to leave my baby outside the shop in the pram! What kind of idiot asks a parent to leave their baby outside!

You have to fire here, else you'll loose potential customers.

Lol didn't get a chance to try the tea out due to the unpleasantness. So unprofessional and lackluster customer service.

Name: R&D&TEA
Address: One Galle Face Mall Shangri-La, Galle Rd, Colombo
Author: Bala SMJ
Review: Thanks to Lanka, who works here, I have decided to drink more tea hereafter. Bought Oolong, Full Moon and Orange Beko. Have the option to buy 25 grams, which gives you the chance to purchase more varieties and decide your favourite.

Name: R&D&TEA
Address: One Galle Face Mall Shangri-La, Galle Rd, Colombo
Author: Елизавета Эксфрон
Review: Fire this unpleasant woman, or all customers will run away, as we did

Name: R&D&TEA
Address: One Galle Face Mall Shangri-La, Galle Rd, Colombo
Author: Abhay Powle
Review: Poor quality products, staff was even worse

Name: Mlesna Tea Kiosk - Libery Plaza
Address: 250 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Jude Motha
Review:
This tiny tea centre located on the Ground Floor in the middle of Liberty Plaza is simply heaven for tea lovers.

Their staff are extremely supportive and easy to deal with .

Wish there were more outlets . Highly recommended.

Name: Mlesna Tea Kiosk - Libery Plaza
Address: 250 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Ramesh Gan
Review: Great tea selection. Slightly more affordable than other Mlesna places, since you dont overpay for the packaging. This is the Mlesna store right by the entrance (there are two in LP).

Name: Mlesna Tea Kiosk - Libery Plaza
Address: 250 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Maged Abidou
Review:
They have two shops inside same mall. One for tea bags and the other one for loose tea.
Quality and varieties are amazing.
They are closing by 6:00 pm.

Name: Mlesna Tea Kiosk - Libery Plaza
Address: 250 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chamara Jayasinghe
Review: It has wide variety of ceylon loose leaf tea packets. Quantity and good customers service.

Name: Mlesna Tea Kiosk - Libery Plaza
Address: 250 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Brian
Review: It was friendly, but it was disappointing that there were no discounts even though we purchased a large quantity with 5 or more people visiting. Cost-effective compared to Besilur. Unlike other black tea brands, it is closed on Sundays, so be careful when using the remaining rupees. (I had no choice but to buy it at the airport, but it was expensive... very expensive... but they accepted it at the airport store. Compared to other black tea brands, most of the store employees [female] I can't help but feel that they are kind, so I am satisfied^^)

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Chishimba Simutowe
Review: Had I not just visited an amazing teach lounge prior to my visit at Longden I probably would have given this place four stars. I felt as though it was ok but way too overpriced for what they offer. The tea and the meal I ordered weren't anything out of the ordinary, the customer service was alright and the building's interior was just ok. I doubt you'd be disappointed if you go here but expect to spend a pretty penny.

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Aadil Fawme
Review: This is a cosy, family run business. Sometimes there's a friendly aunty at the shop who happily makes you tea or coffee and sometimes her husband is there, great person to ask directions from. The place is also convenient with ample parking space and easy access to all major roads. Visit them! And don't forget to smile because they definitely will :)

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: abheeth kotelawala
Review: Eat access, with a big car park

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Sadun Nalaka
Review: Good ☕ shop

Name: Longden Tea House
Author: Sisira Dissanayake
Review: Fantastic

Name: Tea Triumph
Address: 40/1A Joseph's Lane, R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: skaman Pohls
Review: 10/10 on service and quality, the guy knew everything and answered all our questions with such knowledgeable and valuable information. We purchased and when leaving they guy said make sure to stop by for a cup of tea before we leave. We took about 5 steps then realized we could spend more time and enjoy tea tastings. We of course stayed for a while and purchased more tea because of his generosity 😁

Name: Tea Triumph
Address: 40/1A Joseph's Lane, R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Pratibha Sajay
Review:
Tasted some best teas when I visited this curio shop last week in Colombo.
I realised how good tea tastes without milk & sugar.

If you are around do visit they have good customer service as well , they give you sample of different tea flavours and explain yhe process of tea leaves sampling & tea powder processing.

And marine drive outside has stunning view as well

Name: Tea Triumph
Address: 40/1A Joseph's Lane, R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Felix Sonntag
Review: Great experience! The owners were super friendly and really knowledgeable about their teas. I got to try a few different teas, and some of them were amazing (I loved their Oolong). Definitely a recommendation if you're looking to buy Ceylon tea!

Name: Tea Triumph
Address: 40/1A Joseph's Lane, R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Jassim Almoamen
Review: The best tea and spice centre. Lovely taste and friendly staffs.

Name: Tea Triumph
Address: 40/1A Joseph's Lane, R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Royce
Review: Great owners, gave us a nice history about the teas. Unfortunately we're not the type to buy a large array of goods before we even started our journey through Sri Lanka but we gladly sipped away with our teas. If you're on a Tuk Tuk Safari you'll probably come across a place like this. Hopefully Bob Marley will be with you too!

Name: Tea hut
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Hasi HANNAH
Review:
Got their crème brûlée milk tea and it tasted pretty good . But it’s a bit too pricey but I won’t complain. I got the medium for 1700/- and the large was 2200/-  It’s quite similar to the one I tasted in china.  And the tapioca pearls were of good quality well. I would rate the drink 9/10.

The space  was a bit small but  it wasn’t crowded when I visited . Could accommodate 10-15 ppl. The lady who made the tea did a good job but I wish it was a bit more  cold.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: s e s h a
Review:
I happened to be walking past this place so thought I’d go in and order a bubble tea.  Then I noticed they didn’t have a single bubble tea flavor that I wanted.  It’s kind of strange that a bubble tea shop doesn’t have the basic Mango bubble tea or Lychee bubble tea. They had a Mango pudding bubble tea which was a bit strange to me.  Don’t expect to find your normal fruit flavored bubble teas here, you won’t find them.

There are two Chinese people working here (I think they own it) and they do not speak a single word of English.  So they hired a Sri Lankan girl to work there and she couldn’t answer anything about the bubble tea, but that was her second day of work so I cannot blame her.  This place is probably catering to all the Chinese people either visiting or working in Colombo.

I actually felt bad for them so I ordered a medium lime juice and it was just OK and pretty weak flavored lime juice.  How can you not make a good lime juice in SL? The guy squeezed a fresh lime but probably should have added more lime juice because it was watered down.  I will not be going back to this place again.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Krishanthi Seneviratne
Review: It was more than I expected, actually. Love the menu a lot. Genuine Chinese  bobo tea u gotta  try this place for sure. They have a unique  menu  for them, especially.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chalani Peiris
Review: Ordered their Milo and caramel bobo teas. They didn’t taste good. The sugar inside the caramel one was not even mixed properly and with every sip we had sugar crystals in our mouth. The Milo one didn’t even taste like a Milo bubble tea and it tasted like it’s made for a diabetic patient. Not recommending.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Geeth Rajive
Review:
Worst customer service, worst bubble tea ever. Not humble even to listen to customer suggestions. So expensive and not worth,
If they say a suggestion, they always say that it is the way the Chinese like it.We bought a Milo.  Milo is like totaly water.  There was no Milo flavor at all.  We are not usually people who add sugar to Milo.  When I asked to leave a spoonful of Milo because the taste of the Milo was less, they said that they would charge for it.  Think how  worst the custom service is. please dont visit.

Name: Tea Breeze - Mackwood Fine Tea
Author: Mortada Darweesh
Review: I order Mackwoods tea from the website Order #R130383417 on March 19, 2022. Until now I did not receive my order. I called them three 3  times and the guy answered me promised to ship my order next week in every call. Now  nobody answering my calls.

Name: Tea Breeze - Mackwood Fine Tea
Author: Tiba Ponnuthurai
Review: I think it must’ve shut down, seemed deserted

Name: My Tea Shop
Author: Milhan Mawahim (Krakteego)
Review: A very peaceful environment. The owner is great. A good buddy with polite customer service. Me & my friends visit this place by weekly as a bike ride from Colombo to here. It's all just to forget all the work pressure, depressions in our life and basically to have a chill day by sitting around outside the beach table with having some snacks, Tea and cigarettes. Totally worth it for the day. A great place.

Name: My Tea Shop
Author: Tharake Timothy
Review: Good shorteats with tea. Good beach and sea view

Name: My Tea Shop
Author: janith srimal
Review: Small and Nice place to have a drink tea and rolls.

Name: My Tea Shop
Author: Padmasiri Fernando
Review: Good place for a tasty tea with rotty for travellers on the root

Name: My Tea Shop
Author: janni dinith
Review: Good and Warm Street food. With a good sight of the ocean...👏

Name: Basilur Tea Gallery - CCC
Address: No.137 Sri, Sir James Pieris Mawatha
Author: Fathima Zainab
Review:
10th October 2024 I visited basilur at ccc. No one is on the counter no board saying that he's going out.
Security told me he went for breakfast.
City centre itself opens at 10 a.m, why can't the person eat before that and come to work.
Then I left to other shops till this person comes. After 30 minutes when I was returning again this person is leaving the tea shop this time with a board saying il be in 10 minutes with a phone number. 🤣🤣
Good time I called him back purchased my tea and left. The person working has to be changed or tell him to follow some rules.
There's more to add but this is enough for now

Name: Basilur Tea Gallery - CCC
Address: No.137 Sri, Sir James Pieris Mawatha
Author: Raqeeb Rifkhan
Review: I've been standing for almost 45 min. But no one was available. A board to mention gone for dinner etc. would've been helpful

Name: Basilur Tea Gallery - CCC
Address: No.137 Sri, Sir James Pieris Mawatha
Author: Lenny
Review: My only comment is that the locals told me to go to the Tea Board as they are less expensive than a shop in a mall.

Name: Basilur Tea Gallery - CCC
Address: No.137 Sri, Sir James Pieris Mawatha
Author: Jagath Wickramasuriya
Review: It is a place where foreign tourists can buy local teas, in particular.

Name: Basilur Tea Gallery - CCC
Address: No.137 Sri, Sir James Pieris Mawatha
Author: Shavani Nishadi
Review: Cream fantasy is the best 👌👌

Name: Tea Excellence by Bogawantalawa
Author: Nuzy Zavahir
Review: Small yet cozy tea shop with a variety of collection. The ambience and the staff are super friendly. Good place to do some gift shopping.

Name: Tea Excellence by Bogawantalawa
Author: Manjula Gunawardane
Review: Loved the little place. Small but fine selection of quality tea.

Name: Tea Excellence by Bogawantalawa
Author: Charith Mallawaarachchi
Review: Have a good selection for gifts. Don't forget to mention if you need tea bags or loose packs.

Name: Tea Excellence by Bogawantalawa
Author: varuna chandrasekara
Review: Reasonable prices and good quality tea.

Name: Tea Excellence by Bogawantalawa
Author: T Liyanage
Review: Small collection of Bogawantalawa tea. Mostly lose tea with a few tea bags. No big selection for gifts unfortunately.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: oshitha viraj
Review: Hidden places! Near to arcade. Nice atmosphere also please has a old London vibe as you can see in the pictures also hase a outdoor option and indoor option you could work in here if you like a quiet environment.. we go on weekends and there no Rush good for quick bit. Unfortunately they don't serve any food like rice or burger 🍔. But there have good various chees cake like sweet items.. they is packing space available.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Dhinesh Sarma
Review:
One of the good place to Visit. Place is very calm, silent, spacious, no disturbance.
Can spend hours of time with friends and couples. Staffs are very friendly. They have variety of drinks, food and snacks.

They have separate outdoor for smokers as well. Really recommend. Go and explore it.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: dnel
Review:
Quiet place for good coffee
There is a meeting room equipped with a projector you can book as well.
Love their club sandwich and hot chocolate

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Shenika Senavirathna
Review: The interior and the environment is sooo good. A nice place to work and spend time with friends and family. But the quality of food isn't satisfying. I had a frappachino. But it was not creamy at all. And an egg puff as well. It was so thin. I guess it cost around 500 something. I don't think both are worthy of that price. Anyways a nice place where no one feels it's a place in Colombo. The greeny environment 💚 also environment is luxury looking.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Archchana Ganeshalingam
Review: Didn't have much options. When we visited they said they have only egg and sausage items and on that day specifically they had a shortage of eggs too. So we had to come back without having anything. The atmosphere seemed good though. Would love to try another day.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Darsha Fonseka
Review: I recently visited this place drawn by its cozy ambiance and stylish decor, which made it a great spot to relax. However, the cookie cake I ordered was a huge disappointment—tiny, rock hard, and incredibly dry. It was so tough, they might as well have served it with a hammer instead of a fork. For the high price, I expected much better quality. While the ambiance is lovely, I’d recommend sticking to the coffee and skipping the desserts.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: rifath huzair
Review: My experience at Department of Coffee was great! From the beginning the staff was friendly and professional, the food was great! Standout is their coffee! They have a book corner, co-working spaces and meeting rooms in addition to the cafe area. If you are looking for a cozy area with all these facilities and a great service. Department of Coffee might be the place for you.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Nanshad Daruwalla
Review:
We visited the Department of Coffee on a beautiful and peaceful Sunday, eager to experience what this well-located café, opposite the race course in Colombo, had to offer. The ambiance was fresh and inviting, making it a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy a leisurely meal.

We started with the pulled pork and apple sandwich, which was an absolute delight. The sandwich was bursting with flavor, combining the tender, juicy pulled pork with the crisp sweetness of the apple. The contrast of textures and flavors was perfectly balanced, making each bite a treat. The bread was fresh and complemented the filling beautifully, making this sandwich a standout item on the menu.

Next, we tried the Bacon Hash. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to the expectations set by the sandwich. While it was satisfactory, it lacked the robust flavor and seasoning one might hope for. The dish could have benefited from a bit more seasoning to bring out the flavors of the bacon and potatoes.

For drinks, we ordered an iced hazelnut latte, which was refreshing and well-made. The hazelnut flavor was pronounced without being overwhelming, and the coffee itself was smooth and satisfying.

The total cost for these three items came to 6800

Overall, the Department of Coffee offers a pleasant dining experience with some standout items on the menu. The ambiance and prime location add to its charm, making it a place worth visiting, especially for their delicious pulled pork and apple sandwich.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Sachin Thiwanka
Review: Fantastic place for brunch, lunch, breakfast, and even just grabbing a snack and a cup of coffee. Without a doubt, the food and drinks were superb. somewhat pricey, but you may still enjoy a nice meal for the money. Have plenty of parking available. Additionally, they provide settings and private rooms for anything you require separately.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Rimzan Zuhair
Review:
Department of Coffee in Colombo is a great spot to enjoy a coffee or sweet treat, with a variety of cakes, sandwiches, burgers, and snacks available. The cafe also features a cozy little library, perfect for reading while sipping on your coffee. Additionally, they offer a private room that can be pre-booked for meetings or similar gatherings.

Located right opposite the Racecourse, it's a convenient place to grab a snack or coffee. While it can get a bit crowded during weekends, there’s parking available. It's an excellent spot for working on your laptop, meeting up with friends, or holding meetings.

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Ranawaka Chiranjaya
Review: Venturing into this restaurant for a two-day lunch break turned out to be a delightful surprise. my wife and I chose this restaurant for a two-day lunch stint, coinciding with an exam visit. The experience was beyond satisfying—impeccable service paired with delightful meals made it a standout choice. It's more than just a place to eat; it's an oasis of culinary delight and comfort. Certainly I recommending it to anyone in search of a brief escape with excellent food!"

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Dananjaya Madushanka
Review: Not friendly stuff..I asked some favor on my food and they said they can’t doo that.. also the tea is not hot & not taste.. location is good and have nice vibe…clean and relaxed place

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Rosita Hofman
Review: Jeem was very friendly and helpful and even gave us tips for our vacation! Food an drinks were also nice!

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Ali Shaah saiboni
Review: The place was nice and cozy, best place to stop for a coffee before going to airport, parking is available, I loved the taste of the expresso and cappuccino, ice coffee and many more available with snacks, entry to wheel chair available

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Yasitha Anuranga
Review: Coffee and the environment is very good. But cake items are little bit less quality. Btw altogether good  experience there

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Purusoth
Review: Very calm surrounding and live light music in the evenings.  We had a beer 🍺. It is a superb place to have beer peacefully. Service is too good. Reasonable prices too. Limited parking available. Overall experience is feel good

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Gayani Thewa
Review: Today visit this nice place at cinnamon Grand. Love the place music, food and vibe. Perfect place to send some times with your family or friends. Prices also reasonable. Highly recommend this place try it out.

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Indushika Anjanee
Review: An ideal place to relax with a good drink and some delicious snacks. You can get some work done too as they have a couple of power outlets around. The food items are fresh and tasty and worth the price. Customer service is top-notch.

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Praveena Easu
Review: Oshan was real good at customer service. And I was at the Coffee Stop solely for their blueberry cheesecake, they had resumed serving it again after a short break ;)

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Firoze Mistry
Review:
Probably one of the best Coffee Shops in town.

Located just at the entrance of the Cinnamon Grand Hotel this is a Coffee Shops visited by most. It has a range of snacks and sandwiches that one can choose from, probably the best is their prawn roll. The coffee although has dropped a bit in standards.

The service is friendly and swift. Overall a good place to visit.

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Ahmad Dawaheer
Review:
I visited Peppermint Cafe some time ago, and although I can't recall the exact date, recently coming across photos in my gallery brought back all the great memories of my meal there.

I remember the taste so vividly that I felt compelled to finally give them the review they deserve.

The food was nothing short of exceptional. I had a fantastic meal, including crispy, perfectly seasoned fries topped with tender fried chicken, and their delicious, generously sized burger. Each dish was so flavorful that it’s stayed with me long after my visit.

The balance of textures and flavors was spot-on, and the presentation made the dishes even more enticing.The drinks were also memorable.

I tried their mojitos and a refreshing lime cooler – both were exactly what I needed to accompany the rich food. Everything was prepared with such care, and you could tell that only high-quality ingredients were used.Although it’s been a while, I still remember the friendly and welcoming staff who made the experience even more enjoyable.

The cafe’s ambiance was cozy and inviting, perfect for relaxing and enjoying a good meal. Plus, the location was ideal – tucked away just enough to create a peaceful atmosphere while still being easily accessible.

I'm glad I stumbled upon those photos, as it reminded me of just how great my experience was at Peppermint Cafe.

It’s a place I’d definitely recommend to anyone looking for delicious food, great service, and a pleasant environment.

I’ll be sure to return whenever I’m nearby again!

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Sachintha Kumarasinghe
Review: The food is tasty and well-prepared. I tried the Oreo shake and KitKat shake; they are absolutely good and worth it. I've tried different shops for these shakes, but none of them are as good. The only downside is that this place is too hot with no air conditioning.

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Hasara Liyanage
Review:
My visit to this place is on 29th June 2024. This is opened 24 hours so I went early morning for breakfast.

There are a lot of seating arrangements. There’s a separate area for around 10 people to dine in easily.

They have a QR code which you can scan and access the menu.

The food tasted good but I felt didn’t value for money.

Service is good. You have to go to the cashier to order. If you don’t go for long they might come to you. 😝

There’s a slider and you might enjoy the kid within yourself.

Washroom is with tissues, hand wash. The water is working. But the commode seat isn’t clean. 😣

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Shehani Galliyadda
Review: A huge thank you to Peppermint Café for the best service we've received so far! The customer service was superb, and the food was both excellent and amazing. From ordering to serving, everything was quick and efficient. We needed to do some quick office work, and the staff went above and beyond by providing a lounge area where we could attend our meeting and plug in our laptops. The support we received was outstanding. We'll never forget the time we spent there—thank you, Peppermint Café!

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Hirushan Jayasooriya
Review: We went there for lunch and had mushroom pasta, El mexicano chicken rice and plain tea. The Mushroom pasta is really delicious and highly recommended. The El mexicano is yummy but I would say its portion is not enough for the price. The vibe is good except for the crows. The staff is supportive and friendly. Can be recommended.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Thakshila Dayarathna
Review: I went there for my breakfast. Staff was really good. They welcome customers very nicely. Place also very calm and peaceful. Delicious foods as always. I bought caramel macchiato and tuna and cucumber sandwich. The place was amazing.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: _booking_with _jera
Review:
Orion City’s Barista is a hidden gem within the bustling tower complex, offering a perfect retreat for coffee lovers and professionals alike. This cozy café provides a warm and inviting atmosphere, making it an ideal spot for a morning coffee, a quick bite, or even a casual meeting.

The quality of the coffee is exceptional, with a rich selection of brews that cater to all tastes. Whether you prefer a strong espresso or a creamy latte, the baristas here have mastered the art of crafting the perfect cup. The pastries and snacks are equally delightful, providing the perfect complement to your drink.

In addition to the great coffee, the location within Orion City adds to its charm. Being surrounded by offices, shops, and other amenities makes it a convenient stop for both workers and visitors. It’s a place where you can take a break from the hustle and bustle of the city, enjoy a relaxing drink, and recharge for the rest of your day.

Overall, Orion City Barista is a must-visit for anyone in the area. The combination of excellent coffee, friendly service, and a comfortable setting makes it a standout spot within Orion City.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chanuka Nadun
Review:
Barista Orion City is one of the nicest-looking outlets in the franchise, featuring a stylish and inviting atmosphere. The service is consistently excellent, and the food is always up to standard.

Whether you’re stopping by for a coffee break or a casual meal, this branch provides a delightful experience every time. It’s a standout location for enjoying a great cup of coffee and a pleasant ambiance

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Amalan Dhananjayan (Batzee)
Review:
Pretty Cosy coffee shop. Nice Ambiance.
We had hot chocolate and tried their new Cheese Garlic bread. They are both good.

When we were ordering a big crowd of people were ordering and they had around 12 orders before us. But they were working quickly and efficiently and got our order within 15 minutes which is great.

The frape collection called Sweet Tronado looked great. Did not try but they are reasonably priced.

They have other food items including lunch options.

The only complaint is that the hot chocolate has lost most of its heat due to their AC quickly. But that's fine.

Glad to have them back at the same location where they were 2 years before.

Coffee prices are on Average.
Have good seating and shared parking with Pizza hut at the street.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Heshan Rajapaksha
Review: Nice place to chill out with a date, friends or family. The food is really good, the service is really good, and the staff always welcomes the guests. The prices are somewhat expensive but that is expected from such a place. Overall I recommend this place, at least for the overall ambience.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Reshan Chathuranga
Review:
Delicious Food and Relaxed Atmosphere.

This is an incredible place to hang out and enjoy a meal. The ambiance is fantastic. it's chilled, clean, modern, and well-maintained. The restaurant has a really relaxed vibe.

The food and beverages were great. The chicken and cheese waffle was absolutely delicious, one of the best I've had in Colombo.

While the service wasn't really attentive, it was still good. You have to order from the counter, and the food arrives promptly. The prices were a bit high but justified by the quality.

I can easily recommend this place to anyone looking to hang out and enjoy a drink or meal.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Oshitha Narangoda
Review: Easily one of the best places to meet your friends and catch up or work in solitude. The place offers freshly brewed coffee and good food (though I always prefer the coffee more!). Also, the cafe is near my home, so it's an added bonus.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Nuwan Fernando
Review: Coffee Manor is a very nice and a cossy restaurant. I really love their calm and pleasant vibe. Good for group hangouts, family outings and for wfh setups as well. Food is delicious and love their hospitality. Staff is really friendly and supportive and they have parking available for around 10 vehicles and can use the by road as well.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Pesala Jayasuriya
Review:
I've become a regular at The Coffee Manor in Nawala, and it never ceases to amaze me. Every visit is a new experience filled with familiar comforts. Nestled conveniently close to the Nawala junction, this cafe offers ample parking space for more than 6 vehicles, making it hassle-free to stop by even during busy hours.

From the moment you step inside, The Coffee Manor welcomes you with its beautifully designed interior that boasts comfortable sofas and chairs, perfect for long chats or quiet afternoons with a book. The unique wall arts made from coffee nuts add an artisanal touch that speaks volumes of the cafe's dedication to its theme.

The menu here is a paradise for any coffee enthusiast with a plethora of variations to choose from, but it doesn't stop at just coffee. The snacks are delightful, and the hot chocolate is personally my all-time favorite; it's so good it haunts my dreams! But the star of the show has to be their divine chocolate milkshake. It's not just a drink; it's an experience. The rich, velvety texture coupled with the perfect balance of chocolate and cream is pure ecstasy. Each sip leaves a symphony of flavors that keeps you coming back for more.

The staff's friendliness and helpfulness significantly enhance the overall experience, making you feel right at home. Whether you’re looking for a quick coffee run or a place to create memorable moments, The Coffee Manor has it all. The outdoor seating is a bonus, providing a pleasant atmosphere to enjoy your treats under the open sky.

All in all, if you find yourself in Nawala, a visit to The Coffee Manor is a must. Prepare to be dazzled by the flavors and charmed by the ambiance. This place isn't just about great coffee or food; it's about the experiences and memories you take away. Trust me, you won't be disappointed!

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Gimhan Sugathapala
Review: Very chill location. Great place to go out a on date or a meet up. Food quality is good and service is fast as well. Would recommend.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Dhinesh Sarma
Review:
Recently I visited to this place, the atmosphere was really good. Vibe is there for sure in this place. It’s very convenient place for anyone who wants to spend much longer time. Very suitable for groups, teams, couples, even very comfortable for an individual. Very friendly environment, with spacious place. Can do office work, small meeting, get together. Really loved it.

Kind of disappointed since they don’t have any option for vegetarian (only they have pasta and Lasagna). It’s better if they add more vegetarian options.

Overall Great 👍

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Sachintha Kumarasinghe
Review: One of the best coffee shops I've visited—a nice place with plenty of parking and a tidy atmosphere. The food is tasty, and the staff is excellent.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Nadeera Fernando
Review:
Nice place to relax with your loved ones. Sometimes I came all the way from Ja-Ela to do my work from here and to chill.
The moment you step in, you’re greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere.
Java Lounge truly shines with its extensive menu. The coffee is nothing short of exceptional, with a variety of specialty drinks that cater to all tastes. From their perfectly balanced lattes to the rich and robust espresso, every cup is crafted with care.
Service at Java Lounge is top-notch. The staff are friendly, knowledgeable, and always eager to help with recommendations. Whether you’re a coffee connoisseur or a casual drinker, they ensure every visit is a pleasant experience.

Highly recommended !!!

Have fun... Cheers !!

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: R J
Review:
