I have visited this place several times and now this has become one of my to go places to spend some quality time alone or with my friends and family.
Exceptional service provided by the staff (Specially by the managers Jeremy & Tharindu and the staff Shenan, Joanna Migara & Vidumina)every single time, they are very attentive and make you feel like at home.
They have outdoor (smoking area) and indoor seating, and 2 meeting room if you need to host a meeting.
Great food and beverages and great value for Money spent.
Chicken Lasagna with cheese,  Kochchi Chicken Panini, Smoke Beef Panini, Chocolate or Almond Croissants, are must try dishes. And aslo Blueberry Cheese Cake,  Red Velvet, Sweet Amora Cakes goes well with a Spicy Chai or a Caramel Macchiato specially if you have a sweet tooth. They have a wide variety of hot & cold beverages and frappes as well.
And also you can pre order cakes for almost any occasion.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Prabash Jayathilaka
Review: Best place to make your mind calm and taste a good coffee with loved ones. Staff is really friendly, specially Mr. Shenen and always welcome with a smile at anytime you enter here. Place is clean and washrooms are in good condition.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Navidu Bandara
Review:
Really good place to go for a quick cup of coffee. Service here is really great. If you want coffee to take out, you can request them to wrap it up for you so it would not spill. Space inside is a bit limited, but a small area is available outside where smoking (only cigarettes as far as I know) is allowed.
Overall, pretty good area to go to.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Shavindri Perera
Review: I love love love this place. Barista is anyways known for their amazing service. I usually call them in advance and ask them to keep my coffee ready for pick up and they do it with a warm smile. The staff is an amazing bunch and they make sure the takeaway itself is properly packed and neatly and tidy. One of my favorite places and I will always recommend it.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Suram Mendis
Review:
Good place for a quick coffee.
Space is limited inside. Staff is friendly and provides good service. Coffee offered here is great!

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Hasanka Sumanasekara
Review: I recently dined at the barn by Barista, and I must say that my experience was absolutely fantastic! From the moment I walked through the door, I was greeted with warm smiles and a welcoming ambiance.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Bev Latham
Review:
Great coffee, cappuccino recommended! Nice little place… also loved the bigger store although rather expensive…
Would have rated it higher but staff didnt notice me standing waiting at the counter.. Could have been a little more responsive, but definitely would go back!

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Chathumaduri Hettiarachchi
Review: Best go to place when you want a break from your busy day. Love their food and coffees. Staff is very friendly.  🥰

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Rozanne Jansz
Review: I come here on a regular basis. I really enjoy the calm peaceful vibe. Even the service is very good.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Inujan Ravindran
Review: Java Lounge on Duplication Road offers a delightful experience worth savoring. From the moment you step in, the friendly staff welcomes you with warmth and enthusiasm, enhancing the overall ambiance. The Almond Croissant is a heavenly treat, perfectly complemented by the rich aroma of the Mocha Coffee. Don’t miss out on indulging in the Java Cookie Cream Frappe; it’s simply irresistible. The Nai Miri Kochi Baguette stands out as a must-try, showcasing the culinary excellence of the outlet. Each bite is a fusion of flavors that tantalize the taste buds and leave you craving for more. Whether you’re looking for a quick bite or a leisurely coffee experience, Java Lounge on Duplication Road exceeds expectations with its exceptional service and delectable offerings.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: rumesh fernando
Review:
Well its a nice and great place ...
Absolutely nice and cool environment for a ☕ with a cheese cake or more

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Binuka Nishad Bamunuge
Review: One of the best places to have a coffee and spend some quality time. Adequate seating space is also available with comfy chairs and sofas.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: sarani hansamali
Review: Food is really delicious. We ordered chicken creamy soup and that is awesome. Also creamy pasta. But they took like 35-45 min to prepare the order. Anyway the food is really good.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Found this place on Google maps while searching for “coffee” and absolutely loved the place!! Their milkshake is super delicious and so worth the money! The place has a rooftop with an amazing view.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nisal Ashen
Review: The food here is absolutely delicious. Highly recommend. Great Service. Friendly Staff.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Umaya Mallawa
Review: Ordered a Chicken Ceasar Salad where they said will be prepared and ready within 10 minutes. the order was given only 20 minutes later. The order didn’t have Chicken in the Salad and when inquired the management and staff mentioned the chef is new and he is not experienced. When asked to send a new order they said can’t do that. Absolutely terrible service and food. Do not recommend this place

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nikil Helitha
Review: One of the best place for a date with friends, and they are having the BYOB. Food was amazing I would like to recommend the cheese chicken kottu and their special mix rice. They really worth the price and there was a great offer. Highly recommend without any doubts.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Yasas Nanayakkara
Review: Service is good. Service and atmosphere is not as good as their branches in Bamba or Colpetty. Death by Chocolate was great had a great texture to it. The Signature blueberry cheesecake was as tasty as ever. The Garlic bread with cheese was average. Chicken Tikka Sandwich was quite good the chicken was full of spices. Tried one of their christmas special shakes, the Red Velvet Cake Shake: a tad too sweet but had a great consistency overall.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Vimukthi Darshana
Review:
The coffee here is great. My favorite is the café latte because it has more milk and less cream. I also enjoy an espresso sometimes, depending on my mood. They provide half sugar packets with the coffee, which is a nice touch.

As for food, the croissant sandwich is a good choice. I recommend the smoked chicken one.

If you like to smoke, you can sit at the outdoor tables. There are two tables outside, each with four chairs.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Inkey Fernandez
Review: 👍Unquestionably This place is amazing! They offered the best coffee and showed the best attitude to its costumers.   Today i got a cute Art for my cappuccino she made my day .Specially want to say staff is very friendly like family members.💯 Internet connection is very fast and is unlimited as well.   Also they have so many sweet beverages👌🏻 .This place is indeed perfect for studying and chilling out. It was very quiet and air-conditioned. I just want to keep coming back to this place. Thank you !♥️👌🏻

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: Visited the place with my baby. The place was less crowded as I went around 12. The seating arrangement is mind relaxing but the coffee shop is a bit small. Staff is friendly and attentive. Hot chocolate was not that good. But the brownie was really good.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Chaminda Jayasuriya
Review: Good place for a cup of coffee and some snacks and lovely muffins and cakes. Parking also available. Lot coffee flavours and sizes available. Store is bit small but there can seat about 15 customers indoors and another two tables at outdoors. Good atmosphere with some soft music. Friendly staff. Super service.👍👍👍

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Albert Jebanesan
Review: Java Lounge is a charming coffee spot nestled in Mount Lavinia, with additional branches in various locations. This cozy venue offers a serene atmosphere, perfect for enjoying a leisurely cup of coffee and engaging in conversation. Unlike typical bustling coffee shops, Java Lounge provides a tranquil environment conducive to relaxation. The coffee and snacks are delicious, and the customer service is outstanding. If you're looking for an intimate setting for a small meeting or a private chat, this is the ideal place to consider.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Ubaya Medawela
Review: The newly opened Java Lounge in Mt. Lavinia offers a great atmosphere to relax over coffee. The staff is attentive and hospitable, and they also have a handmade chocolate stall on the premises.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Ryan Cooray
Review:
A nice cozy place!
Got a nice collection of sweet and savory items as well as a great beverage collection - both hot and cold.
The Interior is nicely done and there was seating for around 20 people indoors. More smoking-friendly seating is available outside.

Parking is a bit of an issue sometimes. But they offer free parking at the Eye hospital for the first hour. Please make sure you get their rubber stamp on the Parking ticket.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Shani Fernando
Review:
Java Lounge – Mount Lavinia: Perfect for Work/ Study!

Java Lounge has recently moved to a new spacious location right across from the old one. The atmosphere is perfect for studying or working, with plenty of tables and comfortable sofas.

The staff are really friendly and provide great customer service. And they wouldn’t bother you for studying for longer hours. 🥺💗

The only con is the WiFi connectivity - WiFi vouchers don’t work sometime.
It would be great if they could offer unlimited WiFi/ provide new vouchers with working codes that are not limited to 30 mins.

Overall, it’s still an excellent spot for anyone who enjoys studying in a café setting!

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Roaming Kurumba
Review:
Java Lounge Mount Lavinia is a cozy coffee café that I love visiting. Their other branches are equally impressive with a great range of coffees and delicious food. Today, I had the passion and narang juice, which is my favorite drink on a hot sunny day. Along with that, I enjoyed their lasagna. As a big fan of lasagna, I was delighted with their unique version. It had enough cheese, a crisp golden crust, and tasted fantastic.

Highly recommend!

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Anuja Indranatha Madugalle
Review:
The menu is bigger than a text book and it gives you so many options for hot and cold beverages and meals. From the entrance itself, you feel very attracted to this place. I was really impressed with the way they have arranged the place, how the tables were set and how neat it was. Very spacious and tidy.
Definitely going to be my new hangout spot! Excellent work! 🫡

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Ragulan K Nathan
Review:
Went there with good recommendations,  nice atmosphere and nice place, kids friendly. Nice music, lot of food options, drinks and dessert.

Food was tasty but we experienced delay in serving the food , (understaffed maybe), by the time food reached the table it was cold. Management should make sure the food reaches the table in its warm state.  (Burgers, subs and  French fries ).

All is well other than the cold food.

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Kishalini Kirubananthan
Review:
Spacious cafe with great and reasonably priced food items. Fell in love with the ambiance. They also have a small boutique along with the cafe.

Definitely would recommend it to anyone looking for a cute hangout spot. They have miniature decorations which brings the inner child in us alive. Great service too 👍

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Darshana Ranasinghe
Review: Are you looking for a chic place to hang out and indulge in some delicious food? Look no further! Whether you're planning a casual get-together with friends or a  family gathering, This place offers the perfect blend of style and comfort. With ample space to accommodate groups of small sizes, you can relax and enjoy a welcoming atmosphere with a bit of a star wars flavours.

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Sugaashini Surendran
Review:
I recently checked out Ibson’s Choice Cafe and loved its magical ambiance. It feels like a cozy, enchanting retreat from the everyday rush.

The menu is packed with delicious options, and everything I tried was fantastic. The staff were amazing too, really friendly and attentive, which made the whole experience even better.

This cafe is a perfect spot for a relaxing and charming outing. I can't wait to go back!

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Chanakya Ranasinghe
Review:
Lovely cafe situated just in front of the National Museum. They have sweets and savoury items at very affordable prices.

Have both downstairs and upstairs seating areas.

The staff is friendly and their service is good.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Chamudra Sriwarnasinghe
Review: Food and service were good. Prices ate quite reasonable. Has a nice looking view of national museum.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Hasini Hettiarachchi
Review: We had their Lime Juice, Watermelon Juice, Chocolate cupcakes and a chicken Sandwich. Affordable and a nice place in front of the Colombo Museum.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Reg Pryer
Review: Great oasis, whilst on our walking tour. Positioned across the road from the spectacula National Museum. I had the best ice coffee of my trip so far and a delicious, fresh mini chicken pie. Service was professional and efficient.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Georges Younes
Review: The Brown Bean Coffee has a couple of locations in central Colombo. The larger of the two is located across the street from the National Museum. Service is great. Food is good. Breakfast at less than 3 dollars is great value. Prepared to order, it includes eggs, toast, sausages, fresh fruit and tea. The coffeeshop also makes fresh juices and good brownies.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Thashmika Ranasinghe
Review: I visited Java lounge fort for a breakfast with my girlfriend. We were thoroughly impressed. So Friendly staff.. I ordered My favourite coffee Caramel latte. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a conducive environment coupled with excellent service..

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Roel Moises Acedillo
Review: Great food & drinks. Staff were amazing, kind and attentive. Place is cozy, cool airconditioning, plenty of seats and relaxing atmosphere. Definitely a fantastic and safe place when you’re in Hospital Street. Please don’t hesitate to try.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: malshi kavindya
Review: I had a wonderful experience at Java! The atmosphere is cozy and welcoming, making it the perfect spot to relax or get some work done. The staff is friendly and attentive, and the coffee is simply exceptional. I always tried their hot and iced Mocha and it was heart warming . Highly recommend this place to all coffee lovers!

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Chahat Jamwal
Review: Great place for a coffee and time out. Good ambience and great service. Good food and coffee options available.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Sachin Thiwanka
Review: While I may come across as a little biassed, I sincerely believe that anyone who like coffee should visit Java Lounge. It has always been our second home (the barns place). The Java Lounge Fort was quite wonderful. I've been there a few times, but the new design is far better and cosier than the previous one. We have a few complaints about their foods, the pasta meals were a little bland, and the portion sizes were on the smaller side. We do, however, love all of the sandwiches, and the sampling of beef sandwiches they provided were excellent also we love everything they offer in their non-caffeine and coffee sections. Overall, the best coffee chain in Sri Lanka at the price you pay. Finally, fort staff was really friendly and welcoming.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Buddhika Jayawardena
Review:
Not the best experience at this location.

- Service : It used to be a lot better.  No one in the counter spoke. Service used to be more friendly.

-the ground floor area looked clean.  However, the upstairs outdoor area, the slide door doesn't work. How it was opened and closed was a task. They should put some kind of handle if the door does not work or even a sign,

-The upstairs area counter with straws, sugar, and tissues were empty.

-The toilet for men; it did not have a commode seat.  I'm not sure what's going on, if coffee bean is going out of business.

Need some improvement for the price of the products they sell, they need to have some basic facilities.  I hope they do improve their service quality like before and maintain some facilities.  It's a prime location.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Shanila Thirimanne
Review:
Coffee & crossaints and nice place to chill. It's a bit on the expensive side though.

Tandoori pastry is in good overall taste as well. (They had no sauce when I was there)  Again, the price doesn't justify though.

Got a great selection of cheesecakes and pastries. Quite a good ambiance as well.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Lahiru Ellepola
Review: Had to hang out here until we got confirmation on a meeting location. Had a quick coffee before we left. Hot day and the inside was pretty chill. Would visit again.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Love this coffee spot! The cozy atmosphere sets the perfect vibe for work, dates, or relaxation. Their coffee is delicious every time. Highly recommend it for the caffeine lovers!

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: May lorraine Gutierrez
Review:
We used to love coffee/s here even before the pandemic. But lately we noticed that something change on the taste or quality of some beverage/s and pastry. Dont get me wrong but im not saying all..just Some.
Yesterday we had was out of our expectations specially the red velvet cake..kinda dry and seems old for the price of 1k..🤦 Other pastry custard and blueberry danish is all good as well as the swiss roll. Coffee/s 7/10..too sweet.

Ambience/washroom well maintained.
staffs serves well with wide smile. Enough parking when we got there.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Sameera Samarasekara
Review: I visited this place around 8:30 p.m. when it was open. There were some adults chatting with each other. The place was calm, though some were watching movies, which wasn’t bothersome at all. They have a new collection of fruit juices—Narang, passion fruit, and soursop—all in glass bottles, priced at 550 LKR. If they offered these in tetra packs, they could probably sell more. Anyway, their coffee is good, and you can find the country's best cheesecake here.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Asiri Dolawatta
Review: Service was bad! Took time to service. They mixed up the order. When we asked why the order was late, they were kinda made at us. Never said sorry or willing to accept. Never coming here again!

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Hirun Yasara
Review:
The order was delivered extremely quickly and the service by the staff was excellent as always.

The outside smoking area is also a nice place to chill and work from.

The coffee was also excellent.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Lasith Jayalath
Review: Taste of the food is almost same as the other outlets of them. And was delicious as always. For the first time I enjoyed their very own Tamarind drink and you should try it. This outlet is having few seating arrangements both in and out. But I must say that it was bit crowded, hence the calm nature was bit disturbed. They had a parking sufficient for around 5 vehicles with a dedicated security officer.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Hirun Yasara
Review: I had a wonderful experience at this place. The atmosphere is inviting, the food is delicious, and the coffee is top-notch. The staff is extremely friendly and provides excellent service. A special mention to Mr. Ravindu, who was very supportive and attentive today. Additionally, the security guard, Mr. Silva, is also very friendly and helpful—really good company. Highly recommend this place for a pleasant visit!

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Joel S
Review:
Good place to have a meeting or hangout. Loved the pure white chocolate ice blend. The ambience is very nice and chill.
We tried their Tandoori Chicken puff and Mushroom puff. Tandoori chicken puff was tasty but the mushroom puff was not so flavourful.
But the food is highly overpriced and therefore is not value for money at all.
Very limited power outlets.
Service was OK.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Farid Baber
Review: We went there to have Coffee and Tea with light snacks. Very nice place to relax and enjoy beverages and drinks. The quality of all items was excellent. The only thing is that you have to go to get your order from the counter. In a leisure place it’s not comfortable to go to get your stuff. Fully recommended for friends and family.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Sheshan Narada
Review:
I recently visited Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves for the first time. The interior of the cafe was pleasing, creating a calm and quiet atmosphere. The comfortable seating arrangements and spacious layout added to the overall cafe vibe. The staff members were decent.

decided to try the caramel latte and the mocha latte, accompanied by an Oreo cheesecake. It was my first experience with an Oreo cheesecake, and I must say, it was absolutely delicious. As for the lattes, the mocha latte didn't quite meet my expectations, as it had an intense chocolate flavor that might be overpowering for some. However, the caramel latte was enjoyable and well-made. It's worth mentioning that the prices at Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves are slightly on the expensive side, with the lattes priced around rs:1000. Cheesecake also around rs:1000.

In conclusion, my overall experience was positive.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Ranudhi Fernando
Review: My favourite cafe out of every other.. no place can satisfy my taste buds like their Ice Blend drinks, one of my favourites being the Cookies & Cream Ice Blend (which is shown in the picture) which they previously had on the menu but not anymore which I got to know by my recent revisit but I tried out their Mocha (added chocolate) Ice Blend which is as good as the cookies and cream flavour therefore it did not disappoint me. I highly recommend trying it out ❤️👍🏼

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Abdul Basith
Review: Good atmosphere. A nice place to hangout with friends. Would recommend if you are a coffee lover😊

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review:
Was looking for a place to work and eat on a Sunday afternoon and found this one!! Absolutely loved the experience! Their Caramel Frappe is my favorite! I don’t recommend their curry pastas!
P.S. They have free WiFi

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Sarah Sen
Review: The place is cozy and spacious than it looks from outside. Good for working/studying alone. The coffee is great, that's the best part. Sadly I found the food disappointing and very dry. It's understandable the place is a cafe and not a restaurant but it can't be that difficult to keep the quality consistent of the dozen or so meal options in the menu. I've had them before for years but the quality was never this bad. I noticed the place also looked a bit shabby/worn out than it did before. I only came back here after 4 years and saw an unexpected downgrade. I love the Java coffee and cakes. But if the maintenance/quality is deteriorating, the in-cafe experience wouldn't be something to look forward to anymore.

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Be Blessed
Review: I visit Java Lounge often. I like Jawaththa branch as the service and food are great. Staff is very friendly and helpfull.  Ms Gimhani is very friendly and helpful. There a few parking slots and it is very clean also

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Misnad Haque
Review:
Updated for September, 2024. Just had some awesome creamy chicken pasta (they use actual cream cheese when asked) and my usual Americano. Brilliant as always. Service from Suminda, Gimhani and Malik was top notch. Really kind and very helpful!

Love the ambience and they serve excellent coffee. Their almond croissant is highly recommended!!

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Michelle Scharenguivel
Review: The team at our favorite coffee shop is exceptionally warm and welcoming. Janahath, in particular, with his big smile and friendly demeanor, making every visit feel personal and enjoyable. I can't recommend this place enough!

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Krishan Dhammearatchi
Review: Place is nice and cozy. Food is ok. Iced coffee is over priced tho😅

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Yonali De Silva
Review: Food is very tasty.... Very neat and clean place.... Worth for the price...  Excellent service..... Highly recommended...

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Madh Wicks
Review: Nice cosy place for a coffee and a quick breakfast they have an aloe vera drink thats a great refresher

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Akithma Rivisari
Review: Loved the food and the ambience. The indoor seating capacity is limited however there’s outdoor seating available as well.The service is great. Staff is friendly and helpful. The strawberry danish was fluffy and not too sweat and loved the chocolate croissant. We tried the egg and mayonnaise and tuna sandwiches which were readily available and they tasted amazing. They have savoury options including pasta, wraps and sandwiches as well. Loved the hot chocolate the first time. The second time we tried tasted watery. Overall food is great and good portion sizes as well.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Dilrukshi Fernando
Review:
This was a long overdue visit, and it did not disappoint 😊👏🙌✨ As it was my first visit here, Nipun who took my beverage order (Cadbury’s Hot Chocolate to make it a cozy evening!), recommended the Bacon and Egg Ciabatta as a hearty accompaniment since I had not had lunch!

The prices were unbelievably reasonable. The food was  delicious, the hot chocolate made to perfection. To top it all off, the staff were warm and hospitable. Impeccable service 👏 I ended up staying well over an hour, reading a good twenty-plus pages of my book as well. 😄

Do check out TITO’s if you are at CCC, or in and around Nawam Mawatha / Park Street area. It is worth a visit. They have a wide variety of coffee and tea options, as well as a decent menu of café food options, and a delectable array of pastries.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Nanshad Daruwalla
Review:
Tito's Cafe in Colombo is a delightful  gem that exudes an aura of warmth and charm. From the moment you step inside, you are transported to another world with its beautiful, cozy, and open ambiance. The cafe's interior is thoughtfully designed to create a welcoming and inviting atmosphere that makes you feel right at home.

One of the standout features of Tito's Cafe is the range of delicacies being offered. Whether you're in the mood for a cup of coffee, a delicious muffin, a hearty sandwich, or a delectable slice of cake, you'll find that everything is available and also reasonably priced. This makes it a fantastic choice for those looking for a satisfying meal or snack without breaking the bank.

Speaking of the food, the quality matches the affordability. The muffin is a true delight for the taste buds, with its perfect texture and flavors. The blueberry muffin was oozing with blueberries inside. The coffee is rich and aromatic, providing the ideal pick-me-up during your visit. The sandwiches are not to be missed, as they are filled with fresh ingredients and burst with flavor. And if you have a sweet tooth, the cakes are a must-try, with each bite offering a heavenly experience.

So, if you're looking for a cafe that can transport you to another country while delighting your palate, Tito's Cafe should be at the top of your list.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Charles Samarasekara
Review:
Hi everyone,

I would highly recommend that their service and their food is the best - 10/10.

The CY Club Bagel is the best flavour Bagel I have had. This quality and taste is mouth watering.

My children love this place. Highly recommend everything. Honestly sorry that I could not take much photos.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Ashmila Ramachandran
Review: Bought a ribbon cake with customised wording.  The cake was fresh and delicious. The service needs a special mention. Keep up the good work!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: DAMITH CHANDANA
Review:
Monkeybean Cafe is a hidden gem that perfectly combines stunning sea views, a tranquil atmosphere, and delectable food. The moment you walk in, you're greeted by the friendly and attentive staff.

The ambiance is serene and ideal for getting some work done. The spacious seating areas, complemented by the calming sound of the waves, create a peaceful working environment that's hard to beat.

The menu offers a delightful array of dishes, all prepared with fresh ingredients. From the hearty breakfast options to the delicious lunch specials, every bite is a treat. The coffee is exceptional, making it a perfect spot for coffee aficionados.

Overall, Monkeybean Cafe is a fantastic place to relax, work, and enjoy great food with a breathtaking view. Highly recommended for anyone looking to combine productivity with leisure.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Melody Carragher
Review: We just had a coffee here which was delicious. The ladies serving are very beautiful and make you feel so welcome. Atmosphere is great and awesome location as you can watch the waves roll in as you enjoy your coffee!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Laurence keen
Review: Food was amazing! It's honestly been hard to find some good quality (western) cafe food in Colombo; but we were finally fortunate enough to find this place and it definitely hit the spot. Only a 300 meter walk from the Granbell Hotel, which is super convenient. Reasonable prices and the staff are super sweet and helpful!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Not the ideal place for a coffee date! There aren’t many options to select from! Their burger is not worth the price! However absolutely loved their Cafe Mocha!! The staff is super nice.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Gayan Chathuranga
Review:
I must say, the prices here are quite high. I was charged Rs 400 just for a spoon of vanilla, which was not listed on the menu and the staff did not mention when I asked—this is unacceptable. The place wasn't crowded when I visited, but there is no dedicated parking, so you have to park on the road. On a positive note, the staff was friendly.
🥴

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Chanuka Dinuwan
Review: I had hot chocolate and a cafe latte here. It was good. The atmosphere was calm and it's a good place to have some free space. I also had a slice of coffee cake and it was delicious. I recommend this place to those who love to have coffee.

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Kalanga Pieris
Review: We were taken by surprise when we walked into our usual coffee shop, seeing their new chocolate outlet. Everything was 5 star quality except for the prices. All hand crafted, everything we tasted was exceptional, and ended up buying so many. Baileys centred was my favourite among all and white chocolate cooki bar was my son's. Daughter was crazy over the beautiful boxes we had to choose to wrap up our chocolates.

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Thushan kavinda
Review:
If you're looking for a peaceful and delightful dining experience in the heart of Nawala, Java Lounge is the perfect place to unwind. This charming café offers a calm and serene environment, making it an ideal spot for both relaxing and catching up with friends or getting some work done. The ambiance is a delightful blend of cozy and modern, with comfortable seating and a layout that ensures privacy while you enjoy your meal or coffee.

The food and beverages here are excellent, offering a wide range of options from aromatic coffees to delicious pastries and savory meals. Whether you're in the mood for a quick snack or a more hearty meal, the menu has something for everyone. Their coffee is undoubtedly one of the best in town, brewed to perfection, and served by a friendly, attentive staff who go out of their way to ensure you have a great experience.

Java Lounge also maintains a very clean and hygienic environment, with attention to detail that enhances your dining experience. Whether you're a frequent visitor or it's your first time, the consistency in quality, service, and ambiance is remarkable. If you’re looking for a five-star café in Nawala with a calm atmosphere, Java Lounge is a must-visit!

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Krishalika Rathnayake
Review: I recently visited Java Lounge at Nawala with friends and had a great experience. The environment was calm and relaxing. There was enough seating space, allowing us to chat comfortably. The food was delicious with fair portions. Keep up the good work!

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Nuwan Fernando
Review: It’s my first time visiting here, loved the place. Great for group meetings or hangouts and also individually if you have online meetings etc. A wonderful place to catch up with your loved ones. Has a large lobby area and also an outdoor space as well. Over all the ambiance is fantastic.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Sanc
Review:
This cafe offers a delightful ambiance, perfect for casual gatherings or productive work sessions. Its modern interior, spacious layout, and comfortable seating create a cozy atmosphere, ideal for socializing or studying without distractions. Whether you're catching up over coffee or tackling assignments, this cafe provides a welcoming environment for all occasions. With the option to plug in your laptop and work in a quiet corner, it's an ideal spot to join for a business call and get some work done while enjoying a decent cup of coffee.

While the food and coffee are reasonably priced, they don't boast any exceptional qualities or standout recommendations.

It's worth noting that if you're not working at WSO2 and plan to stay beyond 2 hours, you'll need to purchase something worth over Rs. 500 for every 2 hours. This policy seems designed to prevent unnecessary overcrowding and maintain a comfortable environment for patrons.
Overall, it's a great choice for anyone seeking a relaxed and versatile hangout spot.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: himasha jayakody
Review:
Food:
The cafe's food have good taste and quality.
Service:
The only negative issue about this place is the staff. We had to wait for few minutes until the cashier came out for us to order. There was a guy at the back making dough who noticed us struggling to find a staff member to bill our order but didn't even bother about telling others. After we ordered they didn't even call us to tell the order is ready so we had to go back and ask if the order is ready.
Atmosphere:
The place is very spacious with comfortable seating. There's no such loud noises or anything so it's very peaceful. If you stay there more than for 2 hours you need to renew your bill by purchasing another product again. And billing should be over RS.500 per person.

Overall the place had poor customer service but it's a great place if you want a quiet place to hang out with your friends or to work on your assignments/studies.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Theivendiram Pranavan
Review: This place is at the first floor of WSO2. It can be accessed by all the people. Food is great. Humble staff.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Kavinda Domenico
Review:
One of the most beautiful coffee shops in Colombo🤩
This cafe has a spacious dining area with a cozy atmosphere🛋️
Food items are delicious and prices are affordable🍽️
Also there was a restroom🚻
There were different areas to capture beautiful pictures📸

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Tihara Egodage
Review: Food and drinks are pretty good, I usually order from here when I'm at O2 because the prices are also reasonable. The only thing is they usually forget to bring the food despite saying that they WILL bring it and it happens so often idk if it's intentional. But other than that I recommend.

Name: Bean Tree Coffee
Author: Dya De Lisle
Review: Good coffee for a buck. It's the only place I've found in Kalanyia with real coffee. A large variety of cakes  and the staff is very helpful.

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: achinda uditha
Review: Absolutely beautiful place to have a coffee with your loved ones. Although the prices are bit higher but worth every cent. I highly recommend cheesecake and cappuccino. Parking is available and staff is friendly.

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: Vikasitha Ranasinghe
Review:
Reasonably priced delicious food items available.
Parking available
Card payments accepted

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: varuna heshan
Review: Nice place cake items are so tasty & recommended for couples

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: MINIDU DESHAPRIYA
Review: Superb ......amazinggggggg😍😍😍😍😍 kottawa area

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: Kanchana Kumari
Review: Food was not tasty but it was great for the price.The environment is pleasant yet the workers need more practice they're.very slow

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Hasnaka Amarasinghe
Review: Very calm place. The brownie piece that i ate was very tasty and very fresh. They heat the cake piece before serve me. And the chocolate syrup was amazing. I suggest to other people. Nescafe is not available. But you can try different coffees.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Minuk Senanayake
Review:
Idk if it was a bad day or what, but the white forest cake was kinda dry. The brownie was way too cakey, it would have been great with ice cream but on its own or with coffee it's not that good.
Most buns were kinda dry and the hot chocolate was just plain bad(looked so nice, but taste was just like chocolate milk). The buns were kinda hard too.
Cheesecake looked great tho.
All in all, great looking food, nice place, nice people but idk about the food. Just avoid the cakes basically.
Great for photos and all.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Chathurangi Dinushika
Review:
We did not have a cafe close by Maharagama as per my knowledge. 👀 Recently we discovered this place and we were so glad about our visit there.
So space-wise, it is kind of a small place. Not too busy or crowded. But it has quite a good space for hangouts. ❤
First, we did not think that it had any seating area. To our surprise, it is a three-story building or it was designed to look so. 😁
As they mention, there is a karaoke room which will be suitable for a small pack of 8. A meeting area, is an isolated area with a door, so you can have the privacy of carrying your business meetings. 👍
And there are two open areas. One of the open areas is the rooftop and maybe you will be able to arrange a small gathering. And the next open area will be good for you to work with sipping your favourite coffee. (Power sockets available) ☺️
When it comes to the food, they might improve a bit in that area but they have quite a good range. Prices are so reasonable and compared to BIG cafes, it is way more affordable and that is the best part of this cafe. 😍❤️
Coffee is good and good range of coffees available with them. Modern coffee brewing machines were used. And I think since they do not have differentiated cup sizes, they serve a good amount of coffee for a good price. ✨️❤️
Tastes and preferences vary from one to the other. You must try this place if you visit or live around Maharagama.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Ryan Jason
Review:
This is my first time and it was a lovely experience! Staff is good!
Peaceful environment!
Service was fast, they served it within few minutes
Reasonable prize
Drinks are pretty good!
Good place to visit with family or friends!

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Asha Thilakarathna
Review: I got a cake yesterday from this shop and it was rotten when I checked it today morning. And I made a call for this shop and the girl who answered the call, politely apologized and send me a cake worth than I bought yesterday. And she has given me a sweet note on the cake as well. I really appreciate you and thank for this delicious cake❤️❤️🩷 recommend to all❤️

Name: Brew Island
Author: Shane Selvaratnam
Review: This is a newly opened coffee shop. The ambience is good. But the prices are ridiculously high. The customer service was very good and I'm planning to visit again to try their chicken croissant which was recommended. Hopefully the management will revise the prices and tradeoff profit for customer delight.

Name: Brew Island
Author: beast
Review:
Newly opened coffee shop. The milk shake is very nice and the food is decent too.

Will visit again for sure.

Name: Brew Island
Author: Sashini Ranasinghe
Review: Island Brew has the best coffee. If you are into coffee shops which are cozy.. This is the best place.. Staff is very friendly.. Good job Team Island Brew!! I will definitely visit again.. 👍

Name: Brew Island
Author: hiruni perera
Review: Nice friendly staff and good working space. The tea for one person was pretty good for Rs.400 and the portion was sizable. The only shortcoming was that they don’t have a wifi facility but overall it was a great place to get some work done.

Name: Brew Island
Author: Matthew Chmielewski
Review: Very nice iced coffee - open late and hit the spot. Great service!

Name: Leenos cafe
Author: Tasneem Zaheen
Review: Amazing Coffee and food really nice atmosphere to hangout with friends or relax and work.

Name: Leenos cafe
Author: S Anthonysamy
Review: Great way to start your day! Friendly service, good coffee, delicious treats.

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Dilruk Kannangara
Review:
Simply Amazing. What an idea having a Coffee Shop, in a dull city of Borella. Needed theae kind of spot for small rendezvous. Well, we were cluless when our friends came to visit us. We had to move either Rajagiriya or Colombo 7. It was opened on yesterday. But unfortunately I had no time to pay a visit here.
I am really happy to write 1st Review for them on google. Hope they will keep their standard on the outset throughout. They have free Wi-Fi if you stay long. Total seating capacity is 30 or more. They have sofas with coffee tables, rooms to make sure your privacy. 3 parking spots. Modern interior is a plus point. Resonable prices when compared to other similar businesses.

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: EsHAn S
Review: Absolutely loved this place! The food was amazing and the service was top-notch. recommend!

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Kavindya Perera
Review: I was pleasantly surprised to find such a great dining spot on Borella Cotta road. Definitely worth checking out if you are in the area and looking for a delicious meal…

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Pasindu Vihangana
Review: Has everything you expect from a decent coffee place..

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Ishida Tetsuhiro
Review:
Amazing, really good cafe.

I was excited to find a wonderfully designed cafe in a cluttered area on the outskirts of town. However, the store staff doesn't seem to be used to it, maybe because it just opened? Recommended.

Name: Bread Court
Author: Achini Sheralla
Review:
Lovely place to spend some quality time with your family. Ample parking available. Also they maintain the cleanliness very well.

Although there were many kinds of food, we bought two slices of cake to have with cafe latte and ice coffee. The ice coffee was not bad but it would be better if the water quality was reduced.

Name: Bread Court
Author: Kanchana Wijesinghe
Review:
It's really rare to find a good coffee shop around Kaduwela and Bread Court is the best in area.
You will surely love their pastries and food as they are really delicious..
Very limited sestibg space but your taste buds will satisfy for sure. The staff is very friendly and maintain a high level of customer service

Name: Bread Court
Author: Ruwanmalee Dissanayake
Review:
An eye-catching along the roadside. This place a very clean and tidy. The food tastes great and provides a large variety of bakery items from savory to sweet, not to forget they got chocolates as well. The places provide alot of drink options(hot to cold). Prices seem to reasonable.

A good parking space is available. The customer is good. Their bathrooms are very clean.

Overall value for money is high

Name: Bread Court
Author: VIOLETA MARTINEZ
Review:
Coffee is great!
We are coffee lovers and this is the perfect place on town.
We had, americano, espresso doppio and latte coffee.
Bathrooms are clean, service is great.

Name: Bread Court
Author: thilanka ratnayaka
Review: Recommended place for a quick refresh. Convenient location easy to access from main road, near highway interchange. Foods were delicious and fresh. Wash rooms available.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Dinuka De Silva
Review: Only the place at least in this level near dehiwala junction. So I'm used to go there for short snacks. But, it's unfortunate that their food is spoiled some times. Actually none of the short eats are in good quality. Some times too much sugar also.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Kareem Bhai
Review:
Don't buy any things in this place I recently bought a Jambo Hot Dog 🌭 and when I going to eat I can see the worms 🪱 inside the sausages very bad service not quality foods 😡 they will sell the old items
Really very bad experience 👎👎

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Thanu Sris
Review: Best place for bread , cakes & short eats , friendly staffs , I really love the eclair there 😋

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: kumaran thanga
Review: Good place for cakes, buns and other bakery items. Friendly staffs.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Nadine Fernando
Review:
Well the short eats are not bad.
Cakes are not upto standard.

But I have a few complaints too: (1)regarding your orange juice remember it is NOT SUNQUICK. Don't deceive customers. If you are making Sunquick why do you have to use Preservatives & Coloring? Make sure you change your labels immediately.

(2) Recently I ordered Ice Coffee & Orange Juice amounting to 40 cups in total.Asked the Sales Person if you could make it fresh because it was about 2 days old.(a) NO was his reply after checking with his superior. (b) since I had got an order I wanted the label without the price. Even that I received a NEGATIVE response.

You people should be flexible. Afterall Customer is King. Being in Marketing it's a shame if you are treating your customers in this manner.

Name: Island Tea Co. & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: Deegayu Rajanayake
Review: good location, good coffee, good music... Perfect place to have a coffee

Name: හසානෝ
Author: Danushka Maduranga (ダヌーシュカ・マドゥランガ)

Name: හසානෝ
Author: Animilia
Review: There are chickens

Name: BEST COFFEE SHOP
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sathieeswaran Mohanathasan
Review:
One of my favorite cafes in Colombo without any doubt. The reasons:

- it’s 24 hours (what else do you need? 😜)
- The interior is bloody brilliant and calming just how a cafe should be
- Food is good
- I love their coffees (tried few different ones and no complaints whatsoever)
- They do have some live music during the weekend or special occasions

I go to the healing cafe often especially to heal myself from the burnouts and just to relax and chill and every-time it works fine maybe because of the calm atmosphere

Prices are not expensive and somewhat reasonable

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Inosh Perera
Review: Went to work for a few hours and the staff was super helpful. Nice atmosphere. Siddik who was on duty came and handed me the WiFi details. Very nice of him. Super helpful throughout the whole time. Coffee and food was nice as well. Place is open 24/7.

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Oshini Nugapitiya
Review: Found the perfect spot to have my breakfast. 10/10 for food and drink. Thanks Siddeeq for the amazing customer service. Will definitely come back🤩

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sameena Gunawardena
Review: Excellent place to quickly grab a meal, drink or even have breakfast, lunch or dinner. Healing Cafe has been a go to place for the last couple of years.. Best service, relaxed environment and amazing customer service. Special recommendation and appreciation to Siddeeq who has been giving exceptional service for us for last two years..

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Vayshu Vayshalni
Review: I recently visited Healing Cafe and tried their wade with a cup of filter coffee. The wade was crispy and packed with flavor, and the coffee was rich and smooth, just how I like it. The relaxed nature ambiance made it even better, and I love that they’re open 24/7. Whether you're grabbing a quick snack or unwinding with a coffee, this place is a must-visit!

Name: Island Tea Co & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Caffco
Author: Chanaka Rathnayake
Review:
Caffco is a cozy coffeeshop and clam date spot in Horana, and one of the best places to get good quality espresso drinks. All the baristas know about  the available menu items and won't hesitate to recommend a good dish.

We bought cafe mocha and a hazelnut latte from which I can highly recommend their cafe mocha.

If you're visiting here don't forget to try their delicious chocolate brownie as well.

They accept both cash and cards.

Name: Caffco
Author: Savishka Werajini
Review: Caffco, is a charming spot perfect for quality time, featuring a nice ambiance and friendly staff. It offers a private dining area ideal for mini celebrations. However, the AC could be stronger, and the private dining room would benefit from better air conditioning and warmer lighting for a more comfortable and photogenic experience. Despite this, it's a lovely place with delicious food.

Name: Caffco
Author: Nilupulee Wathsala
Review: This cafe has its own unique vibe. The perfect place in the Horana area for having a coffee time with loved ones and friends. Apart from hot coffees it has frappes, mojitos and a food collection including burgers, subs, pastas. The food we tried was delicious. It takes some time to prepare food cause I guess they are freshly made.

Name: Caffco
Author: Thamindu Manodya
Review: clean and calm environment to spent time with delicious foods. There is one thing, that mojito collection will definitely make relaxing mind in any situation. What a great drink😇😇.

Name: Caffco
Author: Tharinda Thamaranga
Review: Celebrated our anniversary at Caffco.The staff was attentive and courteous, ensuring our experience was unforgettable. Highly recommend Cafco for any special occasion or simply for a delightful culinary journey.

Name: Coffee Lounge
Author: Indrani Karunarathne
Review: The newly opened coffee shop was really great. Great service and Great food. Overall... 5 ⭐

Name: Coffee Lounge
Author: Yohan Peters
Review: Best place ..❤

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Dushi Dissanayake
Review: New equipments..grate atmosphere ..qualified ,friendly trainers ...

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Nimantha Gunawardane
Review: Air conditioned space with well maintained equipments

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Omidu Perera
Review: The best gym in town. It includes personal trainees, a air conditioning gym facility and a good and friendly staff.

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Kalum Ge Sithuwili
Review: Getfit is one of the best gyms I've been to in lanka with advanced equipments ,bodybuilding champion the owner himself Mr. Niranjan Kumara and well experienced trainers under him Including Jerry Richard , Gayan Silva & Hasitha Ranga  . The best aspect I love about this gym is the ambiance, the people around are lovely and that way you'll always have a positive mindset which is very important when we workout. They've also got a new branch which was opened recently in Kadawatha. WE ARE GETFIT❤

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Marian R
Review: Great gym, can easily keep up with German gyms. The owner is very friendly!

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: ashen madusanka
Review: I recently visited Tasha Cafe and had an amazing experience. I tried the egg sandwich, vanilla muffin, and cappuccino, all of which were delicious. The sandwich was fresh and light, the muffin perfectly moist with just the right amount of sweetness, and the cappuccino was a smooth and creamy delight. The ambiance of the cafe was cozy and relaxing, making it a great spot to unwind. A special mention goes to Yash, who was incredibly friendly and provided excellent service, making the visit even more pleasant. Highly recommend stopping by for a treat!

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Kaveesha Madubashini
Review: Friendly customer service and a good,calm and quite place for coffee Dates and for solo dates. The food is awesome and they served it very nicely

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Kithsiri Ekanayake
Review: Tasha Cafe is an exquisite establishment that offers a delightful experience. The tasteful decor creates a warm and welcoming ambiance that is perfect for relaxation or engaging in conversation over their carefully crafted and freshly brewed coffee (which I highly recommend!) and delectable butter cake (which is simply divine!). Their menu boasts a diverse selection of sandwiches and treats that cater to various palates. Ms. Nuwani and Chathurya elevate the experience with their helpfulness and amiable disposition, ensuring that every customer feels welcomed and well-cared for. In summary, Tasha Cafe is a must-visit destination for those who seek exceptional coffee, delectable cuisine, and gracious service in a sophisticated setting.

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Mario R
Review:
I have been to this place a couple of times the last two times including last Thursday the service was a let down. The usual pleasant staff was replaced by a stuck up female who was irritated when we came in as she was sitting and lounging during the evening shift this was on a Thursday evening around 5.30 pm. She acted as though we were asking her to pay for the food when we ordered. Provided to give me a lecture when I asked for white sugar for my cappuccino. She has already brought the brown one. Worst service ever. Normally there is a girl who is super pleasant and courteous who makes us want to visit again.
Food wise they need a menu update but the quality is good though. Please train your this person to be more customer friendly.

A small note on my visit today  . I went in again today around 12 in the afternoon to place an order for a birthday cake and the three staff that were there were so welcoming and warm that I ordered more than what I initially planned to order due to the way they treated me ,my wife and son . One of the staff even remmebered my sons name and I would say please make sure you keep them  as they know how to treat customers and makes us want to come again and again .

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Umm D
Review:
I loved the atmosphere, nice interior and good coffee.
Peaceful place to work, study or chill with friends.
I’d ordered a red velvet cupcake unfortunately that wasn’t fresh enough other than that everything was 10/10.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Senuri Hettiarachchi
Review:
I recently visited Tco By Adra and decided to try their donuts, which looked promising. Unfortunately, they turned out to be quite disappointing. The donuts were dry, lacking the light and fluffy texture you’d expect from a fresh batch. Biting into one felt more like eating a stale pastry rather than a soft, indulgent treat.

The flavor was also underwhelming, with little sweetness or richness to make up for the poor texture. Even a drizzle of glaze or icing couldn’t salvage the experience. I’ve had better donuts from grocery stores.

Overall, I’d suggest the restaurant revisit their donut recipe. With so many great options for baked goods out there, offering something this dry and bland just doesn’t cut it.

If you’re craving a donut, I’d recommend looking elsewhere.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: supun missaka
Review:
Cozy Atmosphere and Delicious Coffee!
I absolutely love this coffee shop! The ambiance is cozy with comfortable seating and soft background music. The staff is always friendly and welcoming, making it a great place to relax or catch up with friends. The coffee is top-notch, with a wide variety of options to choose from. Whether you prefer a classic espresso or a unique specialty drink, they have something for everyone. Plus, their pastries and snacks perfectly complement the coffee. I highly recommend this place to any coffee lover looking for a great experience!

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Yasanthi Bandara
Review: Very friendly staff. One of the best places to have a calm and quiet coffee or tea in Colombo. Great coffee and tea.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Navod Kankanamge.
Review: I tiny, cozy attractive coffee shop. Offers a good variety of hot and cold beverages as well as food which goes along with them. Slightly above average prices. Great staff. Tidy, cozy interior. Parking might be an issue though.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Nathan Pandazopoulos
Review: Great coffee spot for an early morning!! The food is delicious and the staff very professional. Highly recommend coming here if you’ve got a train to another part of the island (since it’s relatively close to Colombo Fort Station).

Name: SSC - Lawn Cafe - Coffee Coner
Author: Clehan Pulle
Review: Good please and food also good

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: TD
Review: Ordered chicken fried rice via Uber Eats, and it was delivered after about an hour, as we were located in Kadawatha. The dish arrived hot and fresh, packed neatly to preserve the heat. The portion size was generous, and the rice was delicious. However, it would have been even better with more spices and some gravy. The omelette was a bit small as well.

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: Amila Mahawasala
Review: I had my 40th birthday celebration at The Food Cult, and it was amazing! The venue and ambiance were perfect, and the food was delicious. Malith and his team provided exceptional service, ensuring that everything ran smoothly and all guests were well looked after. I highly recommend The Food Cult for anyone looking for a great venue, tasty food, and outstanding service!

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: K.A Kalani
Review:
Food cults is the best restaurant in the area. They NEVER disappoint. Their food is inventive with flavor combinations I would never envision but are always phenomenal. Top that with excellent service and you have a dining experience you will want to repeat again and again.
This restaurant has such a cozy and charming atmosphere! From the moment you walk in, you feel right at home. The warm lighting and comfortable seating make it an ideal place for a relaxed meal.”

the staff is notably friendly and very welcoming.

Highly recommend

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: UN SA
Review: The art work over there are super amazing!! And the pizza was soo amazing got the chance to have half and half veggie supreme and kochchi chicken !! And the pizza was thin crust. And super tasty though they took longer time period to give us to taste and it’s worth for waiting too!!! We ordered lime and mint mojito as well as karak tea which is similar to masala tea. Those are amazing and also we tried the sweet potato fries and the portion size was huge and it was ok.

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: Gihan Dhananjaya
Review: I recently stumbled upon this place and it was an absolute delight! The food is incredibly flavorful, offering a wide variety of options. I highly recommend trying their wood-fired pizzas, especially the Kochchi Chicken and Ceylon Black Pork. It's great to see that Wattala now has a decent Sheesha lounge with a BYOB option to enjoy and relax.

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: mahesh sellahewa
Review: A best place to chill with friends and it’s BOYB and they have some lovely food and the location is unbelievable . Good Luck guys keep up the good work

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Navi Rafaelle
Review: Delicious food, friendly staff. Norah’s Cafe is a great place. Glad that I gave a visit to this place all of a sudden. Thank you guys ♥️

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Kith Dam
Review: One of the best places around thalawathugoda to chill and have a coffee at anytime of the day. Mahesh makes the best food/coffee and hands down the best service. Highly recommend the place to any one!

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Aman Richard Anthony
Review: Loved Mahesh’s effort the keep us happy. Went out of his way to bring some extra things! Loved the place!

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Dilshan “Butters” Samarasinghe
Review: I had the most amazing time here, the staff was very friendly and welcoming , the food was excellent . Id come back again

Name: Imakro Coffee Shop
Author: Hasitha Subasinghe
Review: One of the most decent places to visit in Bandaragama even with kids and family.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Chandima Mithuni
Review:
I went to tea avenue , kotte on 22/08/2024.
I had a cafe latte small which was rs 940.
I had a tiramisu cake slice which was rs 1250.
The total was rs 2190/-  There were no service charges. The atmosphere was good. Washroom facilities are available.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Mahenn .-.
Review: Tea Avenue captivated me with its serene ambiance and impeccable service. From the moment I stepped in, the aroma of freshly brewed teas enveloped me, creating a tranquil retreat from the bustling city outside. Their extensive menu boasts a delightful array of teas, each served with grace and expertise. I particularly enjoyed their peach tea, a delicate blend that left a lingering floral sweetness on my palate. The staff were knowledgeable and eager to guide me through their offerings, enhancing my experience. Tea Avenue is a haven for tea enthusiasts seeking quality brews in a soothing environment—truly deserving of seven stars. Love the staff!! Absolutely amazing.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Lasith Jayalath
Review: I was looking for a calm place to have a fruit juice while watching some random stuff on you tube. Suddenly I came across this place. I must say it was ideal for what I was searching for. Atmosphere was very calm and clean. You can go upstairs if you want more privacy. There was a room like place on upstairs which is ideal for a group of friends to enjoy some food while not disturbing the others. If you go through their menu without visiting this place, you will feel that the prices are high. But with all the value additions they have done on top of the food experience, it is really worth. But I am bit disappointed with the service, because I had to order and again I had to come to the cashier to collect the food. It is really uncomfortable if you have to carry the food to upstairs. Parking was only sufficient for three vehicles. Anyway the food experience was great.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Oshadie kudagoda
Review:
The place is not too large, but it provides enough space to spend time without getting interrupted. Like in every tea avenue, they offer many food and beverage options. Usually, I enjoy their food, but today I was served some over-fried chips. However, their Latte and Sandwich are good. I highly recommend trying their ginger beer, one of their signature drinks, which is truly amazing.

I also noticed they have a meeting room here, which can be very useful. If you intend to use it, they have mentioned to call and make a reservation in advance.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Dushie Fernando
Review: Ordered waffle with prawn and  creamy sauce or something and ..although it said creamy I didn't see anything creamy 😔. Ordered fish and chips , they served sweet potato chips and it was charred and they served without any problem until we said we can't eat it ..very poor quality.. also ordered tandoori chicken sandwich had only tandoori and no butter or sauce or mayo inside ..very dry .. but the chocolate cake I think ow was mud chocolate cake was good ... Have been to kohuwala tea avenue..the food quality is much better there . This place need improvement

Name: Goodies
Author: Banacinn
Review: We liked it. Nice to be in Air conditioned comfort. Great macaroons and cookies

Name: Goodies
Author: Horatiu Popescu
Review: A bit hidden, as it is situated in the little shopping gallery in the basement of the Cinnamon Lakeside hotel this place was a wonderful surprise. Excellent cakes, good coffee and stellar customer service from the staff. Good prices, so I was surprised to see that it's also value for money despite the fact that the place charges 10% extra for service. It was flawless! Well done!

Name: Goodies
Author: Prabhani TG
Review: Delicious coffee, cakes and sandwiches. Nice and wonderful service

Name: Goodies
Author: Christopher Fernando
Review: They made a bespoke gluten free cake that was excellent! After trying and failing to get a gluten free cake from many locations, they were able to provide a beautiful HF chocolate cake.

Name: Goodies
Author: Ramanan Sharma
Review: Goodies is well known for their fantastic cakes and savories. They also have a good variety of sandwiches which can be customized. Staff are very friendly and accommodating. Always make it a pleasant experience for us.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Ransika Lakmal
Review:
One of the best customer service I have experienced so far. I was there for a meeting and wanted a quick cofee and bite, Neeliya were so welcoming. Amazing hospitality, great cofee and food
Highly recommended cafe if you are in colombo

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Chang Miao
Review: Both the coffee and tea were served in paper cups and Puff was not freshly made that day. The coffee tastes bad. There is no service to speak of, and the price of service charges and taxes is unreasonable.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Lee Smith
Review: Sandwiches with fresh salad should never be rolled over to the next day. Rancid.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Amalan Dhananjayan (Batzee)
Review:
This is located inside the Granbell Hotel on the first floor. There is one Barista.

I ordered a White Chocolate Frappachino and it's one of the Best Frappachinos I have ever had. The perfect Ice Blend.

I would highly recommend this place.

One thing to note that there will be a 10% Service charge and a bunch of Government Tax gets added to the bill making it a total of 28%+ extra to the bill.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Shamm Lux
Review:
Best coffee in Colombo.
Neelya the barista was super sweet & made the most delicious coffee even with a long line waiting.
The ambiance is amazing facing the shore, definitely will come back when in Colombo!

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Food Beats
Review: This cozy little spot is a great place to enjoy a cup of coffee in the city. They offer a delicious variety of cakes, and the coffee is excellent. Conveniently, they have a parking area. However, the staff could benefit from improved professionalism.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Dinesh T. Kumara
Review: Had a good tea time in this cafe. They have good verity of cakes and bakes. Also they have milk tea, milk coffee, espresso, capachino, tea latte and many more. They gave good service to us. Hope to go again.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Ajith Kumara
Review: I went there with my friend to have a coffee, and the male server who attended to us changed his tone in a rude manner while talking to us. Because of this experience, I don't plan to go there again.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Anuradha Sandaruwan
Review: Bad food quality. They sell expired cake.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Champika Pathiraja Menike
Review: A good place to meet and eat.

Name: Coffee Break
Author: Buddhima Ekanayake
Review:
This is a newly opened place and it is a hidden gem. You can have a nice coffee and a burger or something to eat and specially, they have Playstation 5 & a pool table for a very small extra charge. Owner and the staff is friendly.

Atmosphere is okay.. But can be improved. So far, being there for 2 times and will visit again.

Name: Coffee Break
Author: Hirusha Ranasinghe
Review:
I recently stumbled upon Coffee Break in Bambalapitiya and was pleasantly surprised by its cozy ambiance and exceptional coffee. As a self-proclaimed mocha lover, I was particularly impressed by their rendition of the classic. The velvety texture, rich chocolate flavor, and perfect balance of espresso made it one of the best mochas I've had in a long time.

While I haven't tried their food yet, the menu looked promising with a variety of options to suit different tastes. The friendly staff added to the overall positive experience.

If you're looking for a quiet spot to enjoy a delicious cup of coffee, I highly recommend giving Coffee Break a try.

Name: Coffee Break
Author: Abdullah Sherifu
Review: The name really suits this place. This is a very good place for a coffee break. Me and my friend tried their Mocha, and it was good. The staff named Sharaf was very friendly and helpful. I would recommend this place for a coffee break. This place also has a pool table and ps5 where we can have some fun.

Name: Coffee Break
Author: Ken Weary
Review:
A fantastic coffee shop with a great vibe, very friendly service and even better coffee. You can enjoy an espresso while sitting comfortably in a well air conditioned space while watching the waves.

They also serve food and have a pool table and gaming system.

Name: Coffee Break
Author: Kavindi Hansima
Review: Tried a cappuccino and an avocado coffee at this cozy coffee spot. The cappuccino was smooth and creamy, while the avocado coffee was unique—a surprisingly good blend of flavors. Worth a visit for both the drinks and the atmosphere!

Name: Let's Eat
Author: Gihan S
Review: This place permanently closed.

Name: Let's Eat
Author: Madura Perera
Review: Delicious

Name: Samarakoon Fresh Juice & Coffee Cafe
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: They portions are really good and you can cover a full meal using a juice jar coz the content is quite big. They use fresh fruits that are on display so I believe this place to be quite good. Price is worth the content. The biggest concern was seating and atmosphere. They should do a interior designing again to effectively manage the space and to drag customer attraction

Name: Samarakoon Fresh Juice & Coffee Cafe
Author: Poornima Madushani
Review: Highly recommended this shop 🥺❤ Fresh juices with wonderful tastes... Various milkshakes with superb tastes...  An amazing service... 🥺❤  Again and again... Highly recommended  🥺❤

Name: Samarakoon Fresh Juice & Coffee Cafe
Author: Thilan Kasthuriarachchi
Review: Very nice fresh juice close to University of Kelaniya. Resalable price and various category of juice.

Name: Samarakoon Fresh Juice & Coffee Cafe
Author: Umesha Mediwaka
Review: Used to go to this place quite often before the pandemic. Is this fresh juice bar still open for business?

Name: Steamsbury Tea & Coffee House by Santhiyagu
Address: 911, Electricity board road, Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Battaramulla
Author: Hopeless Nerd
Review: Excellent Coffee and milkshakes. They have a big variety of tea collection too. Can't forget about lovely interior. Ideal place for hangouts and relaxing.

Name: Steamsbury Tea & Coffee House by Santhiyagu
Address: 911, Electricity board road, Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Battaramulla
Author: ranjana madusanka
Review: Nice space .. very good environment .. good for work and meeting .costume service is really good price is average .. coffee is very tasty

Name: Steamsbury Tea & Coffee House by Santhiyagu
Address: 911, Electricity board road, Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Battaramulla
Author: kat silva
Review: Its a place with the best ambience to work, take meetings, and later chill in the evening. spent the entire afternoon and evening there, they were also kind enough to give me an air conditioned meeting room for privacy and comfort. Its simply great for students, take meetings, readers, to do work during the day and hop on to the other side to chill the Evening away with good pizza and music !

Name: Steamsbury Tea & Coffee House by Santhiyagu
Address: 911, Electricity board road, Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Battaramulla
Author: Chathuradha Shashmika
Review: Its the best place in town to have a quality coffee. Highly recommend place. Very quiet environment and highly recommend beverages. It's my always go to coffee shop when in town.

Name: Steamsbury Tea & Coffee House by Santhiyagu
Address: 911, Electricity board road, Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Battaramulla
Author: max sergeev
Review: A nice quiet place with good coffee and selection of teas. We went there to chill after spending 4 hours in the Immigration office.

Name: Asker foods kopi kade kelaniya
Author: Asker Ali
Review: Cheaper and tasty iced coffee 100 rupees

Name: Asker foods kopi kade kelaniya
Author: Captain Asker
Review: Reasonable price cheap and good

Name: Cafe Kumbuk
Author: Georgia Gilmer
Review: Delicious brunch spot! Big menu, lots of vegetarian. Options, some vegan. We had coconut milk cappuccinos, choc smoothie & vegan breakfast. Loved our food. Staff friendly, great service. Lovely & lush leafy garden seating + indoor seating. Has a store attached also!

Name: Cafe Kumbuk
Author: Baktybala Torgautova
Review:
Very cozy and atmosphere place. It’s my first time in Colombo and first cafe. I really liked it. Food and coffee were very good. Fresh and delicious. Service is on top. Everyone is so nice. Special thanks to Doole for his service. I would recommend to visit this cafe.
Also you can find nice shop inside with local stuff.
Thank you.

Name: Cafe Kumbuk
Author: Sudeepa Herath
Review:
Laid back and lovely cafe with a great ambiance. Popular among tourists and rightly so. The menu is extensive with a wide range of choices for anyone. Tried the big meaty brekkie. Highly recommend.

The menu also has multiple vegan options and a wide selection of drinks. Service is extremely friendly and prices are reasonable.

This cafe is a wonderful example that a great business doesn't need a high-tech, modern building with fancy lights. Inspired.

Name: Cafe Kumbuk
Author: Amaya Alawattage
Review:
A cozy cafe with a lovely little garden and a great atmosphere.

Food is tasty and fresh with excellent value for money.

The Granola Bowl was delicious and the coffee (Spanish Latte) was wonderful!

And on top of that the staff is so friendly, welcoming and caring.

I'll be back for sure! 😊

Name: Cafe Kumbuk
Author: Madavi Gunaratne
Review:
I recently visited Cafe Kumbuk, located in a quiet nook at the heart of Colombo, for brunch with my sister and a friend. Meeting this friend in person for the first time in five years, despite staying in touch through social media, made the occasion special. Though finding the cafe was a bit challenging, it was worth the effort. The ambiance was serene, offering plenty of privacy and freedom without feeling isolated. The service was excellent, with the staff being thoughtful and caring, adding to the homely vibe of the place.

Regarding the food, I had the Hummus 2.0, which tasted just like the homemade hummus my mum makes—definitely worth five stars for that authentic touch. The strawberry and orange fizz I drank was another plus, being both refreshing and delicious. My sister and friend had the fish and chips, along with a mocha and a coffee, and they were equally satisfied with their choices. Overall, Cafe Kumbuk provided a wonderful setting for a memorable reunion. I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a cozy and intimate dining experience in Colombo.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Indushika Anjanee
Review: Had a pleasant experience here. The food was good. They have a variety of pastry items, cakes and beverages to choose from. The place is a bit small so not suitable to stay for long hours. Also, the staff is so loud and it is disturbing to the customers.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: ravith de silva
Review:
Place is very cozy and comfortable. Menu  is simple and easy. Coffee was excellent. Food was fresh and delicious. Service was fast, got the order within 10min. Bagel was nicely made. The greek yogurt bowl was very fresh and tasty.
One downfall was the kitchen staff were very loud. They were going for a open kitchen concept, staff were joking and laughing which could be heard at the front. Other than that everything was nicely done.
Overall I would give it a 6.9/10 & I recommend this place

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Lily
Review: Cosy little cafe with a comfortable atmosphere. I stayed for a very long time as it is very relaxing here. Breakfast bagel and iced mocha were both very lovely, but I regret not getting a regular cappuccino as the barista was very talented at making coffee art! All the staff was so lovely as well. I would love to come back if I'm in town, and really recommend if you're in the area.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Sanc
Review:
