Nestled in Crescat Boulevard, this cozy café offers a warm and welcoming atmosphere with a separate entrance from outside. Although the seating inside is limited, there are also outdoor seats available. The friendly staff greet you warmly as soon as you walk in.

The prices are fair for the quality of service and food, and often cheaper than from UberEats. I've enjoyed their Matcha Rose Latte, flourless chocolate cake, and bagels through UberEats before, and they were all delightful.

This time, I tried the lemon square, sunshine bun, and Scandi cinnamon bun. The lemon square was my favorite with its perfect tanginess and the lemon glaze was a perfect addition to it —one of the best lemon bars I've ever had. The Matcha Rose Latte is rich and aromatic, though there were a few clumps of matcha at the bottom, probably from not sifting the matcha well. However, this didn’t affect the taste.

I was especially impressed by the staff's flexibility. I've changed my matcha order from takeaway to dine-in, from hot to iced, depending on my schedule and the weather. Each time, the staff kindly adjusted my order without any frustration.

This café, offering multi-cuisine bakes with Sri Lankan hospitality, is a hidden gem that promises a delightful experience every time.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Nilanthi Fernando
Review:
My most favorite coffee shop in Colombo. The staff is extremely friendly & their sweet treats are top quality! A big shout out to Ranga & the team for always taking time to greet us at any given time of the day. Their service & atmosphere is exceptional.
An absolute gem of a spot ...!!

Name: Caravan fresh - The Cake & Pastry shop
Author: Kowsan
Review:
Great pastries (fish is my go to) , and excellent service when I go there in the mornings.

Have been going daily and will be anytime I am in Columbo 10 area

Recommend the getting ice coffee & fish pastries / rolls

Name: Caravan fresh - The Cake & Pastry shop
Author: Menath Baddegama
Review:
I recently went to this place. Customer service is very good, and the staff was friendly. Prices are too much higher than other places. But the food was really good.
I think it's worth it. But the sitting chairs and tables are quite uncomfortable to sit in. There's no parking, just the street parking. Every time I go there, this place is filled with a crowd.

Name: Caravan fresh - The Cake & Pastry shop
Author: Rifqi
Review:
👍 Good customer service and good food.
👌They have a good collection of cake 🍰🎂 and other bakery items 🥐🥮 🥪🍞🍩🍪
🍽️✅There are few tables, if you want to dine in.
🅿️ ❌ No parking options available, roadside parking at this busy junction is a problem.

Name: Caravan fresh - The Cake & Pastry shop
Author: Sivathasan Mayuran
Review:
Very bad chicken roll ( common name)

Please don’t give it away these burned and tear up once .

Caravan needs to check quality control for your branches. Please pay attention to help your customers service.

Name: Caravan fresh - The Cake & Pastry shop
Author: Rin Hussain
Review: Worst customer service. Ordered a small cake when checked the bill had charged 1000 extra. When inquired says they don't know. Pls be aware about the bill and check the slip given after a card payment is made.

Name: Grind
Author: Kasun Sameera
Review:
I recently had the pleasure of enjoying brunch at Grind in Colombo, Sri Lanka, and it was an absolutely delightful experience. The food was incredibly tasty, with each dish bursting with flavor and freshness. The drinks were equally impressive, perfectly complementing the meal with their refreshing and well-balanced taste.

The ambiance of Grind is warm and inviting, making it the perfect spot for a relaxing brunch. The staff were friendly and attentive, ensuring that our dining experience was top-notch from start to finish. I highly recommend Grind for anyone looking to enjoy a delicious meal in a cozy and welcoming environment.

For parking you'd have to go to the top car park and take the elevator to the ground floor.

Name: Grind
Author: Prabu Deepan
Review:
Loved it. It was my first time here, and it was a great experience. The food was fresh and tasty, the service was fast, and it's decently priced. They have a wide variety of coffee flavours. They were also quite flexible in making sure we got what we wanted. That Mac and Cheese (only from 11am) was delicious.

I'm not a huge fan of the lobby area coffee dining experience, but I guess it works for people when the food and service is good, everything else is secondary?

I will go back for sure.

Name: Grind
Author: Isabella Grandic
Review:
Cafe at the bottom of an office building. Atmosphere is so-so. Smaller menu than the one at seeds. The avocado toast was good. Felt a bit small for the price. Lacked some spice/flavour? Wish the toast was thicker. I had to add a good amount of salt. Smoothie was nice, refreshing.

No ambience music or vibes really. No wifi. Has AC.

Name: Grind
Author: Thashy Abey
Review: This is a great place for anything. You can have yummy dishes regardless of breakfast, brunch, dinner and evening coffee. All the options are healthy food and they will accommodate your preferences in terms of salt, spicy level and everything. Staff is extremely friendly and they will constantly provide you a great service for you to have a quality time. The ambiance is super with great lighting and spacious enough for bigger crowds as well. The prices are affordable and value for money is there in every aspect.

Name: Grind
Author: Dinushi Perera
Review:
The Grind in Colombo is an absolute gem and undeniably the best cafe in the city. From the moment I walked in, I was captivated by the cozy ambiance and the welcoming atmosphere. The food is simply amazing, and every penny spent here is worth it.

The highlight of my visit was the Korean Chicken Fried Burger and the Gochujang Chicken Mac and Cheese. The burger was a flavor explosion, perfectly crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside, with the right balance of spices. The Gochujang Chicken Mac and Cheese was the epitome of comfort food—creamy, cheesy, with a delightful kick from the gochujang. It was perfect in every way.

To top it all off, I had the best cold Milo I've ever tasted. It was refreshing and perfectly sweetened, making it a perfect companion to the savory dishes.

I absolutely love this place and will definitely make it a point to visit The Grind again when I return to Sri Lanka. Highly recommended for anyone looking for an exceptional dining experience in Colombo

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Kavinda Domenico
Review:
Prices are little bit lower than other bubble tea shops💲✅
Quick Service 👍
You can also use credit/debit cards payments💳
There were a good variety of bubble tea🧋
It's better to increase the portion size🆙

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: STS Palmtop Media Network
Review: This ripmoff joint charge separatly for bubbles… exorbitant prices for the tea or cofee on tip of that they charge for bubbles too. Cofee or the tea was also average nothing nice or specia to say.. must not go rip off place…

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Selvaharan Prabuddha
Review: Very fast and delicious milk tea

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Author: Ashirwada Manamudali
Review: Not worth at all

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea
Address: 261 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Damisha Bandara
Review: Best place to drink chai tea with real taste in this area... Highly recommend! 👌

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea
Author: Aaliya Sukry
Review: "If you're into bubble tea, this place is worth a shot. 🥤 Keep in mind that their menu can vary, offering more or fewer options on different days. Also, there's no seating area and parking can be a bit tough. But let's focus on the bubble tea itself. 🧋 Personally, I've tried the Milo flavor and the Iced Mocha with Coffee Jelly topping – both are perfect for a delightful refreshment, especially on sunny days. ☀️ The challenge, though, lies in getting the sugar level right – whether you prefer it sweeter or less sweet is totally up to you. So, while there are a few things to keep in mind, like the selection, seating, and parking, what truly matters is the bubble tea experience.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea
Author: Dinithi Hasanika
Review: Finally, they restocked popping boba, and I found my favorite Milo bubble tea with caramel popping boba. This is my second visit to this outlet, and what I noticed today is that the cashier is so supportive in helping you select your bubble tea. Although I already knew what I wanted, there were three customers who were confused about what to select. I heard the cashier explain the flavors and assist in choosing the best one. I highly recommend Bubble Me Bubble Tea, it’s worth your money. However, it’s worth noting that this outlet doesn’t have any seating facility and no parking. We can consider this as a drive-through kind of thing.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea
Author: Dilshy Venoli Perera
Review: I have written reviews about this place some time back and Today I decided to give a different opinion. I'm sure Tapioca Pearls are the most sought-after boba option in BubbleMe since it is the only Boba that would pair well with almost all the beverages available. However, the place seems to always have nearly run out of it. If the workers or the management is very well aware that this particular add-on is very high in demand, why would they never seem to have enough stock of it? It isn't very reassuring because whenever I try to order and have it, it is never available.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea
Author: Douglas Aliston
Review: Great place to have Bubble tea. The Milk ones are really good, but the Juice ones are pretty bitter taste. I tried pineapple and Hazel nut flavor milk. Hazel Nut was really good, but the pineapple was kind of bitter taste. They don't have any snack items, it would have been better if they can have some snacks too. Staffs are very knowledge about what they sell, they helps when you ask for suggestions as which will go better with what etc.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea
Author: Anuda Ehas
Review: Price is reasonable. Bubble tea is nice. Service was meh. Not too bad and would recommend

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Gayan Dasanayake
Review: Boba bubbles are like rubber balls, not original. Service is good.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Dilruk Kannangara
Review: Please teach your staff girls & ladies are not visiting there to flirt with them. Pretty bad attitude by the staff.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Vasana Gunasekera
Review: Love the chocolate bube tea alot

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Zid S
Review: You have to pay extra 330 rupees for boba bubbles. Tea is tasty.

Name: Bubbluscious Bubble Tea- Cool Planet Nugegoda
Address: 27 S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Nugegoda
Author: Sehas Anuththara
Review: I tried a bubble tea from bubbluscious for the first time today. I bought a mango smoothie from the Nugegoda outlet.. It's really tasty than I thought. It has a really amazing taste. It's not too expensive. It's normal. Their customer service is also excellent 👍

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - Colombo City Center (CCC)
Address: 3rd Floor, Colombo City Centre Mall, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Samudra de Silva
Review: I've had iced mocha with coffee jelly and it's one of the best chilled caffein drinks ever. Loved it. Milo was good too. Condensed milk tea was so sugary even with 0% sugar and the rest of the combos are too candy looking for my liking.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - Colombo City Center (CCC)
Address: 3rd Floor, Colombo City Centre Mall, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Nisali Devindi
Review: We visited bubble me at CCC and the customer service was great. We tried Chocolate milk tea with coffee jelly popping boba 😋, best bubble tea ever! The drink was refreshing 🧋 really love it 😍 highly recommended ,Bubble me bubble tea 🥰

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - Colombo City Center (CCC)
Address: 3rd Floor, Colombo City Centre Mall, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Kimodi Wijesuriya
Review:
Again visited my favorite bubble me bubble tea 🧋 at CCC. We tried Chocolate milk tea with coffee jelly popping boba 😍
Best bubble tea so far i tried! We loved it 🥰
Highly recommended everyone who’s looking boba 🧋❤️

Again visited my favorite bubble me bubble tea 🧋 at CCC. We tried Chocolate milk tea with coffee jelly popping boba 😍
Best bubble tea so far i tried! We loved it 🥰
Highly recommended everyone who’s looking boba 🧋❤️

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - Colombo City Center (CCC)
Address: 3rd Floor, Colombo City Centre Mall, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Nitasha Berry
Review:
I often spot Thai Milk Tea on menus and inquire if it's the authentic version, but unfortunately, it usually isn't. Despite the appealing options, they are overpriced—a single tea costs almost as much as a food for 2 in the food court.

My advice? Save your money and opt for the juice instead.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - Colombo City Center (CCC)
Address: 3rd Floor, Colombo City Centre Mall, 137 Sir James Pieris Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Hasi HANNAH
Review:
Omg the worst bubble tea experience!! Really disappointed with the taste quality and the service.
We got the Thai milk tea and was soooo not worth the price. It costed 2200/- and the guy at the cashier recommended that it’s the best. It honestly tasted really bad..
Also  truely worthless to pay extra for bubbles ( tapioca pearls ) from a bubble tea shop. I would never try your bubble tea ever and would not recommend it to anyone .

Name: Bubbluscious at Arcade
Author: Ar.J Gunasekera
Review:
Me and my friend were craving for for bubble tea🧋so we decided to stop by bubbluscious and satisfy our craving.
I got a faluda tea while my friend ordered milo tea. As for the bubbles he said let's get popping bubbles which matched perfectly with the ice cream topped faluda, but not with the milo. (I suggest getting the chewy one for that)
Other than that the two workers were quite friendly and helpful although it took sometime it was worth the wait for us.
The seating was the box benches lying around arcade ofc though I wish there were some air conditioning cz it was warm.

Name: Bubbluscious at Arcade
Author: praneeth indula
Review: They have wide variety of Bubble Drinks and Desserts. The drinks can be customized  to the size and sweetness levels. But the staff never asks. Seating available for few (3 person)

Name: Bubbluscious at Arcade
Author: Arosh Ariyawansha
Review: A tiny lovely clean outlet in Arcade near Burger King. Tried a few cups from their range. Choco & Strawberry Lush one is a must try. Absolutely loved it. But the same cannot be said about Rose Faluda and Mango Smoothie. But they have a really good range of options. No enough seating capacity if you’re planning to have a sip while chatting with your friends. Can customize the drinks and add Tapioca Bubbles or Chewing Bubbles depending on your preference for Rs. 250.00.

Name: Bubbluscious at Arcade
Author: South Peak
Review: Had passion fruit bubble tea and Nutella supreme. Passion fruit was too sweet and thick, the Nutella supreme wasn’t rich enough for the price. But the service was good

Name: Bubbluscious at Arcade
Author: Nirosh Perera
Review: Thai Chicken Rice - the taste is not how it used to be! Not happy! You must maintain the quality and need to be consistent, Gall to Colombo side

Name: Bubble Monster
Author: yeshni Nuwandi
Review: I orderd a Faluda with Boba through Uber Eats, becuase we had ordered this before and was happy with the quality. But this time when I orderd, I decided to use my mug to drink as its easier than the bottle. (I made sure to wash my mug prior to using it obviously).  But while drinking I noticed a Matchstick in the drink. I immeditaly took a picture and sent to them for clarifcation. At first they apologized and agreed to send me another drink. But a few minutes later a lady called and began to question me and refused to accept the mistake from them. She began to imply that I had faked the matchstick to get another drink. She kept saying she was 100% sure they dont use matchsticks and also trusted the rider. The conversation later turned to me trying to defend myself rather than them apologizing for their mistake. While I would have been fine even without a replacement, its the ladies etiquette and lack of customer service that made this place even worse.

Name: Bubble Monster
Author: akram nazar
Review:
Clearly this place is a ripoff. Go through the reviews and you will find countless disappointed customers.
I paid over 2600 for an oreo boba shake via Uber eats  but what I got tasted more like a milo boba shake. I chose to pay more because it was what I wanted  and so that I'd be satisfied with my drink. But it seems like I ended up getting a basic chocolaty milkshake with boba.  The drink size is far too less for the price they charge. Not worth it.
When I put an order review to complain they simply gave a generic response and didn't seem to care about dealing with the problem. Zero attempts made to rectify the matter. Utter disgrace of an establishment.
Would never order from these guys again and will be sure to tell all my friends & family.

Name: Bubble Monster
Author: Edwin Rajan
Review: I ordered this on Ubereats - am visiting Sri Lanka and was craving some bubble tea. Got a little worried after ordering and surfing the reviews. I ended up calling the store to confirm whether any of the feedback below is true - they claim they use fresh ingredients. I waited and I got a regular sized milk tea with pearls. The pearls are a little chewier than normal compared to other places and the tea was a little too sweet for me but was 1550LKR for 2 small ones. Would I buy it again - Sure.

Name: Bubble Monster
Author: Saruniya
Review:
I recently ordered from Bubble Monster via Uber Eats with high hopes of enjoying a refreshing boba tea, but my experience left me extremely disappointed. I have to be honest and share my concerns about the quality of their drinks.

First and foremost, the boba tea I received had an odd taste and an unmistakable feeling as if it was made with expired ingredients. It was evident from the moment I took my first sip that something was off. The flavor was not at all what I expected from a reputable boba tea shop.

Moreover, the chewy boba pearls were an absolute letdown. They had an unusual texture and taste, and I suspect they might have been made with flour instead of tapioca starch. As a regular boba tea enthusiast, I'm familiar with the delightful chewiness of tapioca pearls, but this batch felt entirely different and not in a good way.

As a customer, I hope that Bubble Monster takes this feedback seriously and takes steps to ensure better quality control in the future.

Name: Bubble Monster
Author: Melbee By
Review: The worst boba tea i've ever had. It was like having ages old flour balls soaked in a milk tea. Even so, there wasn't even a handful of boba in the tea for the price i had to pay.. I could literally count the four five pearls. Will not recommend to anyone!!

Name: Miss Winni Bubble Tea - Havelock City Mall B1
Author: Sashini Fernando
Review: A simple iced ‘bubble tea’ without bubbles cost 1600-1800. If you want to make it a bubble tea you have to pay extra 400 though there’s no mention of it in the menu that they display. It simply says xxxxx bubble tea. The service was great but the drinks are not worth half the price. The additional price for bubbles is understandable but that should be mentioned in the menu at the first place

Name: Miss Winni Bubble Tea - Havelock City Mall B1
Author: Anastasia Niveus
Review:
First of all, its very hard to find. Whatever you are looking for, it is located on floor B1, next to the entrance to the supermarket.

When we arrived, almost the entire menu was on the stop list, except for the standard milk tea. We took one brown sugar bubble milk tea and Taiwan Jasmine bubble milk tea. Both are good, taste authentic Asian milk tea. The tapioca balls are great too. The only thing - for me brown sugar bubble milk tea was too sweet. Recommended for visiting 10000%.

Name: Miss Winni Bubble Tea - Havelock City Mall B1
Author: Akitha Chandula
Review: I recently tried the matcha bubble tea, and it was a huge disappointment. I paid an extra 400 rupees for the bubbles, but it wasn't worth it at all. The flavor was overwhelmingly bitter and lacked the smoothness that good matcha should have. The texture was grainy, and the tapioca pearls were hard and undercooked. Overall, it was an unpleasant experience, and I wouldn’t recommend it to anyone looking for a decent bubble tea. Definitely not worth the extra cost for the bubbles.

Name: Miss Winni Bubble Tea - Havelock City Mall B1
Author: Thakshila Dayarathna
Review: I had to walk until my legs hurt to find this place at Havelock City Mall. The location was really hard to find. I got chocolate brown sugar bubble tea. The price was around 2000 rupees. Staff were nice, and they helped to find the best suitable drinks. Also, they made my drink with low sugar as I requested.

Name: Miss Winni Bubble Tea - Havelock City Mall B1
Author: Pavani Thrimavithana
Review:
Recently visited the Miss Winni Bubble Tea shop at Havelock city as we wanted to try the Matcha drinks. The staff’s friendliness and willingness to explain the menu and provide recommendations were noteworthy.

We tried Oreo Brown Sugar Bubble tea with bobba and Matcha Raw Coconut Latte. It’s a must try for anyone looking for something different and delicious.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Hasi HANNAH
Review:
Got their crème brûlée milk tea and it tasted pretty good . But it’s a bit too pricey but I won’t complain. I got the medium for 1700/- and the large was 2200/-  It’s quite similar to the one I tasted in china.  And the tapioca pearls were of good quality well. I would rate the drink 9/10.

The space  was a bit small but  it wasn’t crowded when I visited . Could accommodate 10-15 ppl. The lady who made the tea did a good job but I wish it was a bit more  cold.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: s e s h a
Review:
I happened to be walking past this place so thought I’d go in and order a bubble tea.  Then I noticed they didn’t have a single bubble tea flavor that I wanted.  It’s kind of strange that a bubble tea shop doesn’t have the basic Mango bubble tea or Lychee bubble tea. They had a Mango pudding bubble tea which was a bit strange to me.  Don’t expect to find your normal fruit flavored bubble teas here, you won’t find them.

There are two Chinese people working here (I think they own it) and they do not speak a single word of English.  So they hired a Sri Lankan girl to work there and she couldn’t answer anything about the bubble tea, but that was her second day of work so I cannot blame her.  This place is probably catering to all the Chinese people either visiting or working in Colombo.

I actually felt bad for them so I ordered a medium lime juice and it was just OK and pretty weak flavored lime juice.  How can you not make a good lime juice in SL? The guy squeezed a fresh lime but probably should have added more lime juice because it was watered down.  I will not be going back to this place again.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Krishanthi Seneviratne
Review: It was more than I expected, actually. Love the menu a lot. Genuine Chinese  bobo tea u gotta  try this place for sure. They have a unique  menu  for them, especially.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chalani Peiris
Review: Ordered their Milo and caramel bobo teas. They didn’t taste good. The sugar inside the caramel one was not even mixed properly and with every sip we had sugar crystals in our mouth. The Milo one didn’t even taste like a Milo bubble tea and it tasted like it’s made for a diabetic patient. Not recommending.

Name: BoBo Tea
Address: Shop No 7, Astoria Mall, 418 R. A. De Mel Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Geeth Rajive
Review:
Worst customer service, worst bubble tea ever. Not humble even to listen to customer suggestions. So expensive and not worth,
If they say a suggestion, they always say that it is the way the Chinese like it.We bought a Milo.  Milo is like totaly water.  There was no Milo flavor at all.  We are not usually people who add sugar to Milo.  When I asked to leave a spoonful of Milo because the taste of the Milo was less, they said that they would charge for it.  Think how  worst the custom service is. please dont visit.

Name: Bubbluscious
Address: K Zone , Galle Road , Moratuwa , Western Province, 10400
Author: Sudheera Senaratne
Review:
Prices aren't reasonable and the service isn't customer friendly. Not recommended unless you have no other option.

Reasons for the low rating -
1. the milk coffee is made with milk powder, not fresh milk.
2. hot beverages are served in paper cups, not glass/ceramic cups.
3. no sugar free options.
4. the price of a milk coffee is way above average.

Name: Bubbluscious
Address: K Zone , Galle Road , Moratuwa , Western Province, 10400
Author: Dinithi Hasanika
Review: I recommend this place for bubble tea. I’ve visited 3 to 4 times, and it hasn’t disappointed me so far. I’ve tried milo bubble tea, mocha coffee bubble tea, brownie cookie bubble tea, and strawberry blackcurrant. Personally, I prefer adding peach popping bubbles over chewing bubbles. I’ve also tried their mango smoothie, which was thick and satisfying. The customer service is good, but portions are smaller compared to other bubble tea places. The prices are reasonable.

Name: Bubbluscious
Address: K Zone , Galle Road , Moratuwa , Western Province, 10400
Author: Rayan Fonseka
Review:
Best place fo drink bubble tea..🤩😍
Dubble chocolate caramel 🧋🧋😍,

Name: Bubbluscious
Address: K Zone , Galle Road , Moratuwa , Western Province, 10400
Author: Dakshina Patabandi
Review: Wow this place is so beautiful.  They have many varieties of bubble tea and they are very tasty.  Bubbles are available in two types and have good service.  Try it.

Name: Bubbluscious
Address: K Zone , Galle Road , Moratuwa , Western Province, 10400
Author: Samithu Hettiarachchi
Review: Good place to have a bubble tea. We bought the milo bubble tea with strawberry popping bubbles. they also serve cold coffees, smoothies, shakes and few more. Located inside the Moratuwa Kzone. Prices range from 650-1000+ lkr. They charge extra for bubbles (around 250/-). Recommended for anyone who's looking for a refreshing bubble tea

Name: Ulife Bubble Tea
Author: Enzo S
Review: Would 100% recommend!! Found this gem a few meters from our apartment rental. Amazingly reasonable prices. We ordered two bubble milk teas and it came to less than 2000!! (Some places in colombo you couldn’t even get one for that price!). Yummy milk tea made by very sweet and welcoming staff. Don’t forget to check this place out! P.S it is also part of a Chinese supermarket.

Name: Ulife Bubble Tea
Author: Charitha Ratnayaka
Review: Went there with a few friends to try out the bubble tea. We got budding milk tea and it was great. They have small and large sizes. Even the small size will fill you up significantly.  The staff was friendly and explained everything to us since it was our first visit. Apart from milk tea, they have various naturally flavoured lemon teas, various types of juices with cheese and some more. Great place to grab a drink. We loved it. Definitely we will return again for more.

Name: Ulife Bubble Tea
Author: Senali Ranmuthugala
Review:
It was a nice dinning set up ideal for Chinese people
I ordered pork cabbage dumplings and chocolate boba tea it was good and worthy for the price i paid i wanted to try dumplings from them
All in all it was a good experience and solo date friendly for a girl ♥️
Staff was really nice and they speak english - sinhalese as well there are Chinese speakers too
I recommend for people who wanna try new food places ♥️

Name: Ulife Bubble Tea
Author: Qatrelnada Al-Khonji
Review:
Very disappointed
The ladies don't understand what they are making
It's all powder mixes
The pearls are hard
No taste of any tea and we are in SRI LANKA, the place for teas.

Name: Ulife Bubble Tea
Author: Pasan Anushanga
Review:
The offer bubble teas and a few other drinks, though no other foods.

Their bubble tea is tasty, but I'm not sure how close it is to the original tea or bubbles. Anyway, the price is why higher than displayed on the door. On the door, it said 600 LKR, but there was no such option when buying.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - One Galle Face (OGF) Shangri-La Mall
Address: One Galle Face Mall LG K6 (Lower Ground, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Sachi Antany
Review: Bubble Me Bubble Tea offers high-quality, delicious drinks, though they are a bit pricey. We tried the Milo with boba for Rs. 1400, and it was worth it. Enjoy your drink before it cools down for the best experience. Highly recommended for bubble tea lovers!

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - One Galle Face (OGF) Shangri-La Mall
Address: One Galle Face Mall LG K6 (Lower Ground, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Naduni Damsarani
Review: The bubble tea I had with milo and black perl was really taste good. But the quality of the cup they served was not good.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - One Galle Face (OGF) Shangri-La Mall
Address: One Galle Face Mall LG K6 (Lower Ground, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: shalitha senanayaka
Review:
I recently tried two bubble tea options; condensed milk tea with Caramel bubbles and condensed milk tea with Coffe Jelly bubbles: great taste, and no complaints. Recommend these two options from this shop. Note that, please consider about the sweetness of your bubble tea, I recommend to use 25% sweetness or lower.

The staff is also very helpful, and the service is excellent. If you're new to bubble tea, I recommend asking them for you to choose the correct bubble tea option for you.

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - One Galle Face (OGF) Shangri-La Mall
Address: One Galle Face Mall LG K6 (Lower Ground, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Thakshila Dayarathna
Review: Favorite place for solo dates. Macha bubble tea is the favorite one. The bitter flavor is more sweet to me. Highly recommended to boba lovers!

Name: Bubble Me Bubble Tea - One Galle Face (OGF) Shangri-La Mall
Address: One Galle Face Mall LG K6 (Lower Ground, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Archchana Ganeshalingam
Review: Had my first bubble tea experience. Worth the wait. The milo bubble tea with tapioca pearls and 25% sweetness was absolutely good. Wanna try more and more options but the only thing restricting is the price.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Anastasia Niveus
Review: Very nice place with friendly staff. The tea is natural, without any strange additives. We came here 3 times during our trip to Sri Lanka, tried almost the entire menu, all positions are worthy and suitable for different people. There are both milk teas and fruit teas. I highly recommend visiting this place :)

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Kero Chan
Review: We enjoyed both the 'KARUTHA COLUMBAN' & KITHUL HAKURU DAYDREAM very much. Staff made them with less sugar so it was not too sweet and would not make you thirsty afterwards.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Tharanee K Chandran
Review:
Tea Tang at One Galle Face Mall offers a delightful bubble tea experience. The Wattalappan bubble tea stood out with its rich flavors, chewy tapioca pearls, and crunchy cashews, making it a top-notch choice. In contrast, the Tin Milk bubble tea fell short of expectations, lacking the same depth of flavor.

The shop also features an impressive selection of export-grade teas, with 100g packs priced at Rs 1980, allowing customers to smell various fragrances before purchase. Currently, they have a promotion of any two bubble teas for Rs 1500, providing us a savings of Rs 600, making it a great deal for tea lovers.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Katie
Review: Great bubble tea! It was clean and that view of tea estates really brightened up my bubble tea experience! Will go there more often! Was my first time there last week, wished i visited there sooner.

Name: TEA TANG BOUTIQUE - ONE GALLE FACE MALL
Address: One Gall Face Mall ,LK, 15 Level 2, 1A Centre Road, Colombo
Author: Homoud Alhajri, PMP, RMP
Review: Tea Tang, nestled in the heart of the city, is a haven for tea enthusiasts seeking delightful concoctions. Offering an array of amazing drinks, from classic brews to innovative blends, it caters to diverse palates. Mr. Kumara and Miss Kasuni epitomize exceptional customer service, with their warmth and attentiveness enhancing the overall experience. Whether it's a refreshing iced tea or a soothing hot brew, patrons are treated to unparalleled quality and hospitality. Step into Tea Tang to indulge in a journey of flavors, guided by the expertise of its dedicated staff.

Name: Heavenly Bubble Tea
Author: Shanaka Sudarshana
Review:
Very tasty and quick service. The place is very comfortable. We bought a chocolate one. It is very tasty.

Highly recommend place ❤️

Name: Heavenly Bubble Tea
Author: BlackTrucK
Review:
Good bubble tea in town... especially bubbles are so tasty ☺️
My daughter enjoyed the atmosphere and she was happy to stay more. Also have to mention staff are so friendly and they will help you if you can't choose for yourself.

Name: Heavenly Bubble Tea
Author: Udara Katugampala
Review: We had the chocolate milk tea. It tasted more like water. We were not happy with the customer service too. Portion was good.

Name: Heavenly Bubble Tea
Author: kavindu malitha
Review: Owner is very friendly and they offer various flavors. They  gave me 20% discount as well. It’s the best bubble tea shop in colombo.

Name: Heavenly Bubble Tea
Author: chethani kavindya
Review: I bought the milo milk tea. It’s very tasty. Boba is yummy and good quality. It is worth for price. Staff are so friendly and quick service.

Name: Bubble Space
Author: Sharmi Krish
Review: Tasty bubble tea at a reasonable price!

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Navin Perera
Review:
* The place is nice with nice people
* Was there somewhat early in the morning and the short eats were fresh (Fish buns were worth the price Rs.50/=)
* Ordered waffles but it was half baked - told them about it and they re-baked, but still came out half baked. Might be a one-off incident but that was a little disappointing
* Has parking space for about 4-5 vehicles
* Nice interior
* 500ml mineral water bottle was sold at Rs.90/= although the marked retail price was Rs. 85/=

UPDATED 03/03/18
* Fish buns were Rs.100/= each (not Rs.50/=)

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Prasadee Jayasuriya
Review: Nice place situated near the main road. Price is reasonable and the food is tasty but the portions are a bit too much for a single person. Had a chicken submarine, a chicken burger and a strawberry bubble tea between 2 ppl. The food was served with spicy crispy onion rings. The food was tasty.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Thivanka Manjula (TMV)
Review: A great place to enjoy a tasty meal to a reasonable price. Do not miss to stop and enjoy if you are traveling towards Colombo on the baseline road.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Kavindu Tennakoon
Review: Tea Blog is managed by some of the nicest people you’ll ever meet. They’re very friendly, and attentive but unfortunately, they took around good 40 minutes to deliver our food and drinks to the table. Tip : Try Ice creams they have uniquely tastes.

Name: Tea Blog
Author: Dimith Jayasinghe
Review: Good food and drinks. not too expensive

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Ramidu Ranashanka
Review: Tea story is located at One Galle Face mall and their beverages are exceptional. The most important part is the packaging. The cup that they give us comes in handy because it is reusable.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Chamikara Kariyapperuma
Review:
Found this bubble tea spot on the LG floor. Tried the Classic milk tea with blueberry boba. it was a tasty mix. and the prices were fair. However, I wish they had more options available.

The service was okay, but I was disappointed that they didn't ask about sugar levels. Overall, I would say it's worth a visit if you're looking for a decent bubble tea.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: You can select the type of boba you want to add here. The base options are good but it would be great if they had some crushes as well in this hot weather with flavored iced tea. The staff is friendly, but there was a considerable waiting line. No place to sit by which was another draw back. The bubble tea is of good quality and the cup looks cute. But the prices were a bit too expensive

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: S.M.A Angela
Review:
I recently purchased a pineapple orange mix fruit bubble tea from your store, and unfortunately, my experience was quite disappointing. The drink was extremely sweet, to the point where it was almost undrinkable. The excessive sweetness overpowered any natural flavors of the fruit, making it a very unpleasant beverage.

Additionally, the staff's attitude was really poor. They were unhelpful and seemed uninterested in providing good customer service. He acted like we are buying for free, i think extra sweetness was on purpose. This added to the overall negative experience. I hope the sweetness levels can be adjusted in the future, and that staff can be trained to offer better service.

Name: Tea story Colombo
Author: Divyath Fernando
Review: I enjoyed the refreshing bubble tea with its perfect blend of flavours at your store in One Galle Face. The packaging was impressive, and the variety of tea-based drinks offered is fantastic. Prices are reasonable, making it a great value. While the customer service was average, the overall atmosphere was good, creating a pleasant experience. Keep up the great work!

Name: BUBBLE TEA BY BUBBLE WORLD
Author: Isuri De Alwis
Review: I ordered the oreo cookie creamer. It was really good . The prices are the same as any other bubble tea place. The place is a cute cozy nook, very nice for pictures. I ordered a takeout, the guy there really took it to the next level on packing it, didn't spill a drop on the way 👍.

Name: BUBBLE TEA BY BUBBLE WORLD
Author: Nipuna Perera
Review: I ordered Milo bubble tea, and it was a bit too sweet. It would be better if the salesperson asked about the sugar level from the customer. However, the salesperson quickly prepared it. Since the place is not crowded, it's good for singles and couples. My personal experience with the shop was not pleasant. I hope they will consider Google Maps reviews and improve their service. Good luck.

Name: BUBBLE TEA BY BUBBLE WORLD
Author: Bimsara Wickramarathne
Review:
Well in terms of bubble tea I wouldn’t recommend this place. Prices are really too much for what you get. Could get better bubble tea for this price.
Not the most welcoming service but okay.
Interior and atmosphere looks great but hope if food items had the same :(

Name: BUBBLE TEA BY BUBBLE WORLD
Author: Piyumi Premathilake
Review: I ordered Chocolate Milk with Black Pearls. I didn’t like the taste. It was like having an iced coffee. Prices are too high. Btw I like the Atmosphere. Nice interior design.

Name: BUBBLE TEA BY BUBBLE WORLD
Author: Amandika Cooray
Review: I thoroughly enjoyed my Milo bubble tea at this beautifully designed shop. The ambiance is delightful. However, the prices are on the higher side.

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: sanjeewa madusanka
Review: I have ordered some cakes,coffee and bubble tea. The cakes are a little bit dry but it is ok. Mango bubble tea is so sweet. I think they should reduce the sugar level. The place is nice with comfortable seats

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: Thiwanka Gunasinghe
Review:
The Bubble Tea House delivers on the good stuff: friendly service, fair prices, and tasty bubble tea that hits the spot. Finding parking was easy, which is a big win. However, the small space gets loud with staff chatter and the blender, making conversation a challenge.

Overall, it's a good option for bubble tea fans, but some noise reduction would make it a more relaxing hangout.

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: Sadesh Abeysinghe
Review:
I recently visited The Bubble Tea House, and here's my detailed review:

Parking and Accessibility
I was pleased to find ample parking space available, which is always a plus when visiting a busy establishment. It made the whole experience more convenient from the start.

Staff and Service
The staff at The Bubble Tea House were kind and courteous, contributing positively to the overall atmosphere. Their friendly demeanor added to the enjoyment of the visit.

Beverage Quality
The drinks we ordered were flavorful and tasty, living up to the expectations I've had from previous bubble tea experiences. The quality was on par with what I've come to expect from similar establishments.

Ambiance and Noise Levels
One aspect that detracted from the overall experience was the loud chatter among the staff. While it's understandable that evening shifts can be tiring, the noise level was quite distracting. Additionally, the noise from the blender during drink preparation filled the tiny shop, making it difficult to hold a conversation. We had to pause our discussion multiple times due to the high noise levels.

Price
The prices at The Bubble Tea House were reasonable, which is always appreciated, especially for a treat like bubble tea.

Overall
In summary, The Bubble Tea House offers a satisfying bubble tea experience, with courteous staff and reasonable prices. However, there are some areas that need improvement, particularly the noise levels within the shop. I would recommend this establishment to bubble tea enthusiasts but hope that they can address the issues I've mentioned to enhance the overall customer experience.

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: Kavindi
Review:
Few days ago I visited this place & ordered a cookie cream ice cream & strawberry bubble tea. Ice cream is so good. But the bubble tea is worst. They are not putting good bubbles for the drink. May be they made it by themselves. How ever Im not recommend this place for bubble tea.

Staff is quite good. But they are not talking with customers even properly. They are just smiling only 🥲🥲🥲

Name: The Bubble Tea House
Author: Chanuri Fernando
Review: Worst place ever. This place is a scam. The boba pearls were so bad i think they were made from plain flour it tasted so bad. I was soo disappointed . The boba was so disgusting

Name: The Layover - Marine Drive
Author: Rimshan Rizvi
Review: Got a promotion through the Feelo app for their bubble tea. We tried their bubble tea savoury waffle and also their club sandwich. It was delicious. Highly recommended for families and friends for their casual hangouts.

Name: The Layover - Marine Drive
Author: Dharshi Chandran
Review: Best ever place. And had the best cappuccino and sandwiches ever. Highly recommended and just love it. Will visit again ❤️

Name: The Layover - Marine Drive
Author: ShawnthePaul
Review:
To be very honest with you, I'm happy I visited because it was mainly to understand the hype on social media, which to be fair was a good hype. But was the restaurant up to par? Probably not.

First of all the place is very nice on the eye. Even though I don't take many pictures I feel this place would be a great option for people who do.

Obviously a restaurant should be judged mainly for the food. Not impressed. As soon as we stepped in, we realized the menu lacked savory items. Which begs the question if it's a sweet place?

Even if that's the case, I highly doubt that at least for me the sandwiches were not enough and taste wise, I'll give it a 6/10.

If this is a sweet tooth focused place, I would have to judge those kinds of desserts then. So I got the New Belgium Waffle (pardon me I can't remember the name)

I've had so many chocolatey waffles but this one felt dull. It was too crispy to my liking and it really killed the taste, I didn't quite enjoy it cause it was mostly chewy. Maybe you may have the audience for crispy chocolate waffles but that audience is not me.

Service also wasn't the greatest like the reviewers have mentioned but it is decent.

Either way I put a 4 star review because I was asked to put a good review.

Probably wouldn't visit again, unless I don't have an option or if they step up the game massively. Until then, I guess the place next door is a safer bet.

Name: The Layover - Marine Drive
Author: hashi langley
Review: Had a Caramel shake (with tapioca pearls) and a Nutella crepe fettuccini. Those two were very delicious. The staff is very friendly. The view is amazing ❤️ Keep up the good works❤️

Name: The Layover - Marine Drive
Author: Haiqa Zaffarulla
Review: We loved the crepe we had; it was so filling and delicious. The quality of all their food is amazing. I would definitely come back.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: Pinithi Jayathilake
Review: I love their food so much! Especially the Nutella Waffles and the Burgers! But I wish they would renovate the place a bit especially upstairs has lost its upkeep. Maybe a fresh coat of paint and some new furniture but other than that the food is amazing!!

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: Bhanuka Senerath
Review:
Nice place right in the heart of colombo. Decent amount of parking available. Indoor and outdoor seating also available.
I went here to meet up with a friend for a chat. The interior was nice, but unfortunately I didn't have enough time to check-out the whole place.
They have nice selection of drinks and food.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: E.D.L. Nisansala
Review: This is one of the places where there is the most friendly and considerate customer service. They’ re very nice to the customers. Their dishes are top notch. Very tasty and fresh. Also if you’re a tea lover, this is the place for it. Nice surrounding. Good to spend an evening with a cup of tea and a nice book. Parking space is available. Loved this place.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: ARA ASOKAN
Review: Great and accommodating and friendly staff. Food was good. Atmosphere was nice. I visited the havelock location daily for over month while I stayed in Colombo. Added a couple photos.

Name: Tea Avenue
Author: r2thebizel
Review: Beautiful from the outside but gets less well kept the deeper you go inside. Service is excellent and friendly. The food is fairly good but they didn’t have quite a bit in later on in the day.

Name: QuQu Cafe
Author: Dilini Ranasinghe
Review:
Quaint cafe on the ground floor at OGF. Very inviting.
Food is amazing! A lot of healthy options available as well if required, and they are very willing to customise in case of any food intolerance or allergies.
Definitely try their croissants and  cinnamon roll if you're not looking for a main meal.
Multiple options for drinks including coffee, tea, bubble tea, shakes etc as well.
Staff is friendly and helpful.
Lovely ambience.

Name: QuQu Cafe
Author: Sandali Malalasekera
Review: Ququ Cafe is so aesthetic and cute. We had the Chicken Bolognese Pasta, Charcoal Chicken Burger, and a Chicken Salad. Everything was so good! The Virgin Mojito, Blueberry Mojito, and Chocolate Milkshake were delightful as well. Highly recommend! 💖😍

Name: QuQu Cafe
Author: Osuri Niroma
Review: Just had the QuQu super chicken burger and roses cream pasta at QuQu cafe, and wow, they're delicious! The staff is super friendly, and the atmosphere is just right. Highly recommended.

Name: QuQu Cafe
Author: Sanc
Review: The staff is really friendly and attending and the cafe has a cozy ambience and seating. I didn’t try much from their menu or any of their signatures. I got a matcha latte and requested to replace dairy with coconut milk. There were a lot of small milk clots on the drink :/

Name: QuQu Cafe
Author: Kimodi Wijesuriya
Review:
Recently, we went to try their bubble tea. 🧋 Ordered Oreo bubble tea with coffee jelly. They have two size options.The portion size was okay and worth the price as well.
The cafe is located in One Galle Face Mall. I love their ambience. It’s very modern.
They have a great variety of food and drinks. The place was clean, and the customer service was great.
I can recommend them to all the boba lovers 🤗❤️
Cons: paper drinking straws 🥲

Recently, we went to try their bubble tea. 🧋 Ordered Oreo bubble tea with coffee jelly. They have two size options.The portion size was okay and worth the price as well.
The cafe is located in One Galle Face Mall. I love their ambience. It’s very modern.
They have a great variety of food and drinks. The place was clean, and the customer service was great.
I can recommend them to all the boba lovers 🤗❤️
Cons: paper drinking straws 🥲

Name: Miss Winni Bubble tea
Author: Muscle Factory
Review:
Biggest fan here !!! I travel to Malaysia and Thailand often. Always look forward to coming back to lanka and ordering from Miss Winni. They got the best brown sugar milk tea. Haven’t tried anything else. I’m happy with my brown sugar.

Pricey, but I don’t care. They provide the best bubble tea and I would pay premium for it !!!

I hope you guys don’t close. Ever !!!! 🙏🙏🙏

Name: Miss Winni Bubble tea
Author: Prasad Perera
Review: Absolutely delighted with my Thai bubble tea experience! 🌟 The tantalizing blend of authentic Thai tea and those delightful tapioca pearls created a burst of flavor with each sip. The balance of sweetness and creaminess was perfection, making it a true treat for the taste buds. Refreshing, indulgent, and a must-try for any bubble tea enthusiast!

Name: Miss Winni Bubble tea
Author: Fathima
Review:
The entire ambience is cute and cozy. They had a wide range of options to choose from and friendly customer service.

However, it's expensive and the taste was average. There are more reasonable bubble teas out there.

Thank you for your service  Miss Winni Bubble Tea.

Name: Miss Winni Bubble tea
Author: Mahoda Adikari
Review: I had my worst bubble tea experience here. Look how much ice is left even after almost a half of ice is already dissolved. At first the taste was so good, after like 2 minutes, the taste was terrible due to the load of ice they have put in. Not worth it at all. Really disappointed. Wouldn’t recommend to any of my friends.

Name: Miss Winni Bubble tea
Author: Sadeesha Peiris
Review: Great little nook for Bubble tea! Very good packaging as well. Brown sugar bubble tea is always my go-to. Never disappoints. Make sure to ask for less ice.

Name: O & O
Author: Tirzah Suares
Review: Absolutely delicious food made with a lot of love and care.  I've loved every meal I've ordered so far. Totally recommend this place.

Name: O & O
Author: Apeksha Ranasinghe
Review: Highly recommended for some home made food with great taste. Thank you for the service. Keep it up ✌️

Name: O & O
Author: Charles Samuel
Review: The Poori was just super!! Soft and flaky. Value for money. Thanks.

Name: O & O
Author: MADURANGA C NUWANPRIYA
Review:
For your taste,
Reasonable price,
Friendly Service

Name: Bubble Mania - Royal Arcade Colombo 05
Author: Kokila Shilpeswarage
Review:
Went here for a bubble waffle on a weekday. There wasn't much crowd.
There was a sign saying scan and pay and get 10% off. When inquired about it, the cashier said, not just by scanning you get the 10% off, you need to give a 5 star rating.
We hadn't even had the food yet by then, so how could we give a 5 star rating.
It seemed pathetic that they go to such levels to get false feedback on their products.

We had this bubble waffle with cookies and it was OK in taste. But it wasn't fresh. It wasn't hot, the waffle so it seemed that the waffles are pre-made and served.
They didn't take much time to serve the order, it was pretty quick.
The portion size was satisfactory to the price however it should have been fresh.

Name: Bubble Mania - Royal Arcade Colombo 05
Author: Baakisan Balasingam
Review: I went to buy the savory waffles and bought 2 waffles with buy 1 get 1 offer. They was so tasty and spicy. The customer service is excellent.

Name: Bubble Mania - Royal Arcade Colombo 05
Author: Mohamed Anfas (Travel Hunter)
Review: Tried Belgium heavenly chocolate, Black virgin mojito and Cookie monster milkshake. Belgium heavenly chocolate tastes heavenly as the name says, and I liked the Cookie monster milkshake too.

Name: Bubble Mania - Royal Arcade Colombo 05
Author: Mahesh Wanninayaka
Review: Nice ad cool place. Foods are so delicious and have friendly staff.

Name: Bubble Mania - Royal Arcade Colombo 05
Author: Hashantha Hemachandra
Review:
I recently visited Bubblemania at The Royal Arcade and had a delightful experience. While the atmosphere was fairly standard, the food was absolutely amazing.

We tried the strawberry bubble waffle with white chocolate, and it was a true delight. The combination of warm, fluffy waffle, sweet strawberries, and rich white chocolate was perfect. The presentation was also on point, making it a feast for the eyes as well as the taste buds.

To top it off, Bubblemania's prices are very reasonable, making it an affordable indulgence. I also recommend trying their mojitos - they're a refreshing complement to the sweet treats.

Overall, Bubblemania is a great spot for satisfying your sweet tooth and enjoying a refreshing drink. The delicious food, reasonable prices,

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Chathumaduri Hettiarachchi
Review: Best go to place when you want a break from your busy day. Love their food and coffees. Staff is very friendly.  🥰

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Rozanne Jansz
Review: I come here on a regular basis. I really enjoy the calm peaceful vibe. Even the service is very good.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Inujan Ravindran
Review: Java Lounge on Duplication Road offers a delightful experience worth savoring. From the moment you step in, the friendly staff welcomes you with warmth and enthusiasm, enhancing the overall ambiance. The Almond Croissant is a heavenly treat, perfectly complemented by the rich aroma of the Mocha Coffee. Don’t miss out on indulging in the Java Cookie Cream Frappe; it’s simply irresistible. The Nai Miri Kochi Baguette stands out as a must-try, showcasing the culinary excellence of the outlet. Each bite is a fusion of flavors that tantalize the taste buds and leave you craving for more. Whether you’re looking for a quick bite or a leisurely coffee experience, Java Lounge on Duplication Road exceeds expectations with its exceptional service and delectable offerings.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: rumesh fernando
Review:
Well its a nice and great place ...
Absolutely nice and cool environment for a ☕ with a cheese cake or more

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Binuka Nishad Bamunuge
Review: One of the best places to have a coffee and spend some quality time. Adequate seating space is also available with comfy chairs and sofas.

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sathieeswaran Mohanathasan
Review:
One of my favorite cafes in Colombo without any doubt. The reasons:

- it’s 24 hours (what else do you need? 😜)
- The interior is bloody brilliant and calming just how a cafe should be
- Food is good
- I love their coffees (tried few different ones and no complaints whatsoever)
- They do have some live music during the weekend or special occasions

I go to the healing cafe often especially to heal myself from the burnouts and just to relax and chill and every-time it works fine maybe because of the calm atmosphere

Prices are not expensive and somewhat reasonable

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Inosh Perera
Review: Went to work for a few hours and the staff was super helpful. Nice atmosphere. Siddik who was on duty came and handed me the WiFi details. Very nice of him. Super helpful throughout the whole time. Coffee and food was nice as well. Place is open 24/7.

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Oshini Nugapitiya
Review: Found the perfect spot to have my breakfast. 10/10 for food and drink. Thanks Siddeeq for the amazing customer service. Will definitely come back🤩

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sameena Gunawardena
Review: Excellent place to quickly grab a meal, drink or even have breakfast, lunch or dinner. Healing Cafe has been a go to place for the last couple of years.. Best service, relaxed environment and amazing customer service. Special recommendation and appreciation to Siddeeq who has been giving exceptional service for us for last two years..

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Vayshu Vayshalni
Review: I recently visited Healing Cafe and tried their wade with a cup of filter coffee. The wade was crispy and packed with flavor, and the coffee was rich and smooth, just how I like it. The relaxed nature ambiance made it even better, and I love that they’re open 24/7. Whether you're grabbing a quick snack or unwinding with a coffee, this place is a must-visit!

Name: Tea Avenue - Kohuwala
Author: Lankan Bae
Review:
This spot is great for brunch, tea or dinner. Quiet and peaceful at off time I found it s nice place to sit and relax or a meet up with a friend for coffee.

Just good food, cozy vibes and smashing coffee. The best coffee shop in town. They have some of the best chocolate smoothies.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kohuwala
Author: Kenan Livera
Review: Tea Avenue has always been a place to enjoy a nice cup of coffee, a warm meal with family and friends. I really enjoyed their fish and chips. Great place to catchup with friends.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kohuwala
Author: Yashoda Chandrasekara
Review: It’s not much crowded usually and has good atmosphere but not very spacious. Good coffee. Burgers are good for the price but pasta felt too expensive. Cheesy melt burger is a hit. Cappuccino is a hit too.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kohuwala
Author: Aditha Rodrigo
Review:
Very good food and service.
My fav was waffles with ice cream🤤
U guys can improve the toilet area little bit more.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kohuwala
Author: Aslam Haniffa
Review: Too noisy, stereo on full blast, not a calm place to have a coffee, tea, or a meeting or to have a conversation. It was annoying and felt like sitting with two loud speakers on both ears.

Name: Bubble Mania - Kiribathgoda
Author: sanjeewa madusanka
Review: I came to this place for the very first time. I bought spicy waffles which are promoted on social media.unfortunately Cabbage, Chicken and some cheese only in the middle of these waffles. very expensive and disappointed and I think spicy waffles  are not affordable for the actual price and A waffle is very huge for one person.

Name: Bubble Mania - Kiribathgoda
Author: Praveen Dilantha
Review: Bubble Mania is a hidden gem! Their unique combination of bubble tea and burgers is simply outstanding. The bubble tea is refreshing, with a wide range of flavors and perfect tapioca pearls. The burgers are equally impressive—juicy, flavorful, and cooked to perfection. The cozy ambiance and friendly staff make the experience even better. Whether you’re craving a delicious burger or a refreshing bubble tea, Bubble Mania has something for everyone. Highly recommended!

Name: Bubble Mania - Kiribathgoda
Author: Sasith Gamage
Review: Food were delicious. Service was fine. Decorations were beautiful. Store lightning was unique. Limited food menu with sweet, savory and drink items. Limited seating space. Waiting time after the order was not bad. Prices are very expensive compared to the portion and content. Overlall positive experience.

Name: Bubble Mania - Kiribathgoda
Author: Nesh Özberk
Review:
Highly recommend Bubble Mania in Kiribathgoda.

This place is perfect for unwinding and indulging in some delicious snacks and amazing bubble tea.

They have a vast array of flavors to choose from, and the food is equally impressive.

What really stood out was the warm and welcoming staff - super friendly and attentive.

The atmosphere is cozy and inviting, making it a great spot to chill out.

Definitely going back for more yummy treats!

Name: Bubble Mania - Kiribathgoda
Author: Lewis Turner
Review:
Really nice atmosphere with friendly staff.

There is a small variety to choose from but you can customize your toppings/chocolates etc. Well worth the price and delicious.

Parking is available infront and around the premises.

They do allow people to get small gatherings like Bride to be parties and such. Overall good experience & really friendly & professional staff

Do not get savory waffles to takeaway. While they are tasty when eaten right away, if you take them home it will become soggy and inedible.
Not their fault anyway

Name: Bubbles For All
Author: Nuwan Silva
Review: Worst bubble tea i ever had. Not recommended at all. Boba parls also not tasted original and waste of money. Not worth!

Name: Bubbles For All
Author: Tharushi Perera
Review: Here you can get the most delicious Milo boba drinks.

Name: Bubbles For All
Author: Rehan Rizvi
Review: I ordered the boba drinks here from uber and they are absolutely disgusting. It is inedible and too sweet and the milk drinks taste very watered down. It is not even boba. The boba pearls taste like gulab jamun (not in a good way).

Name: Bubbles For All
Author: Sawani Ranasighe
Review: This really disgusting I ordered this from UBER Total waste of money Never gonna order bubble teas from this again disgusting place No flavor no taste even the bubble were  made out of cheap ingredients

Name: Bubbles For All
Author: Tharidu Perera
Review: Good

Name: Café La Defense
Author: sarani hansamali
Review: Food is really delicious. We ordered chicken creamy soup and that is awesome. Also creamy pasta. But they took like 35-45 min to prepare the order. Anyway the food is really good.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Found this place on Google maps while searching for “coffee” and absolutely loved the place!! Their milkshake is super delicious and so worth the money! The place has a rooftop with an amazing view.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nisal Ashen
Review: The food here is absolutely delicious. Highly recommend. Great Service. Friendly Staff.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Umaya Mallawa
Review: Ordered a Chicken Ceasar Salad where they said will be prepared and ready within 10 minutes. the order was given only 20 minutes later. The order didn’t have Chicken in the Salad and when inquired the management and staff mentioned the chef is new and he is not experienced. When asked to send a new order they said can’t do that. Absolutely terrible service and food. Do not recommend this place

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nikil Helitha
Review: One of the best place for a date with friends, and they are having the BYOB. Food was amazing I would like to recommend the cheese chicken kottu and their special mix rice. They really worth the price and there was a great offer. Highly recommend without any doubts.

Name: Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe
Author: Feness Jansz
Review:
I had a lovely little time with my husband & siblings during the weekend
The food was served freshly and the presentation was amazing.
I would like to mention about the service provided by the staff was just beyond exceptional. From the greetings to checking if everything is okay while we dine to the bye was amazing to see in a restaurant/cafe in Colombo.
Hats off to the cheese & BBQ panini 🤤
Can’t wait to hangout with my friends.
It’s an Ideal place for a bridal shower.

I’m in love with the tea shop and the range
Cinnamon tea is my favorite 🤩

Name: Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe
Author: Lydia Goonetilleke
Review: The cutest place to host a small intimate gathering like a bridal shower. The food was excellent and the venue itself is dream! Highly recommend going here for the high tea as it is total quality and value for money. The staff are very helpful and the service was great.

Name: Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe
Author: Saminda
Review:
We recently visited Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe for brunch with our family, and it was a fantastic experience! The cafe has a lovely, welcoming atmosphere that's perfect for relaxing and enjoying good food.

The menu offered a great variety of options, from classic breakfast dishes to lighter snacks. We all found something we loved. The portions were generous, and the food was delicious. The service was friendly and attentive, making us feel right at home.

If you read this before visiting - please order the Sweet Potato Fries

Name: Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe
Author: Hideho
Review:
Our visit to the tarlton tea shop and cafe was far from pleasant.
We were greeted upon entry by possibly the manager, there was no way of knowing as he promptly sat down and continued a business meeting. There were no other customers in.
I wanted to try a speciality tea, all that was on the menu was a ceylon black tea.
I specifically wanted a light tea, I was advised to go into the shop and see what they suggested. The server had no knowledge of the teas.
Eventually the tea arrived, it had been brewing for so long it had stewed.
Not at all a pleasant experience. So glad we didn't eat here.

Name: Tarlton Tea Shop & Cafe
Author: Asma Deen
Review: Absolutely love this place! The ambience is cozy and perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. The cakes are superb—fresh, delicious, and beautifully presented. Great coffee, great vibe. Highly recommend!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: DAMITH CHANDANA
Review:
Monkeybean Cafe is a hidden gem that perfectly combines stunning sea views, a tranquil atmosphere, and delectable food. The moment you walk in, you're greeted by the friendly and attentive staff.

The ambiance is serene and ideal for getting some work done. The spacious seating areas, complemented by the calming sound of the waves, create a peaceful working environment that's hard to beat.

The menu offers a delightful array of dishes, all prepared with fresh ingredients. From the hearty breakfast options to the delicious lunch specials, every bite is a treat. The coffee is exceptional, making it a perfect spot for coffee aficionados.

Overall, Monkeybean Cafe is a fantastic place to relax, work, and enjoy great food with a breathtaking view. Highly recommended for anyone looking to combine productivity with leisure.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Melody Carragher
Review: We just had a coffee here which was delicious. The ladies serving are very beautiful and make you feel so welcome. Atmosphere is great and awesome location as you can watch the waves roll in as you enjoy your coffee!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Laurence keen
Review: Food was amazing! It's honestly been hard to find some good quality (western) cafe food in Colombo; but we were finally fortunate enough to find this place and it definitely hit the spot. Only a 300 meter walk from the Granbell Hotel, which is super convenient. Reasonable prices and the staff are super sweet and helpful!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Not the ideal place for a coffee date! There aren’t many options to select from! Their burger is not worth the price! However absolutely loved their Cafe Mocha!! The staff is super nice.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Gayan Chathuranga
Review:
I must say, the prices here are quite high. I was charged Rs 400 just for a spoon of vanilla, which was not listed on the menu and the staff did not mention when I asked—this is unacceptable. The place wasn't crowded when I visited, but there is no dedicated parking, so you have to park on the road. On a positive note, the staff was friendly.
🥴

Name: Green Cabin | Rajagiriya
Author: Kokila Shilpeswarage
Review:
Stopped by for lunch and had their Chicken lumprais. The portion size had become smaller than the last time I had it from another outlet, and the Pol Sambol was so spicy with lots of cumin in it. Otherwise it was ok.
The staff was very friendly and welcoming.
The AC wasn't working properly so it was quite hot inside with a few flies around the dining area.
They could improve on the atmosphere.

Name: Green Cabin | Rajagiriya
Author: Roman De Silva
Review:
Staff not great... Was just a boy who was not helpful and seemed more interested playing with his phone.

The one on the way to the southern expressway is head and shoulders better.

Happened within the last half an hour. 👎

Name: Green Cabin | Rajagiriya
Author: Dul Samsinghe
Review: Pay a visit & experience the taste of excellence. If you love your health and still want to test the tastes, Green Cabin is the place to start that.

Name: Green Cabin | Rajagiriya
Author: Gihan S
Review:
The quality of Green Cabin has dropped beyond recovery, this was a household brand famous for its lamprai and pineapple gateaux.

The new owner is compromising so much on quality from fresh pineapples to canned pineapple which has a terrible after taste of sugar syrup, the frosting is so thin and dry.  A waste of money for RS. 130-150 a piece. Same with the Lamprai it was so utterly dry and had no flavor.

I would stick with the original owners of the business who still run on small scale as Rodrigo's for anyone looking to still have an experience of the local authentic taste.

Many months later they respond on google saying they will resolve this and to contact them but there is no response. Terrible customer service. A great brand gone down to shambles because of poor management. Screenshot attached of them not responding to their messages even though they said below they would.

Name: Green Cabin | Rajagiriya
Author: Jehan Goonaratne
Review: Ordered a devilled chicken bun.. and received a bun which was stiff and rock solid.. probably reheated many times.. provided a fish bun as replacement.

Name: The Layover - Havelock City Mall
Author: Yasas Banuka
Review:
I recently visited "The Layover" at Havelock City Mall for the second time, and it was just as delightful as my first visit! The first time I tried their Nutella Bubble Tea and Oreo Bubble Tea 🧋, which were both perfect. This time, I went for the Hot Chocolate ☕ and Nutella Spread Mini Pancakes 🥞, and they were incredibly tasty.

The atmosphere at The Layover is always welcoming, and the staff is exceptionally friendly. A special shoutout to Ruvindu, who was super helpful and friendly on both of my visits ⭐ The prices are affordable, making it a great spot for a quick and delicious treat.

Overall, I had a very positive experience and will definitely be going back. Highly recommend

Name: The Layover - Havelock City Mall
Author: Kokila Shilpeswarage
Review:
The Layover at Havelock City Mall has a wide range of bubble tea as well as coffee. Tried their coffee bubble tea and that was delicious and filling. The tapioca pearls were chewy and good too.
The prices are also reasonable and the service is quick.
They also had the facility to add HCM points here.

Name: The Layover - Havelock City Mall
Author: Madhushan Udeshike
Review: I recently visited The Layover at Havelock City Mall. I've been there many times, and this time, I bought two cappuccinos. They were served hot, and the flavor was great!

Name: The Layover - Havelock City Mall
Author: Dineth Themiya
Review: Had a Nutella shake bubble tea at The Layover and it was so tasty. There are so many bubble tea options available here. The atmosphere and place is very comfortable and staff was very kind. Highly recommended!

Name: The Layover - Havelock City Mall
Author: Shehan Tharunda
Review: We had blended oreo with bubbles drink today and it was fantastic... And not only the drink, their customers service is very efficient and very generous... Special thanks to Sarah who gave us a good service

Name: t-Lounge by Dilmah - Horton Place
Author: Wasana Sewwandi Silva
Review: Place has a Beautiful and peaceful vibe. They have outdoor seating also. Service is good. Their drinks, teas and desserts are top notch. Other dishes were ok. Rice dishes tasted sort of re-heated so the freshness was lacking. Overall it’s an ideal place for a date, quick meetup with friends or for a casual business meeting.

Name: t-Lounge by Dilmah - Horton Place
Author: Emali De Silva
Review:
We dropped in for a drink, we really liked the drinks menu it was innovative.
Loved the atmosphere too.
The only thing that took us back is that we had to wait for about 25 minutes to get our drinks.
And we didn’t get any kinda of apology from the staff. We approached them twice.
We got the managers number from the staff ( they were not too happy about that) the manger was really nice and understood the whole situation and apologised quickly.
Honestly we are not difficult customers but when waiting for 25 minutes for a milk tea was crazy.
We will definitely come back.

Name: t-Lounge by Dilmah - Horton Place
Author: Ruckshani Randeniya
Review: A beautiful ambience dedicated to tea and tea infused meals. Meals were good, well prepared, drinks were almost all tea infused so no options for non tea lovers. The deserts were delicious but were too small in portion for the price so not worth it. Service was not as good as you would expect from a brand like Dilmah maybe understaffed but definitely not very attentive. Menu was given late, they didn’t help much on food selections, and desert was getting late but we were not informed. But they were still friendly so can’t complain too much. The tea shop is great but again some items overpriced. Will definitely go again.

Name: t-Lounge by Dilmah - Horton Place
Author: Tamali Ekanayake
Review:
Chicken curry puffs are the best. Tastes so good. Also tried cinnamon tea. Superb. ❤️
Tried matcha cake, that was not good. Dried like old cake. 😐

Name: t-Lounge by Dilmah - Horton Place
Author: VITHUSHANTH DEVARAJ
Review: Me & my friend went for lunch. They took almost 25 minutes to prepare the biriyani ,falooda & hot Chocolate . Biryani tastes like yellow rice and chicken was overcooked. Falooda and hot Chocolate were nasty. Definitely I won't recommend this place to anyone. Over priced too.

Name: Butter Boutique
Author: Vinula De Silva
Review:
I recently visited the Butter Boutique at the Pelawaththa branch, and it was a delightful experience! The ambiance was warm and welcoming, making it a perfect spot to enjoy some sweet treats. I tried the Tres Leches and their newly introduced Matcha range, and both were absolutely delicious. The flavors were rich and satisfying, truly living up to the high standards Butter Boutique is known for.

I also want to give a special shoutout to Jeewantha, who was incredibly helpful and attentive throughout our visit. His friendly demeanor and excellent service made the experience even better. The cashier was also very kind and efficient, ensuring a smooth and pleasant transaction.

Overall, a wonderful place to indulge in some high-quality desserts with top-notch service. I'll definitely be back!

Name: Butter Boutique
Author: Arjuna Weerasinha
Review: Ordered the caramel dark chocolate cake and the chocolate cake. Having had cake from all over the world, this is surely overrated and expensive. Worth a try but overtly sweet for me and didn’t have the right moist/soft combination. If you like ‘em sweet - you should try it. The service crew was fabulous!

Name: Butter Boutique
Author: Asanka Maduranga
Review:
BB has two locations and this is about one in Pelawatte. experience at the Pelawatha outlet was great. Team at Pelawatte doing a wonderful job and service is 5/5.  Cake and other savory food tastes really good and absolutely delicious. They also serve coffee. Pelawatte outlet is not much of a cozy place so you might not feel like staying for longer. No dedicated parking and only parking available on the roadside.

Highly recommend it!

Name: Butter Boutique
Author: Gamesha Padmabandu
Review: Butter Boutique is a delightful haven for cake enthusiasts. With a tempting variety of cakes and beverages, it's the perfect spot to satisfy your sweet cravings. The staff's friendly demeanor enhances the overall experience, and the inviting atmosphere adds a pleasant touch. While prices may be above average, the exceptional quality justifies the indulgence. A must-visit for those seeking a premium cake indulgence.

Name: Butter Boutique
Author: Shihara Rodrigo
Review: My wife wanted to try the Match as she had got a good feedback from one of her friends. Went to the place around 12.00noon Saturday. Place is quite compact and we ordered the Matcha with French Vanilla foam AND Hazelnut Latte. Ordered a Chocolate Caramel Tart for a side. Drinks were AMAZING. Full marks to the Matcha and latte was of right combination. Loved the food and small atmosphere inside. Parking was a bit challenging and next door GFlock security person was super helpful to park on the road. Butter Boutique is a definte visit again highly recommended for coffee and other snacks.

Name: Lounge 171
Author: Tharuka Hirushan
Review: I had an amazing experience at 171 Restaurant, where I tried their loaded fries. It's easily one of the best dishes they offer. Perfectly seasoned and generously topped, these fries are a must-try. Highly recommended!

Name: Lounge 171
Author: Dinisuru Gunarathna
Review:
I recently visited Lounge 171 with some of my colleagues, and our experience was nothing short of delightful. We had a Crispy Chicken Burger, an Artisan Lamb Burger, a Seafood Marinara Pizza, and two servings of french fries (although the burgers already came with fries).

Lounge 171 shines in its offerings of Thin Crust Pizza and delicious burgers. It's an ideal spot for both couples and friends looking for a great hangout. The ambiance is serene, with comfortable seating and a well-maintained atmosphere. The service was friendly, and our food arrived promptly.

The Seafood Marinara Pizza was a standout, boasting a unique flavor profile not found elsewhere. Any kind of Pizza in here is a must try. The crispy chicken burger and artisan lamb burger were equally impressive, generously loaded with cheese and perfectly portioned meats. We found that ordering extra fries was unnecessary, as the burger portions already included a sufficient serving per person.

Lounge 171 combines a bakery and the restaurant in the same place. The cleanliness, exceptional service, and mouthwatering food make this establishment a must-visit. The prices are bit high compared to other places (with service charge and VAT), but try the varities at least once. Also they do have enough parking space in both sides of the road.

I highly recommend Lounge 171 for a delightful dining experience!

Name: Lounge 171
Author: Sathira Nipun
