Review: Had an amazing experience at 171 Restaurant. It has a calm atmosphere and the service is excellent. The food is delicious, and I really loved the vibe there. They served us well, and I highly recommend it!

Name: Lounge 171
Author: Esther Jansen
Review: A good selection of food. Tasty and the portion sizes are on the larger side. No high chairs were available. Good for a large group or a family or couples outing.

Name: Lounge 171
Author: delishiya lenora
Review:
We ordered 3 lasagna /2 crispy chicken burgers/ chicken pasta and 5 milk shake. Burger was okay but lasagna is too much salty n full of sauce, pasta is horrible no tasty at all. Milk shakes are too much sweet can't drink it no tast of chocolate or milk only you can feel sugar taste.
My bill was around 16,000/= but not worthy at all.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Darsha Fonseka
Review: I recently visited this place drawn by its cozy ambiance and stylish decor, which made it a great spot to relax. However, the cookie cake I ordered was a huge disappointment—tiny, rock hard, and incredibly dry. It was so tough, they might as well have served it with a hammer instead of a fork. For the high price, I expected much better quality. While the ambiance is lovely, I’d recommend sticking to the coffee and skipping the desserts.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: rifath huzair
Review: My experience at Department of Coffee was great! From the beginning the staff was friendly and professional, the food was great! Standout is their coffee! They have a book corner, co-working spaces and meeting rooms in addition to the cafe area. If you are looking for a cozy area with all these facilities and a great service. Department of Coffee might be the place for you.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Nanshad Daruwalla
Review:
We visited the Department of Coffee on a beautiful and peaceful Sunday, eager to experience what this well-located café, opposite the race course in Colombo, had to offer. The ambiance was fresh and inviting, making it a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy a leisurely meal.

We started with the pulled pork and apple sandwich, which was an absolute delight. The sandwich was bursting with flavor, combining the tender, juicy pulled pork with the crisp sweetness of the apple. The contrast of textures and flavors was perfectly balanced, making each bite a treat. The bread was fresh and complemented the filling beautifully, making this sandwich a standout item on the menu.

Next, we tried the Bacon Hash. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to the expectations set by the sandwich. While it was satisfactory, it lacked the robust flavor and seasoning one might hope for. The dish could have benefited from a bit more seasoning to bring out the flavors of the bacon and potatoes.

For drinks, we ordered an iced hazelnut latte, which was refreshing and well-made. The hazelnut flavor was pronounced without being overwhelming, and the coffee itself was smooth and satisfying.

The total cost for these three items came to 6800

Overall, the Department of Coffee offers a pleasant dining experience with some standout items on the menu. The ambiance and prime location add to its charm, making it a place worth visiting, especially for their delicious pulled pork and apple sandwich.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Sachin Thiwanka
Review: Fantastic place for brunch, lunch, breakfast, and even just grabbing a snack and a cup of coffee. Without a doubt, the food and drinks were superb. somewhat pricey, but you may still enjoy a nice meal for the money. Have plenty of parking available. Additionally, they provide settings and private rooms for anything you require separately.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Rimzan Zuhair
Review:
Department of Coffee in Colombo is a great spot to enjoy a coffee or sweet treat, with a variety of cakes, sandwiches, burgers, and snacks available. The cafe also features a cozy little library, perfect for reading while sipping on your coffee. Additionally, they offer a private room that can be pre-booked for meetings or similar gatherings.

Located right opposite the Racecourse, it's a convenient place to grab a snack or coffee. While it can get a bit crowded during weekends, there’s parking available. It's an excellent spot for working on your laptop, meeting up with friends, or holding meetings.

Name: Bubble Bee 🐝 - Bubble Tea 🧋
Author: Mawantha Dilshan
Review:
Highly Recommended place to have in. Can give 5 star ratings for all the things such as taste and the customer service and so on.

You should go and taste it cuz they are giving you a xup of bubbles in the bubble tea 😁

Name: Bubble Bee 🐝 - Bubble Tea 🧋
Author: Nimasha Jayalath
Review: Seriously its next level bubble tea.  I love with that. Really cute place with clean stuff. They have many super lovely flavors . I love with that bubble tea cup they gave . Soo cute one .If you bubble tea lover you must try "bubble bee" congratulations them to super huge success . 😍🥺🥰

Name: Bubble Bee 🐝 - Bubble Tea 🧋
Author: Rohan Fernando
Review: Had a classic chocolate bubble tea and it was really nice with like honey bubbles. The cup was also reusable. Thumbs up from me !

Name: Bubble Bee 🐝 - Bubble Tea 🧋
Author: Sammy Ink Tattoo
Review: Best bubble tea I've had in a while... Highly recommended..... superb service........ ❤️❤️

Name: Bubble Bee 🐝 - Bubble Tea 🧋
Author: Praneeth Nawarathne
Review: A Great Shop which gives you the best flavor.  My favorite cocunut bubble tea which has a good flavor and also a good taste. Recommend for other's ❤️😃

Name: 7 tea
Author: Romance C
Review: The best place I experienced in Colombo, I like the peanut butter toast and the strawberry mike shake mostly, the hospitality is really warm!!!

Name: 7 tea
Author: Oma “Charlie” zan
Review: Amazing place to hang out with friends. Ordered the pudding and a bunch more stuff including the bubble tea premium which is by far the best place in this country.

Name: 7 tea
Author: Sithija De Silva
Review: Great place to hang out.... Amazing atmosphere and vibe. Food and beverages are really good. I would highly  recommend this place. Try out their Lychee Iced tea and Cappuccino Frap. I loved it.Thumbs up. I’ll be visiting again. 🕺🏼🕺🏼🕺🏼

Name: 7 tea
Author: Shazwin Nifath
Review: It's little expensive to drink but staff's are very good and friendly.. place was very neat and beautiful.. I've spent a little more time there. ☺️

Name: 7 tea
Author: Sandy chen
Review: Warm welcome from nice host, foods are tasty and unique. I'd premiere milk bubble tea which is superb!!

Name: BUBBLE WORLD BUBBLE TEA - BATTARAMULLA
Author: Ashu Ragunathan
Review: I bought the chocolate bubble tea the other day it was literally just a normal chocolate bar grounded with milk (more like water) and there were so much of chocolate pieces inside. Tasted so bad and watery too, and coated me 1350. Definitely a waste of money and stomach space🤣

Name: BUBBLE WORLD BUBBLE TEA - BATTARAMULLA
Author: Chammi rashmika
Review: Service was good but the quality was very poor when considering price. Options were limited as they had just opened. The amount of bubbles was less than an average bubble tea place. I ordered a Milo bubble tea with milk but it's like Milo with water. I think they did not add one spoon of milk And it was not sugar enough to enjoy. Sadly wouldn’t recommend it. guys if you want to try your favorite flavor with normal water this is the best place. not recommended for anyone 👎

Name: BUBBLE WORLD BUBBLE TEA - BATTARAMULLA
Author: Dulanjaya Ekanayake
Review:
One of the best places I can recommend bubble tea. They have a good variety of flavours to choose from.

The person at the shop is helpful and will recommend drinks as per your preferences. Portion sizes are good but the size of bubbles are a bit smaller than others. Prices are similar to competitors.

About 5 people can sit and enjoy bubble tea at a given time. Free road parking spaces are available In front of the store. As there are several shops in the building, sometimes you might not get a parking spot.

Name: BUBBLE WORLD BUBBLE TEA - BATTARAMULLA
Author: Tharuki Kaushalya
Review: It' s very tasty . I bought mocha bubble tea. It was superb. Highly recommend it. Highly satisfied ❤

Name: BUBBLE WORLD BUBBLE TEA - BATTARAMULLA
Author: Vishmi De Silva
Review:
I'm extremely happy with their service, the quality of their items and the location. I love the neat and pleasant ambience they maintain within the shop, despite its modest size. Compared to other bubble products in different bubble product shops, one they have in "Bubble World" are exceptionally tasty. I have tried Honeydew and Fererro Rocher Nutella Frappe. Both flavors were EXCEPTIONAL!!!

I highly recommend this place to everyone!! Thank you "Bubble World" for the nice and delicious bubblies!!😍❤️

Name: The BobaCult Premium-Bubble Tea
Author: Manik Dissanayake
Review:
Bobacult bubble tea has 25 plus options and this was my first time I have tried their products.

I tired the strawberry and coffee flavors and both were quite good. I preferred the strawberry one to the coffee.

You have 2 bubble options. Tropica pearls and popping boba. I personally prefer Tropica pearls so asked for it.

I would recommend this place as a good place to have a drink & chill out.

Value for money and customer service was guitar good.

Check it out.

Name: The BobaCult Premium-Bubble Tea
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: One of the best bubble tea’s I have tried so far. You can customize the drink size, the type of boba you need in your drink and the flavor as you wish. The piping boba is one of the coolest things I have tried and loved it. The seating area is limited and better to have it takeaway. The best part is packing get well sealed and you do not have to worry about spilling the drink at all. Enjoyed the drinks a lot. We tried the iced tea with popping boba

Name: The BobaCult Premium-Bubble Tea
Author: Amina Shafi
Review:
Hi.i got your Milo Dino and cream caramel with tapioca pearls and hats off,needless to say Milo Dino was BOMB!!! It was so thick full of flavor.loved it 10/10.
As for cream caramel I’d give it a 7/10 but my husband gives it a 9/10,there was a chunk of pudding as well🔥
Very very generous amount of boba pearls!keep it up.
Had a very good bubble tea after a while♥️thankyou guys.

I’d also like to mention their usage of paper cups now.a good initiative💯but since I had got it through Uber,the cup had become a lil soggy.

Name: The BobaCult Premium-Bubble Tea
Author: Ridma Lakshani
Review: Worthy .. 🤩 🤗 so delicious 😋 customer service superb .... 😍 we got Milo dream with tapioca & Lemon Iced Tea with Lychee popping Boba

Name: The BobaCult Premium-Bubble Tea
Author: Shanika Nanayakkara
Review:
The best bubble tea I ever had.
It was scrumptious 😋  I will continue  buying from bobacult . It made me satisfied 🥰

Name: Milk shop kasbawa
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Milk Bar
Author: keheliya senavirathna
Review: Fresh milk for tiered time

Name: Hot Dog with Ginger Tea
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Bubble Mania Kottawa
Author: Eranga Indrajith Kaluarachchi
Review:
A great spot to enjoy a variety of desserts and drinks. The prices are reasonable, and the atmosphere is really pleasant. They offer a good range of options to choose from, so there’s something for everyone. Plus, parking is available, which is always a bonus.

Definitely recommend for a sweet treat or a relaxed evening out!

Name: Bubble Mania Kottawa
Author: shashi jayawardhana
Review: If you are around Pannipitiya Kottawa, this is the best place to have yourself a bubble tea. Such a wonderful place with a nice interior. The food was amazing. They have a huge variety of bubble tea, sweet waffles, savory waffles and burgers too.

Name: Bubble Mania Kottawa
Author: Chandima Mithuni
Review:
I was trilled to see the Bubble Mania shop in Kottawa. Actually l went in there for the Bubble tea. I had a Banana Caramel Milkshake with boba for rs 1580. Without boba it's 1180. They applied caramel to the milkshake cup. While drinking the milkshake it's best if you can scrape off the caramel with the straw and drink it with the milkshake  shake. It's delicious. There were waffles , and burgers. I didn't try them out because l went in there for the bubble tea. The bubble tea was not bad.
Later l tried out their Very Berry Mojito with boba for rs 1180. And the Caramel Brulee for rs 810.. The waffle was very tasty.

Name: Bubble Mania Kottawa
Author: Kushan Sameera
Review: I recently visited Bubble Mania Kottawa and had a fantastic experience! They offer a great variety of sweet and savory items, including delicious waffles and boba drinks. The food was tasty, and the customer service was excellent. I’ll definitely be coming back for more!

Name: Bubble Mania Kottawa
Author: Anjan Nishel
Review: Customer service is excellent. But cannot be satisfied with the quality of the food and the prices. The crispy chicken patty in the burger is too hard to chew. The cheesy bites didn't taste as good as expected. Prices are very high. The prices here are very high compared to leading fast food establishments. The only thing to be happy about is the customer service.

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Chanuka Dinuwan
Review: When compared to other restaurants, this place is quite expensive. However, I had the chicken burger and it was delicious. The presentation of the food was good and the atmosphere was nice. They have a variety of teas including peach tea, but I didn't find the black currant peach tea to be very tasty. If you are a tea lover or are looking for a delicious dinner in a calm environment, this is the place for you.

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Fathima
Review:
There's limited parking available. Tea Avenue offers a solid variety of options to select from. This includes meals, beverages, and desserts. The ambience isn't anything special, and there's average seating space available.

Their pancakes with salted caramel sauce tasted quite average, and the pancakes were dry, which was disappointing.

Salted caramel pancake - 2/5
Chicken Omelette - 4/5
Vanilla Milkshake - 3/5

Customer service - 4/5
Cleanliness - 3.5/5

Although the visit was disappointing, hoping to try other items from them soon. Thank you for your service..!

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Priyanga K
Review:
Not recommended for those looking to enjoy a calm and relaxed atmosphere or for anyone hoping to grab a coffee and focus on their work. The place is congested, with tables set too close together. It’s noisy, and the constant sounds from the blender and coffee machines are more disturbing.
On top of that family discussions with their unattended kids screaming and running around and still the staff kept quiet.
Worst experience!

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Nathasha Wijayarathne
Review:
I really dont recommend this exact branch. I odered a chicken pasta and an ice latte. Ice latte was too watery i had to go twice to the counter to add milk and then sugar.
Then the plate that they served me was had black patches it was unpleasant actually and they served me without a trey.  (It was a very old plate with some dark stains)

I dont recommend to dine in here

Name: Tea Avenue - Pepiliyana
Address: 41, Dehiwala Road, Pepiliyana, Pepiliyana Rd, Boralesgamuwa
Author: Umm D
Review:
Easily accessible from Dehiwala, Mount Lavinia and the surrounding areas.
The customer service was ok not great.
The interior was average with a few pieces of artwork. It didn’t give me the cozy vibe at all.
We got a portion of Egg Benedicts with Spinach which lacked in flavor, pancake with kithul treacle, classic omelette, Tuna Sandwich (my personal preference, it was excellent) and creamy prawn pasta all tasted great. Try their Tiramisu cake which was heavenly. And they brew quality coffee as well.
Do recommend the food here.

Name: Bubbles and Dreams
Author: Fiona Fernando
Review:
I ordered about 5 drinks from 5 different flavours. The mint and chocolate one does not have any mint in it, the tapioca doesn't even taste like boba and it took over an hour for them to deliver it to a close by location.

There are other places that provide away better options even though the options are slightly more pricey than here, it's not worth to save if you get fake tapioca.

Name: Bubbles and Dreams
Author: Maryam Hassan
Review:
I ordered 5 bubble teas via uber it took forever to receive them and it turn out to be fake bubble tea, options were available to add on tapioca pearls but they have added some sort of jelly and the drinks were extremely sweet!
Very disappointed!

Name: Bubbles and Dreams
Author: Anudi Wijerathne
Review: Ordered pancakes with chocolate syrup and orange juice. Pancakes looked nothing like what they have shown in pictures and it was more like a parata. Orange juice was just Sun quick :)

Name: Bubbles and Dreams
Author: Hz N
Review: Get their double sausage burger. Well worth the money. Has an extensive menu for a small place and the prices are very affordable

Name: Bubbles and Dreams
Author: Chamodi Waduge
Review: Ordered waffles and they were really hard and can’t even think of biting. Will not but again and recommend to anyone

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Joanna B
Review: I had a stuffed roti for 100 rupees. I'm pretty sure that that's a tourist price, but I was happy to pay this anyway as that's what I paid everywhere else in Sri Lanka. Really delicious, and the staff are very kind. I will come back again to stock up before setting out on a longer journey.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Jagdeep Dugar
Review:
Tea is good and in Good Qty. They Charge Rs 50 for 80% of filling
and Rs 60, for fully filled.

Fully filled should be 250ml aprox.

I think the 3 wheelers or Tuk Tuk riders take Tea and poll roty in the morning around 9AM. I saw a line of Tuk tuk at that time on this place.

I dint tried poll roty, but Tea was good, in terms of Quality and Quantity.

But ambiance is zero. Smelly inside.
Hygenic can be a problem here.

Opens in the morning by 6 AM and they serve tea till 7.00 pm.
After 7.00, depends on availability.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Krishan Jayakody
Review: Food is okay. Reasonable prices

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Rishard Sheriff
Review: Super POLROTI with KOCHCHI sambola, not excellent in quality but good for an Evening Snack.

Name: Matara Tea Room
Author: Kushan Weeratunge
Review: The Roti Kade... Tasty Hot Roti... Superb Tea...

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Sachinthya Sandamith
Review: Tea avenue Malabe is a go to place to have some tea/coffee and relax yourself near Malabe town. It has plenty of parking and within outlet you got a large space to sit back and enjoy your meal. Staff is polite and supportive. Has good variety of options for food and beverages. Service is fine.

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Inoka Minipalanga
Review: We ordered a chicken caesar salad before seeing the photo in pickme food. When it was delivered there were very less chicken pieces.

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Saminda Bandara
Review: Tea avenue is one best cafe to have coffee and flavored tea with high quality taste. Atmosphere and the service is always fantastic.

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Taniya Lewwanduwage
Review:
I have always loved Tea Avenue and have always highly recommended them to others. I have promoted this particular outlet particularly on my social media earlier as well.
I would have become a frequent customer of this outlet if not for the unprofessional behavior of the trainees/kitchen staff. It's true that the front desk staff when spoken to are very courteous, but they are not at the counter half the time and because the music is loud they can't hear you. You have to walk around finding a staff member and they just leave you alone in the cafe and do their own thing or eat back in the kitchen. I had an offensive experience because of one such kitchen staff and I stopped visiting the outlet after this incident because she didn't even have the common courtesy to apologize to me, she just kept laughing.

Talking about the food, they have further cut down on the veg options which is such a shame. The only tasty thing for a vegetarian there is the polos sandwich which is actually great; the pasta is horrible, just horrible and bland.

Tea is nice as always.

They have replaced the uncomfortable chairs after I once suggested it, which is good, but I won't be really visiting this outlet, unless I REALLY HAVE to, because its kitchen staff screams as if they saw some ghost when they see its customers.

Name: Tea Avenue - Malabe
Author: Sanuka Marasinghe
Review: Tea Avenue Malabe is a great place to relax with a coffee or tea. Spacious seating, plenty of parking, and friendly staff make it a comfortable spot. Good variety of food and drinks too!

Name: Bubble & Potato- Port City
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: Their bubble tea comes with added bubbles and jelly which is good. The flavors are good but all the flavors in the menu are not available which is a negative point. The staff is friendly but does not meet the requirements all the time. Some options were not available and they did not add the requested type of boba in our mixture

Name: Bubble & Potato- Port City
Author: arshad zaid
Review: Last time, we had the slush and were given the thin, long cup. However, this time, for the same price, we were offered small cups. The place is a scam and not worth it. Please be careful when ordering from this place. It's a horrible place to buy your bubble tea. Consider buying from other places.

Name: Bubble & Potato- Port City
Author: Shihara Zarook
Review: Milo bubble tea was not good

Name: Bubble & Potato- Port City
Author: Sudu Putha
Review: Horrible customer service. Server was rude

Name: Bubble Crush -Horana
Author: hiruni apsara
Review: I bought a chocolate bubble tea, a watermelon bubble tea and a pineapple mojito.  I am not happy with the mojito.  But chocolate & watermelon bubble tea are really delicious.  It had a lot of bubbles.  It was right for the price.  A small business.  But I think it would be better if the background was more comfortable.

Name: Bubble Crush -Horana
Author: Vidhya Parameswaran
Review: The food was amazing. And the service is so nice . Especially the  atmosphere . I really enjoyed it. ❤️

Name: Bubble Crush -Horana
Author: vindula ransika
Review: Best bubble tea and ramen reasonable price in horana town....😍😍😍

Name: Bubble Crush -Horana
Author: heshitha
Review: Best place to have a relax experience with a juice and a ramen.

Name: Hemasiri Tea Room
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Tea pot
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Bambuwa cafe and juice bar
Author: Kavishan Perera
Review: Highly recommend this cafe. nice clean place & very tasty foods & beverages

Name: Bambuwa cafe and juice bar
Author: Shashna Mahakumara
Review: Badu gahanna barida?

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: oshitha viraj
Review: Hidden places! Near to arcade. Nice atmosphere also please has a old London vibe as you can see in the pictures also hase a outdoor option and indoor option you could work in here if you like a quiet environment.. we go on weekends and there no Rush good for quick bit. Unfortunately they don't serve any food like rice or burger 🍔. But there have good various chees cake like sweet items.. they is packing space available.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Dhinesh Sarma
Review:
One of the good place to Visit. Place is very calm, silent, spacious, no disturbance.
Can spend hours of time with friends and couples. Staffs are very friendly. They have variety of drinks, food and snacks.

They have separate outdoor for smokers as well. Really recommend. Go and explore it.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: dnel
Review:
Quiet place for good coffee
There is a meeting room equipped with a projector you can book as well.
Love their club sandwich and hot chocolate

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Shenika Senavirathna
Review: The interior and the environment is sooo good. A nice place to work and spend time with friends and family. But the quality of food isn't satisfying. I had a frappachino. But it was not creamy at all. And an egg puff as well. It was so thin. I guess it cost around 500 something. I don't think both are worthy of that price. Anyways a nice place where no one feels it's a place in Colombo. The greeny environment 💚 also environment is luxury looking.

Name: London House Of Coffee
Author: Archchana Ganeshalingam
Review: Didn't have much options. When we visited they said they have only egg and sausage items and on that day specifically they had a shortage of eggs too. So we had to come back without having anything. The atmosphere seemed good though. Would love to try another day.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Darsha Fonseka
Review: I recently visited this place drawn by its cozy ambiance and stylish decor, which made it a great spot to relax. However, the cookie cake I ordered was a huge disappointment—tiny, rock hard, and incredibly dry. It was so tough, they might as well have served it with a hammer instead of a fork. For the high price, I expected much better quality. While the ambiance is lovely, I’d recommend sticking to the coffee and skipping the desserts.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: rifath huzair
Review: My experience at Department of Coffee was great! From the beginning the staff was friendly and professional, the food was great! Standout is their coffee! They have a book corner, co-working spaces and meeting rooms in addition to the cafe area. If you are looking for a cozy area with all these facilities and a great service. Department of Coffee might be the place for you.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Nanshad Daruwalla
Review:
We visited the Department of Coffee on a beautiful and peaceful Sunday, eager to experience what this well-located café, opposite the race course in Colombo, had to offer. The ambiance was fresh and inviting, making it a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy a leisurely meal.

We started with the pulled pork and apple sandwich, which was an absolute delight. The sandwich was bursting with flavor, combining the tender, juicy pulled pork with the crisp sweetness of the apple. The contrast of textures and flavors was perfectly balanced, making each bite a treat. The bread was fresh and complemented the filling beautifully, making this sandwich a standout item on the menu.

Next, we tried the Bacon Hash. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to the expectations set by the sandwich. While it was satisfactory, it lacked the robust flavor and seasoning one might hope for. The dish could have benefited from a bit more seasoning to bring out the flavors of the bacon and potatoes.

For drinks, we ordered an iced hazelnut latte, which was refreshing and well-made. The hazelnut flavor was pronounced without being overwhelming, and the coffee itself was smooth and satisfying.

The total cost for these three items came to 6800

Overall, the Department of Coffee offers a pleasant dining experience with some standout items on the menu. The ambiance and prime location add to its charm, making it a place worth visiting, especially for their delicious pulled pork and apple sandwich.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Sachin Thiwanka
Review: Fantastic place for brunch, lunch, breakfast, and even just grabbing a snack and a cup of coffee. Without a doubt, the food and drinks were superb. somewhat pricey, but you may still enjoy a nice meal for the money. Have plenty of parking available. Additionally, they provide settings and private rooms for anything you require separately.

Name: Department of Coffee
Author: Rimzan Zuhair
Review:
Department of Coffee in Colombo is a great spot to enjoy a coffee or sweet treat, with a variety of cakes, sandwiches, burgers, and snacks available. The cafe also features a cozy little library, perfect for reading while sipping on your coffee. Additionally, they offer a private room that can be pre-booked for meetings or similar gatherings.

Located right opposite the Racecourse, it's a convenient place to grab a snack or coffee. While it can get a bit crowded during weekends, there’s parking available. It's an excellent spot for working on your laptop, meeting up with friends, or holding meetings.

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Ranawaka Chiranjaya
Review: Venturing into this restaurant for a two-day lunch break turned out to be a delightful surprise. my wife and I chose this restaurant for a two-day lunch stint, coinciding with an exam visit. The experience was beyond satisfying—impeccable service paired with delightful meals made it a standout choice. It's more than just a place to eat; it's an oasis of culinary delight and comfort. Certainly I recommending it to anyone in search of a brief escape with excellent food!"

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Dananjaya Madushanka
Review: Not friendly stuff..I asked some favor on my food and they said they can’t doo that.. also the tea is not hot & not taste.. location is good and have nice vibe…clean and relaxed place

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Rosita Hofman
Review: Jeem was very friendly and helpful and even gave us tips for our vacation! Food an drinks were also nice!

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Ali Shaah saiboni
Review: The place was nice and cozy, best place to stop for a coffee before going to airport, parking is available, I loved the taste of the expresso and cappuccino, ice coffee and many more available with snacks, entry to wheel chair available

Name: Coffee Boss
Author: Yasitha Anuranga
Review: Coffee and the environment is very good. But cake items are little bit less quality. Btw altogether good  experience there

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Purusoth
Review: Very calm surrounding and live light music in the evenings.  We had a beer 🍺. It is a superb place to have beer peacefully. Service is too good. Reasonable prices too. Limited parking available. Overall experience is feel good

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Gayani Thewa
Review: Today visit this nice place at cinnamon Grand. Love the place music, food and vibe. Perfect place to send some times with your family or friends. Prices also reasonable. Highly recommend this place try it out.

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Indushika Anjanee
Review: An ideal place to relax with a good drink and some delicious snacks. You can get some work done too as they have a couple of power outlets around. The food items are fresh and tasty and worth the price. Customer service is top-notch.

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Praveena Easu
Review: Oshan was real good at customer service. And I was at the Coffee Stop solely for their blueberry cheesecake, they had resumed serving it again after a short break ;)

Name: Coffee Stop
Author: Firoze Mistry
Review:
Probably one of the best Coffee Shops in town.

Located just at the entrance of the Cinnamon Grand Hotel this is a Coffee Shops visited by most. It has a range of snacks and sandwiches that one can choose from, probably the best is their prawn roll. The coffee although has dropped a bit in standards.

The service is friendly and swift. Overall a good place to visit.

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Ahmad Dawaheer
Review:
I visited Peppermint Cafe some time ago, and although I can't recall the exact date, recently coming across photos in my gallery brought back all the great memories of my meal there.

I remember the taste so vividly that I felt compelled to finally give them the review they deserve.

The food was nothing short of exceptional. I had a fantastic meal, including crispy, perfectly seasoned fries topped with tender fried chicken, and their delicious, generously sized burger. Each dish was so flavorful that it’s stayed with me long after my visit.

The balance of textures and flavors was spot-on, and the presentation made the dishes even more enticing.The drinks were also memorable.

I tried their mojitos and a refreshing lime cooler – both were exactly what I needed to accompany the rich food. Everything was prepared with such care, and you could tell that only high-quality ingredients were used.Although it’s been a while, I still remember the friendly and welcoming staff who made the experience even more enjoyable.

The cafe’s ambiance was cozy and inviting, perfect for relaxing and enjoying a good meal. Plus, the location was ideal – tucked away just enough to create a peaceful atmosphere while still being easily accessible.

I'm glad I stumbled upon those photos, as it reminded me of just how great my experience was at Peppermint Cafe.

It’s a place I’d definitely recommend to anyone looking for delicious food, great service, and a pleasant environment.

I’ll be sure to return whenever I’m nearby again!

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Sachintha Kumarasinghe
Review: The food is tasty and well-prepared. I tried the Oreo shake and KitKat shake; they are absolutely good and worth it. I've tried different shops for these shakes, but none of them are as good. The only downside is that this place is too hot with no air conditioning.

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Hasara Liyanage
Review:
My visit to this place is on 29th June 2024. This is opened 24 hours so I went early morning for breakfast.

There are a lot of seating arrangements. There’s a separate area for around 10 people to dine in easily.

They have a QR code which you can scan and access the menu.

The food tasted good but I felt didn’t value for money.

Service is good. You have to go to the cashier to order. If you don’t go for long they might come to you. 😝

There’s a slider and you might enjoy the kid within yourself.

Washroom is with tissues, hand wash. The water is working. But the commode seat isn’t clean. 😣

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Shehani Galliyadda
Review: A huge thank you to Peppermint Café for the best service we've received so far! The customer service was superb, and the food was both excellent and amazing. From ordering to serving, everything was quick and efficient. We needed to do some quick office work, and the staff went above and beyond by providing a lounge area where we could attend our meeting and plug in our laptops. The support we received was outstanding. We'll never forget the time we spent there—thank you, Peppermint Café!

Name: Peppermint Cafe
Author: Hirushan Jayasooriya
Review: We went there for lunch and had mushroom pasta, El mexicano chicken rice and plain tea. The Mushroom pasta is really delicious and highly recommended. The El mexicano is yummy but I would say its portion is not enough for the price. The vibe is good except for the crows. The staff is supportive and friendly. Can be recommended.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Thakshila Dayarathna
Review: I went there for my breakfast. Staff was really good. They welcome customers very nicely. Place also very calm and peaceful. Delicious foods as always. I bought caramel macchiato and tuna and cucumber sandwich. The place was amazing.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: _booking_with _jera
Review:
Orion City’s Barista is a hidden gem within the bustling tower complex, offering a perfect retreat for coffee lovers and professionals alike. This cozy café provides a warm and inviting atmosphere, making it an ideal spot for a morning coffee, a quick bite, or even a casual meeting.

The quality of the coffee is exceptional, with a rich selection of brews that cater to all tastes. Whether you prefer a strong espresso or a creamy latte, the baristas here have mastered the art of crafting the perfect cup. The pastries and snacks are equally delightful, providing the perfect complement to your drink.

In addition to the great coffee, the location within Orion City adds to its charm. Being surrounded by offices, shops, and other amenities makes it a convenient stop for both workers and visitors. It’s a place where you can take a break from the hustle and bustle of the city, enjoy a relaxing drink, and recharge for the rest of your day.

Overall, Orion City Barista is a must-visit for anyone in the area. The combination of excellent coffee, friendly service, and a comfortable setting makes it a standout spot within Orion City.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Chanuka Nadun
Review:
Barista Orion City is one of the nicest-looking outlets in the franchise, featuring a stylish and inviting atmosphere. The service is consistently excellent, and the food is always up to standard.

Whether you’re stopping by for a coffee break or a casual meal, this branch provides a delightful experience every time. It’s a standout location for enjoying a great cup of coffee and a pleasant ambiance

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Amalan Dhananjayan (Batzee)
Review:
Pretty Cosy coffee shop. Nice Ambiance.
We had hot chocolate and tried their new Cheese Garlic bread. They are both good.

When we were ordering a big crowd of people were ordering and they had around 12 orders before us. But they were working quickly and efficiently and got our order within 15 minutes which is great.

The frape collection called Sweet Tronado looked great. Did not try but they are reasonably priced.

They have other food items including lunch options.

The only complaint is that the hot chocolate has lost most of its heat due to their AC quickly. But that's fine.

Glad to have them back at the same location where they were 2 years before.

Coffee prices are on Average.
Have good seating and shared parking with Pizza hut at the street.

Name: Barista Orion City
Address: 736 Dr Danister De Silva Mawatha, Colombo
Author: Heshan Rajapaksha
Review: Nice place to chill out with a date, friends or family. The food is really good, the service is really good, and the staff always welcomes the guests. The prices are somewhat expensive but that is expected from such a place. Overall I recommend this place, at least for the overall ambience.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Reshan Chathuranga
Review:
Delicious Food and Relaxed Atmosphere.

This is an incredible place to hang out and enjoy a meal. The ambiance is fantastic. it's chilled, clean, modern, and well-maintained. The restaurant has a really relaxed vibe.

The food and beverages were great. The chicken and cheese waffle was absolutely delicious, one of the best I've had in Colombo.

While the service wasn't really attentive, it was still good. You have to order from the counter, and the food arrives promptly. The prices were a bit high but justified by the quality.

I can easily recommend this place to anyone looking to hang out and enjoy a drink or meal.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Oshitha Narangoda
Review: Easily one of the best places to meet your friends and catch up or work in solitude. The place offers freshly brewed coffee and good food (though I always prefer the coffee more!). Also, the cafe is near my home, so it's an added bonus.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Nuwan Fernando
Review: Coffee Manor is a very nice and a cossy restaurant. I really love their calm and pleasant vibe. Good for group hangouts, family outings and for wfh setups as well. Food is delicious and love their hospitality. Staff is really friendly and supportive and they have parking available for around 10 vehicles and can use the by road as well.

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Pesala Jayasuriya
Review:
I've become a regular at The Coffee Manor in Nawala, and it never ceases to amaze me. Every visit is a new experience filled with familiar comforts. Nestled conveniently close to the Nawala junction, this cafe offers ample parking space for more than 6 vehicles, making it hassle-free to stop by even during busy hours.

From the moment you step inside, The Coffee Manor welcomes you with its beautifully designed interior that boasts comfortable sofas and chairs, perfect for long chats or quiet afternoons with a book. The unique wall arts made from coffee nuts add an artisanal touch that speaks volumes of the cafe's dedication to its theme.

The menu here is a paradise for any coffee enthusiast with a plethora of variations to choose from, but it doesn't stop at just coffee. The snacks are delightful, and the hot chocolate is personally my all-time favorite; it's so good it haunts my dreams! But the star of the show has to be their divine chocolate milkshake. It's not just a drink; it's an experience. The rich, velvety texture coupled with the perfect balance of chocolate and cream is pure ecstasy. Each sip leaves a symphony of flavors that keeps you coming back for more.

The staff's friendliness and helpfulness significantly enhance the overall experience, making you feel right at home. Whether you’re looking for a quick coffee run or a place to create memorable moments, The Coffee Manor has it all. The outdoor seating is a bonus, providing a pleasant atmosphere to enjoy your treats under the open sky.

All in all, if you find yourself in Nawala, a visit to The Coffee Manor is a must. Prepare to be dazzled by the flavors and charmed by the ambiance. This place isn't just about great coffee or food; it's about the experiences and memories you take away. Trust me, you won't be disappointed!

Name: The Coffee Manor - Nawala
Author: Gimhan Sugathapala
Review: Very chill location. Great place to go out a on date or a meet up. Food quality is good and service is fast as well. Would recommend.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Dhinesh Sarma
Review:
Recently I visited to this place, the atmosphere was really good. Vibe is there for sure in this place. It’s very convenient place for anyone who wants to spend much longer time. Very suitable for groups, teams, couples, even very comfortable for an individual. Very friendly environment, with spacious place. Can do office work, small meeting, get together. Really loved it.

Kind of disappointed since they don’t have any option for vegetarian (only they have pasta and Lasagna). It’s better if they add more vegetarian options.

Overall Great 👍

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Sachintha Kumarasinghe
Review: One of the best coffee shops I've visited—a nice place with plenty of parking and a tidy atmosphere. The food is tasty, and the staff is excellent.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Nadeera Fernando
Review:
Nice place to relax with your loved ones. Sometimes I came all the way from Ja-Ela to do my work from here and to chill.
The moment you step in, you’re greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere.
Java Lounge truly shines with its extensive menu. The coffee is nothing short of exceptional, with a variety of specialty drinks that cater to all tastes. From their perfectly balanced lattes to the rich and robust espresso, every cup is crafted with care.
Service at Java Lounge is top-notch. The staff are friendly, knowledgeable, and always eager to help with recommendations. Whether you’re a coffee connoisseur or a casual drinker, they ensure every visit is a pleasant experience.

Highly recommended !!!

Have fun... Cheers !!

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: R J
Review:
I have visited this place several times and now this has become one of my to go places to spend some quality time alone or with my friends and family.
Exceptional service provided by the staff (Specially by the managers Jeremy & Tharindu and the staff Shenan, Joanna Migara & Vidumina)every single time, they are very attentive and make you feel like at home.
They have outdoor (smoking area) and indoor seating, and 2 meeting room if you need to host a meeting.
Great food and beverages and great value for Money spent.
Chicken Lasagna with cheese,  Kochchi Chicken Panini, Smoke Beef Panini, Chocolate or Almond Croissants, are must try dishes. And aslo Blueberry Cheese Cake,  Red Velvet, Sweet Amora Cakes goes well with a Spicy Chai or a Caramel Macchiato specially if you have a sweet tooth. They have a wide variety of hot & cold beverages and frappes as well.
And also you can pre order cakes for almost any occasion.

Name: Java Lounge Barnes Place
Author: Prabash Jayathilaka
Review: Best place to make your mind calm and taste a good coffee with loved ones. Staff is really friendly, specially Mr. Shenen and always welcome with a smile at anytime you enter here. Place is clean and washrooms are in good condition.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Navidu Bandara
Review:
Really good place to go for a quick cup of coffee. Service here is really great. If you want coffee to take out, you can request them to wrap it up for you so it would not spill. Space inside is a bit limited, but a small area is available outside where smoking (only cigarettes as far as I know) is allowed.
Overall, pretty good area to go to.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Shavindri Perera
Review: I love love love this place. Barista is anyways known for their amazing service. I usually call them in advance and ask them to keep my coffee ready for pick up and they do it with a warm smile. The staff is an amazing bunch and they make sure the takeaway itself is properly packed and neatly and tidy. One of my favorite places and I will always recommend it.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Suram Mendis
Review:
Good place for a quick coffee.
Space is limited inside. Staff is friendly and provides good service. Coffee offered here is great!

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Hasanka Sumanasekara
Review: I recently dined at the barn by Barista, and I must say that my experience was absolutely fantastic! From the moment I walked through the door, I was greeted with warm smiles and a welcoming ambiance.

Name: Barista Staple Street
Author: Bev Latham
Review:
Great coffee, cappuccino recommended! Nice little place… also loved the bigger store although rather expensive…
Would have rated it higher but staff didnt notice me standing waiting at the counter.. Could have been a little more responsive, but definitely would go back!

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Chathumaduri Hettiarachchi
Review: Best go to place when you want a break from your busy day. Love their food and coffees. Staff is very friendly.  🥰

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Rozanne Jansz
Review: I come here on a regular basis. I really enjoy the calm peaceful vibe. Even the service is very good.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Inujan Ravindran
Review: Java Lounge on Duplication Road offers a delightful experience worth savoring. From the moment you step in, the friendly staff welcomes you with warmth and enthusiasm, enhancing the overall ambiance. The Almond Croissant is a heavenly treat, perfectly complemented by the rich aroma of the Mocha Coffee. Don’t miss out on indulging in the Java Cookie Cream Frappe; it’s simply irresistible. The Nai Miri Kochi Baguette stands out as a must-try, showcasing the culinary excellence of the outlet. Each bite is a fusion of flavors that tantalize the taste buds and leave you craving for more. Whether you’re looking for a quick bite or a leisurely coffee experience, Java Lounge on Duplication Road exceeds expectations with its exceptional service and delectable offerings.

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: rumesh fernando
Review:
Well its a nice and great place ...
Absolutely nice and cool environment for a ☕ with a cheese cake or more

Name: Java Lounge - Bambalapitiya
Author: Binuka Nishad Bamunuge
Review: One of the best places to have a coffee and spend some quality time. Adequate seating space is also available with comfy chairs and sofas.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: sarani hansamali
Review: Food is really delicious. We ordered chicken creamy soup and that is awesome. Also creamy pasta. But they took like 35-45 min to prepare the order. Anyway the food is really good.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Found this place on Google maps while searching for “coffee” and absolutely loved the place!! Their milkshake is super delicious and so worth the money! The place has a rooftop with an amazing view.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nisal Ashen
Review: The food here is absolutely delicious. Highly recommend. Great Service. Friendly Staff.

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Umaya Mallawa
Review: Ordered a Chicken Ceasar Salad where they said will be prepared and ready within 10 minutes. the order was given only 20 minutes later. The order didn’t have Chicken in the Salad and when inquired the management and staff mentioned the chef is new and he is not experienced. When asked to send a new order they said can’t do that. Absolutely terrible service and food. Do not recommend this place

Name: Café La Defense
Author: Nikil Helitha
Review: One of the best place for a date with friends, and they are having the BYOB. Food was amazing I would like to recommend the cheese chicken kottu and their special mix rice. They really worth the price and there was a great offer. Highly recommend without any doubts.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Yasas Nanayakkara
Review: Service is good. Service and atmosphere is not as good as their branches in Bamba or Colpetty. Death by Chocolate was great had a great texture to it. The Signature blueberry cheesecake was as tasty as ever. The Garlic bread with cheese was average. Chicken Tikka Sandwich was quite good the chicken was full of spices. Tried one of their christmas special shakes, the Red Velvet Cake Shake: a tad too sweet but had a great consistency overall.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Vimukthi Darshana
Review:
The coffee here is great. My favorite is the café latte because it has more milk and less cream. I also enjoy an espresso sometimes, depending on my mood. They provide half sugar packets with the coffee, which is a nice touch.

As for food, the croissant sandwich is a good choice. I recommend the smoked chicken one.

If you like to smoke, you can sit at the outdoor tables. There are two tables outside, each with four chairs.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Inkey Fernandez
Review: 👍Unquestionably This place is amazing! They offered the best coffee and showed the best attitude to its costumers.   Today i got a cute Art for my cappuccino she made my day .Specially want to say staff is very friendly like family members.💯 Internet connection is very fast and is unlimited as well.   Also they have so many sweet beverages👌🏻 .This place is indeed perfect for studying and chilling out. It was very quiet and air-conditioned. I just want to keep coming back to this place. Thank you !♥️👌🏻

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Nirmani Samarakoon
Review: Visited the place with my baby. The place was less crowded as I went around 12. The seating arrangement is mind relaxing but the coffee shop is a bit small. Staff is friendly and attentive. Hot chocolate was not that good. But the brownie was really good.

Name: Barista Rajagiriya
Author: Chaminda Jayasuriya
Review: Good place for a cup of coffee and some snacks and lovely muffins and cakes. Parking also available. Lot coffee flavours and sizes available. Store is bit small but there can seat about 15 customers indoors and another two tables at outdoors. Good atmosphere with some soft music. Friendly staff. Super service.👍👍👍

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Albert Jebanesan
Review: Java Lounge is a charming coffee spot nestled in Mount Lavinia, with additional branches in various locations. This cozy venue offers a serene atmosphere, perfect for enjoying a leisurely cup of coffee and engaging in conversation. Unlike typical bustling coffee shops, Java Lounge provides a tranquil environment conducive to relaxation. The coffee and snacks are delicious, and the customer service is outstanding. If you're looking for an intimate setting for a small meeting or a private chat, this is the ideal place to consider.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Ubaya Medawela
Review: The newly opened Java Lounge in Mt. Lavinia offers a great atmosphere to relax over coffee. The staff is attentive and hospitable, and they also have a handmade chocolate stall on the premises.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Ryan Cooray
Review:
A nice cozy place!
Got a nice collection of sweet and savory items as well as a great beverage collection - both hot and cold.
The Interior is nicely done and there was seating for around 20 people indoors. More smoking-friendly seating is available outside.

Parking is a bit of an issue sometimes. But they offer free parking at the Eye hospital for the first hour. Please make sure you get their rubber stamp on the Parking ticket.

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Shani Fernando
Review:
Java Lounge – Mount Lavinia: Perfect for Work/ Study!

Java Lounge has recently moved to a new spacious location right across from the old one. The atmosphere is perfect for studying or working, with plenty of tables and comfortable sofas.

The staff are really friendly and provide great customer service. And they wouldn’t bother you for studying for longer hours. 🥺💗

The only con is the WiFi connectivity - WiFi vouchers don’t work sometime.
It would be great if they could offer unlimited WiFi/ provide new vouchers with working codes that are not limited to 30 mins.

Overall, it’s still an excellent spot for anyone who enjoys studying in a café setting!

Name: Java Lounge - Mount Lavinia
Author: Roaming Kurumba
Review:
Java Lounge Mount Lavinia is a cozy coffee café that I love visiting. Their other branches are equally impressive with a great range of coffees and delicious food. Today, I had the passion and narang juice, which is my favorite drink on a hot sunny day. Along with that, I enjoyed their lasagna. As a big fan of lasagna, I was delighted with their unique version. It had enough cheese, a crisp golden crust, and tasted fantastic.

Highly recommend!

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Anuja Indranatha Madugalle
Review:
The menu is bigger than a text book and it gives you so many options for hot and cold beverages and meals. From the entrance itself, you feel very attracted to this place. I was really impressed with the way they have arranged the place, how the tables were set and how neat it was. Very spacious and tidy.
Definitely going to be my new hangout spot! Excellent work! 🫡

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Ragulan K Nathan
Review:
Went there with good recommendations,  nice atmosphere and nice place, kids friendly. Nice music, lot of food options, drinks and dessert.

Food was tasty but we experienced delay in serving the food , (understaffed maybe), by the time food reached the table it was cold. Management should make sure the food reaches the table in its warm state.  (Burgers, subs and  French fries ).

All is well other than the cold food.

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Kishalini Kirubananthan
Review:
Spacious cafe with great and reasonably priced food items. Fell in love with the ambiance. They also have a small boutique along with the cafe.

Definitely would recommend it to anyone looking for a cute hangout spot. They have miniature decorations which brings the inner child in us alive. Great service too 👍

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Darshana Ranasinghe
Review: Are you looking for a chic place to hang out and indulge in some delicious food? Look no further! Whether you're planning a casual get-together with friends or a  family gathering, This place offers the perfect blend of style and comfort. With ample space to accommodate groups of small sizes, you can relax and enjoy a welcoming atmosphere with a bit of a star wars flavours.

Name: IBSONS CHOICE CAFE
Address: 51 Narahenpita - Nawala Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Sugaashini Surendran
Review:
I recently checked out Ibson’s Choice Cafe and loved its magical ambiance. It feels like a cozy, enchanting retreat from the everyday rush.

The menu is packed with delicious options, and everything I tried was fantastic. The staff were amazing too, really friendly and attentive, which made the whole experience even better.

This cafe is a perfect spot for a relaxing and charming outing. I can't wait to go back!

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Chanakya Ranasinghe
Review:
Lovely cafe situated just in front of the National Museum. They have sweets and savoury items at very affordable prices.

Have both downstairs and upstairs seating areas.

The staff is friendly and their service is good.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Chamudra Sriwarnasinghe
Review: Food and service were good. Prices ate quite reasonable. Has a nice looking view of national museum.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Hasini Hettiarachchi
Review: We had their Lime Juice, Watermelon Juice, Chocolate cupcakes and a chicken Sandwich. Affordable and a nice place in front of the Colombo Museum.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Reg Pryer
Review: Great oasis, whilst on our walking tour. Positioned across the road from the spectacula National Museum. I had the best ice coffee of my trip so far and a delicious, fresh mini chicken pie. Service was professional and efficient.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee
Author: Georges Younes
Review: The Brown Bean Coffee has a couple of locations in central Colombo. The larger of the two is located across the street from the National Museum. Service is great. Food is good. Breakfast at less than 3 dollars is great value. Prepared to order, it includes eggs, toast, sausages, fresh fruit and tea. The coffeeshop also makes fresh juices and good brownies.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Thashmika Ranasinghe
Review: I visited Java lounge fort for a breakfast with my girlfriend. We were thoroughly impressed. So Friendly staff.. I ordered My favourite coffee Caramel latte. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a conducive environment coupled with excellent service..

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Roel Moises Acedillo
Review: Great food & drinks. Staff were amazing, kind and attentive. Place is cozy, cool airconditioning, plenty of seats and relaxing atmosphere. Definitely a fantastic and safe place when you’re in Hospital Street. Please don’t hesitate to try.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: malshi kavindya
Review: I had a wonderful experience at Java! The atmosphere is cozy and welcoming, making it the perfect spot to relax or get some work done. The staff is friendly and attentive, and the coffee is simply exceptional. I always tried their hot and iced Mocha and it was heart warming . Highly recommend this place to all coffee lovers!

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Chahat Jamwal
Review: Great place for a coffee and time out. Good ambience and great service. Good food and coffee options available.

Name: Java Lounge - Fort
Author: Sachin Thiwanka
Review: While I may come across as a little biassed, I sincerely believe that anyone who like coffee should visit Java Lounge. It has always been our second home (the barns place). The Java Lounge Fort was quite wonderful. I've been there a few times, but the new design is far better and cosier than the previous one. We have a few complaints about their foods, the pasta meals were a little bland, and the portion sizes were on the smaller side. We do, however, love all of the sandwiches, and the sampling of beef sandwiches they provided were excellent also we love everything they offer in their non-caffeine and coffee sections. Overall, the best coffee chain in Sri Lanka at the price you pay. Finally, fort staff was really friendly and welcoming.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Buddhika Jayawardena
Review:
Not the best experience at this location.

- Service : It used to be a lot better.  No one in the counter spoke. Service used to be more friendly.

-the ground floor area looked clean.  However, the upstairs outdoor area, the slide door doesn't work. How it was opened and closed was a task. They should put some kind of handle if the door does not work or even a sign,

-The upstairs area counter with straws, sugar, and tissues were empty.

-The toilet for men; it did not have a commode seat.  I'm not sure what's going on, if coffee bean is going out of business.

Need some improvement for the price of the products they sell, they need to have some basic facilities.  I hope they do improve their service quality like before and maintain some facilities.  It's a prime location.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Shanila Thirimanne
Review:
Coffee & crossaints and nice place to chill. It's a bit on the expensive side though.

Tandoori pastry is in good overall taste as well. (They had no sauce when I was there)  Again, the price doesn't justify though.

Got a great selection of cheesecakes and pastries. Quite a good ambiance as well.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Lahiru Ellepola
Review: Had to hang out here until we got confirmation on a meeting location. Had a quick coffee before we left. Hot day and the inside was pretty chill. Would visit again.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Love this coffee spot! The cozy atmosphere sets the perfect vibe for work, dates, or relaxation. Their coffee is delicious every time. Highly recommend it for the caffeine lovers!

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: May lorraine Gutierrez
Review:
We used to love coffee/s here even before the pandemic. But lately we noticed that something change on the taste or quality of some beverage/s and pastry. Dont get me wrong but im not saying all..just Some.
Yesterday we had was out of our expectations specially the red velvet cake..kinda dry and seems old for the price of 1k..🤦 Other pastry custard and blueberry danish is all good as well as the swiss roll. Coffee/s 7/10..too sweet.

Ambience/washroom well maintained.
staffs serves well with wide smile. Enough parking when we got there.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Sameera Samarasekara
Review: I visited this place around 8:30 p.m. when it was open. There were some adults chatting with each other. The place was calm, though some were watching movies, which wasn’t bothersome at all. They have a new collection of fruit juices—Narang, passion fruit, and soursop—all in glass bottles, priced at 550 LKR. If they offered these in tetra packs, they could probably sell more. Anyway, their coffee is good, and you can find the country's best cheesecake here.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Asiri Dolawatta
Review: Service was bad! Took time to service. They mixed up the order. When we asked why the order was late, they were kinda made at us. Never said sorry or willing to accept. Never coming here again!

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Hirun Yasara
Review:
The order was delivered extremely quickly and the service by the staff was excellent as always.

The outside smoking area is also a nice place to chill and work from.

The coffee was also excellent.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Lasith Jayalath
Review: Taste of the food is almost same as the other outlets of them. And was delicious as always. For the first time I enjoyed their very own Tamarind drink and you should try it. This outlet is having few seating arrangements both in and out. But I must say that it was bit crowded, hence the calm nature was bit disturbed. They had a parking sufficient for around 5 vehicles with a dedicated security officer.

Name: Java Lounge
Author: Hirun Yasara
Review: I had a wonderful experience at this place. The atmosphere is inviting, the food is delicious, and the coffee is top-notch. The staff is extremely friendly and provides excellent service. A special mention to Mr. Ravindu, who was very supportive and attentive today. Additionally, the security guard, Mr. Silva, is also very friendly and helpful—really good company. Highly recommend this place for a pleasant visit!

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Joel S
Review:
Good place to have a meeting or hangout. Loved the pure white chocolate ice blend. The ambience is very nice and chill.
We tried their Tandoori Chicken puff and Mushroom puff. Tandoori chicken puff was tasty but the mushroom puff was not so flavourful.
But the food is highly overpriced and therefore is not value for money at all.
Very limited power outlets.
Service was OK.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Farid Baber
Review: We went there to have Coffee and Tea with light snacks. Very nice place to relax and enjoy beverages and drinks. The quality of all items was excellent. The only thing is that you have to go to get your order from the counter. In a leisure place it’s not comfortable to go to get your stuff. Fully recommended for friends and family.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Sheshan Narada
Review:
I recently visited Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves for the first time. The interior of the cafe was pleasing, creating a calm and quiet atmosphere. The comfortable seating arrangements and spacious layout added to the overall cafe vibe. The staff members were decent.

decided to try the caramel latte and the mocha latte, accompanied by an Oreo cheesecake. It was my first experience with an Oreo cheesecake, and I must say, it was absolutely delicious. As for the lattes, the mocha latte didn't quite meet my expectations, as it had an intense chocolate flavor that might be overpowering for some. However, the caramel latte was enjoyable and well-made. It's worth mentioning that the prices at Coffee Beans and Tea Leaves are slightly on the expensive side, with the lattes priced around rs:1000. Cheesecake also around rs:1000.

In conclusion, my overall experience was positive.

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Ranudhi Fernando
Review: My favourite cafe out of every other.. no place can satisfy my taste buds like their Ice Blend drinks, one of my favourites being the Cookies & Cream Ice Blend (which is shown in the picture) which they previously had on the menu but not anymore which I got to know by my recent revisit but I tried out their Mocha (added chocolate) Ice Blend which is as good as the cookies and cream flavour therefore it did not disappoint me. I highly recommend trying it out ❤️👍🏼

Name: The Coffee Bean and Tea Leaf - Landmark
Author: Abdul Basith
Review: Good atmosphere. A nice place to hangout with friends. Would recommend if you are a coffee lover😊

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review:
Was looking for a place to work and eat on a Sunday afternoon and found this one!! Absolutely loved the experience! Their Caramel Frappe is my favorite! I don’t recommend their curry pastas!
P.S. They have free WiFi

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Sarah Sen
Review: The place is cozy and spacious than it looks from outside. Good for working/studying alone. The coffee is great, that's the best part. Sadly I found the food disappointing and very dry. It's understandable the place is a cafe and not a restaurant but it can't be that difficult to keep the quality consistent of the dozen or so meal options in the menu. I've had them before for years but the quality was never this bad. I noticed the place also looked a bit shabby/worn out than it did before. I only came back here after 4 years and saw an unexpected downgrade. I love the Java coffee and cakes. But if the maintenance/quality is deteriorating, the in-cafe experience wouldn't be something to look forward to anymore.

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Be Blessed
Review: I visit Java Lounge often. I like Jawaththa branch as the service and food are great. Staff is very friendly and helpfull.  Ms Gimhani is very friendly and helpful. There a few parking slots and it is very clean also

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Misnad Haque
Review:
Updated for September, 2024. Just had some awesome creamy chicken pasta (they use actual cream cheese when asked) and my usual Americano. Brilliant as always. Service from Suminda, Gimhani and Malik was top notch. Really kind and very helpful!

Love the ambience and they serve excellent coffee. Their almond croissant is highly recommended!!

Name: Java Lounge - Jawatte
Author: Michelle Scharenguivel
Review: The team at our favorite coffee shop is exceptionally warm and welcoming. Janahath, in particular, with his big smile and friendly demeanor, making every visit feel personal and enjoyable. I can't recommend this place enough!

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Krishan Dhammearatchi
Review: Place is nice and cozy. Food is ok. Iced coffee is over priced tho😅

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Yonali De Silva
Review: Food is very tasty.... Very neat and clean place.... Worth for the price...  Excellent service..... Highly recommended...

Name: Coffee break ceylon
Address: VV8G+HF6, S. De S. Jayasinghe Mawatha, Dehiwala-Mount Lavinia
Author: Madh Wicks
Review: Nice cosy place for a coffee and a quick breakfast they have an aloe vera drink thats a great refresher

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Akithma Rivisari
Review: Loved the food and the ambience. The indoor seating capacity is limited however there’s outdoor seating available as well.The service is great. Staff is friendly and helpful. The strawberry danish was fluffy and not too sweat and loved the chocolate croissant. We tried the egg and mayonnaise and tuna sandwiches which were readily available and they tasted amazing. They have savoury options including pasta, wraps and sandwiches as well. Loved the hot chocolate the first time. The second time we tried tasted watery. Overall food is great and good portion sizes as well.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Dilrukshi Fernando
Review:
This was a long overdue visit, and it did not disappoint 😊👏🙌✨ As it was my first visit here, Nipun who took my beverage order (Cadbury’s Hot Chocolate to make it a cozy evening!), recommended the Bacon and Egg Ciabatta as a hearty accompaniment since I had not had lunch!

The prices were unbelievably reasonable. The food was  delicious, the hot chocolate made to perfection. To top it all off, the staff were warm and hospitable. Impeccable service 👏 I ended up staying well over an hour, reading a good twenty-plus pages of my book as well. 😄

Do check out TITO’s if you are at CCC, or in and around Nawam Mawatha / Park Street area. It is worth a visit. They have a wide variety of coffee and tea options, as well as a decent menu of café food options, and a delectable array of pastries.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Nanshad Daruwalla
Review:
Tito's Cafe in Colombo is a delightful  gem that exudes an aura of warmth and charm. From the moment you step inside, you are transported to another world with its beautiful, cozy, and open ambiance. The cafe's interior is thoughtfully designed to create a welcoming and inviting atmosphere that makes you feel right at home.

One of the standout features of Tito's Cafe is the range of delicacies being offered. Whether you're in the mood for a cup of coffee, a delicious muffin, a hearty sandwich, or a delectable slice of cake, you'll find that everything is available and also reasonably priced. This makes it a fantastic choice for those looking for a satisfying meal or snack without breaking the bank.

Speaking of the food, the quality matches the affordability. The muffin is a true delight for the taste buds, with its perfect texture and flavors. The blueberry muffin was oozing with blueberries inside. The coffee is rich and aromatic, providing the ideal pick-me-up during your visit. The sandwiches are not to be missed, as they are filled with fresh ingredients and burst with flavor. And if you have a sweet tooth, the cakes are a must-try, with each bite offering a heavenly experience.

So, if you're looking for a cafe that can transport you to another country while delighting your palate, Tito's Cafe should be at the top of your list.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Charles Samarasekara
Review:
Hi everyone,

I would highly recommend that their service and their food is the best - 10/10.

The CY Club Bagel is the best flavour Bagel I have had. This quality and taste is mouth watering.

My children love this place. Highly recommend everything. Honestly sorry that I could not take much photos.

Name: Tito's Cafe
Author: Ashmila Ramachandran
Review: Bought a ribbon cake with customised wording.  The cake was fresh and delicious. The service needs a special mention. Keep up the good work!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: DAMITH CHANDANA
Review:
Monkeybean Cafe is a hidden gem that perfectly combines stunning sea views, a tranquil atmosphere, and delectable food. The moment you walk in, you're greeted by the friendly and attentive staff.

The ambiance is serene and ideal for getting some work done. The spacious seating areas, complemented by the calming sound of the waves, create a peaceful working environment that's hard to beat.

The menu offers a delightful array of dishes, all prepared with fresh ingredients. From the hearty breakfast options to the delicious lunch specials, every bite is a treat. The coffee is exceptional, making it a perfect spot for coffee aficionados.

Overall, Monkeybean Cafe is a fantastic place to relax, work, and enjoy great food with a breathtaking view. Highly recommended for anyone looking to combine productivity with leisure.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Melody Carragher
Review: We just had a coffee here which was delicious. The ladies serving are very beautiful and make you feel so welcome. Atmosphere is great and awesome location as you can watch the waves roll in as you enjoy your coffee!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Laurence keen
Review: Food was amazing! It's honestly been hard to find some good quality (western) cafe food in Colombo; but we were finally fortunate enough to find this place and it definitely hit the spot. Only a 300 meter walk from the Granbell Hotel, which is super convenient. Reasonable prices and the staff are super sweet and helpful!

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Ishani Wijesinghe
Review: Not the ideal place for a coffee date! There aren’t many options to select from! Their burger is not worth the price! However absolutely loved their Cafe Mocha!! The staff is super nice.

Name: Monkeybean Cafe
Author: Gayan Chathuranga
Review:
I must say, the prices here are quite high. I was charged Rs 400 just for a spoon of vanilla, which was not listed on the menu and the staff did not mention when I asked—this is unacceptable. The place wasn't crowded when I visited, but there is no dedicated parking, so you have to park on the road. On a positive note, the staff was friendly.
🥴

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Chanuka Dinuwan
Review: I had hot chocolate and a cafe latte here. It was good. The atmosphere was calm and it's a good place to have some free space. I also had a slice of coffee cake and it was delicious. I recommend this place to those who love to have coffee.

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Kalanga Pieris
Review: We were taken by surprise when we walked into our usual coffee shop, seeing their new chocolate outlet. Everything was 5 star quality except for the prices. All hand crafted, everything we tasted was exceptional, and ended up buying so many. Baileys centred was my favourite among all and white chocolate cooki bar was my son's. Daughter was crazy over the beautiful boxes we had to choose to wrap up our chocolates.

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Thushan kavinda
Review:
If you're looking for a peaceful and delightful dining experience in the heart of Nawala, Java Lounge is the perfect place to unwind. This charming café offers a calm and serene environment, making it an ideal spot for both relaxing and catching up with friends or getting some work done. The ambiance is a delightful blend of cozy and modern, with comfortable seating and a layout that ensures privacy while you enjoy your meal or coffee.

The food and beverages here are excellent, offering a wide range of options from aromatic coffees to delicious pastries and savory meals. Whether you're in the mood for a quick snack or a more hearty meal, the menu has something for everyone. Their coffee is undoubtedly one of the best in town, brewed to perfection, and served by a friendly, attentive staff who go out of their way to ensure you have a great experience.

Java Lounge also maintains a very clean and hygienic environment, with attention to detail that enhances your dining experience. Whether you're a frequent visitor or it's your first time, the consistency in quality, service, and ambiance is remarkable. If you’re looking for a five-star café in Nawala with a calm atmosphere, Java Lounge is a must-visit!

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Krishalika Rathnayake
Review: I recently visited Java Lounge at Nawala with friends and had a great experience. The environment was calm and relaxing. There was enough seating space, allowing us to chat comfortably. The food was delicious with fair portions. Keep up the good work!

Name: Java Lounge - Nawala
Author: Nuwan Fernando
Review: It’s my first time visiting here, loved the place. Great for group meetings or hangouts and also individually if you have online meetings etc. A wonderful place to catch up with your loved ones. Has a large lobby area and also an outdoor space as well. Over all the ambiance is fantastic.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Sanc
Review:
This cafe offers a delightful ambiance, perfect for casual gatherings or productive work sessions. Its modern interior, spacious layout, and comfortable seating create a cozy atmosphere, ideal for socializing or studying without distractions. Whether you're catching up over coffee or tackling assignments, this cafe provides a welcoming environment for all occasions. With the option to plug in your laptop and work in a quiet corner, it's an ideal spot to join for a business call and get some work done while enjoying a decent cup of coffee.

While the food and coffee are reasonably priced, they don't boast any exceptional qualities or standout recommendations.

It's worth noting that if you're not working at WSO2 and plan to stay beyond 2 hours, you'll need to purchase something worth over Rs. 500 for every 2 hours. This policy seems designed to prevent unnecessary overcrowding and maintain a comfortable environment for patrons.
Overall, it's a great choice for anyone seeking a relaxed and versatile hangout spot.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: himasha jayakody
Review:
Food:
The cafe's food have good taste and quality.
Service:
The only negative issue about this place is the staff. We had to wait for few minutes until the cashier came out for us to order. There was a guy at the back making dough who noticed us struggling to find a staff member to bill our order but didn't even bother about telling others. After we ordered they didn't even call us to tell the order is ready so we had to go back and ask if the order is ready.
Atmosphere:
The place is very spacious with comfortable seating. There's no such loud noises or anything so it's very peaceful. If you stay there more than for 2 hours you need to renew your bill by purchasing another product again. And billing should be over RS.500 per person.
