Overall the place had poor customer service but it's a great place if you want a quiet place to hang out with your friends or to work on your assignments/studies.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Theivendiram Pranavan
Review: This place is at the first floor of WSO2. It can be accessed by all the people. Food is great. Humble staff.

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Kavinda Domenico
Review:
One of the most beautiful coffee shops in Colombo🤩
This cafe has a spacious dining area with a cozy atmosphere🛋️
Food items are delicious and prices are affordable🍽️
Also there was a restroom🚻
There were different areas to capture beautiful pictures📸

Name: The Brown Bean Coffee Shop At WSO2
Author: Tihara Egodage
Review: Food and drinks are pretty good, I usually order from here when I'm at O2 because the prices are also reasonable. The only thing is they usually forget to bring the food despite saying that they WILL bring it and it happens so often idk if it's intentional. But other than that I recommend.

Name: Bean Tree Coffee
Author: Dya De Lisle
Review: Good coffee for a buck. It's the only place I've found in Kalanyia with real coffee. A large variety of cakes  and the staff is very helpful.

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: achinda uditha
Review: Absolutely beautiful place to have a coffee with your loved ones. Although the prices are bit higher but worth every cent. I highly recommend cheesecake and cappuccino. Parking is available and staff is friendly.

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: Vikasitha Ranasinghe
Review:
Reasonably priced delicious food items available.
Parking available
Card payments accepted

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: varuna heshan
Review: Nice place cake items are so tasty & recommended for couples

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: MINIDU DESHAPRIYA
Review: Superb ......amazinggggggg😍😍😍😍😍 kottawa area

Name: Cakes & Coffee
Author: Kanchana Kumari
Review: Food was not tasty but it was great for the price.The environment is pleasant yet the workers need more practice they're.very slow

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Hasnaka Amarasinghe
Review: Very calm place. The brownie piece that i ate was very tasty and very fresh. They heat the cake piece before serve me. And the chocolate syrup was amazing. I suggest to other people. Nescafe is not available. But you can try different coffees.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Minuk Senanayake
Review:
Idk if it was a bad day or what, but the white forest cake was kinda dry. The brownie was way too cakey, it would have been great with ice cream but on its own or with coffee it's not that good.
Most buns were kinda dry and the hot chocolate was just plain bad(looked so nice, but taste was just like chocolate milk). The buns were kinda hard too.
Cheesecake looked great tho.
All in all, great looking food, nice place, nice people but idk about the food. Just avoid the cakes basically.
Great for photos and all.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Chathurangi Dinushika
Review:
We did not have a cafe close by Maharagama as per my knowledge. 👀 Recently we discovered this place and we were so glad about our visit there.
So space-wise, it is kind of a small place. Not too busy or crowded. But it has quite a good space for hangouts. ❤
First, we did not think that it had any seating area. To our surprise, it is a three-story building or it was designed to look so. 😁
As they mention, there is a karaoke room which will be suitable for a small pack of 8. A meeting area, is an isolated area with a door, so you can have the privacy of carrying your business meetings. 👍
And there are two open areas. One of the open areas is the rooftop and maybe you will be able to arrange a small gathering. And the next open area will be good for you to work with sipping your favourite coffee. (Power sockets available) ☺️
When it comes to the food, they might improve a bit in that area but they have quite a good range. Prices are so reasonable and compared to BIG cafes, it is way more affordable and that is the best part of this cafe. 😍❤️
Coffee is good and good range of coffees available with them. Modern coffee brewing machines were used. And I think since they do not have differentiated cup sizes, they serve a good amount of coffee for a good price. ✨️❤️
Tastes and preferences vary from one to the other. You must try this place if you visit or live around Maharagama.

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Ryan Jason
Review:
This is my first time and it was a lovely experience! Staff is good!
Peaceful environment!
Service was fast, they served it within few minutes
Reasonable prize
Drinks are pretty good!
Good place to visit with family or friends!

Name: Cakes And Coffee
Author: Asha Thilakarathna
Review: I got a cake yesterday from this shop and it was rotten when I checked it today morning. And I made a call for this shop and the girl who answered the call, politely apologized and send me a cake worth than I bought yesterday. And she has given me a sweet note on the cake as well. I really appreciate you and thank for this delicious cake❤️❤️🩷 recommend to all❤️

Name: Brew Island
Author: Shane Selvaratnam
Review: This is a newly opened coffee shop. The ambience is good. But the prices are ridiculously high. The customer service was very good and I'm planning to visit again to try their chicken croissant which was recommended. Hopefully the management will revise the prices and tradeoff profit for customer delight.

Name: Brew Island
Author: beast
Review:
Newly opened coffee shop. The milk shake is very nice and the food is decent too.

Will visit again for sure.

Name: Brew Island
Author: Sashini Ranasinghe
Review: Island Brew has the best coffee. If you are into coffee shops which are cozy.. This is the best place.. Staff is very friendly.. Good job Team Island Brew!! I will definitely visit again.. 👍

Name: Brew Island
Author: hiruni perera
Review: Nice friendly staff and good working space. The tea for one person was pretty good for Rs.400 and the portion was sizable. The only shortcoming was that they don’t have a wifi facility but overall it was a great place to get some work done.

Name: Brew Island
Author: Matthew Chmielewski
Review: Very nice iced coffee - open late and hit the spot. Great service!

Name: Leenos cafe
Author: Tasneem Zaheen
Review: Amazing Coffee and food really nice atmosphere to hangout with friends or relax and work.

Name: Leenos cafe
Author: S Anthonysamy
Review: Great way to start your day! Friendly service, good coffee, delicious treats.

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Dilruk Kannangara
Review:
Simply Amazing. What an idea having a Coffee Shop, in a dull city of Borella. Needed theae kind of spot for small rendezvous. Well, we were cluless when our friends came to visit us. We had to move either Rajagiriya or Colombo 7. It was opened on yesterday. But unfortunately I had no time to pay a visit here.
I am really happy to write 1st Review for them on google. Hope they will keep their standard on the outset throughout. They have free Wi-Fi if you stay long. Total seating capacity is 30 or more. They have sofas with coffee tables, rooms to make sure your privacy. 3 parking spots. Modern interior is a plus point. Resonable prices when compared to other similar businesses.

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: EsHAn S
Review: Absolutely loved this place! The food was amazing and the service was top-notch. recommend!

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Kavindya Perera
Review: I was pleasantly surprised to find such a great dining spot on Borella Cotta road. Definitely worth checking out if you are in the area and looking for a delicious meal…

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Pasindu Vihangana
Review: Has everything you expect from a decent coffee place..

Name: Cakes and Coffee Borella
Address: 89 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Rd, Colombo
Author: Ishida Tetsuhiro
Review:
Amazing, really good cafe.

I was excited to find a wonderfully designed cafe in a cluttered area on the outskirts of town. However, the store staff doesn't seem to be used to it, maybe because it just opened? Recommended.

Name: Bread Court
Author: Achini Sheralla
Review:
Lovely place to spend some quality time with your family. Ample parking available. Also they maintain the cleanliness very well.

Although there were many kinds of food, we bought two slices of cake to have with cafe latte and ice coffee. The ice coffee was not bad but it would be better if the water quality was reduced.

Name: Bread Court
Author: Kanchana Wijesinghe
Review:
It's really rare to find a good coffee shop around Kaduwela and Bread Court is the best in area.
You will surely love their pastries and food as they are really delicious..
Very limited sestibg space but your taste buds will satisfy for sure. The staff is very friendly and maintain a high level of customer service

Name: Bread Court
Author: Ruwanmalee Dissanayake
Review:
An eye-catching along the roadside. This place a very clean and tidy. The food tastes great and provides a large variety of bakery items from savory to sweet, not to forget they got chocolates as well. The places provide alot of drink options(hot to cold). Prices seem to reasonable.

A good parking space is available. The customer is good. Their bathrooms are very clean.

Overall value for money is high

Name: Bread Court
Author: VIOLETA MARTINEZ
Review:
Coffee is great!
We are coffee lovers and this is the perfect place on town.
We had, americano, espresso doppio and latte coffee.
Bathrooms are clean, service is great.

Name: Bread Court
Author: thilanka ratnayaka
Review: Recommended place for a quick refresh. Convenient location easy to access from main road, near highway interchange. Foods were delicious and fresh. Wash rooms available.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Dinuka De Silva
Review: Only the place at least in this level near dehiwala junction. So I'm used to go there for short snacks. But, it's unfortunate that their food is spoiled some times. Actually none of the short eats are in good quality. Some times too much sugar also.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Kareem Bhai
Review:
Don't buy any things in this place I recently bought a Jambo Hot Dog 🌭 and when I going to eat I can see the worms 🪱 inside the sausages very bad service not quality foods 😡 they will sell the old items
Really very bad experience 👎👎

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Thanu Sris
Review: Best place for bread , cakes & short eats , friendly staffs , I really love the eclair there 😋

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: kumaran thanga
Review: Good place for cakes, buns and other bakery items. Friendly staffs.

Name: Everyday Bakery And Cafe
Author: Nadine Fernando
Review:
Well the short eats are not bad.
Cakes are not upto standard.

But I have a few complaints too: (1)regarding your orange juice remember it is NOT SUNQUICK. Don't deceive customers. If you are making Sunquick why do you have to use Preservatives & Coloring? Make sure you change your labels immediately.

(2) Recently I ordered Ice Coffee & Orange Juice amounting to 40 cups in total.Asked the Sales Person if you could make it fresh because it was about 2 days old.(a) NO was his reply after checking with his superior. (b) since I had got an order I wanted the label without the price. Even that I received a NEGATIVE response.

You people should be flexible. Afterall Customer is King. Being in Marketing it's a shame if you are treating your customers in this manner.

Name: Island Tea Co. & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: Deegayu Rajanayake
Review: good location, good coffee, good music... Perfect place to have a coffee

Name: හසානෝ
Author: Danushka Maduranga (ダヌーシュカ・マドゥランガ)

Name: හසානෝ
Author: Animilia
Review: There are chickens

Name: BEST COFFEE SHOP
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sathieeswaran Mohanathasan
Review:
One of my favorite cafes in Colombo without any doubt. The reasons:

- it’s 24 hours (what else do you need? 😜)
- The interior is bloody brilliant and calming just how a cafe should be
- Food is good
- I love their coffees (tried few different ones and no complaints whatsoever)
- They do have some live music during the weekend or special occasions

I go to the healing cafe often especially to heal myself from the burnouts and just to relax and chill and every-time it works fine maybe because of the calm atmosphere

Prices are not expensive and somewhat reasonable

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Inosh Perera
Review: Went to work for a few hours and the staff was super helpful. Nice atmosphere. Siddik who was on duty came and handed me the WiFi details. Very nice of him. Super helpful throughout the whole time. Coffee and food was nice as well. Place is open 24/7.

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Oshini Nugapitiya
Review: Found the perfect spot to have my breakfast. 10/10 for food and drink. Thanks Siddeeq for the amazing customer service. Will definitely come back🤩

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Sameena Gunawardena
Review: Excellent place to quickly grab a meal, drink or even have breakfast, lunch or dinner. Healing Cafe has been a go to place for the last couple of years.. Best service, relaxed environment and amazing customer service. Special recommendation and appreciation to Siddeeq who has been giving exceptional service for us for last two years..

Name: A Healing Café - Hotel MaRadha
Address: 31, St. Kilda's Lane, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Vayshu Vayshalni
Review: I recently visited Healing Cafe and tried their wade with a cup of filter coffee. The wade was crispy and packed with flavor, and the coffee was rich and smooth, just how I like it. The relaxed nature ambiance made it even better, and I love that they’re open 24/7. Whether you're grabbing a quick snack or unwinding with a coffee, this place is a must-visit!

Name: Island Tea Co & Ceylon Coffee Club
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Caffco
Author: Chanaka Rathnayake
Review:
Caffco is a cozy coffeeshop and clam date spot in Horana, and one of the best places to get good quality espresso drinks. All the baristas know about  the available menu items and won't hesitate to recommend a good dish.

We bought cafe mocha and a hazelnut latte from which I can highly recommend their cafe mocha.

If you're visiting here don't forget to try their delicious chocolate brownie as well.

They accept both cash and cards.

Name: Caffco
Author: Savishka Werajini
Review: Caffco, is a charming spot perfect for quality time, featuring a nice ambiance and friendly staff. It offers a private dining area ideal for mini celebrations. However, the AC could be stronger, and the private dining room would benefit from better air conditioning and warmer lighting for a more comfortable and photogenic experience. Despite this, it's a lovely place with delicious food.

Name: Caffco
Author: Nilupulee Wathsala
Review: This cafe has its own unique vibe. The perfect place in the Horana area for having a coffee time with loved ones and friends. Apart from hot coffees it has frappes, mojitos and a food collection including burgers, subs, pastas. The food we tried was delicious. It takes some time to prepare food cause I guess they are freshly made.

Name: Caffco
Author: Thamindu Manodya
Review: clean and calm environment to spent time with delicious foods. There is one thing, that mojito collection will definitely make relaxing mind in any situation. What a great drink😇😇.

Name: Caffco
Author: Tharinda Thamaranga
Review: Celebrated our anniversary at Caffco.The staff was attentive and courteous, ensuring our experience was unforgettable. Highly recommend Cafco for any special occasion or simply for a delightful culinary journey.

Name: Coffee Lounge
Author: Indrani Karunarathne
Review: The newly opened coffee shop was really great. Great service and Great food. Overall... 5 ⭐

Name: Coffee Lounge
Author: Yohan Peters
Review: Best place ..❤

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: ashen madusanka
Review: I recently visited Tasha Cafe and had an amazing experience. I tried the egg sandwich, vanilla muffin, and cappuccino, all of which were delicious. The sandwich was fresh and light, the muffin perfectly moist with just the right amount of sweetness, and the cappuccino was a smooth and creamy delight. The ambiance of the cafe was cozy and relaxing, making it a great spot to unwind. A special mention goes to Yash, who was incredibly friendly and provided excellent service, making the visit even more pleasant. Highly recommend stopping by for a treat!

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Kaveesha Madubashini
Review: Friendly customer service and a good,calm and quite place for coffee Dates and for solo dates. The food is awesome and they served it very nicely

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Kithsiri Ekanayake
Review: Tasha Cafe is an exquisite establishment that offers a delightful experience. The tasteful decor creates a warm and welcoming ambiance that is perfect for relaxation or engaging in conversation over their carefully crafted and freshly brewed coffee (which I highly recommend!) and delectable butter cake (which is simply divine!). Their menu boasts a diverse selection of sandwiches and treats that cater to various palates. Ms. Nuwani and Chathurya elevate the experience with their helpfulness and amiable disposition, ensuring that every customer feels welcomed and well-cared for. In summary, Tasha Cafe is a must-visit destination for those who seek exceptional coffee, delectable cuisine, and gracious service in a sophisticated setting.

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Mario R
Review:
I have been to this place a couple of times the last two times including last Thursday the service was a let down. The usual pleasant staff was replaced by a stuck up female who was irritated when we came in as she was sitting and lounging during the evening shift this was on a Thursday evening around 5.30 pm. She acted as though we were asking her to pay for the food when we ordered. Provided to give me a lecture when I asked for white sugar for my cappuccino. She has already brought the brown one. Worst service ever. Normally there is a girl who is super pleasant and courteous who makes us want to visit again.
Food wise they need a menu update but the quality is good though. Please train your this person to be more customer friendly.

A small note on my visit today  . I went in again today around 12 in the afternoon to place an order for a birthday cake and the three staff that were there were so welcoming and warm that I ordered more than what I initially planned to order due to the way they treated me ,my wife and son . One of the staff even remmebered my sons name and I would say please make sure you keep them  as they know how to treat customers and makes us want to come again and again .

Name: Tasha Cafe
Author: Umm D
Review:
I loved the atmosphere, nice interior and good coffee.
Peaceful place to work, study or chill with friends.
I’d ordered a red velvet cupcake unfortunately that wasn’t fresh enough other than that everything was 10/10.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Chandima Mithuni
Review:
I went to tea avenue , kotte on 22/08/2024.
I had a cafe latte small which was rs 940.
I had a tiramisu cake slice which was rs 1250.
The total was rs 2190/-  There were no service charges. The atmosphere was good. Washroom facilities are available.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Mahenn .-.
Review: Tea Avenue captivated me with its serene ambiance and impeccable service. From the moment I stepped in, the aroma of freshly brewed teas enveloped me, creating a tranquil retreat from the bustling city outside. Their extensive menu boasts a delightful array of teas, each served with grace and expertise. I particularly enjoyed their peach tea, a delicate blend that left a lingering floral sweetness on my palate. The staff were knowledgeable and eager to guide me through their offerings, enhancing my experience. Tea Avenue is a haven for tea enthusiasts seeking quality brews in a soothing environment—truly deserving of seven stars. Love the staff!! Absolutely amazing.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Lasith Jayalath
Review: I was looking for a calm place to have a fruit juice while watching some random stuff on you tube. Suddenly I came across this place. I must say it was ideal for what I was searching for. Atmosphere was very calm and clean. You can go upstairs if you want more privacy. There was a room like place on upstairs which is ideal for a group of friends to enjoy some food while not disturbing the others. If you go through their menu without visiting this place, you will feel that the prices are high. But with all the value additions they have done on top of the food experience, it is really worth. But I am bit disappointed with the service, because I had to order and again I had to come to the cashier to collect the food. It is really uncomfortable if you have to carry the food to upstairs. Parking was only sufficient for three vehicles. Anyway the food experience was great.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Oshadie kudagoda
Review:
The place is not too large, but it provides enough space to spend time without getting interrupted. Like in every tea avenue, they offer many food and beverage options. Usually, I enjoy their food, but today I was served some over-fried chips. However, their Latte and Sandwich are good. I highly recommend trying their ginger beer, one of their signature drinks, which is truly amazing.

I also noticed they have a meeting room here, which can be very useful. If you intend to use it, they have mentioned to call and make a reservation in advance.

Name: Tea Avenue - Kotte
Address: 382 Pitakotte - Talawatugoda Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Dushie Fernando
Review: Ordered waffle with prawn and  creamy sauce or something and ..although it said creamy I didn't see anything creamy 😔. Ordered fish and chips , they served sweet potato chips and it was charred and they served without any problem until we said we can't eat it ..very poor quality.. also ordered tandoori chicken sandwich had only tandoori and no butter or sauce or mayo inside ..very dry .. but the chocolate cake I think ow was mud chocolate cake was good ... Have been to kohuwala tea avenue..the food quality is much better there . This place need improvement

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Senuri Hettiarachchi
Review:
I recently visited Tco By Adra and decided to try their donuts, which looked promising. Unfortunately, they turned out to be quite disappointing. The donuts were dry, lacking the light and fluffy texture you’d expect from a fresh batch. Biting into one felt more like eating a stale pastry rather than a soft, indulgent treat.

The flavor was also underwhelming, with little sweetness or richness to make up for the poor texture. Even a drizzle of glaze or icing couldn’t salvage the experience. I’ve had better donuts from grocery stores.

Overall, I’d suggest the restaurant revisit their donut recipe. With so many great options for baked goods out there, offering something this dry and bland just doesn’t cut it.

If you’re craving a donut, I’d recommend looking elsewhere.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: supun missaka
Review:
Cozy Atmosphere and Delicious Coffee!
I absolutely love this coffee shop! The ambiance is cozy with comfortable seating and soft background music. The staff is always friendly and welcoming, making it a great place to relax or catch up with friends. The coffee is top-notch, with a wide variety of options to choose from. Whether you prefer a classic espresso or a unique specialty drink, they have something for everyone. Plus, their pastries and snacks perfectly complement the coffee. I highly recommend this place to any coffee lover looking for a great experience!

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Yasanthi Bandara
Review: Very friendly staff. One of the best places to have a calm and quiet coffee or tea in Colombo. Great coffee and tea.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Navod Kankanamge.
Review: I tiny, cozy attractive coffee shop. Offers a good variety of hot and cold beverages as well as food which goes along with them. Slightly above average prices. Great staff. Tidy, cozy interior. Parking might be an issue though.

Name: TCo By Adra
Author: Nathan Pandazopoulos
Review: Great coffee spot for an early morning!! The food is delicious and the staff very professional. Highly recommend coming here if you’ve got a train to another part of the island (since it’s relatively close to Colombo Fort Station).

Name: Goodies
Author: Banacinn
Review: We liked it. Nice to be in Air conditioned comfort. Great macaroons and cookies

Name: Goodies
Author: Horatiu Popescu
Review: A bit hidden, as it is situated in the little shopping gallery in the basement of the Cinnamon Lakeside hotel this place was a wonderful surprise. Excellent cakes, good coffee and stellar customer service from the staff. Good prices, so I was surprised to see that it's also value for money despite the fact that the place charges 10% extra for service. It was flawless! Well done!

Name: Goodies
Author: Prabhani TG
Review: Delicious coffee, cakes and sandwiches. Nice and wonderful service

Name: Goodies
Author: Christopher Fernando
Review: They made a bespoke gluten free cake that was excellent! After trying and failing to get a gluten free cake from many locations, they were able to provide a beautiful HF chocolate cake.

Name: Goodies
Author: Ramanan Sharma
Review: Goodies is well known for their fantastic cakes and savories. They also have a good variety of sandwiches which can be customized. Staff are very friendly and accommodating. Always make it a pleasant experience for us.

Name: SSC - Lawn Cafe - Coffee Coner
Author: Clehan Pulle
Review: Good please and food also good

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: mahesh sellahewa
Review: A best place to chill with friends and it’s BOYB and they have some lovely food and the location is unbelievable . Good Luck guys keep up the good work

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Navi Rafaelle
Review: Delicious food, friendly staff. Norah’s Cafe is a great place. Glad that I gave a visit to this place all of a sudden. Thank you guys ♥️

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Kith Dam
Review: One of the best places around thalawathugoda to chill and have a coffee at anytime of the day. Mahesh makes the best food/coffee and hands down the best service. Highly recommend the place to any one!

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Aman Richard Anthony
Review: Loved Mahesh’s effort the keep us happy. Went out of his way to bring some extra things! Loved the place!

Name: Norah's Cafe
Author: Dilshan “Butters” Samarasinghe
Review: I had the most amazing time here, the staff was very friendly and welcoming , the food was excellent . Id come back again

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Ransika Lakmal
Review:
One of the best customer service I have experienced so far. I was there for a meeting and wanted a quick cofee and bite, Neeliya were so welcoming. Amazing hospitality, great cofee and food
Highly recommended cafe if you are in colombo

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Chang Miao
Review: Both the coffee and tea were served in paper cups and Puff was not freshly made that day. The coffee tastes bad. There is no service to speak of, and the price of service charges and taxes is unreasonable.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Lee Smith
Review: Sandwiches with fresh salad should never be rolled over to the next day. Rancid.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Amalan Dhananjayan (Batzee)
Review:
This is located inside the Granbell Hotel on the first floor. There is one Barista.

I ordered a White Chocolate Frappachino and it's one of the Best Frappachinos I have ever had. The perfect Ice Blend.

I would highly recommend this place.

One thing to note that there will be a 10% Service charge and a bunch of Government Tax gets added to the bill making it a total of 28%+ extra to the bill.

Name: Cafe EN -縁-
Address: 1st Floor - 282/5, Kollupitiya Road, Marine Drive, Colombo
Author: Shamm Lux
Review:
Best coffee in Colombo.
Neelya the barista was super sweet & made the most delicious coffee even with a long line waiting.
The ambiance is amazing facing the shore, definitely will come back when in Colombo!

Name: Imakro Coffee Shop
Author: Hasitha Subasinghe
Review: One of the most decent places to visit in Bandaragama even with kids and family.

Name: Let's Eat
Author: Gihan S
Review: This place permanently closed.

Name: Let's Eat
Author: Madura Perera
Review: Delicious

Name: Asker foods kopi kade kelaniya
Author: Asker Ali
Review: Cheaper and tasty iced coffee 100 rupees

Name: Asker foods kopi kade kelaniya
Author: Captain Asker
Review: Reasonable price cheap and good

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: TD
Review: Ordered chicken fried rice via Uber Eats, and it was delivered after about an hour, as we were located in Kadawatha. The dish arrived hot and fresh, packed neatly to preserve the heat. The portion size was generous, and the rice was delicious. However, it would have been even better with more spices and some gravy. The omelette was a bit small as well.

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: Amila Mahawasala
Review: I had my 40th birthday celebration at The Food Cult, and it was amazing! The venue and ambiance were perfect, and the food was delicious. Malith and his team provided exceptional service, ensuring that everything ran smoothly and all guests were well looked after. I highly recommend The Food Cult for anyone looking for a great venue, tasty food, and outstanding service!

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: K.A Kalani
Review:
Food cults is the best restaurant in the area. They NEVER disappoint. Their food is inventive with flavor combinations I would never envision but are always phenomenal. Top that with excellent service and you have a dining experience you will want to repeat again and again.
This restaurant has such a cozy and charming atmosphere! From the moment you walk in, you feel right at home. The warm lighting and comfortable seating make it an ideal place for a relaxed meal.”

the staff is notably friendly and very welcoming.

Highly recommend

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: UN SA
Review: The art work over there are super amazing!! And the pizza was soo amazing got the chance to have half and half veggie supreme and kochchi chicken !! And the pizza was thin crust. And super tasty though they took longer time period to give us to taste and it’s worth for waiting too!!! We ordered lime and mint mojito as well as karak tea which is similar to masala tea. Those are amazing and also we tried the sweet potato fries and the portion size was huge and it was ok.

Name: The Food Cult Restaurant & Coffee House
Author: Gihan Dhananjaya
Review: I recently stumbled upon this place and it was an absolute delight! The food is incredibly flavorful, offering a wide variety of options. I highly recommend trying their wood-fired pizzas, especially the Kochchi Chicken and Ceylon Black Pork. It's great to see that Wattala now has a decent Sheesha lounge with a BYOB option to enjoy and relax.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Food Beats
Review: This cozy little spot is a great place to enjoy a cup of coffee in the city. They offer a delicious variety of cakes, and the coffee is excellent. Conveniently, they have a parking area. However, the staff could benefit from improved professionalism.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Dinesh T. Kumara
Review: Had a good tea time in this cafe. They have good verity of cakes and bakes. Also they have milk tea, milk coffee, espresso, capachino, tea latte and many more. They gave good service to us. Hope to go again.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Ajith Kumara
Review: I went there with my friend to have a coffee, and the male server who attended to us changed his tone in a rude manner while talking to us. Because of this experience, I don't plan to go there again.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Anuradha Sandaruwan
Review: Bad food quality. They sell expired cake.

Name: Cakes & Coffee - Homagama
Author: Champika Pathiraja Menike
Review: A good place to meet and eat.

Name: Neleez Station
Author: Lahiru Rajapaksha
Review:
**First Impressions: Disappointing**

My experience at this place was far from satisfactory. Upon entering, I was greeted by a strong burnt smell that permeated the entire area. Despite having five staff members present, they were all preoccupied with their own tasks and not attentive to customers.

One of the biggest issues is the misleading menu. The prices listed are outdated, and they charged more on the final bill. Additionally, they impose a 10% service charge, but I couldn’t discern what service was provided to justify this fee.

The atmosphere is quite noisy due to the open doors. I wouldn’t recommend this place unless you are in desperate need of food or drink.

Name: Neleez Station
Author: saehaekim business
Review:
Super good try nasigoreng!!!
Best restaurant!!

We were very tired because the weather was hot. So we found coffee. Five kind staff welcomed us. We ordered americano and ate nasi goreng. I wasn't hungry, but because the restaurant smelled like nasi goreng. And the bottom line was that it was the most delicious food we had. Shockingly good. We are Koreans. The coffee was good and the nasi goreng was really delicious and enough. I hope you eat it. Food so delicious!! Eat rice here!!

Name: Neleez Station
Author: Abisheka Seneviratne
Review: the food was okay for the price. atmosphere within the spot was horrible. the staff was preoccupied with their own things on their phones and chatting instead of catering to the customers. the place was too loud as the entrance doors were wide open with external sounds. they didn't provide a bank receipt for the card payment as well. unprofessional service needs tending to!

Name: Neleez Station
Author: Mrunali Randunubandara
Review: The most disgusting dining experience I ever had in a restaurant here in Lanka. Very unpleasant atmosphere, dirty pans and bowls were everywhere in there kitchen. The most disrespectful and unprofessional staff I’ve ever seen. All of them were in their own worlds seeing their phones. They served our food one by one in a very ugly manner without any tray. After we asked about that, all of them started to scowling at us until we leave. The rice was raw and when we asked about that, the waiter said that he has nothing to do it’s up to their chefs. We regret each and every penny, each and every minute that we spent at this disgusting place. 🤮 They ruined our whole experience at lotus tower.

Name: Neleez Station
Author: Maheshi Kahatapitiarachchige
Review: We recevierd a welcome that we have never receverd in a resturent.that's a big difference.the chef is gave differnce expiriance.thank you chef. sri lanaka need a chenge like that.the food is a verry tasty.we realy enjoyed the meal.wish ur all the best.

Name: Barista Bambalapitiya
Author: Thakshila Dayarathna
Review: Recently visited this cozy place for breakfast. So good to be here in the morning as the place is calm and peaceful. I ordered pol sambal and cheese sandwich with matcha. Yummy foods. Staff service also so good.

Name: Barista Bambalapitiya
Author: Cary bg
Review: Barista is a good place for relaxing, meetings etc.. I have been to several and they are good.  The coffee is decent.  I did order a bagel and did not get a bagel.  It looked like a bagel on the menu but I got a roll.  A roll is not a bagel. They also did not have butter.  Therefore I give them low marks.  If you are going to offer bagels, serve bagels.  Not rolls.  I also wanted cheese in it.  I got one tiny bit of a cheese.  I could barely see the cheese.  If you are going to service a "Bagel" with cheese, put some cheese on it so I know it has cheese.  Service was fine.  Atmosphere is fine.  Its not expensive to have butter.  Please add butter to your menu.  It makes all kinds of things better.  by the way, the furniture was not good.  It was old and a bit grungy.  I would upgrade my furniture if you are going to have an above average cafe or coffee/ tea shop.

Name: Barista Bambalapitiya
Author: Pabodha Weerasinghe
Review: We went barista to take our lunch and it was so crowded. We ordered Lunch deal A, cheesy pol sambal sandwich and piece of death by chocolate. Staff took some time to prepare the meal. But they were very friendly, Sandwich was spicy. Chili chickenpox rice was okay.

Name: Barista Bambalapitiya
Author: Dulanjalie Oshani Amaratunga
Review: My go to coffee place. Great coffee and their cheesy garlic bread and the sandwiches are the best. They greet us whenever we enter , friendly staff.

Name: Barista Bambalapitiya
Author: Allan Gabriel
Review: Beautiful place to chill and have a sip! However, air conditioning has to improve. Besides that, good place.

Name: Barista Thalawathugoda
Address: Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Thilina Dilshan
Review:
I recently visited Barista in Thalawathugoda and had a wonderful experience. The cafe has a warm and inviting atmosphere, perfect for relaxing or getting some work done. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, making me feel welcome from the moment I walked in.
I ordered a thai chicken rice, and it was absolutely delicious. The cafe also has a variety of other drinks and snacks to choose from. There is plenty of space to sit and enjoy your drink, whether you're alone or with friends.
Overall, I was very impressed with Barista in Thalawathugoda. It's a great place to visit for a coffee or snack, or simply to enjoy the relaxing atmosphere. I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a cozy and friendly cafe.

Name: Barista Thalawathugoda
Address: Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Sashi Jayathunga
Review:
Barista Thalawathugoda is my go-to spot for a perfect cup of coffee and a cozy atmosphere. The ambiance is warm and inviting, making it an ideal place to unwind or catch up with friends. The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive, always ensuring that you have a great experience.

Their coffee is top-notch, with a rich and robust flavor that never disappoints. The menu offers a variety of delicious pastries and snacks that pair perfectly with their beverages. I particularly love their cappuccino and the freshly baked Cakes 🍰

Whether you're looking for a quick coffee on the go or a place to spend a leisurely afternoon, Barista Thalawathugoda is the place to be! Highly recommend ✨

Name: Barista Thalawathugoda
Address: Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Yashodha Janithani
Review:
I highly recommend Barista - Thalawathugoda for anyone looking for a coffee shop that offers not only excellent coffee but also a comfortable and productive study environment. This café is perfect for students, professionals, or anyone who needs a quiet place to work or relax.

The dedicated study area at Barista - Thalawathugoda is well-designed with comfortable seating, plenty of natural light, and a peaceful atmosphere, making it easy to concentrate. Each table is equipped with power outlets, and the café provides fast, reliable Wi-Fi, ensuring you can work without interruptions.

Moreover, the service at Barista - Thalawathugoda is exceptional. The baristas are friendly, knowledgeable, and always go the extra mile to ensure your order is just the way you like it. Whether you’re dropping in for a quick coffee or planning to spend hours working or studying, the staff makes sure you have everything you need.

Overall, Barista - Thalawathugoda is the ideal spot for coffee lovers who appreciate quality, comfort, and great service.

Name: Barista Thalawathugoda
Address: Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Menaka Dharmawardane
Review: I bought two frappe one white chocolate and one cookie crumbles.drinks were not cold enough and The whipping cream was tasting funny, like with fungal after taste. The cake was okay but little too sweet and crumbly not that moist. I expected better than this for the name Barista. They looked pleasing tho.

Name: Barista Thalawathugoda
Address: Battaramulla - Pannipitiya Rd, Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte
Author: Janith Bogahawatta
Review: I am a coffee fan. Hence Barista is one of the places I enjoy. Thalawathugoda Barista has 2 stories. Generally 1st floor opens after 11 am or something. Many come here to do their studies and work also. You can stay till evening and do your work. I love the vibe here.

Name: Coffee & Company
Author: Ruckshani Randeniya
Review: We went at a less busy time so was very quiet and calm. The food needs to be ordered from the counter but was served to us. The meals were super. And just the right portions, definitely worth the price. I appreciate the efficient and attentive service. The menu has a variety of options. Thank you

Name: Coffee & Company
Author: Piumi Fonseka
Review: Ideal place for a meet up with friends or to have small celebrations. All the food we had there were great, delicious. They have vegetarian options and the mushroom waffle I had was amazing. Variety of food and coffee items were available. Loved the cafe macchiato. Service was also good and they have pretty clean washrooms. This place is highly recommend.

Name: Coffee & Company
Author: Archchana Ganeshalingam
Review: Nice place for a quiet coffee. Food was good too.

Name: Coffee & Company
Author: ushani kottahachchi
Review: Away from the urban hustle , it’s a very nice place to meet your friends, chat and chill.this place can be recommended as a chill place to do your own office work too. The staff is very friendly and gives your own space. Food is average but nothing to complain of tho. I personally recommend the brownie ice cream (can’t remember the exact name). Prices are not too high and have space to park 4,5 vehicles

Name: Coffee & Company
Author: Lakshan Abeyawardena
Review: The place has a relaxing vibe. I went on a Saturday afternoon and it wasn't crowded at all. There's plenty of seating options and comfortable chairs and sofas to choose from. There's an outdoor garden area as well. The coffee is superb and the food is alright.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Indushika Anjanee
Review: Had a pleasant experience here. The food was good. They have a variety of pastry items, cakes and beverages to choose from. The place is a bit small so not suitable to stay for long hours. Also, the staff is so loud and it is disturbing to the customers.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: ravith de silva
Review:
Place is very cozy and comfortable. Menu  is simple and easy. Coffee was excellent. Food was fresh and delicious. Service was fast, got the order within 10min. Bagel was nicely made. The greek yogurt bowl was very fresh and tasty.
One downfall was the kitchen staff were very loud. They were going for a open kitchen concept, staff were joking and laughing which could be heard at the front. Other than that everything was nicely done.
Overall I would give it a 6.9/10 & I recommend this place

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Lily
Review: Cosy little cafe with a comfortable atmosphere. I stayed for a very long time as it is very relaxing here. Breakfast bagel and iced mocha were both very lovely, but I regret not getting a regular cappuccino as the barista was very talented at making coffee art! All the staff was so lovely as well. I would love to come back if I'm in town, and really recommend if you're in the area.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Sanc
Review:
Nestled in Crescat Boulevard, this cozy café offers a warm and welcoming atmosphere with a separate entrance from outside. Although the seating inside is limited, there are also outdoor seats available. The friendly staff greet you warmly as soon as you walk in.

The prices are fair for the quality of service and food, and often cheaper than from UberEats. I've enjoyed their Matcha Rose Latte, flourless chocolate cake, and bagels through UberEats before, and they were all delightful.

This time, I tried the lemon square, sunshine bun, and Scandi cinnamon bun. The lemon square was my favorite with its perfect tanginess and the lemon glaze was a perfect addition to it —one of the best lemon bars I've ever had. The Matcha Rose Latte is rich and aromatic, though there were a few clumps of matcha at the bottom, probably from not sifting the matcha well. However, this didn’t affect the taste.

I was especially impressed by the staff's flexibility. I've changed my matcha order from takeaway to dine-in, from hot to iced, depending on my schedule and the weather. Each time, the staff kindly adjusted my order without any frustration.

This café, offering multi-cuisine bakes with Sri Lankan hospitality, is a hidden gem that promises a delightful experience every time.

Name: Kaffi Colombo
Address: G9, Crescat Boulevard, Crescat Boulevard no.89
Author: Nilanthi Fernando
Review:
My most favorite coffee shop in Colombo. The staff is extremely friendly & their sweet treats are top quality! A big shout out to Ranga & the team for always taking time to greet us at any given time of the day. Their service & atmosphere is exceptional.
An absolute gem of a spot ...!!

Name: The Commons Coffee House
Author: Vasana Gunasekera
Review: If you're searching for a cozy spot with an inviting atmosphere, Commons Coffee House is a must-visit. Their coffee is expertly brewed, featuring a range of blends that cater to all tastes, from bold and robust to smooth and subtle. The menu also offers a variety of delicious pastries and light bites that perfectly complement their beverages. The warm, welcoming ambiance makes it an ideal place to catch up with friends, work on a project, or simply enjoy a quiet moment. The friendly staff and comfortable seating add to the overall charm, ensuring that every visit is a pleasant experience. Highly recommended for anyone who appreciates quality coffee and a relaxed environment.

Name: The Commons Coffee House
Author: Tharaka Ranasinghe
Review: What a welcoming and warm atmosphere! The place feels spacious and has a home-like vibe. The staff is incredibly friendly, and the service is impressively quick. I was pleasantly surprised by how good the food tasted; many 'cafes' often miss the mark on flavor. While the value for money is reasonable given the overheads and portion sizes, it's definitely worth a visit for all foodies. Overall, it's a must-visit spot for a peaceful and cozy hangout with friends, family, or that special someone

Name: The Commons Coffee House
Author: Sunari Gnanathilaka
Review:
Very calm & spacious restaurant.
Self-service style.
The best thing is, they are open till 11.45pm.

Food is delicious & rich with ingredients. Nicely presented.
The portion size is applicable for a single person.

Decent & supportive staff.

Name: The Commons Coffee House
Author: shannan gunasekara
Review:
Fish and chips are absolutely amazing! The fish is super crispy and pairs perfectly with the salad and the sauce they offer. The French fries, while less crispy, still taste good. The hot chocolate has a delightful blend of sweetness and a hint of bitterness, which goes well with the hazelnut coffee.

The atmosphere of the place is nice and calm, though it can get a bit noisy when crowded. However, they have designated areas for parties and group gatherings, providing some privacy. The service is excellent, with a supportive team, but be aware that they include VAT and a service charge, which can make the bill a bit expensive.

Overall, I totally recommend the fish and chips, and I'm confident that their other food items will meet your standards as well.

Name: The Commons Coffee House
Author: Chanuka Nadun
Review:
The place is actually not bad cozy and nice. But it's pretty noisy for a conversation. The staff is pretty friendly and the coffee is not bad at all.

They advertise prices without tax so it's a bit expensive after all the taxes and service charges. ( When you visit keep that on your mind)

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Dushi Dissanayake
Review: New equipments..grate atmosphere ..qualified ,friendly trainers ...

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Nimantha Gunawardane
Review: Air conditioned space with well maintained equipments

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Omidu Perera
Review: The best gym in town. It includes personal trainees, a air conditioning gym facility and a good and friendly staff.

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Kalum Ge Sithuwili
Review: Getfit is one of the best gyms I've been to in lanka with advanced equipments ,bodybuilding champion the owner himself Mr. Niranjan Kumara and well experienced trainers under him Including Jerry Richard , Gayan Silva & Hasitha Ranga  . The best aspect I love about this gym is the ambiance, the people around are lovely and that way you'll always have a positive mindset which is very important when we workout. They've also got a new branch which was opened recently in Kadawatha. WE ARE GETFIT❤

Name: Get Fit - Fitness Center and coffee bar
Author: Marian R
Review: Great gym, can easily keep up with German gyms. The owner is very friendly!

Name: Barista Laksala
Author: Kalna Hettikankanama
Review:
One of the best outlets i have been.
service is super good always. Outside area is more comfortable comparing to other locations around colombo area.

Food is good, and its a outlet, you can spend the day without any hassle even for work purposes. Specially, it is a good meeting place.

Name: Barista Laksala
Author: L.B Peramuna
Review: It's your typical Barista coffee cafe. Offering indoor and outdoor seating. The customer service is friendly and welcoming, making it a good place to enjoy a nice cup of coffee and a snack. Free WiFi is also available.

Name: Barista Laksala
Author: Madhuka Dilshan
Review:
Went yesterday to this cool, tiny place. They are famous mainly for Coffees and have a lot of cold and hot coffee options to choose. They also offer food options such as pasta, sandwiches, lasagna, brownies, cakes, etc.

They offer facilities to do our work as well, so we can do our work while having a nice coffee. They provide outdoor dining as well.

We ordered a Hot Chocolate and a Ham & Cheese Sandwich which have an amazing taste.

Highly recommending for coffee lovers who looks for an amazing coffee experience with your loved ones.

Name: Barista Laksala
Author: Food Beats
Review: Newly opened Barista coffee chain outlet. Cozy and relaxing small space with an outdoor seating area. Great spot for a cup of coffee and sandwiches.

Name: Barista Laksala
Author: Mohamed Isham
Review:
Barista, a name synonymous with quality coffee and cozy ambiance, continues to uphold its reputation as a beloved destination for caffeine enthusiasts and casual coffee drinkers alike. With its welcoming atmosphere, wide range of beverages, and commitment to consistency, Barista remains a go-to spot for those seeking a delightful coffee experience.

Upon entering Barista, you're greeted by the rich aroma of freshly brewed coffee, creating an inviting ambiance that beckons you to linger and indulge in a moment of relaxation. The cozy interiors, adorned with comfortable seating and warm lighting, provide the perfect setting for catching up with friends, diving into a good book, or simply savoring a quiet moment of solitude.

But it's the coffee at Barista that truly steals the show. From classic espresso-based drinks like lattes and cappuccinos to indulgent specialty concoctions like caramel macchiatos and mocha frappes, the menu offers something to satisfy every palate and preference. Each beverage is crafted with care by skilled baristas, ensuring a consistently delicious and satisfying cup every time.

In addition to its extensive selection of coffee drinks, Barista also offers a variety of teas, hot chocolates, and refreshing cold beverages to cater to a wider range of tastes. Whether you're in the mood for a soothing herbal tea, a decadent hot chocolate, or a revitalizing iced latte, Barista has you covered with an array of options to choose from.

Moreover, Barista's commitment to quality extends beyond its beverages to include a selection of freshly baked pastries and savory snacks to complement your coffee experience. Indulge in a flaky croissant, a buttery muffin, or a savory sandwich, each made with the finest ingredients and perfect for pairing with your favorite drink.

While Barista excels in providing a delightful coffee experience, some patrons may find the prices slightly higher compared to other coffee chains. Additionally, depending on the location and time of day, queues can sometimes be long, leading to a wait for service during peak hours.

In conclusion, Barista remains a cherished destination for coffee lovers seeking a moment of respite from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. With its inviting ambiance, wide range of beverages, and unwavering commitment to quality, Barista offers a sanctuary where you can sit back, relax, and savor the simple pleasure of a well-crafted cup of coffee.

Name: Hidden Gem Cafe Hanoi
Address: 1 Hàng Mắm, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Andrew “Andy” Davis
Review: Interesting little cafe. Love the entrance and stairs to get up to this and the rooftop with open air and fans was a delight on a nice afternoon. Decor is good with some lovely paint songs and a relaxed feeling. Coffee is good but the papaya salad we ordered was dry and rather disappointing by Vietnam standards lacking flavor. Can recommend coming for drinks but I’d skip the food next time. Salt coffee was a highlight though.

Name: Hidden Gem Cafe Hanoi
Address: 1 Hàng Mắm, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Anita Rosaleh
Review: Cool not so little cafe with beautiful murals. Spanning two floors with a lot of fans dotting around for airy feeling even at summer. Salt coffee is nice and not too sweet. Vietnamese coffee with condensed milk could really use more condensed milk. However the papaya salad is rather dissatisfying and very dry.  Flavor is definitely more suited for westerners. Good pricing.

Name: Hidden Gem Cafe Hanoi
Address: 1 Hàng Mắm, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Nurtac Somunkiran
Review: Great, cozy place, staffs so kind and friendly. The interior design is authentic and creative. The food tastes delicious and the prices are quite normal. Additionally, its ambiance makes you feel very comfortable. Their music fits well with the environment. This place definitely deserves its name.

Name: Hidden Gem Cafe Hanoi
Address: 1 Hàng Mắm, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Harry Fraser
Review: Lives up to its name - it is an absolute gem, beautiful and unique set up. Could sit here all day! So many nooks you could hide away in. Great food, and enjoyed my first ever egg coffee. Staff are lovely. Would definitely recommend visiting!

Name: Hidden Gem Cafe Hanoi
Address: 1 Hàng Mắm, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Daisy Lau
Review: Based on many good reviews on this hidden gem cafe, I decided to come here this morning for breakfast. The ambiance is great and unique, I love it so much. I left with 1 hour in Hanoi, so I need to try the combo set to taste every dish as possible.  I was quite surprised the color noodles bowl is actually quite a big portio for me. The 1st bite of the noodles I knew I was going to come again to this cafe in the future if I come to Hanoi again. I ordered the set in vegan. They all tasted so fresh and good. As the noodles are quite a big bowl, I decided to bring the bread to the airport for my snacks.   I also ordered salted coffee, and it was so creamy, I love it too, and I finished it within a few minutes. The bread still tasted good even after 2 hours when I had it after clearing the immigration. Highly recommended to come here, price is affordable, and you won't regret it.

Name: An Café
Author: Grace Kelly Hosea
Review:
The style of this cafe is very unique and authentic. Well-designed. Menu Book is truly made with heart, hand drawing and very cute.
The cooking and processing (foods and drinks) are taking a bit long, but very beautifully crafted and taste good. The weather is a bit hot in the day.
Thanks to the owners, giving hands to every single thing in the cafe, we enjoy it here so much. Keep it up!!

Name: An Café
Author: Andrew Williams
Review: Absolutely incredible experience. Must try place in Hanoi! Huge range of coffee, cocktails, and other drinks and so many banh mi options. Caters to dietary requirements too! Lots of vegan and vegetarian options. Our mixed group all loved our food and the experience that we had to come back again knowing we would get another delicious feed. Friendly and welcoming staff with great service.

Name: An Café
Author: Mya Mapstone
Review: Loved A Cafe! If you are looking to try Banh Mi A Cafe is the place to do so. The staff are very friendly and make you feel very at home. The smoothie, coffee, and the Bahn Mi are amazing. We ended up going back for a second time. The space inside is small, however the staff make you feel very welcome. I was also very excited by my egg coffee foam art! 😍

Name: An Café
Author: Jody Housley
Review: Lovely food and amazing coffee. Returned for a second time for an egg coffee, even though I wasn't local. I decided it was worth the trip in a grab to sample their delights. They even put my portrayed on my egg coffee. I would recommend to anyone looking for a banh mi and a good coffee. It won't disappoint

Name: An Café
Author: Nathalie Cockayne
Review: Quaint tiny coffee shop, busy as so few seats. Friendly staff and nice food. You pay the price for Instagram in terms of value for money, but food and drinks were tasty. Egg coffee with portrait is fun

Name: The Hanoi Cafe & Restaurant
Author: Laura Marinescu
Review: I had an amazing experience at this coffee shop! The staff were not only super friendly and funny (see Tu’s signature pose;)) but also incredibly knowledgeable about Vietnam’s coffee culture. They shared fascinating stories behind the brew during our egg coffee class, making my visit both enjoyable and educational. Their warm personalities and passion for coffee made me feel right at home. Highly recommend their class and the food - I had the avocado egg! Amazing inside courtyard also. Thank you Phuong!

Name: The Hanoi Cafe & Restaurant
Author: Steffen Meyer
Review:
the “THC” is addictive!
we already came here a few times and we love this sweet café with it’s almost calm backyard/garden.
the atmosphere invites you to chill, to relax or just to have a good coffee.
the friendly staff here is really thoughtful; the toilets are super clean and nice and drinks & food taste just fantastic.
we love the overnight oats, the french and the avocado toast. prices are absolutely fair.
recommendation!!

Name: The Hanoi Cafe & Restaurant
Author: Sarah B.
Review:
Came here for early dinner. It was quite empty. We went upstairs to the smoking area. The dishes were served fast and some of them were good.
However, our mood was spoiled by the lack of attention that we were given.
After our dishes came, no one ever came upstairs to ask if we needed something else. We couldn’t even ask for the bill. We had to go downstairs and pay.
Honestly, it’s not the first restaurant in Hanoi that does this.
Unacceptable coming from a place that is not cheap at all.

Name: The Hanoi Cafe & Restaurant
Author: Claire Garcia-Webb
Review:
This cafe is amazing. We sat outside and the atmosphere was great.
I ordered the smashed avocado with poached eggs and it was delicious. My friend ordered the protein bowl and granola bowl and they also looked amazing.
100% would recommend coming here.

Name: The Hanoi Cafe & Restaurant
Author: Onika daley
Review: One of our favorite places for breakfast whilst visiting Hanoi. The staff were friendly the atmosphere was welcoming warm and the AC was fantastic. All dishes on the menu that we tried on each day were better than the last, the attention to detail and presentation for the food was amazing- no dish was over or under cooked. We will definitely be visiting again.

Name: The Note Coffee
Address: 64 P. Lương Văn Can, Hàng Trống
Author: Bhavna T
Review: This is such a nice place to have your morning coffee, especially on a rainy Sunday morning. It has a great view of Hoàn Kiếm Lake. The decor is made up entirely of notes that their customers have written over the past and stuck on the walls so you can spend hours reading these. The coffee is wonderful - strong with that nice condensed milk kick. The servers are sooooo warm and welcoming. One of them even came up to us an offered to take a photo for us. Must visit (multiple times)!

Name: The Note Coffee
Address: 64 P. Lương Văn Can, Hàng Trống
Author: Sophie Lam
Review:
Definitely more of a one and done kind of place. The drinks we ordered was okay nothing majorly special in my opinion but it’s worth it to write a cute little note that will live there forever!
Worth popping in even for a small drink to experience the atmosphere! It’s about 4 floors high but the higher you go the better especially if you want to look out the window and see the streets of Hanoi.

Name: The Note Coffee
Address: 64 P. Lương Văn Can, Hàng Trống
Author: Alvin Chan
Review:
Wonderful place to people watch!
Nice beverages served as well..
There are uncountable pieces of little notes which people from all over the world pasted on the walls of the cafe!
Must visit if you are around the area but it could get a little warm during the hot weather..

Name: The Note Coffee
Address: 64 P. Lương Văn Can, Hàng Trống
Author: Ruturaj Patil
Review: The cafe occupies entire 4-5 floors and it is a bit compact to navigate however it is an amazing concept to keep a note there and write whatever u want. The entire cafe is laced with notes which really looks  funky. We tried coconut coffee which was great it had perfect blend of coffee and an aftertaste of coconut. The egg coffeewas equally great..

Name: The Note Coffee
Address: 64 P. Lương Văn Can, Hàng Trống
Author: divya girish
Review:
Trendy place . Very famous among tourists. There are 4 storeys in the narrow building. Fun reading messages from people all around the world . There are stickers everywhere roof,stairs, chairs, ceilings ….
Lot of seating available and it’s moving crowd. We had cappuccino, hazelnut coffee and the famous egg coffee.
Egg coffee was good , you don’t get the taste of egg while drinking it ( i assumed we may get that raw egg taste)
Had heard a lot about this place. Worth the hype.

Name: Hanoi Coffee Culture
Address: 45 P. Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Roei Klein
Review: Friendly staff and very nice place. The breakfast items were very well made (English breakfast, mushroom bacon breakfast, avocado toast). I would though avoid the salads… cold coffee was one of the beat in Hanoi in my opinion

Name: Hanoi Coffee Culture
Address: 45 P. Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: steven lim
Review:
We passed by in the morning but it was super crowded.

We returned at 545 pm but the kitchen was closed, so we opted for desserts of mango sticky rice and grilled banana with ice cream.

They did take about 15 minutes to be served buy were pretty good, even if they cost 190000vnd.

The banana was nicely caramelized while the mango was not overly ripe and slightly tart.

Name: Hanoi Coffee Culture
Address: 45 P. Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: J Grant
Review:
The cafe is beautiful with many interesting spaces to sit. Couches and chairs clustered in a range of spaces downstairs, upstairs and on a deck.
It is a busy vibrant cafe with a large range of drinks and especially coffee. The highlight for us was the egg and coconut coffees. There is also a menu of European brunch items. We had pulled pork and eggs and avo and toasted cheese. Both delicious,  attractively presented and large meals.
Staff are friendly and efficient.  They took our order upstairs to save us coming back downstairs to order.
Highly recommended. We will be back.

Name: Hanoi Coffee Culture
Address: 45 P. Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Stephanie Piano4Me
Review: This place was recommended to me by a friend. Apparently they were the original folks who invented egg coffee. This place looks small from the outside but opens up to  another world inside. Absolutely charming, they provide free Internet as well. The egg coffee was very delicious!  Oh, clean bathrooms too.

Name: Hanoi Coffee Culture
Address: 45 P. Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Siham Chehida
Review: I recently visited this café in Hanoi and had an amazing experience! The ambiance is cozy, and the coffee is exceptional. A special shout-out to Ryan, our server, who was fantastic. He was attentive, friendly, and made sure we had everything we needed. His excellent service really made our visit memorable. Highly recommend this place!

Name: S'Cafe
Address: 11 Ngõ Hài Tượng, phố P. Tạ Hiện, Hàng Buồm
Author: Delaney Lush
Review: I’m so glad that I found this place to try my 1st egg coffee. Very cute little shop with birds, fish and a cute needy poodle to keep you company. The owner is also so friendly and cute. Great egg coffee served over a little candle.

Name: S'Cafe
Address: 11 Ngõ Hài Tượng, phố P. Tạ Hiện, Hàng Buồm
Author: Chu Jie Ting
Review: Super chill vibes with an adorable dog!! Amazing egg coffee and comes on a cute candle to keep it warm. Tried their egg with bread and mango smoothie and both were good. Broke their cup by accident and the owner was so nice and didn’t ask for compensation. went back again and she let me stay after she closed her shop. will definitely come here to relax and have a cup of egg coffee again 🫶🫶

Name: S'Cafe
Address: 11 Ngõ Hài Tượng, phố P. Tạ Hiện, Hàng Buồm
Author: Charis Soon
Review: Stumbled into a small alley to try the egg coffee here! So quiet and peaceful away from the hustle bustle. Coffee is amazing! Only 35k and the Dog is super cute and friendly. Highly recc!!

Name: S'Cafe
Address: 11 Ngõ Hài Tượng, phố P. Tạ Hiện, Hàng Buồm
Author: Dimosthenis Loukisas (TheTrickyProject)
Review: Definitely a secret gem, will take your mind off the city noise. The birds sing beautifully specially if you can  whistle a bit and the family that owns the place is very nice people! The dog is a charm and the green around you will make you feel nature . Recommended for food and drink !

Name: S'Cafe
Address: 11 Ngõ Hài Tượng, phố P. Tạ Hiện, Hàng Buồm
Author: Xiaa
Review:
I spent 3 nights in Ha Noi and discovered this cafe by looking for egg coffee. It was very interesting to try this special coffee, creamy on top with light egg taste. For those who get used to take espresso without sugar like me, maybe ask less sugar:)
The puppy is so cute, and monsieur and madame were very friendly. The green space and birds make me calm n simply happy, I came for 2 times coz I do loving spending my afternoon here :)

Name: RAILWAY TUAN CAFE (The ORIGINAL) )
Address: chắn tàu, 112, số 5 P. Trần Phú, Hàng Bông
Author: Yana Boyarskaya
Review: I would recommend choosing this cafe while visiting the famous train street. You have the best views here, plus the drinks are very good. We tried egg coffee and egg Baileys, both were awesome. The hosts are very friendly, they chat with you, recommend the drinks and are honest about the timetable. They also told me what was the best spot for the photo:) I would gladly come back again

Name: RAILWAY TUAN CAFE (The ORIGINAL) )
Address: chắn tàu, 112, số 5 P. Trần Phú, Hàng Bông
Author: Jarah C
Review:
Friendly owner, delicious drinks, reasonable prices (around 60k for coconut coffee & 70k for salt coffee).

Times for the train change. But we came mid-May for the 9.20am train, saw it, and was very happy. As May is very humid and hot, the place has many fans running to cool us.

This cafe has plenty of seats around the track area.

Highly recommend this place for a coffee and to see the train!

Name: RAILWAY TUAN CAFE (The ORIGINAL) )
Address: chắn tàu, 112, số 5 P. Trần Phú, Hàng Bông
Author: Taher Mohammad
Review: Actually I had a business trip to Hanoi for one day , but I extend my trip because of Mr Tuan to three days , I was spending most of my day in his cafe with his family, ( mother , sister , nephews , and his friend) it’s a family business they deserve to support them , his family they welcomed me without knowing me , god bless you guys

Name: RAILWAY TUAN CAFE (The ORIGINAL) )
Address: chắn tàu, 112, số 5 P. Trần Phú, Hàng Bông
Author: amanda
Review: You need to contact the owner in advance before going to train street. He pick us up to go to his cafe. It was noon that time to wait for the train at 11.50am. He put us in the best angle seats ever😍. This cafe has many selection of drinks and even food as well. We ordered ice coffee, it was very good and prices were not expensive at all. Will definitely come back!

Name: RAILWAY TUAN CAFE (The ORIGINAL) )
Address: chắn tàu, 112, số 5 P. Trần Phú, Hàng Bông
Author: Markuss Javier
Review: We walked 20 minutes with all our luggage just to get here, and it was worth it. The owner himself (really nice guy) made the murals and all the tiny details of art around the cafe. This is near the Hanoi Railway Station itself which we're bound to go to anyway, so this was a pleasant little stopover.

Name: CAFE HIEU
Author: Monika Rajchlova
Review:
Great little cafe with friendly staff.
We ordered egg coffee, banana smoothie, 1 Nutella crepe and 1 nutella & banana crepe and they were all tasty.
The bill came to 150k so very reasonable.

Name: CAFE HIEU
Author: Tailor Mészáros
Review:
Had coffees and pho here, both were decent but I had high hopes given the reviews on this place. The Pho was far from the best I've had, and coffee was averagly good. We tried to come here one morning but it wasn't open even though it's hours said it was, and I actually had a better experience at the place right next door.

I'd say this place is fine, but there are better options around. 4 stars still here

Name: CAFE HIEU
Author: Kei
Review: Had fried rice with egg (in photo) for late lunch and nutella crepe the day before. The food is good and they have a varied selection from rice meals, noodles, bahn mi, coffee, and other snacks. The staff are super friendly too! If you’re looking to enjoy a good meal right by the road, I really recommend this place.

Name: CAFE HIEU
Author: Ri Yanto
Review:
At a crowded road (but what else do you expect in Hanoi 😅
Friendly owners/staff 🫶🏿
Delicious fried rice (the portions a little small) but very tastefull. All kind of different Bahn Mi's also very good and the fruit smoothies were wonderfull ❤️

Name: CAFE HIEU
Author: Babylon Jr
Review: portion of food is ridiculous I think they should say it’s kid’s menu, if you stay at Hanoi a week you can be full with 80000, I ordered vegetarian rice ,he bring me corn rice it’s mean they only think corn is vegetarian ,and price for this portion 50000, I ordered cheese sandwiche 30000 and he just put only cheese without any vegetable, I wish someone warned me before I go there. plus owner was not welcoming which I surprised too

Name: GreenArch Cafe & Bistro
Address: Tòa nhà Hồng Hà, 25 P. Lý Thường Kiệt, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Hong Anh Pham
Review: I’m impressed with their Salt Coffee! A bit of sweet, a bit of salty, and a bit of creamy. Everything is just fine. Highly recommended for a beautiful coffee morning, seating outdoor and enjoying your chill autumn day in Hanoi.

Name: GreenArch Cafe & Bistro
Address: Tòa nhà Hồng Hà, 25 P. Lý Thường Kiệt, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Thu Hieu Nguyen
Review:
Perfect for everything
Ổi hồng is the best

Name: GreenArch Cafe & Bistro
Address: Tòa nhà Hồng Hà, 25 P. Lý Thường Kiệt, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Nicholas Donnison
Review: Google was recently updated to say it opens at 7am. I arrived at 7:10 and was told it opens at 8am. What a waste of my time

Name: GreenArch Cafe & Bistro
Address: Tòa nhà Hồng Hà, 25 P. Lý Thường Kiệt, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Ngọc Phạm
Review: Nice cocktails with great view in the very centre.

Name: GreenArch Cafe & Bistro
Address: Tòa nhà Hồng Hà, 25 P. Lý Thường Kiệt, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Thúy Hạnh
Review: Refreshing smoothies and cosy outdoor seating, great if you need a short walking break in Hanoi Old Quarter.

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Ruckasaurus Rex
Review: Amazing service and super nice owner/daughter. Location is great, food and drink were so good, and we would come again!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: L G
Review:
The absolute best cafe in Vietnam Hanoi. My boyfriend and I came every day. The lady and her mother are so friendly. Very accommodating to foreigners as we’re from the UK. Spoke English very well. The food is 10/10. Every I ate, the food tastes so fresh and I never got the runs after eating their food.

Their cocktails are amazing too. Very affordable food and drinks. I even requested for a certain dish that was not on the menu and it tasted so good I had to come back in the evening for seconds!

100% would recommend everyone to come here!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Kianni Blanton
Review: Very sweet lady!! We almost went to another place but she was so cute and nice that I couldn’t say no! This was the best mojito I’ve ever had! Don’t get me started on the spring rolls that sauce was amazing!! When I do come back to Hanoi I will for sure see her again!!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Amelia Reisman
Review: Owner is so nice and friendly clean eating area right by train good view and food was excellent!!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Stuart Harvey
Review:
Great atmosphere, great food, and the owners are very welcoming and friendly. we had to msg them prior to going to confirm a table and send our photo for confirmation.
the owners are great and like a chat (the translation app came into good use). We had a storm come through, and the train was delayed, but we hung around and had some more drinks and was worth the wait. The train was amazing to see so close and was a great experience.
Cafe 40 is a great spot, and I highly recommend it. there are 9 of us  travelling here for a month in Vietnam, and they loved having us in their cafe.

Name: MIDDLE CAFE
Author: Sarah B.
Review:
Very disappointed with this place. Ordered 2 beers that were each 75 and 80k. They came back saying that they didn’t have the  Pale Ale that was 80k but they replaced it with another one that was 125k and of course they didn’t mention the price.
We ended up ordering more because they had a promotion of order 5 get a dish. We asked if we could get a free beer instead of the dish. They said yes. Result no promotion and beers are expensively priced.
It’s sad when people pretend that they don’t understand to simply trick customers.
AVOID.

Answer:
I am not sure that you are reading people’s reviews properly.
The point is that we were promised one thing and got something completely different at the end. We asked one of you TWICE if it was OK to replace the chicken by a free beer and the answer was positive. This is why we ordered more. If the answer was negative, we would have stopped at 2 beers.
If you can’t understand English and can’t speak it fluently, why even working with foreigners?
And of course, it would have been professional to offer another beer and show its price, especially when it is so different from the initial price that we chose. This is what usually happens in reputable bars/pubs.

Name: MIDDLE CAFE
Author: craig roper
Review: Very nice environment the staff are really friendly. Great live music experience. Hien is very friendly and went the extra mile. Great place.

Name: MIDDLE CAFE
Author: Kyawt K Khaing
Review: Disappointing experience with dishonest treatment. There was nobody except us, we ordered a lot and paid a good bill. Telling us about the package and at the end they sing another song, like they didn’t know about it. Big tourist trap and full of low standard people. Shame on you!!! We paid 200k for lunch and 800k for beer in the evening. Avoid this place and go another place for your money. Take my free advice please!

Name: MIDDLE CAFE
Author: Angus Creaser
Review: Regular Vietnamese beer is great but it's nice to have some Vietnamese home grown craft beer. Fantastic host Hien! Live music! A must do on a visit to Hanoi. :)

Name: MIDDLE CAFE
Author: James W6rmj Millington
Review: Every time I come here I get greeted with a loving welcome. It has a good selection of canned beers from around Viet Nam. It also has days where they have comedy events and random music events, it really is a good place to go and drink. When you go you will see. Upstairs there is a pool room. It’s just a coo place to go.

Name: The Running Bean Nhà Thờ - Coffee and Brunch
Author: Jossy Nunez
Review:
We came here twice and the food did not disappoint. We got the same server twice, her name was Hien. Hien was super sweet and attentive on both occasions. She made sure we had water and checked on us occasionally to see if everything was ok.  Everyone is so attentive here and make you feel welcomed and the food is not only appealing to the eye, but delicious!
I recommend drinking the coconut cafe (Ca Phe Sua Dua”,  it’s absolutely fantastic! And the crème brûlée crepe cake was divine!

Name: The Running Bean Nhà Thờ - Coffee and Brunch
Author: oksana rakova
Review: Nice location. Nice interior. Very good coffee and cakes. Buuuut the service is very weak. Our waitress could barely speak English. I know that we are in Vietnam. But this coffee place is located in the middle of tourist district. And your prices are so high. So please, align. The waitress brought us the bill instead of cakes, dirty dishes were staying on our table the whole time we were sitting there. No wish to come back. Food is okay, nothing special.

Name: The Running Bean Nhà Thờ - Coffee and Brunch
Author: Jackelyne Nuñez
Review: Amazing and trendy brunch spot! The food was great and the service was too. Our waitress Hien did an amazing job and was super sweet. I would definitely recommend trying their crème brûlée Mille cake and the sticky chai latte which they thankfully had alternative milk options. If you don’t have a sweet tooth they also have hearty breakfast options I ordered the garlic rice and steak combo and it was great. Definitely recommend this place if you’re looking for an instagramable brunch spot here in Hanoi!

Name: The Running Bean Nhà Thờ - Coffee and Brunch
Author: Hunter DeGraw
