Review: Hien was an amazing server, and was very helpful. Her English was good as well. we went here twice and both times the food/drinks were very good. They have big and small portions available. Would 100% recommend this place to anyone in the area.

Name: The Running Bean Nhà Thờ - Coffee and Brunch
Author: Heather Scoggins
Review: Lovely spot in a great location near the cathedral. The food and drinks are delicious with lots of options. The only downside was my partners food came out a long time before mine and we had to chase mine up. Would be five stars all round with better service.

Name: Xofa Café & Bistro
Author: Adam Teoh
Review: We were here to experience the train street. So before the train arrived, we were looking around the area for a quick lunch and we found this hidden gem.  A lot of young local people came here for a meal and photos. The food are quite good and price is reasonable too. Most people will order their signature french fries. The ambience of this place is nice too.

Name: Xofa Café & Bistro
Author: Minh Huế Trần
Review: My fav cafe and bistro from now on🥹🥹 Carbonara is really good, foam cheese so tasty, the staff here are supportive and nice. I’ve seen many reviews on tiktok said that the staff here have bad attitude but today when I come and use the service, it is totally the opposite to what other people said on tiktok. The atmosphere is great, love the sunlight, French countryside vibe and really chill here. Xofa deserves 10 out of 10 for sure💖

Name: Xofa Café & Bistro
Author: Jidon Hilario
Review:
The place is quite big, different areas you could stay. You can choose between airconditioned or the typical al fresco experience. The thing about it is, it is popular among the locals and tourists alike. So expect to be on queue during peak hours, from 6pm onwards. But during lunch time, there will be no problem. The employees are everywhere, they pay particular attention to every customer. They always follow up on your needs, they provide you with water and some condiments automatically. My glass of water never gets empty.

Coconute milk coffee and Xofa Mille Crepe 👌👌

Name: Xofa Café & Bistro
Author: WONG SIEW CHIN
Review:
Quality food. Good presentation and service is excellent.
Definitely recommended for tourists if you are looking for delicious and quality food

Name: Xofa Café & Bistro
Author: Sheena So
Review:
Went to stay here to relax and be able to catch a nap as a arrived too early from the train station and couldn't check-in yet. There were others who were also trying to catch some nap, and those who are working and studying. The music was soft and mellow and all of a sudden the music was cranked up too loudly. Customers started talking loudly to staff too. I think I paid a good amount to be able to utilize my stay in however way I wanted to without being too disruptive.

I suppose it's not appreciated to stay here to relax and catch a nap. I will not be coming back here. Quite disappointing.

Name: The Backyard
Address: 17 P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Hoa Le
Review: It looks like this place has a new owner since the day i knew and first visited the same. I found the menu, the table were changed. Additionally, the number of dishes in the menu was also decreased, leading to less options for choosing. However, it was also worth the price.

Name: The Backyard
Address: 17 P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Ahmed Eiweida
Review: Fantastic Restaurant, Bar, Cafe with great ambiance, atmosphere and rich variety of food and drinks. All food came very fresh and nicely cooked and presented. Service is great and staff and very friendly. The facade is very Instagramable 🤩🤩

Name: The Backyard
Address: 17 P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Tuan Vu
Review: Nice french colonial villa in one of hanoi main streets. Staff can speak english well. Food serves fresh and well presented. Price is suprising reasonable for this area.

Name: The Backyard
Address: 17 P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Agi Kaufman
Review:
We visited this place based on recommendations - were soooo disappointed!
Corn soup - was simply not eatable!
Cakes are, beside being super small also not tasty.
A cucumber&tomato salad was a size of side dish with a strong fish souce - we would expect to be told in advance about this fact. Could not eat it. Not to mention that we waited for this 'salad' like 20 min.
Absolutely overrated, not tasty and bad service!!!!
DO NOT GO THERE!!!!

Name: The Backyard
Address: 17 P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Van Vu
Review:
Nice restaurant in Hanoi downtown. Food is good and fresh.
Its is chill to have a view of Hanoi street with a beer 🙂

Name: Kafebean Coffee Roastery
Address: 7 P. Trần Nguyên Hãn, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Saeta B
Review: Beautiful little coffee shop. I bought about six bags to bring home. Like supporting a small family business like this. Owner very passionate about his coffee and produces high quality beans in small batches.

Name: Kafebean Coffee Roastery
Address: 7 P. Trần Nguyên Hãn, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Kook Hyun Cheong
Review: Love this place! This is a must go cafe! Hard to come up with a proper expression to describe this place. EPIC?!!

Name: Kafebean Coffee Roastery
Address: 7 P. Trần Nguyên Hãn, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Phung Bich Thuy
Review:
Cozy area, nice coffee, available parking lot.

A place for some peace of mind, where you can be on your own without worrying about the world outside and do your stuffs, or just simply watching your friends hangout and having fun and enjoy the moments.

Name: Kafebean Coffee Roastery
Address: 7 P. Trần Nguyên Hãn, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Nguyen Dat (refrez)
Review: A cozy place in the centre, 50m from Turtle lake (Ho Guom), the finest coffee in town

Name: Kafebean Coffee Roastery
Address: 7 P. Trần Nguyên Hãn, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Choaang Leo
Review: The home of triatheletes and runners, where you can meet and talk about training, races. Very friendly and nice boss, he shared and inspired to join Goldcoast Marathon 2024.

Name: Colonel Coffee
Author: JC Production Travel Journal
Review: Came here to film Hà Nội sunset. It has very good location, sufficient shades and fans for cooling, and staff service is very good. F&B prices are very reasonable. Highly recommended.

Name: Colonel Coffee
Author: •Tweetibird •
Review:
Delicious food and amazing juices. The Fried Rice with Chicken & Mushroom was full of flavour, and the Ambarella  & Pineapple Juice is extremely refreshing.
The owner is friendly and polite, and the whole environment is so tranquil, especially at sunset.
A must-visit if you are in the area.

Name: Colonel Coffee
Author: Bill Cabell
Review: This is a great place for breakfast, lunch, or dinner. The outdoor seating is quite comfortable with a great view across West Lake. It’s also one of the best places in the city to watch the sunset. If lots of cigarette smoking bothers you then you might not want to go. I’ve been six times in the last couple of months and enjoyed the very simple but nicely prepared delicious food.

Name: Colonel Coffee
Author: Jake (Jake)
Review:
The food here was amazing! Should definitely try the foods here 100% would recommend!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

The view is beautiful and chill with lake view. I always loved watching sunset here! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Name: Colonel Coffee
Author: Bt Martens
Review: Wonderful food great service stayed down the street from it was home away from home great breakfast smoothies and cocktails

Name: Joma Bakery Café
Author: John Dean
Review:
Lot of options here at Joma Bakery Cafe. We enjoyed our time here, on a quiet Sunday.
The peanut butter brownie was a bit hard, but after a while it was easier to break apart. The peach drink was good, just as the blueberry muffin.

Name: Joma Bakery Café
Author: An Bui
Review:
Great varieties of cakes and sandwiches. Lots of flavor and they are all excellent.
Cosy atmosphère and spotless place.
You can always smell freshly baked goods and coffee here.
Nice staff and excellent service.

Name: Joma Bakery Café
Author: Tim Tr.
Review:
Great food with a good value!
Their food and drink là never disappoint.
Can’t say enough how much we appreciate JOMA’s presence and what they have to offer in the city.

Service has room for improvement though, especially with greetings and welcome when customers enter the store. Not professional when staffs joking and laughing with each other behind the counter, totally ignoring a group of customers walking through the door and to the ordering counter.
Other than that, we had a great experience at the restaurant. Love what they have done with the place.

Highly recommended.

Name: Joma Bakery Café
Author: Kyungnam Ryu
Review: My second time to this cafe after trying the one in Vientine, Lao PDR. The bakery and drinks tasted nice. I liked the terrace on the second floor and would like to sit there next time.

Name: Joma Bakery Café
Author: Trang Vu
Review:
It's been awhile since I last visited the place. I always want to support this business as they advertise about their community support with 10% of their profit. But today is more than a disappointment to me. The soup is way too soggy and full of spicy pepper. I cried trying to finish it because of the strong, thick peppery taste while thinking about how much I just had to pay for it. The tacos are hard and tasteless. The mango tea looks good but is completely bland, taste like water with mango and vanilla flavor. I think the vanilla doesn't go well with mango tea anyway. 75k for the tea, 99k for the taco soup - completely waste of money.

Talking about the staff, the person who took my order was so rude to me, showing no interest in introducing the products or serving the customer. When I asked her what was special here, or what she suggested as a drink if I didn't drink coffee. She said, 'all on the menu, please read'.
She kept frowning each time I asked for more information about the dish and drink. She just wanted to get done with the payment and quickly turned away. Other staff were folding her legs on the bench, chilling along the hallway, playing on her phone, paid no attention or greeting as customers passed by.

The furniture is so old and the new grey couch doesn't resonate with the old wooden brown furniture's color and style. All the decorations don't match or are not with the same style. The glass door looks uncleaned. The shop isn't busy but no staff wants to clean a little bit of it, or at least wipe off the water stain.

The bakery stands are blurry or empty. I can't see what's inside through the fog on the glass. The cookies stand is pretty empty. No background music is being played. Very few customers. The whole place feels too empty and sad.

While sitting on the first floor waiting for my grab ride. I overheard a conversation between some staff with a grad delivery guy who came for a cake. The grab driver was concerned about how to save the cake during the ride and wonder if the stafd could have some idea or help him tide it up on his bike to avoid ruining it. The staff answer, 'It's not our problem, you should ask the guy who book the ride from you, we just sell the cake and that's it, the rest is not our job.'

This isn't the JOMA I remember with high quality of service, hygiene, delicious food & drinks, friendly staff and welcoming atmosphere.

Name: Đoàn Gia Cafe
Author: Emma Corstorphine
Review: Wonderful place with amazing spring rolls and the best coffee I ever had! Very recommended for a nice stop. Also they had the cutest poodle that we could pet 😍 Also the service couldn’t be better! The owner is really good at English, and gladly shares cool information about Vietnam 🤩

Name: Đoàn Gia Cafe
Author: Anja D
Review: Nice ambience, friendly service and delicious drinks!

Name: Đoàn Gia Cafe
Author: Rajesh Kumar Baskar
Review: Coffee was very good. We ordered Saigon, fin iced milk coffee, spring roll and Co Tra chi Lan. All were nicely prepared and served

Name: Đoàn Gia Cafe
Author: Kimber Kox
Review: Amazing coffee! The best we had in Hanoi.

Name: Đoàn Gia Cafe
Author: gtb n
Review: Such a good mood, thanks for your welcoming!

Name: An Nhien Cafe Khuc Hao
Author: J. M.
Review:
Ambiente OK - nothing special.

Pro:
+ It's close to the government and main street
+ Not that loud if you like that

Con:
- to be honest, that was the worst coffee I ever had. The coffee taste is to sweet and also salty (cafe nâu đá)  // can't recommend that - 35k vnd
- the price is to high for what you get.
- you wait a while to get served

Name: An Nhien Cafe Khuc Hao
Author: Giang Do
Review: Beautiful little cafe tuck away in a nice alley in French coner. You can feel a but of old Hanoi vibe here:)

Name: An Nhien Cafe Khuc Hao
Author: Little Cub
Review: Nice place for lunch after visiting the sites nearby.  On a side street behind the embassies.  Small outside terrace.  There is a small menu which changes on a daily basis.  Friendly staff and tasty food.

Name: An Nhien Cafe Khuc Hao
Author: Дмитрий Никулин
Review: The first time I ate soup without any greens, and they didn’t give me water before coffee.  Very strange ... The portion of the soup is large, but I didn’t like it without greens, I liked the coffee with coconut.  Check 130,000. Didn't like the service.

Name: An Nhien Cafe Khuc Hao
Author: Mỹ Hạnh Nguyễn Thị
Review: I had a good time with friend here. The drink made so beautiful. The space is a coffee perfume, green, silent, romantic with the piano. Good service, we forgot our bag and could connect to the coffee fast and take back easy.

Name: 28 Train Street - Cafe & Bistro
Address: Phố đường tàu/28 P. Trần Phú, Cửa Đông
Author: Leanne Tran
Review:
TLDR: if you want the typical picture go south. If you want to avoid the crowds perfect place to watch the trains 😍

We got there a few minutes before the train thinking we'd miss the opportunity to see the train but we were whisked super quickly to get a seat by the train track. Got the opportunity to walk down the train track after as well. If you want the typical picture of the train tracks I would keep going to the southern part of the block.

Name: 28 Train Street - Cafe & Bistro
Address: Phố đường tàu/28 P. Trần Phú, Cửa Đông
Author: Ryder Matthews
Review:
I cannot recommend this place enough!! Absolutely phenomenal, fantastic experience. The food was delicious, drinks were great, atmosphere was amazing! The nice lady that runs the restaurant is legitimately the sweetest person in the world. She’s so nice, great english, and is fully dedicated on making sure all her customers have an amazing time.
If you’re looking for a great time, great food, and not to be overcrowded by tourists, this is the place for you! We will be back, so good!

Name: 28 Train Street - Cafe & Bistro
Address: Phố đường tàu/28 P. Trần Phú, Cửa Đông
Author: ブルーフォックス
Review:
The clerk of man is really bad.He threw Tabasco to our seat . Ha？can’t u see？we are customers of your shop,aren’t we?
The clerks of woman are really nice . But the man makes this shop worse. He shouldn’t work here.

Name: 28 Train Street - Cafe & Bistro
Address: Phố đường tàu/28 P. Trần Phú, Cửa Đông
Author: Alira
Review: We came there to have lunch, not to watch the train this time, and the food didn't disappoint :) We ordered Bun Cha and fried noodles + white coffee. Everything was super tasty and served very fast. Highly recommend 👍

Name: 28 Train Street - Cafe & Bistro
Address: Phố đường tàu/28 P. Trần Phú, Cửa Đông
Author: Amy Piesley
Review:
What an experience! The owner of the cafe allowed us in slightly earlier than we should've been there and couldn't have been more accommodating. She made sure we were comfortable, kept us informed on what time the train was coming through and let us play our own music through the speakers. Amazing egg hot chocolate and my English partner was very happy to find cider! She even put his bottle caps on the track to get squished by the train as a souvenir, really cool! Her family was really lovely too, her daughter helped translate :-)

Seeing the train come through was such an awesome experience, don't miss it and definitely come and find this place to sit at!

Name: Trung Nguyen Legend Coffee
Address: 17T3 P. Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Trung Hoà
Author: Deepak Sood
Review:
I wish I can give zero star!! Pathetic coffee. It's the worse coffee in my 20 years of vietnam stay. Shame on this store to say they sell coffee muoi. It is 100% cafe latte. To make things even worse. I can hardly feel any salt or any milk. I feel it's a flavor water. 70% of it was ice. I want to throw the coffee away. I had clearly told the person I want less ice. But 70% ice in a coffee? Is it coffee in the ice or ice in the coffee? It is indeed my worst experience. True shame that they say themselves as legend when it comes to coffee.
It's my last visit to this store ever. Interestingly same brand In eco park, they serve a true coffee muoi. I think they need go to their eco park branch and learn how to make a coffee. And godsake stop scamming your customer by putting 70% ice and asking 65000 VND... I am sorry but your coffee is not coffee. Its flavor ice water!! And pls don't teach me what is coffee muoi. It is not my first time to drink it. Ok? Stop having such arrogance. Customers cannot be made fool. Around my home in van canh, I will invite you to have coffee muoi. And it's less than half the price and I will show you what is cafe muoi. Shame on you to scam your customers like this. Ruined my Friday evening mood !!!

Name: Trung Nguyen Legend Coffee
Address: 17T3 P. Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Trung Hoà
Author: Sergey Dementovich
Review:
I definitely recommend stopping by for a cup of coffee here. It’s fantastic!

The first time in my life I had an egg coffee, and it was just amazing! It has a rich flavor and a thick texture.

Name: Trung Nguyen Legend Coffee
Address: 17T3 P. Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Trung Hoà
Author: Miu Le
Review: There were customers smoking indoor. The male toilet's revolting smell spread to the outside. Other than that, everything else is good.

Name: Trung Nguyen Legend Coffee
Address: 17T3 P. Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Trung Hoà
Author: duy khoa nguyen
Review: Ok

Name: Trung Nguyen Legend Coffee
Address: 17T3 P. Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Trung Hoà
Author: Esther Pena
Review: Had the motherland coffee and it was absolutely amazing. The ginger in it was heavenly.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Address: VinaFor Building, 127 P. Lò Đúc, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Donia Lisa Zora G.
Review: Not bad Iced Matcha frap 🍵😋a bit different to my usual perhaps because it has some fruity green tea bubble inside 🧋

Name: Highlands Coffee
Address: VinaFor Building, 127 P. Lò Đúc, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: An Hoe
Review: Just another Highlands Coffee located in the ground of on building in a noisy street. Outdoor and indoor seating. During cold weather they have heater, it’s good. But this place is also packed with people and not really well-organized.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Address: VinaFor Building, 127 P. Lò Đúc, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Alex Gu
Review: Need a place to pass some time, this place is pretty decent but nothing special about it.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Address: VinaFor Building, 127 P. Lò Đúc, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Decosama Abura
Review: Always able to count on Highlands, this particular one is in the first floor of an office building, relatively big in size and comfortable.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Address: VinaFor Building, 127 P. Lò Đúc, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: 雪
Review: We had a hot Vietnamese coffee and a latte. Served hot with a cookie. Tiramisu and chocolate mousse cake are good too. Small piece but just right for satisfying the sweet tooth. Service was good. They tried to communicate with us in English and body movement. Appreciated.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Tô Ngọc Vân
Address: 43 Đ. Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An
Author: Huyền Trang
Review:
Highly rcm Thai Tea Latte and potato soup
A good place to work and date but the price is rather high
Anw, i still love Joma🥰

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Tô Ngọc Vân
Address: 43 Đ. Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An
Author: Mitchell Vassie
Review:
Update 6th June. I decided to try again. Today I was short changed again. By the same person. Unbelievable. That is 4 times now so now I assume it’s not a mistake but a considered action. Very disappointing. Pull your socks up Joma. This behaviour will impact your business negatively.

Joma Bakery is  an expat/foreigner favourite. And the prices generally show that. That’s ok of course. For the past year it’s been my lunchtime/breakfast go to. Clean food in a town with inconsistent food hygiene. (A quote from my Viet doctor). I would normally recommend a visit. However, in a relatively short space of time I have been ‘short changed’ 3 times. This IS NOT an allegation, merely an observation. Mistakes can happen. All Im saying is that if you are a local or visitor, it’s good practice to check your change wherever you are. I have found it a rare occurrence in Hà Nội, but just my recent experience here.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Tô Ngọc Vân
Address: 43 Đ. Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An
Author: Eileen Lui
Review: Just wanted coffee and a light bite. Found this place on Google maps. It's alright. Not the best coffee in town. And also, not the best Bacon and Eggs Croissant. TBH, the Ham & Cheese Croissant from Amman Gourmet was much much better. But overall,  it was ok.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Tô Ngọc Vân
Address: 43 Đ. Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An
Author: K DJ
Review:
Bit old but best place to take time.
Clean cafe, delicious foods and coffee and well trained kind staffs.

Texan(chedder pepper bagel sandwich) is recommended.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Tô Ngọc Vân
Address: 43 Đ. Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An
Author: F411en
Review: Great spot to get a drink and food. The bagels tasted fresh and drink was good. There are seating in and out doors. The indoor seating area seems dated and worn, could use a update. The staff spoke English and are very polite.

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Erik Rybár
Review:
This is my go-to coffee shop, hands down! The vibe is super cozy, and the smell of fresh coffee hits you as soon as you walk in—instant mood boost. The staff is always friendly and somehow remembers my order, even when I switch it up!

Their coffees are spot-on every time, and the pastries are dangerously good. It's the perfect place to chill, catch up on some work, or just relax for a bit. Highly recommend if you're looking for a great cup of coffee and a welcoming atmosphere.

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Katherin Cueller
Review: We had a vietnamese coffee and a cappuccino. Everything was delicious and the outdoor sitting is beautiful and relaxing. The staff is very nice, we will definitely come back

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: M.A. C.
Review: It used to be a very quiet cafe situated on the side road of Vo Chi Cong street. Today there are more crowds after the opening of Lotte Mall nearby. Their espresso machine has been down for a while...

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Viet Truong Quoc
Review: Good location for coffee, parking free

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Hải Hói
Review: I’ve tried many coffees in town and I have to say drop coffee is way better than big company coffee shops . Highly recommend!

Name: LINKA café
Address: 93 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Gia Bùi
Review: Ok

Name: LINKA café
Address: 93 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Thang Cao
Review: Good

Name: LINKA café
Address: 93 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Thanh Duy
Review: Ok

Name: LINKA café
Address: 93 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Anh Pham Xuan
Review: It's a moderate coffee place

Name: LINKA café
Address: 93 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Việt Đoàn
Review: Ok

Name: Joma Bakery Café • The Garden
Address: cổng A2-TT4, Lô 82, Garden Manor P
Author: JY Song
Review: It's nice to be able to order decaffeinated coffee. There are a variety of brunch menus, so it's good to use on weekend mornings.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • The Garden
Address: cổng A2-TT4, Lô 82, Garden Manor P
Author: Muoi xinh
Review: High quality food, great service. The staffs are very nice and attentive. The setup is nice and cozy. Small space but still provide enough privacy

Name: Joma Bakery Café • The Garden
Address: cổng A2-TT4, Lô 82, Garden Manor P
Author: Misaki Ito
Review: Congratulations to opening a new one!  There are up to 4th floors, good wifi, comfortable seats inside and outside. I went to joma cafe in Luangprabang and Hanoi, and all staffs are very nice! I love joma^^ また来ます

Name: Joma Bakery Café • The Garden
Address: cổng A2-TT4, Lô 82, Garden Manor P
Author: Jade Ng
Review: New Joma branch in My Dinh. They have 4 floors beautifully designed. The food and drinks were all good and consistent in quality, only except for one time when I came for dinner at 7:30, bread was a bit mushy not crunchy like usual, dressing for side salad wasn’t enough.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • The Garden
Address: cổng A2-TT4, Lô 82, Garden Manor P
Author: Полина Кленкова
Review: I really like food and drinks there though some of them are overpriced. But it seems like i won’t go there as often as I would like as the workers there are terrible . The cashier there is so rude, unpleasant and disrespectful to the customers. I’ve visited this place a lot of times and she charges full price instead of discount ( in the evenings pastries are cheaper). Also in the evening she refuses to serve the customers though it could be 45-30 mins till the closing time. The cafe is nice,  coffee is amazing but workers ruin the experience:(

Name: Cafe Thóc Bistro Sài Gòn
Address: 63 P. Đặng Xuân Bảng, Đại Kim
Author: The Visual Edge
Review: The food is exactly what you need to fill you up with wholesomeness. Tasty warm food.  The owner is super kind, and the prices are good. I come here often with good reason. 👍

Name: Cafe Thóc Bistro Sài Gòn
Address: 63 P. Đặng Xuân Bảng, Đại Kim
Author: Thành Trung Phạm
Review:
Coffee corner
When it's hot, going out to find a cafe to have lunch is a real treat.
Lunch with fried bread and shumai. In my opinion, it is okay with the sauce being easy to eat.
The restaurant space is spacious and airy.
➡️ Cafe Thuc Bistro Saigon: 63 Dang Xuan Bang Street, Dai Kim, Hoang Mai, Hanoi

Name: Cafe Thóc Bistro Sài Gòn
Address: 63 P. Đặng Xuân Bảng, Đại Kim
Author: Lại Văn Hiếu
Review:
Bringing Saigon cafe and cuisine space to Hanoi.
ChatGPT
Cafe Thoc Bistro Saigon brings to Hanoi not only the cafe space but also the typical flavor of Saigon cuisine. The restaurant is located in a convenient area, with a luxurious and cozy design, creating an ideal space for guests to relax and meet friends.

With the motto "bring Saigon to Hanoi", Cafe Thoc Bistro impresses with its sophisticated decorative space, blending modern and classic styles. The menu is diverse with delicious coffee dishes, herbal lemon tea and attractive O long milk tea, meeting customers' needs for relaxing and traditional drinks.

Not only is it an ideal destination for those who love Saigon cafe culture, Cafe Thoc Bistro is also an address to experience unique flavors and a Southern atmosphere right in the heart of Hanoi capital.

Name: Cafe Thóc Bistro Sài Gòn
Address: 63 P. Đặng Xuân Bảng, Đại Kim
Author: Toàn Nguyễn Thành
Review: The street view is very chill, the food is quite delicious, the staff is cheerful and enthusiastic, taking beautiful photos

Name: Cafe Thóc Bistro Sài Gòn
Address: 63 P. Đặng Xuân Bảng, Đại Kim
Author: Dai Le danh
Review: The food and drinks are delicious. Cute staff

Name: NEW WIND CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Bằng Lê
Review: A very nice place for families, couples and single people to have coffee, breakfast, lunch...

Name: NEW WIND CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Christin Kelly
Review: One of my favorite spots in Hanoi! Beautiful lake view with greenery everywhere. I love the cozy feel as well as the AMAZING drinks (and food). Every single time I come here I am impressed with how much flavor and unique tastes everything has. Highly highly reccomend!

Name: NEW WIND CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Nam Nguyen
Review: Large space, next to Nghia Do park and lake. Serving breakfast and coffee.

Name: NEW WIND CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Chuc Mai
Review: ok

Name: NEW WIND CAFE & RESTAURANT
Author: Vu Lam
Review: Nice coffee place, but i don't like the smoke from cigarete

Name: The Kafe
Author: Nicolas Boichat
Review: Good breakfast items, nice décor. But... Confusing menu where the pictures consist of the base item + a large number of add-ons, without clearly saying which ones. Restroom tiny and uncomfortable.

Name: The Kafe
Author: Peter Gyorfi
Review: Love both the ambiance and the food as well. Servings are of decent size, great taste in preparing the food - no wonder they are Kitchen Art based. And the idea of having the dessert kitchen at the entrance to get you drooling as soon as you enter is just genius.

Name: The Kafe
Author: Nguyen Hoang Duy
Review: Nice decor but the food and drink does not match the price.

Name: The Kafe
Author: legh davies
Review: Have been there twice already and the food and service was good. This time when we arrived we were told they didn't have a table which slightly annoyed me as we had booked and half an hour before we arrived  had reconfirmed - and no one apologised which was a pity . Luckily a table for two vacated and we had a table for two where we squeezed four people on and then another table next door vacated and so all went to plan EXCEPT average main courses for two of my guests, one of my friends had a steak that was not wonderful, my wife had a Mediterranean sausage salad that was delicious, another guest had chicken which was average and I had the worst hamburger I have ever eaten. The meat was a sort of dark grey with no taste at all - I should have sent it back but I was starving. The deserts were excellent and our waitress who had served us before remembered my name and was as good as they get. I got home with an extremely upset stomach and think it might have been the dubious hamburger; maybe not but I thing the owner needs to check out the quality of his food a bit more - I suspect he was on holiday or at another branch on that day but it will take a lot of of persuading to get me back there.

Name: The Kafe
Author: Henk Duursma
Review: Great coffee, tasty food and beautiful drinks. Above all a modern day local Hanoi hangout! One of those places with only a few tourists. Very nice... (and reasonable prices)

Name: Letefe Bistro & Cafe
Address: 12 Ng. 106 Đ. Hoàng Quốc Việt, Nghĩa Đô
Author: Jeffrey Teo
Review:
Ordered a tuna salad and a steak. Tuna salad was done to perfection. Steak melted in my mouth in an instance. Served with a crispy bun at the side.

Surprise #1 - free wine pairing with the steak!

Surprise #2 - complementary 2pc beef cheek.

Name: Letefe Bistro & Cafe
Address: 12 Ng. 106 Đ. Hoàng Quốc Việt, Nghĩa Đô
Author: Bodan Cassidy
Review: Gorgeous hidden gem in the area. The service was so friendly and attentive, and the food was amazing. Highly recommend!

Name: Letefe Bistro & Cafe
Address: 12 Ng. 106 Đ. Hoàng Quốc Việt, Nghĩa Đô
Author: John Dean
Review:
We went here for a drink, but they have a lot more to offer. Nice modern interior and different rooms where you can sit and enjoy your food or drinks.
The kumquat honey tea was simple but very enjoyable.

Name: Letefe Bistro & Cafe
Address: 12 Ng. 106 Đ. Hoàng Quốc Việt, Nghĩa Đô
Author: chinmay h
Review: Delicious food and great ambience must try when in Hanoi

Name: Letefe Bistro & Cafe
Address: 12 Ng. 106 Đ. Hoàng Quốc Việt, Nghĩa Đô
Author: Nilesh Chaudhari
Review: I had gone for a vegetarian takeaway. The staff is friendly. ambience great and the pasta and fried rice was great too. The packing for the takeaway was nice.

Name: Flora Bistro
Address: 36 Dịch Vọng Hậu Ha Noi Hanoi City
Author: anson jay
Review: Having lunch here, nice food with reasonable price. Friendly staff with nice service that you may not easy to find in this area. Will come here often definitely.

Name: Flora Bistro
Address: 36 Dịch Vọng Hậu Ha Noi Hanoi City
Author: Ron Rozen
Review: The service is good, the atmosphere is nice. Unfortunately the drinks were mediocre, the place closes at 2pm and the food was too salty to my taste.

Name: Flora Bistro
Address: 36 Dịch Vọng Hậu Ha Noi Hanoi City
Author: mitch
Review: Located 9th floor of Bloom Hotel. Food is reasonably priced and atmosphere/staff are nice.

Name: Flora Bistro
Address: 36 Dịch Vọng Hậu Ha Noi Hanoi City
Author: Douglas Cunningham
Review: I had breakfast at the Flora Bistro. ( Bloom Hotel rooftop). The beef Pho was the tastiest that I have had in Vietnam, and the coffee is among the best also.

Name: Flora Bistro
Address: 36 Dịch Vọng Hậu Ha Noi Hanoi City
Author: Amber Hoang
Review:
First time eating here, really impressed from the decoration to the aesthetics. Everything looks very attractive and creates a delicious feeling. Good background music, there are both indoor and outdoor spaces, the entrance is a bookshelf with many good books that are quite difficult to find in regular bookstores. The menu here is diverse, including Vietnamese rice sets (including vegetarian and healthy dishes), Spaghetti and Sandwiches, combined with many nutritious drinks such as Kombucha tea, juices, and even strong wine :)
That day, I ate the Home Rice Set with dishes such as fried pork, fried eggs, onion-soaked tofu, and pickled vegetables. Eating rice makes me miss home terribly. Even though I was full, I didn't forget to order another cup of peach Kombucha tea because it was so delicious and good for my health. I'm also quite impressed with the staff here, warm, polite, professional, always seen walking around so if you want to ask for anything, you can ask them right away, unlike some restaurants where the staff waits after serving and then gathers around. one place. Overall it's great, nothing to criticize. If you come over, remember to book a table in advance, because this place is quite crowded. :))

Name: Lửa Việt Cafe
Author: Sơn Đinh Công
Review: Ok

Name: Lửa Việt Cafe
Author: Toàn Nguyễn
Review: Nice

Name: Lửa Việt Cafe
Author: Mr.Quang Nguyễn Xuan
Review: Very good.

Name: Lửa Việt Cafe
Author: Nam Đặng
Review: The shop space is too hot, the coffee is as bland as water. Enthusiastic staff but the restaurant atmosphere is too breathless!

Name: Lửa Việt Cafe
Author: Sơn Thế
Review: Delicious food and enthusiastic staff

Name: Phê Đây Cafe
Address: Đ. Phủ Quốc, TT. Quốc Oai
Author: Thống Lĩnh
Review: Good

Name: Phê Đây Cafe
Address: Đ. Phủ Quốc, TT. Quốc Oai
Author: Minh Trịnh
Review: Fresh food, good service, airy space

Name: Phê Đây Cafe
Address: Đ. Phủ Quốc, TT. Quốc Oai
Author: Do Huyen
Review: Delicious food, enthusiastic service, beautiful view suitable for virtual living😜😜

Name: Phê Đây Cafe
Address: Đ. Phủ Quốc, TT. Quốc Oai
Author: Baoanh Hanguyen
Review: Delicious drinks, lovely and cute wait staff

Name: Phê Đây Cafe
Address: Đ. Phủ Quốc, TT. Quốc Oai
Author: Phuc Pham
Review: Delicious drinks, reasonable prices, beautiful views, you should try it

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Cầu Giấy
Address: Lô B3 - D6, Khu đô thị mới, Đ. Cầu Giấy
Author: hoa quynh
Review: This coffee, sandwich and salad is absolutely amazing! Its roasted to perfection and the different blends are amazing!

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Cầu Giấy
Address: Lô B3 - D6, Khu đô thị mới, Đ. Cầu Giấy
Author: Tatiana Andreeva
Review: A cosy place with great coffee!! Excellent start of the day! I always come here after a walk in the park nearby ☺️

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Cầu Giấy
Address: Lô B3 - D6, Khu đô thị mới, Đ. Cầu Giấy
Author: Masae Kitagawa
Review: I had grate time here. I will visit again.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Cầu Giấy
Address: Lô B3 - D6, Khu đô thị mới, Đ. Cầu Giấy
Author: Ishan Keskar
Review: My first visit to JOMA in 4 years, had heard about it. The food quality and presentation is A class. The bread I bought from here was excellent.

Name: Joma Bakery Café • Cầu Giấy
Address: Lô B3 - D6, Khu đô thị mới, Đ. Cầu Giấy
Author: brent h
Review: Great restaurant. Great food and coffee!

Name: Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro
Address: 66 P. Nguyễn Thái Học, Điện Biên
Author: Alisa Zhazhieva
Review:
Nice Interior design with many paintings, the music doesn't really fit and some furniture get a bit old so ranked 4 for atmosphere.

Service is ok

Ordered Bac Xiu coffee and a cake for 138k. Tastes good. The coffee was too little for 60k.

Name: Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro
Address: 66 P. Nguyễn Thái Học, Điện Biên
Author: NJ Hunter
Review: I recently visited Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro and had an extremely disappointing experience. The waitress left before we finished ordering, and she forgot to add the pizza we ordered at the beginning. She didn’t read back our order, and we ended up waiting for half an hour for a pizza that hadn’t even been started. When we asked the manager about it, we were told the pizza would be ready in 5 minutes. To make matters worse, the waitress who made the mistake found it amusing and started laughing. The service was appalling, and the mushroom soup was under-seasoned. I would not recommend this place to anyone.

Name: Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro
Address: 66 P. Nguyễn Thái Học, Điện Biên
Author: Anita R Ratnam
Review:
One rude waitress can mar the experience
I entered and ordered Salt coffee and Chivk pea salad
Both were very good. I just enquired if I could purchase some extra crackers when a very rude waitress confronted me with a curt NO! A big contrast from the cheerful staff behind the counter. Am not returning here. My first negative experience in Vietnam

Name: Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro
Address: 66 P. Nguyễn Thái Học, Điện Biên
Author: John Dean
Review:
Artsy cafe next to the museum, with a big bar, couple of boots and seating on the patio.
The milk tea was skillfully put together and was of great taste. Prizes for the drinks were affordable too, happy to see that.

Name: Lê Art Cafe Wine Bistro
Address: 66 P. Nguyễn Thái Học, Điện Biên
Author: Meda Wara
Review: A cute and chic place beside the art museum. The drinks are lovely but we didn't try any wine. It looks like they have a nice selection though. The 5 cheese pizza is very good. A nice snack. The atmosphere is good.

Name: Le Faubourg, Bistro & Café
Author: Elly Seo (Marine)
Review: This is my first time visiting here. I highly recommend you to come here!  Vibe is so good and the drinks menu and cake were amazing.

Name: Le Faubourg, Bistro & Café
Author: Lauren Thurmond
Review: The waitress tried to short me 100k on the change, when confronted she was like hah you caught me, first time that's happened to me in Vietnam over months of visits. The drinks were *very* bad, and they acted like they did not want customers. Avoid at all costs!!

Name: Le Faubourg, Bistro & Café
Author: Calvin Lam
Review: An enjoyable visit, reminiscing about my favorite coffee shop in Europe. What a little gem in the heart of Hanoi. Can’t wait to return to this cafe comes fall/winter

Name: Le Faubourg, Bistro & Café
Author: BON BON
Review: Nice place, but service is poor, waited over 30 minutes for the drink and food during non peak time.

Name: Le Faubourg, Bistro & Café
Author: Sandra Schneiderman
Review:
Overpriced terrible coffee.
The staff tried to make me pay 800VND for a glass that broke over the register, that slipped down while I passed over my money.
Poorly designed pay area, poor staff fearful of their boss and bad coffee.
Much better authentic coffees close by.

Name: Letefe Bistro Cafe
Address: 34 Ng. 12 P. Láng Hạ, Thành Công
Author: NBLâm HMUPH
Review: One of my fav western restaurant to enjoy dinner with my friends. Why ? 1 It have quite variety of the menu from asian dishes to western dishes, believe me not all my friends can enjoy western food the same as I. 2 It have quite nice atmosphere with good service and come with ok price nothing crazy here. True it's not the best western food I have tried but it's still good enough and they also have some asian dishes if you want and quite some variety of dessert, I just love "chè khúc bạch" so much. So yeah I genuinely recommend this restaurant for small group 👍

Name: Letefe Bistro Cafe
Address: 34 Ng. 12 P. Láng Hạ, Thành Công
Author: Val Ng
Review:
Suitable for lunch and dinner with a wide range of options for friends and family.

Pleasant atmosphere, reasonable price and staff is friendly and helpful.

Name: Letefe Bistro Cafe
Address: 34 Ng. 12 P. Láng Hạ, Thành Công
Author: Brett Minor
Review: Very good food at a reasonable rate. Being a nicer restaurant I expected the prices to be double what they were. We appreciated it. The only downside was they substituted my mashed potatoes with french fries without telling me. They were out of mashed potatoes, but didn't say anything. They just put something else on the plate. I would rather they had said something, but the service was still excellent and I'm giving five stars.

Name: Letefe Bistro Cafe
Address: 34 Ng. 12 P. Láng Hạ, Thành Công
Author: Kenny Estelita
Review: The food was reasonably good considering the price. The staffs are always very accommodating and quick which is the best part of my experience. Been there twice and recommended it to my friends.

Name: Letefe Bistro Cafe
Address: 34 Ng. 12 P. Láng Hạ, Thành Công
Author: Wendy Justice
Review:
Big selection of food - everything from salads and steaks to pasta, chicken rice, beef stew, Vietnamese cuisine and hot pot. Service is exceptional and always attentive. Prices are more than reasonable - it's a great value.

It's in a block-long strip of restaurants, and I've been to most of them but Letefe is one of the best. Highly recommended.

Name: Ô Trống Cà Phê
Author: Mia
Review: i like this lovely place to stay with coffee. there are many places to sit. A good place to chat with friends and family.

Name: Ô Trống Cà Phê
Author: Margaret Hitching
Review: The staff are friendly and helpful. The cafe has a special welcoming atmosphere. The drinks are good. I love the layout, so many different rooms to choose from. I have visited almost every day for two months and I  am never tired of it. Try it. The dogs like it too.

Name: Ô Trống Cà Phê
Author: Nguyen Thu Trang
Review:
The cafe has unique interior space, feeling like it’s a combination several smaller apartments in an old apartment complex. That means even tho it’s big and there are many customers, there are many corners and smaller rooms, you can still find some quietness and privacy. All drinks I have tried are good with reasonable price, and served with reusable glass straws. They take my “no sugar” request seriously and I truly appreciate that.
Highly recommended for those who need a tranquil place to read / work. I also love the marker next door and all the food options around, which allows me to easily spend a whole day in this neighborhood.

Name: Ô Trống Cà Phê
Author: Ngọc Thuỷ Trần
Review: perfect place to study

Name: Ô Trống Cà Phê
Author: Đỗ Hoàng Kim Tân
Review: Chill chill 😘

Name: Trung Nguyên Legend Cafe
Address: 5 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Grace Kelly Hosea
Review:
The place is comfortable both ground fl. and 2nd floor. The staffs are friendly and helpful, they even prepared a pot of tea and hot water for free refills.
The coffee is perfectly made, especially the egg coffee, comes with peanut snacks. Try their salted coffee, it is very delicious, not too sweet, the coffee is perfectly blended also suits those who cannot drink too bitter coffee.

Name: Trung Nguyên Legend Cafe
Address: 5 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Alan S
Review: The drinks were solid, I got the iced pandan with lotus seeds. The drink itself was very fresh, and very refreshing on a hot day in Hanoi. I recommend this place as the atmosphere is very nice air conditioned interior and a great escape from the heat. The presentation of the drinks were beautiful with pandan leaves garnishing the top of the drink.

Name: Trung Nguyên Legend Cafe
Address: 5 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Christele Fock
Review: My mum is a big fan of this coffee so was a must to stop by and enjoy some coffee. ☺️ It didn’t disappoint. You can also enjoy buying coffees bags at a really good price too 😄

Name: Trung Nguyên Legend Cafe
Address: 5 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Marie C
Review:
Beautiful spacious coffee shop in the midst of the hustle and bustle of the old quarter in Hanoi. The whole atmosphere exudes calm and quiet with the smell of good coffee. This would be a great place to read a book.

There were so many drink choices that I didn’t know what to choose. I only wanted to try the egg coffee but they were sold out on that. So a traditional Vietnamese coffee on ice with condensed milk instead but they didn’t speak much English so I ended up with a quarter glass of iced latte which was too bitter for my taste.

Maybe when my taste buds will become more learned about coffee, I’ll be able to appreciate this shop more.

Name: Trung Nguyên Legend Cafe
Address: 5 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Alison Sim
Review: This shop was recommended by hotel front desk when I told them I wanted to get some nice coffee as souvenir. The shop is spacious and great relaxing/chill vibe. They have a nice coffee selection as well as some cakes and pastry. They also have other drinks such as fruit juice and smoothie. I tried the ice peach tea, and I was disappointed, just what I needed after walking at 35C.

Name: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery
Address: 29c Ngõ 20, Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Author: Monique Bekker
Review: What a great experience!!! Such a beautiful view place. The detail in the decor, pastries and coffee is immaculate! Definitely worth a visit😻 Looking forward to more Web3 meetups in this space🫡🙌

Name: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery
Address: 29c Ngõ 20, Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Author: Đàm Đình Kiên
Review: It’s really beautiful coffee in HaNoi. I love the design of Anemoia, it’s bring me peaceful when I am there. Also, the cake is fresh and not too sweet and really delicious. Drink also nice. Specifically, the employees is young people which are enthusiastic and nice.

Name: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery
Address: 29c Ngõ 20, Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Author: Khanh-Anh Tran
Review: Lovely cafe, friendly staff and great coffee. One of my favorites in Hanoi

Name: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery
Address: 29c Ngõ 20, Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Author: Hoang Bui
Review: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery is a perfect place for coffee enthusiasts and productive business gatherings. With exceptional brews, cozy ambiance, and friendly owner (Remy is a cool and friendly guy), it's the perfect spot to relax.

Name: Anemoia Coffee & Bakery
Address: 29c Ngõ 20, Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Author: Will Pháp
Review: The area is quite calm. I Went at the opening, really chill, they offer us strawberries and cookies,

Name: Café Nhím Hồ Đắc Di
Address: 43 P. Trần Hữu Tước, Nam Đồng
Author: 恵理西村
Review: Nice place. Nice guy. Nice decor. Nice music. I love it

Name: Café Nhím Hồ Đắc Di
Address: 43 P. Trần Hữu Tước, Nam Đồng
Author: Duong Ngo Duy
Review: good view

Name: Café Nhím Hồ Đắc Di
Address: 43 P. Trần Hữu Tước, Nam Đồng
Author: Vũ Quynh
Review: Not bad, but not good

Name: Café Nhím Hồ Đắc Di
Address: 43 P. Trần Hữu Tước, Nam Đồng
Author: Nguyen Van Hai
Review: ok

Name: Café Nhím Hồ Đắc Di
Address: 43 P. Trần Hữu Tước, Nam Đồng
Author: chung anh Lê Thị
Review: good

Name: Bloo Cafe' & Bánh
Address: 35 Ng. 91 Đ. Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Thành Công
Author: Ngô Khánh Huyền
Review: Really really like this shop 💯. Airy and clean space 🫰; Drinks are delicious and diverse; Banana cake, choco cake and even sandwiches, you can eat them once and want to eat them again 😋. The staff here are also cute, enthusiastic and attentive to guests' wishes 🫶. In particular, the 2nd floor is a suitable space for those who want to find a place to study or have group meetings 📚.

Name: Bloo Cafe' & Bánh
Address: 35 Ng. 91 Đ. Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Thành Công
Author: Trần Quỳnh
Review: Delicious drinks, enthusiastic staff, clean space, will support the shop for a long time 🫰🏻💗

Name: Bloo Cafe' & Bánh
Address: 35 Ng. 91 Đ. Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Thành Công
Author: Diệu Thảo Nguyễn
Review:
- The staff here are very cute and enthusiastic.
- Packaging is neat and clean.
- As for the drink, I don't really like it, I order regular matcha. Bland matcha taste. When I asked what ingredients they used, they said whipping, but when I checked again, it was rich cream 😭😭 If I knew the shop used rich cream, I would have told them not to add it because it's very bad for skin.
Mong shop training gives staff more detailed information about ingredients to avoid confusion between rich and whip. And you can ask the customer in advance about the desired sweetness level, or whether you want more richness.

Name: Bloo Cafe' & Bánh
Address: 35 Ng. 91 Đ. Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Thành Công
Author: Nguyễn Tuyết Trinh
Review: Delicious food and drinks, green and quiet space to work.

Name: Bloo Cafe' & Bánh
Address: 35 Ng. 91 Đ. Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Thành Công
Author: Phuong Nguyen
Review: 5 star rating for service and drinks, thank you for being so supportive and caring. Very loving

Name: Chillhood - Rooftop Cafe & Bistro
Author: Ben Rowan
Review: We went when it was quite quiet, it did begin to rain heavy to be fair. The banh mi was good if a little small. The roof top view was a plus, over seeing west lake.

Name: Chillhood - Rooftop Cafe & Bistro
Author: Richard Kirchner
Review: Great view. Very good food. Nice staff. Excellent prices. What’s not to like? I actually ate all three of my meals there in one day which explains all why I added 5 food pictures.

Name: Chillhood - Rooftop Cafe & Bistro
Author: Jodie Maxted
Review:
I write this review whilst waiting for my Banh My at this far from adequate establishment. The only reason I come here is for the sick view of the lake. The food is less than subpar and every time I order something on the menu I am told that they don’t have it ?

In all honesty I think whoever owns this place is selfish. I wish they’ give up ownership to someone that would be able to realize this place’s full potential.

Come here if you want a dry pasta and sad sandwich.

Name: Chillhood - Rooftop Cafe & Bistro
Author: Sara McQuaid
Review: Absolutely loved it. Not expensive and great food. Liquor and beer are also very reasonably priced. Gorgeous view of the city on the 5th floor and it's a lovely space to eat dinner. Staff are excellent and the food is served relatively quick. We had the alfredo pasta (delicious) ceasar salad (very good)  steak with pepper sauce (delicious) and Belgium moose (good). Will definitely go back!

Name: Chillhood - Rooftop Cafe & Bistro
Author: J Z
Review: The music was great. It’s such a comfortable place with a good service. Wine is so cheap(3USD by a glass?) and food price too. BUT, they have very limited food as a selection :( Too bad they do not serve Pizza today... Do not except for having a big meal here tho, other than that, everything is cool!

Name: 6 Degrees
Author: Trịnh Minh
Review:
The restaurant has a truly excellent view, one of the most beautiful rooftop restaurants with West Lake views
- Space: 3 floors, each floor has beautiful cg design. There is indoor and outdoor space, both are ok.
Rooftop restaurant with beautiful trees
- Drinks: usually not very special. cocktails quite basic. The price is very ok, I think it's cheaper than the quality of the view hahaa
- Staff: very cute, enthusiastic

The restaurant is suitable for dates, gatherings of friends and family
Will support for a long time

Name: 6 Degrees
Author: Lester Chee
Review:
Read about the views so we visited during lunch time today. We had the calamari, oysters and clam chowder; food was average. Expect the price to be slightly higher like in a restaurant.

Service was poor and the waiters were not attentive, even though there were less than 3 groups in the restaurant.

This place is multi-levels and there's a children's playground built onsite. The weather was hot and the air con was underpowered in the summer midday sun. Furniture and interior feels a little dated; time for a refresh.

Got to make my own cotton candy for free so that's a small plus.

The views were not bad but I suppose it is more beautiful in the evening.

Name: 6 Degrees
Author: Phương Mai
Review: After ordering, the food came out quickly, but because it came out at once, it was cold when tasted. The taste was not too special, but quite pleasant. A quite space, quite chill view of west lake.

Name: 6 Degrees
Author: dat tran
Review: Good food, amazing view and excellent staff

Name: 6 Degrees
Author: Miguel Guardian
Review: Great views and good western food. I went for lunch and the food came out quickly. There are seats inside and in the balcony which wraps around both levels. There is a bar downstairs with what appears to be a good wine selection.

Name: Puku Cafe & Bar
Author: Yutika Pahuja
Review: Absolutely loved the food, the variety as well as the hospitality.  We had a variety of coffees (my personal favourite- the frozen coffees), Lemongrass chicken, bun cha as well as the pizzas. Loved it ❤️ Chris had not just a taste in food but also a humour that we very well enjoyed as our first encounter at Hanoi.

Name: Puku Cafe & Bar
Author: Alain Chartrand
Review:
Personally I’m not a fan of Asian food, after a week of Asian food this place “ brought me back to life “ amazing western food! Eggs, Benedict, English breakfast, bangers and mash and the most amazing bacon in Asia, good fast service, English service and the only place that has macchiato coffee. 10 out 10 for sure!

Even if you aren’t a fan of sports, it’s still worth coming here for the food.

Name: Puku Cafe & Bar
Author: Freja Tousgaard Andersen
Review: Came here for lunch, got the chicken burger - extremely chewy and I was afraid it might not have been cooked properly. Didn’t finish it. Ordered a tea with milk - the milk was spoiled and left the tea clumpy and disgusting - see pictures. The frozen cookie milkshake was good, their cakes are plain. Overall not very great experience and would not come back or recommend. Nice music though.

Name: Puku Cafe & Bar
Author: David McCabe
Review: Absolutely amazing staff. Super friendly.  Food was delicious too. Great energy. Place to be. Chris is a legend !! Troung is a great guy. Keep an eye out for this place. Coldest  beers around too.

Name: Puku Cafe & Bar
Author: Shoelace19
Review: I ordered from Puku for the first time. I was excited about it as it had a good range of expat food. But when it arrived I was nothing but disappointed. The pictures were not what arrived. I ordered the tacos and made my preference of beef. The photos showed three tacos with a crispy shell with all the lettuce tomatoes and cheese. I got a single flour taco with only beef and corn inside. I thought maybe it was a build your own taco but the sides were the salad that comes with it with balsamic vinegarette all over. One cheese for both dishes and one sour cream for the fajita. My other order was a the chicken fajitas. I was expecting what that is but it is an Asian stir-fry with 2 thin flour tortillas. I feel scammed. The salsa was weirdly oily and the taste like ketchup. I don't think I will order from here again. Big let down.

Name: Baffi - Coffee & Bistro
Address: S09 - Park 3, Park Hill, Khu đô thị Times City
Author: Aisle-n Feigth
Review: I like the ambiance, but their customer service is really slow. They have a lot staff and inly a few customers at that time but they're too slow to serve our ordered coffee. We waited for 15 minutes... just for a coffee.

Name: Baffi - Coffee & Bistro
Address: S09 - Park 3, Park Hill, Khu đô thị Times City
Author: Alyssa Meyer Lai
Review: Cute cafe but the location is incorrect. Having to wander around for 20 minutes trying to find it actually ruined the experience once I got there unfortunately.

Name: Baffi - Coffee & Bistro
Address: S09 - Park 3, Park Hill, Khu đô thị Times City
Author: Bảo Trân Lâm
Review: Say hi!!!😝

Name: Baffi - Coffee & Bistro
Address: S09 - Park 3, Park Hill, Khu đô thị Times City
Author: Phạm Dương
Review: Last night, I went to a cafe at the shop and met an employee I've never met anywhere 🥹 Today I went with my family and had no change and no transfer money. My bill was 315k and I gave him a 500k bill and the employee said he didn't have money to return it. I also said I didn't have real money or change and gave him an extra 5k to pay for even money. She received my 500k bill and said, "I'll take this money out, exchange it and pay you," so I said, "Oh, you're a new employee, right?" I often drink here and other employees will exchange money and send it back to me. This is the first time I meet an employee like you.” She was upset and had an attitude when she called someone and then told me she was going to exchange money. I went up to the 2nd floor and thought I would skip it and pretend it was okay. While carrying the water, she put the cake and water on the table with a thud, then placed a stack of 1k, 2k change and told me, "Are you counting enough? We can only exchange this money." Below is a photo of the change she sent me, everyone stay away🥰

Name: Baffi - Coffee & Bistro
Address: S09 - Park 3, Park Hill, Khu đô thị Times City
Author: Alex Nguyen Thang Long
Review: The shop is beautiful and spacious with a bit of Retro style. The shop has 3 glass windows looking out so the view is beautiful. There are high chairs for those who like to sit and work on laptops and sofas for those who like to relax comfortably.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Philippe Fritsch
Review: Nice coffee in a good atmosphere.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Lassie Celita Forbes
Review: Big portions. Quiet place. Very accommodating staff.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Nicky
Review: Very bad food

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Anh Dang
Review: Personally, I don't think Milk Tea is delicious, it's like drinking rice water + tea, and the matcha frosting is very sweet, like powdered.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: phương lê
Review: Delicious food - good service - the owner is 60 but looks like an 18 year old girl🥰🥰

Name: The Hanoi Social Club
Author: Hailee
Review:
LOVEEEE the vibes here! Their unique decor and music create an unmatched kind of ambience. We had the French toast and some snacks for breakfast, coupled with some tea. It was delicious and well-served. Extra points for the staff: very polite and friendly at the same time.
Would definitely recommend for any of my friends looking for a cool place to chill and appreciate the beauty of Hanoi in the middle of the Old Quarters.

Name: The Hanoi Social Club
Author: BCL ADRIAN
Review: This is one of the best places to eat in Hanoi if you  want to eat food that is European style and vegan friendly. It is worth it to come here and have dinner breakfast or lunch. I would highly recommend you have a dinner here. It is approximately 20 Euro for two main courses and 1 starter a coffee and a water.

Name: The Hanoi Social Club
Author: Louice Fulgentius
Review: This is a cute little gem located in a small alley off the most touristy areas. The place is really soft with art pieces on the wall and bohemic furniture. The staff are really nice and they all speak English. I ordered the poached egg toast which was enough for me to get full and my boyfriend ordered the black bean plate since it was gluten free and vegan. His dish was nice but he missed the zingy cream fraiche which was taken away due to his lactose intolerance. He made it up tho with the flour less chocolate cake, so good. We would recommend anyone to choose one of their versions of Vietnamese coffee, both the ice coffee with condensed milk and the coconut salted coffee was amazing 🤩

Name: The Hanoi Social Club
Author: Katherine Dennison
Review:
Super tasty brunch spot. Lots of options as well as great coffee - I got an oat flat white which was a needed taste of home.

The waiters are really attentive and the service is super quick.

Name: The Hanoi Social Club
Author: Lurdes Vicente
Review: Hanoi Social Club is the perfect spot to enjoy Western food with a little vietnamese twist. The menu offers plenty of options, from breakfast to lunch and dinner. You can enjoy avocado on toast, yoghurt with granola, French toast, pancakes, all kinds of coffee, as well as sandwiches, pasta, burgers, or salads They also offer a list of drinks, including wine, beer, cocktails, and soft drinks. I went there with my husband for dinner, and we tried Hoanh Thanh (central vietnamese spicy salsa chips with Coriander and parsley). I also had the tofu sandwich and my husband the beef burger. In general, everything was quite nice. Bear in mind, there are vegetarian and vegan options available as well. The service was very good, staff kept tables super clean at all times, double-checked with us the order, and even left us a table game while we awaited for the food. I think that was cool. The atmosphere is super cosy, and warm lights allow you to enjoy a casual dinner. It's definitely a place to go if you feel like unwinding. Obviously, the price is much higher than local restaurants, but as a one soft, I think it is worthy.

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Pui Cheng Lum
Review:
The staffs can't exactly speak English but sign languages help. Head up to 5th floor for the natural air roof top. It might get a bit hot depends on the time u are there. If the sun isn't exactly strong, it is a nice place to admire The lake.

Here doesn't serve hot/main course. U can only get fishballs, sunflowers and some beef jerky. The rest are beverages

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Lenka Matejovicova
Review:
We stopped here for evening drinks after a long day (caramel milk and cinnamon tea, we loved both!) and we really enjoyed the quiet terrace with lovely view and the peaceful atmosphere. The lady is very nice and she speaks English well enough to deliver perfect service.
The prices seem very fair too, it is no tourist trap (you can check the menu in English with clear prices before you come in).

The one-star reviews seem to be some trolls trying to bring this place down with bad rating, it deserves more than 4 stars on average in my opinion.

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Irene Rizzo
Review: We had a wonderful time at this café. It is not a tourist trap and it has a lovely view from the 5th floor. It is run by a very kind and attentive Vietnamese woman, and the staff is polite. We spent some time sipping our delicious coffees, and then had a chance to converse with her about how typical Vietnamese coffee is made. So far, the best human experience we had in Vietnam at a local cafeteria. Really recommended!

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Rey
Review: Beautifull spot. Clear menu in english with prices. There is some construction going on in the front of the building, so you have to go behind that.

Name: Aubergine cafe Restaurant
Address: 16 P. Hàng Bè, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Isabel Schrepfer
Review: Very friendly staff who spoke a very good English. Food was tasty and well priced as well. Loved the fresh vegetarian spring rolls, papaya salad and the eggplant with garlic. Also worth a try are the fried eggplants in sesame and the caramelized tofu with lemongrass.

Name: Aubergine cafe Restaurant
Address: 16 P. Hàng Bè, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Johan Böhlin
Review: Had a nice tofu in tomato sauce here with excellent taste and real tomato sauce, not just sweet and sour sauce (which is common in other places). The dish was cooked at time of order as it took some time to get it even when I was the sole customer at this time. Got two hairs in my food, but I did not mention that. Prices are good.

Name: Aubergine cafe Restaurant
Address: 16 P. Hàng Bè, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: ana purna
Review: the people were very nice here. the food was just alright. perhaps we were unlucky ordering dish that were not impressive at all. the Vietnam style crispy chicken was just KFC with sesame — not recommended!

Name: Aubergine cafe Restaurant
Address: 16 P. Hàng Bè, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Adam Traveler
Review: Excellent food, reasonable prices, about 65-120k VND for most dishes.  I had their signature dish of roasted eggplant with chiles.  It is kind of a Vietnamese fusion place.  I recommend going there!

Name: Aubergine cafe Restaurant
Address: 16 P. Hàng Bè, Phố cổ Hà Nội
Author: Christel Garcia
Review:
Lovely service and lovely food. We had fried vegetable spring rolls, tofu noodles and beef noodles. Everything was beautiful!
Well located also.

Address: 4 ngách 5/38 Ng. 5 P. Từ Hoa, Quảng An

Review:
It’s a nice spot to chill, relax, and watch the madness of Hanoi pass you by.  Prices are a bit higher than what’s normal in Hanoi, but I suppose ya gotta pay a little extra for the cool view. Definitely worth checking out though and at least having a beer.

@nothin_but_views

Name: City View Cafe
Address: 4 ngách 5/38 Ng. 5 P. Từ Hoa, Quảng An
Author: Andrew Hoang
Review: Ideal for a drink or an ice cream. A good selection of Vietnamese desserts. Stunning panoramic views of the lake and City. Service is a bit slow and food is not the best nonetheless a very relaxing way to shelter from the afternoon and evening stuffiness of Hanoi and hangout with friends over a cool drink or Vietnamese ice coffee.  Extra marks for the beautiful view.

Name: City View Cafe
Address: 4 ngách 5/38 Ng. 5 P. Từ Hoa, Quảng An
Author: Longha Seng
Review: best neighborhood to experience your nightlife in Hanoi

Name: City View Cafe
Address: 4 ngách 5/38 Ng. 5 P. Từ Hoa, Quảng An
Author: Hon Du Muc
Review: The only good thing you can say about this place is that it largely does what it says in the tin: you get a view. That's it. It is absolutely coasting on that. Nothing else about it is remarkable or even remotely good. Go if it is the only one with the angle you're looking for, but several other establishments have equally nice views and far better product. Pick almost any of them.

Name: Lotus Blanc Cafe Restaurant
Address: 8 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Elina Rindle
Review: Very charming, little café in the old quarter. We ordered a coffee and a coconut smoothie and sat on the balcony on the second floor from where we had a beautiful view on the rustle and bustle of the streets. Very great experience and they even accepted card which was a plus!

Name: Lotus Blanc Cafe Restaurant

Various coffees' selection.

Not able to understand special request.

Name: Hien Minh Tea House
Address: No. 13 P. Ngô Tất Tố, Văn Miếu
Author: Emilia Nieminen
Review:
On our first visit I gave the place a glowing 5 star review. Coming back we encountered a hostile and rude staff member taking a break. She took one of the kittens feeding off the mother cats breast, hit it twice and then sat next to us watching loud videos. We asked her to please stop as we came to enjoy the tranquility of tea ceremony, but she continued even after another staff member asked her not to. It was like she was being purposefully obnoxious: showing us the soles of her feet ( I read this gesture is very rude in Vietnam) and cracking her bare toes loudly. Completely ruined our experience. I wanted to come back every day next week, but now I don't want to come again. Just horribly rude and who hits a kitten?!

My original review:
"Beautiful and tranquil haven. Exquisite selection of tea , elegant service and super cute family of cats. If you are in Hanoi you cannot miss this treasure! It should have a Michelin star. I'm only here for two weeks but I think I need to come back many times to try more tea. Today we tried Full Moon white tea and Puer vintage 1994. Both were lovely, different and could be refilled 8-10 times (they will give you a thermos and fill it regularly). Perfect place for journaling, working on a laptop or just enjoying the tranquil atmosphere and music. Perfection!"

Name: Hien Minh Tea House
Address: No. 13 P. Ngô Tất Tố, Văn Miếu
Author: Farid Hamka
Review: An oasis of a teahouse. The interior and the donation directly makes anyone who enter quickly shift to a zen mode. The kind shopkeepers were helpful in choosing teas based on the season and our preferences. Recommending this place for a nice respite, perhaps around the time you visit the Van Mieu Temple of Literature.

Name: Hien Minh Tea House
Address: No. 13 P. Ngô Tất Tố, Văn Miếu
Author: Canan Üstündağ Ayçiçek
Review: I feel so lucky to find such a heavenly place and have the opportunity to taste their special tea selection. We visited this tea house in the morning after visiting the temple of literature in an extremely hot weather. We came from sa pa with night train in that morning with our backpacks and needed a relaxation moment so badly. Indoor area was so cosy with floor cushion seats and low tables, it was cool with fans. We had special lotus green tea, it has a dreamy delicate taste. And black aged tea has a earthy full bodied taste. She prepared tea with care and explained so well, she was so kind. Garden is so peaceful with all plants, decorations, pond with acuarium fishes and a lovely cat. There was no one except us and we had the opportunity to chill on our own enjoy the teas with more pour over for a long time. We bought some lotus tea while we leave and I can’t wait to prepare tea ceremonies at home too. It was such an exquisite experience, I recommend for the ones looking for a runaway from chaotic city center.

Name: Hien Minh Tea House
Address: No. 13 P. Ngô Tất Tố, Văn Miếu
Author: Lan-Elise Hoang
Review:
As a tea enthusiast, I love to see places like this tea house which are very rare. The selection of tea and teawares is great and the people there seem to be very passionate.
We only went there for a break in the morning and it was very peaceful. If I get the chance, I'd like to return there and buy some tea or teaware!

Name: Hien Minh Tea House
Address: No. 13 P. Ngô Tất Tố, Văn Miếu
Author: Johnathan MacDonald
Review: Without a doubt one of the best things I did. To experience this tea ceremony and get history and all the information was outstanding. My host had very good conversational english. You must do this.

Name: Thưởng Trà Quán
Address: nhà tập thể, 2E P. Tông Đản, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Michael Marousek
Review: You know that the place is worth the effort you need to put into finding it…IT REALLY IS worth the effort though. Such a peaceful oasis in the heart of the bustling Hanoi. Knowledgeable and kind staff, phenomenal selection of teas, individualized approach! One of my best memories from Hanoi!!

Name: Thưởng Trà Quán
Address: nhà tập thể, 2E P. Tông Đản, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Nguyen Nhi
Review: 4 stars for the staff quality and atmosphere. Minus 1 because the tea isn’t my type but it’s a decent change. Finished 3 pots of tea and the staff started to ask if i’m okay so i’m quite impressed. I might take a friend here next time if i want to hang out but i don’t think i’ll visit here if i just want tea

Name: Thưởng Trà Quán
Address: nhà tập thể, 2E P. Tông Đản, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Desireé L.
Review: An incredible hidden gem in Hà Nội if you like tea. A lovely beautiful well curated space. Very hidden with no sign posting. A retreat from the hustle and bustle of the city. Can’t wait to be back. Be mindful smoking is allowed inside which may disturb some patrons.

Name: Thưởng Trà Quán
Address: nhà tập thể, 2E P. Tông Đản, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Thuha Ng
Review: Feeling disappointed to visit that Vietnamese tea shop although I have already seen many positive reviews about this place. Tea taste is not notable or flavorful at all, just like other normal tea shops somewhere. They don’t provide any menu and price is really expensive, roughly vnd 300k for two pots of tea. White Crane tea is considered one of the best kind of tea there but it just like a dried Northern tea on Thai Nguyen hills. The Com cake is quite bad since it is not fine or smooth. The positive points are a friendly staff and a quite cozy place.

Name: Thưởng Trà Quán
Address: nhà tập thể, 2E P. Tông Đản, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Tanya Matyushenko
Review: This tea house is fantastic! They have a wide variety of Vietnamese, Chinese, and Japanese teas. The teaware is beautiful and high quality. The music and atmosphere are perfect for relaxing. Highly recommend!
