Review: We had a vietnamese coffee and a cappuccino. Everything was delicious and the outdoor sitting is beautiful and relaxing. The staff is very nice, we will definitely come back

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: M.A. C.
Review: It used to be a very quiet cafe situated on the side road of Vo Chi Cong street. Today there are more crowds after the opening of Lotte Mall nearby. Their espresso machine has been down for a while...

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Viet Truong Quoc
Review: Good location for coffee, parking free

Name: Level Café & Coworking
Address: 104 - D5D Đ. Võ Chí Công, Vườn Đào, Khu biệt thự
Author: Hải Hói
Review: I’ve tried many coffees in town and I have to say drop coffee is way better than big company coffee shops . Highly recommend!

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ
Author: phuong phung
Review: Whether you're looking to kickstart your morning or unwind in the afternoon, this charming spot is a must-visit for anyone seeking a unique artsy coffee shop experience. Love it!

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ
Author: Mai Tran Thanh
Review: My favorite specialty coffee shop in Hanoi! I love how detailed and heartful work the owner put into the arts, decoration, and drinks. I always enjoy coming here for a special treat and a good time guaranteed. Highly recommended!

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ
Author: Thao Nhi Nguyen Da
Review: Good drinks, great atmosphere, staffs are nice, cool paintings, love the furniture and decorations. 🥰🥰

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ
Author: Kim Chi Nguyễn
Review:
Nice place to boost your morning energy💪🏻

Must-try coldbrew kitkat here!!! Great coffee, nice staff and chill vibe ✨💯

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ
Author: Pepper Poppins
Review: Nice place in a decent alley!!! Staffs are kind and easy going!

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Ngo To Uyen
Review:
🌿 I went to the familiar place opposite The Wiseland Coffee but it was a bit crowded at noon so I ordered a drink and went to this ST to sit. I've been to Wiseland many times but this time I just came here to sit. The space here is very quiet, very suitable for working, super focused. This side looks mainly at books about history, politics, country, Party of all kinds, while Wiseland looks at children's books, personal development...
🌿 The drink is so delicious. Wiseland staff will bring it to your seat. I often drink orange-mango hibicus tea 😁 A cup of mine costs 49k, a reasonable price compared to this area.
This is the best working + reading shop I've ever known.

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Lam Tran
Review: Quiet and comfortable space for reading

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Khánh Trà Lê
Review: Great for reading and reflecting

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Phạm Minh Tuấn Giám đốc

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Larry Nguyen

Name: Gossip Coffee cs6
Address: 57b P. Phạm Hồng Thái, Trúc Bạch
Author: Olha Burlai
Review: I tried coconut coffee and regular americano. Both were good. I also liked the atmosphere and design. Service was good.

Name: Gossip Coffee cs6
Address: 57b P. Phạm Hồng Thái, Trúc Bạch
Author: Nicolehrm
Review: Wonderful service and kindly helped with some delicious coffee.

Name: Gossip Coffee cs6
Address: 57b P. Phạm Hồng Thái, Trúc Bạch
Author: Hieu Truong
Review: Thank you for taking me to such a great coffee shop!  I had a wonderful time with you here.

Name: Gossip Coffee cs6
Address: 57b P. Phạm Hồng Thái, Trúc Bạch
Author: Martijn Bos
Review: Great cafe! Cosy and comfortable atmosphere and friendly staff. The menu is relatively cheap compared to similar places. Just a great coffee shop to chill for a bit.

Name: Gossip Coffee cs6
Address: 57b P. Phạm Hồng Thái, Trúc Bạch
Author: Mindy Borchardt
Review: Lovely little coffee shop next to  the Babylon hotel, nice decor and very friendly service.

Name: Carina Coffee
Author: Carl Freeborn
Review: Stopped off en route to B52 lake and museum. Had a coconut coffee and really enjoyed it. Staffs English is limited (better than my Vietnamese) but we all managed. WiFi is available and nothing beats sitting outside in a non tourist street watching the everyday lives of Vietnamese people going about their daily lives, especially the poor builders across the road.

Name: Carina Coffee
Author: Ngô Vân Trang
Review: Best drink in town. Cozy & warm vibes. Super friendly & nice staff. Highly recommend.

Name: Carina Coffee
Author: J. S.M. (Facemelter66)
Review: Friendly service, great coffee, what’s not to love?

Name: Carina Coffee
Author: Jan
Review: A cozy café with a friendly vibe, and very tasty coffee and juices. I recommend their bặc xỉu and mango smoothie.

Name: Carina Coffee
Author: NBLâm HMUPH
Review: I think they gonna close down soon so be hurry 🙂

Name: Extra Shot Please Coffee Bar
Address: 16 Ng. 99 P. Lê Hồng Phong, Điện Biên
Author: Marina Nguyen
Review: this place is filled with professional and very welcoming staff that are willing to tell you and help you to choose your drink. I like their red cold brew. Matcha with berries cordial was pleasant too.

Name: Extra Shot Please Coffee Bar
Address: 16 Ng. 99 P. Lê Hồng Phong, Điện Biên
Author: Dao Do Anh
Review: A super cute coffee shop with modern decor and amazing lighting, perfect for capturing your photos. The most impressive thing about coming here is the dedication of the staff. They greet you right from the door, give drink recommendations, and chat with you to improve service quality. Absolutely wonderful – I will definitely support this place in the future.

Name: Extra Shot Please Coffee Bar
Address: 16 Ng. 99 P. Lê Hồng Phong, Điện Biên
Author: Hà Trang Nguyễn
Review: Super cozy and comfortable setting; the drinks are great too; really love the vibe here and may stop by occasionally

Name: Extra Shot Please Coffee Bar
Address: 16 Ng. 99 P. Lê Hồng Phong, Điện Biên
Author: Adrian Ho
Review: Awesome cappuccino, the taste of coffee is so, so good 👍🏻 Atmosphere is nice and cozy and there is air-con too. Don't miss it on this place.

Name: Extra Shot Please Coffee Bar
Address: 16 Ng. 99 P. Lê Hồng Phong, Điện Biên
Author: Huy Cao
Review:
I recently discovered this hidden gem nestled in a quiet alley, away from the bustling streets. The café is surrounded by a high-class residential area, making it a peaceful retreat for anyone looking to unwind. The space is airy and cool, with the option to sit either indoors or outdoors—both offering a chill vibe perfect for relaxing.

The staff here are not only friendly and attentive but also knowledgeable about coffee, which adds to the overall experience. The drinks are excellent, and it’s clear that the café has invested in top-notch brewing equipment to ensure quality in every cup.

The ambiance is enhanced by soft lighting, which creates a beautiful setting for taking photos. They even have bean bags, which is a huge plus for someone like me who struggles with back pain.

One of the biggest highlights for me, though, is how incredibly clean and fragrant the restroom is. It might seem like a minor detail, but for me, a clean bathroom is a significant factor in judging any food or drink establishment.

Overall, this café ticks all the boxes and is definitely worth a visit!

Name: Aftertaste Coffee Lab
Address: 168 Thảo Nguyên, Khu đô thị Ecopark
Author: Jay Neween
Review:
I must say.
The place itself is a joy to come into and sit down and take in atmosphere. The atmosphere is great with lots of seating options.
The food was delicious, generous servings and impeccable coffee.
Would definitely be back again whenever back to Viet.

Name: Aftertaste Coffee Lab
Address: 168 Thảo Nguyên, Khu đô thị Ecopark
Author: Lua Pu Luong
Review: Attentive and friendly staffs. The atmosphere is great and of course good coffee!

Name: Aftertaste Coffee Lab
Address: 168 Thảo Nguyên, Khu đô thị Ecopark
Author: An Hoe
Review: Nice coffee place with better quality coffee beans compared to other places in this area. Reasonable prices for drink quality but their croissant is just too bad. Simply comfy vibes for chilling.

Name: Aftertaste Coffee Lab
Address: 168 Thảo Nguyên, Khu đô thị Ecopark
Author: Khánh Linh Võ
Review: Lovely place, nice atmosphere with meticulously decorated space that feels personal, and with style. The coffee shop roast their own beans. Had a delicious Colombian Pink Bourbon cup with good price.

Name: Aftertaste Coffee Lab
Address: 168 Thảo Nguyên, Khu đô thị Ecopark
Author: Le Hoang Lam
Review: A must-try coffee shop even if you aren’t into coffee!

Name: Eggyolk Coffee
Author: Thế Anh Bùi
Review: The first time i travel here, the decor look very warm and simple! Water is enough, cake is better, i had tell bartender not put to many ice but they still put in but anw still okey with me

Name: Eggyolk Coffee
Author: Uyên Nguyễn
Review: Had amazing brunch with my favorite salted coffee and some amazing croissants. The crunchiness of the dough dipped in rich creamy salty foam truly a blessing. Highly recommended

Name: Eggyolk Coffee
Author: Hoang Nguyen
Review: I had got to try the egg matcha version of the egg coffee. Very smooth and the matcha is very good. Hope they will stay like that. The good matcha quality is very important ;)

Name: Eggyolk Coffee
Author: Phuong Cao
Review: Good drink and cake. Nice place to take a rest.

Name: Eggyolk Coffee
Author: Vy Kun
Review: Nice location for Ecopark citizen, has a great view over the lake, you can stay outside which has many tables and chill. The atmosphere was very great, impressed with the decorations of the coffee shop. However, the drinks and cakes was not interesting, EggYolk need an improvement in the drinks and cakes, it tasted so bad.

Name: Trung Nguyên E-Coffee
Address: Nhà CT3A KĐT Mễ Trì Thượng, ĐL Thăng Long, Mễ Trì
Author: Game Guy
Review: Good services i like 😁🤙

Name: Trung Nguyên E-Coffee
Address: Nhà CT3A KĐT Mễ Trì Thượng, ĐL Thăng Long, Mễ Trì
Author: Duy Trần
Review:
The 2 owners are easy-going and friendly.
The restaurant space is clean and fragrant. Location right on Thang Long Avenue.
There is not only coffee here, but in the morning there are also various types of vermicelli and pho that change day to day, with an average price ranging from 40-45k depending on the type of vermicelli. In my opinion, the noodles taste like home-made, so it's quite light and not rich in spices like in the restaurants, so it's quite reassuring.
If you don't like noodles, you can have bread or dumplings.
When eating, you will also be served free water.

Name: Trung Nguyên E-Coffee
Address: Nhà CT3A KĐT Mễ Trì Thượng, ĐL Thăng Long, Mễ Trì
Author: Tuyền Phạm
Review:
Friendly restaurant
Many delicious cakes. Coffee is fine too
For comfortable parking.
There is lunch depending on the day

Name: Trung Nguyên E-Coffee
Address: Nhà CT3A KĐT Mễ Trì Thượng, ĐL Thăng Long, Mễ Trì
Author: Tùng Phương Vũ
Review: Great quality, clean space, a comfortable place to stop by and sit

Name: Trung Nguyên E-Coffee
Address: Nhà CT3A KĐT Mễ Trì Thượng, ĐL Thăng Long, Mễ Trì
Author: Trần Duy Khánh
Review: The signature coffee here is so great

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Octavia Jubilee
Review: One of my favorite coffee shops in Hanoi. The coffee is made well and the owner is very kind! This cafe is located on a quieter street and it’s a great place to relax :)

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Mavis Chuah
Review:
A hidden gem at the corner of small alley. This cafe only serve coffee (no food). They drip the authentic Vietnamese coffee for the serving.  We tried yoghurt coffee (which is amazing, mixing both of my favourite together) and a hot coffee (taste like espresso with condensed milk) - we love both!

Location - decent
Price - good (30-40k dong per drink with decent portion)
Staff - friendly
Cleanliness - great
Coffee - unassuming great coffee

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Jolene Chua
Review:
Nice small coffeeshop that serves drinks only. Love their coffee with ice blended coconut, absolutely refreshing on a warm day.
Drinks are affordable priced and you can sit facing the small road to see vehicles go by.

Service is pretty quick 👍

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Juan Carlos Silva
Review: Excellent place to have an egg coffee, coconut coffee, smoothies, everything was great !! The guy is so nice! Received us with a glass of cold tea! One of the best coffee spots we visited in Hanoi

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: 박준형
Review: Nice place to take a break.. when you want to put yourself a little far away from noise of motorbike. The owner always hosted me with great smile and hospitality. My son was crezy at coconut coffee!!

Name: Ký Coffee Books
Address: Tầng 1 TT2 B06, Khu đô thị Văn Quán
Author: Nothing
Review: Nice

Name: Ký Coffee Books
Address: Tầng 1 TT2 B06, Khu đô thị Văn Quán
Author: King Bēe
Review: Peaceful space

Name: Ký Coffee Books
Address: Tầng 1 TT2 B06, Khu đô thị Văn Quán
Author: Hoang Nguyen
Review: Free drinks :v

Name: Ký Coffee Books
Address: Tầng 1 TT2 B06, Khu đô thị Văn Quán
Author: Hoàng Lê Huy
Review: The shop is full of handsome guys :)

Name: Ký Coffee Books
Address: Tầng 1 TT2 B06, Khu đô thị Văn Quán
Author: giavinh lê
Review: Great

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Tim
Review: You can sit here on the balcony enjoy your well made Coffe, Juice oder Tea, while watching other tourists struggle in the traffic jungle, wonderful. 😉 the only downside, but i guess thats common in the country, the toilet is behind the counter and not the cleanest. The entrance is Hidden, but its worth the search.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: shel tay
Review:
a hidden cafe thru a small tiny alley
the lady boss is super friendly
Although she couldn't communicate English well but she took the effort used the Google translate to answer our curiousity of the fingered citron & her homemade fermented fruit wine

The egg coffee is superb, as well the ice  salt coffee is so nice
Nice view to watch the busy traffic from the balcony. Simple yet enjoy the drink & view.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Low Sinhui
Review: Found this cafe by chance and I love how -mysterious- the entrance is (think small alley + rustic stairs). Ordered a Salted Coffee to try and it tastes very interesting (because salty). Great cafe spot to chill and observe the traffic at the intersection. Would recommend it as a resting stop for anyone who feels tired from walking 🙃

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Diana Cardenas
Review: amazing hidden coffee shop with a view at the local market atmosphere outside! very friendly staff and the entrance was quite an adventure! recommended 100% after visiting the market or for a quick quality coffee in between.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Y Nhi Dang
Review: Spent our afternoons enjoying coffee and watching the busy quarter here. The drinks are tasty and the atmosphere is, to us, very typical of Ha Noi

Name: Vườn Nắng Coffee & Tea
Address: 65 P. Nguyễn Hy Quang, Chợ Dừa
Author: long quang
Review: Enjoy the very Vietnamese coffee espresso with the rooftop view of Hanoi. Lovely atmosphere, warm and peaceful at any time of the day.

Name: Vườn Nắng Coffee & Tea
Address: 65 P. Nguyễn Hy Quang, Chợ Dừa
Author: Thảo Nguyễn
Review: Nice and peaceful place. At 9th floor with good city and sky view

Name: Vườn Nắng Coffee & Tea
Address: 65 P. Nguyễn Hy Quang, Chợ Dừa
Author: Linh Bui
Review: Ohhh, I love beverage menu here.. All is delicious, specially the creamy coffee.. Enjoying coffee while working is the most comfortable experience..

Name: Vườn Nắng Coffee & Tea
Address: 65 P. Nguyễn Hy Quang, Chợ Dừa
Author: TRỊNH THỊ THÔNG
Review: The first time we visited, the shop was so beautiful, the owner was enthusiastic and friendly. Even though the shop was closed, the owner still opened the shop for us to come in, the drinks were beautiful and delicious, I promise to come back many times 🥰 the space is very chill. Anyway, bth doesn't rate any restaurant, but this restaurant has to be rated 🤣

Name: Vườn Nắng Coffee & Tea
Address: 65 P. Nguyễn Hy Quang, Chợ Dừa
Author: HN02 Lô Thị Ánh Tuyết
Review: The shop is located on the 9th floor of a building, lovely and clean, with gentle and pleasant music. We arrived at an empty hour so we really liked it because it was quiet. I drank coconut water with pandan leaves or something, it was delicious and refreshing. Overall, I am very satisfied with this experience. Prefer.

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Paula Collazo
Review: My favorite lil cafe in the area! Beautiful area and decor, super yummy drinks and very kind and friendly staff 🥰 I go here at least once a week! I always get their delicious egg coffee or the guava and strawberry tea- both are amazing!

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Sofia Ng.
Review: Nice atmosphere, but drinks not so good...

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Harry explores the world
Review: Nice experiences

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Mr Tuan ANH
Review: Ok

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Trang
Review:
Also chill
The other day I ordered a cup of cocoa, and when I drank it, my throat felt a bit dry
Suggestion is that the shop should have a glass of filtered water or light tea for customers

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Ai B
Review:
I was looking for an open coffee shop in Hanoi during Typhoon Yagi and google maps led me to this lovely coffee place. It was such a lovely surprise when I saw they have this adorable cat! The coffee was great I ended up buying 3 cups 🤭 the couple manning the shop are also nice.
They gave me a free bag of cookies! They speak and understand english well so it wasn't hard for me to communicate.
The place is artsy and cozy. I recommend you visit this coffee place and have a chill/good vibes.
I Will definitely recommend this shop. Will come back soon too.

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Shaurya Panpalia 5-Year IDD Materials Science and Technology
Review: Hands down the best coffee shop we went to in the whole Vietnam. The owner is very sweet, the atmosphere is very cute and also the music. The coffee is also the best coffee I might have had in my entire life

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Shirly Cheng
Review: Just passing by and noticed the interior was quite cool. Had Egg coffee, Tiny Dot and the banana cake. The cake was amazing - would have ordered another serving if I haven’t had lunch. The cat was sooooo cute 😍😍😍

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: mario vegas
Review: Near the street, egg coffee is great.. the girl who served us, was pretty, looks like famous artist in my country..  your smile so sweet.. also the cat is cute.. good coffee shop.. will back again if I had chance..

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Agustina Poblete
Review: Perfect coffeeshop for a cozy atmosphere, good music also! Perfect for reading and spending a chill morning. Cat is so cute 🥹

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Long Nguyen
Review:
Solid cafe served by really friendly staff! The place is also clean and cozy. I ordered an iced Americano here expecting an average cup, but their drink delivered a real kick. Will be back for more!
Edit: "salted coffee" (cà phê muối) is good too!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Amy
Review: Lovely little cafe, the gentleman who served us was very friendly. We had coconut coffees and a butterfly pea lemonade, all of which were delicious!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Dan Cerf
Review: Outstanding coffee with a nice outside table/chairs (at regular height!) and great service to boot!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: laga luga
Review: Coffee was so good I finished it before taking the pic. Highly recommended!!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Sokratis Papaloukas
Review: Cool drinks, clean and nice environment

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: fama safan
Review:
I would like to extend my sincere gratitude to the CEO of Kafela Coffee for the kind invitation. My experience at Kafela Coffee was truly exceptional. The ambiance was warm and welcoming, and the staff was incredibly attentive and friendly. The coffee itself was outstanding, rich in flavor and perfectly brewed.

The atmosphere made it an ideal place for both relaxation and work. I highly recommend Kafela Coffee to anyone looking for a great coffee experience. It’s a place I will definitely be visiting more often. 5/5 stars!

Thank you once again for the wonderful experience.

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: LinYan
Review:
A great place to focus on your study or reading book ,staff behavior is really good
And I discovered they roast coffee beans by themselves which surprised me
Even though they didn't have any special menu or recommendation , but I enjoyed my time over there
Looking forward to visit this place once more
Need to note that pets are not allowed

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: C Cutler
Review: Tucked away in a quiet neighborhood this small cafe offers a variety freshly roasted coffee beans, specialty coffee and juice drinks along with a few treats. Upstairs is a good meeting space for a few friends or larger party.

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: Selina Vu
Review: It’s a lovely coffee, the price is affordable. It’s like a hidden cafe so would recommend it for everyone

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: Tatiana Didukh
Review: Tucked away European-style place with highly accommodating people working there, very quiet🙌

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Adam Fente
Review: Decent iced americano, service was a bit slow and no pastries. Coffee itself was decent, but the balcony was very nice for the street view.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Hạnh Bùi Thị Mỹ
Review: Good drinks with affordable prices, not too expensive. The interior is quite chill with comfortable seats, nice arts and an amazing aquarium. However, the AC doesn’t seem to be working properly, it’s not too hot but not as cool as my liking. The bookshelf is kinda messy

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Sabrina C
Review: Waited 30 minutes for 2 drinks. Had to go down and ask where the drinks were and 3 members of staff were just standing around doing nothing and hadn’t even started preparing them. There was no apology issued I was just told it would be 5 minutes. If I hadn’t already paid I would have left for sure as it was not cheap either! My lychee tea was nice but my partner ordered a mango smoothie and got some sort of mango desert/ice cream with cream on top which was a far cry from the healthy drink he thought he was ordering. The seating balcony area was nice so adding a star for this. I would not return.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: John Dean
Review:
Two story cafe with a lot of seating options. Besides the drinks they also serve pastries.
Peach tea was refreshing and good size for the prize.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Karim Ghomari
Review: Their are a few aquariums laid around this cafe. One aquariums tank filled with maybe a hundred fish each with a different colour of the rainbow, another tank holds a few bigger (what I assume are) fighting fish. Overall the coffee is pretty good, they have all the classic Vietnamese options as well as the classic Italian ones (espresso, latte, etc.) The only food item on the menu is croissants.

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Emma Lim
Review: Khanh is very helpful and personable. He recommends based on what I want and gives a good price for the coffee. Thank you so much!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Central PHX
Review:
Nice small coffee place.
Very attentive sales lady Ngoc.
Excellent  Egg Coffee!
Thank you Ngoc!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Cheryl Benson
Review: Great coffee selection, but get there early as they sometimes run out of cream or yogurt for certain drinks by the afternoon.

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Ella Tsang
Review: Great spot for coffee and beans. The barista Andy is super friendly and helpful, introducing us to all kinds of drinks & beans!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Lai Laura
Review: Coconut coffee is nice and interesting.   I enjoy the environment in the coffee shop as well.

Name: Selena Coffee
Author: Csaba Bundik
Review:
New and clean place, food and coffee are good. Prices are OK, good value for money. Staff is nice, but service is a bit slow. Ly - the manager - speaks all the languages of the world.
Update: they are speeding up now. Good job!

Name: Selena Coffee
Author: jay Kim
Review: recommend to drink "cold brew"!!   Good~

Name: Selena Coffee
Author: Andrea Paolini
Review: Delicious hot back coffee!

Name: Selena Coffee
Author: Dunk Tank
Review: Iced latte was great.

Name: Selena Coffee
Author: Ducc Lee
Review: delicious👍

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Bea Atkinson-Myers
Review: Delightful hidden gem in the old quarter of Hanoi. The chicken bites were tangy and delicious. They play American 1950s and 1960s music. Amazing atmosphere. Little tricky to find, but well worth it.

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Eileen Lui
Review: Wouldn't say the Chicken Bites we had was super wow and it took a long time to arrive. However, the drinks were good. We had the Chamomile with Salted Cream and also a Special Kuzu Powder with Salted Apricot. The ambience though... super cosy and the books are available for your reading pleasure at the outlet. Not for purchase!

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Fernan Mascarinas
Review:
If you are working remotely in Hanoi, this is one of the best places to zone out, drink some tea or coffee, and focus on your work. There are a lot of must try drinks and pastries, but I ordered salty cream chamomile. This place is giving GenZ meets IG inspired library+coffee den which really looks good on photos. You can read books if you're not working, or you may play the piano if you know a piece or two.

The shop is tucked inside and there's an alley that leads to it, so just look for the sign "Tranquil Books & Coffee".

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: nuinsrnui
Review: The cafe is so lovely and cozy. You can chill or work there. The drink menu is also nice. Don't forget to take the photo at the street in front of the cafe too!

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Nimit Naik
Review: You will find tranquility in the Tranquil Books & Coffee! Loved the huge collection of books, the taste of coffee and the calm ambience this cafe offers. If you want a peaceful cafe to work from, then this cafe is the best choice. I highly recommend getting the Hazelnut Coffee! It's my new favourite!

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: razzle raanan
Review: Lovely place, lovely people, lovely drinks. I really enjoyed sitting in this place as my coffee was served with a smile. I would recommend this for coffee or food (which I didn’t have but judging by what I saw seemed great) any day! I had an avocado coffee (on the menu it said buttercream coffee but the man who took my order let me know it was actually avocado and I took it anyway) but only for those who really like avocados, as the taste is very strong. The peach orange lemongrass tea was great as well!

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: Vanessa Miller
Review:
I came here because of the reviews, i just wanted to try their coconut coffee but unfortunately i was really disappointed, i don’t know if the milk was off or what it was but I couldn’t drink it, it was vile 😔 really disappointed on this one,
The cafe itself is really cute and they have a little balcony overlooking the street which is a nice touch, but that’s all I can really say positive on this one.

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: L Leung
Review: Delicious egg coffee at 40K VND, freshly whipped for 5 minutes. Cozy second floor, super clean restroom.

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: Paul
Review:
Delightful indoor/outdoor restaurant on the second floor (accessible only by stairs, no lift/elevator) overlooking a busy street near Old Town.  Not air-conditioned but there are fans enough to keep the air moving comfortably.  Cash & credit card payments.  Some English spoken.

Menu is fairly extensive and features many typical Vietnamese food options as well as a few selections tailored for tourists.  Great drink options - juices, coffees, teas (hot & cold) to help cool you off in the summer or warm you up in the winter  The spring rolls (fresh, not fried) were delicious and served with a traditional ginger & garlic dipping sauce.  Their banh mi was also respectable and the bread was very crispy and fresh.

Definitely a great place to catch your breath before continuing your time in Old Town!

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: Tyler Stewart
Review: Wonderful family owned coffee/restaurant spot with a beautiful view and great coffee. I asked her for some fresh mango so she found her ripest, sweetest one for me. I also ordered a coconut coffee and she sweetened it just the way I described it (medium). Originally, I was going to get takeaway, but two of the family members convinced me to sit upstairs on the balcony. I’ve now been up here for a couple of hours enjoying the scenery.

Name: Wayne’s Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Tung Shing Building 02, P. Ngô Quyền, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Soghomon
Review:
Great place, great people

If you want to be part of the Hanoi in-crowd, and I think you do, then this Wayne’s is the place to be. Not only is the coffee of the outstanding quality we’ve all come to expect from the Swedish coffee chain, but the staff at this particular location is even more attentive and professional than you imagine - always ready with a helping hand or a good laugh, local recommendations and what have you.

Name: Wayne’s Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Tung Shing Building 02, P. Ngô Quyền, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: An Hoe
Review: I like this coffee chain with consistent drink quality, light coffee taste, reasonable price with minimal chairs and tables but comfy enough for sitting and working. This store itself isn't busy and they have a big working table upstairs. But they're better to pay more attention for operations I guess, to arrange chairs and tables and cleaning up. They have such a good location but it looks like no one really cares about it.

Name: Wayne’s Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Tung Shing Building 02, P. Ngô Quyền, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Vinh Nguyen
Review: Bev is abit high compare to other shop in the area. Though they have very nice seating on the 2nd floor (both outdoor & indoor)

Name: Wayne’s Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Tung Shing Building 02, P. Ngô Quyền, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Vicky Cowan
Review:
delicious drinks..coffee and iced fruit juice.
The staff were very genuine and didn't have the fake polish of other coffee places

Name: Wayne’s Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Tung Shing Building 02, P. Ngô Quyền, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: haTrang
Review:
I had a hot latte, which was actually too hot for a standard one. It was the frothed milk that was overdone, resulting in an extra-hot latte that burned my tongue at my first sip. I had to wait for 10 minutes before continuing to drink it. Yet, I must say the bean was really good, sustaining the perfectly mild sweetness of the latte as the drink was getting colder, even at the last sip the sweetness was still there. Overall a very pleasant taste was remained. Of course the latte could have been finer if the milk frothing was done in the right timing.
Prices are quite high compared to the average in Hanoi, given the location.

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Chantelle Drabik
Review:
Cedar Cafe is a delightful little spot perfect for grabbing a coffee and enjoying a relaxed atmosphere. The ambiance is cozy and inviting, making it an ideal place to unwind or catch up with friends.

One of the standout features of Cedar Cafe is the availability of Wi-Fi, with access details conveniently noted right on the tables. This is a great touch for those looking to work remotely or browse while sipping their coffee.

Ordering is a breeze thanks to the QR code system, which streamlines the process and makes it easy to browse their large drinks menu. Whether you're in the mood for a classic espresso or something more adventurous, there’s plenty to choose from.

For those with a sweet tooth, Cedar Cafe offers a selection of pastries to accompany your drink. It’s the perfect way to indulge while enjoying your coffee.

Overall, Cedar Cafe is a charming spot that ticks all the right boxes for a coffee break. I highly recommend stopping by for a relaxing experience!

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Mayumi Leah Millanes
Review: Nice and helpful staff. A good place to unwind from the extreme weather outside. Not cold and not warm either. Just to make ur temperature back to normal. Coffee was good as well complimented with water.

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Srishti Mitra
Review: Wonderful coffee and pastries. Must visit

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Oliver Moore
Review: Urgh I can't tell you how much I loved the serenity of this café. It is so nice, the place is very comfortable and a safe space off the street. The coffee was fantastic and they seem very kind and attentive 💕

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Fatema Baser
Review: Love this place. Staff are friendly, provide good service and recommendations. Place is very calm and open. Most important is their drink is so fresh, tasty, and well presentable

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Ara A.
Review:
Randomly stopped by this café  after having bun cha nearby. We were in the mood for some coffee. This was my official introduction to Vietnamese coffee, and it did not disappoint. The vibe was cozy, the place was well-ventilated (not air conditioned but plenty of fans), and the staff were kind.

Though random, this turned out to be a good choice. A great spot for a relaxing coffee break!

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: John Tango
Review: Mr Zhang(?) was great in explaining how he makes his coffee. I absolutely like the exotic taste of the coconut coffee on ice. Gotta try it once … a totally new experience to regular coffee. Highly recommended. Very good strong coffee with great service.

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: CL Hops
Review: Personally one of my favourite coconut coffees in the Old Quarters, as I have my coffee iced and dairy free. They were able to adjust the proportions to get the right balance of coconut creaminess, coffee fragrance, refreshing slushy texture, yet without the lactose. Hit the right spot for me! Good working spot with decently strong free wifi and a view of the street!

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Shell Klok
Review: The best black coffee that we have in Vietnam, it is so strong and good to wake us up! Great great fresh fruits juice we have carrot juice and grape juice. It is so pity we didnt take any picture of our orders hehe

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Caramela Rose
Review:
A must try! The owner himself makes all the coffee orders and we found out he uses his own blend too. I personally loved his coconut coffee and brown coffee. Tried a lot of coffee shops during our stay and so far, this is one of the best!

It seems to be famous for locals too!

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Anwarul Hakim
Review:
Atelier Coffee, Hanoi
@ateliercoffeevn

Atelier Coffee probably the nearest one you can grab if you are visiting Train Street in Hanoi. You just need to walk about 2-3 mins to reach the cafe from Train Street area which is convenient to plan during your travel.

They serve coffee from Ho Chi Minh city roaster which is mild in acidity, subtle and a bit light in my opinion. Probably due to the fact that some of cafe here still serve single shot espresso based drink.

The cafe is cozy, can be kind of dim environment but the vibes is relaxing, most probably because not too busy during our visit.

Nevertheless, still a great place for good cup of coffee to escape the cold Hanoi winter weather.

IG:@katunx

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Quoc Bao
Review:
Not too much crowd
Coffee: 8/10
Space: 7.5
Service: 8
Toilet: 7

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Alexa
Review: We stopped in here because we saw the sign for egg coffee, and were on a mission to try it for the first time and we were so glad we did! It was definitely the perfect place to sit and enjoy the rich, creamy beverage! The coffee itself was so good and the whole thing was practically a dessert. The staff spoke good English and were sweet enough to answer my questions about the beverage since it was my first time trying it! If you haven't tried it yet, definitely go for it! It's definitely a sipping beverage because it's so rich, so just plan to sit and enjoy it for a while!

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Chi Hong Hwang
Review: Lovely cafe with Japanese minimalist design sensibilities. It's eye catching after you turn off the main road into a smaller side lane. Not much food - buns from 11 am to 2 pm. We had croissant, espresso and a soad drink. Coffee was good. Quiet when no one speaks but speech volume is magnified due to the bare interior.

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: mgblanchard
Review:
Great independent coffee shop run by two young locals who know their stuff about coffee.

Delicious coffees - serves Vietnamese, drip style and Italian/european coffees like cappuccino, lattes etc - the barista is very skilled and clearly enjoys doing the foam art! Has oat milk for extra.

Hot coffee is ‘warm’, but I like it that way as it doesn’t damage the flavour! Thought I’d mention that in case anyone enjoys super-hot or coffee.

Has cool seating, both inside and outside. Lovely place.

Name: Abc Coffee Roasters
Address: 91 P. Đặng Văn Ngữ, Nam Đồng
Author: Cao Son Tung
Review: Good location!!!

Name: Abc Coffee Roasters
Address: 91 P. Đặng Văn Ngữ, Nam Đồng
Author: Mr Fury
Review: The shop has a pretty small space, the coffee is quite delicious, suitable for small groups or a few people, sitting and relaxing with a view of the streets!

Name: Abc Coffee Roasters
Address: 91 P. Đặng Văn Ngữ, Nam Đồng
Author: Yen Bui Hai
Review: Cheap price for 1 cup of coffee machine. The sitting space at the corner of the literary intersection is quite airy

Name: Abc Coffee Roasters
Address: 91 P. Đặng Văn Ngữ, Nam Đồng
Author: Nguyen Anh Dung
Review: Coffee ok, place is a bit small, suitable for groups of 2-3 people in a rustic style.

Name: Abc Coffee Roasters
Address: 91 P. Đặng Văn Ngữ, Nam Đồng
Author: Hai Thinh
Review: Coffee with friends on a beautiful autumn morning, delicious mixed drinks, really pleasant.

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Bradley Stevens
Review:
Great place, great coffee and tea, so many options and all good.
Very nice staff and super friendly, my favorite coffee shop in Hanoi.
Avoid the chains and try this one, you will not be disappointed!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Emma Sim
Review: Sim Coffee is an awesome place to start your day, fantastic coffee and friendly service. Plus, the walls are decorated with interesting art pieces like a gallery 😁 The salted coffee is my favourite. Thanks for having us Travis and team!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: TKC 76
Review: Super nice and friendly owner couple. Strong espresso! Recommended!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Nicolas Kasprzyk
Review: Super chill people always eager to have a chat with you, and the drinks are really good too!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Trịnh Duy Anh
Review: The shop has changed its name, I don't know if it will change owners or not. The older owner is quite agile and hospitable. The cafe is good, the decor is good, there are many paintings. The shop's space has artistic features.

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Ruckasaurus Rex
Review: Amazing service and super nice owner/daughter. Location is great, food and drink were so good, and we would come again!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: L G
Review:
The absolute best cafe in Vietnam Hanoi. My boyfriend and I came every day. The lady and her mother are so friendly. Very accommodating to foreigners as we’re from the UK. Spoke English very well. The food is 10/10. Every I ate, the food tastes so fresh and I never got the runs after eating their food.

Their cocktails are amazing too. Very affordable food and drinks. I even requested for a certain dish that was not on the menu and it tasted so good I had to come back in the evening for seconds!

100% would recommend everyone to come here!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Kianni Blanton
Review: Very sweet lady!! We almost went to another place but she was so cute and nice that I couldn’t say no! This was the best mojito I’ve ever had! Don’t get me started on the spring rolls that sauce was amazing!! When I do come back to Hanoi I will for sure see her again!!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Amelia Reisman
Review: Owner is so nice and friendly clean eating area right by train good view and food was excellent!!

Name: Coffee 40
Author: Stuart Harvey
Review:
Great atmosphere, great food, and the owners are very welcoming and friendly. we had to msg them prior to going to confirm a table and send our photo for confirmation.
the owners are great and like a chat (the translation app came into good use). We had a storm come through, and the train was delayed, but we hung around and had some more drinks and was worth the wait. The train was amazing to see so close and was a great experience.
Cafe 40 is a great spot, and I highly recommend it. there are 9 of us  travelling here for a month in Vietnam, and they loved having us in their cafe.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: John Dean
Review:
In a quiet alley you’ll find this cafe. Outdoor seating looks nice, but today was a bit too sunny for that. Luckily there is enough room inside too.
The Bac Xiu was creamy with a nice coffee bean aftertaste. Something you want from a place with fresh coffee beans of course. Size was good too, only downside maybe the price of 50k. Still enjoyed it thoroughly.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: NBLâm HMUPH
Review: This one is so close to 5 stars. Their beverage is decent, the space is really nice indeed, outdoor seating with good lighting, i can even read book outside. They play music  at quite low volume and chill as well which is a good sign. Solid Croissant but i think it's little bit pricey compare to the quantity of the beverage. Last i want to have better egg cream next time, too many bubble. Overall really chill and quiet (not a lot of vehicle go by) experience.👍

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Ata ur Rehman
Review: One of most horrible experiences in the city. This is in regards to the abysmal service provided by Mr. Joseph, owner of the apartments above the coffee shop. Absolute rude and pathetic individual who should not be allowed to operate in the hospitality sector. Avoid the apartments at ALL COST.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Henry
Review: Nice place to stay but the rental motorbike wasn’t cool.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Liana rabsn
Review: When we arrived we found that we had booked an apartment that could accommodate 6 people but only had one double bed. After showing our dissatisfaction, the staff found a solution for us. The apartments are clean and comfortable. The stay was pleasant. I advise you to look carefully at the details before booking otherwise the hotel itself is very good.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Ryan Kim
Review: I visited again, recalling the time I attended a coffee class here before. The egg coffee was just as delicious as I remembered.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Eryn MacKenzie
Review:
We did an egg coffee class here with the owner. We were given a welcome drink on arrival and then a thorough explanation and walk through of the difference between robusta and arabica beans included a side by side comparison of appearance and taste. It was fascinating and you could easily see the difference.  Fun fact: all coffee from Vietnam is Robusta and is North Americans drink mostly Arabica.

The egg coffee class was phenomenal. We got a full walk through of the origins of egg coffee and then an interactive class on how to make it. Then we got to sit and taste our creations with the options of bruleeing the egg meringue or dusting with cocoa. It was wonderful.

The atmosphere, drinks, owner, everything was top notch. Could not recommend enough

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Ophelie Chuffart
Review: Cute coffee shop with fast WiFi and few outlets if you need to work and charge your computers. I got a delicious cold brew with litchi. The prices are affordable. My only complaint is that there is neither toilet paper nor hand soap in the bathroom.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Naufal Husain
Review: Attended the coffee making class via Airbnb. The head barista, Linh is very knowledgeable about coffee and we learm alot from for the 2 hours class on how to make egg and coconut coffee and it was really good. We also tried the lemon coffee. Highly recommended place to visit and try their egg and coconut coffee 😁

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Alec Hickernell
Review: We took an egg coffee making class here that was listed on Airbnb. So amazing! Learned about the history of egg coffee and tasted different types of coffee beans. Roomy place to sit with WiFi and AC. Definitely recommend!

Name: Oriberry Coffee
Author: Huyền Trang
Review:
Love the vibe here.
It is an ideal working space for people who prefer peaceful and quiet atmosphere 😌
This morning I enjoyed a cup of bac xiu and a load of charsiu pork bread with a perfect lake view, especially at a very reasonable price 😘🥰

Name: Oriberry Coffee
Author: Bảo Khánh Vũ
Review:
The legend of Xuân Diệu has came back.
I’m glad that it isn’t far from the previous one. With much more features added such as a roadside patio and open balcony right beside the waterbody of lake Tay Ho, would be awesome for the coming autumn.
Last but not least, they didn’t sacrifice the quietness on 2nd floor. You’re welcome to bring along your laptop.

Name: Oriberry Coffee
Author: David Fu
Review: One of many scenic coffee places with a lake view in Hanoi's West Lake District. Enjoyed the coffee and the apple crumble dessert.

Name: Oriberry Coffee
Author: Андрюша
Review: The best place in Hanoi. I go here for breakfast every single day. The staff is just incredible, we have become friends with some of the guys. If you want to eat delicious food and drink a cup of wonderful coffee, this is the best choice! Be sure to try the hebiscus cheesecake, and the chicken baguette

Name: Oriberry Coffee
Author: Antonina Beskrovna
Review: We come to this cafe cause they have the best coffee in Hanoi. They moved from the old place and  it seams rooms are bigger here. Friendly stuff and good food. Thank you

Name: Highlands Coffee Nguyễn Trãi
Address: 495 Đ. Nguyễn Trãi, Thanh Xuân Trung
Author: Ha Thuc
Review: Convenient transportation, not too noisy, clean toilets, drinks okay

Name: Highlands Coffee Nguyễn Trãi
Address: 495 Đ. Nguyễn Trãi, Thanh Xuân Trung
Author: Doctor
Review:
The space is ample and ventilation.
The drinks are good, but I think some of them have lots of ice that make drinks lost their tastes fastly. It's a big mistake Highland coffee should fix or change their prescription.
The other services are very well.

Name: Highlands Coffee Nguyễn Trãi
Address: 495 Đ. Nguyễn Trãi, Thanh Xuân Trung
Author: Dinh Van Tien
Review: The space is large and comfortable. if you smoke you can sit outside, otherwise, inside space is better for this hot summer

Name: Highlands Coffee Nguyễn Trãi
Address: 495 Đ. Nguyễn Trãi, Thanh Xuân Trung
Author: Somsak Chutanan
Review: Good coffee as usual, easy access as the train line in front of them

Name: Highlands Coffee Nguyễn Trãi
Address: 495 Đ. Nguyễn Trãi, Thanh Xuân Trung
Author: Viva Channel
Review: Nice place to chill with friends. Limited to no parking slot for cars.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Greg Sharpe
Review:
Cozy cafe that's a nice oasis from the busy city action. A good range of coffees including the classics and some creative. Also delcious cake on offer. The oat-milk latte and cheese cake paired well!

Comfy seating and friendly staff, plus a green area out back for some extra atmosphere. This cafe has the perfect blend of chill and positive vibes!

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Thanh Lam Tran
Review:
A cozy small coffee shop with a beautiful purple trellis that caught my eye. The ambiance was lovely and inviting, perfect for enjoying a quiet cup of coffee. While the drinks weren't anything out of the ordinary, they were still enjoyable. The staff was friendly and welcoming, making me feel right at home.
I had a pleasant experience at this coffee shop and would recommend it to anyone looking for a nice place to relax and unwind.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Claudia Mi
Review:
In order to escape the chaotic streets of Hanoi this is a real gem. Went there to get a proper coffee and we didn’t got disappointed. Very friendly staff and besides classics they also serve fancy own creations - worth to mention they also offer oat milk.

Would definitely recommend to have a seat in the mini garden 🌱

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Silvana Smith
Review: The best little spot to get a coffee . I ordered a cold brew apricot and bergamot tea . It's worth making the trip to get away from the noise of the old quarter .staff are super friendly . One of my highlights.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Nguyen Xuan Ha Anh (Milu)
Review: Matcha Latte (original) (60k VND) here used Japanese Shizuoka Matcha with condensed milk, which made the drink creamier and elevated the matcha flavour. This will be suitable for those who love sweet matcha with a hint of umami in it.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: John Hendrikx
Review: The flat white with brownie is a respectful match loved it...  really an upgrade to what starbucks offers. A must do in Hanoi.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Oliver Taylor
Review: Came here this morning for a coffee and pain au chocolat. We were met with a lovely warm welcome from the staff and seated quickly. We ordered two lattes and pastries. They were both well presented when delivered to our table, however my coffee was luke warm and both our pastries were very dry and almost stale. We sent the pastries back and they kindly replaced them. After waiting even longer for these replacements to by warmed up, they arrived and were also quite dry. These ones weren’t as bad as the first so we just ate them. The staff here were very apologetic and tried their best to make it right. I hope these small little issues get noted and worked on as this place has so much potential. The cafe itself is beautiful inside and very well decorated!

Great outdoor seating with lots of shade.  Or, air conditioning inside.

For those who are unaware on the topic:

Crema is one of the most prized components of a well-made espresso. Caramel-colored and creamy in texture, the foamy puff is created when hot water emulsifies coffee bean oils and floats atop the espresso with smooth little bubbles.

Name: Bubbles
Author: Vivian Ngoc Nguyen
Review:
say, it was absolutely amazing! The bread was perfectly crispy, and the beef was seasoned so well, every bite was packed with flavor. The sweetness of the beef combined with the crunchiness of the fresh veggies and a hint of spicy chili sauce made it irresistible. My boyfriend went for the grilled chicken banh mi, and after the first bite, he couldn’t help but say, “yummm.” The chicken was grilled to perfection, tender and flavorful, and it paired wonderfully with their special sauce.

But that’s not all—Bubble’s Greek yogurt really stood out! It has a light tanginess, creamy texture, and is super fresh. If you’re into healthy, nutritious meals, you absolutely have to try it. It’s the perfect choice for breakfast or a midday snack!

Name: Bubbles

Review: Nice banh mi shop! They use roasted duck which adds a really nice touch. Nice indoor seating area. Super sweet owner, with two adorable dogs!

Review: Really good milk tea! Lots of tea flavour and not a lot of milk. The staff even let us taste a small bit before actually ordering which was very nice. Overall, one of the better bubble teas we’ve had so far :)

Review: THE WORST I HAD. There’s no so much places to order bubble tea after 9 pm so i went here to buy a drink. 40.000 VND for mixed water with tea and syrup it’s unbelievable. in menu there’re tapioca bubbles, but in the cap there were no. tbh i tried tea in saigon, nha trang, danang and some places in hanoi but this one is just disgusting. i’d better buy the cheapest bottle of ice tea in the nearest mart. don’t waste your money

Name: Trà Sữa Toco Toco
Address: 2 P. Nguyễn Văn Tố, Cửa Đông
Author: Michaela Hladká
Review: I dont usually write bad reviews and maybe they just had a bad day today. But I was excited to try this tea drink the whole day, in the morning I was told they didn’t have any supplies for any drinks. So I came back in the evening after I withdrew the money and ordered Lsize fruity tea drink. Firstly they couldn’t open the cashier, after 5 minutes of calling somewhere they figured out it wasn’t turned on, then they didn’t have small change to give me the money back so I left them more. Moving on the drink consisted mostly of the ice. So if you love to pay for an ice it is a perfect place to go because you get at least 2 full spoons of it. After I got my drink I finished it in 5 sips. You either have to wait for ice to melt or you drink that bit right away. When I opened the lid to at least eat the jelly on top, I found a fly in my drink, leaving me wonder what else was there I was drinking with a lid on. Needs a lot of improvement!

Name: Trà Thang
Author: Nhung Bùi
Review: Found a new tea shop here! They served traditional herbal tea, fruit tea, bubble tea and other coffee. The shop is featured and designed with traditional architecture style of Vietnam in the period of 50s. There are two floors with a small yard behind with a lot of trees, you can find peaceful atmostphere there. There is a balcony as well so you can see locals’s activities nearby and enjoy the atmostphere in the small alley. Love the vibe here! Highly recommended!

Name: Milk & Honey Tay Ho
Author: Thuỷ Linh Hà
Review:
I absolutely loved the Prosciutto Bruschetta I had – I'd rate it a solid 9/10. The only drawback was the butter sourdough, which was just average. However, the moment I took the first bite, the rich flavors of the prosciutto and the goat cheese instantly awakened my taste. This dish holds a special place for me as it reminds me of my days as an international student. Milk and Honey certainly brought me joy that morning.

The setting of the place is calm and peaceful, with a warm and inviting ambiance. The staff, including the kind security guard, are all very caring and friendly. Thank you, and I will definitely be back to try other dishes.

Name: Milk & Honey Tay Ho
Author: Lior Arnan
Review: I recently visited a restaurant that caught my eye with its lovely decor. The ambiance was inviting, making it a great spot for brunch. I decided to order the Eggs Benedict, a personal favorite of mine. Unfortunately, the ham used in the dish didn't meet my expectations and detracted from the overall taste. However, the other ingredients were fresh, and the dish was well-presented. The service was prompt and friendly, and the coffee served alongside was excellent. Overall, while the ham was a letdown, the rest of the experience was very enjoyable.

Name: Milk & Honey Tay Ho
Author: Eileen Lui
Review: Always loved the scones here. And the Hot Chocolate. Today, we also tried the Croissant. All was good. Except the Banana Bread. I think this was a tad undercooked. Maybe just this loaf? Also the heat and also the terrible sound-proofing. But still... wait staff was patient and helpful.

Name: Milk & Honey Tay Ho
Author: Steph Daniel
Review:
We caught a Grab from old quarter to try milk and honey after seeing it on Instagram. Don’t confuse it with Milk and Honey express! The express doesn’t have the same brunch options!!
Food was delicious, the iced mocha was one of the best I’ve had in Vietnam and I’d go back again in a heart beat :)

Name: Milk & Honey Tay Ho
Author: Vivian Do
Review: This establishment has quickly become our go-to spot for weekend brunch. While it may not be situated near the lake, it boasts an abundance of trees and a delightful atmosphere. Our preferred seating area is on the balcony of the third floor. I particularly appreciate the location for its serene and cool ambiance. The service and food offerings are exceptional. Although the bruschetta is my favorite dish, the portion size is quite generous for a brunch item. If it could be reduced to about 2/3 of its current size, it would enhance the overall dining experience.

Review: Ok

Author: Cédric (KDRIC)
Review: Great ice cream shop 2 steps from the hectic railway street animation

Name: Vua's Desserts And Cakerie
Author: Kirsty & Matt Harman
Review: I was keen to try something new and the team were very helpful and gave me a good recommendation ... including direction on how to eat it! Outside my comfort zone but turned out to be delicious - thanks for the help!

Name: Vua's Desserts And Cakerie
Author: Linda Yonemoto
Review: Silken tofu pudding dessert with flan and more at 45k was delicious but a smaller serving. The gals serving up desserts were friendly and efficient.  The shop is clean but small. My partner and I sat outside, ate quickly, paid cash, and left. Most people do takeout as you can't linger here.

Name: Vua's Desserts And Cakerie
Author: אייר לין
Review:
-Nice place to hang at when you crave some western food
-I'd recommend the Green tea icecream for desert even though it's a bit expensive in local terms

Name: Vua's Desserts And Cakerie
Author: Bông Phan
Review: Good place for dessert!!! Sell various of products including bean curd and cream bubble tea ( signature). In addition,  yogurt and ice cream are also recommended. The price is very reasonable, varies from 15.000 - 30.000 VND. The only things I do not like is the place is too small and has not too many seats for guests. Anyway still is my favorite placeeee 😁

Name: Universal Tea (U:Tea) - Trần Quốc Toản
Address: 50 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Linh Phi
Review:
We choose 2 fruit teas. 1 Kenya honey lemon tea and 1 apricot peach tea. The teas weren’t too sweet, taste of the tea was strong and tart to the children.

The space inside is small and lacking of fresh air. That why the seats outside are always full.

They sell tea box and merchandise as well. The tea box price is 150.000, if you buy 2 box you can get a tote bag for free. There are 3 kinds of tea, they named them: Spring, Summer and Winter.

The parking lot was closed but I have to pay 10.000 for one lot without notice from the staff. I think that could be better if I know that information before.

Name: Universal Tea (U:Tea) - Trần Quốc Toản
Address: 50 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Nhung Bùi
Review: Pretty shop! Located in center, it’s quite small and has limited seats.

Name: Universal Tea (U:Tea) - Trần Quốc Toản
Address: 50 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Nguyễn Tuấn Vũ 2TĐ-20ACN
Review: The store was not crowded. However, my order was late for 45 mins with just 2 cups of milk tea and a cake.

Name: Universal Tea (U:Tea) - Trần Quốc Toản
Address: 50 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Phương Linh Thi
Review: good

Name: Universal Tea (U:Tea) - Trần Quốc Toản
Address: 50 P. Trần Quốc Toản, Trần Hưng Đạo
Author: Phương Uyên Nguyễn
Review: The shop is beautiful, clean, smells of tea and coffee, drinks are reasonably priced, enthusiastic staff, and the cake with cheese cream is delicious.

Name: Quán Trà Sữa Chatime
Address: 64 P. Đào Duy Từ, Hàng Buồm
Author: Lan Tran

Name: Coffee A
Author: T K
Review:
A cafe standing on a corner of bustle

My partner and I stopped by and grabbed some coffee in the morning here. We ordered a coconut coffee and iced coffee that were both nice and dark and rich.
The atmosphere made our coffee even tastier.

The thing I enjoyed the most was the view from the balcony seat and the bustling sound from the streets.
Contrary to how busy the streets right before my eyes, I felt so relaxed and time was going slowly.

A little cute retro looking cafe.
Highly recommended !

Name: Coffee A
Author: Kaja Jaronska
Review: The absolute best spot for a traditional coffee (vietnamese with condensed milk, coconut coffee, salt coffee; they also have an egg coffee but we didn’t try it here). In the morning super fresh flaky pastries. We came here twice a day to sit on a balcony and enjoy the soothing traffic below. Two ladies and a man who were serving us were extremely friendly and smiley. We will make this our first stop when we will be back on Hanoi next time. 10/10

Name: Coffee A
Author: pop-pop iggy
Review:
nice, cosy cafe. I had a mango smoothy which was so rich and tasty.
the cafe is decorated as retro western and asian.
from the 2nd floor balcony, you can check the people passing by.  The place is really good for chilling in the lazy afternoon.

Name: Coffee A
Author: Ilaw Ayuka
Review: Cute cafe! Had coffee and a croissant, they tasted great! Prices are fair. I liked having the balcony view and had it all to myself. The stairs to the balcony are a little small but I don't mind. Thank you!

Name: Coffee A
Author: Annalisa Esposito
Review: Lovely terrace and the owners of the place seem very nice. Shame that the egg coffee (40) is not very good (they put so much sugar in it, I couldn’t even finish it bleah). If you are really into coffee like me, there are better places to stop by. If you just want to relax on the terrace, that’s a great spot.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Philippe Fritsch
Review: Nice coffee in a good atmosphere.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Lassie Celita Forbes
Review: Big portions. Quiet place. Very accommodating staff.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Nicky
Review: Very bad food

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: Anh Dang
Review: Personally, I don't think Milk Tea is delicious, it's like drinking rice water + tea, and the matcha frosting is very sweet, like powdered.

Name: H Coffee & Restaurant
Author: phương lê
Review: Delicious food - good service - the owner is 60 but looks like an 18 year old girl🥰🥰

Name: Bubble House West Lake
Author: Van Bach
Review: Clean, bright & safe space with 2 floors of various games / themed corners for kids to explore. Entrance for kids at 200k each which is on the high side but my kid loved it and didnt wanna leave after 1.5 hours of playing. Food & drinks menu available. Seating for adults indoor and outdoor. Will return.

Name: Bubble House West Lake
Author: Tuyen Hoang
Review:
1.	Service: 1
Explanation: When we first stepped in, the staff/manager at the counter asked if we had bought a ticket for our child. After that, she asked us to buy 3 pairs of socks even though we explained that we were just sitting to eat breakfast, and only our child would be playing. We asked why parents also had to buy socks. She said: “Due to cleaning regulations, you have to wear socks.” I responded: “If you think our feet aren’t clean, then don’t let us in.”
What an explanation! They allow people to eat in the play area but believe customers’ feet aren’t clean enough. And they don’t allow people the choice to not buy socks.
2.	Atmosphere: 1
Explanation: It was too noisy to enjoy breakfast, and for the price, it didn’t feel enough to justify being called a play area — just my personal opinion.
3.	Normal compared to what we expected to play.
4. 	Safety: While playing, our 4.5-year-old son found a real snail, about 3cm long, in the bubble area. We informed the staff, but the play area didn’t feel safe or well-maintained.

Conclusion:
First and last time ever.

Name: Bubble House West Lake
Author: Dilyara I
Review: We celebrated our daughter's birthday in this cafe, we really liked everything. The food is delicious, the staff is polite and friendly. The staff gave our daughter a gift from the cafe. I recommend this place to visit and celebrate your birthday!

Name: Bubble House West Lake
Author: Nir Chako
Review:
AMAZING for kids.
2 floors full of activities.
Nice working/eating area while the kids play.

Solid coconut coffee.

Name: Bubble House West Lake
Author: Ruth Cardona
Review: We had soooo much fun in this place, is nestled in the best area of Hanoi, if you stay in Tay Ho with kids, this is the playground to go to.

Name: Anh béo foods (Lê Hữu Tựu)
Author: Alupin Kids
Review: Ok

Name: Anh béo foods (Lê Hữu Tựu)
Author: Duy Le
Review: delicious, clean, cheap

Name: Anh béo foods (Lê Hữu Tựu)
Author: Thai Ha Tran Thi
Review: Delicious food, reasonable prices, attentive staff, enthusiastic take care, cool air-conditioned restaurant

Name: Anh béo foods (Lê Hữu Tựu)

Name: Anh béo foods (Lê Hữu Tựu)

Review: Delicious chicken rice

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Pui Cheng Lum
Review:
The staffs can't exactly speak English but sign languages help. Head up to 5th floor for the natural air roof top. It might get a bit hot depends on the time u are there. If the sun isn't exactly strong, it is a nice place to admire The lake.

Here doesn't serve hot/main course. U can only get fishballs, sunflowers and some beef jerky. The rest are beverages

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Lenka Matejovicova
Review:
We stopped here for evening drinks after a long day (caramel milk and cinnamon tea, we loved both!) and we really enjoyed the quiet terrace with lovely view and the peaceful atmosphere. The lady is very nice and she speaks English well enough to deliver perfect service.
The prices seem very fair too, it is no tourist trap (you can check the menu in English with clear prices before you come in).

The one-star reviews seem to be some trolls trying to bring this place down with bad rating, it deserves more than 4 stars on average in my opinion.

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Irene Rizzo
Review: We had a wonderful time at this café. It is not a tourist trap and it has a lovely view from the 5th floor. It is run by a very kind and attentive Vietnamese woman, and the staff is polite. We spent some time sipping our delicious coffees, and then had a chance to converse with her about how typical Vietnamese coffee is made. So far, the best human experience we had in Vietnam at a local cafeteria. Really recommended!

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Rey
Review: Beautifull spot. Clear menu in english with prices. There is some construction going on in the front of the building, so you have to go behind that.

Name: Mỹ Lan Coffee - Rooftop Cafe
Address: 57 P. Quốc Tử Giám, Văn Chương
Author: Hieu pham duc
Review: excellent

Name: Quanchehangkien
Author: Minh Tiến Nguyễn
Review: Ok

Name: Quanchehangkien
Author: Xuan Manh Nguyen
Review: Personal opinion: Hang Kien tea is still the best in the area, but I still prefer the flavor of old tea, but nowadays it seems like everywhere tea is filled with jelly and pearls, perhaps suitable for students and young people. Younger today than 3x men like me.

Name: Quanchehangkien
Author: Hằng Đặng
Review: The tea is very delicious, the price is too cheap

Name: Quanchehangkien

Name: Quanchehangkien
