I came here because of the reviews, i just wanted to try their coconut coffee but unfortunately i was really disappointed, i don’t know if the milk was off or what it was but I couldn’t drink it, it was vile 😔 really disappointed on this one,
The cafe itself is really cute and they have a little balcony overlooking the street which is a nice touch, but that’s all I can really say positive on this one.

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: L Leung
Review: Delicious egg coffee at 40K VND, freshly whipped for 5 minutes. Cozy second floor, super clean restroom.

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: Paul
Review:
Delightful indoor/outdoor restaurant on the second floor (accessible only by stairs, no lift/elevator) overlooking a busy street near Old Town.  Not air-conditioned but there are fans enough to keep the air moving comfortably.  Cash & credit card payments.  Some English spoken.

Menu is fairly extensive and features many typical Vietnamese food options as well as a few selections tailored for tourists.  Great drink options - juices, coffees, teas (hot & cold) to help cool you off in the summer or warm you up in the winter  The spring rolls (fresh, not fried) were delicious and served with a traditional ginger & garlic dipping sauce.  Their banh mi was also respectable and the bread was very crispy and fresh.

Definitely a great place to catch your breath before continuing your time in Old Town!

Name: Ann Coffee (Restaurant)
Author: Tyler Stewart
Review: Wonderful family owned coffee/restaurant spot with a beautiful view and great coffee. I asked her for some fresh mango so she found her ripest, sweetest one for me. I also ordered a coconut coffee and she sweetened it just the way I described it (medium). Originally, I was going to get takeaway, but two of the family members convinced me to sit upstairs on the balcony. I’ve now been up here for a couple of hours enjoying the scenery.

Name: CILAS Coffee & Pastry
Author: Yuki Sato
Review: The coffee was delicious and the cafe was so cool

Name: CILAS Coffee & Pastry
Author: Phú Phạm
Review: Perfect !!! 💯

Name: CILAS Coffee & Pastry
Author: Phuong Nguyen Duc
Review: The drinks don't really match the price, a cold brew cup costs 70k, comes in a paper cup, and really isn't anything "special". I know that the shop sells views, but don't let that mean you serve a drink like this, at this price, and on the menu there is also a star image that looks very... "special". Tiramisu Cafe Cake is quite delicious, and this cake somehow makes up for a few points in my review. Oolong jasmine tea is also good, I feel like coming here to drink coffee is not very standard, other things are a bit better ^^. The decor is nice, the view is not really impressive when compared to many other shops. I went in the evening and it was quite crowded so I couldn't take many pictures. There was a corner outside that looked straight at the lake. Rate 6/10 for me, the restaurant's menu needs to be starred more carefully, and a more accurate cold brew cup if the price is kept the same.

Name: CILAS Coffee & Pastry
Author: Thanos
Review: The cafe has a beautiful and wide view covering the entire West Lake, the shop is located on the 2nd floor with very cool breeze. The outside space is arranged to look very chill, very suitable for "healing". I went in the evening and saw the restaurant's decoration with some hanging lanterns which looked quite interesting. The drinks are ok, nothing outstanding. Overall 10/10

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Anwarul Hakim
Review:
Atelier Coffee, Hanoi
@ateliercoffeevn

Atelier Coffee probably the nearest one you can grab if you are visiting Train Street in Hanoi. You just need to walk about 2-3 mins to reach the cafe from Train Street area which is convenient to plan during your travel.

They serve coffee from Ho Chi Minh city roaster which is mild in acidity, subtle and a bit light in my opinion. Probably due to the fact that some of cafe here still serve single shot espresso based drink.

The cafe is cozy, can be kind of dim environment but the vibes is relaxing, most probably because not too busy during our visit.

Nevertheless, still a great place for good cup of coffee to escape the cold Hanoi winter weather.

IG:@katunx

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Quoc Bao
Review:
Not too much crowd
Coffee: 8/10
Space: 7.5
Service: 8
Toilet: 7

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Alexa
Review: We stopped in here because we saw the sign for egg coffee, and were on a mission to try it for the first time and we were so glad we did! It was definitely the perfect place to sit and enjoy the rich, creamy beverage! The coffee itself was so good and the whole thing was practically a dessert. The staff spoke good English and were sweet enough to answer my questions about the beverage since it was my first time trying it! If you haven't tried it yet, definitely go for it! It's definitely a sipping beverage because it's so rich, so just plan to sit and enjoy it for a while!

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: Chi Hong Hwang
Review: Lovely cafe with Japanese minimalist design sensibilities. It's eye catching after you turn off the main road into a smaller side lane. Not much food - buns from 11 am to 2 pm. We had croissant, espresso and a soad drink. Coffee was good. Quiet when no one speaks but speech volume is magnified due to the bare interior.

Name: Atelier Coffee
Address: 65A P. Tôn Thất Thiệp, Điện Biên
Author: mgblanchard
Review:
Great independent coffee shop run by two young locals who know their stuff about coffee.

Delicious coffees - serves Vietnamese, drip style and Italian/european coffees like cappuccino, lattes etc - the barista is very skilled and clearly enjoys doing the foam art! Has oat milk for extra.

Hot coffee is ‘warm’, but I like it that way as it doesn’t damage the flavour! Thought I’d mention that in case anyone enjoys super-hot or coffee.

Has cool seating, both inside and outside. Lovely place.

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Ai B
Review:
I was looking for an open coffee shop in Hanoi during Typhoon Yagi and google maps led me to this lovely coffee place. It was such a lovely surprise when I saw they have this adorable cat! The coffee was great I ended up buying 3 cups 🤭 the couple manning the shop are also nice.
They gave me a free bag of cookies! They speak and understand english well so it wasn't hard for me to communicate.
The place is artsy and cozy. I recommend you visit this coffee place and have a chill/good vibes.
I Will definitely recommend this shop. Will come back soon too.

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Shaurya Panpalia 5-Year IDD Materials Science and Technology
Review: Hands down the best coffee shop we went to in the whole Vietnam. The owner is very sweet, the atmosphere is very cute and also the music. The coffee is also the best coffee I might have had in my entire life

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Shirly Cheng
Review: Just passing by and noticed the interior was quite cool. Had Egg coffee, Tiny Dot and the banana cake. The cake was amazing - would have ordered another serving if I haven’t had lunch. The cat was sooooo cute 😍😍😍

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: mario vegas
Review: Near the street, egg coffee is great.. the girl who served us, was pretty, looks like famous artist in my country..  your smile so sweet.. also the cat is cute.. good coffee shop.. will back again if I had chance..

Name: Si.Coffee.Stories
Author: Agustina Poblete
Review: Perfect coffeeshop for a cozy atmosphere, good music also! Perfect for reading and spending a chill morning. Cat is so cute 🥹

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Octavia Jubilee
Review: One of my favorite coffee shops in Hanoi. The coffee is made well and the owner is very kind! This cafe is located on a quieter street and it’s a great place to relax :)

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Mavis Chuah
Review:
A hidden gem at the corner of small alley. This cafe only serve coffee (no food). They drip the authentic Vietnamese coffee for the serving.  We tried yoghurt coffee (which is amazing, mixing both of my favourite together) and a hot coffee (taste like espresso with condensed milk) - we love both!

Location - decent
Price - good (30-40k dong per drink with decent portion)
Staff - friendly
Cleanliness - great
Coffee - unassuming great coffee

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Jolene Chua
Review:
Nice small coffeeshop that serves drinks only. Love their coffee with ice blended coconut, absolutely refreshing on a warm day.
Drinks are affordable priced and you can sit facing the small road to see vehicles go by.

Service is pretty quick 👍

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Juan Carlos Silva
Review: Excellent place to have an egg coffee, coconut coffee, smoothies, everything was great !! The guy is so nice! Received us with a glass of cold tea! One of the best coffee spots we visited in Hanoi

Name: Hội An Corner Coffee
Address: 6 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: 박준형
Review: Nice place to take a break.. when you want to put yourself a little far away from noise of motorbike. The owner always hosted me with great smile and hospitality. My son was crezy at coconut coffee!!

Name: Hanah's Coffee
Author: 서원숙
Review: It was awsome!!! I orderd  a cup of  ice  avocado  smoothie, however they gave me a huge  size  of  ice  avocado smoothie.  Also  the  taste was sooooo goooood.

Name: Hanah's Coffee
Author: Thomas Woge
Review: Friendly service, fantastic coffee 😍

Name: Hanah's Coffee
Author: Philippe Meunier
Review: Small coffee shop. Vietnamese coffee at 20,000 Dong. Juice, quick bites

Name: Hanah's Coffee
Author: Phong Dang
Review: That is ok for the coffee

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: John Dean
Review:
In a quiet alley you’ll find this cafe. Outdoor seating looks nice, but today was a bit too sunny for that. Luckily there is enough room inside too.
The Bac Xiu was creamy with a nice coffee bean aftertaste. Something you want from a place with fresh coffee beans of course. Size was good too, only downside maybe the price of 50k. Still enjoyed it thoroughly.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: NBLâm HMUPH
Review: This one is so close to 5 stars. Their beverage is decent, the space is really nice indeed, outdoor seating with good lighting, i can even read book outside. They play music  at quite low volume and chill as well which is a good sign. Solid Croissant but i think it's little bit pricey compare to the quantity of the beverage. Last i want to have better egg cream next time, too many bubble. Overall really chill and quiet (not a lot of vehicle go by) experience.👍

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Ata ur Rehman
Review: One of most horrible experiences in the city. This is in regards to the abysmal service provided by Mr. Joseph, owner of the apartments above the coffee shop. Absolute rude and pathetic individual who should not be allowed to operate in the hospitality sector. Avoid the apartments at ALL COST.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Henry
Review: Nice place to stay but the rental motorbike wasn’t cool.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans
Author: Liana rabsn
Review: When we arrived we found that we had booked an apartment that could accommodate 6 people but only had one double bed. After showing our dissatisfaction, the staff found a solution for us. The apartments are clean and comfortable. The stay was pleasant. I advise you to look carefully at the details before booking otherwise the hotel itself is very good.

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Ara A.
Review:
Randomly stopped by this café  after having bun cha nearby. We were in the mood for some coffee. This was my official introduction to Vietnamese coffee, and it did not disappoint. The vibe was cozy, the place was well-ventilated (not air conditioned but plenty of fans), and the staff were kind.

Though random, this turned out to be a good choice. A great spot for a relaxing coffee break!

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: John Tango
Review: Mr Zhang(?) was great in explaining how he makes his coffee. I absolutely like the exotic taste of the coconut coffee on ice. Gotta try it once … a totally new experience to regular coffee. Highly recommended. Very good strong coffee with great service.

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: CL Hops
Review: Personally one of my favourite coconut coffees in the Old Quarters, as I have my coffee iced and dairy free. They were able to adjust the proportions to get the right balance of coconut creaminess, coffee fragrance, refreshing slushy texture, yet without the lactose. Hit the right spot for me! Good working spot with decently strong free wifi and a view of the street!

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Shell Klok
Review: The best black coffee that we have in Vietnam, it is so strong and good to wake us up! Great great fresh fruits juice we have carrot juice and grape juice. It is so pity we didnt take any picture of our orders hehe

Name: Chất Coffee and Drinks
Author: Caramela Rose
Review:
A must try! The owner himself makes all the coffee orders and we found out he uses his own blend too. I personally loved his coconut coffee and brown coffee. Tried a lot of coffee shops during our stay and so far, this is one of the best!

It seems to be famous for locals too!

Name: Lộc Coffee & Tea
Address: 41 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Anita Rosaleh
Review: We tried 3 different coffee shops for salt coffee and we personally loved the Salt coffee here the most. The have Soursop smoothie as well! Reasonable pricing, they only take cash or local payment. The owner’s dog corgi was super friendly and well behaved.

Name: Lộc Coffee & Tea
Address: 41 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Ji Ramz
Review: Tried egg coffee for the first time here and it didn’t disappoint. I also ordered a Taiwan sponge cake, which was good. The cafe’s facade downstairs was cute but we chose to go upstairs in their cozy balcony. To keep you cool from the humidity, they have an outdoor mist machine and wall fan.

Name: Lộc Coffee & Tea
Address: 41 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Cynthi Kiru
Review: Amazing egg coffee, one of the best in Old Quarter. Rich intense flavours without the cloying sweetness. Saltes cream coffee was also a unique taste. Nice place to chill and watch the traffic go by with a cute little Corgi to accompany you. Highly recommended.

Name: Lộc Coffee & Tea
Address: 41 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Paulina
Review: Every time I try an egg coffee in Hanoi, it tastes different. However, I think here I had the best one so far. It was so good that we took another cup. The staff is very nice and friendly. Street view is great at both floors.

Name: Lộc Coffee & Tea
Address: 41 P. Lý Quốc Sư, Hàng Trống
Author: Nomadic Flavors
Review:
The egg coffee is the best. Great location for this family own business. The location is just around the corner from the Cathedral and is well worth the visit. The family is very nice and eager to help in anyway.

I would highly recommend this place.

Name: COTTI COFFEE - BA ĐÌNH
Address: 44 P. Giang Văn Minh, Đội Cấn
Author: Trung Hiếu Nguyễn
Review:
The restaurant is near my house and the outside architecture is quite strange, so stop by and try it.
+ Plus points: moderate prices, most drinks cost 50🐠 or less. Spacious space with large glass windows looking out very airy. The staff are quick and enthusiastic. After buying water, each person was also able to borrow a pretty mini handheld fan.
+ Minus point: the drinks are not too special, the taste is quite similar to other chains or cafes. The shop has 8 floors but has just been completed, the remaining 3 floors are under construction. Only the 2nd and 3rd floors can sit, but probably because it's new, it hasn't been decorated much yet.

Name: COTTI COFFEE - BA ĐÌNH
Address: 44 P. Giang Văn Minh, Đội Cấn
Author: Cynomys Lipton
Review: The shop is easy to find. The space is quite large and the decor is reasonably airy. Even though both sides are glass, there are curtains and the air conditioner is still cool without any effect. On the street but not as noisy as some similar shops I've been to. Convenient motorbike parking. Cute and friendly staff. The drinks are fine now. Pink grapefruit tea is delicious and affordable, with toppings including white pearls. I find the space to sit and chat, work, or study very good, with sockets and full wifi. Each floor has free filtered water and straws that you can take yourself. In general, 👍👍👍

Name: COTTI COFFEE - BA ĐÌNH
Address: 44 P. Giang Văn Minh, Đội Cấn
Author: Nguyễn Thị Mừng
Review:
The new restaurant is clean, luxurious and beautiful design. Airy view on the 2nd floor. Delicious drinks. Reasonable price! Polite service!
Take away drinks are also extremely thoughtful and meticulous! Thank you Cotti Coffee Giang Van Minh for giving me a wonderful experience!

Name: COTTI COFFEE - BA ĐÌNH
Address: 44 P. Giang Văn Minh, Đội Cấn
Author: Hoa
Review: The shop is very beautiful, the decor is also great. Unfortunately, it just opened and only has a 2nd floor. There will soon be a 3rd floor for groups and people who need quiet. Looking forward to it. I hope the shop will be completed soon🥰🥰

Name: COTTI COFFEE - BA ĐÌNH
Address: 44 P. Giang Văn Minh, Đội Cấn
Author: Dat Quan
Review:
Newly opened shop on Giang Van Minh street, located right on the main road and alley for easy access. Neatly decorated, beautiful and clean. Seating is a bit cramped. It's a bit bright in the morning, but in the afternoon it's sunny in the West so it's likely to be harsh.
Diverse drinks, many foods, milk tea, coffee, fruit juice.
As usual, I enjoy Americano. Here, every size is the same for 35k, and there are 3 medium-dark nut flavors to choose from. The coffee is okay, not too special, I choose the dark roast flavor. Not satisfied with the plastic cups and too much ice, like highland industrial coffee.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Tim
Review: You can sit here on the balcony enjoy your well made Coffe, Juice oder Tea, while watching other tourists struggle in the traffic jungle, wonderful. 😉 the only downside, but i guess thats common in the country, the toilet is behind the counter and not the cleanest. The entrance is Hidden, but its worth the search.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: shel tay
Review:
a hidden cafe thru a small tiny alley
the lady boss is super friendly
Although she couldn't communicate English well but she took the effort used the Google translate to answer our curiousity of the fingered citron & her homemade fermented fruit wine

The egg coffee is superb, as well the ice  salt coffee is so nice
Nice view to watch the busy traffic from the balcony. Simple yet enjoy the drink & view.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Low Sinhui
Review: Found this cafe by chance and I love how -mysterious- the entrance is (think small alley + rustic stairs). Ordered a Salted Coffee to try and it tastes very interesting (because salty). Great cafe spot to chill and observe the traffic at the intersection. Would recommend it as a resting stop for anyone who feels tired from walking 🙃

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Diana Cardenas
Review: amazing hidden coffee shop with a view at the local market atmosphere outside! very friendly staff and the entrance was quite an adventure! recommended 100% after visiting the market or for a quick quality coffee in between.

Name: Coffee Nang
Author: Y Nhi Dang
Review: Spent our afternoons enjoying coffee and watching the busy quarter here. The drinks are tasty and the atmosphere is, to us, very typical of Ha Noi

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Ngo To Uyen
Review:
🌿 I went to the familiar place opposite The Wiseland Coffee but it was a bit crowded at noon so I ordered a drink and went to this ST to sit. I've been to Wiseland many times but this time I just came here to sit. The space here is very quiet, very suitable for working, super focused. This side looks mainly at books about history, politics, country, Party of all kinds, while Wiseland looks at children's books, personal development...
🌿 The drink is so delicious. Wiseland staff will bring it to your seat. I often drink orange-mango hibicus tea 😁 A cup of mine costs 49k, a reasonable price compared to this area.
This is the best working + reading shop I've ever known.

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Lam Tran
Review: Quiet and comfortable space for reading

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Khánh Trà Lê
Review: Great for reading and reflecting

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Phạm Minh Tuấn Giám đốc

Name: ST Coffee BOOK
Address: 24 P. Quang Trung, Trần Hưng Đạo, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội Hà Nội
Author: Larry Nguyen

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Emma Lim
Review: Khanh is very helpful and personable. He recommends based on what I want and gives a good price for the coffee. Thank you so much!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Central PHX
Review:
Nice small coffee place.
Very attentive sales lady Ngoc.
Excellent  Egg Coffee!
Thank you Ngoc!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Cheryl Benson
Review: Great coffee selection, but get there early as they sometimes run out of cream or yogurt for certain drinks by the afternoon.

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Ella Tsang
Review: Great spot for coffee and beans. The barista Andy is super friendly and helpful, introducing us to all kinds of drinks & beans!

Name: Coffee & Tea Lam
Author: Lai Laura
Review: Coconut coffee is nice and interesting.   I enjoy the environment in the coffee shop as well.

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Bea Atkinson-Myers
Review: Delightful hidden gem in the old quarter of Hanoi. The chicken bites were tangy and delicious. They play American 1950s and 1960s music. Amazing atmosphere. Little tricky to find, but well worth it.

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Eileen Lui
Review: Wouldn't say the Chicken Bites we had was super wow and it took a long time to arrive. However, the drinks were good. We had the Chamomile with Salted Cream and also a Special Kuzu Powder with Salted Apricot. The ambience though... super cosy and the books are available for your reading pleasure at the outlet. Not for purchase!

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Fernan Mascarinas
Review:
If you are working remotely in Hanoi, this is one of the best places to zone out, drink some tea or coffee, and focus on your work. There are a lot of must try drinks and pastries, but I ordered salty cream chamomile. This place is giving GenZ meets IG inspired library+coffee den which really looks good on photos. You can read books if you're not working, or you may play the piano if you know a piece or two.

The shop is tucked inside and there's an alley that leads to it, so just look for the sign "Tranquil Books & Coffee".

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: nuinsrnui
Review: The cafe is so lovely and cozy. You can chill or work there. The drink menu is also nice. Don't forget to take the photo at the street in front of the cafe too!

Name: Tranquil Books & Coffee
Address: 5 P. Nguyễn Quang Bích, Cửa Đông
Author: Nimit Naik
Review: You will find tranquility in the Tranquil Books & Coffee! Loved the huge collection of books, the taste of coffee and the calm ambience this cafe offers. If you want a peaceful cafe to work from, then this cafe is the best choice. I highly recommend getting the Hazelnut Coffee! It's my new favourite!

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Chantelle Drabik
Review:
Cedar Cafe is a delightful little spot perfect for grabbing a coffee and enjoying a relaxed atmosphere. The ambiance is cozy and inviting, making it an ideal place to unwind or catch up with friends.

One of the standout features of Cedar Cafe is the availability of Wi-Fi, with access details conveniently noted right on the tables. This is a great touch for those looking to work remotely or browse while sipping their coffee.

Ordering is a breeze thanks to the QR code system, which streamlines the process and makes it easy to browse their large drinks menu. Whether you're in the mood for a classic espresso or something more adventurous, there’s plenty to choose from.

For those with a sweet tooth, Cedar Cafe offers a selection of pastries to accompany your drink. It’s the perfect way to indulge while enjoying your coffee.

Overall, Cedar Cafe is a charming spot that ticks all the right boxes for a coffee break. I highly recommend stopping by for a relaxing experience!

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Mayumi Leah Millanes
Review: Nice and helpful staff. A good place to unwind from the extreme weather outside. Not cold and not warm either. Just to make ur temperature back to normal. Coffee was good as well complimented with water.

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Srishti Mitra
Review: Wonderful coffee and pastries. Must visit

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Oliver Moore
Review: Urgh I can't tell you how much I loved the serenity of this café. It is so nice, the place is very comfortable and a safe space off the street. The coffee was fantastic and they seem very kind and attentive 💕

Name: CeDar Coffee
Address: 63a P.Tôn Đức Thắng, Quốc Tử Giám
Author: Fatema Baser
Review: Love this place. Staff are friendly, provide good service and recommendations. Place is very calm and open. Most important is their drink is so fresh, tasty, and well presentable

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Bradley Stevens
Review:
Great place, great coffee and tea, so many options and all good.
Very nice staff and super friendly, my favorite coffee shop in Hanoi.
Avoid the chains and try this one, you will not be disappointed!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Emma Sim
Review: Sim Coffee is an awesome place to start your day, fantastic coffee and friendly service. Plus, the walls are decorated with interesting art pieces like a gallery 😁 The salted coffee is my favourite. Thanks for having us Travis and team!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: TKC 76
Review: Super nice and friendly owner couple. Strong espresso! Recommended!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Nicolas Kasprzyk
Review: Super chill people always eager to have a chat with you, and the drinks are really good too!

Name: Sim Coffee & Arts
Address: 26 Nguyễn Công Trứ, Phạm Đình Hổ
Author: Trịnh Duy Anh
Review: The shop has changed its name, I don't know if it will change owners or not. The older owner is quite agile and hospitable. The cafe is good, the decor is good, there are many paintings. The shop's space has artistic features.

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: fama safan
Review:
I would like to extend my sincere gratitude to the CEO of Kafela Coffee for the kind invitation. My experience at Kafela Coffee was truly exceptional. The ambiance was warm and welcoming, and the staff was incredibly attentive and friendly. The coffee itself was outstanding, rich in flavor and perfectly brewed.

The atmosphere made it an ideal place for both relaxation and work. I highly recommend Kafela Coffee to anyone looking for a great coffee experience. It’s a place I will definitely be visiting more often. 5/5 stars!

Thank you once again for the wonderful experience.

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: LinYan
Review:
A great place to focus on your study or reading book ,staff behavior is really good
And I discovered they roast coffee beans by themselves which surprised me
Even though they didn't have any special menu or recommendation , but I enjoyed my time over there
Looking forward to visit this place once more
Need to note that pets are not allowed

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: C Cutler
Review: Tucked away in a quiet neighborhood this small cafe offers a variety freshly roasted coffee beans, specialty coffee and juice drinks along with a few treats. Upstairs is a good meeting space for a few friends or larger party.

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: Selina Vu
Review: It’s a lovely coffee, the price is affordable. It’s like a hidden cafe so would recommend it for everyone

Name: Kafela Cafe
Author: Tatiana Didukh
Review: Tucked away European-style place with highly accommodating people working there, very quiet🙌

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Ryan Kim
Review: I visited again, recalling the time I attended a coffee class here before. The egg coffee was just as delicious as I remembered.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Eryn MacKenzie
Review:
We did an egg coffee class here with the owner. We were given a welcome drink on arrival and then a thorough explanation and walk through of the difference between robusta and arabica beans included a side by side comparison of appearance and taste. It was fascinating and you could easily see the difference.  Fun fact: all coffee from Vietnam is Robusta and is North Americans drink mostly Arabica.

The egg coffee class was phenomenal. We got a full walk through of the origins of egg coffee and then an interactive class on how to make it. Then we got to sit and taste our creations with the options of bruleeing the egg meringue or dusting with cocoa. It was wonderful.

The atmosphere, drinks, owner, everything was top notch. Could not recommend enough

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Ophelie Chuffart
Review: Cute coffee shop with fast WiFi and few outlets if you need to work and charge your computers. I got a delicious cold brew with litchi. The prices are affordable. My only complaint is that there is neither toilet paper nor hand soap in the bathroom.

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Naufal Husain
Review: Attended the coffee making class via Airbnb. The head barista, Linh is very knowledgeable about coffee and we learm alot from for the 2 hours class on how to make egg and coconut coffee and it was really good. We also tried the lemon coffee. Highly recommended place to visit and try their egg and coconut coffee 😁

Name: NYNA Coffee - Fresh Coffee Beans - Lê Văn Linh
Address: 20 P. Lê Văn Linh, Hàng Mã
Author: Alec Hickernell
Review: We took an egg coffee making class here that was listed on Airbnb. So amazing! Learned about the history of egg coffee and tasted different types of coffee beans. Roomy place to sit with WiFi and AC. Definitely recommend!

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Adam Fente
Review: Decent iced americano, service was a bit slow and no pastries. Coffee itself was decent, but the balcony was very nice for the street view.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Hạnh Bùi Thị Mỹ
Review: Good drinks with affordable prices, not too expensive. The interior is quite chill with comfortable seats, nice arts and an amazing aquarium. However, the AC doesn’t seem to be working properly, it’s not too hot but not as cool as my liking. The bookshelf is kinda messy

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Sabrina C
Review: Waited 30 minutes for 2 drinks. Had to go down and ask where the drinks were and 3 members of staff were just standing around doing nothing and hadn’t even started preparing them. There was no apology issued I was just told it would be 5 minutes. If I hadn’t already paid I would have left for sure as it was not cheap either! My lychee tea was nice but my partner ordered a mango smoothie and got some sort of mango desert/ice cream with cream on top which was a far cry from the healthy drink he thought he was ordering. The seating balcony area was nice so adding a star for this. I would not return.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: John Dean
Review:
Two story cafe with a lot of seating options. Besides the drinks they also serve pastries.
Peach tea was refreshing and good size for the prize.

Name: Goco Coffee
Author: Karim Ghomari
Review: Their are a few aquariums laid around this cafe. One aquariums tank filled with maybe a hundred fish each with a different colour of the rainbow, another tank holds a few bigger (what I assume are) fighting fish. Overall the coffee is pretty good, they have all the classic Vietnamese options as well as the classic Italian ones (espresso, latte, etc.) The only food item on the menu is croissants.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Greg Sharpe
Review:
Cozy cafe that's a nice oasis from the busy city action. A good range of coffees including the classics and some creative. Also delcious cake on offer. The oat-milk latte and cheese cake paired well!

Comfy seating and friendly staff, plus a green area out back for some extra atmosphere. This cafe has the perfect blend of chill and positive vibes!

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Thanh Lam Tran
Review:
A cozy small coffee shop with a beautiful purple trellis that caught my eye. The ambiance was lovely and inviting, perfect for enjoying a quiet cup of coffee. While the drinks weren't anything out of the ordinary, they were still enjoyable. The staff was friendly and welcoming, making me feel right at home.
I had a pleasant experience at this coffee shop and would recommend it to anyone looking for a nice place to relax and unwind.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Claudia Mi
Review:
In order to escape the chaotic streets of Hanoi this is a real gem. Went there to get a proper coffee and we didn’t got disappointed. Very friendly staff and besides classics they also serve fancy own creations - worth to mention they also offer oat milk.

Would definitely recommend to have a seat in the mini garden 🌱

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Silvana Smith
Review: The best little spot to get a coffee . I ordered a cold brew apricot and bergamot tea . It's worth making the trip to get away from the noise of the old quarter .staff are super friendly . One of my highlights.

Name: FUKU Coffee
Author: Nguyen Xuan Ha Anh (Milu)
Review: Matcha Latte (original) (60k VND) here used Japanese Shizuoka Matcha with condensed milk, which made the drink creamier and elevated the matcha flavour. This will be suitable for those who love sweet matcha with a hint of umami in it.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: John Hendrikx
Review: The flat white with brownie is a respectful match loved it...  really an upgrade to what starbucks offers. A must do in Hanoi.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Oliver Taylor
Review: Came here this morning for a coffee and pain au chocolat. We were met with a lovely warm welcome from the staff and seated quickly. We ordered two lattes and pastries. They were both well presented when delivered to our table, however my coffee was luke warm and both our pastries were very dry and almost stale. We sent the pastries back and they kindly replaced them. After waiting even longer for these replacements to by warmed up, they arrived and were also quite dry. These ones weren’t as bad as the first so we just ate them. The staff here were very apologetic and tried their best to make it right. I hope these small little issues get noted and worked on as this place has so much potential. The cafe itself is beautiful inside and very well decorated!

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Hiep Dao Trong
Review:
The coffee quality is not suitable for coffee enthusiasts.
The location is convenient with decent decoration.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: Philip Hubertus
Review: Sweet little coffee shop with excellent service. High quality coffee. Great fresh made juices. Small French bakery items. Almost like a coffee and snack boutique. Super nice interior and exterior design and setting.

Name: CAPPI Coffee
Address: 55A P. Phan Chu Trinh, Phan Chu Trinh
Author: De Ren Ang
Review: Bac xiu was delicious, and croffle was fresh. The tap in the toilet was an engineering marvel and cannot be missed!! Definite recommend 👌🏻👍🏻

Name: Coffee
Author: Jessie Do
Review:
Ambience: nice modern eco friendly interior, with spacious indoor and outdoor seating. Its located at a rather hidden corner of the street, so house is usually not crowded - suitable if one likes tranquility.

Food: their avocado icecream is the best, with good balance of sweetness - creaminess - fragrance.

Staff: friendly

Overall recommend for a casual gathering or daylong study trip :)

Name: Coffee
Author: linh nguyen
Review: Nice place and really good drink. Avocado ice cream is super delicious. Highly recommend

Name: Coffee
Author: Ngan Do
Review: Nice and quiet coffee shop, staffs are friendly, drinks are affordable and taste good ❤️

Name: Coffee
Author: Viet Cuong Nguyen
Review: Very good taste with a different style.

Name: Coffee
Author: Hải Cao Văn
Review:
beautiful space
delicious drinks
polite staff

Name: Wheel Coffee
Author: David Nesbitt
Review: #1 best Vietnamese sweet milk coffee!  We love strong coffee, and this is the place.  We tried many other shops in the old quarter, but we always returned to Wheel Coffee for Brown Coffee.  The coffee is dark roasted, lots of crema, & when sweetened condensed milk is added, the drink tastes like bittersweet chocolate.  So,so good.  Yummy!  The shop is small & only serves coffee.  Great outdoor seating with lots of shade.  Or, air conditioning inside.

Name: Wheel Coffee
Author: Adam Fente
Review: Great salt white coffee, friendly staff, good aircon and strong WiFi 😁

Name: Wheel Coffee
Author: priscyllagallo
Review: Very delicious and fresh coffee. The cat was also super cute!

Name: Wheel Coffee
Author: Veronika Vyoralová
Review: Very cozy cafe with delicious coffee for a good price. The coffee was served with a beautiful latte art and the owners were very welcoming. Overall great experience.

Name: Wheel Coffee
Author: Lucie Kordíková
Review: A wonderful place worth a visit. Excellent taste of coffee, top notch service, definitely one of my favourite spots in Hanoi.

Name: Co:coffee
Address: nhà Gems, Tầng 1, toà, 1 Ng. 21 Đ. Lê Văn Lương, Nhân Chính
Author: Fabien Goetz
Review: Very good coffee and cakes. A fine place with excellent service.

Name: Co:coffee
Address: nhà Gems, Tầng 1, toà, 1 Ng. 21 Đ. Lê Văn Lương, Nhân Chính
Author: Toma
Review:
The cafe is on the ground floor only

Americano(not my favorite) and a tiramisu are reasonable, That’s ok

Name: Co:coffee
Address: nhà Gems, Tầng 1, toà, 1 Ng. 21 Đ. Lê Văn Lương, Nhân Chính
Author: RayRayRay Tan
Review:
Espresso so bad that I had to go to Highlands.

There’s chunks in my créma 😂 you literally had one job - to make sure your coffee machine is clean and functioning properly.

For those who are unaware on the topic:

Crema is one of the most prized components of a well-made espresso. Caramel-colored and creamy in texture, the foamy puff is created when hot water emulsifies coffee bean oils and floats atop the espresso with smooth little bubbles.

Name: Co:coffee
Address: nhà Gems, Tầng 1, toà, 1 Ng. 21 Đ. Lê Văn Lương, Nhân Chính
Author: Quân Phan
Review: Small and quiet place for offline working.

Name: Co:coffee
Address: nhà Gems, Tầng 1, toà, 1 Ng. 21 Đ. Lê Văn Lương, Nhân Chính
Author: Hien Phuong
Review: Must try some coffee here

Name: The Copa Coffee
Address: 65 P. Trần Đại Nghĩa, Bách Khoa
Author: Bang Nguyen
Review: Coffee menu taste good, use Simonelli espresso machine. Has a chill balcony view. Wifi is not strong enough to cover the balcony. Small front, not enough place for many bikes. But have parking lots (parking fee required) nearby.

Name: The Copa Coffee
Address: 65 P. Trần Đại Nghĩa, Bách Khoa
Author: Mr Niang
Review: the coffee was good, the staff was nice 😊 I liked everything

Name: The Copa Coffee
Address: 65 P. Trần Đại Nghĩa, Bách Khoa
Author: Thảo Hoàng Thanh
Review: That day, I ordered cold brew and I personally found it not delicious. Enthusiastic staff. Prices are also on par with other parties. There is open space outside to sit, but in the summer it's so hot that you can't sit. Sitting in the dark is ok

Name: The Copa Coffee
Address: 65 P. Trần Đại Nghĩa, Bách Khoa
Author: Thùy An Ngô
Review: Nice small space, few tables. Staff are very friendly. I have tried all the teas of the shop (59), found many dishes have quite similar flavors, divided into 2 groups: sour and sweet :)))

Name: The Copa Coffee
Address: 65 P. Trần Đại Nghĩa, Bách Khoa
Author: Trang Nguyễn Thu
Review: Bad coffee, burnt beans. Mixing skills are not good. When I ate 2 dishes, I couldn't drink the 3rd sip of both dishes. The price is not cheap with 1 cup nearly 50k. 2 drinks are 95k.

Name: Oxygen Coffee
Address: 71 P. Trần Quốc Vượng, Dịch Vọng Hậu
Author: John Dean
Review: Great place to have a drink. With different seating areas, a nice selection of drinks & couple of snacks 🍪

Name: Oxygen Coffee
Address: 71 P. Trần Quốc Vượng, Dịch Vọng Hậu
Author: Chung Mai
Review: Reasonable price, good food,

Name: Oxygen Coffee
Address: 71 P. Trần Quốc Vượng, Dịch Vọng Hậu
Author: Nguyen Hoang Ha
Review: Natural-oriented, mountainous-liked decoration

Edit: "salted coffee" (cà phê muối) is good too!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Amy
Review: Lovely little cafe, the gentleman who served us was very friendly. We had coconut coffees and a butterfly pea lemonade, all of which were delicious!

Name: Star Up Coffee & Tea
Author: Dan Cerf
Review: Outstanding coffee with a nice outside table/chairs (at regular height!) and great service to boot!

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ

Review: My favorite specialty coffee shop in Hanoi! I love how detailed and heartful work the owner put into the arts, decoration, and drinks. I always enjoy coming here for a special treat and a good time guaranteed. Highly recommended!

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà
Address: 23 Ng. 165 P. Thái Hà, Láng Hạ

Name: Class6 Specialty Coffee Thái Hà

Review: Nice place in a decent alley!!! Staffs are kind and easy going!

Address: 23 P. Hàng Tre, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Adriana Perez
Review:
Great little spot to order a coffee, people watch and use WiFi.

I ordered the coconut coffee and enjoyed the moment.

Name: Hope Coffee 23
Address: 23 P. Hàng Tre, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Brittnie Y
Review: 4 stars for sitting on the street lol but I know it’s common here. Seated and served quickly as it is not busy at all. Just locals to my surprise as this place was recommended by our hotel.

Name: Hope Coffee 23
Address: 23 P. Hàng Tre, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: kizzoq23
Review: Tried the egg coffee, took a little long to make but it was rich smooth and just a hint of egg and more coffee flavor and not a too sweet which is nice.  Well balanced flavor and smoothness. 9/10. Must try

Name: Hope Coffee 23
Address: 23 P. Hàng Tre, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Teo Zhi Eng
Review: Chance upon this cafe, as my friends and I were nearby waiting for our tour bus. I tried their iced coconut coffee and it was amazing!! Service was fast. Not that crowded. There’s wide variety of coffee as well.

Name: Hope Coffee 23
Address: 23 P. Hàng Tre, Lý Thái Tổ
Author: Long Nguyen Hoang
Review: Nice coffee, quiet, good service and cheap 😊

Name: Highlands Coffee
Author: Tuan D. Nguyen
Review:
Great drinks, really good cakes, decent and fast service. Quite clean. Excellent views.

I've tried all of the cakes and they are very decent, even at random times. Quite impressive.

It can be super crowded but otherwise, great atmosphere, spacious, and chill.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Author: Nguyen Nguyet Minh
Review: Nice location. Wide open space. You can visit the museum and flag tower beside . Many seat options. Nice staff. Fast service. The price is quite expensive, the flavor of drink is not very good.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Author: Garth Motton
Review: Atmosphere great.. and that’s all. Iced coffee was full of ice and very little coffee. Save your $$ and go to an authentic coffee shop.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Author: Kerri Chequer
Review: The museum is in the process of moving. And this coffee shop short changes tourists and drinks are just a full cup of ice very poor.

Name: Highlands Coffee
Author: Alex K
Review:
Me and my friend both got short changed here when we paid with larger notes. It seems they take advantage of tourists, despite it being a big chain in Hanoi.

I questioned it after reading reviews here and she gave me the correct change straight away so obviously knew.

The coffee was nice but three sips and it was gone (too much ice).

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn
Author: Paula Collazo
Review: My favorite lil cafe in the area! Beautiful area and decor, super yummy drinks and very kind and friendly staff 🥰 I go here at least once a week! I always get their delicious egg coffee or the guava and strawberry tea- both are amazing!

Name: Sunny Garden Coffee
Address: 3 P. Võ Quý Huân, Phúc Diễn

Review: Nice atmosphere, but drinks not so good...

Author: John Dean
Review:
Charming cafe with a lot of character. Unfortunately, we didn’t see the cats but we still had a good time. Several floors available, some more for socializing with a couch, others more for studying or working.
The watermelon vitamin juice was very refreshing and nicely finished with some watermelon chunks.

Name: Hub de Tana Coffee
Author: Sinh Phan
Review:
The place good be to work. But not really working place with me.
The drink is good enought. I have ordered a espresso coffee because they are sold out vietnam coffee.

Review: I found this place by accident and what can I say… delicious coffee ☕️,decor wonderful ,service very nice. I recommend to everyone 💜

Name: Hub de Tana Coffee

Name: Hub de Tana Coffee
Author: Tú Nguyễn
Review: If you love cats, this is the place. The plus is the place doesn't smell like cat stink. Also, their collection of drink is excellent, best coldbrew in the area

Name: Stereo Coffee
Address: 77 P. Tuệ Tĩnh, Lê Đại Hành
Author: Teresa
Review: I’ve been here for about 10 times. The staff are always very attentive. Bathroom always clean. The drinks are good. I’d be happier if the waffle is served with ice-cream of other flavors. Like always, today I’ve had a good time here drawing and listening to music !

Name: Stereo Coffee
Address: 77 P. Tuệ Tĩnh, Lê Đại Hành
Author: James Murnane
Review: 🍵 ☕️ 🖊 Great vibes here! Lots of sunlight, good place to relax or work. They have tables as well as comfy seating. 3 stories. I enjoyed the matcha. Really good service as well. My go to spot to get work done in the area. It can get busy in the afternoon.

Name: Stereo Coffee
Address: 77 P. Tuệ Tĩnh, Lê Đại Hành
Author: Allison Nicole
Review: Great drinks! Studied/worked here for a long time and it felt so nice. 3 stories so there’s lots of seatings.

Name: Stereo Coffee
Address: 77 P. Tuệ Tĩnh, Lê Đại Hành
Author: Kotryna Kantautaitė
Review: Very good coffee, baristas are very friendly and helpful, explained what is the difference between a lot of different Vietnamese coffees that they have 🥰

Name: Stereo Coffee
Address: 77 P. Tuệ Tĩnh, Lê Đại Hành
Author: David T
Review: Great little coffee shop with chill vibes and friendly staff. Had the kumquat soda and would highly recommend 👌🏼

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Mir Umme Sumaia
Review: This was our first time there. The food was good. We took the smoked fish and chips. Fries and others tasted good but the fish was bit overcooked which made it a little crunch. For 750 BDT, they could increase coleslaw a little more. Service was 50/50 as we pressed their service button 3 times but no one came. But after when they came, the service was speedy. Their ambiance was amazing. Interior is very beautiful, very rustic. Very good place for having a nice, peaceful meal. Great place for casual GTG.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Kazi Sartaj Ahmed
Review: Pretty chill place for a cold coffee drink or even some appetising meals. This is my first review of this restaurant after having visited multiple times & I must applaud them for being consistent in their service, food & cleanliness. This place is very photo friendly with many wall decorations & other items. Definitely would recommend to come with family & friends.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Tahmid Chowdhury (tuhi009)
Review: The Blueberry Cheesecake was great. Lemon Tart was a bit too sour. Service was fast and easy. We went around 9.30pm so it was not that crowded. The interior was really nice.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: afique ahmed
Review:
I
must say, the salted caramel freddo at Happiness Café is even better than North End's, which makes me confident their other menu items are just as good. I used to be a regular at North End, but it's become a bit overrated. The ambiance at Happiness Café, along with their dedicated smoking zone, really adds to the overall experience. I think this might just become my new go-to coffee spot.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Urmi Debnath
Review:
Happiness cafe is a beautiful place to relax. The ambience is great, the decor is beautiful. There is a variety of seating options. There is an outdoor seating option with live grill, there is live kitchen view seating, a corner with books and games and plants. It was really cozy, and the option of reading books while waiting for food felt great.

The menu comes in a tab handed by the staff. I ordered Fettuccine Alfredo with grilled chicken. It tasted great. It was creamy and was seasoned perfectly.

The service was good. The price in the menu is inclusive of VAT and service charge, which impressed me. However , the price seems a little steep. There are options to pay with cash, card and bKash. Overall it was a very good and comforting experience.

Name: The White Canary Café
Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: The White Canary is a hyped place for brunch and dessert lovers in Gulshan Area....But the disappointing part was this place didn’t even match the hype...It was tough enough to find the exact location, not even a single signboard! Interior was below average...The most famous item on their menu, the buttermilk blueberry pancake tastes wasted and price flawed...Service and price was okay...

Name: The White Canary Café
Author: Shehzaani
Review: One thing I didn't like is the fact that there's no indication that it's a cafe from the outside. The new location just looks like a house. They NEED to place a sign outside. Other than that, the café is quite nice. It's a little expensive but the portions are good. I got the harley quinn french toast - two thick pieces of french toast filled to the brim with cream cheese between them - and I loved it, I definetely recommend it. The blueberry buttermilk pancake is good enough but not worth the hype and the sandwiches are alright. Another dish I recommend is the creamy shrimp pasta, it was pretty tasty. The waiters were very nice, they even gave us a complementary lemon iced tea!!

Name: The White Canary Café
Author: Biksam
Review: My experience with the food of this cafe is just wonderful. I've already been there on two different occasions and tried a couple of items by now. Let me start with the creamy shrimp pasta, honestly it was real creamy but was a bit sticky. They gave some white soup like thing in a small cup along with that item so I, by pouring that soup over that sticky pasta, made that a little watery and then it hit my taste. After that comes the salmon eggs benedict and it was really pleasant with every bite on that. Then i tried their most hyped blueberry buttermilk pancake and it was just super delicious. The most memorable taste i had there was with their signature coffee 'the white canary'. I've tried so many different coffees and it ranks quite top on my list. Moreover, some important things i wanna share are, their rooftop is closed by around 10pm, they stop taking orders of food by around 1am, they spend quite a lot of time delivering the food so it may be a little annoying sometimes and they have some space for parking a few cars inside their surroundings.

Name: The White Canary Café
Author: Mehjabeen Rahman
Review:
This was an extremely hyped cafe for some time. Especially for their blueberry buttermilk pancakes. We tried it, did not live up to the hype. The only good part about the pancakes were the whipped cream on top. The ambience was the worst part of this cafe. Took us ages to find the location,  no sign, banner for customers to identify. If you take the prices into account, the atmosphere should be so much better.  The paint from the walls were chipping off.
We did like the iced latte, it was refreshing. But if we're paying 300+ for a latte, I expect it come in a glass container not a flimsy plastic to-go cup.

Name: The White Canary Café
Author: AgustD AK
Review:
Great spot for introverts! One book and good coffee. Or for brunch!

The exterior of the place doesn't look like anything of cafe as at first glance, its someone's home from early 80s.

Inside, gives very pretty cute little cozy homely vibe. Their outdoor area is great to enjoy in a rainy day while you’re waiting for your order.

We were there for lunch and not crowded at all. Their brunch menu looked solid.
Ordered almost half of their menu and all was yummy, which  is rare. Creamy shrimp pasta and tandoory chicken spaghetti was such a delish. Blueberry buttermilk pancake was also  mouthwatering.

Staffs are really well behaved and fast.
Good place for dates and casual meetings, quite, friendly, trendy.

One recommendation: they can work on their yard area to clean and make some sitting arrangements

Review: We went there yesterday to celebrate our friend's birthday.. the environment was awesome. We ordered set menu of 150tk... but service was so bad! The don't care about their customers.. & they also should provide some small waste bins there for throwing tissue & other things... but ultimately it's a good cafe in Bailyroad!

Name: The Grounds Cafe
Author: Syed Noor Muhammad
Review: The restaurant was very silent. The environment was very good. It was very neat and clean and had a large space. The behaviour of the restaurant owner and the waiters were very good and pleasent. Their coffee was shakes were very mouth watering. The price of the food was a little bit high. But though it was okay to me.

Review: One of the oldest food court in Mirpur Purobi. Food Quality is average. Internal Environment is not good.

Name: Goonjon Bangla Cafe

Review: The quality of food here is good. Although the restaurant is not a famous one, they are running business for quite a long time. I think the quality is the key behind this.

Review:
One of the oldest restaurant at purobi.The weather was hot inside, not well decorated.
But food cost is cheap,Couple can find little bit privacy there.But the place doesn't attract me.

Name: Goonjon Bangla Cafe
Author: Muktadir Ahmed
Review: The ground floor is quite good but the 1st floor (where they serve so called Thai/Chinese menu) is dangerous. I was literally shocked 😮 about the waiter’s behavior, after having the meal he gave me small letter about tip (Picture added).

Name: Goonjon Bangla Cafe
Author: Mohammad Rasel
Review: A very good place for cheap and oily foods like Samucha, Singara and kabab. Tea is good. Price is very reasonable. No parking place. No air cooler. Not clean up to the limit.

Author: rumana aref
Review: Army Golf Club is a fantastic,  eco friendly  place to visit. The green nature will definitely create a calmness  in your heart. The placid nature will bring tranquility  within you. You need to have a member with you if u want to enjoy the facilities of the cafe. Food is not that much standard but the price  is cheaper. From breakfast  to dinner u can enjoy. There is place for namaz available. The lavatories are clean. There are souvenir and items related to golf also available for purchase.  Good place for family.

Name: The White Canary Cafe - Tejgaon
Address: Level 3 Shanta Western Tower 186 Bir Uttam Mir Shoan Shorok, Dhaka
Author: Tausiq M. Rahman
Review: The location is in a corporate building so this outlet is mainly catered towards corporate clients in the neighbouring area. Nevertheless the branch is compact but beautifully designed. The cafe has the proper ambiance to meet someone for chitchat. I had their signature dish which was the Blueberry Buttermilk Pancakes. It tastes as good as it looks. The pancakes was fluffy and perfectly done. It was drizzled with the blueberry jam on the top made it marvellous. The blueberry bits adds much more depth to it. The cream cheese paired well with the dish. The portion was quite large and fulfilling. The Peach Ice Tea was bland and a bit disappointing. I wanted to pick some other drink but they were out of stock for most of them. Their staffs were cooperative and friendly. Service time was quick.

Name: The White Canary Cafe - Tejgaon
Address: Level 3 Shanta Western Tower 186 Bir Uttam Mir Shoan Shorok, Dhaka
Author: Impa Farazy
Review:
Ordered:
-Blueberry Buttermilk Pancakes:
Pancakes were good, but the blueberry syrup was too overpowering.
- Harley Quinn Toast:
The filling tasted like condensed milk and icing sugar, not very good. Don’t recommend.
- Peach Iced Tea:
💯 recommend! It was very refreshing
- Americano: was good

Name: The White Canary Cafe - Tejgaon
Address: Level 3 Shanta Western Tower 186 Bir Uttam Mir Shoan Shorok, Dhaka
Author: Ayesha Zahid
Review: It is  location is in a corporate building to maintain corporate clients in the neighbouring area. Nevertheless the branch is compact but beautifully designed. The cafe has the proper ambiance to meet someone for chitchat. I had their signature dish which was the Blueberry Buttermilk Pancakes. It tastes as good as it looks. It was drizzled with the blueberry jam on the top made it .The cream cheese paired well with the dish. The portion was quite large and fulfilling. Average taste of hot chocolate.  Their staffs were cooperative and friendly. Service time was quick.

Name: The White Canary Cafe - Tejgaon
Address: Level 3 Shanta Western Tower 186 Bir Uttam Mir Shoan Shorok, Dhaka
Author: Rumman Ahmed Prodhan
Review: Ordered a strawberry shake & white Canary signature coffee. Both of them were average. The shake was too sugary. Blueberry pancakes were not available.

Name: The White Canary Cafe - Tejgaon
Address: Level 3 Shanta Western Tower 186 Bir Uttam Mir Shoan Shorok, Dhaka
Author: Dil Afroz
Review:
Love it.. I have tasted their vegan brownie, mocha and club sandwich with brown bread.. all of them tasted good.. specially the chips and dip that comes with the sandwich is awesome.
Environment is amazing. This is a small shop but they have decorated it so nicely that you will love it.. staffs are well behaved..

Name: Pinewood Cafe + Kitchen
Author: rushi rahman786
Review:
At first I would like to say that this restaurant provides the best service and mouth-watering foods. Me and Two friends went there last Friday and stayed for about 6 hours but no one disturbed us. And the second thing is that the foods we ordered were all delicious. We tasted their Potato wedges,Thai chicken Fry, BBQ chicken pasta,Beef Burger(without bacon) and Maxican chicken with 3 side dishes.
Though the food price is a little bit expensive according to students, the food tastes delicious. Moreover , they also add 5% vat on the total bill.

Name: Pinewood Cafe + Kitchen
Author: Lisa sharmin
Review: The food prices were reasonable, but the atmosphere wasn't ideal for a large group. We were a party of 13 women, and unfortunately, whenever we got a bit loud while laughing, the staff would ask us to quiet down. It seemed like their expectation was for guests to simply take pictures, eat their meals, and leave quietly. While the restaurant wasn't crowded, we felt constantly monitored and somewhat unwelcome, which definitely put a damper on our enjoyment.

Name: Pinewood Cafe + Kitchen
Author: Farhana Jafrin (Onee)
Review:
Beautiful and cozy atmosphere, well decorated with lots of plants and nice paintings.
Really great place to hangout  with friends and colleagues after a hectic day.
We tried their creamy pasta and thai noodles. We liked their pasta, taste great, while noodles was nothing special, so so.

Overall, it was a great experience.

Name: Pinewood Cafe + Kitchen
Author: 0155_Anik Hasan
Review: Place is nice and cozy. Foods are delicious. Staffs are well behaved. Though foods are quite pricy but it was okay for us.

Name: Pinewood Cafe + Kitchen
Author: Roudrosporshi Megh
Review: I had a wonderful experience at Pinewood Restaurant and Caf.  The food was delicious; I tried the seafood platter and enjoyed everything except the squid. The chicken steak with mashed potatoes was especially delightful. I also tried blueberry cheese cake and brownie with vanilla icecream. I loved the cake but the brownie not ao much. The service was attentive, and the atmosphere was warm and inviting. Their decor was fantastic.  Overall, it's a fantastic place to dine, but accessibility improvements would make it even better.

Name: Vive Study Cafe - Hatirjheel (First Study Cafe in Bangladesh)
Author: Suprio Pramanik Emon
Review: I had a great experience at Vive Study Cafe - Hatirjheel, the first study cafe in Bangladesh! The environment is beautiful and peaceful, perfect for focusing on assignments or studying. I was also pleasantly surprised by the warm welcome, including a complimentary drink, which added a nice touch. The staff is very friendly and accommodating. I went to complete an assignment and managed to finish it on time without any distractions. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a productive workspace in a calm setting!

Name: Vive Study Cafe - Hatirjheel (First Study Cafe in Bangladesh)
Author: Nayeem Chowdhury
Review:

Hope they will solve their AC & toilet flush(*_*) issue soon.

Their customer  service is just excellent.
Must tried Restaurant.

They have a large outdoor seating for having smoke and adda. A really good place to hang out with FNF. Staff are well educated and smart enough to handle foreign guest.

Parking available.

Another thing is people have to park their cars by the roadside as there isn’t any specific parking zone.

Name: Kettle Cafe
Author: Nahian Islam
Review: Kettle Cafe located on the Chandrima Housing area just beside of Dhaka Uddyan. This place is very near to the river (Turag-Buriganga) Bank. This a nice place to Hangout. Generally people come here in afternoon or weekend to pass a quality time with family or dear ones. The coffee shop is not highly decorated but the simplicity may be okay for everyone. Prices are reasonable here. You can get a nice view of river in sunset from here. As this place is not so crowded therefore still you will get the natural feels here. The main problem is - from evening there is too much mosquitoes over there. So be save from evening to night time. Other is this place is nice.

Name: Kettle Cafe
Author: Rejaul Ahsan
Review: This is a great cafe with good coffee.Perfect place to have a coffee,or simply chat with buddy's! with a great brunch menu. Excellent service and a great place nearby on the bank of the river Buriganga at Mohammadpur area in Dhaka city and a great value for the price!

Name: Kettle Cafe
Author: NJ Lily
Review: Ordered seafood ramen and chicken dumpling ramen from the Kettle cafe. It was delicious.

Name: Kettle Cafe
Author: Abdullah All Noman
Review: The ramen was okay. We had to wait for 40 minutes to get a place to sit. You need to wait for the food if the place is packed. You can see the live kitchen. The ramen had regular noodles, eggs, and meat. The taste was nice, though. But the place and rate of the food did not match according to my perspective. This "Kettle Cafe" restaurant has left the best impressions! delicious dishes, beautiful presentation, wide menu. I recommend it to everyone. i would like to come back here again and again. The sitting place is small, only four tables. So, plan accordingly.

Name: Kettle Cafe
Author: Md. Mahmudul Hasan Emon
Review:
The quality of food was not good at all. There were lots of mosquitoes inside. However, the price is fairly cheap. Inside there are swings, sliders for kids to play. There are 2 pool tables to play, which can be used from 11 am to 5 pm.

My personal opinion is that it would be better to go to the river bank and sit in the open, although mosquitoes are a big problem.

Name: Cafe Mango
Author: Monisha Kaiser
Review:
Beautiful decor and ambience
Service is quick and fast and very friendly with smiles and very accommodating staff.
But, the food is really bad. I had wings, cream of mushroom soup, pizza and drinks before. Today i had poutine which was the worst ever that i couldn't even complete

Name: Cafe Mango
Author: Prataoy Kabya Bhowmik
Review: Pretty nice and cozy place to hangout. The tables are arranged significant distances apart. The low lights will give your eyes a little bit of rest, however, it might be problem for some people. There’s a chessboard where you can engage yourself while waiting for the food. Did not have to wait long for the food to arrive. The Jazz Chicken was good enough. Unlike the representations on their social media handles, we were served small pieces of chicken instead of one large piece. Not a big deal though. The Chickmania was somewhat disappointing. I, personally, did not like the flavour, also the chicken pieces were a bit dry. The rice and sautéed vegetables were on point!

Name: Cafe Mango
Author: mumu benjir
Review:
Lover the atmosphere with the sophisticated crowd. This place is quiet and close to nature. They have lots of plants which make the environment calm.
#You can play chess to pass leisure time.
Food:

Chickenmania- 9/10
Brownie- 8/10
Virgin Mojito- 6/10
Price:
Chicken meal# 500-1000 taka

Dessert# 150-400

Name: Cafe Mango
Author: Halima tuz Sadia
Review:
One of the coolest place to hang out ♥️
The interior will certainly catch attention.
Food tasted really good.

Name: Cafe Mango
Author: Mamunur Rashid
Review: Cafe Mango at Gulshan 1 in Dhaka offers not only a delightful dining experience but also boasts awesome interiors that elevate the atmosphere. The fusion of modern and traditional elements creates a cozy yet stylish ambiance perfect for any occasion. What sets Cafe Mango apart is its diverse breakfast menu, featuring Bangla, American, and English options, catering to various tastes and preferences. From hearty Bangla breakfast classics to familiar American favorites and refined English offerings, there's something for everyone. Additionally, their extensive selection of drinks adds to the experience, ranging from refreshing juices to specialty coffees and teas. Whether you're craving a comforting breakfast or simply looking to unwind with a flavorful beverage, Cafe Mango's menu and inviting interiors make it a must-visit destination in Dhaka's culinary scene.

Name: Cafe Login
Address: 152/1/H, Sabamun Tower, 1st Floor, Green Rd, Dhaka
Author: Mir Sabbir
Review: The restaurant entrance is hard to find. We ordered a combo meal for two. Which includes 2 classic burgers which is a bit tricky as I thought I can order any for the classic burgers section. Their service was alright. But the food wasn't good and the restaurants were a bit dirty. Also the atmosphere wasn't great. I liked the potato wages. But drinks and burgers weren't good. I don't think I will be going back.

Name: Cafe Login
Address: 152/1/H, Sabamun Tower, 1st Floor, Green Rd, Dhaka
Author: zannatul
Review:
Food was quite good. But the seating space is very congested and you can easily overhear what other people are saying.
We took:
Regular nachos (Tk. 250)
Student Combo Platter (Tk. 300)
Loved the wedges, they were pretty spicy.

Name: Cafe Login
Address: 152/1/H, Sabamun Tower, 1st Floor, Green Rd, Dhaka
Author: Faiaz Ahmed Rabbany
Review:
Its a great place for hangout with family and friends. One of the best restaurant in Panthpath area.A small place but can give a peaceful view of the road. The food quality is good as well. A good place to have burger. Burger taste same like the other brands. Price is reasonable. Environment is okay.   Staffs are also well mannered and well behaved.
But the place is little bit tiny and turn over crowed in lunch hour!

Name: Cafe Login
Address: 152/1/H, Sabamun Tower, 1st Floor, Green Rd, Dhaka
Author: Md. Sazzad Hossain Sharkar
Review:
This place is lovely, with excellent food quality. The French fries, in particular, are outstanding, and the beef burgers are fantastic. Plus, you have the option to add extra toppings.

I've shared unedited, raw photos for an authentic look.

Name: Cafe Login
Address: 152/1/H, Sabamun Tower, 1st Floor, Green Rd, Dhaka
Author: Samiul Alam (প্রত্যয়)
Review:
Hit Stick is a hot dog. There was a sausage in between a tall bun and it had mustard and tomato sauce. The bun was very soft. There was also cheese in the middle of the bun with the sausage. It was spicy and sour. Overall it was a nice snack.

Luscious Lime is basically a mint lemonade. It was frozen and had a reasonable amount of mint and lemon in it. The quantity was okay. It went well with the hot dog.

Address: West Panthapath, East Side Of Square Hospital ltd Dhaka
Author: Sirajum Munir GALIB
Review: You get lot of items in a single pack but the comes in very small amounts. You definitely have to spend more than the package in order to fulfill your hunger. Some item comes cold too.

The staff here is very good.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Somaiya Haque
Review:
I gave them 5 stars because they deserve it. I love the total ambience of the place, it is a very cozy place to chill and hangout. Great for family gatherings and friends catch-up. The place was very big, nice and the interior design was really top notch. There were comfy sofas and chairs everywhere. The dinning was neat and clean. I'm really satisfied with the food they served. I took One cappuccino coffee, One chocolate mousse and Cream of chicken soup.
Coffee- 4/5
Chocolate mousse- 5/5 highly recommend it.
Soup - 4/5
I'm happy with their service and staff's behaviour. They were very gentle and welcoming and well mannered.
My overall experience was very good. I will definitely go there again.
They served zero cal with brown and white sugar which i like the most. They are really health conscious and concerned about their customers. I love the gesture. A great coffee shop indeed in dhanmondi.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Sunny Quazi Saad Billah
Review:
Relatively on the more expensive side. Quality of food was okay and could have been better. The portions were too less.

The juices were different and was uncommon. The fish cake was out of sorts. The pizza was top notch.

The seating arrangements were nice and there was a space for the smokers as well.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Abu Bakor Siddique
Review:
Someone has already said in the reviews that ambience is the key highlight here. It couldn't be more true. Furnishing and decor choices felt tasteful to me. And usually not very crowded.

The staff generally have a jolly approach to things and you'll feel welcome the moment you walk in.
Their coffee is nothing special. Croissants are better avoided in my opinion. Hot chocolate was also underwhelming.
They have good pastas though. We had prawn and pesto, it was cooked to perfection. Some of the desserts are also good. That mango bliss was blissful.

I have been there quite a few times, so naturally not all of them were perfect experiences. A waiter took my plates away assuming i was done (which i was not) without asking. And this happened to me twice. But they are only humans and it would be nit picky of me to make a fuss about it.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: khadiza Fyruz
Review: The place was excellent!  service staff was very attentive, and food proportion was big too. specially the teriyaki chicken I'll recommend 10/10, because the meat was so nicely done that it immediately caught our attention. drinks were of good taste too. music was in moderation it was overall very sweet. their dessert section was also diverse. overall enjoyed it.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Trisha Tishu
Review: It is an upscale dining restaurant.  Light jazz music was playing.  I selected cream of mushroom soup, seafood tapas and chocolate pistachio dome from their menu.  Service was good.  The spanish dish seafood tapas tasted very good.  I took the chocolate pistachio dome for dessert, quite uniquely presented and was tempting.  But I was disappointed to see that the quantity of all the dishes were less.  Because I paid a high price for it.

Name: Belafian Cafe & Live Bakery
Address: Plot no: 492, Nearby Bashundhara Evercare Exit Gate, Dhaka 1229, 2056 Bangladesh, Dhaka
Author: Rabita Saleh
Review:
Liked this cafe for what it was, a nice place to hang out with friends and have a laugh. It's new, and not full of crowds yet, so you can spend a good amount of time chatting freely.

The baked goods from the "live bakery" are delicious. Would especially recommend the chicken puff pastry. It was buttery and incredibly crispy, and thankfully did not taste of "dalda" like many other places.

The chicken roll is good too, but the chicken to bread ratio could be improved even though the bread is quite nice.

The sausage sub was not too great, so wouldn't order that again.

Of the drinks we only tried their fresh lemon mint, which was pretty standard, and their lemon ice tea which was quite refreshing but could use a little more sugar for my taste.

The service was quick, and the staff were friendly and accommodating as well.

The random entrance to the grocery store next door was actually quite fun. You can order some food and then just explore the grocery section while you wait. The store had some novelty items like pink himalayan salt crystals as well, so it wasn't completely run of the mill, and it was entertaining enough to just look around too.

Name: Belafian Cafe & Live Bakery
Address: Plot no: 492, Nearby Bashundhara Evercare Exit Gate, Dhaka 1229, 2056 Bangladesh, Dhaka
Author: Zobaer Khan
Review:
It was really a awesome day at Belifian cafe. The environment of the cafe was soo nice, welly decorated. The food was also 10/10. Their burger was so tasty. I have also visited their kitchen neat and clean.

I think It's a must visit place.

Review: These places are so lovable , well environment , Good for relaxation.Fantastic knowledgeable service. Super fresh delicious foods. Reasonable price. If you want spent some good times, i prefer this place.

Address: Plot no: 492, Nearby Bashundhara Evercare Exit Gate, Dhaka 1229, 2056 Bangladesh, Dhaka
Author: Md Rafi Uz Zaman
Review: Ambience was great..But disappointed with the food actually..Got the Belafian best bite pizza and grilled chicken sub there..The sub was okay but the pizza tasted absolutely horrible..It was not eatable to me at all..I hope it was just a mistake but if it happens all the time then I would like to request them to improve the quality of their pizza…

Name: Police Cafe
Author: Anwar M Hossain
Review: Police Cafe in Mirpur is a unique spot that’s all about celebrating the brave hearts of the city. It’s a tribute in the form of a cafe, where the decor and ambiance honor the men and women in uniform. Here, you can enjoy a cup of coffee or a snack in an environment that’s both respectful and relaxed. It’s a place that not only serves good food but also tells a story of service and dedication. So, if you’re looking for a cafe with character and a cause, Police Cafe is the place to be!

Review: The atmosphere of the cafe is very simple   but clean.The service is good.But the food could have been better.

Name: Police Cafe
Author: Mohammad Shohel Rashid
Review: Police Cafe Mirpur is located very close to Sher-e-Bangla Stadium. Breakfast, lunch, dinner and evening food are available here. Being next to the police station and belonging to the police department, the food is presented in a very clean condition. About 60 people can eat together.
