Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: The coffee bean & tea leaf is a well known coffee destination for many coffee lovers...The interior and environment of the place was decent...Staffs service needs to be improved more especially the decency in communication...The choco cheese cake was tasty but the blended white chocolate mocha was just rubbish compared to the taste and price...All over service was okay...

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: SS SY
Review: It was really a comfortable place for hang out and it's mentionable that their staffs were very friendly and respectful. Their atmosphere remind peaceful

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Osama Akeely
Review: My go to place for breakfast when I was in Dhaka, very welcoming staff and quit place to work.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Himendra Yadav
Review: Quite and beautiful place for a cup of coffee with some quick bite. The atmosphere is very pleasant and the place is easy to reach, enough space for parking. Price is bit on higher side but ok. Its a good place for small group but not for big group.

Name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf
Author: Muhidul Hasan
Review: Why does this basic burger cost 600BDT? I'm not concerned about the price. it's just that the burger doesn't taste good. I also ordered a blueberry cheesecake, which was decent. It seems they're not very experienced in making food besides coffee and pastries.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Mir Umme Sumaia
Review: This was our first time there. The food was good. We took the smoked fish and chips. Fries and others tasted good but the fish was bit overcooked which made it a little crunch. For 750 BDT, they could increase coleslaw a little more. Service was 50/50 as we pressed their service button 3 times but no one came. But after when they came, the service was speedy. Their ambiance was amazing. Interior is very beautiful, very rustic. Very good place for having a nice, peaceful meal. Great place for casual GTG.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Kazi Sartaj Ahmed
Review: Pretty chill place for a cold coffee drink or even some appetising meals. This is my first review of this restaurant after having visited multiple times & I must applaud them for being consistent in their service, food & cleanliness. This place is very photo friendly with many wall decorations & other items. Definitely would recommend to come with family & friends.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Tahmid Chowdhury (tuhi009)
Review: The Blueberry Cheesecake was great. Lemon Tart was a bit too sour. Service was fast and easy. We went around 9.30pm so it was not that crowded. The interior was really nice.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: afique ahmed
Review:
I
must say, the salted caramel freddo at Happiness Café is even better than North End's, which makes me confident their other menu items are just as good. I used to be a regular at North End, but it's become a bit overrated. The ambiance at Happiness Café, along with their dedicated smoking zone, really adds to the overall experience. I think this might just become my new go-to coffee spot.

Name: Happiness Cafe
Author: Urmi Debnath
Review:
Happiness cafe is a beautiful place to relax. The ambience is great, the decor is beautiful. There is a variety of seating options. There is an outdoor seating option with live grill, there is live kitchen view seating, a corner with books and games and plants. It was really cozy, and the option of reading books while waiting for food felt great.

The menu comes in a tab handed by the staff. I ordered Fettuccine Alfredo with grilled chicken. It tasted great. It was creamy and was seasoned perfectly.

The service was good. The price in the menu is inclusive of VAT and service charge, which impressed me. However , the price seems a little steep. There are options to pay with cash, card and bKash. Overall it was a very good and comforting experience.

Name: Halda Valley Tea Lounge
Author: Radi Shafiq
Review:
Fantastic atmosphere. A hidden gem in Dhaka. I spent maybe 4 hours here yesterday, immersed in a book and some tea. The butter milk tea was great.

However the food was just okay. The service, even though very welcoming, was unevenly paced. The music was good but suddenly a youtube advert was playing at full volume. The eyebrow black tea (a name something along this line) was disappointing. So I am not sure how the other special teas are that you can buy here.

Attention to a few small details can do wonders for the place. I'd recommend this for a lazy afternoon hangout.

Name: Halda Valley Tea Lounge
Author: Ziaul Haque
Review: The ambiance is really nice but the experience wasn't. They didn't have any Iced Tea, according to them the vending machine wasn't functioning. They've agreed to do tea testing for us but 20 minutes later one of them came up and said it's unavailable. Whatever tea we have ordered, it came almost 20-25 minutes later. Previously they used to serve cookies 🍪 with tea, I don't why they stopped that as well. Not sure what's going on with the place.

Name: Halda Valley Tea Lounge
Author: Hasin Hayder
Review:
Wonderful place, excellent ambience. Great for adda, meetings and work.

Foods are expensive here, nothing extra ordinary. But the environment is excellent, gives you a very positive vibe. Also they have dedicated tea rooms available for rent at 800 taka per hour. Nice idea. Overall I like this restaurant. Will visit again.

Name: Halda Valley Tea Lounge
Author: Asif Mahmud
Review: The ambiance was cozy and inviting, making it the perfect spot to relax and unwind. The cookies were absolutely delicious, and they paired perfectly with my tea. The staff was friendly and attentive, adding to the overall pleasant atmosphere. I'll definitely be returning for more cookies and relaxation in the future!

Name: Halda Valley Tea Lounge
Author: Anjuman Ara Lucky
Review:
Cozy place with nice environment!🥰
You can enjoy me time over there. Service is very good. Huge variations of tea is over there for real tea lover!🥰

Name: Hobnob Coffee
Author: Rayhan da Ordinary
Review:
Very dark theme which could mislead to be in the ghost area. Other than dark, nice ambience.
You have to wait quite long after placing an order.
Food is good but not every food. The place is good for fresh juices and soup.
The price is a bit higher than reasonable.

Name: Hobnob Coffee
Author: Minhajur Rahman
Review: The place is mind blowing like their atmosphere, service, food quality almost everything is up to the mark. If You're looking for a authentic chinese cuisine I bet you It's one of the best chain restaurant. Their place is peaceful and ome of the best place for hangout with friends and family. I must suggest you to try them at least once.

Name: Hobnob Coffee
Author: Upasana Sharma
Review:
Loved the ambience. It's a cozy place to meet friends, family or even carry out your meetings.
The food is delicious and in good quantity. Service is very good and prompt. Would visit again! Highly recommended.

Name: Hobnob Coffee
Author: S.M. RIFAT
Review:
2nd Time review: After long 4 year later i again went to this restaurant. Lots of change i found out. Manu and food quality. Lots of items added in the menu. Food tastes and quality good. I personally like quality and test. Price is a bit high still. Service and atmosphere still almost same and maintained. You should try if you like different kinds of food. Thanks

1st review 4 years before: Beautiful place and also food is good.
But price is high.Quality is low if I compare it with price. Japanese people mostly come to eat.

Name: Hobnob Coffee
Author: All Season
Review:
Hobnob Coffee: A Spicy Adventure in Japanese Cuisine 🔥☕️
Nestled in the heart of Japanese culinary exploration, Hobnob Coffee presents itself as a charming establishment with a cozy atmosphere that immediately invites patrons to unwind. The ambiance is a perfect blend of contemporary design and traditional Japanese elements, creating a pleasant and relaxed dining experience. 🍵✨

Opting for the stir-fried beef with fried rice, we were excited about the variety of choices available, including chicken and steamed rice. The menu promised a flavorful journey, but unfortunately, the dishes fell short of our expectations. 😞🌶️

The stir-fried beef with fried rice, while generously portioned, turned out to be excessively spicy, overpowering the other flavors and leaving our taste buds on fire. The spice level seemed to mask the potential deliciousness of the dish, making it challenging to savor the subtleties of the ingredients. 🔥🍚

Seeking solace, we decided to explore the steamed rice noodle roll. This dish, while a bit better than its fiery counterpart, still didn't manage to impress. The flavors were somewhat lacking, and the overall experience left us yearning for a more satisfying culinary adventure. 🍜😕

Despite the culinary letdown, Hobnob Coffee's atmosphere remains a redeeming quality. The warm, inviting setting provides a pleasant backdrop for a casual dining experience, making it an ideal spot for social gatherings or quiet evenings. The staff, while friendly, could benefit from being more attentive to the varying spice preferences of their patrons. 🍽️

In conclusion, Hobnob Coffee offers a delightful ambiance but falls short in delivering a memorable dining experience when it comes to the spiciness of their dishes. If you're a spice enthusiast, this might be your haven, but for those seeking a more balanced and nuanced Japanese culinary adventure, you might want to explore other options in the vibrant culinary scene. 🌐🍣

Name: Apon Coffee House
Author: Sajid Mahmud
Review:
Recently visited Apon coffee house. Previously heard about their cold coffee, however I didn't know their pasta was that good.

Super cheese, pasta was perfectly cooked and price was reasonable. Also tried their cold coffee and it was the best at that price.

It's really difficult to find seats on the weekends but it was worth waiting for.

Do pay a visit.

Name: Apon Coffee House
Author: Rashedul Alam (Rashed)
Review: One of the best coffee shops in Dhaka city. The coffee is delicious and reasonably priced. In addition to coffee, you can also get other food items. It is often very crowded. Recommended for coffee lovers.

Name: Apon Coffee House
Author: Nisat Sarker
Review: We tried butterscotch cold coffee, caramel cold coffee, nuts milk shake. Price was 450tk. The taste of the food is average. Nuts milk shake is very mild and soothing. Environment was as usual crowd. Service is quite better than before.

Name: Apon Coffee House
Author: Reeshan Ahmed
Review:
Apon Coffee House is one of the most popular Cold Coffee Shop in Dhaka, Bangladesh. It's first branch was established at Khilgaon, Malibagh Chowdhury Para. Now it has another branch in Dhanmondi.

Primarily Apon Coffee House served verities of cold coffee, hot coffee and milk shakes. But, later they adds many more drinks and sacks in their menu.

We went there to had Dosa,Sub Burger (Similar taste to sub sandwich but a smaller size) & Chocolate Milkshake.

Price is great & food is also good.

Name: Apon Coffee House
Author: Saiful Hoque
Review: I recently had the pleasure of dining at Apon Coffee, located in the heart of the city. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with a warm and inviting atmosphere. The restaurant boasts a modern and elegant design, with comfortable seating and soft lighting that sets the perfect mood for a memorable dining experience.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Somaiya Haque
Review:
I gave them 5 stars because they deserve it. I love the total ambience of the place, it is a very cozy place to chill and hangout. Great for family gatherings and friends catch-up. The place was very big, nice and the interior design was really top notch. There were comfy sofas and chairs everywhere. The dinning was neat and clean. I'm really satisfied with the food they served. I took One cappuccino coffee, One chocolate mousse and Cream of chicken soup.
Coffee- 4/5
Chocolate mousse- 5/5 highly recommend it.
Soup - 4/5
I'm happy with their service and staff's behaviour. They were very gentle and welcoming and well mannered.
My overall experience was very good. I will definitely go there again.
They served zero cal with brown and white sugar which i like the most. They are really health conscious and concerned about their customers. I love the gesture. A great coffee shop indeed in dhanmondi.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Sunny Quazi Saad Billah
Review:
Relatively on the more expensive side. Quality of food was okay and could have been better. The portions were too less.

The juices were different and was uncommon. The fish cake was out of sorts. The pizza was top notch.

The seating arrangements were nice and there was a space for the smokers as well.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Abu Bakor Siddique
Review:
Someone has already said in the reviews that ambience is the key highlight here. It couldn't be more true. Furnishing and decor choices felt tasteful to me. And usually not very crowded.

The staff generally have a jolly approach to things and you'll feel welcome the moment you walk in.
Their coffee is nothing special. Croissants are better avoided in my opinion. Hot chocolate was also underwhelming.
They have good pastas though. We had prawn and pesto, it was cooked to perfection. Some of the desserts are also good. That mango bliss was blissful.

I have been there quite a few times, so naturally not all of them were perfect experiences. A waiter took my plates away assuming i was done (which i was not) without asking. And this happened to me twice. But they are only humans and it would be nit picky of me to make a fuss about it.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: khadiza Fyruz
Review: The place was excellent!  service staff was very attentive, and food proportion was big too. specially the teriyaki chicken I'll recommend 10/10, because the meat was so nicely done that it immediately caught our attention. drinks were of good taste too. music was in moderation it was overall very sweet. their dessert section was also diverse. overall enjoyed it.

Name: Cafe Sao Paulo
Address: House No 42-43, Gawsia Twin Peak (Lift3, 9/A Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Trisha Tishu
Review: It is an upscale dining restaurant.  Light jazz music was playing.  I selected cream of mushroom soup, seafood tapas and chocolate pistachio dome from their menu.  Service was good.  The spanish dish seafood tapas tasted very good.  I took the chocolate pistachio dome for dessert, quite uniquely presented and was tempting.  But I was disappointed to see that the quantity of all the dishes were less.  Because I paid a high price for it.

Name: Espresso House
Address: 6th Floor, Rangs Fortune Square, Plot 32 Road No. 2, Dhaka
Author: shabab rahman
Review:
One of the best places for coffee. Their beans are from Colombia and if you love coffee this is a must place to visit.

I also tried their spaghetti meat ball and it tastes very good as well.

Name: Espresso House
Address: 6th Floor, Rangs Fortune Square, Plot 32 Road No. 2, Dhaka
Author: Adityo Hassan
Review: One of my favourite coffee houses in Dhanmondi. Most of their food is delicious; try beef meatballs, pasta, gyro wrap,  baked yoghurt, and coconut cookies. I love their wooden pizza and the live kitchen view; they also have a salad section. The behaviour of the staff is amazing. So if you are in Dhanmondi, you can check it out.

Name: Espresso House
Address: 6th Floor, Rangs Fortune Square, Plot 32 Road No. 2, Dhaka
Author: Shimo 01631
Review:
Hello,
Their foods savory specially mixed rice & pizza deliciousness in every single bite❤️❤️

Name: Espresso House
Address: 6th Floor, Rangs Fortune Square, Plot 32 Road No. 2, Dhaka
Author: Je Alam
Review: Good quality is really great and overall atmosphere is really beautiful

Name: Espresso House
Address: 6th Floor, Rangs Fortune Square, Plot 32 Road No. 2, Dhaka
Author: Shawon Khan

Name: Glazed Dhanmondi
Author: Saria Farheen
Review: Too costly for just doughnuts, although the doughnuts taste amazing. Little space, nice n tidy. I usually order coffee or juices to go with the desserts. I love everything here!

Name: Glazed Dhanmondi
Author: Imran Shahriar
Review:
Glazed is an artisan donut shop that has been around Dhaka since circa 2015 and have sold upscale luxury sweets in Dhanmondi and Gulshan.

📍 Location: Rangs Fortune Square, Dhanmondi
📅 Date of Visit: Sun Mar 10
🏷️Price: BDT165

📈 Pros:

🍰 Taste & Texture: The Cafe Creme flavor at Glazed Donuts is a divine mix of rich coffee and creamy chocolatey goodness that just melts in your mouth! ☕🍦
👍 Presentation: The donuts were beautifully presented, with a glossy and smooth finish that looks as good as it tastes.
🏠🍩Large Variety: There are plenty of other flavors to choose from, we recommend Creme De La Cheese and Classic Glazed
Cozy Ambience: The inviting atmosphere of the cafe provided the perfect backdrop for savoring our sweet treats, making our visit even more enjoyable! 🏠✨

📉 Cons :

📉Pricing Consideration: While the quality is good, the donuts can be a little pricey, with all of them costing over BDT150 and some even over BDT200 where you could just grab a waffle or mishti instead💰💭
🍰 Amount: The donuts are a little smaller than your palms and are average in size, so it is not an option for filling your stomach

🌟 Rating: 8/10 (Great)

Overall, Glazed Donuts  delivered an exceptional experience with their Creme Cafe, leaving us craving for more donuts, despite having a lavish price tag! Here's to many more delightful donut adventures at this sweet haven! 🎉🌟

Name: Glazed Dhanmondi
Author: Asaduzzaman Rocky
Review:
I always love their Tiramisu Donuts. Its just yum. The boba team is average in taste.
The ambiance is pretty good. Since the sofa and couch are a bit old, they need to clean the fabric properly.

Name: Glazed Dhanmondi
Author: Farabi ahmed
Review:
They serves decent doughnuts and I am always happy to have a bite of their doughnuts.but waht was surprising for me was their cakes.. they were good too.
Overall, a good desert place

Name: Glazed Dhanmondi
Author: Trisha Tishu
Review: I can never overlook the love for donuts.  And their donuts, cakes, pastries are very delicate, that's why I visit their outlet in Dhanmondi.  They have nice seating areas inside.  I always order De La cheese donuts, the donuts are very soft and the cream cheese and light chocolate crumble on top is my favorite, I get a taste of everything in one bite which is very satisfying.  Double chocolate donut and salted caramel slice cake are my favorites.  I would say they are the best in town for dessert.

Name: Panda Dumplings-PD
Author: Arnab (অর্ণব)
Review:
First of all the dumplings are great as always. Had the chicken chilli dumplings, 9/10 🔥
The shrimp fried rice and spicy shrimp were quite unique.
Even though the food was good, the staff behavior was not up to the mark, they were somewhat careless and rude. Like they just provided the bill immediately after we finished our food even though the restaurant was half empty!
They have been getting negative reviews for this for a while, hope they work with the feedback.

Name: Panda Dumplings-PD
Author: Sajjad Mahmud
Review: The food and environment was quite good but I personally don't like their service. There are lots of waiters but they did not provide proper service for guests. I watched other tables and another guest also discussed that their staff did not come at a time and they are kind of careless. I must say the staff organiser must take care of this.

Name: Panda Dumplings-PD
Author: Sifat Mosarrat
Review:
Budget friendly authentic Chinese food restaurant. Do not visit if you don't like the authentic taste of Chinese food.
We tried:
Boiled Dumplings: The taste was good with soya sauce, except that it was bland for our taste buds.
PD Chowmin: 3.5/5
PD chicken fries: small bite fries, had great amount of spices. 4/5
PD hot and sour soup: This was good. 4.5/5
Waiters were very clumsy and didn't maintain any order, brought main course first and then they brought appetizers.

Name: Panda Dumplings-PD
Author: Xinchen Tang
Review: Try their roast fish !!! Soooo good!!! Also the drink!! Grape milk, sweet orange passion fruit and mango peach smoothie are soooooo good!!! I’m a Chinese and their food are really original taste !!!! Highly highly recommend !!! Try their fried chicken and fish dumplings also !!!!!! 👍👍👍👍👍！！！

Name: Panda Dumplings-PD
Author: Abrar Jahin
Review: Went there with my girl a few weeks back. The Spicy Shuan Du is the bestseller, yet I found it quite underwhelming for the price I had to pay for it. The beef dumplings are epic, fr. Never liked tofu but their spicy tofu is something that's always going to be in my heart. And not to mention, the chowmein! OMG! That alone was enough to sway my heart to Panda Dumplings for authentic chinese food! 🤤

Name: Mazaa
Author: Shamsun Nahar
Review:
The beef sheek kabab and laccha partha combo was very good. Loved the tea. Beef boti kebab was okish.

I will suggest coming early in the evening because most of the items get sold out soon after 7 pm.

Name: Mazaa
Author: Md. Nahid Uz Zaman Ratul
Review:
The grilled chicken was out of stock by 8pm which somewhat surprised me. So, I had the chicken chap instead. The taste was pretty good but the chap was slightly on the hard/ side. I expected it to be a bit more tender.
But their service was pretty good and warm.

Name: Mazaa
Author: Saadi Hemel
Review:
Very good & air conditioned place for Dine-in with family or friends.
They serve mouth watering Mughlai & Bangla traditional dishes:
Kacchi
Kebabs
Rice
Meat Gravy
Special Daal Bhuna etc.
than any restaurants in Mohammadpur & menu Price is much reasonable.

Name: Mazaa
Author: Artisan DDL
Review: I love their foods a lot .  But would like to see improvements in service and atmosphere

Name: Mazaa
Author: Maneki_neko
Review: The quantity of food is low & the price is high. Foods are so spicy🥵 Such a unhealthy environment. Service is not good. Ac is not working properly.  Overall Bad experience!!

Name: DOSA Express Dhanmondi
Author: Akash Shahriar
Review:
Food and service was good. But it's a bit irritating when little children are crying and screaming their lungs out when you are trying to eat your meal and have some quality time. The kids zone made this place a BAZAR!!

Food description: I ordered -
1. Chicken cheese masala dosa 1x
2. Chicken hariyali kebab 1x
3. Regular lassi 1x
4. Masala lassi without sugar 1x

Name: DOSA Express Dhanmondi
Author: Ashraf Ul Alam
Review:
Very nice and friendly environment . They have testy foods. Staffs are helpful and supportive.
They have movenpick ice cream and clod beverages.

Name: DOSA Express Dhanmondi
Author: Md Mehedi Hasan
Review:
I tried Doi Fuska and Mixed Aloo Chaat.

:::::Doi Fuska:::::
Rating: 7/10
Price: 190tk
Review: It was okay, I prefer Dhaba's Doi Fuska instead of this one.

::::: Mixed Aloo Chaat:::::
Rating: 5.5/10
Price: 200tk
Review: If you are expecting something like India's one, you will definitely be disappointed. Nothing like Indian's one. It was basically some steamed potatoes, vel puri, fuska, chanachor, doi all mixed together. Nothing fancy.

Environment and stuff's behavior was good overall 🐥

Name: DOSA Express Dhanmondi
Author: waseq bhuiyan
Review: My first time having a dosa and it was very tasty we had the chicken dosa. The restaurant was nice and had a good crowd. I was surprised that dosas are so tasty

Name: DOSA Express Dhanmondi
Author: Farabi Iqbal Khan
Review: Every food item is very low in quantity but average in taste. Naan was not good at all it was crispy and burnt. And kids were always making a mess.

Name: Signature Food Court
Address: 9th Floor) Holding No. 3, Roof Top, Sultan Mansion, Begum Rokeya Ave, Dhaka
Author: Sabuj Sheikh
Review: An inviting spot offering both indoor and outdoor seating, perfect for hanging out with friends and loved ones. The ambiance is delightful, with occasional live music adding to the atmosphere. While there might be some waiting during peak times, it's worth it for the overall experience. Families will appreciate the kids' zone available. Overall, a great recommendation for anyone looking for a charming hangout spot. 🎶👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Name: Signature Food Court
Address: 9th Floor) Holding No. 3, Roof Top, Sultan Mansion, Begum Rokeya Ave, Dhaka
Author: Ismail Akash
Review:
Tasty food with very reasonable price, good place to celebrate various ocation.
Kid zone available.

Name: Signature Food Court
Address: 9th Floor) Holding No. 3, Roof Top, Sultan Mansion, Begum Rokeya Ave, Dhaka
Author: Pabel Hasan
Review:
Its really good!! There is shade and open roof top!you can enjoy the outside view! looks good specially at night!

Good for couples as well! Environment is good indeed, neat and clean! The food was okay! Price is not so high! Overall above average! I can recommend to ppl, you might go once!

Name: Signature Food Court
Address: 9th Floor) Holding No. 3, Roof Top, Sultan Mansion, Begum Rokeya Ave, Dhaka
Author: Sanjida Akter
Review:
We ordered a combo platter from " The Invite ". The price was very reasonable and tasted so good.We enjoyed live Music also. Price : 350
Rating : 9/10

Name: Signature Food Court
Address: 9th Floor) Holding No. 3, Roof Top, Sultan Mansion, Begum Rokeya Ave, Dhaka
Author: Fuad Hasan
Review: A good place to hang out is an open rooftop venue that hosts concerts every Friday night. I enjoy this very much. There are plenty of food options available from different cuisines around the world, especially Indian food and Japanese sushi. The variety ensures that everyone can find something they love. There is also a play zone for kids, making it a family-friendly spot. They have restrictions on bringing outside food and drinks, and they have only one store for soft drinks, which exclusively sells beverages from PepsiCo. The atmosphere is lively, with comfortable seating and a scenic view of the city. It's a perfect spot to relax, enjoy live music, and indulge in delicious food.

Name: Alitto Food
Address: Plot # 1, Bijoy Rakeen Tower, Shop-9 & 10, 3rd Floor, 2 ব্লক#ডি, Dhaka
Author: Nusrat Jahan
Review:
It's obvious restaurants are always famous for some specific reason. 🦀
Always searching for some speciality 🫥

About this one 🕜
It was frustrating about the day 😔
Raken city has the quiet place in mirpur 13 . And I didn't find any sitting area so I chose to go there.

Omg I tried the  bbq chicken meatbox. Which has no chicken 👀 no sausage 🌭😔 . Just fries and wedges.
So disappointing.  I did try to finish the food  as I was so hungry 😔.but I couldn't.

The place  is well decorated 📔
But they should improve their foods quality and maintain hygiene 🙂🙂

Can't say it was a clean  one ..🤚🏻

Personally I didn't like  the place . But I will visit again. Maybe they will do better next time 😔

Name: Alitto Food
Address: Plot # 1, Bijoy Rakeen Tower, Shop-9 & 10, 3rd Floor, 2 ব্লক#ডি, Dhaka
Author: Shipra Chowdhury
Review:
For me the most important thing for a restaurant is hygiene and health.  The food was not good. My son had food poisoning after had food here. There were many cockroaches in the sofa and table. If you open the shop first you need to clean it before serving.
The food was expensive than it’s quality.
Washroom was dirty.
Order delivery was slow and food was served by a Child.

Name: Alitto Food
Address: Plot # 1, Bijoy Rakeen Tower, Shop-9 & 10, 3rd Floor, 2 ব্লক#ডি, Dhaka
Author: Shakil Ahmed
Review:
service & behavior - 8/10
price-7/10
food- 8/10
environment - 7/10

their spicy food items are also superb spicy. loved th e food.

a good restaurant in Mirpur. 🥰

Name: Alitto Food
Address: Plot # 1, Bijoy Rakeen Tower, Shop-9 & 10, 3rd Floor, 2 ব্লক#ডি, Dhaka
Author: Himadri Shekhar Singha
Review:
Specialities of this restaurant:
1. Live Kitchen
2. Neat and Clean
3. Well organized
4. Food Variety
5. And most importantly, each & every single      menu is damn tasty.

Name: Alitto Food
Address: Plot # 1, Bijoy Rakeen Tower, Shop-9 & 10, 3rd Floor, 2 ব্লক#ডি, Dhaka
Author: Siam Rahman
Review:
Had their Club Sandwich and Potato Wedges.
Price-4.5/5
Taste-5/5

Highly recommended!

Name: Dosa Express
Address: 3rd Floor, Gold Palace, 3 New Bailey Rd, Dhaka
Author: Mahdy Pepul
Review:
This is the worst food I have ever tasted. It lacked any cheese flavor and was excessively oily.. making it nearly impossible to swallow. It didn't even taste like panir pakora. It was tasteless and unappetizing. The cheese inside was cold and hard. There was a lack of seasoning to enhance the taste.
And the funny thing is....
It was priced at 290tk
Pure scamming

Name: Dosa Express
Address: 3rd Floor, Gold Palace, 3 New Bailey Rd, Dhaka
Author: Nurul Afsar
Review: Their mixed chaat, Alu chaat, bhelpuri is so good. Tried Dosa but i am not a Dosa lover so that was okay for me. If you want to try some afternoon snacks this is the place i would suggest.

Name: Dosa Express
Address: 3rd Floor, Gold Palace, 3 New Bailey Rd, Dhaka
Author: Toukir Parag
Review: Chola Bhatura was too delicious and the other items are quite good to taste. Space is tiny for a large group of people so far. The building has its own garage but the customer does not have any access to park their vehicles. However, we manage one of the guard to park our vehicle for the time being. Overall, the taste, ambiance & other things are quite good.

Name: Dosa Express
Address: 3rd Floor, Gold Palace, 3 New Bailey Rd, Dhaka
Author: Tas A
Review: The best in Baily Road area. I have been coming here for more then 5 years and the food quality is still the same. There staff is always prompt and cordial. Listens to all our queries and requests. I always go for thier Doi fuchka and lassi. The best. Yummy. Other things we had is dahi bora, onion dosa, plain dosa to name a few. A must try for anyone who wants quality and clean fuchka. Price has changed with time. That’s the sad part. Another thing they need to rearrange the seating plan. Over the years they added more and crammed the place despite being a tiny place . So come not at peak times if you can.

Name: Dosa Express
Address: 3rd Floor, Gold Palace, 3 New Bailey Rd, Dhaka
Author: Md Masudur Rahman
Review:
I recently visited Dosa Express located in Bailey Road and tried a variety of their dishes including Doi Bora, Doi Fuchka, Raj Kachuri, Masala Dosa, and Lachchi. Overall, I had a great experience and would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a delicious and affordable meal.

Starting off with the Doi Bora, I must say it was the standout dish for me. The taste was absolutely amazing and the texture was perfect. The Doi Fuchka and Raj Kachuri were also good, although I found them to be just okay compared to the Doi Bora. Moving on to the Masala Dosa, I must say it was their signature dish and definitely worth trying. The combination of flavors was excellent and the dosa was cooked to perfection. Lastly, the Lachchi was another dish that I really enjoyed.

One minor complaint I had was that the yogurt used in some of their dishes was a bit on the sweeter side, but this is a matter of personal preference and may not bother everyone.

Overall, I found Dosa Express to be great value for money. The food was delicious, the service was prompt and friendly, and the prices were very reasonable. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for an authentic taste of Indian cuisine.

Name: Fajitas Green Road
Author: Nusrat Jahan
Review: This place is beside my university. This place used to be my go to place.I love their rice bowl so much. At that time the price of a Mexican rice bowl was only 200 and according to the price the quantity was more than enough.But after sometime the quantity decreased though the taste was the  same.This fact disappointed me 🙂. After a long time again I tried their Mexican rice bowl and the price increased but the quantity is not enough according to the price.Taste of their food is honestly appreciable.

Name: Fajitas Green Road
Author: Abrar Hossain
Review:
Although the wait time was a bit long, the food was quite delicious!
The rice was a bit spicy tho, and the sub sandwich was smaller that I expected.

Still the taste was good and I'd totally recommend the rice bowls!

Hope to visit there soon and try other items👍

And for now my rating will be a beautiful 8.2/10

Cheers~

Name: Fajitas Green Road
Author: A.Z.C
Review: Good place to hangout and fill my empty stomach after our university classes ends. One thing i would like them to add is give us the sauce service, like when we order some food give us sauce on bottle. Like mayo sauce, tomato sauce etc. It should be a mandatory service. Otherwise food and everything is good.

Name: Fajitas Green Road
Author: Farhan unfa
Review:
This is value for money. A great spot for Students and friends to have a quick bite and gossip.
I rather say prices are more economical here. I bought sub with only 170 bdt.

The interior decoration will make you colourful.

Food taste: I have tried rice bowl, sub, burger(beef), french fry. I would not say taste is 10/10 but with the economic price? Taste is 10/10.

Name: Fajitas Green Road
Author: Aysha Siddika Panna
Review:
It's a great spot for friends to have a quick bite and gossip. The environment was so calm and their sitting arrangement was pretty cool.
Good place to sit and hang around in the midst of Green road.

Name: Daily Treats
Address: The Westin, Main Gulshan Ave, Dhaka
Author: Tanvir Rahman
Review:
It used to be my favourite spot once upon a time. But since then they have been slipping.

For example, the americano came with a biscotti. Last time I was here, I got the biscuit but today they forgot about it.

Their food has also been slightly inconsistent. I think only their care has held its standards.

Ps: this review has been over a span of a decade.

Name: Daily Treats
Address: The Westin, Main Gulshan Ave, Dhaka
Author: Sadia Ricky
Review: Good place for bakery and pastry items. They offer special desserts for Ramazan.

Name: Thirty3 Restaurant Dhanmondi
Author: Morshedul Alam Sujan
Review: A well fusion of indian & western foods with seafood and indian snacks options like fuchka, chat, momo etc. They offer live music which makes this restaurant a good place to enjoy and dining alone. But if u want a very calm non disturbing environment then its not a good deal. Foods were good enough to taste. Price is a bit higher considering the place but the facilities here makes it right.

Name: Thirty3 Restaurant Dhanmondi
Author: Merajun Naher (Duli)
Review: I really like the Raj Kachori from Dosa Express. Also Kiwi Smoothie. Salad was also good. But the Spicy Ramen, tasteless. They told it's spicy, actually it's not. Like live music. Singer was actually good, but their service was poor. Need to update it.

Name: Thirty3 Restaurant Dhanmondi
Author: sabrina mahzabin
Review: Three stars because of the super loud music which would have been controlled,as the place is small, live music could have been managed in a lower volume. The guests had to scream at each other to be heard which was extremely annoying. We had to move to a quieter area of the restaurant. Ordered Goa lemon as my drink which ended up tasting like JIRA PAANI. The grape juice was excellent, they actually used grapes. the butter chicken was good, not the best I've tried so far, it was okay. Quantity was great, the garlic naan was soft and delicious.

Name: Thirty3 Restaurant Dhanmondi
Author: Farjana Munmun Alam
Review: Food was okay. Environment was good and also have music System. But moving small cockroach on the table it not makes me feel good...

Name: Thirty3 Restaurant Dhanmondi
Author: Mohd. Morshed Choudhury
Review: Nice ambiance. Good food. Friendly staff

Name: DOSA Express Mirpur, Indian restaurant
Address: Safura Trade City, 12 Mirpur Rd, Dhaka
Author: Md. Mirazul Islam
Review:
I tried Dahi Fuska & Papri Chat.

The papdi chat was similar to taste of Rajkachuri, in its texture and taste. It had tiny fish finger type crispy papar like thing in it. It was my first time trying papri chat.
I would prefer Rajkachuri over Papri Chat.

The Dahi Fuska has something missing in it, wish the fuska body was a bit more crispy. But I liked its taste though!

They had less customers when I visited. And Sanitizers on each tables.
But they don't provide WiFi to customers!
nowadays, each restaurant provides WiFi to customers. Please, consider it.

Name: DOSA Express Mirpur, Indian restaurant
Address: Safura Trade City, 12 Mirpur Rd, Dhaka
Author: Fahmida Reetu
Review:
I hv tried their most of the items bt in all of them me n my husband r obsessed with their papri chaat💜💜💜 ..
this has been our go to meal ..
and their drinks r also very refreshing

Name: DOSA Express Mirpur, Indian restaurant
Address: Safura Trade City, 12 Mirpur Rd, Dhaka
Author: MOhammad Lipu
Review: If you're passionate about authentic Indian cuisine and often travel to India just for the food, @dosaexpressbd 🇧🇩is hands down the best Indian restaurant in Dhaka!

Name: DOSA Express Mirpur, Indian restaurant
Address: Safura Trade City, 12 Mirpur Rd, Dhaka
Author: Intekhab Alam
Review:
What I liked about them is the attitude of the staffs. One of the staff mistakenly spilled my coke, I almost drank the whole cup but there small drink left at the bottom.
The waitress brought me a whole new cup of coke. It was a nice gesture from them

Name: DOSA Express Mirpur, Indian restaurant
Address: Safura Trade City, 12 Mirpur Rd, Dhaka
Author: Rashique Chowdhury
Review:
Dosa express is a good place for indian foods. This place has plenty of vegetarian options. We tried the following items:
1. Cheese Masala Dosa
2. Paneer Pakora
3. Lassi
4. Rajkachuri

The cheese masala dosa was really good. It had plenty of cheese inside and was quite tasty with the dippings. The lassi was very good as well. It was refreshing. But the paneer pakora wasnt good. It lacked taste. The rajkachuri was amazing.

The staffs were professional and well behaved. The ambiance of the place was really well. I liked the fact that the place was very well lit.

If you're in mirpur looking for some dosa or you want to try some vegetarian food I recommend you to try out this place!

Name: Tess
Address: Shahid Sarani Garrison, 6 Road No. 6, Dhaka
Author: Abdullah Omar Nasif
Review: Foods are tasty. I find this place crowded most of the time.

Name: Tess
Address: Shahid Sarani Garrison, 6 Road No. 6, Dhaka
Author: Ferdouse Kamal Ahmed
Review: A lovely time spending place in Mirpur DOHS! Located just over the lake with great view and nice natural surroundings! With trendy interior environment and plenty choice of food makes a it a great place for family and friends get together! Wether it a quick bite or long course lunch or dinner, wether to take home foods it a good choice of a place! Best time is in the evening, the place becomes lively!!

Name: Tess
Address: Shahid Sarani Garrison, 6 Road No. 6, Dhaka
Author: M Hasan Mustafa
Review:
Seating capacity good enough.
Food test was good & their Coffee test was quit good.
But if you plan to going after evening Friday, so plz change ur plan because of too rush….😊

Name: Tess
Address: Shahid Sarani Garrison, 6 Road No. 6, Dhaka
Author: S. Shuvo
Review: It is a restaurant run by CSD, bd Army. As usual, defence people gets preference here. Food quality is not up to the mark. You will find no difference  with other roadside restaurants who sells the same fast food items. The decoration and ambience is nice though.

Name: Tess
Address: Shahid Sarani Garrison, 6 Road No. 6, Dhaka
Author: Razzak Abdur
Review: The staff behaviour of Tess Mirpur DOHS is very rude. They don't have smiley face even. However, the food is delicious.

Name: Bubble Panda - বাবল পান্ডা
Author: Mahia Mosarrat
Review:
You will get various bubble drinks there but I tried their coffee milk boba. Taste was very good and price was reasonable as well.

Coffee Milk boba 350ml - 180/-

Name: Bubble Panda - বাবল পান্ডা
Author: Tansia Rahman
Review:
Best Waffle place indeed, love their simple Waffle on a stick the mossttt. Dive into Nutella & chocolate haven one are Very reasonable yet, so yummy.  Also tried their coffee milk boba smoothie, it's taste so refreshing during this hot weather.  Loved everything about Bubble Panda .
Will surely visit very soon ♥️

Name: Bubble Panda - বাবল পান্ডা
Author: Alveena Fareeha
Review: Hi ! Although on Google it says that the store is closed its open! How did we know? We called them you can find the number on there Facebook page. Ok so it's really not that spacious and you have to stand cuz there's no seats. But it's ok . The service was nice . And the drink was great. We took 2 coffee Boba drinks. Now the liquid is exactly an cold cofee but unlike the actual cold cofee it was pretty thin and not frothy. The tapioca Pearls (boba) was really nice and chewy. But according to the price there wasn't enough boba 😕 . But the taste was good. Our overall experience was great. You can check the place out

Name: Bubble Panda - বাবল পান্ডা
Author: beyond brunette
Review: simply awful. found a big piece of plastic in my drink and all they had to say was sorry. no refunds no nothing. the bobas weren't even cooked all the way through so they were incredibly hard to chew through. don't waste your money on this!

Name: Bubble Panda - বাবল পান্ডা
Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: As a new seller they are selling quite good waffles at a decent price...Taste was awesome...

Name: Harun Red Tea
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Gotcha - Art Of Tea Dhanmondi
Author: Talha 18700
Review: I just love the place. They have beautiful interior with good sitting areas. I think there is also a little outdoor space. I just love their pancakes. The guilty pleasure is always the one for me and for drinks I personally don’t like the cheese drinks, but I do enjoy their tea and other drinks. Recently, I got to try their sandwiches the “The Have It All” one. It’s very good and filling.

Name: Gotcha - Art Of Tea Dhanmondi
Author: Anwar Parvez Chowdhury
Review:
First food or a restaurant, I guess this restaurant has both character! From outside, it seems to very small restaurant but when you just passed the main door, wow, it is a big restaurant.

Nice decoration and very simple. Very contemporary furniture and yes it is absolutely a clean restaurant.

Food quality is good but price wise, I guess a little on the high side.

No designated parking and no separate smoking room. You can park your vehicle on the road side but at the evening and school time, it is not easy nor easy to find parking space.

Name: Gotcha - Art Of Tea Dhanmondi
Author: Mishkat Mahiuddin
Review:
I really liked these two teas.
The strawberry matcha cheese one is very delicious and the caffeine is effective. I didn’t sleep for a day after having half of it. This one is a must try.
The mango cheese affair is as expected. It tasted like it was made from real frozen mangoes. Not bad.  For both of these teas, you can’t really taste the tea.

The place is usually empty and quiet so it’s a good place to get some work done. They let you stay a long time.

Name: Gotcha - Art Of Tea Dhanmondi
Author: Sanwar Hosen
Review: My friend shared his thoughts on the boba tea. He does not recommend it at all. But The place is nice and well kept though.

Name: Gotcha - Art Of Tea Dhanmondi
Author: Jimothy
Review:
They have some of the more unique boba options in dhaka. Their cheese boba options are very tasty. The salty cream layer goes very well with the sweet drink and the boba is pretty standard. Overall a solid drink.

The problems arise when we look at the price. Each of their cheese milk teas are like 500tk+. Yes they are very big, but that price feels quite unreasonable. Then again, recently places like chamichi and koi have been charging similar prices. It's definitely worth trying at least once to see how you like it.

Also, sadly the interior isn't that great. It's quite rundown. Not really sure why, the place is not that old. Still worth a try in my opinion.

Name: মাঈনউদ্দিন স্টোর
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: CHAMICHI, BANANI
Address: House No-67, Level, 2 Road No. 11, Dhaka
Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: Chamichi has the uniqueness in premium tea and coffee...The interior was fine...Tried the terocheese and choco cheese and taste was fantastic...Price is a bit high but ok...

Name: CHAMICHI, BANANI
Address: House No-67, Level, 2 Road No. 11, Dhaka
Author: Elton Hiew
Review:
Perhaps this is the first bubble tea store in Banani. Good variety of bubble tea from the menu but price, slightly expensive in my opinion.

Ordered the Jasmine tea without sugar, it taste nice. It does have the fragrances of Jasmine tea.

Atmosphere wise, it was very comfortable and trendy! Hope they can keep this up!

Name: CHAMICHI, BANANI
Address: House No-67, Level, 2 Road No. 11, Dhaka
Author: Shahriar Enan
Review: Well, the place was nice and comfy to hangout with friends. Mango passion fruit parfait tea was great. I loved it.

Name: CHAMICHI, BANANI
Address: House No-67, Level, 2 Road No. 11, Dhaka
Author: Muhtasim Intisar Farhan
Review:
Nice environment
Took the Bogo offer
Thai Green Milk Tea (L)
It was good...

Name: CHAMICHI, BANANI
Address: House No-67, Level, 2 Road No. 11, Dhaka
Author: Mehedi Hasan
Review: Not a bad place. But for me KOITHE is better. Still an amazing place and recommendable

Name: Bulapin
Author: Roni
Review:
The staff are friendly and knowledgeable about the drinks.
Brown sugar and herbal jelly bubble tea has assam tea flavour. I expected taro bubble tea  colour to be purple despite the difference in colour it tasted good. Brown sugar and taro I highly recommend.
It would have been good  if there did hokkaido or Thai milk tea flavours

Name: Bulapin
Author: Myst
Review: Tried Many Of Their Drinks Till Now.And All of Those drinks were pretty good and by far one of the best in the area.

Name: Bulapin
Author: Shihab Sharar Mukit
Review:
Overall good quality service from the employees.
Served products are also of decent quality and quantity.
Only con is that they don't have POS machines for all cards. Even dbbl. You might have to pay in cash despite having multiple credit cards in your pocket 😉

Name: Bulapin
Author: Fatima Rahman Sneha
Review:
This my favorite boba shop at Wari. The boba is made fresh and it's so good.
The texture of the baba is perfect and it's tasty.
They have so many different kinds of drink
-brown sugar, strawberry, mango, and blueberries! The macha drink are also very delicious. You can adjust the sweetness and the ice which i like. today it was fast service.The place is also cute to chill and hang out. I would recommend anyone to come here for good quality drinks. such a reasonable price. i wishh you guys  carry on and do very well in future.❤️💕

Name: Bulapin
Author: Mirza Khaled
Review:
Im not a big fan of bubble tea but Bulapin cracked out the taste. It’s a sister concern of a famous brand GONG CHA.

They have white range of flavors and type of drinks the price is very affordable. Nothing fancy but very good. In fact, I must say their drinks are beat in Dhaka.

Name: CHAMICHI, GULSHAN 1
Author: Samiha Noor Kona
Review:
Had the brown sugar taro milk tea and brown sugar chocolate milk sort of thing. Both were yummy but the taro milk tea was simply amazing. I still crave for Chamichi whenever i think of this taro milk tea.
Although their shared sitting space with crisp is not something i admire. We couldn’t even find chamichi for quite some time as we thought it’d be a separate place. Other than that it’s okay.

Name: CHAMICHI, GULSHAN 1
Author: Mehzabin Aothoi
Review:
Tried their Chocolate Chamicheese, which cost 460 Tk, and I regret wasting my money on it.

They use regular Aarong full cream milk, and the chocolate lacks any special flavor. The cheese doesn't taste like cheese at all, more like dense whipped cream. Overall, it’s just a creamier version of Starship milk.

I wouldn't recommend it; it's not worth the hype for me.

Name: CHAMICHI, GULSHAN 1
Author: Shehejadi Afreen
Review: Tried this Mango milk tea with added Pearls. You can choose the ice level and sugar level, so that’s kinda fun. Really liked the taste of this drink. Gonna visit them again!

Name: CHAMICHI, GULSHAN 1
Author: Ayesha Zahid
Review:
Shares space with Crisp on the ground floor.

1st time try  Matcha Milk Tea.
Sugar 30%  cause do not like suger.

Matcha flavour could have been a little bit stronger but it okay to me cause of coffee lover especially black coffee.

Only the large size was available.
Price: 320 TK
Rate : 8.5/10

Next time try different flavour.

Name: CHAMICHI, GULSHAN 1
Author: arafat ahmed
Review: Golden boba milk tea was really good. Chocolate mousse was average. Overall it's a good place

Name: KOI Thé Dhanmondi
Address: Ground Floor, CONCORD M K Heritage, 76 Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Prataoy Kabya Bhowmik
Review: Ordered Chocolate Milk with Golden Bubble toppings. I opted for less ice option but guess that wasn’t actually too less. Problem that it created was this excessive ice made the drink bland as it gradually melted. Else the drink was somewhat okay; not up to the mark as its price though. Their service was pretty good enough. The staffs were quite friendly and hospitable.

Name: KOI Thé Dhanmondi
Address: Ground Floor, CONCORD M K Heritage, 76 Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Hamid Rahman
Review: The taste wasn’t up to the mark but it's okay. They need to improve their service and make some more space. During my order I mentioned that I'll not have any ice but still they put a lot of ice in my milk tea. :)

Name: KOI Thé Dhanmondi
Address: Ground Floor, CONCORD M K Heritage, 76 Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Kazi Mizan
Review:
1. Taste 4.5
2. Price 4.5 (Based on rest five factors)
3. Service 5
4. Environment 4.5
5. Hygiene 5
6. Presentation 4.5

Observations:
**Overall value for money 5 out of 5
*Definitely recommend them.
*Price is reasonable according to what they serve.
*Interesting washroom entrance.
*Washroom was very neat and clean.

Note:
*Pay first
*Self service
*Display and Card Menu.
+Accept card payment
+Ac available
+Good environment
+Good food
+Over good service
+Cute Washroom

Name: KOI Thé Dhanmondi
Address: Ground Floor, CONCORD M K Heritage, 76 Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Adiba Anbar Ahona
Review:
Small place, less options in menu.
Overhyped & too pricey for smaller portion.
They should add more drink/shake in the menu.

Ordered Mango iced green tea : 5/10
Chocolate Milk tea : 6/10

Name: KOI Thé Dhanmondi
Address: Ground Floor, CONCORD M K Heritage, 76 Satmasjid Road, Dhaka
Author: Mahbub Rahman Nafee
Review: Nice place. Good options for drinks. Drinks were okay. A bit too hyped. Price was a bit much. There are better options for such drinks.

Name: Tea Leaf Juice Bar
Author: ahmed musa
Review: Experienced the mango d light more impressive as I expected.

Name: Tea Leaf Juice Bar
Author: AH Shrayan
Review: Bad

Name: KOI Thé Uttara
Author: Lin Shelly
Review: I bought it and put in the freeze and next day became white spot. When I back to the shop to check, they told me valid only 3 hours ! I am surprised to hear this reason. If they told me valid only 3 hours, I will not buy it. They have to mention valid time to customer. It waste my time and money. Really disappointed !

Name: KOI Thé Uttara
Author: 繁光丸山
Review:
I came here for the first time on a Friday, right after it opened.
The inside of the store is very nice and clean.
I think this needs to be improved since it takes a long time to order drinks as there is only one counter.
I ordered the No. 1 recommended bubble milk tea.
You can choose the sweetness and amount of ice, so you can match it to various tastes.
I chose 70% sweetness and normal amount of ice.
There is no problem with the taste at this level. I think this is a store that I would like to visit again and again.

Name: KOI Thé Uttara
Author: Suhaib S Khan
Review: We got the regular milk tea and another medium milk tea with bubbles. The person who took our order kept on insisting to upsell to a higher priced drink and also charged 2x bubble without our knowledge which we had to fix later. Other than that the drink was great and atmosphere is good. Lots of houseflies tho haha

Name: KOI Thé Uttara
Author: Md Fahad Hasan
Review:
Bought 1 Milk Tea with Golden Bubble Toppings & Coconut Jelly Toppings. Price was 455 tk.
Now taste wise it was great, specially the bobba pearls, the coconut jelly, not so much. Amount was ok. I think the price was a bit too much.

Name: KOI Thé Uttara
Author: Samiul Islam
Review: If u wanna waste your money then you can come here. All they offer is nothing but tasteless beverages to be honest. And the pricing is ridiculously high. I felt I was ripped off for a small sized caramel milk tea which didn't even taste like it had caramel. If you add bubbles they charge an extra 125 tk. What's the point of promoting bubble tea if you are gonna charge extra for that? Shouldn't those be included in the drink in the first place ? A small Ovaltine macchiato is priced at 500 tk. Why? On top of that you'll need to pay separately if you want to add some bubbles which will come around to 650-700. For ONE SMALL drink. You can easily get far better beverages at other places like north end. I'm sorry but this place is ripping people off!

Name: Cha Bari
Author: Yusuf Zubayer
Review: I’m in love with this tea stall. Much can be said of the pricing, but what I get, I am happy. Delighted in fact. I am a tea lover. Tea over coffee any day for me. Milk tea is an indulgence of mine. The Premium Tea of this shop, for me, is heaven on earth. Premium Tea with that fruit cake of theirs:  woof! My wife loves the Special Malai Cha. That too is good but Premium Tea all the way for me. Sometimes I have it with butter buns from Well Food, just next door. That too is a great combo. Don’t expect much in terms of ambiance/environment. No sitting arrangement. Have the tea standing on the sidewalk. It’s a tea stall I said, not a ‘lounge’.

Name: Cha Bari
Author: Mihran Ahsan
Review:
This is a small tea stall which serves various types of tea with their masala tea to be the most popular one.

They don't provide any sitting place and is usually very crowded after 7 pm. Their service is good too.

Additionally, as their tea is also good it's a nice place to gossip with close friends with a cup of tea late night.

Nonetheless they should always keep dust bins around there stall as it's really dirty when seeing all those tea cups in the road. The baskets are not always there and they should always guide their customers to throw the cups in that basket.

Name: Cha Bari
Author: Rajib Ahsan Kader
Review:
This is different type of tea stall sells many types of tea. This is located opposite to Sector-7 mosque of Uttara.

They don’t have sitting arrangement. Except tea they don’t sell any type of items.

They usually attract lot of crowd.
Some of teas I tried so far were very tasty to me. I particularly liked their Masala milk tea and Malta tea. They also carry coffee.

Name: Cha Bari
Author: Muhammad Redwanul Haq
Review: One of the best Tea shops in Uttara. Among all the tea choices I really love Masala Raw Tea ( 20tk/cup) . Unfortunately this is only available from afternoon as no one but  only one of the staff Rasel can prepare it . They don't give too much sugar which make the tea taste best. Lots of other tea shops often ruin the tea taste by giving excessive sugar. You can also try different milk tea variations.

Name: Cha Bari
Author: Kazi Md Al Amin
Review: Nice place for slightly hangout. No option for sitting. They provide various types of tea & coffee. Taste Good.

Name: Chatime - Banani
Address: 1st floor, Bulu Ocean Tower, 40 Kemal Ataturk Ave, Dhaka
Author: Estiak Ahamed
Review:
The environment and food quality was too good but unfortunately they provide low quality services.
Hopefully better luck next time 🤞

Name: Chatime - Banani
Address: 1st floor, Bulu Ocean Tower, 40 Kemal Ataturk Ave, Dhaka
Author: Zihad Faruk
Review:
I loved this branch mostly because of the huge and comfortable sitting arrangements. This place doesn’t feel congested at all. You can spend the time comfortably. Though kind of felt that this place is going under construction!  Love the drinks, Passion fruit slushy and mango smoothy. I love how diverse the menu is and also the taste is good. Though didn’t like the pearls.

Parking facilities are available. There is a smoking zone too.

Name: Chatime - Banani
Address: 1st floor, Bulu Ocean Tower, 40 Kemal Ataturk Ave, Dhaka
Author: Nekroly
Review:
already a dead place but still decided to drop by upon seeing the new buy 1 get 1 free.

to my surprise, they increased all the prices for the drinks by upto 200-400

the drinks which were priced at 250 for regular previously is now over 400 and that too for a new size "small" with regular priced as 500+

cheap marketing tactics man and never coming again

Name: Chatime - Banani
Address: 1st floor, Bulu Ocean Tower, 40 Kemal Ataturk Ave, Dhaka
Author: Aelomelo Tanjheel
Review:
I am going to give them only 1 star rating, though I didn't find anything less than that. For the reason I find cockroach inside their drink(Photo given). I ordered One Jasmine milk tea. Then they offer buy 1 get 1 during FIFA match hour (Thats preety cool). But after taking few sips on my Jasmine tea, I found something attached on the inner part on my glass. Yes, Thats the insect( small Cockroach). Its really horrible at that kind of beverage centre where only drinks are served. I didn't make any noise for that, only asked to the waiter. He told me sorry for that & gave a new one ( But on the same glass 😠). I don't know how they r running the business like this. I just left the place.
I will gave the interior environment 3 star mark. To go with someone for chatting/ hanging; it is a good place(Photo attached). But they should be neet & clean on their kitchen portion.

Name: Chatime - Banani
Address: 1st floor, Bulu Ocean Tower, 40 Kemal Ataturk Ave, Dhaka
Author: Mabrur Waitforit Chowdhury
Review: Visited during pandemic and they were well equipped with disinfectants and place was very clean. If you are looking for a place to chill with a chiller or refreshing drink and minimal people then it's your place.

Name: CHAMICHI DHANMONDI
Address: H- 60, R- Dhanmondi 16(New), Opposite of Bangladesh Eye Hospital, Dhanmondi, Dhaka
Author: Shahbaz Amin Bhuiyan
Review: Chamichi is an international franchise of Thailand serving delicious bubble tea of various flavours, tapioca pearls, toppings and fruit blends. They have a modern minimalist decor, along with family-friendly and cosy ambience. We tried 4 regular-sized drinks, each of which is more than enough for a person because the drinks are very heavy. The sweetness was mostly balanced as well as the amount of ice they used. But yes, the prices could have been more reasonable.

Name: CHAMICHI DHANMONDI
Address: H- 60, R- Dhanmondi 16(New), Opposite of Bangladesh Eye Hospital, Dhanmondi, Dhaka
Author: Saniul Alam Nibir
Review: Situated at the beginning of Dhanmondi road 27(old, opposite of Bangladesh eye hospital). The cafe is small but cozy and offers different types of beverages. The price is quite high. But similar to others offering the same service. They are also famous for their golden pearls/bubbles. They recommended their classy Taro bubble tea. However, personally I didn't find it that appealing according to the price. But the mango passion fruit green tea was awesome! You have to adjust the sugar level while ordering. Adding bubbles costs separately.

Name: CHAMICHI DHANMONDI
Address: H- 60, R- Dhanmondi 16(New), Opposite of Bangladesh Eye Hospital, Dhanmondi, Dhaka
Author: Md Mehedi Hasan
Review:
Most of the items were stock out, that wasn't a pleasant experience at the first time.

However, small and cozy place. Nice environment, price is on the higher side as expected. I took  Strawberry drink, it was good.

Item: Strawberry Drink(Refreshing drink)
Price: 350
Rating: 7/10

Name: CHAMICHI DHANMONDI
Address: H- 60, R- Dhanmondi 16(New), Opposite of Bangladesh Eye Hospital, Dhanmondi, Dhaka
Author: Noshin Saiyara
Review: I tried two “ChamiCheese” flavors - mango and taro. The boba was added separately. Both were amazing. Super thick and creamy, and you can really taste the cream cheese. The flavours were subtle and only slightly sweet, which I love. The drinks made me feel super full, probably because of the thickness. They’re a bit expensive, but I think they’re worth the price.

Name: CHAMICHI DHANMONDI
Address: H- 60, R- Dhanmondi 16(New), Opposite of Bangladesh Eye Hospital, Dhanmondi, Dhaka
Author: Ibrahim Chowdhury
Review:
Good for semi-exotic drinks.
The place is small, hence, it's tough to get a seat during pick hours.
And they don't have any parking. However, one can use nearby parking services.

Name: Cha-Huanum ~ Wari
Author: Safiana
Review: This is a very cosy place to sit and sip your fav drink. Idk why I never noticed it before. Eager to go there again. Their Brown sugar Green tea was such a delicious drink with a lot of boba pearls. If feels great until you reach the bottom cz the bottomis filled with crushed ice.

Name: Cha-Huanum ~ Wari
Author: sakuta_kun
Review:
+ Quite small outlet but very well arranged and aesthetic
+ Drinks might seem a bit overpriced but their portion sizes match the price so it's worth it
+ Soda and iced tea recommend

Name: Cha-Huanum ~ Wari
Author: preyanka nath
Review: I saw this shop from rickshaw and without  second  thought i hop in.its a good place to seat alone or in group, though its a small place. I took pink purple corn thai taro tea as they said that is their best selling and find its right. Also tried  their waffle,  good to taste. Will visit again.oh, also their song choice is good.

Name: Cha-Huanum ~ Wari
Author: Md Shahadat Hossain Shoyshob
Review: Their Glutinous nd pink taro bubble tea are Unique in taste also delicious. Highly recommend to try them out.

Name: Cha-Huanum ~ Wari
Author: Muhammed sahajalal
Review: We ordered a glutinous milk tea and waffle. Comparing to price the taste was up to the mark💯. There service and atmosphere was fabulous.

Name: Moishi Bangladesh - Gulshan 2
Address: Moishi Bangladesh Gulshan 2 @ Chef's Table, Level 2 Gulshan central Point, Rd 90, Dhaka
Author: Ayan
Review:
400+ for two pieces of stale, trash mochi, frozen, inedible, no variety. They told us one price, charged another.

The Japanese would break international relations with Bangladesh if they had this. This company is literally a stain in the developing cuisines industry of Bangladesh. They could use panta Bhat and frozen halua and it would probably be better than this.

If you want Mochi in Bangladesh, look elsewhere. Go somewhere else. Save yourself.

The saffron mochi tastes like regurgitated halua covered in a thick plastic coating.

The rose mochi tastes like frozen sugary plastic covered in thick waxy plastic.

I'm very disappointed. This is not just a sad day for Mochis, it's not just a sad day for food all over the world, it's a sad day for Bangladesh.

Name: Moishi Bangladesh - Gulshan 2
Address: Moishi Bangladesh Gulshan 2 @ Chef's Table, Level 2 Gulshan central Point, Rd 90, Dhaka
Author: Mahfuza Mim
Review: I recently visited Moishi BD and it was fantastic! The ambiance was cozy and inviting, perfect for hanging out with friends. I tried their bubble teas, mojitos and coffee mousse, and those were one of the bests I've had—so flavourful and refreshing. The desserts were equally impressive; each bite was a delightful experience. The staff were friendly and attentive, making the whole visit even better. I highly recommend checking it out if you're in the area!

Name: Moishi Bangladesh - Gulshan 2
Address: Moishi Bangladesh Gulshan 2 @ Chef's Table, Level 2 Gulshan central Point, Rd 90, Dhaka
Author: Moumita Zaman
Review: Love their drinks and smoothies! So rich in flavor and delicious. They use premium quality ingredients and very little ice, Unlike other brands. Overall cute ambiance and friendly atmosphere. 10/10 recommend!

Name: Moishi Bangladesh - Gulshan 2
Address: Moishi Bangladesh Gulshan 2 @ Chef's Table, Level 2 Gulshan central Point, Rd 90, Dhaka
Author: Iffath Shoumik
Review: There mochi was terrible. Nothing close to the original. Also the vanilla flavor one was smelly. I think it was stale. Super disappointed. Even though the first time I had there boba drink it was delicious but today I had it again and it was absolute disappointment. Very bad.

Name: Moishi Bangladesh - Gulshan 2
Address: Moishi Bangladesh Gulshan 2 @ Chef's Table, Level 2 Gulshan central Point, Rd 90, Dhaka
Author: Mushfiq Shin
Review: Bubble tea bliss! The perfect blend of flavors and those chewy tapioca pearls make every sip an absolute delight. Had a delightful experience.

Name: KOI Thé Gulshan
Address: Level 01, House 3/B, Road 111, Gulshan Avenue (Opposite Azad Mosque) Gulshan 2,, Dhaka
Author: Wamia Nawar
Review: The Gulshan outlet is very pretty! It has good lighting and very spacious. Tried their hazelnut milk tea and peach green tea. Both of them were refreshing but I would recommend the hazelnut.

Name: KOI Thé Gulshan
Address: Level 01, House 3/B, Road 111, Gulshan Avenue (Opposite Azad Mosque) Gulshan 2,, Dhaka
Author: Tasnuva Tabassum
Review:
Loved the cute bears at the entrance and their interior was quite Simple and unique.  Loved it.

Ordered their Hazelnut Chai(with and without ice) and Caramel Chai(with ice) and they tasted really good.
Wether you may or may not mange the hotness or coldness of you partner but here you have the choice to adjust the coldness or hotness of your cha nd which I liked most. ✌🏽😁😋

About the taste, all of them tasted really differently nice though a bit expensive. 😅
But it seem really unique and cute when the cups came with the price with "$" sign.. 😆
Allover the experience was really cool. ❤️

Name: KOI Thé Gulshan
Address: Level 01, House 3/B, Road 111, Gulshan Avenue (Opposite Azad Mosque) Gulshan 2,, Dhaka
Author: Farhana Afroj
Review:
This is the worst bubble milk tea I have had in my life. The golden bubble milk tea tasted like plain water with a hint of tea. Went there seeing some positive reviews but was totally disappointed by the taste of their drinks. Also,
The price of the drinks is very high considering the size and the quality of the drinks. I will never recommend it to anyone.

Name: KOI Thé Gulshan
Address: Level 01, House 3/B, Road 111, Gulshan Avenue (Opposite Azad Mosque) Gulshan 2,, Dhaka
Author: Urmi Debnath
Review:
This is a very beautiful bubble tea shop, with a calming ambience. The decor is very pretty and cute. It is a good place to spend some time on your own, but also spacious enough for hangouts.

I had the honey milk tea with golden bubbles. It tasted amazing. The price is slightly high, but comparable to other milk tea places.

This place is self-service, and uses a display board to show which order is up. The staff are friendly. They accept bKash, card and cash.

Name: KOI Thé Gulshan
Address: Level 01, House 3/B, Road 111, Gulshan Avenue (Opposite Azad Mosque) Gulshan 2,, Dhaka
Author: Adib Mohammad
Review: Average Drink with decent amount of boba pearls. The place is big and good for spending time there but remember you have to pay 500 for a basic flavoured drink. 😵

Name: KONA Cafe
Address: House No: 46, Road No: 41, House# 46 Road No. 41, Dhaka
Author: Rayhan da Ordinary
Review:
I have tasted the buffet for two consecutive days. Separate menu full of mouth-watering dishes. Loved the food a lot. Enjoyed the nice ambience.
Varieties of seating plans.

Good to have a visit for a luncheon.

Name: KONA Cafe
Address: House No: 46, Road No: 41, House# 46 Road No. 41, Dhaka
Author: Shadman Araf
Review:
Tried their milk cakes (pistachio & cheese)
The pistachio one tasted better.
Among drinks tried their passionfruit pops which was tangy and sour. Brownie bomb drink had boba and the consistency, sugar level were okay.

About service, the waiters, guards all were very professional and extremely well mannered.

As the cafe is in the lakeshore hotel’s ground floor lobby, guests won’t have to worry about parking facilities.

Name: KONA Cafe
Address: House No: 46, Road No: 41, House# 46 Road No. 41, Dhaka
Author: Nasir Khan
Review:
The only good thing about this cafe is that it remains open 24 hours.

The service is not that good and the food and coffee are average. They took a very long time just to serve even the coffee.

Another thing to note is that only a small portion of the cafe has air conditioning!

Name: KONA Cafe
Address: House No: 46, Road No: 41, House# 46 Road No. 41, Dhaka
Author: Md Asaduzzaman
Review: Superb cafe. Food is delicious and pocket friendly. Stuffs are very smiley and friendly. Their menu is very unique unlike other cafe. Their drinks are superlicious. Desserts option is limited but awesome. they have introduced a loyalty card.

Name: KONA Cafe
Address: House No: 46, Road No: 41, House# 46 Road No. 41, Dhaka
Author: Sarika Resh Rahman
Review: I ordered the Thai bubble tea and it was excellent! Worth the price for sure. Their service is really good and the staff is very cooperative. They provided us with more than needed cutlery and tissue. The atmosphere is peaceful and the interior is very trendy.

Name: Panda Chá
Address: Ground Floor, Rahman AJ Trade Centre, Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Muhtadi Hossain Reti
Review: All the drinks are so freaking good. Loved ittttttt. 💜💜💜💜💜💜

Name: Panda Chá
Address: Ground Floor, Rahman AJ Trade Centre, Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Saif Rahman
Review: I had the best sub in my life and folks out there are super nice . Definitely try the special beef sub

Name: Panda Chá
Address: Ground Floor, Rahman AJ Trade Centre, Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Kazi Porichoy
Review: The best bubble tea in town! Didn’t expect snacks, Beef Sub was mouthwatering!!

Name: Panda Chá
Address: Ground Floor, Rahman AJ Trade Centre, Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Kazi Badhon
Review: Food and service was excellent

Name: Panda Chá
Address: Ground Floor, Rahman AJ Trade Centre, Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Faiaz Ishrak
Review: Whoever came up with the neon idea is a legend

Name: More Tea
Author: Shadab Ahmed
Review: Really nice boba tea store. They have a ton of options to choose from, most are very reasonably priced considering the amount they give you. I had their black tea with soda and lemon it was a 10/10, definitely will be going back.

Name: More Tea
Author: Eva Halder
Review: Cute boba shop inside the mall. Lots of different drink options. I ordered the passion fruit/mango fruit tea and enjoyed it. Nice sitting area with cute decor too.

Name: More Tea
Author: Dark Man
Review:
The ambiance at More Tea is both serene and inviting. The interior is tastefully decorated with a blend of modern and traditional elements, creating a cozy and peaceful atmosphere. The soft lighting and comfortable seating make it an ideal spot for a leisurely tea session or some quiet reading.

What truly sets More Tea apart is its extensive tea menu. The tea preparation is a meticulous process, ensuring each cup is brewed to perfection. Whether you're a black tea aficionado or prefer herbal infusions, the quality of the tea here is exceptional.

The menu also features a range of delightful snacks and pastries that pair wonderfully with tea. From savory quiches to sweet scones, there's something to satisfy every palate.

Name: More Tea
Author: Khaled Hasan Ratul
Review: Nice place and nice ambiance and their tea was also amazing, but i would suggest to must have the bubble as an additional, its really yummy. Must recommend

Name: More Tea
Author: Md. Nafees Ur Rahman
Review:
Loved a proper boba milk tea after long time in Dhaka. Why? The black boba in the shop is property cooked and tasted perfect. Jelly literally melts in your mouth. Proper hint of the tea on the milk tea.

The Chinese dessert is pretty good. It's not too sweet and has a decent taste.

They have decent seats for 15-20 people. Loved the overall experience.

It's in the food court of Jamuna Future Park.  The employees are well behaved.

Drink: 10/10
Dessart: 8/10

Name: NORTH END coffee roasters Dhanmondi
Address: House 57, Old Ahmed & Kazi Tower, Lift 3rd, 35 সড়ক-২, Dhaka
Author: Shadab Ahmed
Review: My favorite cafe chain in Dhaka. Honestly I’ve never had coffee better than their roasts in Dhaka. Maybe it’s just my taste preference. The Dhanmondi branch being my favorite one as it used to be near my old house. Wish you guys opened one in Bashundhara or nearby so I didn’t have to suffer and have sub par coffee all the time.

Name: NORTH END coffee roasters Dhanmondi
Address: House 57, Old Ahmed & Kazi Tower, Lift 3rd, 35 সড়ক-২, Dhaka
Author: waseq bhuiyan
Review: Their coffee drinks are always first class as usual, this time I ordered a healthy option which was the granola parfait. This location is huge but does not have a smoking zone. Good experience and I also recommend the cookies and brownies very tasty as well.

Name: NORTH END coffee roasters Dhanmondi
Address: House 57, Old Ahmed & Kazi Tower, Lift 3rd, 35 সড়ক-২, Dhaka
Author: Shrayoshi Mondal
Review: My favourite coffee shop in Dhaka. The staffs are really nice & their coffees/ drinks & other savoury items are tasty too ❤️ Not gonna lie, salted caramel latte (hot) is the best coffee they serve. Everyone should try this if you like sweet, lil salty flavour in your coffee.

Name: NORTH END coffee roasters Dhanmondi
Address: House 57, Old Ahmed & Kazi Tower, Lift 3rd, 35 সড়ক-২, Dhaka
Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: North End is a famous coffee chain of Bangladesh...The interior and ambience of the place was great...Tried their Croissant with roasted beef which was really good and full of Beef...The triple choco cookie was also tasty...Price was a bit high but the service was quite satisfying...

Name: NORTH END coffee roasters Dhanmondi
Address: House 57, Old Ahmed & Kazi Tower, Lift 3rd, 35 সড়ক-২, Dhaka
Author: Prataoy Kabya Bhowmik
Review: Their Lemon Raz is so refreshing! Just gives a restart to the body after a tiring day. Had a raspberry flavour and was quite fizzy for the sparkling water used. Well yes, felt a bit expensive but that’s nothing new for North End. Not to mention, their behaviour was too good.

Name: Arabika Coffee
Author: Fazal Mahmud Roni
Review:
My late night best place for coffee and light snack is this one. Their coffee and their cool drinks are recommended along with their croissants. However this time we had their brownie and carrot cake; carrot cake stood out among these two.

Their interior will give you a vibe that this place is for long adda place. They have smoking zone too but that looks bit shady to me.

Road side parking with adequate guards keeps me worry free.

Name: Arabika Coffee
Author: Ismail Hafiz
Review: I grabbed an Darjeeling iced tea. It was just mid considering the price. Not impressed at all. The place is cozy with some coffee shop music as usual. I gotta try their food items, but so far the staff practice good behaviorism. I would recommend the place for a warm coffee date actually, will add some more details once I check in again to try out more. Stay tuned!

Name: Arabika Coffee
Author: Nowrid Bin Afaz
Review:
Average taste with excessive pricing.
The washroom was not clean.
The staff is not that professional as well.

Beef Crossiant 7/10
Chicken Bacon Toastie 7.5/10
Butter Scotch Cream Fozotino 6/10

Name: Arabika Coffee
Author: Sheikh Fardin Oyon
Review: A great place to hangout and grab a cup of coffee...Interior and ambience was amazing...Staffs were well behaved and the oreo cheese cake and double choco cookie was also fantastic...Price is a bit high but okay...

Name: Arabika Coffee
Author: Md. Rifat Rahman Bhuiyan
Review:
This coffee shop is everything I want when I look for a quality time with a cup of coffee. Top notch service - the barista and servers were super nice to us. Their coffee was freshly roasted and brewed with perfection (it was so nice I asked for a second cup). The food was value for money, no complaints. The sitting arrangement was spacious and cozy.

Highly recommend!

Name: NION green AGRO
Author: Parvin Aktet
Review: Wonderful me the it department working my experiences.

Name: A & Z Coffee Shop
Author: Song of car
Review: A perfect place for Adda

Name: Rizik coffee shop ( রিযিক কফি শপ )
Author: Rd Robin
Review:
Alhamdulilla , this is the best tea + coffee ☕ shop in the area!
We always loved ♥️ to comes here to test there milk tea snacks etc !

Name: Rizik coffee shop ( রিযিক কফি শপ )
Author: Md.Ismail Hosen
Review: Nice milk tea , I loved it

Name: Rizik coffee shop ( রিযিক কফি শপ )
Author: Sohrab Hossain7777
Review: Nice shop

Name: Badal Tea Stall
Author: Badsha vay
Review: Intelligent tea stall boy super VPN service thanks a lot

Name: Badal Tea Stall
Author: Syed Ahmed Adnan
Review: Good place for local adda.

Name: Badal Tea Stall
Author: Ibrahim Khalil
Review: Nice tea stall.

Name: Badal Tea Stall
Author: Ziaul Hasan
Review:
I am happy
Thanks

Name: Badal Tea Stall
Author: Amina parvin
Review: Nice

Name: Polash tea stall. Coffee shop. And juice bar
Author: md polash
Review: Then I'm tea stall and coffee shop owner

Name: Polash tea stall. Coffee shop. And juice bar
Author: Raj Rana
Review: My location

Name: Tabaq Coffee GP house
Address: R/cআআআ।লআআনলব্ডতআলA, GP House, 1229 Bashundhara Rd, Dhaka
Author: Samiha Islam
Review: Tabaq is one of the most renowned coffee shops in Bd, they already have an outlet in jamuna future park, this is their 2nd outlet in Bashundhara, which is located ar GP house. Price is high comparatively.

Name: Coffee shop
Author: MD:Shamim Hasan420
Review: Courage
