Name: YOLO's Cafe
Author: Samer D
Review:
Nice place, great ambience. I just wish they would be a little more creative with their menu. Sandwiches are made with slices of wonder bread. They were a little dry and stale.
Drinks were a bit too sweet. Nothing special.

Name: YOLO's Cafe
Author: Yoshi K
Review:
Good coffee and food. Great accessory like sockets under the couch and games for the kids.
TV loud and actually unnecessary for a breakfast place.

Name: BOBBY & FRIENDS. CAFE 巴比咖啡
Author: Nitin Malla
Review: My BLT sandwich with egg was good. They accommodated my request for extra lettuce for 10 dollars more. Bread was airy. The cafe has very limited seating. I was the only person eating food while everyone else was sitting for a long time drinking something. They could make the seats more efficient by adding benches or tables in the large open space.

Name: BOBBY & FRIENDS. CAFE 巴比咖啡
Author: Chi Eng Chow
Review:
Love the vibe and coffee here. Ordered an iced americano, it has "modern" taste with balance of fruitiness and sweetness. The milk tea my partner ordered is average though.
Seats arrangement are optimized for quick drink or bite, not a full meal.

Name: BOBBY & FRIENDS. CAFE 巴比咖啡
Author: Michael Limantara (Mike)
Review:
This cafe has a great atmosphere, a great place to spend time alone pr with 1 friend. the seat is a bit weird but nevertheless still comfortable and nice.
Best healthy also delicious food I have ever eaten.
Coffee was also superb.
Will go here again for food and coffee.

Name: BOBBY & FRIENDS. CAFE 巴比咖啡
Author: Y L
Review:
The only thing I could say is that this place is beyond my expectation! The food is great, the environment is clean, and the staff are nice. Moreover, it’s located in a cozy corner where I can feel relaxed and hang out with friends in a very good mood!

It’s not easy to find. I’d recommend you to find exit 5 of MRT chongshan station and go into the alley next to it. The alley is hidden in the building.

Name: BOBBY & FRIENDS. CAFE 巴比咖啡
Author: Thien Trang
Review: Just a chill cafe with food and drinks. Came here for a quick break while exploring the area. Very minimal seating. More of a take out place if the seating is all occupied.

Name: 台北日常咖啡商行 Regular Taipei cafe
Address: No. 35號, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Jonas Tamano
Review: Of all the specialty coffee shops I've been to in the area, this one wins for quality and service while being one of the best priced. It's cute and clean, but not trying too hard to be cool. And they serve delicious croissants by local Taipei bakery MyCroissant by Guillaume.

Name: 台北日常咖啡商行 Regular Taipei cafe
Address: No. 35號, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Kris Anto
Review:
Milk tea and Croissant excellent. 💯 Beautiful
Cafe and friendly service. Thank you

Name: 台北日常咖啡商行 Regular Taipei cafe
Address: No. 35號, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Daniel Wang
Review: Excellent environment to get some work done or just chill and relax over coffee and some food. Staff is very friendly. Clean and modern decor with a nice layout of seating. Very reasonably priced and great value and quality. Been several times because it’s close by where I’m staying with family; every time it’s been awesome!

Name: 台北日常咖啡商行 Regular Taipei cafe
Address: No. 35號, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Daniel ダニエル
Review: If you are around Zhongxiao Fuxing area, this place is a must go for the lasgna. Absolutely scrumptious.

Name: 台北日常咖啡商行 Regular Taipei cafe
Address: No. 35號, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Chen Chee Keong
Review: This cafe is a hidden gem in its neighborhood. A bit hard to find as the signage is not prominent. Very cosy, clean and comfortable. I like the mocha very much.

Name: MeJA cafe（咖啡、甜點、早午餐）
Author: 陳老师Anisah
Review:
Creme custard (pudding) was delicious
Brownie and ice cream was yummy
Afragato, added whipped cream and caramel: ice cream was of good quality, creamy and not too sweet.

We helped ourselves with glasses of drinking water - which was a nice touch rather than asking customers to pay more.

It was a pleasant experience having our afternoon coffee and desserts there.

Name: MeJA cafe（咖啡、甜點、早午餐）
Author: Camel Yang
Review: Hands down the best flat white I've had in Taiwan! The coffee at this place is top-notch and the owner's passion for their cafe really shines through with a warm welcome. It's become my go-to spot in Beitou for a reason.

Name: MeJA cafe（咖啡、甜點、早午餐）
Author: Kent
Review: Exceptionally clean place. Owner is young and enthusiastic. And does an excellent job at producing quality. Coffee speaks English too which I appreciate. Tourist friendly

Name: MeJA cafe（咖啡、甜點、早午餐）
Author: Fabian Köninger
Review: Stepping into this coffee shop offers an immediate sense of comfort with its cozy atmosphere and friendly owners who greet everyone with a warm welcome. The quality of the food and drinks is exceptional, with a clear focus on high-quality ingredients. Every detail, from the perfect espresso shot to the fresh, delicious pastries, is attended to with care. It's a delightful spot for anyone looking for a top-notch coffee experience in a snug and inviting setting.

Name: MeJA cafe（咖啡、甜點、早午餐）
Author: Mr KC
Review:
As a foreign tourist looking for a Western flavored bite to eat this was like stumbling into heaven. The space is beautiful and they have a version of a “full English breakfast” with sourdough bread that is worth the journey from anywhere in town. The lattes are also made to perfection, never burnt! The cookies and cakes are amazing. I really wish I lived closer to this cafe, I’d be there all the time.

The staff have English menus and speak English if that’s any help.

Name: CBC SPACE 景美咖啡圖書館 Cafe Boven Co-working
Author: International Tempo
Review: 1st floor offering regular dink and light meat throughout the day while 2nd floor providing a quiet atmosphere with foreign magazine and rentable working space/room for additional entry fee.

Name: CBC SPACE 景美咖啡圖書館 Cafe Boven Co-working
Author: hl y
Review:
Hate this trend of places giving free things for 5 star reviews on Google. Every 5 star review you see on here is FAKE because it was done for free things! This should not be permitted on the Google Maps platform, it’s rating manipulation. I won’t go here because of this.

You can give out things for reviews, but not for 5 star reviews.

Name: CBC SPACE 景美咖啡圖書館 Cafe Boven Co-working
Author: Gina Hou
Review: I waited 30 minutes for my drink. Unbelievable!  Wifi is super slow. Not coming here again for sure!

Name: CBC SPACE 景美咖啡圖書館 Cafe Boven Co-working
Author: 潘得龍（Matthias Telung Pan）
Review: Nice and comfortable place.

Name: CBC SPACE 景美咖啡圖書館 Cafe Boven Co-working
Author: July chuang
Review: good~tasty food and coffee

Name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉信義
Author: 艾美沙
Review: Every time I come to Taiwan, I have to go to Xinyi (Leaves🍃). The food is very nutritious, both my soul and cells are spoken to by that salmon's omega 3's and the 🥑vitamins "C, E, K, and B6" fills my hair & skin with all the supplement it needs to keep growing strongly and shiny. Not to mention the super tasty pumpkin soup 🍲 OMG 😱 it's such a work of art! I usually add three slices of lemon 🍋 to squeeze on top of it and then indulge in the beautiful tastes and flavors.

Name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉信義
Author: Feyzanur Öner
Review: one of my favorite brunch places! me and my friend go there when we can't decide for a place to go for brunch. the location is also so nice and easy to find. i can say that it is a little but expensive but it's worth it because the food is delicious! service is very nice.

Name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉信義
Author: Lindy Hsu
Review: I ordered a lemon chicken bowl, it is quite healthy without too much seasoning. The chicken is thick with different vegetables around such as sweet potato, beans, tomato, broccoli, etc. Also, the atmosphere is comfortable and chill🍃

Name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉信義
Author: Bryan Lim
Review:
Food so so especially that Tiramisu so disappointed, frozen!
Staff service also not good as they gave us the dinner menu when they are serving the lunch.
However the environment okay.

Name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉信義
Author: Ervin Lai
Review:
Lovely brunch place, food is yummy. Love how the foyer is litter with leaves plants and aerial roots, hence the name of the cafe.

Love it they are playing wheel on the bus nursery rhymes in the shop!

Name: Arrival Brunch & Cafe
Address: No. 26號, Alley 4, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: Iana Huang
Review:
Sadly we were asked to share 1 small table for 3 people, although there were enough tables and I was moving 2 tables together to have a comfortable Saturday breakfast with my family. It is very uncomfortable to share 2 tiny table for 3 people! I didn't have the mood to argue. Had to go to another cafe.

I know they just want to have more customers and more money, but are we in Beijing where people have to handle so tense density? The price here is not the lowest to treat guests this way. I don't like greedy people, so we will never come again, we have different life values.

Was really sad, because the place seemed to be suitable for a Saturday breakfast for family. But not suitable in reality.

If you guys are a couple, it's nice place, but if you are having a kid and value personal space, don't waste your energy on this cafe, choose another one.

Name: Arrival Brunch & Cafe
Address: No. 26號, Alley 4, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: Captain Daniel
Review:
I chose this place kind of randomly while in Taipei just looking for high-rated brunch possibilities, and this is a very fine restaurant.
The dishes are beautifully balanced, with good quality ingredients and fun creations, and the prizes are very reasonable. This is a well-liked and popular spot so make reservations.

Name: Arrival Brunch & Cafe
Address: No. 26號, Alley 4, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: Ray Wang
Review: We’re Honestly a little disappointed. Perhaps we had to high of an expectation from the reviews.  The eggs felt like powder mixture, not from fresh eggs.  The meats were mediocre, much like the quality of a regular Taiwanese breakfast shops with better presentations.  Considering the price point, the portions were small (even with Taiwanese standards).  The staff was friendly and attentive, but the service was quite slow.  The vibe and decor was nice though.  All in all, not the kind of western brunch place I was expecting.  ***** (Reply to the owners insulting comments below).  I gave them 3 stars based on our honest feelings after the dining experience, but the insulting reply earned them a solid ZERO star, if Google would make it an option.  I’ve done 150 Google reviews and rarely give fewer than 3 stars.  If I do not give my honest opinion based on my true experiences, what’s the purpose of doing Google Reviews at all?   Aren’t we all trying to help out each other by giving our honest individual opinions?  Should I lie about my experiences just to make the management happy?  No, I’d be insulted by the owner.

Name: Arrival Brunch & Cafe
Address: No. 26號, Alley 4, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: Leo Randy
Review:
Really nice brunch restaurant near Taipei Arena. Their burger is fantastic and worth the price. Definitely recommended for weekday lunch and weekend brunch.

Price: Considered inexpensive in this area
Service: Table service is provided.
Food: Rated to 5 stars because of its nicely combo flavor. Cook does create their own special burger flavor with creativity. Good job!
Transportation/Parking: There are few paid parking nearby but not many. MRT is the best way because it’s a few minutes walk from MRT station.
Environment: Very cozy and warm decor for enjoying brunch. Good for couples or friend gathering.

Overall rate to 5 stars because of its yummy brunch set and nice environment. Highly recommended!

Name: Arrival Brunch & Cafe
Address: No. 26號, Alley 4, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: Leidi Hsieh
Review: Vegetarian friendly. We also have the choice of tofu burger. Nice, healthy, and tasty.

Name: IDK Cafe & Brunch
Author: Calogero Damanti
Review: Absolutely love their Beef Burgundy - served with two delicious slices of lightly toasted bread! It's a rather small establishment so it's better to come during off times or with a reservation!

Name: IDK Cafe & Brunch
Author: Annie Lima
Review:
My laptop and I visit a lot of cafes. As an author, I’m always looking for good places not only to eat and drink but to sit and write for hours. As a teacher, I believe in scoring according to various criteria. With that in mind, these are my opinions about this one.

Food: ***** The first time I went, I ordered the butter chicken masala. The second time, I got the avocado and salmon toast. Both were excellent and filling! Later, I ordered the fruit and yogurt bowl, which also included some granola. The yogurt was sweetened with honey, so it wasn’t too sour. The whole thing was artistic and delicious, as well as healthy. When I went back again with a friend, we both ordered the DIY breakfast option (available all day). It was fun to pick our own combinations of the items we wanted (toast, avocado, bacon, scrambled eggs, sauteed mushrooms, tomato, yogurt & fruit cup, etc.). I will definitely come back and do that again!
Prices: **** Some of the prices are a little high, but the serving sizes are generous, and everything is great quality.
Variety of Menu Options Available: ***** There are several different meal options, as well as several kinds of desserts and a few things that could count as either brunch or dessert (fruit bowls and french toast/pancakes with sweet toppings).
Variety of Non-Coffee Drink Options: **** There are six types of coffee, five flavored milks, three fizzy drinks, and five “something else”. (See my pictures of the menu.) Tea lovers might be disappointed that there aren’t more tea options.
English Menu? Yes, if you ask for it.
Pleasant Environment/Comfortable to Write In: ***** The air conditioning was a little colder than I’d prefer, but otherwise, it’s pretty nice. My laptop and I stayed for a few hours each time. Most recently, my friend and I sat at the outside tables. The weather was great, and it was quite pleasant out there.
Customer Service: ****
Wi-Fi/charging ports available? Wi-fi, yes. No charging ports or outlets inside that I could see. There are outlets in the outside area.
What was the restroom like? Clean and practical.
Hours: 9 a.m. - 5 p.m. (closed Mondays)
Additional Comments: The name is strange (“I Don’t Know”? What don’t you know??) but this is a pleasant cafe to work in (if your battery has a long life) or just to go for a nice lunch or brunch. I plan to return and spend a few hours writing here again sometime.

Name: IDK Cafe & Brunch
Author: Clint Rand
Review:
Food was pretty good and the place is very cute.
One thing is most things are self-service for a place you pay full-service. You need to get your own waters, cutlery, ketchup, tissues etc....
Also, anything you needed cost extra (20ntd for butter for toast with no jam or butter?!?!)
Upstairs is cute but small, only 3 tables and bench seating, downstairs only bench seating.
Outside has 4 picnic tables for when the weather is good.

Name: IDK Cafe & Brunch
Author: po mo
Review:
Excellent breakfast/brunch. A bit pricey, but it is the best quality and very tasty. The quantity is largely sufficient.

The restroom is impeccable and smells nice.

This place is far better than 4-point Sheraton hotel breakfast near MRT station in Linkou.

Name: IDK Cafe & Brunch
Author: Jay Walker (Jay Walker)
Review: Great food, authentic brunch.  The shop is small, so book your seat fast

Name: Ramble Cafe 漫步藍咖啡-台北北門店
Address: Yanping S Rd, 13-1號店面面向開封街號
Author: k
Review: I got a Medium Rose Sea Salt Latte (85 NT). It tasted pretty watered down, so not something I would get again. However, this place seems like a good study spot. It was pretty crowded on a weekday night but quiet, and the WiFi was fast.

Name: Ramble Cafe 漫步藍咖啡-台北北門店
Address: Yanping S Rd, 13-1號店面面向開封街號
Author: chero
Review: stopped by a few days ago for brunch, and thoroughly enjoyed our meal here (plus IT IS SO AFFORDABLE) i LIVE for the brick sandwich- it was simple but so tasty. the mille crepe cake was also really great. the cafe was quaint, which made the ambience real cozy and peaceful for us.

Name: Ramble Cafe 漫步藍咖啡-台北北門店
Address: Yanping S Rd, 13-1號店面面向開封街號
Author: Kasia Ch
Review: A small place to grab a drink or sth to snack on (rather for takeaway than dine-in, however, a couple of seats inside are available). Good coffee and tea, yet, be aware that the sandwiches are rather small and contain not too many ingredients (e.g., a vegetable sandwich with PB and cheese had a few pieces of lettuce as veggies and that's all) and serve more as a snack than a proper breakfast.

Name: Ramble Cafe 漫步藍咖啡-台北北門店
Address: Yanping S Rd, 13-1號店面面向開封街號
Author: Shane Low
Review: We were staying in Taiwan for a week already and had coffee from different cafes everyday. This was the first and only one that tasted like a properly made latte. Keep it up! 👏👏👏

Name: Ramble Cafe 漫步藍咖啡-台北北門店
Address: Yanping S Rd, 13-1號店面面向開封街號
Author: Poh
Review: Specialty coffee for the adventurous. Example: green lemon ice americano

Name: 嗯哼咖啡食堂(Uh huh cafe)
Author: Mohit Lad
Review: Taipei has some amazing coffee shops but this one is quite unique. The owner is super friendly and took the time for the coffee art that the kids loved. The ingredients used do not change the taste much so it's actually also great coffee. Plus the ambience and the drawings are great to see. Kids have options such as strawberry milk as well.

Name: 嗯哼咖啡食堂(Uh huh cafe)
Author: Adeline Lee
Review:
A very soothing and cozy cafe. The owner is extremely talented and kind - in general, so pleasant to interact with.

The matcha latte I ordered was also gorgeous! I didn’t want to drink it, it was so cute. Eventually, I did, and it was perfect - creamy and delicious, not too sweet.

Visit if you’re in the area!

Name: 嗯哼咖啡食堂(Uh huh cafe)
Author: Young ah Yun
Review: Omg so cute and comfortable cafe:) I came here randomly to get some drink and snacks also free wifi!! Everything was perfect !

Name: 嗯哼咖啡食堂(Uh huh cafe)
Author: Lizette Hansen
Review: Great small cafe. The owner is really nice, and very attentive. I love his strawberry milk tea. I have been there a couple of times and it’s been enjoyable each time.

Name: 嗯哼咖啡食堂(Uh huh cafe)
Author: Molly Ho
Review: One of my favorite cafes in the area. There’s always seating available, customer service is great/very friendly, and the drinks are sooo cute. Great place to go if you’re looking for a place to study, get some work done, or meet with a friend.

Name: GoLife Cafe 擱來嘎B
Author: Shawn Lau
Review:
Quite corner in the hotel.
Bagels are good. We had the honey mustard chicken and the egg mayo.

Can ask them to toast longer if u like them hot.

Coffee was food too. I had the cuppacino and they asked if i wanted Cinnamon powder on it. Good decision - adds conplexity to it.

God coffee aroma as well.

Olny downside is 3 seats only - but you can always just have them to go and sit at hotel lobby :)

Would come back again

Name: GoLife Cafe 擱來嘎B
Author: Peggy Lu
Review: In the ground floor of the building. They accept easy card and line pay, but not accept credit card to pay. Offering breakfast and drinks.

Name: GoLife Cafe 擱來嘎B
Author: Ling Yu
Review: Their sandwiches are delicious, full of fresh veggies, try their ham&cheese bagel and their fresh juice, coffee is great too!

Name: GoLife Cafe 擱來嘎B
Author: • impenny
Review:
🤎Honey Mustard Chicken $95
I came here for class and saw some light snacks sold downstairs. Try it.
It’s very convenient to order online. The toast is crispy and plentiful.
There’s a lot of ingredients and lettuce too, and it’s quite delicious☺️

Name: GoLife Cafe 擱來嘎B
Author: 餅
Review: The hot latte is great. Sometimes the food is slow when there are few people.

Name: 漫步藍咖啡Ramble cafe-牯嶺店
Author: Alyssa Lee
Review: Good coffee, cake and light meals! Marvellous service from 2 lovely ladies 😊

Name: 漫步藍咖啡Ramble cafe-牯嶺店
Author: Elaine Lin
Review:
It's a good place to have a coffee.

Not only do they serve tasty meals, but they also provide excellent service.

The staff members are friendly and enthusiastic.

Thank you for making my day so wonderful!!☀️☀️☀️

Name: 漫步藍咖啡Ramble cafe-牯嶺店
Author: Nicola
Review: Great coffee and really friendly staff 😊

Name: 漫步藍咖啡Ramble cafe-牯嶺店
Author: Mirabelle Chen
Review: The waiters are very friendly and lovely, making the dining environment very comfortable. I felt good after seeing the beautiful latte art in the latte. The brunch portion was just right, but the egg was a little salty.

Name: 漫步藍咖啡Ramble cafe-牯嶺店
Author: Chang Hming
Review: On a weekend morning, I came to Ningbo West Street, which was still not fully awake, looking for a good cup of coffee and a small personal space to complete some paperwork. This store is small and has ordinary decoration, but the friendly greeting from the ordering girl is reassuring. I ordered the lime American style and peanut cheese vegetable sandwich. The toast was crispy, the lettuce was enough, the coffee was smooth, the lemon was suitable for the summer heat, and the food and price were quite satisfactory. The sound of chatter and laughter, the running of the coffee machine, and the aroma of bread could be heard in my ears. This is the daily routine in Taipei city in the morning.

Name: J12 Café
Author: Der Chuckmeister
Review: Had the salmon panini, and their organic latte.  The panini is great, so is the latte.  A bit pricy though.

Name: J12 Café
Author: T TT
Review:
The pasta was overcooked. No flavor. Really not tasty. But the price is high.

The drinks are not tasty either. The atmosphere of the restaurant is nice, so it's a shame.

Name: J12 Café
Author: Stephen Tsao
Review: Great place for coffee and lunch. Inside is very quiet and perfect for work or study!

Name: J12 Café
Author: Ian Yang
Review: One of my favorite coffee shops

Name: J12 Café
Author: WS, J Chang
Review:
Where one may cozily spend the afternoon.
Good environment!
Coffee was ok.

Name: Cafe,honestly真拾生活
Author: Benjamin Cheng
Review:
Pretty good neighborhood cafe.  Courteous and knowledgeable (and if they don't have the answer, they'll ask someone who does) staff.  Power plugs at most tables.  Tolerable (for work or conversation) music volume.  Croissant has good texture.  Basque cheese cake could be a bit heavier.
A second is required for staying past 2 hours. Staff is pretty courteous when reminding the time is up

Name: Cafe,honestly真拾生活
Author: HL Huang
Review: Tasty coffee, especially the ozmanthuhs latte! The food is awesome too. The daily lunch (spicy chicken) is wonderful. Will definitely visit again next time in Taiwan.

Name: Cafe,honestly真拾生活
Author: Tzu-Hui Sherry Yang
Review: Having worked in the area few years back and today found it on GM and decided to come here for some reading downtime. Really enjoyed the space, the music, the southern French vibe and the meal. It took them some time to prepare the croissant but they were kind enough to make it up with a small plate of their homemade biscotti. Hope this will be on the menu next time I’m back! 😌

Name: Cafe,honestly真拾生活
Author: Josh Lindfield
Review: Excellent coffee, and the croissants are perfectly fresh and light. Staff were very friendly and a great atmosphere

Name: Cafe,honestly真拾生活
Author: Alysia Lin (Alysia 瑜珈路上)
Review:
Apple pie with ice cream is perfect with Jin-Xuan Tea(金萱茶）.

Nice food and good atmosphere. Clerks are nice as well.

Name: 彼爾咖啡館Beel Cafe
Author: Lady C
Review:
One of my favorite coffee shop in town. Their coffee and sandwiches are very testy, service is quite good as well. Most importantly, the price and quality are so much better then Starbucks 😆
If you want a decent coffee and don’t want to be ripped off, just come to Peter Better!

Name: 彼爾咖啡館Beel Cafe
Author: changhan fan
Review: Best neighborhood coffee shop. Delicious croissant and tasteful coffee. My favourite stay in the holiday morning.

Name: 彼爾咖啡館Beel Cafe
Author: Oscar Gr
Review:
That was toast, not panini. The beef slightly sour.
Coffee was good.

Name: 彼爾咖啡館Beel Cafe
Author: Jackson Lee
Review: Great place to stay

Name: 彼爾咖啡館Beel Cafe
Author: fruitspunch.m
Review: Spacious, clean and bright mid-price cafe, both light meals and beverages taste good.

Name: Bona Cafe
Address: No. 3號, Alley 8, Lane 39, Section 2, KeeLung Rd
Author: Low
Review:
One of the popular cafés around the neighborhood, mainly for office ladies. The meals here are prepared nicely, and generally healthy. I would prefer fresh meat (I.e. fresh pork fillets rather than smoked pork or ham slices) though, but you can't ask too much with such affordable price for a breakfast fix. I love it that the coffee aroma is all over the places every time you enter the café.

It is very limited in space though, especially if you go at morning hours or lunch time. There are also magazines for reading at the entrance.

Name: Bona Cafe
Address: No. 3號, Alley 8, Lane 39, Section 2, KeeLung Rd
Author: Adam Patrick Murray
Review: Cute little place with good coffee and amazing sandwiches!

Name: Bona Cafe
Address: No. 3號, Alley 8, Lane 39, Section 2, KeeLung Rd
Author: Spencer T
Review: Given all of the high reviews, I was surprised at how mediocre the experience was :( I ordered a $60 latte and it was remarkably bad, in spite of a very expensive La Marzocco espresso machine sitting on the counter. The ham and egg sandwich was fine, if not a bit bland. The atmosphere in the cafe was very cozy, but there was also very poor cell reception inside so I didn't end up staying for long (and likely will not be returning).

Name: Bona Cafe
Address: No. 3號, Alley 8, Lane 39, Section 2, KeeLung Rd
Author: Adrian O'Donnell
Review: As good as ever. Super value and quality.

Name: Bona Cafe
Address: No. 3號, Alley 8, Lane 39, Section 2, KeeLung Rd
Author: Adrian Odonnell
Review: First time here. Delicious ciabatta with spicy sausage, nicely presented. Very good, inexpensive cappuccino. Great place.

Name: 宇啡商行Real cafė（準確營業時間請關注ig及臉書唷～感謝各位）
Author: Michael H
Review:
Awesome spot, the food, drinks and juices are great. The toast is sooo good. Buttery, crispy on the outside, huge, and breads on the inside.

Great place for morning breakfast and coffee/tea. The sandwiches are good too.

Name: 宇啡商行Real cafė（準確營業時間請關注ig及臉書唷～感謝各位）
Author: Igor Nakonechnyi
Review:
Good coffee is not that easy to find here, so be sure to check out this place!
Also very hip atmosphere. No credit cards: cash or local means of payment only.

Name: 宇啡商行Real cafė（準確營業時間請關注ig及臉書唷～感謝各位）
Author: Shao-Yu Yen
Review:
nice place for my ME TIME

fried eggs 👏👏
coffee 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

Name: 宇啡商行Real cafė（準確營業時間請關注ig及臉書唷～感謝各位）
Author: Brittney Pan
Review: Very easy and relax place. Breads are  very good.

Name: 宇啡商行Real cafė（準確營業時間請關注ig及臉書唷～感謝各位）
Author: SHANMUGARAJ M
Review: It's really good in all the factors. For Indians they have both veg and non veg sandwich, the taste of which is equal to what we have in India. Must try around. Good hospitality.

Name: 閣樓 Loft Brunch & Cafe
Author: stephen stinton
Review: Followed Google recommendations to this small place. Kind of western simple cafe food. Good if you want to be surrounded by people taking photos of the food and then picking up the sandwiches with a fork. No expresso coffee either.

Name: 閣樓 Loft Brunch & Cafe
Author: Sarah Chen Lin
Review:
📍 Location is great. Super easy to walk to and not far from the Xingtian Temple MRT stop
💲 Very affordable
✨ The facilities, restroom etc were clean
🍛 Unfortunately food was not my fave, nor were the drinks (watery for my taste). All things considered it's still good value for money and they don't use disposable cutlery which I appreciate 💚

Name: 閣樓 Loft Brunch & Cafe
Author: Stella
Review: Lovely brunch place. Good portion for a reasonable price. Really the best tea latte (鮮奶茶) so far in Taiwan. Highly recommended!

Name: 閣樓 Loft Brunch & Cafe
Author: Saber “Spicy”
Review: Very cozy and nice brunch, the food was very tasty and the portion was filling, really like the omelette and the nice jazz 🎺 music 🎶 definitely reccomend just around Ximen

Name: 閣樓 Loft Brunch & Cafe
Author: Rosa D'Andrea
Review: Had an amazing brunch here! The hazelnut latte was delicious. Ordered an american breakfast with scrambled eggs and multigrain bread, spent in total 230 NTD. The music at the cafe was lovely!

Name: Cafe 4 Way
Address: Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, 2之2號
Author: WS, J Chang
Review:
The sandwich set meals were okay (tho a bit pricey), yet the caramel cheese cake and cinnamon roll were pretty disappointing (tho price was alright).
The cheese cake was too moisture (watery) with weird texture and the caramel sauce was containing pellets, not smooth; while the cinnamon roll tasted a bit raw, and the dough was in a soft and moisture (felt yet cooked) state.

Space wise was alright, the air con was quite strong.
Food prep was long, but it’s understandable as the kitchen cooked freshly.

Not a fan for the music taste btw. (Strong beeps)

Name: Cafe 4 Way
Address: Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, 2之2號
Author: Teresa Tong
Review: Food and drinks are fine, but no services and if you are hungry probably you need to order two sets.

Name: Cafe 4 Way
Address: Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, 2之2號
Author: Allen Suei
Review: Nice place for a cup of coffee, but food portion might be slightly little compare to its cost.!

Name: Cafe 4 Way
Address: Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, 2之2號
Author: SP Lee
Review: A bot pricing but foods are tasty

Name: Cafe 4 Way
Address: Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, 2之2號
Author: May Jian
Review: Good dessert and Costa Rica Mozart

Name: BLACK PRINCE MOTORSPORT CAFE
Address: Nanyang St, 211號雍和台北園區1樓
Author: Terence Parker
Review: We went there for a group meeting! We love it! The food and service were excellent!

Name: BLACK PRINCE MOTORSPORT CAFE
Address: Nanyang St, 211號雍和台北園區1樓
Author: Jay Lin
Review:
Black Prince Cafe is a coffee shop with a pretty good atmosphere. I ordered brown sugar latte and Sicilian coffee that day, and the overall experience was satisfactory.

The milky aroma of brown sugar latte perfectly blends with the sweetness of brown sugar. It has a strong brown sugar aroma and a smooth taste without being overly sweet. It is suitable for coffee lovers who like a little caramel flavor.

As for Sicilian coffee, the sweet and sour lemon flavor is paired with the strong coffee, which is refreshing without losing the richness of the coffee. It is very suitable for people who want some fresh taste.

The interior decoration style of the store is simple, creating a relaxing atmosphere. It is a great choice whether you are working or hanging out with friends.

The service staff are friendly and polite, and their introduction to coffee is also professional. It is worth visiting again.

Name: BLACK PRINCE MOTORSPORT CAFE
Address: Nanyang St, 211號雍和台北園區1樓
Author: KiLLz LEE
Review:
The atmosphere in one is very nice. I drank Sicilian coffee this time and it was really good!
The cake is also delicious😋

Name: BLACK PRINCE MOTORSPORT CAFE
Address: Nanyang St, 211號雍和台北園區1樓
Author: Pei-Ching Yang
Review:
Brown sugar coffee is super delicious! The seats are spacious and the atmosphere is relaxing! The price is not expensive!
There is a new menu for lunch! Affordable and delicious😋I am a regular customer

Name: BLACK PRINCE MOTORSPORT CAFE
Address: Nanyang St, 211號雍和台北園區1樓
Author: lulu
Review:
Cafe in Yonghe Park
Delicious food and a great place to relax

Name: Miracle Coffee 東區
Address: No. 34, No. 34號, Lane 308, Guangfu S Rd
Author: C Jarvis
Review: Quite chilling place. Food and drink quite tasteful and decent looking too. Had salmon avocado dough and brownies. Honey lemon lemonade and mocha latte meet expectation too. Enjoyed my tea break here!

Name: Miracle Coffee 東區
Address: No. 34, No. 34號, Lane 308, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Alice Wang
Review:
I’ve never had such an unpleasant experience in a cafe.

First, the attitude. The people there wasn’t friendly. I saw one of the staff making faces after turning her head off from a customer. Also, for my order, she seems like not interested in explaining and just want to finish this job quick. I didn’t come in store closing time, I came in around they opening the store.

Second, the quality of the coffee. Something is completely off. Either the choices of the bean isn’t right or the barista didn’t know how to make a right one. My piccolo was really light and the bean flavor not mixed with the milk well. Salmon Avocado toast cost $270 and it was just a ok taste.  In addition, food doesn’t count as the minimum order, you gotta at least order a drink. The other drink I got it by redeemed latte pass. That drink was horrible that I didn’t want to finish that. It was mixed with taro, coffee and plant milk.Please don’t put this in your menu.

Third, the seats. The store didn’t consider that the Sun light will hit the right parts of the store so the seats along the window will actually hits by the sunlight. This is critical especially summer in Taipei could be very very hot. The charging station will hit by the sunlight as well! It is not safe. Although other decor in store looks cool but this part could tell that did the owner really pay attention about this detail? Did they care about the customer or the safety of the charging station? I questioned about it.

Overall, I think I’m not interested to go back again.

Name: Miracle Coffee 東區
Address: No. 34, No. 34號, Lane 308, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Gwennie 0.0
Review:
Nice place to relax after hours of shopping in the area.⁣
⁣
Had the signature 𝐌𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐢𝐥𝐨 𝐍𝐓 $𝟐𝟐𝟎 which reminds me of milo dinosaur. It's thick and rich in milo and the cup is also coated in chocolate and cereal. ⁣Feel that it is slightly pricey though.

Name: Miracle Coffee 東區
Address: No. 34, No. 34號, Lane 308, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Yvonne Liu
Review: (With English menu but no English service) coffee in here tastes ok, but not especially good. The cup size is pretty small. But i understand that they need to earn for people sit for 2 hours and the rent in his area is quite high. So I think the price is ok. The atmosphere is very cozy, especially when it’s just opened (11am). It’s quiet with  light music. It’s suitable to sit in with a book.

Name: Miracle Coffee 東區
Address: No. 34, No. 34號, Lane 308, Guangfu S Rd
Author: R M
Review: Atmosphere is the only good thing about the place. They dont have what the menu in Google says they have.  The staff will try their best to accommodate you if you say your coffee is bad , they will redo it. Read the other reviews , sums it up.

Name: Rodanthe Cafe
Address: No. 38-1號, Lane 296, Section 6, Minquan E Rd
Author: SasaNa
Review: Tasty and very very nice price point for a brunch. The owner is very nice and thoughtful. We went for family brunch and because my grandma couldn’t eat a whole meal the portion is too much for her also her oral problem. The owner not only exclude her from minimum order but also offer her a free soup which is easy for her to eat. Very thoughtful and nice. I saw a lot of comments said the owner looks angry all the time but u can’t blame how people born like. He maybe looks angry but soft inside. A cozy store and worth give it a try:)

Name: Rodanthe Cafe
Address: No. 38-1號, Lane 296, Section 6, Minquan E Rd
Author: Ryan Axelson
Review: Surprising find behind XiaoBei. Sophisticated food for a good price. I had the steak and risotto the mrs had the rosemary pork cutlet with risotto. Both plates were cooked perfectly. The steak was a little firm but still a decent cut and at medium rare was cooked just right. The pork was very flavorful. The rosemary taste is super strong. I loved it. Both risottos were soft creamy and gooey. The cheese clings to the fork as you pull away from the dish. Looks amazing. The added bonus is that these meals come with a small consume, garlic bread, fruit, a small slice of breakfast cake, and a drink of your choice. Can't wait to come back.

Name: Rodanthe Cafe
Address: No. 38-1號, Lane 296, Section 6, Minquan E Rd
Author: 明緯林
Review: 番茄義大利麵好吃😋

Name: Rodanthe Cafe
Address: No. 38-1號, Lane 296, Section 6, Minquan E Rd
Author: Lisa Chen
Review: Nice food,  comfort & clean restaurant

Name: Rodanthe Cafe
Address: No. 38-1號, Lane 296, Section 6, Minquan E Rd
Author: Yu-Hui Chen
Review: Good food, good service!

Name: Uranium Cafe
Address: Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, 32號1樓
Author: JungJung Chang
Review: The location is highly convenient, with nearby parking available. The food is fresh and offers unique flavors. It gets busy quickly, often filling up within an hour of opening. It’s an ideal spot for gathering with friends.

Name: Uranium Cafe
Address: Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, 32號1樓
Author: Kelly
Review: Only ordered snacks and a drink. Truffle fries is pretty good! And surprisingly the Maple mint americano was light and easy to drink!

Name: Uranium Cafe
Address: Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, 32號1樓
Author: L T
Review:
Been there twice when we visited Taipei.
The layout was warm and cozy.
Coffees and food were great and also combined both of western and Taiwanese cuisines.
We loved the little fish pond outside the window.
Only one minor effect of the dinner time was the candle to instead of the lights but not a big deal at all.
The girls and boys were really nice and polite to provide the services.
We were very relaxing to have a meal and had very pleasant time together.
Will come back when we visit Taipei again.

Name: Uranium Cafe
Address: Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, 32號1樓
Author: Aaron Sutanto
Review: While this café offers standard food and drink options at slightly higher prices, it boasts a cozy space ideal for work or socializing with friends and colleagues. You can leisurely enjoy your coffee or tea without feeling rushed, making it a perfect spot to unwind.

Name: Uranium Cafe
Address: Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, 32號1樓
Author: HP Chng
Review:
Really charming place with a quiet quiet environment. There is some minimum spin of one drink, and the drinks are about 100 NTD. I ordered the baked fish, which I think was a cod. The flavor was light and refreshing without the usual heavy sources you get at other places, it was paired with multicolor capsicum. Served in aluminum foil though.

For those looking for uranium, I couldn’t find any nuclear reactor in here … just a peaceful and green respite in the back streets of the hipster neighborhood of Da’an.

Name: Basement Cafe 樓下咖啡
Address: B1, No. 10, Lane 420, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Earn S.
Review:
I was looking for a cafe that stays open late for studying and found this gem!

It’s a hidden place in a small alley with a wonderful atmosphere. The interior is a bit dark but has a cozy vibe. They serve coffee, alcohol, and food. The price is a bit higher than average, but you pay for good vibes.

They also have a DJ playing music on weekends and some other days (you'll need to check with the place for specifics). There’s no time limit, and some seats have power sockets.

(On the days they play music, it will be loud, so I don't recommend coming to study then, but it’s perfect for chilling.)

Name: Basement Cafe 樓下咖啡
Address: B1, No. 10, Lane 420, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Kaitlin Putnam
Review: One of my favorite low key bars in Taipei. The vibes are always good. Love the reptiles and fish and they often play rnb. It’s like going out to a cozy living room. Perfect for relaxing with friends

Name: Basement Cafe 樓下咖啡
Address: B1, No. 10, Lane 420, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Amy Nguyen
Review: Super chill, great atmosphere! Will comeback for music night :)

Name: Basement Cafe 樓下咖啡
Address: B1, No. 10, Lane 420, Guangfu S Rd
Author: Christopher S
Review:
I was having a brief visit to Taipei and stumbled across this Cafe while looking for a place to charge my phone up a bit and have a cup of coffee.  The experience was good enough that on my next visit to Taipei I would not leave without visiting the cafe again.  The staff were very kind and hospitable.  The ambiance and music were perfect to me - a cozy, jazz and hip hop vibe. Perfectly chill.
I am truly thankful I found this place.

Name: Basement Cafe 樓下咖啡
Address: B1, No. 10, Lane 420, Guangfu S Rd
Author: A H
Review: Good atmosphere and no limited dining time, but not many options for food.

Name: FUJIN TREE CAFE
Address: No. 5-1號, Lane 27, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Chichimothy Neko
Review: Good coffee cafe to visit. There are various specialty coffee. The staff was lovely. If you want to dine in you have to order for each person. It's not a big deal tho. You can also take out and take a picture out side the cafe. I recommend to visit in the morning due to not crowded. I'm not a big fan of coffee but I did order iced matcha milk. It was good 👍🏻.

Name: FUJIN TREE CAFE
Address: No. 5-1號, Lane 27, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Dustin Mella
Review: Pretty hip place with good coffee. Fujin Latte was pretty bland, nothing special. But the espresso itself is good. I just expect the namesake latte to provide a different experience.

Name: FUJIN TREE CAFE
Address: No. 5-1號, Lane 27, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Christina Susilo
Review: Gorgeus building, simple no frill interior decor. One of the nicer coffee option that I’ve tried in Taiwan. Cold brew was nice and flavorful. Love their hot cappuccino too, though the portion was quite huge. Service was friendly and staff can speak well english too.

Name: FUJIN TREE CAFE
Address: No. 5-1號, Lane 27, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Manirat S
Review: Probably one of instagramable spots in Taipei within walking distance from MRT. Great coffee and Matcha Latte, the basque cheesecake was good

Name: FUJIN TREE CAFE
Address: No. 5-1號, Lane 27, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Chris Dang Khoa
Review: Love the vibe, the banana latte and the momo cake here!

Name: Somebody Cafe
Author: edwin tan
Review:
This is an instagram worthy venue…  decor wise and food presentation wise.

The food is ok only, nothing to shout about; but it’s presented prettily…

Their signature, ‘somebody’ latte was surprisingly good. So coffee wise, they are good.

I think, they prep and keep warm all their food and just plate them. The only one which is cooked to order will be the pizza and baked egg dish…

But it’s a nice place to chill…

Name: Somebody Cafe
Author: Jeannette Foo
Review: The cafe is located on 2nd floor. You have to climb a flight of staircase. Not convenient if you have elderlies or children in stroller. The food doesn’t worth the price. Chicken breast is very dry. Salad is not appetising. However the toasts are soft and warm. Just very nice presentation. Will come back for coffee only.

Name: Somebody Cafe
Author: Mel
Review: Very vibey cafe in the heart of Ximending. Located upstairs so bit tricky to find. Would recommend one of their set breakfasts (280NTD) - we got the sandwich (bacon+sausage, chicken+cheese) which were decent (chicken on the dryer side though), very soft but crispy bread that had been toasted. Came with a seasonal salad, hash brown and egg muffin (frittata) that were nice side dishes with the sandwich. Would return for the decor, nice place to study or read.

Name: Somebody Cafe
Author: Chelsey a
Review: Everything was amazing!!! Service, good, atmosphere, all of it. Love love love it. Will be going back. And the little cookie thing that came on top of the latte was so amazingly paired with the drink that I want 100 more. They also had books for free with beautiful art! Can't wait to translate to read the story(?) that goes with it

Name: Somebody Cafe
Author: Sheena Wong
Review:
Portion is great and good is perfect.
Chanced upon this cafe nearby hotel and really love the ambience.
Price is affordable and food is prepared with care.
Highly recommend!!

Name: Merci Cafe
Author: Kelvin Low
Review: Impromptu breakfast at Merci, food was great and coffee is awesome. It’s a must try restaurant I would recommend.

Name: Merci Cafe
Author: Eric Wu
Review: Cafe with cozy atmosphere. The meal is quite special and the staff is cordial here. Worth a visit.

Name: Merci Cafe
Author: Soumaya Ben Ahmed
Review:
The food is delicious and the staff are nice
Cozy place will definitely come back

Name: Merci Cafe
Author: A Sh
Review: Tiramisu was not that good. Flavor if it didn’t come out as other place I had before. Had the greatest whisky espresso ever!

Name: Merci Cafe
Author: Leo Randy
Review:
Definitely the best western restaurant in this area.

Location: close to a mall (FET21). Easy to find parking nearby.
Price: considering inexpensive for its delicious food
Environment: nice industrial decor. Cozy and you will not feel crowded in here
Food: Love the brunch menu and pasta. For anytime around noon, brunch with French toast is recommended. For dinner, recommend you to enjoy their pasta and nice topping salad
Others: alcohol is also served here. Especially fruity flavor.

Highly recommended for friend gathering and family dinner.

Name: inn cafe 西門店
Author: Changhun Jeong
Review: Delicious food and fresh cool air. What do you need  in Taiwan.

Name: inn cafe 西門店
Author: Andrew “Andy” Davis
Review: Probably the best of the in-house chain in Taiwan. Xinyi is good and a great location and then this one. Food is good and well priced. Service is good and friendly and a good location. Worth a visit. Nice and relaxing

Name: inn cafe 西門店
Author: D. M.
Review: If you want to eat western food, this is the place to go. Very tasty fries.

Name: inn cafe 西門店
Author: Therese Chua
Review:
The mushroom risotto was really good, and their set meals are so inexpensive (in my opinion) -- they were only 180NTD.

It's a good place to study/work in the afternoons because it's quiet and they have outlets and wifi.

Name: inn cafe 西門店
Author: AK
Review: Quite good actually…waffles are marvellous…margaritas pizza…not bad…and i got a discount cos I am staying at the other in house heritage…atmosphere is good…all can speak English…

Name: Ramble Cafe
Author: D KS
Review:
Beautiful coffee place on a Sunday morning! The girl that gave me my coffee was really nice and helpful!
The coffee and the cake were amazing!

Name: Ramble Cafe
Author: Vadim Dørum
Review: Simple but stylish blue&white coffee shop with very nice prices and a heavenly nutty milktea 🤩 A nice surprise - it has a second floor with seating for 30+ people 😉

Name: Ramble Cafe
Author: Gabriel M
Review:
The food was below the expectation
But the coffee shop looks nice and comfortable

Name: Ramble Cafe
Author: Bas -
Review: Not bad but not really good either. Definitely expected more from their coffee in particular, based on the other reviews.

Name: Ramble Cafe
Author: chunkai yen
Review: a peaceful place

Name: In house Residence Cafe
Author: Brad Good
Review:
They were full so I ordered take out. Chicken sandwich had zero flavor ... and, chicken still had bones in it.

French fries were not just simply fried but rather had more stuff on them. They did not taste good at all.

Seems there is a complete lack of salt. Chicken had zero flavor. Would have been nice if they provided salt, and more than two small packets of ketchup.

In Taipei there are places with much better hamburgers.

Name: In house Residence Cafe
Author: Shuya
Review: Very calm and cute café, perfect to get some work done or spend a quiet afternoon. The menu has pasta/risotto, burgers and dessert options, like waffles and cake! (The pasta with sauteed chicken ribs and truffle cream sauce is delicious!) The staff is very friendly as well~ Definitely recommend it ❤️

Name: In house Residence Cafe
Author: D W
Review: Their burger, while a tad undersized, was pretty good, with a taste that distinctly reminded me of the burgers at Johnny Rockets due to the inclusion of sweet pickle relish. The shop's decor is pleasant, as was the service, though the window beside our table was rather dusty. Overall, a fine place to grab a light lunch, but they really should clean those windows since they push the tables right up against them.

Name: In house Residence Cafe
Author: Yvonne Liu
Review: (With English menu) the price is pretty fair. You can get a soup, pasta and a drink with 10 euros (350NtD including service fee). However, I think it just a simple meal. The soup was not hot; the pasta and risotto taste like it made by package, and the portion is quite small. The drink is just acceptable. But the environment is very cozy. If u don’t have high standard of your food and drink, it will be a good choice.

Name: In house Residence Cafe
Author: Anita Rosaleh
Review: Warm decor, Very inhouse! good beef pasta and latte.. The beef was surprisingly tender.. service was good too. It’s located behind NTNU dormitory in a very quiet neighborhood.. Definitely will come back if we’re in the area!

Name: 91°N CAFE NATION-林口外帶店|新型態模式|林口好喝咖啡|手沖咖啡|咖啡廳推薦
Author: Bob Chau
Review:
Spacious and comfortable environment…..

Friendly and helpful staff…..

Nice coffees and dessert……

Reasonable prices…..

This is a nice neighborhood coffee shop to relax, reconnect with a friend, or just get some work done. There’s plenty of indoor seating as well as some tables outside. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

Name: 91°N CAFE NATION-林口外帶店|新型態模式|林口好喝咖啡|手沖咖啡|咖啡廳推薦
Author: CJ Wu
Review:
been interested in this coffee shop for years
finally came w a friend after its newly renovation completed
we ordered 2 Americanos
tasted like water down coffee

so had to go to 想林口 for strong..er coffee
other than coffee wasn't to my liking
every other things were fine

Name: 91°N CAFE NATION-林口外帶店|新型態模式|林口好喝咖啡|手沖咖啡|咖啡廳推薦
Author: Jinkwon Hong
Review: High ceiling, various furniture, morden interior and good music.. everything is perfect. The best coffeeshop I have been to in Taiwan

Name: 91°N CAFE NATION-林口外帶店|新型態模式|林口好喝咖啡|手沖咖啡|咖啡廳推薦
Author: Annie Lima
Review:
My laptop and I visit a lot of cafes. As an author, I’m always looking for good places not only to eat and drink but to sit and write for hours. As a teacher, I believe in scoring according to various criteria. With that in mind, these are my opinions about this one.

Food: ***
Drinks: ****
Prices: ***
Variety of Menu Options Available: *** (They need more food options, especially savory ones.)
Variety of Non-Coffee Drink Options: *****
English Menu? Drink menu, yes. Food menu, no, but there are pictures.
Pleasant Environment/Comfortable to Write In: ****
Customer Service: ****
Hours: 9 a.m. - 8 p.m.

Name: 91°N CAFE NATION-林口外帶店|新型態模式|林口好喝咖啡|手沖咖啡|咖啡廳推薦
Author: William Cirillo
Review: nice coffee great cinnamon roll 😋 will go again

Name: Moi Cafe
Address: No. 29號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Lindy Hsu
Review: The chicken is nice and tender with the sour sweet sauce at the top, the scramble eggs cooked very well. The most stunning part is the cream for the bread, the gray tea flavor spice up everything🤩🤩Also, the portion is quite big, truly fulfilled after finishing the 🍽️🤤🤤

Name: Moi Cafe
Address: No. 29號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Jennifer Sun
Review:
Was this place decent? Yeah.
Would I come back again? No :(
They were really meticulous about time so don’t come here if you don’t expect to get kicked out even WITH empty tables LOL
The latte and the brownie was aight but it wasn’t something super special to where I can’t find something similar elsewhere

Name: Moi Cafe
Address: No. 29號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Denis Chabot
Review: Food is cooked with taste, coffee is really good. The basic brunch is really good and so is the yogurt one.

Name: Moi Cafe
Address: No. 29號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Nawatt Silawan
Review:
"Nice Place for Brunch and Chitchat"
★ About: The restaurant serves many selections of brunch. The interior is nice and cozy. It's a good place to take time with your friends to talk and relax.
★ Recommended: Benedict is really nice. Good quality and large enough portion to fill you up for a full day. American and French Brunches are good choices too.

Name: Moi Cafe
Address: No. 29號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Mikhail Tiu
Review: This place is a good brunch place since they have a lot of seats available. Their dishes are also generous in portion and their coffee drinks are good. The servers are also very nice and kind. It might get packed so try to reserve beforehand. The menu has some English but you can also just look at Google Maps for the photos. Foreign and local credit cards are accepted.

Name: Aussie Cafe
Address: No. 33號, Lane 115, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: 呂冠毅
Review: A nice quiet cafe to meet up with friends to chill or to go alone and read a book. The food is really tasty and not too heavy; I especially recommend their matcha latte. The matcha flavor is fairly strong, yet not overpowering. Superb presentation of the food and they feature art of Australian animals in their drinks. The staff is very warm and friendly. You can choose from a variety of postcards (comes free with the meal) that were photos taken by the cafe owner. Will definitely come again~

Name: Aussie Cafe
Address: No. 33號, Lane 115, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Life of the Varol's
Review: If you ever come to Taipei, I strongly recommend you visit this place. Delicious food and drinks and very comfortable place to spend time. We ate and drank almost every day. The staff are also very welcoming, always smiling and very friendly.

Name: Aussie Cafe
Address: No. 33號, Lane 115, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Daniela Hernandez
Review: I really liked all the flavors, i chose the black tea (it’s included with the sandwich, coffee or tea). Cozy place. Recommended 💫

Name: Aussie Cafe
Address: No. 33號, Lane 115, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Alicia Dunstan
Review: I'm an Aussie living in Taipei and this cafe was delightful - the decor was really fun, the food was great (lamingtons!!) and the coffee was good too! Loved the print of Country Races as well, my grandparents had a copy in their house and haven't seen that painting in years - very nostalgic :) the Coles/Woolies theme in the menu also cracked me up!

Name: Aussie Cafe
Address: No. 33號, Lane 115, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Feliciana Hsu
Review: The cranberry pancake is yummy,coffee is great and everything here is fantastic ! Highly recommended ♥️🤍

Name: Dine in cafe 咖啡廳｜早午餐｜義大利麵｜燉飯｜甜點
Address: Lane 36, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd, 11號1樓
Author: S.J. Lee
Review: We had lunch here yesterday, ordered White wine clam risotto and Pesto pasta with a grilled drumstick. We were very impressed by the authentic flavor, great service and comfortable environment. We would love to come back again!

Name: Dine in cafe 咖啡廳｜早午餐｜義大利麵｜燉飯｜甜點
Address: Lane 36, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd, 11號1樓
Author: Kate Shao
Review: Beautiful and unique decoration. They provided brunch, pasta, risotto and dessert. How healthy and delicious they were. There weren't many seats so remember to make a reservation in advance. Reasonable price and friendly service.

Name: Dine in cafe 咖啡廳｜早午餐｜義大利麵｜燉飯｜甜點
Address: Lane 36, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd, 11號1樓
Author: Evangeline Chen
Review: Had a great time here~ Came on a Sunday afternoon. Food was great, service was exceptional, staff are polite and helpful. Since it's usually crowed here at Zhongshan area on weekends, we made reservation a day before. We ordered 'pork kabob risotto with creamy sauce', 'fried mushroom and shrimp with scrambled eggs', 'smoked salmon focaccia with aioli'~ the food does not disappoint! 😋 Will definitely come back~

Name: Dine in cafe 咖啡廳｜早午餐｜義大利麵｜燉飯｜甜點
Address: Lane 36, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd, 11號1樓
Author: Krisztina Gyimes
Review: Love this small diner! They provide us with tasty and healthy food from high quality ingredients. The service is amazing, and we even got free smoothies!

Name: Dine in cafe 咖啡廳｜早午餐｜義大利麵｜燉飯｜甜點
Address: Lane 36, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd, 11號1樓
Author: Daniel Li
Review: Prices are what you'd expect for this part of the city. I thought the decor here was nice and the food was good. I was able to work here quietly for a new hours on a weekday.

Name: Hungry Pig’s Cafe & Bar
Address: No. 6-6號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: idb games
Review: This cozy outdoor cafe is a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy a good coffee with relaxing music. They keep it cool with plenty of fans, so the heat isn't an issue. The Sicily lemon coffee is a favorite, and the cold brew is just as delightful. The cakes are delicious, served with a little coffee on the side. The service is amazing, and everything is well priced. A great place to relax!

Name: Hungry Pig’s Cafe & Bar
Address: No. 6-6號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: hisa
Review:
Food
Very good cake and coffee

The owner's daughter cooked everything.
I ordered the cheese chocolate cake and a latte.
The peppermint tea served after dinner was great.

Service
Great
They were very friendly.

atmosphere
I also like the space to eat on the terrace.
For those who are hot, they also lend you a fan.

Name: Hungry Pig’s Cafe & Bar
Address: No. 6-6號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Maira De León
Review:
I very rarely feel the inspiration to write a review but this café definitely deserves one.

The service is unmatched, the best I've had. The food and drinks delicious. The price very fair for such good service. The atmosphere very relaxing and welcoming. I could write so much more but all in all, it was a 10/10 experience with some of the nicest staff I've ever seen. Will definitely be back.

Name: Hungry Pig’s Cafe & Bar
Address: No. 6-6號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: David Chiu
Review:
This is by far one of the best sit down coffee places I've had. I would rate above five stars if possible. The experience adds an icing on the cake of my short trip to Taiwan.
The care of the store owner and staff a superb. I brought some to-go from a store nearby on a hot and rainy afternoon. They happily greeted me with a refreshing ice mint tea before I even looked at the menu. I ordered a pour over black coffee. It was very flavorful with a hint of nuts, The level and intensity was unforgettable. It was so good that I returned in the same afternoon for another bottle of cold brew coffee. The snow Q cake that comes with the coffee perfectly blends in. I'm not a gourmet critic, but this is definitely one of the best coffee I've had in a long time. For the ones who wonder about the electric fans in the photo, The store owner placed those for the customers.

Name: Hungry Pig’s Cafe & Bar
Address: No. 6-6號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Indradb
Review:
Outside cafe / bar.
Very friendly service, one of the best I've experienced.

The coffee has great flavour, the cakes are delicious (passion fruit is my favorite so far!), the jalapeno quesadilla was delicious.

Name: 小宅子咖啡 shiaujhai.cafe
Address: Alley 1, Lane 45, Section 1, Wenhua Road, 5號1樓
Author: M K
Review: It’s a small but cosy coffee shop with semi-outdoor space.   The milk tea is super tasty😊

Name: 小宅子咖啡 shiaujhai.cafe
Address: Alley 1, Lane 45, Section 1, Wenhua Road, 5號1樓
Author: Fernando Antonio dos Santos
Review: I love this place!  Good  good!

Name: 小宅子咖啡 shiaujhai.cafe
Address: Alley 1, Lane 45, Section 1, Wenhua Road, 5號1樓
Author: 天行任
Review: Good

Name: 小宅子咖啡 shiaujhai.cafe
Address: Alley 1, Lane 45, Section 1, Wenhua Road, 5號1樓
Author: 何至
Review: Today I ordered frozen stockings milk tea (sugar-free), frozen lemon tea (sugar-free), frozen pineapple oil, barbecued pork buns, and cheese meal meat and egg sandwich. They were all delicious. The stockings milk tea tasted very fragrant, and the frozen lemon tea was also very good. Drink, I want to try something else next time, I will definitely visit this store again.

Name: 小宅子咖啡 shiaujhai.cafe
Address: Alley 1, Lane 45, Section 1, Wenhua Road, 5號1樓
Author: 黃娟娟
Review:
Beautiful atmosphere around
The gate giraffe is a great attraction to take pictures of. The interior has an antique feel and a nostalgic feeling.
The hostess is also very beautiful and good at cooking. The most important thing is that she also offers off-menu dishes, but only if you make a reservation in advance!
The environment is great and the attractions are popular! Too much push

Name: 3C Cafe
Author: 周澄融
Review: Had a nice time in this home vibe filled café near the park in a secluded area. Their desserts and beverages are nice but not mind blowing, still a fair deal at their prices. The owner seems very chill and friendly.

Name: 3C Cafe
Author: Michael Wulf
Review: Delicious Cappuccino, very comfortable sitting places, cozy ambiente and top service. Good hiding place from fast running Taipeh. Enjoy!

Name: 3C Cafe
Author: Maciej Chadała
Review:
You will find many types of coffee here for a fair price.
You can definitely focus on work there.  The other guests are calm and the place is well soundproofed.  You won't hear any noise from the nearby road.

Name: 3C Cafe
Author: Alexander Frankish
Review: A nice little cafe near the local 7-11. The owner was a late in opening, dude to an event, but was so very accommodating that it was a lovely experience.

Name: 3C Cafe
Author: Stephanie
Review: Clean environment, great coffee, and good place to focus on work

Name: UDE Café Bistro
Author: David C
Review:
The food and atmosphere was perfect for me to eat lunch and study:)
The food was healthy and delicious.
I was about to move to another cafe since it was full but the owner helped my friend and i find seats. Very accommodating!

I got a iced matcha and ham and cheese sandwich.

Name: UDE Café Bistro
Author: Pygopus lepidopodus
Review: Quite and nice LGBT friendly cafe & bistro. Some alcoholic beverages are also available. The owner is most likely playing a piano if the cafe is not so busy.

Name: UDE Café Bistro
Author: Phil
Review: A small, fine café a little away from the hustle and bustle of the busy streets, where you can enjoy your coffee in a quiet and beautiful atmosphere. The coffee was of high quality and prepared with a lot of love. Small details also characterise this lovingly run café (see photos).

Name: UDE Café Bistro
Author: Kayla Mohnsen
Review: Rose vinegar beverage is surprisingly sweet, a special flavor! The service was amazing. Live keyboard performance - impressive!!! Let us work online for quite a while and remained welcoming throughout our experience.

Name: UDE Café Bistro
Author: Joseph Cheng
Review: Cafe is a bit out of the way in (literally) a shady place at night from the main XiMenDing area but worth the visit. Very friendly staff, quiet, and relaxing place to let time go by with good company.

Name: 草泥Cafe（搬遷安東街35巷31號）
Author: Emily Lu
Review:
Sharing the space with a furniture shop, this cafe has a beautifully sunlit room with cozy dining environment.

The menu is done with utmost creativeness in mind but in reality I think they’ve overshot it. I mean, sometimes a simple ham sandwich beats fancy panini like plum-sauce pork chop, which in all honesty the flavours don’t really match.

And like all cafes in Taiwan absolutely no respect for order of food, hence the coffee is served at the barista’s earliest convenience while you wait for your food on an empty stomach.

Stick with the basics then you get a decent coffee shop.

Name: 草泥Cafe（搬遷安東街35巷31號）
Author: Dw Law
Review: Super cozy cafe environment with delicious food and coffee. The cafe is very spacious and are well designed and decorated. You can wonder around and take pictures. They also sell original stuffs made by local artists. The only downside is the serving time is at times a bit slow as they are short of staff.

Name: 草泥Cafe（搬遷安東街35巷31號）
Author: Ariel 林慧君
Review: The vibe is fabulous! Food is ok. A good place to spend your time here thinking and creating new things.

Name: 草泥Cafe（搬遷安東街35巷31號）
Author: Jaclynn Joseph
Review: Lovely cafe to work in! Prices are good and the staff were so so so nice! My phone died and they let me borrow their charger.

Name: 草泥Cafe（搬遷安東街35巷31號）
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Average place to spend time. Drink is so so.  Entrance has big table and nice space.

Name: Läbu Café
Address: No. 7號, Alley 2, Lane 161, Section 2, Xinyi Rd
Author: Bryan Huang
Review: This restaurant is a good place to meet with friends and has a very modern vibe. They serve a variety of dishes including pasta, risotto, and sandwiches. Business Lunch is a good deal as you get around a 70nt discount for your drink. I would recommend the Bolognese Linguine (shown below). It has 2 floors and outdoor dining, but I would recommend eating inside since there are many bugs during summertime. They provide English menus and accept credit cards. If you are eating during rush hour (11:30 - 13:00), you may have to wait a bit for your food.

Name: Läbu Café
Address: No. 7號, Alley 2, Lane 161, Section 2, Xinyi Rd
Author: Yvonne Liu
Review: (With English menu, foreigner friendly)  I have already been here few times. The food and service is pretty good here. They have very cute decorations and cozy atmosphere. But u have to wait a little bit long for ur food and drink if u r in the rush hours.

Name: Läbu Café
Address: No. 7號, Alley 2, Lane 161, Section 2, Xinyi Rd
Author: Mikhail Tiu
Review: This restaurant has a very cozy and cute ambiance with good food. It is good to meet and talk with friends and have a good meal together. They have English in their menu and there are lunch meals to during weekdays. They also have credit card options for payment.

Name: Läbu Café
Address: No. 7號, Alley 2, Lane 161, Section 2, Xinyi Rd
Author: Ray Trinh
Review:
I love it, one of the best rissotto in Taipei I've ever eaten with much beef.
The sea salted caramel milk is not that great but acceptable.
I ordered a set of 1 main dish + 1 drink ($350 NTD) - Reasonable when you have Western food in Taipei.
Labu is a hidden gem in Dongmen with a bunch of people get together here

Name: Läbu Café
Address: No. 7號, Alley 2, Lane 161, Section 2, Xinyi Rd
Author: 周澄融
Review: A bit pricey but the taste of their food is amazing. I ordered a torched salmon risotto and it was mind-blowingly good. Their freshly brewed tea is also a plus for me, adding some depth to the richness of their food. Allegedly their desserts are also delightful, something that I would prepare an empty stomach for for the next time.

Name: Maple Maple Café
Address: No. 410-5, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Victoria Xia
Review: Maple Maple Cafe is so cute and relaxing! Although I didn't get the lunch selection, I saw many others did and it looked delicious! I opted for pastries and the Maple Lavender Latte. They were both so delicious. We'll definitely visit again when I'm in the area and maybe try out the savory menu next time!

Name: Maple Maple Café
Address: No. 410-5, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Suzanne Smith Treacy
Review:
I visited last Friday, around lunchtime. It wasn't busy at all. I sat upstairs in the comfy cushy sofa area. There are plugs if you want to use a laptop, and Wi-Fi.
I ordered a chicken quiche, and it was good. I also had maple milk tea. I really liked that the tea was served in a large pot, and the cup was small and cute.
I'd definitely come back again for the maple milk tea and comfortable atmosphere.

Name: Maple Maple Café
Address: No. 410-5, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Tammy Liu
Review: A small cafe, with about 6 table seats downstairs and 3 sofa seatings upstairs.  Featuring Canadian style quiches, sandwiches, baked chicken, pork and beef.  Liked the ambience.  The cold pork sandwich was okay.  Enjoyed the baked chicken, juicy and good flavors.  Service was good.  Interesting tea!

Name: Maple Maple Café
Address: No. 410-5, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Celeste Poh
Review:
A spontaneous CAFE which I saw on google map. Delicious maple coffee n Maple suger pecan pie.
Advisable to call for reservation.

Name: Maple Maple Café
Address: No. 410-5, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Tina Hall
Review: Ahhhhhhmazing Becoming one of my top 3 places to go. Food, staff, atmosphere, absolutely awesome. Cannot give enough stars.

Name: Cafe a la mode
Address: No. 11號, Lane 26, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Sonita Chen
Review: This Cafe serve a lot of foods, drinks, and dessert, but for the price it's quite pricey. This place is so convenient for having lunch, afternoon tea with business partner, friend, couple or family. I like their design, environment and natural plants.

Name: Cafe a la mode
Address: No. 11號, Lane 26, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Emanuele De Cupis
Review: I stopped for a coffee and when the owner knew I am Italian, she insisted I try her "risotto". It was very good! The flavour reminds me a lot the mushrooms risotto i have at home. Delicious 😋

Name: Cafe a la mode
Address: No. 11號, Lane 26, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Jasmine Ho (Luxiferette)
Review:
Had my super late lunch here two days ago.

Ordered a spinach bacon risotto with their add on combo (one drink, one bread/salad/soup, one dessert)

The french pain is not bad, if you dislike hard bread, not recommended to have it. ⭐

Risotto is not bad. Personally like it a lot. ⭐

I chose Mocha for the drink and it taste like milk with a bit of chocolate in it. (Maybe because I'm not a fan milk) So if you like milky drinks, you might like this.

Creme Brulee is quite decent, also very milky.

It is a nice and chill place when there is not much crowd. Staffs are quite friendly ⭐ and doesn't make you feel awkward like some café when they have no crowd.

Will definitely visit again to try their desserts.

Name: Cafe a la mode
Address: No. 11號, Lane 26, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Shirley H. Lee (Shishi 囍囍)
Review: One of my favorite restaurants for having lunch or catching up with friends… the prices are reasonable and the food here is very tasty!! Hightly recommend❤️

Name: Cafe a la mode
Address: No. 11號, Lane 26, Section 2, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Natalie Reid-Ross
Review: I love this place. It’s my favorite cafe in Taipei, as the food is delicious and worth the price, the atmosphere is so relaxing and the service is wonderful. The owner is very kind and welcoming and every time I go there I have a pleasant experience.

Name: Forgood Cafe
Author: Edward Niedbalski
Review: Another wonderful little boutique style coffee ☕☺️ shop tucked away on the little avenues and alleyways of the district.  Great coffee, sandwich 🥪😋 and atmosphere.  High quality WiFi and and good vibe 😁 Will definitely be in again, a delightful little place for a quiet chat with friends after a long day!😉

Name: Forgood Cafe
Author: angie
Review:
got here around 12.05 on a weekend and surely this place got packed so easily! i ordered the 檸檬抹茶 because somehow the 蜜桃奶蓋 got sold already?
the matcha lemontea wasn’t really my liking as it’s very sour
however their mozzarella, tomato, pesto sandwich was really good 😋 i would recommend!
the place has such a good ambiance, perfect for studying with their free wifi (but on weekends they have limited 3 hours dine in only, weekdays are unlimited) the location was a bit hidden but somehow everyone always manage to find this!

Name: Forgood Cafe
Author: Felix Torres
Review: Found this place while shopping around 永康街， nice and quiet place with friendly staff.  Was able to have my first Flat White since I came to Taipei a couple of days ago.  The flat white was good and up to expectations.

Name: Forgood Cafe
Author: jody moore
Review:
I arrived just after lunch time and stayed until around 7:30pm. The interior is very minimalist and they play nice soothing music in the background. Almost every table along the wall had a charger socket, which was very convenient.

In the day, lots of people were here chatting so it was quite noisy(not the cafes fault though), however at 5pm onwards, it was silent even though there were 10 people all on their computers. It was a very nice atmosphere to work in.

I had an Earl Grey no bake cheesecake. It was alright, I just like a bit more flavour when it comes to desserts. The coffee was also pretty ordinary. I found it to be a bit expensive (180 ntd for an iced caramel latte) but then I stayed for a really long time without being kicked out so I just consider it the ‘fee’ for sitting there for hours.

Overall not a bad place to work, just have to hope that it’s not too crowded when you visit. Bathroom was also very clean.

Name: Forgood Cafe
Author: Justin Lui
Review:
Surprisingly solid.

Ordered the peach tea with foam? Good sweetness, foam adds a nice touch.

Tiramisu? Very good.

Name: Greedy Bistronomy Cafe
Author: Pei-Ru Shih
Review:
I celebrated my birthday last night here and the staff were so nice and friendly!

The food was also nice and the atmosphere was also good! 😍

(And thank you for changing the music playlist for my friend haha!)

Name: Greedy Bistronomy Cafe
Author: Esther L
Review:
Do recommend their mix corail drinks, their drink are really innovated and interesting names, as for service is very good, their serveur always keep on eyes on customers. The reason why I gave them 3 stars is that, me and my friends we ordered appetizer, then drinks, and several dishes, but their kitchen gave us the main dishes first, then later drinks come along, their dishes are not cheap, is just too fast their main dishes  came to our table was like 15 minutes, me and my friends still basent start chatting and we already have main dishes in front of us.
Do recollent for going their for drinks, but if your picky like me for how the restaurant should bring their dishes in orderly then, this restaurant are not recommend.

Name: Greedy Bistronomy Cafe
Author: Bryan Kuo
Review:
Been here several times over the years. Love this bistro for being pet-friendly. Although their current cocktails menu is not as extensive as it used to be, it has remained truly creative with well-balanced flavors and photo-worthy presentations since day one.

Jerry (hope I got the name right) is exceptional this evening for taking customers’ feedbacks seriously. We had a great time and would not hesitate to come back again!

Name: Greedy Bistronomy Cafe
Author: Simon Hsu
Review: Great place for gatherings or dates! They have an amazing selection of cocktails and with eye-opening presentations. You would be amazed by how much thought they put into a small cocktail with gadgets and stuff! Food is also good and to the point. Definitely recommend!

Name: Greedy Bistronomy Cafe
Author: The Hunger Game Nancy
Review:
Food was really good, enjoyed every dish we ordered, including fig salad, pasta, steak and tiramisu.

Decor is really nice as well, from floor to table, kitchen set up and bathroom tidiness.
Worth trying when you are in the neighbourhood

Name: 2J CAFE
Address: No. 9, Lane 79, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd
Author: Earn S.
Review:
I absolutely love 2J Cafe. It's such a cute spot with a wide variety of things to order—coffee, food, beer, and cakes.

They have both outdoor seating with a cute garden and a nicely decorated indoor area.

The staff is incredibly nice; when it started raining, they helped us move our table and even offered free cake because we had to move a few times!

It's a chill and adorable place, perfect for meeting up with friends, working, or studying. Highly recommend!

Name: 2J CAFE
Address: No. 9, Lane 79, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd
Author: 周澄融
Review: An wonderful cafe located near the biggest park in the capital, with its old structure hidden between towering condos, covered by its own garden greenery. It has quite a few pleasant outdoor seats, and abundant of indoor seats. It offers a variety of desserts as well as savory delicacies. The kimchi fusion tortillas were amazingly tasty, the scones set and honey French toast were brilliant. Even though I prefer heavy cream to whipped cream on my scones, they still brought me satisfaction. The staff was nice and accommodating, the ambiance was chill, and the price was not bad.

Name: 2J CAFE
Address: No. 9, Lane 79, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd
Author: Tiffany W
Review:
A cozy cafe in the city area run by Korean in Taiwan
Such a "Forest Restaurant."

Welcome to follow my IG if u like my photos ☺️
IG : luv.tiffany.w

Name: 2J CAFE
Address: No. 9, Lane 79, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd
Author: Paul Robert Gilroy
Review:
The food is delicious, I really liked the BBQ chicken quesadilla. My friends beef-rice-lettuce bowl was really good too. Both very tasty dishes. The coffee is decent too.
You order and pay at the cash and the drinks and meals are freshly prepared and delivered quickly. And they clear away the empty dishes quickly.
My only complaint if I had one is the quesadilla makes for a very light meal. It would have been nicer and more satisfying with a little side dish or two: a corn, sweet peppers and bean salad perhaps, and/or a beans and rice side.

Still worth a visit for a quick lunch if you are nearby. Some interesting flavours to be had here. Not far from Da'An Park MRT.

Name: 2J CAFE
Address: No. 9, Lane 79, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd
Author: Jayed Miah
Review: Aesthetic, retro design. Light snacks, alcohol and coffee based drinks. Outdoor shaded area, 1F and 2F tables. No reservation before 6pm.

Name: 貳號基地Cafe
Author: William Yen
Review: Coffee is barely ok but isn't costly either. The servers are fairly indolent, dont match their heartwarming décor

Name: 貳號基地Cafe
Author: Kevin Clark
Review: Beautiful coffee shop.  Wish I’d had time to sit.

Name: 貳號基地Cafe
Author: 顧博文
Review:
It's a very atmospheric, quiet, peaceful and peaceful shop. There is also space to display the works of some artists. It's a nice experience once in a while.
The decor is very simple, which I personally like.
The price is a bit expensive.
The desserts are super delicious. I recommend the waffles with three kinds of chocolate. The lychee coffee is also good.
Occasionally, my wife and I take a walk here to have coffee and snacks and take a break. It's great to have a leisurely walk home again.

Name: 貳號基地Cafe
Author: Andy Chang
Review: The premium brunch option in Bandung funnel cake tastes very special and is designed with the concept of cinnamon rolls. The peanut candy on top is the finishing touch.

Name: 貳號基地Cafe
Author: Weiss Wang
Review: The overall color scheme of the interior is soft and bright, there are also cute little exhibitions, and it is a very high-quality cafe! Quite a comfortable space, I will come again if I have the chance!

Name: Haowu Spirit Cafe
Author: Z Alexander
Review: I got the “pick 6” breakfast and almost everything was mediocre. The scrambled eggs overcooked, the fried eggs with raw egg whites on top, and the tofu was generous but greasy and lukewarm. Less forgivable is to sell a coffee “smoothie” which is just coffee with big lumps of ice. They even serve it with a spoon, so they know it’s not drinkable with a straw. A smoothie has one essential property and it’s right there in the name.

Name: Haowu Spirit Cafe
Author: J L
Review:
I was disappointed to find my fruit tea overly acidic and under-sweetened, while my extra order of scrambled eggs was swimming in grease, although the server kindly addressed the issue with a new order (slight improvement) when it was brought to her attention.

Sadly, the prices are high, and you just don’t get what you pay for.

Name: Haowu Spirit Cafe
Author: Man Kit
