Review: The ingredients are real and the drinks are not too sweet. They use rock sugar and brown sugar, which is very healthy. The boss lady is also very kind. Highly recommended!

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: 李景文
Review: The Sicilian coffee is delicious, and the mung beans in the mung bean paste and milk are cooked by Ban Niang herself. They are lightly fragrant and not too sweet. Peanut thick slices and peanut granules, the ingredients are good and solid

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: Nara Fang
Review:
Second brush
After changing from plastic cups to paper cups, it may be that the quality of the paper cups I chose was not good. Tea started leaking from the bottom of the two cups I brought home. It was a disaster😰
-
The proprietress is very kind and the pearls are delicious. However, because the sweetness of their pearls is quite high, I suggest that friends who don’t like too sweet can choose sugar-free when ordering tea with pearls (although it will still be a bit sweet because the pearls are quite sweet). sweet)~
The thick slices are very thoughtfully cut into small pieces, which is very convenient to eat~

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: S Y
Review:
I highly recommend everyone to drink the coffee brewed by Yuqi☕️
Yuqi is beautiful and kind. The black coffee today is definitely worth the money!
(I asked Yuqi if I could take photos ~ Yuqi said very kindly that it was OK. Many people took photos🤣🤣)

Name: Xuan Zi Ju Tea House
Author: Angelica
Review: The tea master (5th gen) is very passionate and enthusiastic about tea. He showed us photos and videos about what happens during tea competitions. We had a tour guide who translated everything which helped a great deal. My favorite is the Honey Scented Black Tea which is a tea that naturally developed its sweetness due to grasshopper bites. I ended up buying a lot here but they definitely don’t pressure you into buying anything which was nice. Had a great time with the tea ceremony and learned a lot.

Name: Xuan Zi Ju Tea House
Author: Adam Dipert
Review: This is a special gem in the middle of a quiet town. The tasting and lesson is THE BEST! Definitely try the Baozhong tea. It's a speciality in the area.

Name: Xuan Zi Ju Tea House
Author: Silvia de Donato
Review: Lovely experience in this little tea house. The owner is very competent and passionate about tea. He does not speak English but uses Google Translate, while his son is a better English-speaker. It was super interesting, and they offer amazing teas. I would highly recommend to stop by, it is really worth it!

Name: Xuan Zi Ju Tea House
Author: CJ
Review:
This is a tea shop that does tea tastings. We went here with a guide who translated the owner’s explanation. Not only was he kind and knowledgeable, the tea he brewed (Bhaozong Tea, Honey Black, and Alishan High Mountain Oolong) were incredible and each different and unique in their own way.

Not only can you experience proper tea brewing in an open air shop, you can also purchase fresh teas and tea-making tools there.

A little gem in Pinglin that I highly recommend.

Name: Xuan Zi Ju Tea House
Author: Gelisa Joseph
Review: Amazing tea tasting and friendly staff! Highly recommend this spot and doing a Tea tour from Taipei if you a tourist!

Name: 貓空金盆茶園 Gold Basin Tea Garden
Author: Ben Ben
Review: Friendly lady owner brewed all the different types of tea (wenshan baozhong/pouchong, tie guanyin/kwanyin and wulong/oolong) available for me to taste. Patiently she explained the difference in processing each type, resulting in unique aroma and taste profiles. She took me to the uppermost floor to view how tea leaves are dried and roasted. She explained the leaves were harvested from own plantation/farm and hers is 4th generation family business. While she and her husband are still active, her son will be taking over the business. As all the teas I tasted were fresh and good, I bought all 5 types (one wenshan baozhong/pouchong, 2 types of tie guanyin/kwanyin,  2 types of wulong/oolong).

Name: 貓空金盆茶園 Gold Basin Tea Garden
Author: Beverly Fung
Review: Both owners are warm and nice! We entered because we wanted to buy the tea and still they offered to let us try it first. They performed the traditional tea serving. You can see the tea was high quality and they have many recognitions displayed. Also they provided extra gift packages. Auntie and Uncle guided us to the bus so we dont have to walk back. The bus station is right in front of the store.

Name: 貓空金盆茶園 Gold Basin Tea Garden
Author: J M Rossy
Review: Cute little shop, very friendly people. Great tea of course

Name: 貓空金盆茶園 Gold Basin Tea Garden
Author: Jeni Sis (Jenisis)
Review: Very friendly and experienced tea masters. They grow and make their own Tea and it tastes Great!!!

Name: 貓空金盆茶園 Gold Basin Tea Garden
Author: Tiffany
Review: Amazing!!!!! You should give it a try

Name: Zhuang ZI Tea House
Author: R P
Review: I came to the place but no store on ground floor.. Found a office door on 9 floor but place was closed at 12.52 afternoon 🤷‍♂️ not sure if this shop still exists.. Definitely nothing like a shop on the pictures here

Name: Zhuang ZI Tea House
Author: 김지원
Review:
best oolong tea ever!
I stopped by the store because it’s just near the hotel I stayed and bought the cheapest one for just spend the rest of the money
but it tastes amazing
& it’s really worth the money than other expensive ones like Wangdechaun

Name: Zhuang ZI Tea House
Author: 이동현
Review: This tea house might be the best tea house in Taipei. I had the best cup of tea in my life. Thank you again.

Name: Zhuang ZI Tea House
Author: Yi-Fang Huang
Review: Well packaged great quality tea

Name: Zhuang ZI Tea House
Author: 黃曜晟
Review: Good！！！

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Songjiang Project
Author: John
Review:
Specialist bubble tea store. Can get very popular and considerable wait times despite numerous staff and efficient service.

Excellent flavours amongst intense competition. Worth visiting if happy with wait times.

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Songjiang Project
Author: Gene N.
Review: Waited for 20 minutes to get two drinks. Only two people were in front of me when I ordered from the cashier. They kept on making drinks for delivery. What a disaster place. Will never go back.

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Songjiang Project
Author: Ssor M.
Review: Must try. Smell so goooood

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Songjiang Project
Author: I-Chun Hsiao
Review: Overrated

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Songjiang Project
Author: Doris Chen
Review: From Taichung!yaaa

Name: Authentic Taiwanese tea
Address: No. 2號, Alley 5, Lane 133, Section 4, Nanjing E Rd
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: 淡水雲峰茶莊 YunFong Tea Store.co
Author: OR Slacker
Review: What a fantastic place. The owner was very nice and helped us to taste many teas until we found several we liked. It was a great learning experience about the teas and regions. I can see why he's been in business for over 30 years. Don't miss this shop.

Name: 淡水雲峰茶莊 YunFong Tea Store.co
Author: Mel Seto
Review: My favorite tea store / parlor in Taiwan! I find that 雲峰 （茶小樓）has a perfect mix of tradition and modernization. The tea store is on the second floor. 李茶藝師 patiently brews and explains each tea you are interested in. She also teaches tea mastery classes on the third floor. Highly recommend visiting! I believe making an appointment with her beforehand will confirm she’s at the store (instead of traveling to tea farms etc)

Name: 淡水雲峰茶莊 YunFong Tea Store.co
Author: C Lu
Review: My sister and I dropped by almost at the end of the day. The owner was super polite and helpful. You can tell that the husband/wife duo cared deeply about their craft. We sat down to sample a variety of teas and left with our favorites as well as some for gifts. I am trawling online for a similar jasmine to the amazing one I picked up but have nearly finished. Deliciously floral and complex flavor... too bad I don't have any trips planned soon!

Name: 淡水雲峰茶莊 YunFong Tea Store.co
Author: 林佳萱
Review: A few days ago, I found Yunfeng Tea House due to course requirements. I am very grateful to the boss for spending two hours talking to a group of us college students. Jia, he is a tea-making master with cultural background. Such a good shop must let everyone know about it!

Name: 淡水雲峰茶莊 YunFong Tea Store.co
Author: Lydia Lee
Review: The tea house has a long history and many tea-tasting utensils, which are worth exploring. The boss is friendly and professional, has a profound cultural and historical literacy, and has first-class tea-making skills. The boss is sweet and pleasant, and has rich tea knowledge. Thank you for your hospitality today!

Name: Yu Zai Fan Shu Tea House
Author: Rosalind Chaw
Review: Came here for their local dishes cooked with fresh ingredients. This was recommended by the Owl Grandma for lunch and tea. We ordered pig intestines with duck blood stew, local bitter gourd omelette, and mapo tofu. All are prepared to perfection. Hospitable service staff. The dining environment is perfect with antiques and wooden furniture.

Name: Yu Zai Fan Shu Tea House
Author: brijesh patel
Review: Beautiful and Decorated Tea House. You can enjoy getting into Cave before reaching to the Tea house. It is has a beautiful views of Jufin. I enjoyed the traditional way of Tea serving. Actually its a Tea ceremony. They taught us well how to prepare and do it. We sit for 2 hours and it was awsome experience.

Name: Yu Zai Fan Shu Tea House
Author: Jeffrey C
Review:
Highly recommended. Such a special tea house. The walk in through the cave entrance was so intriguing. Then you enter a beautifully decorated tea house. As you proceed further in, you get tables with million dollar views.
And then there the food. So unique and so delicious. Order the tea and watch them show you how to brew a perfect pot of tea.

Name: Yu Zai Fan Shu Tea House
Author: Chris SG
Review: This tea house is absolutely breathtaking!! It shares the same beautiful view with ah mei tea house and offers homely food with excellent tea as well. I was so glad to find it. The shop owner (店长) is so kind and even showed me around the tea house, which is incredibly decked with thoughtful pieces of furniture that look so well put together. The entrance to the hidden tea house is also decorated like a secret cave along the stairs up and past the ah Mei tea house, and it was so fun 🤩 to walk through the “cave” and have the tea house and its gardens appear before you at the end of the cave . 20/10 must visit if you are in jiufen!

Name: Yu Zai Fan Shu Tea House
Author: Michelle Mitchell
Review:
My second visit to 九份, but the first time visit to Yu Zai Fan Shu. A hidden gem.  The view from the terrace was breathtaking, and the food was awesomely delicious. We ate so much at lunch yesterday... we skipped dinner... that was how delicious the dishes were.
I had to save its location in my favorite so I will be able to find it next time!!!

Name: 台灣seven tea
Author: Andy Wu
Review: Nice tea

Name: 台灣seven tea
Author: ᄏᄏ호호
Review: I went shopping today and bought Oolong Ole. I asked to add coconut. When I came back, I found that it was still more expensive without adding coconut. It was a bit exaggerated. When I came back and found the small straw, I realized that something was wrong.

Name: Jing Cai Ming Tea
Author: hance Liu
Review: The proprietress is very kind. She is an expert in tea. A treasure trove for tea lovers.

Name: Jing Cai Ming Tea
Author: Philip Kao
Review: Friendly, good tea

Name: Tea Bar Bakery & Cafe
Author: Denny Mila Doank
Review:
I’m curious about this croissant, because it’s viral.. then i wanna try it…
I’m looking for this bakery store, because i watched many people’s come here…
So i buy the cheese flavor, then it’s really yummy 🤤😋
Next, I’ll try the other flavors 😊

Name: Tea Bar Bakery & Cafe
Author: Ant Tan (Ant)
Review: The cinnamon roll (peanut)was big enough for a breakfast meal, I ordered on a late evening and ate it the next day for breakfast. Must say it is very filling for a meal. Perhaps I should have eat it when I purchased it so the rolls inside could be more “creamy”. The americano coffee (black coffee without sugar) could have more thicker caffeine taste otherwise easily 5 stars. The bakery is located within the supermarket Mia C’bon.

Name: Tea Bar Bakery & Cafe
Author: sabrina leung
Review:
Angry staff, at first he mentioned about some promotion but he was mumbling I couldn't really understand what he was saying, so I ask again what it is. He continue with an impatient attitude, and ended yelling at me and my 5yr old daughter was shocked. My chinese wasn't good. His name is Wayne Hsu man with glasses.

June 26 2024 19:30

Name: Tea Bar Bakery & Cafe
Author: 薇薇的天空
Review:
Original cinnamon rolls have crispy skin, rich cinnamon and plump walnut filling, so delicious!
Grilled orange cinnamon rolls, with gorgeous orange skin making the skin softer and not crispy.
Berry Forest Croissant Tower is highly recommended!
The grape custard croissant tart is delicious!

Name: Tea Bar Bakery & Cafe
Author: Joseph Chen
Review:
Wow, I didn’t expect the comment to be deleted.

I remember I had a chocolate croissant filling a while ago
It was sour. There is a message.

I want to give him another chance to try
The cheese croissant is super greasy
It’s the concept of asking you to eat a big piece of cheese.
I have never tasted such a terrible croissant.

Although there is a 20% discount at night
But the price of one piece is 111$, so I dare to charge money.

Terrible store

Name: Wangfuji Ming Tea
Author: Peter Tseng
Review: Friendly staff and suggestion of products

Name: Wangfuji Ming Tea
Author: Debby Yang
Review: When participating in the guided tour, the tour guide took us to the tea shop to listen to the boss' introduction to tea leaves, and we could also smell the aroma of different tea leaves at close range. The fragrance of Alishan tea leaves was very fragrant. It is highly recommended.

Name: Wangfuji Ming Tea
Author: t s
Review: The owner will show you various tea leaves and let you smell the scent. There was a wide variety of items and the explanations were thorough.

Name: Wangfuji Ming Tea
Author: neko sui
Review:
There aren't many types of tea leaves, and you can't sample them, but you can open the bag and smell the tea leaves. A woman who could speak Japanese gave me detailed explanations, and I was able to take my time in making my selection.
The tea I bought as a souvenir was amazing and delicious, and I would like to buy it again.

Name: Wangfuji Ming Tea
Author: Apple Lin
Review: I heard that the local old tea shop is very famous and the tea quality is very good. I came here today to buy tea and drink it. If it tastes good, I will buy it again.

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Guting Project
Author: Paul Yang
Review:
Got the sugarcane tea here and it’s pretty good

5/5 Baked oolong with cheese milk cover — good milk foam and tea, blends well.  However they require you to get ice, so you have to drink it fast.

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Guting Project
Author: Jesse
Review: Good price and good tea. Tell me if I’m wrong but this is a big oolong tea project and it’s customers are it’s guinea pigs

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Guting Project
Author: Edwin Wilson
Review: They made me sign an NDA to participate in the project. Does Taiwan even have NDAs?

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Guting Project
Author: Fernando H.
Review: I love their bubble milk green tea 🤤

Name: Dejeng Oolong Tea #Taipei Guting Project
Author: Halo Andy
Review: Pretty good 👍🏻

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 陳貴順
Review: I often buy Green Tea from this shop, so many days i just realize that every day is new taste, although i just only drink green tea with same sweetness levels, but a day is too bitter, another day is too sweet, another i couldnt find tea's smell where it is, almost is water 😱 Moreover, unlabels on tea cup.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 辜柏耘
Review: A chain tea shop provides various tea drink.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 讓你看不可能
Review:
A middle-aged male clerk is super bad
The needle kept jumping and we didn’t have any boba, so I asked for big pearls. The needle kept jumping and finally I said, oh, the pearls are sold out.
Ah, wouldn’t you have told me earlier that if you don’t want to do business, just get out of here?
It’s really bad for the boss to hire someone like you.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 昕熊
Review: The attitude was so bad, the customer looked impatient and disdainful when ordering drinks, the store made a mistake and blamed the customer for insisting on paying the bill!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: KEVIN Ng
Review:
In order to save costs, ice cubes and water are added to make the drink tasteless.
Click to remove the ice and sugar, and it will become slightly iced and sugar-free.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Jessica Donoho
Review: Not sure what all the bad reviews are about. We didn't have a coupon but we stopped by early morning. We were the only ones there but she was fast and we looked at the tea collection inside. I got pu-erh milk tea and it was delightful. She also spoke English well

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Reni Lim
Review: The $5 off voucher from the its neighbours is a trap. There is only 1 staff who will slowly make drinks. You can finish the food and drink is not ready yet. Not to mention the drinks are still expensive after the discount. Absolute tourist trap.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Christian J
Review: Absolutely horrible. Tricked into coming here from getting a $5 NTD coupom from the scallion pancake place to the right. The way the lady scrapes the last of the tapioca balls from a quite dirty looking container, coupled and unfriendly attitude. Big nope. Do not come here. The good news is they returned my money upon request. Well actually the head boss. We did it not the lady.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Jean Teo
Review: Had the pineapple and like juice. Very refreshing.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Artitaya Tanngern
Review: Ok but too expensive than what we got

Name: MR.TEA
Author: Margi Rinaldo
Review: Mr tea is my favorite place. Not only they have good bubble tea they now also have small business lunch available. Specially recommended the Italian seafood pasta. Really delicious! I ate twice and still love it!

Name: MR.TEA
Author: Xian You Lim
Review: I only tried the drinks, so I can't speak for the food. Ordered the matcha cheese top, it was alright. Tasted a little artificial. I'm sure they have other good drinks though!

Name: MR.TEA
Author: frank rinaldo
Review: Very nice fast food place. Has tons of drinks and small lunch / dinner boxes. Service is good and quick. Staff very nice and helpful. We stay in a hotel nearby and shop here frequently.

Name: MR.TEA
Author: Jack Lee
Review: Love it, got the brown sugar winter melon with boba.

Name: MR.TEA
Author: David Watts (Skogvokteren)
Review: Many different types to chose from!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 跟著感覺走水瓶男
Review: Bad

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: L J
Review:
The pearl honey Pu'er tastes so bad...it's so sweet that I cry. I don't know if it's the pearls or the drink tastes like tap water. I only took two or three sips of the whole cup before I couldn't drink it and threw it away.
Cause me to waste food and money

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Yuna Li
Review:
Sanrio joint event rarely includes Pacha dog
But I can’t buy cute co-branded products anywhere
This is the only store where the clerk was kind enough to ask if he wanted to pre-order.
thank you very much! 🙏
-
The drinks are undoubtedly delicious🤍
I personally recommend the new peach jelly black tea released last year.
Also like the hidden version and tea jelly milk green!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: YuChen Chiang
Review:
Well-known chain of hand-operated stores,
There is one everywhere,
The quality is almost the same,
It still tastes good.
When visiting,
Because there are few people,
So the speed of hand cranking is fast enough.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Peggy
Review: For an additional 20 yuan, you can get an environmentally friendly cup. I thought it was environmentally friendly and cost-effective, so I bought two on the spot. The clerk was very kind and helped wash the cups before filling them. I thought the service was great. The cup has two lids. After the upper lid is opened, there is a hole in the middle for inserting a straw. However, the length of the straw must be calculated first. The length of the stainless steel straw is fixed. Once inserted, the upper lid will not close. It should be better used with a silicone straw

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: SHY
Review: I will like this place more. Milk tea was really better than others one where I've been

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 虫二
Review: ok.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Lina C
Review: I ordered two drinks with ingredients, and was given drinks without straws. I asked for a thin straw, and I was given a thick straw. I was given a face. In fact, if you don’t want to go to work, you can just leave your job. It doesn’t matter (chubby girl with long hair and dyed ponytail ) The service quality of the employees really needs to be improved. It’s really hard to be the boss. Now it’s hard to hire empathetic employees.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Maurice Wang
Review: The golden-brown haired female store clerk had a very bad attitude. She rolled her eyes before I even ordered. She was very impatient and I will not patronize her again in the future.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: vivi lin
Review:
I often order food to be delivered to your house.
Almost already a regular customer
Several times before going to the site, I would call to order, and then pick up the order on site when the time came.
I won’t discuss the attitude of a female waiter with short hair who prefers to dress up as a man. After reading so many people’s comments, you should know 12,
I am very impatient when asking for change,
Out of politeness, I still say thank you to him or her!
His (her) eyes probably rolled to the back of his head. I don’t understand what part of the store is responsible for developing her special service personality.
Eye-opening
Everyone cannot choose the quality of life, but they can choose their job based on absolute fundamentals.
If you are really bored with this job or don't like it, or you really hate being in contact with people, you really don't have to force yourself and find some job that you like that can support you.

Name: 穆葉茶房MuYèh Tea Room(ReservationOnly)
Author: Debbie Yeh
Review:
We took the Taiwanese Tea Class in English and it was really great and educational! The content and instruction was so well organized and effective - we've been to various tea tours and ceremonies but it never really clicked until it was explained to us in this course. Having all of the teas laid out to taste was a wonderful part of the experience too.

The ambiance in the tea room is very calm and well-decorated. Zoe the owner is truly passionate about tea and it shows in her space and programs. We will definitely come back and bring our friends.

Name: 穆葉茶房MuYèh Tea Room(ReservationOnly)
Author: 簡莉芩
Review:
Surrounded by the bustling Yongkang business district, in a cozy teahouse that offers tranquility amidst the bustle, settle your body and mind into this world of tea banquets!

In this space, the tea master will hold tea art-related courses from time to time. You can also make an appointment via IG private message to taste tea here!

It’s so nice to choose a favorite book for yourself, choose a tea you want to drink, and spend a quiet and peaceful time❤️

Name: 穆葉茶房MuYèh Tea Room(ReservationOnly)
Author: hyeongmin lee
Review:
This is a 3-story tea house located in a quiet alley. The interior using natural wood and light blue creates a comfortable atmosphere.

I was able to enjoy a variety of teas, and one of the great pleasures was seeing the tea utensils suited to each type of tea. The owner spoke really good English, so there was no problem communicating. I don’t think there will be any problem for those who are traveling to enjoy it too! If you are looking for a tea house to stop by during your trip, I recommend it!!

Name: 穆葉茶房MuYèh Tea Room(ReservationOnly)
Author: 王新宜（阿新）
Review:
The space is comfortable! The lady boss is very kind and easy to talk to~

The proprietress has a lot of knowledge about tea. During the tea tasting, she carefully explained the fermentation and roasting degree of the tea, and how to distinguish the quality of the tea.

The description of the taste is very detailed, carefully explaining whether the aroma and taste are consistent or not, and the connection with fermentation.

Spent a pleasant and wonderful night of tea tasting here~

Name: 穆葉茶房MuYèh Tea Room(ReservationOnly)
Author: 佐々木奈採
Review: A hidden teahouse located in a corner of Yongkang Street. The female owner is fluent in both Japanese and English. You can hear a lot about tea, and it's the perfect place to experience the Taiwanese atmosphere. I think you will be able to know the true taste of Taiwanese tea♪

Name: TWG Tea
Author: Wen Wu Tan
Review: Food tasted ok. The environment was great. It's alright to come once in a while.

Name: TWG Tea
Author: Clarench Ng
Review:
Wonderful experience with TWG Taiwan .. Simply love it. It's a rainy day and I was dying for some proper hot tea. Glad to have my favourite Jasmine Queen.
My kid enjoyed his simple club sandwich with salad.
Our favourite truffle sandwiches came warm with the crisp toast.
The pot of tea was huge and good enough for a meal per person.
I felt so comfortable through the whole meal service. Excellent professional service rendered.
Thank you so much. Definitely will be back again.

Name: TWG Tea
Author: Fara
Review: I chose this place for an afternoon tea outing, and it didn't disappoint. The atmosphere was delightful, offering a wide range of tea options to suit every taste, accompanied by equally delightful desserts. The service was attentive and friendly, enhancing the overall experience

Name: TWG Tea
Author: ShaoJan Wang
Review:
We came here for the high tea and to rest our tired feet after walking so many places around Taipei. Upon entering this place, we felt that there's sandalwood essential oil(maybe it's tea scented candle)defused in the background, it's very soothing.
The tea selections' overwhelming.  Luckily, our server was a tea connoisseur, he gave us some basic guidelines, so we got the tea we like.
For the price tag, the food was average. The black truffle sandwiches was mostly button mushroom paste. If you tried really really , really hard, you get the hint of black truffle. The cakes were very pretty and not too sweet.
The servers were informative, however, I would suggest they fine-tune the training towards customer services. After all, who would like to be served by a baron or baroness. Less attitude more smile would be appreciated.

Name: TWG Tea
Author: Jeje Maria
Review:
Went here for the afternoon tea and the experience was amazing. The staffs are helpful, the snacks are very well prepared.

Bought 1837 sets with choco mint tea, but I’m actually like the Valentine’s tea (it’s strawberry black tea). You can also see the tea barista blend the tea here.

But we sit by the glass and everyone was looking at us 👀 but overall experience was great!

Name: South Street Delight Tea House
Author: Isabelle L
Review: A wide selection of aromatic teas, including Taiwanese tea, Japanese tea, fruit teas, and others. They also provide tea leaves samples so you can smell and judge each tea before ordering. The environment is warm and vintage—perfect for a relaxing afternoon or to snap a picture. Highly recommend!

Name: South Street Delight Tea House
Author: Julia Sternberg
Review: Delightful experience! The staff was very helpful in picking out a tea and the atmosphere is lovely, very calming. Both of our teas were great, would recommend!

Name: South Street Delight Tea House
Author: Karina Kisselite
Review: Tea house where you can choose your tea based on the description as well as smell. You can also get refills, plus some snacks accompany the tea. Light music and characteristic decor make this tea house a good option for a break. It’s on a second floor of a tea shop.

Name: South Street Delight Tea House
Author: YiHsuan Tseng
Review:
It’s a lovely tea house full of a reminiscent atmosphere. They got various tea collections including those without caffeine. The tea leaves are put into different glass jar so that we can smell their flavors first before deciding which to try.

The desserts are elegant and in traditional Taiwanese style. We are quite satisfied with their sweetness (not too sweet).

The location could be a bit difficult to find. The first floor is a gift shop where displays many interesting cultural and creative commodities derived in Taiwan. Definitely recommend this house for a try!

Name: South Street Delight Tea House
Author: Daniel Santoso
Review:
If you want to try taiwanese tea house experience, you can come here to try. the price is not so pricy for a tea drinking experience. the minimum order is 280nt/person. for 280nt, you will get 1 variant of tea with several traditional desserts and free refill of your hot water for your tea.
when you come, they will give you a menu book that explain each tea that they sell. They will give you the tea leaf samples so you can smell its fragance.
the room is well air conditioned and the music suits your experience. it is located on the 2nd floor of a classic building. so you need to go inside a souvenir shop on the first floor to find a stair to this shop.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: Mak Ken
Review: Ordered 日安茶厚奶加仙草，tastes like HK style milk tea, a perfect combination of milk and tea. Also the texture of 仙草is good, so suitable for drinking using the straw! The staff are nice:)

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: G Reyes
Review: First bubble tea place I’ve come across that has oatmilk! Suitable for vegans! I can finally enjoy the signature black tea with milk!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: T greensake
Review: Tried Brown Sugar Milk With Boba (NT75) on 15/11/22, was good. Note that this item is fixed on ice & sugar level.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: rchan
Review: Taro milk tea was 10/10

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: Ka Hei Ho (Kelvin)
Review: Personally the best taiwanese drink in Taipei. Recommend the black tea latte in milk based with boba and no sugar.

Name: Qingtian Tea House
Author: Veteravel
Review:
Tranquility, serenity… shhh don’t talk so loud…
After you sit down, automatically you will switch on your quiet mode and experiencing tea at its tasty form of life. A beautiful place in Taipei when you are tired and wants to have some relaxation to your taste, nostrils, metal, mind and sight!

Name: Qingtian Tea House
Author: Kate Z
Review: Amazing tea experience! The place is beautiful and the staff is very kind and helpful, they explained the tea making process really well! Loved it 😇🍵

Name: Qingtian Tea House
Author: Craig Buller
Review: This is a lovely, Japanese style tea house hiding in a narrow back street. The tea menu is extensive, with a nice range of sweet snacks. The service is exceptional.

Name: Qingtian Tea House
Author: Julien van der waal
Review:
Authentic Taiwanese tea house & experience! This place is the real deal and it is definitely worth going here to learn more about traditional Taiwanese tea culture.

The place itself is stationed within a traditional Taiwanese house, is super relaxing and the staff are very pleasant and calm while also explaining the culture. It is rather expensive, especially if you go solo or with only 2 people. But this is 100% worth it as the experience is priceless.

From the delicious tea & snacks (can especially recommend the pineapple pie) to the amazing ambience created by the calmness & the beautiful decor. You should definitely go here to experience tea on another level.

Name: Qingtian Tea House
Author: Trần Hòa
Review: Visited this place on a rainy afternoon and the atmosphere goes together with tea service totally made my day. I would highly recommend this place when you just need a “hide” from the crowded life

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Christophertravelz
Review: One of the best Taiwanese teas of my life. Black Tea with Bourbon Vanilla Cream Milk Foam for the win! English menu available! 1/2 the price of something at Starbucks but I am addicted to the Hojicha latte :]

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Liam Lindemann
Review: Pretty good bubble tea. The mango smoothie (made with fresh mangoes a point) is also delicious.

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Michelle Qin
Review: We tried the winter melon tea with kumquat. Well balanced flavour is very refreshing.

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Vincent Co
Review: One of the best drink shop in Taipei, they use fresh ingredients like real kiwi, orange and tomatoes, and the cp 值 (price) is reasonable, try it if you’re in Ximen area

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Ronald Wisznia
Review: Its ok

Name: Youshan Tea Visit Qingtian Club
Author: ys k1
Review:
I had the most amazing tea experience with the world's kindest tea professional, Yuria!
She asked me my favorite kinds of tea, and gave me some recommendations.
Then she brewed tea for me, which was so professional and graceful, and I could learn how to brew tea from her. It was amazing to enjoy the scent and flavor of tea. This is the second time that I visit Taiwan and I have been in love with Youshan Tea since my first visit.
Also the price is affordable for me. Whoever wants to experience tea should visit this place!

Name: Youshan Tea Visit Qingtian Club
Author: Phil L
Review:
Awesome tea shop!
Impeccable service and really great tea.
We bought many different varieties after trying many of them.
Highly recommend to those that want great tea to drink or gift

Name: Youshan Tea Visit Qingtian Club
Author: Jerald Kng
Review: Good place to get authentic Taiwan tea, the lady staff was very hospitable, served us tea to try, and recommended different tea based on our personal preferences

Name: Youshan Tea Visit Qingtian Club
Author: Chocolate Mint
Review:
The employees are very friendly, warm, kind and helpful. They can speak english very well and will patiently guide you to figure out which tea is the most suitable to your taste!
The teas are amazing 🤩 I would recommend to go there to try out their tea!

Name: Youshan Tea Visit Qingtian Club
Author: I v y Y
Review: I was looking for gifts to bring back to the States and I found this tea shop. It was small but cozy. The hostess was super friendly. She introduced different choices of tea as I was looking for something more on the lighter and sweeter side. She also let me tasted some of them before I made up my mind. I left the shop happily as I didn't only buy teas for my friends, but also bought some for myself!

Name: Geow Yong Tea Shop YongKang Store
Author: Felita Gutana
Review: A touristy tea shop, the staffs speak a bit english. Wide variety of oriental tea suitable for gift / souvenir. They offer free tester for some variant of tea. Give a 5 stars & get 2 bags of tea.

Name: Geow Yong Tea Shop YongKang Store
Author: Tracy Lai
Review: I highly recommend this store! If you're looking for the perfect souvenir for your friends and family, it's a fantastic place to visit. The staff there are not only friendly, but also incredibly helpful and professional. You'll have a great experience shopping there!:)

Name: Geow Yong Tea Shop YongKang Store
Author: merrow mistral
Review: Great experience with Sunny who showed me the difference in brewing techniques of Taiwan grown tea.  Ms Tina and Mina were so helpful during the checkout process.  Please come visit this wonderful tea store!

Name: Geow Yong Tea Shop YongKang Store
Author: yanti sisilia
Review: I am so like tea and i found this store when came Taiwan. Happy to know Jenny, help me to choose the best tea for me.

Name: Geow Yong Tea Shop YongKang Store
Author: Rarasanti Rania Qodri
Review: Super nice place! Price from 260 NTD to 5000 NTD. Taste good and friendly clerk. Recommended!

Name: 毛青茶室 Maochi Tea （原松江總店搬遷）
Author: Mavis Pan
Review: Great quality of tea and service! Their bubbles are well cooked with suitable sweetness! Oolong and puer tea latte are my favorite!

Name: 毛青茶室 Maochi Tea （原松江總店搬遷）
Author: PHC
Review: It’s good to drink

Name: 毛青茶室 Maochi Tea （原松江總店搬遷）
Author: mintaitrade wang
Review: Good tea and nice service

Name: 毛青茶室 Maochi Tea （原松江總店搬遷）
Author: Alex Achtymichuk
Review: One of the best

Name: 毛青茶室 Maochi Tea （原松江總店搬遷）
Author: Alan Liu (Alan)
Review: High quality tea

Name: Wistaria Tea House
Address: No. 1號, Lane 16, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd
Author: Edwin Wilson
Review:
Money can’t buy happiness but it doesn’t hurt if you’re looking for serenity… and tea. I’m historically more of a coffee guy but I’m thinking of getting into tea. It’s more contemplative.

It’s definitely worth visiting this tea house if only for the experience. The staff are very helpful and sat down to show me how to brew the tea. I unfortunately had to do some homework here because I’m a cog in the education machine, but this would be an excellent place to meet a friend or—dare I say—a date.

Name: Wistaria Tea House
Address: No. 1號, Lane 16, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd
Author: Nancy
Review: When they get busy, they won't be able to spend a lot of time talking with you about tea, but the atmosphere is very nice and tranquil. I can't speak for the regular food, but the snacks that you can get with tea are good. Recommend getting here early on a weekday so there's no wait. Service was friendly, and there is an English menu for those who need it. You are required to spend 400NTD per person, which is reasonable. This is a nice place to relax with some tea in the middle of Taipei.

Name: Wistaria Tea House
Address: No. 1號, Lane 16, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd
Author: Sabrinna
Review: It looks like a very unassuming place from the outside. But once you enter, it’s a cute little traditional tea shop. As I was dining alone, and they were out of places in the main dining area, I was allowed to take up a table in the tatami room. This room felt like a place out of time. A throwback to traditional Japan. All the staff were very patient with me as I told them I didn’t know how to prepare my own tea. The staff who helped me was very patient and answered all my basic questions. If you’re looking for some respite from the cold or from the bustle of city life, this is the ideal spot for it. (your experience is also dependent on the civic mindedness of the other patrons, if they are loud, it detracts from the atmosphere)

Name: Wistaria Tea House
Address: No. 1號, Lane 16, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd
Author: Jiraporn Trakonthanasoontorn
Review:
Tea was good but the price is so high and cost per head is at least 400 TWD. Staffs can speak English but some of them didn’t explain much. Tea demonstration was perfect. The guy that serviced us was really nice.

Ps. They no longer serve food.

Name: Wistaria Tea House
Address: No. 1號, Lane 16, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd
Author: Tatiana Ramos
Review: I learned about the tea ceremony and it was magical. If you are in Taipei, it's the perfect place to relax and enjoy yourself with your loved ones. The perfect peaceful atmosphere while tasting how the tea flavor in its different types changes as it is shared in the typical handmade tea pots.  Absolutely beautiful.

Name: CAOLY TEA 茗窖茶莊 中山一店
Address: Linsen N Rd, 154號CAOLY TEA SHOP154 Linsen N. Rd. Zhongshan Dist. , Taipei, Taiwan茗窖茶莊 CAOLY TEA SHOPNo
Author: Andres Serrano
Review: The shop and owner was extremely patient with us. She took the time to teach us about the different teas she has around the shop and she made us try several of them before we were happy with our decision !

Name: CAOLY TEA 茗窖茶莊 中山一店
Address: Linsen N Rd, 154號CAOLY TEA SHOP154 Linsen N. Rd. Zhongshan Dist. , Taipei, Taiwan茗窖茶莊 CAOLY TEA SHOPNo
Author: Zoe D
Review: One late night in Taipei, I stumbled upon Caroly Tea Shop. It turned out to be one of the most memorable experiences of my time in Taiwan. From admiring the beautiful tea pots to savoring a variety of original and exotic teas, it was truly wonderful. I can't forget to mention Helen, who provided such an amazing and sweet service. I highly recommend it, and I'll definitely be back.

Name: CAOLY TEA 茗窖茶莊 中山一店
Address: Linsen N Rd, 154號CAOLY TEA SHOP154 Linsen N. Rd. Zhongshan Dist. , Taipei, Taiwan茗窖茶莊 CAOLY TEA SHOPNo
Author: Jaroslav Kopecký
Review: Great tea shop, I promised to write review. Ladies nicely explained some details about tea that I didn't know. Delicious Lishan. I got that leaf. Greetings from Prague

Name: CAOLY TEA 茗窖茶莊 中山一店
Address: Linsen N Rd, 154號CAOLY TEA SHOP154 Linsen N. Rd. Zhongshan Dist. , Taipei, Taiwan茗窖茶莊 CAOLY TEA SHOPNo
Author: Ming M.
Review: Beautiful tea shop with lots of very tasty tea. The staff is very knowledgeable when it comes to tea and we loved the experience of tea tasting! The wild oolong tea tastes the best for us. We will come back again when we go to Taipei 🙏

Name: CAOLY TEA 茗窖茶莊 中山一店
Address: Linsen N Rd, 154號CAOLY TEA SHOP154 Linsen N. Rd. Zhongshan Dist. , Taipei, Taiwan茗窖茶莊 CAOLY TEA SHOPNo
Author: Linda Keuntje
Review: Absolutely delightful small shop with extremely knowledgeable staff. They speak good English and are generous with what they offer for tasting. They even re-brewed one tea for me to be sure it was the one I wanted. Also have truly lovely tea ware. Highly recommend to any tea lover.

Name: tea room SERENDIP
Author: Linda Hsieh
Review: So glad to know this tea house- they sell authentic Ceylon tea. The owner of the tea house is very knowledgeable and the service is excellent! They also host tea tasting events to enjoy Ceylon tea in various ways and will introduce you the history of the tea

Name: tea room SERENDIP
Author: Mekko
Review:
One of my favorite places in Taipei. The owners are extremely knowledgeable and welcoming (in Chinese and English!). Within a couple visits, we became friends, and I not only learned about tea from them, but had many good times bringing friends, meeting people, and trying teas (and styles of serving teas) from around the world.

Especially if you're a foreigner interested in tea, this is an amazing place to come. The owners have lived abroad, are very welcoming, and enjoy connecting people. I rarely point this out as I speak Chinese fluently, but they truly know how to welcome all kinds of people into their store and make them feel happy to be there. So glad I accidentally stumbled here on a hot afternoon first date!

Name: tea room SERENDIP
Author: Benjamin Schultz
Review: What an interesting great idea, to bring to Taiwan high quality black tea/ from other countries including Ceylon and Nepal. The owner has an extensive knowledge on this subject. Highly recommend if you want to try something new.

Name: tea room SERENDIP
Author: A G
Review: Cool place for tea time … knowledgeable boss

Name: tea room SERENDIP
Author: 澎大海（同學你什麼時候搬走）
Review:
Excellent service and unforgettable tea flavors
Love your service and handmade dessert!!!!!!!!!

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: NP陈
Review: Had such a good experience here at Odd One Out. The space is beautiful. But most importantly, the tea is great. Such good quality. Came with my family and each tried something different. I got the champion milk tea which was delicious - the cream foam had outstanding flavour. Hubby got the East India ice blend (with the lemongrass and earl grey gelato) which was my favourite. My kids got the watermelon jade and watermelon pomelo sago. The gelato flavours were so unique and delicious. They were both so refreshing for the hot Taiwan heat. Will definitely try to come again before we leave.

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Wynnie Chan
Review: The seasonal Watermelon Jasmin tea is so delicious and refreshing!! So good!!! I tried the champion milk tea too.  Great quality of ingredients that you can taste.  Craving this more and more every day…

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Vicky Tip
Review: The taste of the tea is quite prominent. I was expecting the boba but they have only jelly here.  I love the color palette of the menu!

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Pimchanok P
Review:
Their taste deserves the crown !✨

I ordered Champion milk tea (their signature) on that day. Its heavenly cheese foam tastes amazing. The aroma of the tea is like an explosion in every sip! Smells soooo good! 🤤

If you happen to be around Songshan creative park, this tea spot is a definite must-visit. ⭐️✨ Enjoy the crown-worthy taste! 🥰🥰

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Ron Ang
Review:
The bubble milk tea here is really awesome. They take pride in grinding the tea leaves, using the Mahlkonig grinder to grind the finest.
We've also tried the longan winter melon with the honey tapioca cubes and it is dope. Very refreshing drink and highly recommended!
The service is great too.
Will definitely come back again!

Name: Yi Bei Tea
Address: No. 54之1號 之 號, Yongkang St
Author: SH Kim
Review: Lovely place for tea lover. You can taste hiquality taiwan tea and chinese tea. Host will welcome you with warm tea.

Name: Yi Bei Tea
Address: No. 54之1號 之 號, Yongkang St
Author: 손미옥
Review: The atmosphere is great and you can see and purchase various things related to cars.

Name: Yi Bei Tea
Address: No. 54之1號 之 號, Yongkang St
Author: 韓奕
Review:
A leisure space for professional artworks, collections, and Pu'er tea.

There are many special numbers to drink, which are worth pondering.

Name: Yi Bei Tea
Address: No. 54之1號 之 號, Yongkang St
Author: 廖淑愉

Name: Yi Bei Tea
Address: No. 54之1號 之 號, Yongkang St
Author: 劉小伶

Name: Tea Tank
Author: kate obille
Review: Tea Tank is situated in the NTNU area and the crowd is mostly students and possibly tourists like us  The menu has English translations and the owner speaks good English as well. This is a take out only shop but there are shops here that offer food where you can take your tea. Better than the supposed famous boba tea in Ximending Night Market

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Gisse
Review: The best bubble tea I had in Taiwan! Must try the Golden lily oolong milk tea, I almost always came for one after class

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Wanderlust
Review: Not bad

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Yuting Hsu
Review:
The three cups of drinks with different flavors are all very good, and the business is so good that I am envious. Two hollow bricks and a standing sign are placed opposite, as if they are stone gandang, but they cannot stop the flow of people drinking tea.
"Shi Gandang, also known as Taishan Shi Gandang, stands in the streets, especially at T-shaped intersections and other places on the walls where feng shui rushes, which are known as evil positions. It is a stone tablet used to ward off evil spirits. The stone tablet is engraved with "Shi Gandang", or "Taishan Shigandang", and there are often bas-reliefs such as lion heads and tiger heads on the forehead of the stele. In many places, Shi Gandang is worshiped as a road god. (Excerpt from Wikipedia)"
The alleys are crowded and there is a lot of motorcycle traffic. The space to wait for freshly made drinks is already very small. The stone bricks and signboards placed by the shops across the street only add to my negative image. The neighbor across the street is not smart enough.
We have forgotten that mutual help and trust between neighbors is the key to mutual prosperity, sigh.

Name: Tea Tank
Author: 寶弟
Review:
I passed by by chance and read the good reviews, so I tried it. The sweetness suggestion given by the boss was just right. Every time I passed by Normal University, there was something delicious to drink.
The first time I drank peach iced tea, I thought it tasted much better than the peach drinks sold in some chain stores.
I also saw many people slowly approaching the store to buy. Sure enough, the high reviews are not undeserved👍
The store is closed on holidays! Don't make this trip in vain

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Nanyang
Author: Anna Demchuk
Review:
Great spot for a quick drink.
Reasonable prices (although a bit higher that in other places, but it’s still ok), great flavor of the drinks, my favorite one is roasted oolong tea, 30% ice and 30% sugar.
They have English translation in the menu so definitely foreign friendly. And the staff is very friendly and helpful!!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Nanyang
Author: Wayne Leong
Review:
Rating: 4 / 5 stars
🤩 : fragrant tea brews, well balanced beverages, availability of oat milk
🤧 : slightly pricier than competitors

This outlet isn’t particularly convenient as I found that a detour is inevitable. i made that detour on my very last day in Taiwan as it was highly recommended and as my partner is a fan of the founder. I notice that the teas here are priced just a tad higher than the market average by 5-10元. We tried the Jasmine Green Tea with milk cap (55元) and Roasted Oolong Tea Latte (60元). Both were signatures of Nap Tea. “Milk cap” is essentially a macchiato in most other markets, and “tea lattes” are generally milk tea made with fresh milk instead of creamer/milk powder.

The Jasmine Green Tea with milk cap had a very prominent taste of jasmine green tea. The tea fragrance was pleasant, but was a tad too bitter. I prefer WooTea’s version of this drink.

Roasted Oolong Tea Latte was fairly fragrant. I like the use of Tie Guan Yin in this drink. Using fresh milk was also beneficial as it prevents the tea flavours from being overpowered. It is also less heavy on the palate vs milk teas made with cream/milk powder. However, I did not entirely enjoy the addition of the black pearls as I felt that the pearls did not entirely complement the flavours of the drink.

It was a good experience overall. The products are good but perhaps still some distance from being the top choice.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Nanyang
Author: Jayne Bertilla “Bertie” Rubio
Review: This is such a pretty bobba milk tea shop in the heart of Zhongsheng district. They served quality oolong milk tea. Their service was kind and understandable of my poor Mandarin. Google translate was very helpful.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Nanyang
Author: LiV3 LiFe
Review: The Signature Black Tea latte with more Tea-based 日安紅濃茶珍珠 (No ice, no sugar) with boba is nice! Highly recommend to try this signature tea. Also tried the Roasted Oolong tea 鐵觀音珍珠歐皙(No ice, no sugar) with boba but the tea tasted slightly burnt - won’t recommend this oolong tea. Even though the tea has no sugar, the tea will taste slightly sweeter with the addition of boba :) this place is by a small road. The staff are friendly and able to conversed in English.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Nanyang
Author: SONE SEO
Review: I was looking forward the milk foam for so long, it was good but I expected more. I think the foam can be rich in milk flavour more.

Name: 鬍子茶Who's Tea - 台北林森店
Author: Paul Yang
Review: 4/5 — cheese foam tea.  Tea flavor was ok

Name: 鬍子茶Who's Tea - 台北林森店
Author: Bernhard Inthal
Review: Guava lemon tea was very refreshing and delicious. Friendly and polite. I can highly recommend a visit!

Name: 鬍子茶Who's Tea - 台北林森店
Author: sj sj
Review:
i've ordered brown sugar milk tea with pearl(less sugar option).

but i realized that there is no sugar in my drink. only milk and ice

i think the staff's mistake or she thought sugarless instead less sugar.

but it may healthy🙂

Name: 鬍子茶Who's Tea - 台北林森店
Author: PowerSpongy
Review: On 5/12, I bought Cheese Beard Tieguanyin at Linsen Store around noon. After I returned to National Taiwan University and drank it, I found that the milk cap had gone sour and I couldn't drink it.

Name: 鬍子茶Who's Tea - 台北林森店
Author: Adair
Review:
Purchase time: this holiday
Meal: 80s bubble milk tea
The pearls were a bit hard and felt undercooked, and the milk tea was a bit sweet. I think I could leave a comment about the pearls and pink corners.

Name: TWG Tea at Taipei 101 B1
Author: Angela Kwon
Review:
I love sweet things and tea. (specialy macarons ,cookies and ice cream )
i visited TWG long times ago when i travel in singapore for 2weeks. i guess every countries TWG store had a same vibe. we order the macarons with tea(moon). and it was fine, i love the lemon& vanila flavor macarons here. mood is good to killing some time, and the staff are fine too.

Name: TWG Tea at Taipei 101 B1
Author: Vivian Su
Review: Tastes better than expected.

Name: TWG Tea at Taipei 101 B1
Author: Kevin S
Review: Good dessert and friendly staff.

Name: TWG Tea at Taipei 101 B1
Author: 馬克田
Review:
I was woken up by a phone call in the middle of the night, and I have a lot of feelings in my heart that I want to express. First, I drank expensive tea with my Korean godbrother at the TWG Tea Salon in 101. Three years ago, I sent my godbrother to ask for help. That day, because I was abroad, I asked my Korean brother for support. At that time, I was contacted by a company working in Iran.
In order to thank him for making an appointment, there is a beautifully decorated restaurant in Taipei 101. I had always thought that TWG only had tea, but I didn’t expect that they also had meals. We ordered French beef stew lasagna, which is made of French beef stew and cream. The sauce lasagna is paired with Emmental cheese crisps, their Ivory tea confit cherry tomatoes, Manchester cheese sauce and basil pesto. The mellow taste is paired with the pesto, making the ingredients beautifully balanced in the mouth. An unforgettable spring dance.
Borrowing flowers to offer to Buddha, the names of these fresh ingredients are all lines spoken by the waiters who serve the dishes. I think they all know it by heart! However, many people reported that the service was not attentive, I think the customer flow is huge! Being so busy all the time requires a little patience.

Name: TWG Tea at Taipei 101 B1
Author: 虹
Review:
First time trying TWG afternoon tea
Low consumption, one drink per person
No time limit (comfortable environment)
Selected #ParisianDouble Package

The service staff explained in detail and helped us choose tea.
☕️🫖
We chose tropical fruit & floral teas
(I like floral scent)

Salty food is not bad, but as I get older, sweet food is a bit boring at the end😅
Also order a glass of orange juice🍹 (a little sour⋯)

Name: T.TEA | 新鮮現萃茶飲
Author: Brandon Shenfield
Review: Amazing tea-based drinks. The friendly staff made the experience that much better. If you’re in the area come check out this window

Name: T.TEA | 新鮮現萃茶飲
Author: Leo C
Review: Excellent

Name: T.TEA | 新鮮現萃茶飲
Author: Norio Taniguchi
Review: A take-out only shop located between the gallery and restaurant. The tea and milk had a good balance and it was very delicious. I want to try all the menu items. The design of the cup and logo is good, and the staff is kind. I would definitely like to visit again when I go to Taiwan from Japan.

Name: T.TEA | 新鮮現萃茶飲
Author: 賴志盛
Review: I ordered Jinxiang fresh milk tea, which was delicious! Highly recommended 👍

Name: T.TEA | 新鮮現萃茶飲
Author: Chen Meng
Review:
It’s cute to see everyone crowded in the small window studying the menu😆
The milk cap is really delicious, and there is an art gallery next to it, which is a bit amazing and quite special~

Name: Wanpo Tea Shop Taipei Hengyang
Author: Jennifer H
Review: Can’t remember exactly which one I ordered but I’m pretty sure it was the Boba Pearl Jelly Jinxuan Oolong. Couldn’t taste any boba, pearl, or jelly first time round and so the staff made a new one for me. I think it just needed some mixing and stirring as the boba/jelly were at the bottom. I enjoyed it overall!

Name: Wanpo Tea Shop Taipei Hengyang
Author: R V
Review:
I ordered the Winter Melon Oolong Tea with "less ice" and "medium sugar".
I should have asked for "less sugar", but the tea was great.

Name: Wanpo Tea Shop Taipei Hengyang
Author: Ivy Merry
Review: It’s disappointing with unwelcoming attitude from the staffs, long hair girl at the counter and the short hair lady in the kitchen. I hope you can fix this issue for the future customer as the milk tea is enjoyable.

Name: Wanpo Tea Shop Taipei Hengyang
Author: Cheryl Fan
Review: Order was placed quickly, but took some time for the drink to be ready. Fair pricing for drinks quality and size. The black sugar bubble with milk was not overly sweet and the pearls had a good bite with it

Name: Wanpo Tea Shop Taipei Hengyang
Author: Jenny Huang
Review: The shop looks like medicine store but actually they sell drink. Not far from Taipei Main Station and I order the brown sugar bubble milk tea (NTD50). Honestly the taste just okay.

Name: COFFEE.TEA.OR -中山形象店
Author: Boon Sun Tan
Review: Ordered fresh milk tea and it’s very average. It’s very expensive considering the pricing and competition in taiwan. Won’t recommend for a very average drink.

Name: COFFEE.TEA.OR -中山形象店
Author: Kittayot (Mark)
Review: cute small tea shop with selling glasses. I ordered oolong lemon tea. It gave me fresher when you drink in summer season.

Name: COFFEE.TEA.OR -中山形象店
Author: Amy
Review: Pomelo drink is really good! Get 30% sugar

Name: COFFEE.TEA.OR -中山形象店
Author: ドンシクルカ
Review: Alright.

Name: COFFEE.TEA.OR -中山形象店
Author: joanna seow
Review: Some of the best BBT we had in Taipei!

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Andrew “Andy” Davis
Review: Great little neighborhood coffee shop. Small upstairs but offers downstairs seating which is quite expansive and larger than expected. Calm atmosphere with background music and industrial design theme. Coffee is good. Takes time to make but worth slowing things down to enjoy. Can recommend. Good options and snacks like scones and waffles are also available.

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Navaneetha Balaganesan
Review: Cozy and a nice place with amazing coffee. The basque cheesecake was awesome. Definitely try their Danish toast. Totally recommend

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Daniel H
Review: Not a place for pour over coffee. They have only 5-6 choices of beans. After I placed my order, made my payment and waited for 5 minutes, the staff came over to tell me that the beans ran out. Then when I picked another one of the same price, she said is out too. In the end, I had to pick something more expensive. I had to go and cancel my original credit card payment and redo the payment again. While doing that, just realised my butter toast was sitting there for awhile. Music is techno pop, 9-10 am in the morning. This place is ok, very neat and modern looking but the Taipei coffee scene is world class, there are tons of better establishments here and I don’t understand why they get average 4.9 stars while others are 4-4.5 stars. Some of those rated 4.3 stars places I been to are way much better. More cosy, more friendly. To come in and grab a cup of espresso or milk drink, this place look good. For a sit down to enjoy your pour over, go somewhere else

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Jiahui Tan
Review: The coffee here reminds me of the ones from Arabica %. It has a tinge of sweetness and the coffee is not bitter. My friend enjoyed her avocado coffee which she described as creamy with a tinge of coffee. The tiramisu and basque cheese were both delicious.

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Will Ang
Review:
Stopped by this place to get out of the rain and it's so good! Friendly baristas, a clean stainless steel interior decor and most importantly bomb drinks and dessert.

We had the iced latte with oat milk, good but not great, the Valrhona chocolate latte legit tastes like school truck Milo (Malaysians IYKYK) and the tiramisu was fluffy and pillowy.

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Bob Chau
Review:
SKA is a small and quaint neighborhood coffee shop that brews up a nice cup of java. The cappuccino is great and the ham and cheese sandwich is tasty. Jamie, the owner, is friendly and a super chill guy.

If you’re a real coffee lover, I highly recommended SKA Coffee for daily fix.

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Evgenia Martynova
Review: Delicious coffee and nice food. An owner is a great guy, thank you again for getting recommendations of hikes around Taipei for us and all the small talks! We keep going back to memories about this place!

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Benjamin “SEOux Indianer” Wingerter
Review: Space for 3-4 people but it’s worthstopping buy if you want a refreshing juice infused coffee at a hot day. Music good, individually made bagel 🥯 tasty, and good conversations in Spanish, mandarin or English. Muy bien, 謝謝

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Kenny Tran
Review: The flat white was sensational. It's always difficult to find good coffee away from home but ska coffee nailed it. Great atmosphere, must visit in Taipei!

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Ramses Del Cura
Review: Super nice coffee shop! We were passing by and my daughters were hungry and we enjoy a hot ham and cheese croissant 🥐 with a chocolate milk. The owner great guy! For sure we will come back!

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: DeltaX
Review: The cafe's contemporary design feels comfortable at first sight. The door has a fantastic design. The cafe It caters to the younger crowds in Taipei. I see many people having meetings, as the settings are conducive and straightforward—excellent motivational liners are on the side walls. The black Truffle moon was good, just not to my taste. The latter was remarkable. Service was excellent!

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Jamie Joseph
Review:
We were here on a Wednesday morning around 9am . And service is ok as there were 2 staff on duty . Coffee is good and we really love the cinnamon roll . They are so soft and delicious. Chocolate croissant is good too .
We spent almost an hour here enjoying our food and chit chatting . Highly recommended !

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Daniel Schreiber
Review:
This review is for the owners. Stop being so cheap and hire more staff to run your business. There was only 1 guy working and the poor guy was struggling to do his best keeping up with the orders. We sat here for over 15 minutes waiting for a coffee and watched him have to turn away over 10 guests because he told them they’d have to wait since he was the only one working.

Coffee is great, but be prepared to wait a long time unless the owners learn how to run a business.

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Olya A. D.
Review: There are different flavours of coffee which really taste good. Different types of desserts 🍨 . Do not expect too much from croissant because it is might not be freshly backed but still taste good. if you go in the morning probably you can enjoy freshly backed croissants. the place is recommended especially it seems a good place for work and study.

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Dr. Sathiyalingam Kannaiyan
Review: Very nice place to have with friends.. well decorated interiors.. Taste of coffee taste good.. I love cappuccino.. quotes on the cups and on the wall are amazing.. busy shop right next to Starbucks. I loved dreamers coffee. I recommend to visit this shop in taipei

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Earn S.
Review:
It’s located near Huashan Creative Park, this cafe is a convenient spot for me while waiting for my friends to go watch movie together. It also seems like a good place for working, with available charging spots.

I found the coffee reasonably priced and quite good. The brownie I tried was also nice.

However, the cafe is not very big and was quite crowded when I visited. Overall, a nice spot to grab a coffee and snack, especially if you're in the area.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Maxime Michel
Review:
Café

Filter coffee - 140
Apparently not good considering the price and the quantity.

Latte - 140
Not bad but once again the quantity is quite small.

All-in-all, the place looks good, it's modern and clean however it is pricey.
Maybe due to the location.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Pei
Review: Patronised on a weekday morning for quick fix. Cozy & minimalist. Sitting by the bar overlooking the busy roads ahead gave a feeling of world bustling by. It was healing. Sit back, relax and enjoy the coffee. I had Peru beans, it was fruity & nutty, truly recommended.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Andrew Robertson
Review:
This place feels like an oasis, and with the traffic outside it gives a bit of Shibuya crossing vibes on a small scale.

Loved it, great coffee as well.

Thanks!

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Mix
Review:
Drop by if you're interested in an Australian-style cafe within the heart of Taipei, just an intersection across Huashan 1914 Creative Park. 🌳⛰️🎨

If you're a fan of the flat white, be sure to choose the medium roast for an authentic taste of home down under. 🌏☕🦘

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Xjo Jo
Review: This tiny coffee shop has a great vibe. We only purchased coffee beans, but the barista was helpful and knowledgeable. We loved the creative underground café interior. Definitely visit if you have time!

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Everardo Ortiz
Review:
Delicious coffee. Great and knowledgeable barista. Amazing atmosphere in the basement. The cake was amazing especially the white chocolate matcha, the soft center was so delicious I couldn't stop eating it.

Knowledge of coffee and barista skills are very good. A must try for coffee connoisseurs and lovers.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: John
Review:
Ordered espresso + cappuccino combo and banana cake.

Great little cafe with very good coffee. Fantastic music selection. Good place to chill and enjoy peace and quiet.

Downsides - basement location (no natural light) and no toilet.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: cl noods
Review: I ordered really interesting coffee - Espresso + tonic water. It was really creative to enjoy coffee in a new way that I’ll definitely try once I’m back home.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: S. T
Review:
This is a basement cafe so it can be a little dingy (just my personal preference for brighter cafes). The coffee was decent though I noticed coffee in Taiwan tends to be on the lighter side, so perhaps request for a double shot if you like your coffee stronger.

The staff seemed a little cold and unfriendly which was disappointing. I wanted to like this place. But unfortunately fell short for me.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Pote Pothongsunan
Review: Loves this place. Found it by accident while getting my breakfast food. I ordered the Ethiopia Sidamo drip coffee two days in a row. I would go back next time. It's a tiny place with a cool tiny (air conditioned) room to drink coffee. I hope you return next time I visit Taipei. Way better than Star$$.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Kamonwat Suksumek
Review: Really nice coffee. We had iced americano and double shots espresso. Lovely! The price with this quality is incredible! Staff are very lovely

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Mairin Elizabeth Blaauw
Review:
DELICIOUS COFFEE!!!
Open nice and early, great staff and a very relaxing environment. Our new favorite coffee shop in Taipei!! ❤️❤️❤️

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Jun-Wu Chen (Tong)
Review:
Atmosphere rating is biased, as I personally like hole in the wall kind of coffee place. 9 Days Coffee is totally such a place.

Had the specialty latte, which according to the barista, has a richer coffee taste. She was absolutely right. I loved the rich coffee taste, just how I like it.   Be sure to drop by if you are nearby, perhaps before or after a meal at the nearby Moon Moon Restaurant.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Trang Boos
Review:
They have good espresso, English menu.

I also got the blackberry latte, which was unique and very delicious, certainly something I hadn’t had elsewhere. There’s interior small seating space, very cozy, with just the bar and stools. The shop also provides internet/wifi but the space isn’t big enough to work all day in

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Monsicha Pongrujikorn
Review: Little hole in the wall coffee roaster that has home-roasted and imported blended coffees, they also make their own cold brew that takes 4 days to make. The cold brew was very nice but coffee is generally quite light in taste especially if had with milk. They do have oat milk.

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Sixian Lee
Review: Chanced upon this vibey place that specialises in coffee! Store owner was very friendly and could detect our Singaporean accent and struck a convo with us! The coffee was super smooth and to our taste

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Tom
Review:
Not sure if the guy had a bad day or what exactly happened here here but the reviews here do not reflect our experience in any way:

We ordered 1 oat milk cappucino and 1 matcha latte:
- when ordering he didnt ask whether we wanted to have them in his shop or take out, but instead served us plastic cups right away (ok, can happen)
- the beans were pre grinded (big red flag)
- the cappucino took him not even 30secs to make incl. foaming the milk and „latte art“. see for yourself how that turned out on the picture attached (spoiler: i had one sip and left it there)

- the matcha latte was so hot that it burned my tongue.

It felt like either we werent welcome or the guy had no clue how to run a coffee shop. would like to give more stars but it was a waste of money

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Frank Lee
Review: Ideal for grab to go tho there are some tables for sitting yet it’s quite a small space I’d feel claustrophobic.  The cappuccino is good but on the light roast side so if you’re Italian or s am used to strong coffee then you might want to ask for double shots but I didn’t see that option on the menu.  Tho the price is very competitive

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: NT Is the best
Review: Delicious coffee with the atmosphere so chilled. I think the owner roasted coffee beans by himself. I ordered iced americano the tase is very perfect !👌🏻

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: I CHEN CHEN
Review: Excellent place for a good cup of coffee.  From espresso to hand pouring all very professional.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Order ice Americano and cold brew coffee. Both are all right. Coffee flavour is bitter.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Jenny Hsu
Review: Love this little gem and it’s one of the rare places in Taipei that actually does decent coffee.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Winnie Wu
Review: Very good coffee with a lot of care! And we also liked the waffle very much

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: 헤이썸머 HeySummer
Review: Server was kind, but the coffee didn't taste good. They changed cafelatte to a double shot because it tasted like just milk 🥲 Waffles are too sugary but crispy. I'm giving you two points because they were kind, but I don't want to visit anymore!!!

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Xin Yi Steph
Review: Toast set has a cut off timing better to go early :) simple breakfast toast to fuel the start of your day. Been here afew times, breakfast definitely has some 古早味. Visit them :)

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Wendy Cheng
Review:
A little underwhelmed...

What did I get
I got the americano, honey tea and some snacks from the front counter - almond cookies and this flour treat. The coffee was okay.. nothing particular. They did not have any non-dairy substitute, so I had to have it black. The cookies are really good, very tasty. The other snack was okay... it kept sticking to my teeth...

Environment
I ran into this place just walking around. I seems to be a small space and they have the line outside. There are markings on the floor. It was fairly quickly since it was a quick sit and drink.

Niceness of the staff...
Again, not a I have time to answer all your questions. They give you the menu and hope you figure it out. Don't ask for any suggestions.

Dollar
Relatively inexpensive.

Yes?
I would.

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Yi Ling
Review:
Came here from the hype and attracted by the displays of traditional snacks on the entrance. Before even entering, the aroma of roasted coffee wafted through the streets already.

We came at a non peak hour and were able to get a seat immediately. When we left during lunch hour, this place was so crowded we could not get out of the door easily...

However, we waited about 20 mins for our coffee when we only ordered 2. There was only 1 staff per section of the ground, such as the Brewer, waitress, roaster, and To-Go snacks. With orders piled up, the coffee brewer naturally had more load to carry than her speed could handle.

Some customers were very snappy as the waitress did not go over to take their orders as told.

Nonetheless, we tried 2 of their coffee:

☕️ Strong Blended Coffee
☕️ Charcoal Making
No point writing a customised review for each of them because they tasted so similar to me it was disappointing. I was expecting something stronger in flavours or a clear distinction in both. But it was really just watered-down coffee that carried a freshly brewed taste. For a price of NT 100, I would expect a taste that lives up to its price tag. We left immediately after drinking our coffee.
I rate: 1/5 🌟

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: joel tan
Review:
tldr: you have to look past their service (manned- by an senior “lady boss”), and you’ll find some really good coffee and food

Old school coffee house where you can get a really good coffee fix and respite on a hot day. Expresso was full-bodied in smell and taste, not sour. Chocolate cake is also very good. Latte was balanced.

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Leslie Tang
Review: I had a basic breakfast set.  It was OK as in nothing to shot about.  I bought the coffee beans and they grind for me.  I strongly recommend the coffee beans and the aroma is fantastic.  I bought the "Manbo",  and "Dark Roast".  It taste so good.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Vicki Friedman
Review: Cutest little coffee shop. We were staying nearby and not thrilled with the breakfast buffet so went in search of good coffee and light breakfast. Adored this place. Fantastic couple with the cutest dog. Outstanding coffee and food. The whole package. Will be headed back tomorrow.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Jay Tseng
Review:
Quaint cafe near a serene green patch, with FASCINATING Japanese/Taiwanese rice burgers (飯糰, flavors include: braised tofu, shredded chicken, pork floss, etc) & AMAZING SAUCE (peanut butter, miso, grilled cheese...)

Space offering 6 seats only.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Naomi Ackerman
Review: Definitely the best cafe in the area! The owners are so friendly, the coffee is great, the food is very tasty (get the fish-shaped waffle with maple black sesame - it’s delicious), and everything is prepared with so much care. There is also a super cute cafe dog, Fu Mei, who welcomes all visitors 😍🌟💫 5* and can’t wait to come back again

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Ryan Axelson
Review: Best coffee around. Time and time again, I can't get enough of their coffee and service. They have an Indonesian Mandheling that is wonderful in a latte. I actually get an extra shot and that really makes the flavor and caffeine kick. It's absolutely coffee perfection.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Alexander Tiffany
Review: Amazing cafe, great food and coffee, and lovely, kind owners. 10/10, I love it here! 😍

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Linda T
Review:
Another great hidden gem!

The coffee here is AMAZING. Brewed fresh, made with care, and taste delicious. I’m only visiting Taipei for a short amount of time and have returned to this coffee shop three separate times. If you enjoy black coffee, the single origin is highly recommended - one of the best blacks I’ve had, really smooth. If you enjoy flavored coffee, you can’t go wrong with any of the specialty drinks! It’s not overly sweet, just perfect 🤌

Pros:
- tasty coffee
- friendly staff!
- plays great music
- speedy wifi
- decent amount of seating
- 5/5 on cleanliness

Cons:
- no restroom; but there’s a store right down the street if needed

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Florian
Review: Do yourself a favour and try their coffee! The two baristas do a very good job creating your favourite coffee/tea drink (also with oat-milk). It's a very cute place to stop and relax or get some work done (WiFi and electricity outlets available). Student friendly prices - especially compared to most other cafes in the area. Went here a lot during my time at NTU and will remember it as one of my favourite cafes in Taipei ❤️

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Martin Manullang
Review: I love this place. They have a big window. Very comfy for work or having chit-chat with friends. They offer coffee and snacks as well—also a wide variety of single-origin coffee. The barista is friendly. They use fresh milk. The price is also reasonable, not cheap but also not expensive.

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Rising Star
Review:
Awesome place to have coffee ☕
And they even have oat milk

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: J L
Review: Two fashionable guys in their mid 20s man the espresso machine. I highly recommend their sea salt caramel latte. One of the best I’ve had!

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Jeremy Ferre
