Review: The brown sugar coffee latte was my favorite and I ordered this multiple times. I ordered a cinnamon one day and a basic scone another day. Both were delicious. The scone was perfect. The cinnamon roll was nice, not too sweet. Service, including English speaking, was wonderful. This is a cute place to visit.

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Konstantin Sevryukov
Review: I recently visited this cafe and ordered a cold mocha to go, and I was pleasantly impressed by its taste! The balance of flavors was perfect, making it one of the best mochas I've had in a long time. The coffee had a rich, robust flavor that paired perfectly with the smooth chocolate, creating a delightful and refreshing drink. The ambiance of the cafe is cozy and inviting, with a warm and friendly atmosphere that makes it an ideal spot to relax and unwind. Whether you're looking to grab a quick coffee to go or sit down and enjoy a meal, this place has something for everyone. The staff were attentive and courteous, ensuring a pleasant experience from start to finish. The menu offers a wide variety of options, from delicious coffee beverages to tasty food items, catering to all tastes and preferences. I highly recommend this cafe if you're craving a quality coffee to go or if you want to enjoy a leisurely meal in a comfortable setting. It's definitely a place worth visiting again and again!

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Joel. cs
Review: A small cozy cafe with great owner, I recommend the brown sugar latte, and will definitely try their curry next time. 😊😊😊❤️❤️❤️

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Jie-Ting Jiang
Review: Visited here to get a warm meal in a cold winter day. Eventually, not only my stomach got warmed by the delicious dishes, but also my heart was warmed by the friendly staffs. It is just like a little reliable cafeteria in your neighborhood, where you can always take a little break and temporarily run away from annoying things to get recharged, which is rare in a fast paced city like Taipei.

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: wm H
Review: Hands down best coffee I've had in Taiwan.  Coffee has distinct berry and wine taste.

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Big Lou
Review: Awesome coffee. The staff is awesome and friendly. Thank you for everything

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Leo Randy
Review: Excellent coffee shop in Dunhua S. Rd. The environment is extremely cozy and good for reading/meeting/relaxing. Highly recommended!

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: firework s
Review: A comfortable, spacious cafe. Enjoyed the cappuccino I ordered. Normally cinnamon isn't sprinkled on cappuccino in Taiwan, but I was asked if I'd like cinnamon. It was thoughtful of the barista to ask.

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Jack Tan
Review:
Pretty average.

1. Staff/barista all grumpy looking, no smile of any kind though the visit. Female staff that took our order has a really sour and lethargic look on her while tksing our order. Service was lack lustre and without enthusiasm.

2. Pourover and flat white order taste OK. Don't really like the mug used for the brew, as it resembles a large saucer with a tiny winy handle.

3. Slick and cool vibe with the typical cafe industrial interior, but lacks character.

Overall, it was an OK visit but there are better options especially on the service element.

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Hsueh-Shang Lu
Review:
hidden in the ally of Taipei city center south side,
great ambiance and great coffee taste!
reasonable price with comfortable decor,
I personally love their handmade desserts

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Erica Lee
Review: i got the brown sugar coffee latte iced with oat milk and the balance of flavors was so good! i loved it, one of my favorite coffees. the apple tart and cinnamon roll were pretty good too. both had a lot of cinnamon and weren’t too sweet. we didn’t sit down inside but the vibes are nice inside and you can see them making the pastries.

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Sophia Severino
Review: Delicious  Oatmilk Latte uniquely flavored with ground roasted sesame! Strong yet subtle. Touch of sugar added to soften. Love the baristas here! Welcoming and expressive in explaining the menu! Today I am dining in for a Mother’s Day  treat of their Twin Brothers famous home made cinnamon roll! This is my second visit this week! Aesthetic ambiance and a chance to view the baker making the cinnamon rolls and cakes through the large glass window. Super fun and chill!

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Johannes
Review:
It's a nice place to have a coffee+ snack! 💯
The coffee was absolutely delicious (especially the special flavors!) and the chocolate was just amazing! 😍
Didn't try their pastries, but they looked as they wouldn't disappoint you 😋

Be aware that you'll have 90min. to enjoy your order until you have to leave (that's what we were told) - so it might be the wrong place for you, if you need to get some work done that requires longer than 90mins. 😅
Also the tables might be 🤏🏼 small for a good working session with your PC 😅

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Amy Loke
Review:
The milk used in the iced latte has a lower fat content. Also, the coffee is not strong enough. Hence, it leads to an unbalanced coffee overall. You can see from the colour of the coffee.

The cinnamon roll had too much cinnamon. Balance is off, too. The canale is nice.

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Marcus Fong
Review:
Dropped by Twin Brothers for my AM coffee run. Good coffee and even better Cinnamon Roll! Like seriously, the Cinnamon Roll is to die for.

Please note, they only accept cash.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Tim
Review:
First I have to say the coffee tastes very good. I like that you can choose between different blends and my iced latte with oat milk was good.

The attitude of one staff was a bit rude, I was confused where to order and where to receive my drink since it wasn’t sure…
The other one was friendly when I paid.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Raven Kwok
Review: Awesome coffees are served by professional staff. The boss is a brewing champion but super down-to-earth and friendly 🤎

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Cris L
Review: So pleasantly surprised by this coffee shop! The service is wonderful and nice, while the speciality bean coffee (I had the Brazilian beans) tasted delicious. The roast own coffee at the back and it’s a great working space! Would love to come back again!

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Josh Gold
Review:
We had a wonderful time at moonshine. We had their strawberry mocktail that contains their house blend espresso. Was very well balanced, cool and refreshing.

Also 2 comp filters. They were superbly made. Flavour profiles were spot on.
Highly recommend them for anyone who wants the best in a retail environment.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Ka Yee Chin
Review:
Their coffee special is great, hand brew is quite decent, staffs and baristas are really friendly.

The space is spacious and interior is more industrial + cozy.

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Julia Chen
Review:
You can either have your coffee to-go or there's a few stools for sit-ins. Had a great Yirgacheffe coffee, will defs visit again :)

#士東市場 #單品咖啡 #日曬耶加雪菲

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Per van der Horst
Review: Definitely the best single origin espresso, macchiato and cappuccino in Taipei. My favorites are Sidamo and Yirgacheffe unwashed.

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Syrena C.
Review: good good

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Yao
Review:
I ordered a single-origin latte at your store at 9 o'clock this morning. The barista who made the Italian style didn't seem to have enough experience; the light roasted beans, the milk was over 90 degrees, and the milk foam was too thick and not dense. I hope that the store can pay more attention to the workplace education part, rather than letting novices directly serve cups, which affects the customer's perception.
I'm also a barista and I hope you guys can keep up the good work.

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: ching2 ching2
Review:
Specialty 70

Black, too sour.

Tasty ☀️☀️☀️
Visit again☀️

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Georgin Lau
Review: We had the pour over which was extracted well. Simple place without much seating but good coffee overall. A little pricey for the hand pour in my personal opinion, I have had better ones at a slightly lower price.

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Aaron Neal
Review:
Asked for an americano but was advised their house black was the equivalent.  The cup drank very sour. Either that was by design and their style, or the brew was not done properly. Maybe their espresso drinks are good?
The space looks nice and comfortable though.

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Lindy Luu
Review: We just passed this cute little coffee shop today and decided we would go in for a coffee. The lovely barista who speaks perfect English suggested we try the oat milk cappuccino which was to our surprise amazingly good! The coffee beans are roasted out back and the taste is amazing. We will definitely be returning to this coffee shop soon! We highly recommend this to any coffee lovers out there!

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Pui Ngai Low
Review: A very memorable cup of iced latte for me. Flavour wise it was a perfectly balanced cup! Lemon tart was also very delicious! Staff provided good prompt and attentive service!! Craving for another cup already!

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Kelvin Yung
Review: Higher end coffee but lives up to the price. A spin-off from All Day Roasting Company. Shop has limited bar seating. Simplistic decor. They roast their own beans which is signature to their style and the reason why they're so good. Portions are smaller than expected, leaves you wanting more.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Edward Niedbalski
Review: Great coffee ☕ and polite staff, a great little place for a quick morning 🌄 coffee!  And best of all, they have functioning WiFi, unless the shop next door.  Definitely worth a cup!

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Alan Hellawell
Review: The hot cap has three shots: I love it strong. Tons of noise from the street but offers a nice, tiny refuge. Their bagged beans seem to be amongst the cheapest in town.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Michael Hildebrand
Review:
1. Staff messed up my very simple order
2. Staff did not give me change from the money I paid
3. Staff made the coffee for the person behind me in line, before even starting on mine. In fact, they waited a while before starting on mine.

When they finally gave me my coffee, they seemed angry at me, rather than apologetic for the above.

Shop is pretty small, not a lot of space to wait for your order. Coffee is good.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Cornelius Piros
Review: The price is affordable with cozy little place sharing with Dongmen 3 hostel. Got an hot chocolate, and it as delicious.  Got  Barista was nice and put a lot of care and attention into making the drink.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Ellis Koifman
Review: May not look like much but for three weeks I've been passing by this coffee place smelling their beans. Today I finally decided to go for it and wow. Not only is the coffee fantastic, they also have an exceptional selection. All of it at reasonable prices too. I don't drink coffee everyday, but when I do I know where I'll be coming.

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: yang mmsg
Review:
My wife and I had this during our last 2 days of the trip.

She love their coffee latte…
…and apple black tea for me.

I’m not too particular with coffee, but gosh their coffee is really something.

I tried lemon honey tea and apple black tea.

Like many other reviews, their apple black tea is heavenly!

The tea itself has a blend of sweetness and bitterness. And the apple cut dice makes the whole experience great and unique.

The business owners are really friendly, courteous and hospitable as well.

Must try!

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Andrew Robertson
Review:
After an early morning flight into a misty Taipei, next to my hotel was a small joint, still closed and Google said opening on Monday.

Turns out they ARE open on Saturday morning and provided me with a brown sugar latte and toasted cheese sandwich.

Cash only, which is normal for small shops, and the gent at the counter spoke English!

Loved it, check the photos it tastes as good as it looks and feels as cozy as the warm lights show.

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Alan Hellawell
Review: (June, 2024 update): much better cappuccino; may have changed the milk. (Old review: “Very nice barista. I think it’s the milk in the cappuccino that wasn’t great.”)

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Grace Magdalene Ong
Review: Great coffee or tea fix if you’re staying at the hotel next door or in the area! Service was excellent as well

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Denise Lee
Review: Think they ran out of printed cups... Coffee is one of the better tasting cups around the area (the rest were more diluted/milky). Well-balanced and nutty. Ordered the latte and mocha.

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Charlie Shay
Review: The ambiance and playlist gives off a really chill vibe - really does feel like the serenity under the deep blue. Their unique coffee and tea blend is worth the visit alone (I had the espresso earl grey Amber). The cheesecake is also worth checking out (I had the earl grey cheesecake - it felt very light for a cheesecake, and not too sweet).

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Andil Ong
Review:
- Such a cool concept for a store. You got the standard Americano, Latte but they have a lot of signature drinks where they convince drinks based on coffee or tea with various seasonal ingredients.

- Ordered:
1. Waterfall - Coffee with coffee foam and whipped cream on top. GIve it a few minutes and you understand why it’s called waterfall as the foam “falls” into the coffee under it.
2. Citrus Punch - Coffee with tonic water and lemon and other stuffs. Very refreshing on a hot day. Very acidic as well, that I didn’t like it on the first sip, but the more I drink it, the more refreshing it gets. It’s like drinking lemon soda with coffee
3. Osmanthus - Very light. It has jelly and lightly sweetened. Very easy to drink.
- Out of the three above, definitely enjoyed the Citrus Punch the most because the weather was so hot outside

- The place is so chill to work, chat and meet people.
- Definitely will come back again when I’m in the area

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Nicol Tan
Review:
The coffee is ok, could be better. Ordered latte and it costs 90 NTD, which is a good price.
Whisky chocolate cake is good, creamy, chocolate and whisky flavor well balanced, cheese not too rich, 140 NTD.
Service and atmosphere is immersing :)
It’s a good place to work or read a book and chill

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: 黃米雪
Review: Love their whisky cheesecake soft and silky alcohol taste not overpower. WiFi available decent sitting place. Only order americano smooth and well-rounded flavor. Not too bitter and acidity just nice. Service if great staff really know their menu gave a good recommendation. Might get crowded during lunchtime.

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Henry Christian
Review: Beautifully decorated cafe that serves a unique blend of coffee. The barista takes great pride in his concoction. We ordered two of their signatures drinks: Cucumber and Amber. The Cucumber coffee tastes refreshing (recommended to have it with ice). The Amber coffee is aromatic with a tinge of citrus flavour. We also shared a raw lemon cheese tart. It is light but delicious. We spent slightly more than 409NTD between the two of us. Bonus: There's WiFi and power plugs in the cafe if you need to do remote work here.

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Alvaro Lopez
Review:
If you’re passing by you might not even realize that this small shop offers a great selection of the finest quality specialty coffees. It is surprising the amount of high quality coffees, teas and snacks that a shop that easily can get lost in the busy streets of the business zone of Taipei.
I might be just an enthusiastic Coffee Aficionado, however a place like this really deserves a larger audience. If you like supporting local small businesses, fine coffees, fine designers tea, and snacking, this place is a MUST VISIT

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Good service.  I have only tried Americano, but it is fine.  Theb shop is more like mixture of Louisa and Cama.

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Andy Tsao
Review: Mocha coffee is great

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Tùng Nguyễn Sơn
Review: Firstly, idk about other drinks/cakes, the only thing i order is a cup of dripping coffee, ethiopia. This is the worst coffee i ever drink.

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Lavinia
Review: There is no food at this unit. Coffee is only served on the go, very hot, doesn't compare with  the coffee they make in their bigger locations.

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Josephine Lee
Review: Tiny coffee place serving reasonably priced, out of this world coffee.  1st ordered their Americano, thinking it's my average morning dose.  Thoroughly surprise of it's multi-rich favour that's oddly addictive and like no other.  During my last Taipei week, ordered 2 different favours everyday.  All well blended, my favorite being Cucumber Americano, Sunkist Americano, Piccola, Sesame seed Latte...wish I'd more time to savor all which I'm sure will not disappoint me.

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: せなせな
Review: very excellent coffee, had their honey osmanthus latte, although osmanthus can be stronger, the drink itself was amazing and i enjoyed it thoroughly. adorable little shop too

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Catherine Tang
Review: I have never been here before but my friend sent me a photo of her coffee and it made me laugh because I immediately recognized the lyrics. Then I looked through this cafe's photos and the owner has good taste in music from Taylor to 1975 to Justin Bieber :P

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Chris L
Review: The coffee was so good that I almost finished it before I remembered to take a pic. Excellent customer service from the hard-working laoban with a friendly personality. This is exactly what you want from a daily coffee shop. If I lived in Taipei, I’d be here every day. Jealous of those who can take advantage of this choice little spot and feel sorry for those who don't stop by.  Check it out!

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Vanillin Quan
Review: Indeed great coffee, I ordered Americano, it's Fruity and aromatic, yet not too acidic. Nice coffee!

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: sheena chee
Review: Nice and cosy cafe to chill. Service is good. They have a nice selection of expresso-based drip coffee so feel free to ask for explaination. For favourites you can try their famous gula melaka latte (黑糖拿铁). Their matcha latte is abit too light for my liking. You can try their matcha lava cake, this is nice.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: L HuiMING
Review: A quaint little cafe good for chilling with friends over weekends, or for dates, tried their signature matcha cake (抹茶甜甜圈）and the chocolate cake （巧克力甜甜圈），and the Taiwan honey cake (台湾蜂蜜蛋糕）. The matcha cake body is too dry and not fluffy enough for our liking, but the sauce is good,love the chocolate cake, it was perfect and a must try! The honey cake has a faint honey taste. We tried the matcha coffee and chocolate coffee, it was a little difficult to finish, but hard-core chocolate lovers who love thick thick chocolate will love it. I feel it was a bit  jelat (腻) towards the end. Still no trying :)

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: i . am . kenny
Review: Great ambience for chilling. Recommend having the  黑糖拿铁 and 抹茶蛋糕. Service is good too.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: Henry
Review: Nicely decored cafe with a unique interior color palette creates an ambiance suitable for conversation or study (if no kids are around). Personable staff. Reasonably priced drinks and light food.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: Joyce Yu
Review: The green tea donut was so delicious, staffs were  friendly!  Will definitely  come back  someday! Yum yum!

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Chi Ha
Review: The milk tea and latte were very bad. Super diluted and we didn’t even want to drink it. The toast was very underwhelming as well. Ended up with 219 TWD per pax.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Chris Bunch
Review: We went here a few times, and we loved it each time. It was quiet and the upstairs had a nice vibe. Our server was super friendly and spoke enough English to help us order. Our coffee was great (we just enjoy good black coffee), and they even brew a nice cup of natural, if that's your thing. The breakfast was simple and limited, but it was indeed tasty.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Suzanna Bunch
Review:
Best coffee place we found in Taipei, and they open early! We went for coffee and breakfast 3 days in a row. Awesome selection of very well brewed coffee and a perfect simple breakfast menu for the travelers who might need something familiar for breakfast.

Our waitress was so sweet and helpful to order from.  I highly recommend Nanmay Coffee!

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Ong C
Review: A very old coffee shop in Ximen have many good coffees. Breakfast here is very simple, toast, eggs, waffles only.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Andy Tse
Review:
As a tourist, I found this is a clean place and nice for a tea break.
Don't expect any top class brewed coffee and drinks.
My best choice was the egg and ham sandwich 🥪! 3 stars for the atmosphere is because of the slow free wifi.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Ordered iced latte and got discount to go. Latte is a bit light.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Terence Wong
Review:
As a straight guy, I find the simple things like a turkey, cheese and lettuce bagel w/ tea are all done on point.

Plastic cups aren't used unless you order takeout.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Sirinnicha Chuemuangphan
Review:
Nicely staff. Good drinks. Softly comfy atmosphere.🥰 I try custard 🍮 and hot milk tea. 🧋 so good for this season. 😋
Suit for working space or reading .📖

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Eric Khun
Review: Designed and comfortable cafe. Friendly service

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: ian aegis
Review: Nice place;

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Corey Wong
Review: Food potion is significantly smaller than Japan's. What a let down. The taste and atmosphere is good, albeit higher price and lower potion compared to original store in Japan.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Der Chuckmeister
Review: Great place to meet and chat over some simple meals and desserts.  Menu is not fancy but their coffee is good with a lot of selections.  Don’t expect latte or espresso here though as everything is Japanese style.  Usually come for the morning special with coffee and toast for only NTD100.  Mornings can get noisy especially if there are tables with kids.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: L W
Review: The drinks here are good, the staff members were friendly. The price is quite expensive, and the other guests here were entitled and annoying. It doesn’t usually concern me but I could overhear their conversations. During their breakfast time, they will give you free bread and sauce in addition to the drink.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Foodie Pirate
Review: Although there is 2-hours time limit. The food is good, and excellent service. Price is on the expensive side but its acceptable since its in the expensive area. Who doesn’t like a cute boot glass?They have work station to this with laptop too. Tonkatsu sandwich is highly recommended. 👍🏼 IG:@foodiepirate

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Krisztina Gyimes
Review: Super comfy place with great service. Their coffee and ice cream dessert is pretty good 😊

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Po Chen
Review: Ok

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Ervin Lai
Review: Exactly what a coffee place should be all about. And thank goodness it opens early so that you can grab a cup on the way to work.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: A. M. Just
Review: I enjoy the coffee here.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: A ak
Review: Small place, very difficult to fit in but friendly service.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Jimmy C
Review: Great dark roast iced americano and nitro coffee

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Yvonne Liu
Review: Nice local cafe with a fair price. It doesn’t have English menu and much choices, but all the standard coffee you can expect to get it here.

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Christian Keck
Review: Just a short stop before we start our little hike through the „five beasts“ of Taipeh. The coffee is delicious and furthermore we get some complementary snacks for our hiking. In total best and sweetest service ;)

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Taylor Herron
Review: One of my favorite coffee shops! The owner is friendly and puts a lot of care into his work. My two-year old and I go often - he loves the coconut toast. A great place to kill time and enjoy great coffee!

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Mason H
Review: A very affordable and roomy coffee shop. A pretty ideal place to sit down and read or work.

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Jojo Padilla
Review: Nice, hip coffee shop. Coffee's good too. No food though

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Jin
Review:
Friendly barista that greeted me and was patient when taking my order. He also had no issues when I asked if I could take a few pictures. Good atmosphere and you can tell the shop cares about producing good coffee.

Good times. Hope this helped.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Ryan Covey
Review: Awesome A+ coffee. Can’t wait to try the cold brew. Very nice little cafe.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Frank Chun Yat Li
Review:
I had the hazelnut iced latte, flavour was great. Theres no AC but they had a fan and it was fine in terms of heat.

The decor is pretty hipster.. They have their own roaster right at the entrance.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Kevin Cameron
Review: Pretty good spro, roasting on premises.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Samuel Tersigni
Review: Had a fantastic cappuccino here. Great coffee flavour, nice presentation, reasonable price. Only a few places to sit, but great for takeout.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Ahmad Khalis
Review: Thank you Lesley for the warmth & stellar service. Appreciate your recommendations! Everything lived up to the 5🌟 google reviews! From the ambience to the cheesecake and toast, this quaint coffee nestled in the heart of the city is totally worth a visit. Looking forward to the next one! Thank you @fierytianjin , I’ll see you again soon!

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Anton Subert
Review: Excellent coffee. Many single origins to choose from. Card payment (apple pay) possible which is rarely the case in a non-chain coffee shop.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Anna D
Review: A tiny sidewalk spot /kiosk with really great coffees and bites. I had coldbrew with milk and a salmon/spinach quiche, both delicious.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Peter Hunt
Review: Beautifully balanced coffee. Nice shady spot outside. Friendly staff and cute artwork.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: shawn ng
Review:
This place is low key fire man.
Grab me self a cuppa and Bolo bun during lunch. Great place to people watch, enjoy coffee. (Lunch time has higher foot traffic if u wanna people watch)

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Y “Yowie” T
Review:
Extremely cosy old school and characteristic bar. Older (20 year plus) songs are often on the playlist.

Great boutique coffee and alcoholic cocktails. In a quiet corner suburban location. Superb place to catch up with friends without loud music blasting in the background.

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: JINA SEO
Review: Very cute doggy says hi when you enter. I had BLT sandwich which was perfect except the bread was too crispy (I prefer soft). My coffee with medium-light-roasted beans were very good. You can choose roasting. If you are traveling this city, don’t go franchised coffee shop, go to local, extra-ordinary cafe!

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Bieb C
Review: Best coffee for both latte and drip coffee. But the part I don't understand is its neighbor, why can't they just celebrate and enjoy such fantastic coffee shop?!? Don't you know they have a great mixologist that serve awesome cocktail for really fair price?

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Rachel An
Review:
More than a coffee house, the owner was one of my favorite bartenders in Taipei (back in the old days).

It’s chill, cozy and a place where you can work, hang out and have a good cup/glass of something! Anything from a nice espresso, tea, gin& tonic to fancy cocktails, it’s available.

Haven’t tried the food yet, but I’m sure it’s awesome.

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Angela Hong
Review: Friendly staff and good interior. Bathroom has pads for those days when your uterus surprises you, which is very thoughtful. Didn’t try the food but enjoyed my coffee. Only one minor disappointment is the plastic straw. Really would prefer no straw or non-disposable. Oh also, AWESOME BLT!

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Wow Haochi
Review: This cafe knows how to serve a toast! Bread was not sweet nor milky, thickness was generous but I would not mind paying a little more if they can add a layer of butter before the jam. Also they can try to serve french toast with this bread, I’m sure it will be perfect!

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Jennifer Kilborn
Review: My first time here, but maybe my new favorite coffee shop and place to study! Great drink and light meal menu at totally reasonable prices. The taro paste & pork floss croissant and rooibos milk tea with honey are super yum! The atmosphere is modern, lovely, cozy, and relaxing with great lighting, plenty of seating (1st & 2nd floor), wifi, some electrical sockets, and nice music for study (elevator-ish but not too loud). The weather is chilly right now, and the upstairs is perfectly warmed. So glad I discovered this place!

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Natalie Turner
Review: Really love the simple, yet delicious paninis and croissants. I also love the interior design of this cafe: lovely blue and off-white color pallet that gives a trendy and relaxing feel.

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Andrew Zhu
Review: Cool and spacious spot, but deducting a star as the Wi-Fi never works when I’m here. Likely requires an access point upgrade to be able to handle more simultaneous connections.

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Nathan Harburn
Review: The coffee here is very good, will definitely go again.

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Ash P
Review: Cute little cafe/roaster around Memorial Hall 國立中正紀念堂 with a few seating available. I had iced latte which was nice and refreshing. My mum had the brown sugar milk tea which she really enjoyed. They have lovely illustrations drawn on each of their coffee cups. We sadly missed the presence of their furry boss, hopefully we can catch him next time!

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Randi Lee
Review:
Award-winning coffee beans, taste delicious, strongly recommended brown sugar latte
It’s a small takeout place with helpful & friendly staff

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Juliette RGD
Review:
Cute coffee shop with a large selection of coffees and teas! I tried the iced lemon coffee and found it so surprisingly delicious !
The staff was very kind and helpful.

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Matt J
Review: Excellent coffee. Taipei has a lot of chain coffee and also independent coffee places that do micro roasting, this is one you should definitely check out.

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Tom W
Review: Came here a few times during my trip to Taipei, so glad I found it. Amazing coffee, and the cinnamon rolls were quality too!

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Kevin Huang
Review: For those who’s heavily rely on americano, this place provides incredible coffee latte for you to shift to with no problem! Honestly, I’ve never had a latte with so many layers of taste, simply amazing. The pour over coffees are well known in this place as well, coffee beans are freshly roasted every single night with the Ray’s love! Strongly recommending this place without a doubt because you get a quality coffee at a extremely affordable price!

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Jethro Liou
Review: Ta already sets the bar high with its hand ground drip coffee with an excellent variety of beans to select but this time Ta has set the bar higher for take out. Just look at just minor details to ensure take out coffee doesn’t spill.

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Plang's World
Review: This place hold a special place in my heart during my 10 days Taiwan trip. Been here 4-5 times and they offer very good coffee for very affordable prices

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Anthony LI
Review: A simple yet sophisticated coffee place. Price is reasonable and the place is chilled and relaxed

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Fawsya Al Badri
Review: Good Coffee, Nice and calm coffee shop vibes, & Excellent Coffee also count as cheap price with very friendly barista 😁 👍🏻

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Kerk Low
Review:
Was attracted by the interesting theme of this cafe.  The cafe was decently spacious especially in the context of costs of space in Taipei.
Coffee is average, but the decor is interesting.
If passing by, can drop by and check them out.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Kaeru Shu
Review: Near MRT(metro) ShiLin station, good place for a cup of coffee.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Ivan Luu
Review: I am a tourist and I happened to come in this coffee shop one day Jan 2024, the coffee was up to standard but what happened was we wanted to dine in coffees . We are 3 people but ordered only two coffees, the staff said you needed to order 3 coffee cause we are 3 people.you cannot dine in or sat on table unless you ordered 3.i did not understand what kind of service is this? However, I did not think I have been treated nicely in a way.i went so many places the whole world I have never came across this situation.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Valerie Huang
Review: The quality of drink and dessert matches to the prices👌, and if you wanna enjoy spacious seats, visit here during weekdays.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Jun Tang
Review: Average tasting coffee, good environment for work with outlets free to use. The only annoyance is that you’ll have to get water from downstairs. Wish they had water available upstairs too since guests are expected to serve themselves. Their bagels were whatever.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Ken Wong
Review:
Stopped by for a pour over coffee and a Vietnamese style sandwich. Both were very good 👍.

Would stop by again for more delicious food.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: James Lo
Review: Solid breakfast sandwiches, make sure to add eggs! Drinks are great, besides coffee they have a good selection of teas and hot steam milky teas

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Jerry Yang (Jerry Yang)
Review: I tried the signature coffee “Flavored Latte with Banana”by using Uber eats, and felt not bad! I guess I may re-order due to its affordable price.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: siva raj
Review: local taiwanese coffee outlet

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Tony
Review: Nice a big cup of hot latte in the cold winter with a chill atmosphere

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: Joel. cs
Review: its a bit on the expensive side of cafe, but hey they really have some good coffee here 👍👍👍 we got a free drip coffee aswell hahhaha thank you laoban ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: David Collins
Review:
Oh God, thank you for a real coffee
Best Coffee in Taiwan by far.
The black tea cheese cake is to Die for.

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: 유예진
Review:
Love the coffee here. Was having a bad day but feeling quite happy after having a coffee and the cute "enjoy your coffee" on the paper bag ♡
Thank you !

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: B L
Review: Seized my day with Bellissimo Coffee. So happy and enjoy the Aussie Latte and Banana Bread. Fantastic layout for takeaway or dine in. Probably the best Latte I had in Taiwan with Love ❤️

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: Mitchell Norrie
Review: I had a really delicious iced latte here with my girlfriend and we chatted with the manager the whole time who was so so nice! all of the staff was friendly, the drinks were great, and I'll be excited to return 😄

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Pamela Nguyen
Review: A great little cafe. Elsi was lovely.  Helped bring my stroller into the cafe. Exceptional service and coffee from when I first stepped in. They offered to play with my son so I could enjoy my coffee in peace. I also ended up buying quite a few of their coffees as presents for back home. A must visit for everyone

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Linus
Review:
Be careful of the steps when taking the seats at the back.

Coffee was good.

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Chloe Vuong
Review: We have very limited Chinese speaking capability and Elsie was super friendly, patient and helpful. The dark roast cappuccino with oat milk was just as good as our favourite coffee joints back in Melbourne. Perfect strength and quality oat milk. Thank you so much

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Mohammad Soltanieh-ha
Review: Great coffee and super friendly staff. I went there on my first day at Taiwan and was treated with a delicious (and free - thank you!) Cinnamon role. Highly recommend

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Phoebe Chang
Review:
Love this cozy place and vibe.
Best for a relaxing weekend afternoon to have a sip of coffee. Life is just great!

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Alice Wang
Review:
Reservation only! Very difficult to get the reservation but totally worth it! Pay for the “ seat” fee which is 700 dollars per person, ( $350 upfront for the reservation fee can deduct beans purchase) can drink as much as you want! With one free toast ( 3 different flavors of choice, I chose yuzu butter flavor. It was great!)

Hidden at the valley, nice vibe! Great services! Can’t wait for the next time :)

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Hsiao Rain
Review:
It's a quiet but not serious shop with a really nice atmosphere. Although when I made the reservation, I had made a reservation for Lucky Trove (I must have remembered the name correctly🤔) coffee and cocktails, but I missed it because my body was undergoing treatment and I was unable to drink alcohol that day. I felt a little sorry for the store, but luckily Jin Wan directly said that he would drink it for me that day🤣

However, I still hope that after the treatment, I can drink Jinwan’s cocktail again and reminisce about Jinwan’s special cocktail at remember me late at night N years ago.

Let's talk about "Magpie". It is a cafe that is not out of the ordinary when you visit it. You can taste various coffees in peace and quiet. For me, it is the most direct way to choose the coffee beans I like. 😂I drank four kinds of drinks that day (it is really impossible to order four cups like this in ordinary cafes, so you can try what you want slowly). I also thank "Magpie" for its system of changing cups for coffee at no cost, and I was very satisfied with the take away that day. Got my favorite beans.

In addition, let’s talk about the desserts. It’s actually quite surprising. I thought that for a shop with strong coffee, the desserts would be relatively inferior. Quite unexpectedly, from toast, toast jam, Boston cake, handmade pudding. Not ordinary! ! It’s really only children who make choices. I want to try the lemon tart next time, but I don’t know how the tart crust performs?

This time I went alone, without taking NB to the office. I just enjoyed the aroma of coffee and desserts all afternoon. It was a place where I didn’t do anything and it was not obtrusive. The barista’s instructions were also very detailed, allowing me to choose the one I like smoothly. The taste of home.

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Eating Jeng
Review:
Awesome cafe that is completely reservation-only💯

Need to book online first
Deposit 350 yuan per person
In order to put an end to Oko, it is definitely worth the price.
You can check the box to reserve dessert when making a reservation
I highly recommend getting some desserts with coffee.
These are all choices that won’t step on thunder.

There are clear reservation and seating instructions on the website
After sitting down at the scene, the service staff will explain in detail
Bring hand towels and boiling water to welcome guests
The first step is to choose the flavor of the toast spread.
This time there is honey yuzu cheese or apple
There is also tea-flavored spread for an additional NT$30.

The first cup of coffee can be selected based on acidity
Or start tasting according to the barista’s recommendations
After drinking, take the empty cup to the bar to exchange for another cup.
Beans on display in the window
Here are the items available for selection today

Most of the customers who arrived first chose seats at the bar.
Like to be alone or want to concentrate on chatting with friends
The table and chair area is also very nice👍

Environment⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Meals⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Service⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
All scores are perfect and couldn’t be higher😎

The official website introduces it in great detail
Friends who are interested can go directly to have a look
The best coffee experience in recent days❤️

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Jason Hsieh
Review:
Drinking coffee for so many years and visiting so many stores
If you have some basic senses, you will know
How rare and rare it is to be able to drink coffee that clearly meets the flavor description in a coffee shop
I still remember that time I happened to come across 4 different Ethiopian washes on the bean list.
I drank 3 of them, one of which has a relatively higher unit price and a richer flavor description.
After drinking the 3 bottles, you can clearly see the difference in flavor and the taste matches the description.
Jin Wan’s authenticity and pursuit of flavor are really admirable
Professional specialty coffee staff
If you want to enhance your senses, go to Queye for coffee, you won’t be disappointed

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Phoebe Liang
Review:
One of the few great coffee shops where you can clearly taste various flavors
Once you drink it, you can't go back.

You can also enjoy a variety of hand-brewed products if you go alone.
If you bring friends and family there, you can chat and discuss the flavor of coffee comfortably.

Single species change frequently, more than 100 beans a year
In addition to the single items, the special dishes and cakes are also great.
The coffee beans are strictly controlled and each one is full.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Earn S.
Review:
I've come here many times. It's not a fancy cafe and not suitable for sitting long because the shop is more of a grab-and-go spot. However, you can sit in front of the coffee bar to enjoy the peace in this small alley. I love the coffee here—good quality at a reasonable price. I also like the cute decoration with various Japanese models.

If you get a chance to come near Kunyang MRT, are not in a hurry, and want to sit and grab a good coffee, I recommend this place to slow down your life.

P.S. Please visit when the weather is nice; it will give you extra chill energy.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Dani Vitriolo
Review: It’s just the perfect depiction of a neighborhood cafe. So well designed

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Kevin Lai
Review: Great coffee in the neighborhood.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Shane Thorne
Review: Great coffee and design !!

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: pez lo

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Trâm Trần (Selena)
Review: Latte coffe is really good. The owner is friendly. Sitting outside this season is blessing

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Jeremiah Scholl
Review:
If you are looking for an out of the way tiny cafe with great coffee this is the place! I often stop in on my way to work in the morning. The owner is super nice and usually is playing chill classic jazz and whatnot in there.

The espresso coffees really are made perfect, and that’s what I drink. But they are more famous for fancy pour over coffee. So maybe check that out if you make a visit.

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Wang Review
Review: Best peanut latte i ever had!  Nice and cozy atmosphere.  Kind barista. Such a really nice place to escape from a freezing cold wind outside.

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: James Tang
Review: Stayed near the area for about a month while wife was recovering in the birthing center nearby. Clean cafe with friendly staff. Good place to people watch. I don’t understand coffee much but owner was friendly (speaks English!) and went through the different types of coffee with me until I found one that I liked. Very nice experience overall. I visited regularly during my stay and would def come back when in the country again!

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: H G
Review: Very lovely coffee shop. Stop here for a real latte!

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Johnson Chou
Review:
Arrived early and personally speaking, it was worth to wait.
Ordered hot-pressed tuna+ corn sandwich, inside has plenty of veggies, it’s good combination.
Try croissant with ham and egg, I liked sauces inside.
Finally the main character, tiramisu soufflé.  Very fluffy and well dressed ,texture and extra cookie crumbs, Perfect!  But, warmer is better.
Latte; a good choice of coffee bean, not bad.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Jonny so
Review:
Not too bad if compared to uk prices, customer service is good and shop unit is good. They sell Japanese style pancakes but this item will require pre order/ reserve.
430 ndt for 2 sandwiches with extras added and two milk teas.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: David Rotter
Review:
Amazing food and coffee in a hole-in-the-wall place in Taipei. Stupidly cheap prices and great food unfortunately lead to big crowds at times.

Highly recommend the single origin pour over coffee and their souffles!

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Layne Mostyn
Review: Nice coffee shop, but prices seem to have increased significantly within the past 3 months, judging by others' photos. Minimum order policy also applies.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: VIVIAN HO
Review: Nice cozy small space. Iced Americano is great, not acidic. Heats up croissant before serving, plus point for the service.  It’s light and fluffy, not sinful. Great for light bite.

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Justin Wang
Review: A good space near hospital to spend time. Came in in the late afternoon and not too many customers. I ordered Americano and walnut pie, and coffee is a bit light.

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: tw
Review: still not open at 9am. are your hours wrong?

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Weiann WU
Review: Clean comfy good staff

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Grace C
Review: A very relaxing, cozy place. Coffee is good!

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Jay Chang
Review: Nice, clean and quiet shop. Coffee is decent. But your mileage may vary.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Bryan JW “Bra” Chua
Review:
Minimalistic cafe serving great lattes!

The hazelnut latte was better than most cafe chains and their TGY latte was amazing.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Amanda Hu
Review: There is an offline coffee on Fushun Street next to Minquan West Road Station. Although there are not many seats, there is tea and coffee. I ordered the Shizuoka matcha latte, which was thoughtfully made sugar-free. Very large cup, hot enough, rich matcha, price 85 yuan. In Taipei, I am really surprised by the good quality and good price! ! I hope the store's business will be prosperous. Will visit again when I'm nearby. Highly recommended.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: アリクス
Review: I was waiting for a friend at the nearby metro when it suddenly started raining and I found this coffee shop.I immediately went in and had an iced coffee latte.It was delicious.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: summary0628
Review:
Pei Guo is so delicious!
Fluffy and crunchy! Awesome!

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Neo Kung
Review:
Beautifully decorated coffee shop!
Coffee latte is rich and delicious

If there is no invoice, a blank receipt will be given.
It is better to write it for the customer!

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Chiara
Review: super cute and cozy cafe with natural light and great working environment. Staff was super friendly and attentive

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Rachel Wallace
Review: Such a cute little place! Nuki cafe’s environment is so relaxed, perfect place to study or meet a friend for coffee. The lower level is more noisy than the upper level, so if your looking to enjoy the ambience and work upstairs is probably better. Food was tasty, and their green tea lemonade was so refreshing! Very unique. Also loved how cute all the dishes were. A bit on the spendier side, but worth it for the experience.

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Nikita Eden
Review: I love this place!! It’s such a chill vibe and has really nice relaxing music. It’s perfect for studying and the drinks are so good! there’s an upstairs with lots of extra seating, and some outlets if you need to charge devices. Bonus points for the cute kitties!

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Rémi Thorel
Review: Really cute café with a lot of seats and plugs. Coffee is really good and not too expensive. Big plus for the playlist, they had all the songs I love. Only minus is that there’s no wifi inside.

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Tzi Ling Chew
Review:
🍓CP value: Requires minimum purchase of one drink (it’s not cheap).
🍓Lovely ambience and dessert.
🍓 Service: Downside is that I wished the services were slightly warmer towards a newcomer; it doesn’t have that mom and pop friendly  vibe but that’s not necessarily a bad thing if all you’re looking for is a place to study.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Pno Ens
Review: Passing by this restaurant for so many times, I finally went in for the first time! What a surprising experience! The servers we’re all very prompt and courteous. The contemporary Japanese dishes were delicious and pleasant to enjoy! Will come again very soon 🔜. Highly recommended!

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Alpha Chen
Review: A typical Japanese Cafe chain restaurant. The meat sauce spaghetti tastes delicious. The meat sauce is a mix of pork and beef. The bread is soft and tasty. It’s a good restaurant for simple meal with coffee.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Jessica Kan
Review: The fried pumpkin cookies were really yummy and the salad dressing was amazing. The vibe in the restaurant was also really good, I really enjoyed it.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Eric C
Review:
Visited this place few days ago. Still in its soft opening period and certainly still need some improvement. Ordered the typical breakfast.
1. Did not asked us the option for butter or jelly.
2.  Brought us the wrong toast, but was quickly corrected.
3. Table for two tend to be a bit tight.
4. Free Wi-Fi available.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Jeff Tan
Review:
Went here for a Saturday lunch, felt they were a bit understaffed.
Food itself was OK, portion size was decent, may be slightly on the expensive side for what it's worth.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Kate Shao
Review: Great coffee shop with cozy atmosphere. Awesome and impressive interior design. There were only three tables available but I just wait about 30 minutes on weekends. You can take away at the beautiful park nearby. I ordered blend of light hot Americano and it was nice but nothing special. The red bean cake was sickly sweet. Attentive staffs and reasonable price.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Came in Sunday morning. The people who taking photos are a bit annoying for people who just want to enjoy coffee.  Ordered brand of Shadow iced Americano which is a bit light for city roast. Be watch out if you ordered to go cannot sit exterior.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Elisabeth M
Review: Obsessed with their cold brew with cream! Love the aesthetic and pastry options here

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Sean Lin
Review: Multiple different flavors of coffee to choose. Not many seats, recommend to take away. It’s a nice grab-and-go coffee place nearby beautiful park.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Chi-Pei Tseng
Review: I got an iced oat latte and it was really good. You get a choice of the type of coffee bean you would like them to use. The vibe inside is also nice, but there are only 3 tables available and they are usually always taken. However there are nice parks nearby to take your coffee to. The baristas were super nice as well :)

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Annie Lima
Review:
Food: **** (I had the beef panini. It was okay. Nothing to write home about.)
Drinks: ***** (I had the mango passion fruit tea. It came warm and was delicious. It hit the spot on this cold, rainy day.)
Prices: *****
Variety of Menu Options Available: ***** As long as you only want carbs, there’s plenty of variety. It’s all cakes, croissants, paninis, bagels, danish toast, etc.
Variety of Non-Coffee Drink Options: **** There are several teas and some (noncaffeinated) fruit teas
English Menu? yes
Wi-Fi/Charging Ports Available? No! No outlets, either!
Pleasant Environment/Comfortable to Write In: *** It’s small, without a lot of seating options. The tables are a little awkward for computer use.
Customer Service: ****
Hours: 7 a.m. - 10 p.m. daily
What was the Restroom Like? They have no restroom! When I asked, they directed me to the 7-Eleven next door.

#CafeQuestLinkou

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Rolf Chen
Review:
20240810 first release:
Cooler bag provided with first purchase
Second purchase due to using 15% discount coupon
No cold storage bags are provided, so this fictitious event is recommended to be cancelled.
Bad experience from a repurchasing customer who bought three cakes in one week😅

The store manager is too entangled and persistent. It’s a pity. With such a good brand and coffee drinking environment, I hope the event can be optimized and adjusted to make people willing to repurchase such a great Yujin coffee shop~

20240811-Updated reply to industry information
It's really ridiculous that you want to control someone even if they give you one star. It seems that there are no 0.1 stars to give. It's really a pity.

The service of the female clerk in the evening on 8/8th was so good.
Why was the male store manager in the afternoon on 8/10 so funny?
It seems that this store can no longer be supported~

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Anna Chiang
Review: The space is not big, the seating arrangement is a bit messy, the cakes are ordinary, and the drinks are okay.

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: ⁎ S m A r T ⁎
Review:
If you buy bread, they will help you bake it. It will be delicious and you can eat it hot right away, which is a bonus.
But the raw milk Mont Blanc ordered that day was not that good. It tasted dry, with distinct grains (?), and the chocolate flavor was not noticeable. If you eat it with your eyes closed, you really don’t know what you are eating.

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Landy Hung
Review:
An affordable coffee shop with rich and delicious coffee, and cakes that are top notch among affordable chain stores.
It’s a small store but it’s exquisite and comfortable. You can come here again.

Name: El Nativo coffee
Author: Joanne Lee
Review: New waffle flavor, delicious. The coffee is smooth and has great flavor.

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Kevin Lin
Review:
I don’t know when this coffee shop opened on the top floor of the office. Come to the 7-11 on the 24th floor and stop by to taste the coffee.
Asang, who was cleaning up when he left, asked me, doesn’t your company already have coffee☕️? The black man's face looks like a question mark... You can tell if the company's coffee is good or not. "If there is always no one in front of the coffee machine, do you think it will be a fragrant coffee?"
In addition, you need to have the access control card of this building to enter and exit. Except for employees, you are visitors before you can reach the 24th floor.

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: YC
Review: I ordered a sparkling drink that cost nearly 100 yuan and was told that the sweetness could not be adjusted. I originally thought it was adjusted with boiled jam, but it turned out that "a lot of fructose syrup" was squeezed directly into it! I was told again not to squeeze in so much fructose, but the service staff also said that it was the boss's rule that no adjustments could be made!

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: CC Jin
Review: I ordered 8 cups of coffee on the morning of 6/14 and told the clerk that I would rush to deliver it to the conference room. The next customer ordered 1 cup. Then the clerk slowly made the coffee and gave it to the next customer before starting. My coffee was served too slowly, and I gave it to the next person first in front of the guests. This was not a good response.

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Candice Hui
Review: You should explain on Google that only employees of the commercial building can enter and use it, so that people will go there and waste time :(

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Lotus Huang
Review: The coffee is delicious and the landlady is attentive

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Ong C
Review: Small and cosy coffee roaster cafe in Keelung harbour town. They have few type of good local coffee available.

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Rayane Enaya FADEL
Review:
Very warm and friendly staff.
The coffee is excellent and inexpensive. It's a cosy little place to relax and enjoy a drink.
I highly recommend it if you're passing through.

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Jed
Review:
Friendly service, excellent coffee and a very chilled place to sit and savour. The shop is nestled in a lovely little alleyway. We visited twice during our short stay in Keelung. The owner also has a cute cat which made for a fun photo from outside :)

We've been travelling around East Asia for a few months now and still think this is the best coffee we've had!

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Jake Cherry
Review: I’ve been traveling around for a little over a year, and finding the great coffee shops where ever I can. This is certainly one of them! A small batch roaster in the heart of Keelung. What a pleasure to find this little unexpected gem. 5 stars guys 🙏

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Stephen Mann
Review: Open earlier than other cafes. Good coffee.

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Dave
Review: Serious Coffee is a one man show run by a gentleman who is serious about his coffee and makes seriously exceptional coffee. At the same time, he is friendly and approachable and happy to share his deep knowledge of coffee. The espresso that he makes is stunning. The ambience is warm and relaxed. It is a perfect place for a chat, or to sit and read. On a hot day, try his Sicily coffee (espresso, soda water, a little syrup and citrus). It is much more textured and balanced than many others around the city (showcasing the quality of his roasting and his skill at pulling shots).

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Dharius Robinson
Review:
Very calm and relaxing place.
The barista is super helpful and passionate about his work and was happy to help and recommend certain beans etc... Even gave an extra portion of cold brew coffee as he said he wasn't satisfied with how the first one turned out (both tasted great to me though!)

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Tony 24p Yeh
Review: Great place for pour-over and expresso coffee. Nice hang-out spot to coffee enthusiasts. Limited items on the menu. This shop roasts it own beans.

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Rebecca Zhang
Review: Coffee is decent for a quick takeaway. The coffee-to-go price is cheaper. Wouldnt say it's impressive, but fair for the price and the area. Haven't tried their pour over coffee

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Arthur Chen
Review: This place is run by 2 young men with passion for coffee. If you are serious about your pullover coffee, this is a great place to come.

Name: MKCR / Mountain Kids Coffee Roaster 山小孩咖啡
Author: Marc Faucher
Review: Coffee shop around the corner from Citizen M hotel. Ordered a brown sugar lced latte and an orange cake pastry. Both are excellent indulgences. Unfortunately there is an active restoration obscuring the view of the North Gate.

Name: MKCR / Mountain Kids Coffee Roaster 山小孩咖啡
Author: Mei D
Review:
Cute coffee shop beside Taipei North Gate (ChengEn Gate).
Lots of single origin options for pour over. Wide selection of desserts, ordered the apple cinnamon cheesecake. Coffees were good, cheesecake was just okay, beautifully presented though.
More seating available at second floor.
I appreciate the fact that they are open until 10pm as most coffee shops in the vicinity close early.

Name: MKCR / Mountain Kids Coffee Roaster 山小孩咖啡
Author: Marcus Fong
Review:
Located nearby many hotels and the Taipei Main Station. Ordered the Osmanthus Latte and while the flavour was alright, it had too much milk.

So I'd recommend you to get the regular latte or black coffee as the barista is award winning.

Name: MKCR / Mountain Kids Coffee Roaster 山小孩咖啡
Author: Dee Jay
Review: Found cute little cafe right next to Citizen M hotel! They have different specialty pastries and authentic coffee and tea. Ordered iced osmanthus latte, citrus early grey cake and brown sugar cinnamon roll. Love their Osmanthos latte and Citrus earl grey cake 😍 They have cute sitting area upstairs and some view 🩷

Name: MKCR / Mountain Kids Coffee Roaster 山小孩咖啡
Author: Sza
Review: Cool place, Hochicha OK, small glass take away. Madeline just simple homemade product, vanilla taste is nothing special

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Cris L
Review: Super cute cafe with spacious 2 floors for lots of seats! Great selection of salad, soup, drinks and bread. Great place to just chill! Would highly recommend checking it out

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Dru Lu
Review:
It’s nice to finally find a proper bakery in the area that also have plenty of space for dine in. The space is neutral tone and comfortable, with additional seatings upstairs.

Their cream fruitcake is delicate but dense, and very light on the sugar compared to the traditional ones from 紅葉. The tiramisu on the other hand have a similar profile to what you would expect elsewhere.

If you don’t find the cake you want on display, the staff can check for you in the back. Great service~

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Jimmy Jih
Review:
Freshly baked goods with good coffee and a clean large interior space.
Really enjoyed the lemon cream cheese bun and their take on the cinnamon roll (it's got bits of apple)!
There is no table service here. You'll need to put away your dishes after you are done.
Two floors but no escalator.
Electrical outlets, music is not too loud (a bit trebly; could use some equalization but that's just personal taste :P)
Looking forward to trying their other pastry offerings.

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: 柯亞緹
Review: The cream of the strawberry chiffon is fascinating—not cloying, but sweet with a hint of saltiness, like a taste of sea salt. If you are a lover of milk cap tea and prefer salty rather than sweet, this cake might be your type.

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Anna Baatz
Review:
Newly opened, nice atmosphere, very friendly owners and staff~ counter staff guys so good looking and chill ;)
The kind of place you can stay for at a while and relax/work! Personal menu favorites  are the croissant ham and cheese sandwich with house made almond butter (!!!!! So good!! Which you can also purchase from them in packaged glass jars!) and their vegetable sandwich  with housemade cashew butter (both 90ntd!). Vanilla latte (140) uses real vanilla pod syrup and is solid! Lemon tart super tart flavored, not too sweet and delicious ~ The rose and cheese cream bread is yummy, and the green onion bread has a super fresh strong garlic flavor. Seems like more products will be developed~ excited to keep coming back and try new things:D

Now with expanded drinks menu~ fresh cream and fruit cake also refreshingly light and fluffy!

Name: 琢磨咖啡 coffee 永樂店 2F
Author: Cassia Attard
Review:
Really vibey spot! It’s a bit expensive (over $100 for a coffee) but it’s really nice. They have lots of natural light, comfy seats, and lots of table space.
Their matcha latte and americano were both good. They came with a little cookie! They also have bubble tea/boba.
They have a lot of outlets which I really appreciate.

Name: 琢磨咖啡 coffee 永樂店 2F
Author: Cris L
Review: Extremely nice and air conditioned cafe to chill at on a hot day. The servers are extremely nice. The space is roomy for both guests who want to relax or work. Would recommend!

Name: 琢磨咖啡 coffee 永樂店 2F
Author: Raymond Shu
Review: Very nice coffee shop among the old streets of western Taipei. Plenty of seating, with good light by the window. Coffee is good, but be aware of slow service— siphon coffee took 15 min and mine was the only order at that time.

Name: 琢磨咖啡 coffee 永樂店 2F
Author: Jasmine Henry
Review: very cute spot with really good coffee and vibe. lots of chargers available

Name: 琢磨咖啡 coffee 永樂店 2F
Author: Finn Gonschior
Review:
Amazing Cold Brew coffee. Nice atmosphere and a very friendly and knowledgeable staff.

They also offer delicious syphon coffee from Taiwan.

Name: 咖啡·重開機｜Coffee Reboot Roaster
Author: Zaa10
Review: Best coffee in town. Fantastic big cup of Cappuccino good taste good service..

Name: 咖啡·重開機｜Coffee Reboot Roaster
Author: Kevin Kao
Review: Cute coffee shop tucked away ~10 minutes walk from Jianzicui MRT station. There's some indoor and outdoor bar seating. Lots of single origin coffee options, and they have a special option for multiple smaller cups of coffee if you want to try different beans and compare. I got two single origin pourovers with fruity notes and could really smell and taste the difference. Overall, a cool place to check out if you're into coffee!

Name: 咖啡·重開機｜Coffee Reboot Roaster
Author: Fio Lei
Review:
It’s a rainy day yet vibing in this coffee shop made my day. Would have spend a long time if I could.

Both fruity and nutty americano were amazing. Would definitely come back again, until next time!

Name: 咖啡·重開機｜Coffee Reboot Roaster
Author: 李慧廷（大寶）
Review:
Good morning
Good coffee

Name: 咖啡·重開機｜Coffee Reboot Roaster
Author: chou_min周淑珉
Review:
Accompanied by my daughter, my husband and I went here to drink coffee and ordered 3 coffees, coli, and cinnamon rolls. The first time I sat outside the small tube window to dine, the weather was very hot.
There are a few scattered seats inside. Maybe it was not designed to be used inside, so there are very few seats.
What's puzzling is that the second time I took my friends there, only two of us could use it inside. It was really hot outside.
Surprisingly, a regular customer can occupy two seats. My friends and I could only sit in the bench area and in the aisle.
In the middle of the meal, when the clerk takes out the trash, delivers coffee, or passes by, my friends and I have to move our positions to let them pass by, that is, stand up and let them pass.
There are two seats next to the bar. The boyfriend left his girlfriend first and also occupied two seats. Another regular customer is still sitting in a two-person seat, which was noticed last time.
When we finished our meal and told the store before closing time, the lady had a bad look on her face. Our store is so small and there are not enough seats.
I responded to her: "Boss, can't you arrange for the two guests to sit together so that we can have a more comfortable seat?"
We also go to the store to consume, why do we have to be so aggrieved? "
The lady's answer was wonderful: "I'm just a wage earner, not a boss! You can coordinate with the guests by yourself! Can you just ask them to sit together?"
I really feel like I’m spending money and getting pissed off.
No matter how delicious and affordable your food is, I am not willing to give you 4 stars.
Her attitude is obvious. There are so many customers in the store, and you are one of them! What are you talking about here?
What a disappointment, very unfriendly coffee shop staff.
Maybe the boss should talk to her.

Name: yokoso coffee stand
Author: Seonyoung Yang
Review:
This is a friendly neighborhood cafe where you can grab a cup of coffee and do little chitchat with a coffee maker.

Though, the coffee I ordered, a single origin isn't that good... I think it's robusta, or I misunderstood I was going to get V60. Nonetheless, not a bad place to sit and sip some coffee in the morning.

I like their cheeky atmosphere. Japanese-vibed, but do mostly Italian-espresso style brewing.

Name: yokoso coffee stand
Author: Terry Lee Hornsby
Review: Enjoyed an iced single origin coffee. Delicious flavor. A cozy but groovy atmosphere. I love groovy atmospheres. Will be back weekly because I workout at KX Pilates nearby.

Name: yokoso coffee stand
Author: LP Lee
Review: Grab and go coffee stand. Cozy cafe with unique display. Indoor seating place may host about 8pax.

Name: yokoso coffee stand
Author: Stephanie Yu
Review: Comfy environment and affordable cafe

Name: yokoso coffee stand
Author: Nadia Hsieh
Review: I was once here getting a coffee and impressed by the taste, and the service. It's why I usually recommend my friend to grab coffee here. I took my friends here to get coffees and dine-in today. One of the staff pulled hard while I gave him the cash, and put my order down hard on the table. When we left, the other staff glared at me.

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: NUTCHALI NAMCHAIBORISUT
Review: highly recommend an awesome taste of mulberry milk.The cafe interior and highly atmosphere is so great.I would like to suggest everybody to visit best place to chill out with friends and even with family. Excellent service and a  good working space spot

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Vassili B.
Review: Lovely little café to either sit quietly inside or enjoy the comfortable and big terrace. The coffee and toasts taste great and the banana bread was delicious!

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Paul Lo
Review: Only tried their hand crafted coffee and cinnamon rolls via Ubereats, great coffees and cakes, I can feel the focus and dedication they put into making the coffees, even from the delivery, I can only imagine even more amazing experience being there in the shop.

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Taro Sakurai
Review: Here was nice. Owner was nice and interior was cute. I saw hand drip equipment but I did not see the hand drip coffee on a menu so if they have hand drip coffee, I would like to try it next time. Try it ;)

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Laura Hsiao
Review: I highly recommend everyone comes here having drinks here!!! We enjoyed our time in this cafe. Nice decoration and atmosphere!

Name: 青森咖啡自烘店 Forest Coffee Roaster
Author: maleerat panteepo (Miki)
Review:
I stumbled upon Forest Coffee Roaster by chance after finishing breakfast across the street! This cozy coffee shop has been open for over two years, and the owner is very friendly, offering excellent recommendations on coffee beans and roast types to suit your taste.

The highlight here is their single-origin pour-over coffees, perfect for fans of unique flavor profiles. They roast their own beans and often feature a rotating selection, primarily from Central and South America and Africa. Their specialty lattes, like matcha or rose, are also popular for their balanced flavors. I usually go for a regular latte with oat milk, which is smooth and satisfying.

Today, I decided to try a pour-over made from Papua New Guinea Western Highlands beans, a medium roast. The notes were nutty and chocolaty with a hint of light, sweet caramel, plus a subtle floral fragrance—absolutely delightful!

If you’re craving a snack, they offer homemade treats like cheesecakes, milk puddings, and brownies in flavors like hojicha, matcha, and classic original. I tried the hojicha milk pudding and the original cheesecake—both were cute, delicious, and paired perfectly with my coffee.

The shop has a cozy seating area with a sofa corner and a bar with high stools, ideal for relaxing. It can get a bit warm during coffee roasting times, but the vibe is welcoming. They’re English-friendly, offer milk alternatives, and accept both cash and credit card.

Name: 青森咖啡自烘店 Forest Coffee Roaster
Author: David Schainker
Review: I wish this place screamed "Great Coffee Here!" instead of whispering it. I must have passed by a dozen times before stumbling in. The coffee? Excellent for the price! The barista? As reliable as your morning alarm clock. Plus, they let you be the boss of your drink's sweetness.

Name: 青森咖啡自烘店 Forest Coffee Roaster
Author: Nink Sirimongkol
Review:
One of my favourite cafes, not only because it is close to my house, but also because of their wonderful matcha drinks and desserts at a reasonable price🍵🍮💖 And here is a great calm place where I can escaping from other noisy places and work/read books peacefully.

The staff is always kind and provides great service.  I'm constantly grateful for that.🥺🤍

Name: 青森咖啡自烘店 Forest Coffee Roaster
Author: Alan Hellawell
Review: Very nice “hole-in-the-wall” café. Reasonable prices. The milk in the hot Cap was not awesome, but it’s otherwise a nice place to hang out when strolling along 新生南路.

Name: 青森咖啡自烘店 Forest Coffee Roaster
Author: Michael Greenberg
Review: A cute hole in the wall cafe serving all sorts of coffee options. Great for a stop in!

Name: Mimosa Coffee Tea 板橋三民店
Author: Mark Chou
Review: Good coffee

Name: Mimosa Coffee Tea 板橋三民店
Author: Jiang Xuan
Review:
There are seats in the smoking area at the entrance of the store. There is space for indoor use, WiFi and toilets are available, and the clerk is polite.
I ordered a cup of hand-brewed black coffee. It was a big cup, not expensive, and had a strong taste. I could drink it for a while.
There should be no one around at noon on weekdays, so the store staff allows customers to bring outside food for internal use. One group of customers brought something like dry noodles and soup noodles to eat inside, and the air was mixed with the oily smell of Chinese food.
The store is very energy-saving. When the outdoor temperature was 34 degrees, the store clerk said it was not hot, so he did not actively turn on the air conditioner. He only turned on a small electric fan until the customer who just came in asked if he could turn on the air conditioner.
If you want to come to this store to experience the atmosphere of a coffee shop, you may not meet your expectations. It is suitable for customers who want to sit and relax for a while and stay for a short time.
Willingness to return: low, takeout at best.

Name: Mimosa Coffee Tea 板橋三民店
Author: 阿瑞斯
Review:
The boss is very kind and has a great attitude🥰
I like to come to the store in the morning and have a light snack to start a good day!

Name: Mimosa Coffee Tea 板橋三民店
Author: Allen Liu
Review:
You can drink such high-quality single-origin hand-brewed coffee at this price. The large capacity of the large cup is very large, and it is very value for money!
Apple cinnamon toast and single-origin coffee go great together!
