The clerk is professional and enthusiastic in introducing coffee types and degrees!
The decoration in the store is very thoughtful and it is very relaxing in the store!
It's a pity that it's a bit far from my home. I came here for work.
Otherwise, I would definitely come every day!

Name: Mimosa Coffee Tea 板橋三民店
Author: Chanel Wu
Review:
This is a very special store. They also sell pizza on the second floor. The coffee is super delicious. I drank the osmanthus-stuffed latte today. The scent of osmanthus combined with the smell of coffee is quite unique. The price is also very reasonable. I recommend it to everyone!
If you come to Banqiao, you must try it. The proprietress is friendly and the waiters are also very friendly!

I ordered a peanut bagel today🥯, but after finishing eating I realized that I didn’t take any photos!

If you want to have a gathering with a large number of people, you can choose the pizza shop on the second floor.
There is space for 30 people inside, where you can enjoy pizza and get together with friends.
The space upstairs is very comfortable and the environment is very clean and hygienic. There is no smell of oily smoke, only the smell of fragrant food😍

Name: Xing Fu Tang Flagship
Author: Edward Lau
Review:
This being the flag ship store, we had to check it out.  Unlike other franchises that I've visited, they only offer three drinks (brown sugar milk, green tea, or black tea).

The brown sugar milk was unique and better than others. Even the pearls were fresher and chewier than other stores that I've visited.

There was a bit of a line but it moved quickly which is good because it was raining when we ordered. There's no place to sit either so you grab your drink and go.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Flagship
Author: Cassia Attard
Review:
The boba is really good. They’re big and chewy and hot and fresh. It’s a very creamy drink. Almost like a thing milkshake.
The chicken is also really good, but not like life changing. But it’s really good.
The line moves FAST. We had our food within 3-4 minutes. Very efficient system.
Chicken and a drink for $200.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Flagship
Author: destiny sisior
Review: The service was phenomenal. They were thorough; and every drink they made was up to par and by far the tastiest I’ve ever had in Taiwan. Nothing can compare to the freshness of the boba pearls, the warmth and fluffiness of the milk cap, and the intricate design of the torch on brown sugar. With the superior customer service and the product itself, I give an easy 10/10. We were also given stickers which really made me feel like I got my money’s worth.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Flagship
Author: Regina Kluchevskaia
Review:
Honestly, when I first saw the line I thought, "There's no it's THAT good", and then, I got in said line (which went by super fast) , and got my drink with almost no wait.

I will go so far as to say that this is probably the BEST boba I have ever had. It's flavorful, and had some kinda of sugar crystals in them maybe? (which you typically don't ever get, because the tapioca boba ball itself is not flavored with anything, and is usually bland!) SUPER soft. The topping was a foam,  as well as a giant scoop of Brown sugar, which is then torched.🤩 🧋

It is in the Ximending Walking District on the corner of one of the buildings, it is outside, but does have a roof over the front section.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Flagship
Author: Happy A
Review:
The milk tea that made me rethink.

At first I thought it was just overhyped milk tea so we tried ordering it. The line was very long everytime but it was constantly moving so we didn’t mind.

Once you order they let you pick a stick representing a number and then they give out a luck paper for you which I thought was cute.

They also have clear glass so you can see how the boba is being made and also your drinks.

I am not a huge fan of boba but this one is for the books. I really loved it. My friends also order it once a day for many days on our trip there.

Name: 茶山小_TEASSENTIAL（和平總店）大安必喝飲料|飲料推薦|外送飲料|水果飲品|人氣茶飲|奶蓋首選|熱門飲料|蛋蜜汁
Author: Krittaphat Phanglib
Review: The tea is so good. You can tell that the owner is passionate about Tea. But i was not satisfied with the service today tho. I was waiting in line  and there were two middle aged couples in the store who were chatting with the owner. I was waiting there, the owner just chatted and made the sample to those two ignoring me. I know he is a good person but please prioritize other customers needs not show too much favouritism to other customers. But definitely come back and hope for better service. Thanks , i love your tea ❤️

Name: 茶山小_TEASSENTIAL（和平總店）大安必喝飲料|飲料推薦|外送飲料|水果飲品|人氣茶飲|奶蓋首選|熱門飲料|蛋蜜汁
Author: Grace
Review:
Visited on a Monday afternoon and it was not that crowded.
Located near to the train station.
Variety of options to choose from.

Name: 茶山小_TEASSENTIAL（和平總店）大安必喝飲料|飲料推薦|外送飲料|水果飲品|人氣茶飲|奶蓋首選|熱門飲料|蛋蜜汁
Author: John B.
Review: This shop has nice wood based decorations and a small area to sit down and relax if you have time. The menu is quite broad with lots of options. The boss is cheerful and gave me excellent service. I’m looking forward to going back again.

Name: 茶山小_TEASSENTIAL（和平總店）大安必喝飲料|飲料推薦|外送飲料|水果飲品|人氣茶飲|奶蓋首選|熱門飲料|蛋蜜汁
Author: s lee
Review: If you like fruity tea …… try their off menu fruity tea 90 NT but is worth it.

Name: 茶山小_TEASSENTIAL（和平總店）大安必喝飲料|飲料推薦|外送飲料|水果飲品|人氣茶飲|奶蓋首選|熱門飲料|蛋蜜汁
Author: Sheena Fang
Review: Very decent rose Tieguanyin tea with cheese cream on top. The cheese cream’s got a unique toffee taste and goes really well with the sugar free tea. Cozy place with seats inside. High recommended and would definitely come back again!

Name: 天仁茗茶 西門店
Author: B. Razote
Review:
Best milk tea I’ve had in Taipei!

Actually, I was able to try TenRen back when I was living in the Philippines, but as far as I know due to corona all of the stores had to close down. Great thing I was able to have this tea again after so so long!

Still taste the same tea I used to love back then. Aside from 913 Oolong MT, I’ve tried the Dark Oolong MT, Puerh MT, and Orange Four Seasons Fruit Tea and everything was delicious! Would definitely go back for more before my vacation ends.

Name: 天仁茗茶 西門店
Author: Dutchmew MS
Review: I just walked past this place when I travelled in Ximending. I saw there are many people in queue line, so I made decision to try. I ordered the recommended menu randomly as some rosette tea and I felt it like as lime tea but more being delicious. The taste and smell is toooooooo glad! I was surprised on this tea experience.❤️

Name: 天仁茗茶 西門店
Author: Rafa Loves Travel
Review:
Still one of the best milk teas that you can actually taste the tea.

Order by the outside and option to wait either outside or inside the shop. Pick up inside.

Name: 天仁茗茶 西門店
Author: siena mira
Review: this place does not show on the map, but it was near my accommodation. i randomly stopped for the iron buddha oolong ice cream on a hot evening and it was amazing! the next day i saw a long queue and joined immediately. i ordered the dark oolong milk tea and it was so good!! i went again today and got 913 king’s oolong milk tea, which is also delicious. you can taste the uniqueness of the tea brew ~ i highly recommend👍👍

Name: 天仁茗茶 西門店
Author: Justin Liu
Review: Quality is always excellent and the service is very warm and friendly. I get a drink here several times a week. My favorite is the taro green tea drink. Ten Ren is the BEST!

Name: 春山茶水舖
Author: sunrainsky
Review:
I ordered the milk tea with mini pearls.
I usually opt for 30% sugar back in my home country but I think it's a mistake here. It needs a bit more sugar to bring out the taste.

The mini pearls were just ready when I reached the shop at about 8.25am Saturday.

However, the pearls had no taste. Felt like they were just boiled to cook without any sugar or flavouring. Coupled that with my wrong choice of sugar level, the taste is pretty bland.

I'm not writing it off. Maybe I'll try again next time if I'm back at Taipei.

Name: 春山茶水舖
Author: Best Foodie
Review:
Super delicate milk tea with good quality of tea, much better than other franchise brands
However the bubbles are way too small
So you can’t even chew it. Instead, you could just swallow it, which is so bad for stomach

Name: 春山茶水舖
Author: Jeremy Vo
Review: Good tea, bubbles are tiny and unique. There’s better out there but this is a great choice still.

Name: 春山茶水舖
Author: Chlotus
Review:
The business hours are quite different from generally tea shops, check the time before visiting.

I got their classic black tea with fresh milk. That was a strong one, though I prefer milky tea, but you can taste the quality of the tea is very good.

I’ve been trying many tea shops, usually you get size medium (500ml) for around NT$45-NT$55, if with fresh milk.
I was surprised got a large (700ml) milk tea for NT$55.

Name: 春山茶水舖
Author: theyamamama C
Review: Reasonable priced quality tea. The mini pearls amazed me. Just delicious. Was so sad they closed on a Sunday and that was the last day of my trip in Taiwan. Totally regret I didn't find this place earlier. Definitely will have to visit again next time I go 😇

Name: 魚池貳壹-西門店
Author: Alwin Goh
Review: Perfect milk tea for a typical day in taipei. Lots of unique pearl available. I chose the dragonfruit milk tea as it was unique, and I'm glad that I went with that choice.

Name: 魚池貳壹-西門店
Author: Phuong Mai Nguyen
Review: Must try boba milk tea shop when visiting Taiwan. Affordable yet tastes very good. The milk tea is not too sweet. First time I tried the dragon fruit pearl, it was chewy and nice 😁

Name: 魚池貳壹-西門店
Author: Andrew Ramirez
Review: The bubble is decent but the milk tea is great. Once again here in Taiwan I found really good milk tea that doesn’t give me bloating.

Name: 魚池貳壹-西門店
Author: Just Human
Review: Gets very busy at times since there is one staff most of the time but it is right next to a souvenir shop so you can order your drink then slowly browse the souvenirs. Just be patient. The drinks are good. Hence why people are buying it.

Name: 魚池貳壹-西門店
Author: E C
Review: This bubble tea shop is known for its hand made tapioca. And, it also has a few different flavoured tapioca, including the most common brown sugar one, mocha, fruit flavours, and more. However, every time I visited here, I could not buy what I really wanted. Anyways, its tapioca is chewy and not too sweet.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 陳貴順
Review: I often buy Green Tea from this shop, so many days i just realize that every day is new taste, although i just only drink green tea with same sweetness levels, but a day is too bitter, another day is too sweet, another i couldnt find tea's smell where it is, almost is water 😱 Moreover, unlabels on tea cup.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 辜柏耘
Review: A chain tea shop provides various tea drink.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 讓你看不可能
Review:
A middle-aged male clerk is super bad
The needle kept jumping and we didn’t have any boba, so I asked for big pearls. The needle kept jumping and finally I said, oh, the pearls are sold out.
Ah, wouldn’t you have told me earlier that if you don’t want to do business, just get out of here?
It’s really bad for the boss to hire someone like you.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 昕熊
Review: The attitude was so bad, the customer looked impatient and disdainful when ordering drinks, the store made a mistake and blamed the customer for insisting on paying the bill!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: KEVIN Ng
Review:
In order to save costs, ice cubes and water are added to make the drink tasteless.
Click to remove the ice and sugar, and it will become slightly iced and sugar-free.

Name: Oolong Tea Project - Da'an
Address: No. 39, Lane 107, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: warat niamsa-ing
Review: Delicious oolong tea

Name: 天仁茗茶 中山店
Address: No. 11號, Lane 105, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Alan Liu
Review: Ordered Black tea with pearls.  Wait was ok as ordered mid afternoon.  Able to order sugar and ice level with no change in price.  Drink tasted ok.

Name: 天仁茗茶 中山店
Address: No. 11號, Lane 105, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Jeffrey Lau
Review: Nice bubble milk tea, but need 15 mins wait.

Name: 天仁茗茶 中山店
Address: No. 11號, Lane 105, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: o t
Review: Good black tea latte with pearls to go.

Name: 天仁茗茶 中山店
Address: No. 11號, Lane 105, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Tina Wang
Review: I bought 931 Tea King today, it’s pretty good, slightly sweet and just right. On weekdays at 4pm on Thursdays, the eco-friendly cups are discounted by 5 yuan. Thanks

Name: 天仁茗茶 中山店
Address: No. 11號, Lane 105, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: 小喵喵
Review:
Ordered the most popular pearl milk tea (hot), 3 cents sugar.
It doesn't taste like tea, and the pearls aren't quite good enough. It can only be said to be very ordinary.
Compared with similar beverage stores, the prices are relatively high.
The chance of revisiting may be low.

Name: 天仁茗茶 永康店
Author: Rina Feast (That’s How We Feast)
Review: Tenren (天仁茗茶 永康店) is a popular local chain known for its exceptional tea, and their bubble tea is amazing! They only use freshly prepared bubbles made within 2 hours, and even as someone who’s not usually keen on bubble tea, I absolutely loved it. You can customize your drink by choosing the sugar and ice levels, which is a nice touch. It would be even better if they offered more milk options besides cow’s milk, but overall, it's a fantastic experience for tea lovers!

Name: 天仁茗茶 永康店
Author: Cat
Review: My fav place to order green milk bubble tea

Name: 天仁茗茶 永康店
Author: E VIP
Review: The lady at the counter was very rude, the attitude of the staffs will ruin your day, the mediocre food is too pricey and they require every person to order otherwise you cannot seat, you'll only have 1 hour max to dine and have to leave immediately

Name: 天仁茗茶 永康店
Author: Tina Chung
Review: I love this company’s tea. They are very professional in producing good quality tea with reasonable price.

Name: 天仁茗茶 永康店
Author: La Gaviota Azul
Review: great authentic taiwanese bubble tea!

Name: Ten Ren's Tea
Address: No. 26之2號, Section 1, Minsheng E Rd
Author: AMSK Art
Review: good

Name: Ten Ren's Tea
Address: No. 26之2號, Section 1, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Lancelot H
Review: After seeing 3 stars, I was hesitant to go to another store, but the clerk was very polite, unlike what the reviews said. 913 also cooks delicious food. Five stars for blood replenishment.

Name: Ten Ren's Tea
Address: No. 26之2號, Section 1, Minsheng E Rd
Author: kiki Cheng
Review: I finally got in line and was told that the screenshot Momo roll company stipulates that you cannot use an older woman and a tall and strong boy. However, I have bought many stores, and yours is the only one that does not allow them to use the screenshot roll. I would like to ask you, please. Store, what difference does it make to you if you scan the screenshots! This company's service attitude and ability to handle things need to be improved! Very bad👎

Name: Ten Ren's Tea
Address: No. 26之2號, Section 1, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Cindy Lin
Review: I went to the store for shopping at about 11:15. Shopkeeper A was preparing ingredients, so I waited for a while before ordering a drink. After ordering, shopkeeper A told me that the pearls were not ready yet and I had to wait for another 10 minutes. I didn’t understand why it wasn’t open at 9:30. pearl? I went there again at about 11:30, and clerk B was chatting and laughing with other customers. After I took the number slip, he immediately said with a straight face: The pearls have just been cooked, wait a minute, and then he forcefully placed two drinks on the counter. It says: These two cups are yours. It was the first time I encountered this kind of attitude. Other branches would also say that if you are not used to drinking, you can adjust it or something. What left me speechless the most was that after I finished drinking, I tore off the sealing film and prepared to clean it, and found that there was an ant at the bottom of the cup... I didn’t Know what to say.

Name: Ten Ren's Tea
Address: No. 26之2號, Section 1, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Zhan Gti (Gti zhan)
Review:
It’s okay not to have too much attitude! . but. .

Tenren himself personally feels that green tea is the best!

Ordered four drinks! I think black tea is not astringent! but. Full sugar doesn’t quite match the quality of their tea!

green tea. half sugar. Seriously, it's just right. It's great. It’s absolutely heavenly sound!

Milk tea. It’s the middle value! not bad. It’s not super good either!

Kumquat green tea. I think it tastes worse than 711! It has a tea feel but not enough fruity aroma!

Overall, I feel like it’s a bit unkind!

Name: Cow Banana政大店
Author: Audrey Grv
Review:
Coming here almost everyday for morning coffee. Prices are correct, they even have soy milk! Love their latte, smoothie and bubble milk tea

All the drinks taste good, I even like their bagels with original cream.

The loyalty card is a great idea

Staff is friendly

Something to improve : be a little faster 😊

Name: Cow Banana政大店
Author: Mr. Owning
Review: Chill with the Fresh Coffee, Brûlée and Seasonal Fruits.

Name: Cow Banana政大店
Author: Julian “Yuu” D.
Review:
I recently stopped by Cow Banana, a small snack bar near the NCCU, and was pleasantly surprised by their mushroom toast. It was loaded with mushrooms, tomato, cheese, and pepper and tasted absolutely delicious. I paired it with a matcha latte and had the perfect start to my morning. I highly recommend giving Cow Banana a try, especially if you're a fan of mushroom toast. Trust me, you won't be disappointed!
(Only downside is the relatively high price)

Name: Cow Banana政大店
Author: Lana A
Review: Long lines is a disadvantage however the drinks are delicious, and you can get one for free after buying 10 😊 my fave is earl grey with milk

Name: Cow Banana政大店
Author: Tiffany Blue
Review: Low quality shop, there are so many better ones around. Bad value for money, and impolite staff.

Name: Hua Da Nai Tea
Author: Steven Hsu
Review: Recommend getting their 30-50% sweetness if this is your first time! I usually get their mei rong milk tea with tapioca. (美容奶茶加珍珠)

Name: Hua Da Nai Tea
Author: Steven Lim
Review: Decent boba milk tea.

Name: Hua Da Nai Tea
Author: Jeremy Hsiao
Review: A very-hot and good taste milk tea on time that soothed my soar throat. Surely 5 stars for that.

Name: Hua Da Nai Tea
Author: Jacob Weintraub
Review: I got yelled at by the manager while trying to order, so I just left.

Name: Hua Da Nai Tea
Author: AFINFO77
Review: So so

Name: tc shop
Address: No. 62號, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd
Author: Jesse
Review: I saw the capybara himself making the boba but could use some practice cause they were a bit hard. They don’t make their drinks very sweet for those who like it less sweet like me.

Name: tc shop
Address: No. 62號, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd
Author: J L
Review: Best tea shop near NTU! Taiwanese tea was good.

Name: tc shop
Address: No. 62號, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd
Author: Amiba Gelos
Review: Cheap and fast.

Name: tc shop
Address: No. 62號, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd
Author: Rachel
Review:
⩓ Line Pay, Taiwan Pay available ⩓ No invoice
𖠱 Golden Diamond Pineapple Green (sugar-free and ice-free) ɴᴛᴅ 45/M - There is pineapple pulp, and some pulp fiber is thicker. When paired with sugar-free green tea, it is about half to less sweet than sugar.

Name: tc shop
Address: No. 62號, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd
Author: Tina Wang
Review: Today I bought lemon black tea for 50 yuan for a large cup of 700cc. The taste is very bland, not as good as the one across the street. You can use linepay and transport.

Name: 五桐號WooTea 台北古亭店
Author: David
Review: 五桐tea store run by 3 guys. Friendly service! Taste was unfortunately not as good as other 五桐tea stores

Name: 五桐號WooTea 台北古亭店
Author: D W
Review: The starfruit green tea jelly drink I just ordered is the worst tea drink I've had anywhere. Nowhere on the menu does it mention honey, and that's the only flavor I could taste in this excessively sweet drink. My Taiwanese partner found it unpalatable as well.

Name: 五桐號WooTea 台北古亭店
Author: Andy Andersen
Review: Had Thai Milk tea, it was pretty good

Name: 五桐號WooTea 台北古亭店
Author: Best Foodie
Review:
Very bad bubble
Super tasteless

Name: 五桐號WooTea 台北古亭店
Author: Yuni Lestari
Review: Tasty drinks , staff are friendly ☺️

Name: 鶴茶樓- 鶴頂紅茶商店(中正寧波西店)
Author: Mandy Kuo
Review: The lady who works on Sunday is terrible. Not only was she passive aggressive and impatient towards the three of us, she also forgot to add oat milk to my tea while I had paid extra $15NT for it. Together with the almond and black sesame jelly I added, it was $90 while I didn't receive what I had paid for! The tea (mountain tea and oolong tea were kinda bitter). We do appreciate that this brand of bubble tea only uses honey for the tapioca which is awesome since it's refined sugar free.

Name: 鶴茶樓- 鶴頂紅茶商店(中正寧波西店)
Author: Betta Moiso
Review: A must visit for any vegan person in Taipei. We struggled to find milk tea with oat milk and were so grateful to stumble upon this place! The milk tea was fantastic and the boba were the perfect texture. Great service, as well. We are looking forward to coming back!

Name: 鶴茶樓- 鶴頂紅茶商店(中正寧波西店)
Author: Samantha Lee
Review: Hei-ding milk tea w/oat milk, 50% sweet. Rec to order 75%. Takeout only, good for tourist.

Name: 鶴茶樓- 鶴頂紅茶商店(中正寧波西店)
Author: Iana Iakovleva
Review: Was the best taste of green tea in bubble tea I’ve ever tried

Name: 鶴茶樓- 鶴頂紅茶商店(中正寧波西店)
Author: 郭景為
Review: The

Name: 清心福全淡水中山店-珍珠奶茶手搖專賣店
Author: Asa G.W. Hsu
Review: like

Name: 清心福全淡水中山店-珍珠奶茶手搖專賣店
Author: 阿妏
Review: Thank you to a male clerk inside. When my delivery car fell over and my drink spilled, he helped me wash the cup holder and put a lid on the cup. I suddenly felt very touched.

Name: 清心福全淡水中山店-珍珠奶茶手搖專賣店
Author: 鄭青和
Review: I am also a regular customer of this store. I would like to suggest a female clerk who is not tall. Her service attitude is not very good. She does not say thank you and has a very disdainful expression. "Please pay attention to the store." Thank you.

Name: 清心福全淡水中山店-珍珠奶茶手搖專賣店
Author: 彤彤
Review: I ordered honey oolong from takeaway. Half honey didn’t taste like honey. I was dumbfounded.

Name: 清心福全淡水中山店-珍珠奶茶手搖專賣店
Author: Amber Li
Review:
Fresh milk oolong, fresh milk green tea (2 cups both ➕Boba, Pearl) The Boba has been soaked for an unknown amount of time, and the taste is so soft that it sticks to your teeth.
Although the fresh milk oolong is iced, it has no tea flavor at all...
Terrible drink, will not consume again
Quality assurance needs to work harder!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: 跟著感覺走水瓶男
Review: Bad

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: L J
Review:
The pearl honey Pu'er tastes so bad...it's so sweet that I cry. I don't know if it's the pearls or the drink tastes like tap water. I only took two or three sips of the whole cup before I couldn't drink it and threw it away.
Cause me to waste food and money

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Yuna Li
Review:
Sanrio joint event rarely includes Pacha dog
But I can’t buy cute co-branded products anywhere
This is the only store where the clerk was kind enough to ask if he wanted to pre-order.
thank you very much! 🙏
-
The drinks are undoubtedly delicious🤍
I personally recommend the new peach jelly black tea released last year.
Also like the hidden version and tea jelly milk green!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: YuChen Chiang
Review:
Well-known chain of hand-operated stores,
There is one everywhere,
The quality is almost the same,
It still tastes good.
When visiting,
Because there are few people,
So the speed of hand cranking is fast enough.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station
Author: Peggy
Review: For an additional 20 yuan, you can get an environmentally friendly cup. I thought it was environmentally friendly and cost-effective, so I bought two on the spot. The clerk was very kind and helped wash the cups before filling them. I thought the service was great. The cup has two lids. After the upper lid is opened, there is a hole in the middle for inserting a straw. However, the length of the straw must be calculated first. The length of the stainless steel straw is fixed. Once inserted, the upper lid will not close. It should be better used with a silicone straw

Name: TRUEDAN Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital
Author: Sheen April Bahan

Name: TRUEDAN Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital
Author: Leslie Huang
Review:
Taro Zhen Double Q Milk Tea

I used to order brown sugar pearl milk
This is my first time ordering taro balls and milk tea

The taro balls are a surprise😍
As a taro lover, I am very satisfied!
You can get taro pellets in every piece
And very Q

Although I ordered milk tea with a little sugar,
But maybe QQ itself is sweet
Still a bit sweet
Next time I'll try 1 cent sugar

Name: TRUEDAN Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital
Author: 小秋
Review: The pearls were warm, probably just cooked, but they were very soft and had no taste at all.

Name: TRUEDAN Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital
Author: CHIU
Review: I ordered a cup of replica black tea without sugar and ice, with taro balls and taro puree. I checked with the clerk again and again whether it could be sugar-free. The clerk said it was OK. At first, the order was made as honey-flavored black tea, which was ten yuan more expensive, but I ended up drinking it when I got back to the car. It turned out to be slightly sugary (3% sugar), and I lost it after drinking half a cup. Maybe the clerk made a mistake while he was busy. I have to remember to check it clearly next time. Alas... To be honest, it is a bit disappointing to drink like this after a three-month visit. QQ. Maybe the clerk made a mistake while he was busy, and it was hard work for only one person to make the drinks, but I will remember to check carefully and try the drinks next time.

Name: TRUEDAN Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital
Author: Lu Han
Review: The tea flavor is not enough, too much milk and water is added...not recommended

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 西門町店
Author: LiLy Lee
Review: No queue on a Friday afternoon. Tried their no. 2 bubble tea and it was very delicious and refreshing. Have asked for less sweetness so it was not too filling. Definitely worthwhile to try.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 西門町店
Author: Andrew Ramirez
Review: The common theme of Taiwanese boba is it has a stronger tea ratio then back in the US. I really like this and the pearls tasted exceptional. As time went on I think it lost its flavor a little and I realize maybe the ratios were off a bit.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 西門町店
Author: pretty sipayung
Review:
Chose this one instead of the long line of famous boba: XFT.

No line when I order.
No bad experience with the staff too, so nothing to say about the attitude of the staff.

The boba itself was good. But nothing special.

And I dont know whether there is option for no or less sugar.
Because they didnt ask me at all.
And my bad, I forgot to ask also.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 西門町店
Author: RNE
Review: Bad service. Understandable that the cashier does not understand english but she don’t even bother looking at what we are pointing, such a lazy attitude. Always frowning and impatient. Not recommended. Drinks are very basic, just go to other stores since there are many options around this area.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 西門町店
Author: Alwin Goh
Review: One of the many popular tea stalls around the area.

Name: 梅子兔生活飲品專賣店(西門總店)
Address: Lane 50, Xining S Rd, 7號1 樓
Author: j h
Review:
Maybe I just didnt order the right drink? I had high hopes based on all the great reviews on google but was disappointed.

I ordered the traditional bubble mill tea with boba with no sugar. Maybe the no sugar is what was throwing the drink off because the boba balls here do not taste sweet at all. I dont think its soaked in sugar. Therefore, maybe that's why the drink was very bland. At other boba tea shops, the boba balls are already very sweet since it's soaked in sugar so adding no sugar still makes the milk tea pretty sweet.

Adding real milk vs powder milk is an additional 10 NTD on top of the advertised price.

Service was good.

I prefer to have the boba balls soaked in sugar syrup. The balls were too bland for me.

Name: 梅子兔生活飲品專賣店(西門總店)
Address: Lane 50, Xining S Rd, 7號1 樓
Author: Joseph Devera
Review: Ordered a hot milk tea cos it was 16 degrees. The staff were patient and friendly with me and my broken mandarin. And of course, the milk tea was fantastic and hit the spot with just the right sweetness and temperature.

Name: 梅子兔生活飲品專賣店(西門總店)
Address: Lane 50, Xining S Rd, 7號1 樓
Author: Liam Lindemann
Review: Fairly priced bubble tea shop. Not surprising in terms of taste.

Name: 梅子兔生活飲品專賣店(西門總店)
Address: Lane 50, Xining S Rd, 7號1 樓
Author: Goog Jariya
Review: Fresh, tasty.  Nice service.  We're impressed and go to buy the same menu twice (Orange with black tea) during our trip :)

Name: 梅子兔生活飲品專賣店(西門總店)
Address: Lane 50, Xining S Rd, 7號1 樓
Author: jean z
Review:
Ordered strawberry pearl milk tea 0 sugar little ice.
Was very surprised it wasnt strawberry syrup (think sweet talk).  You can feel/taste the strawberry seeds too. Milktea was smooth n  not sweet with zero sugar.. Pearl was chewy and sweetness was just nice. Will come back to try other drinks soon!

Name: Chun Shui Tang Xinyi Branch
Author: Anggita Deska
Review: My first dinner in Taipei, need to made reservation via line, but the queue tolerable. Ordered beef noodle with milk tea size S, paid at cashier and wait until the food came. It highly recommended! The beef noodle really delicious, the soup was light, the meat easy to chew, also had several vegetables inside. The milk tea had so many bobba inside, and size S was big for me. Love it!

Name: Chun Shui Tang Xinyi Branch
Author: Jedi
Review:
Very good cook, a real pleasure to taste it, so you'll wait for sure but deserves it.
Nice quantity, L size drink are very huge..
Very apreciable moment.
I'll be back soon.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Xinyi Branch
Author: Philip Bergqvist
Review: Every time I come back I try a new dish and get pleasantly surprised. For me the Szechuan chili pork ears, chili oil dumplings, and fried radish cake are a must. My standard drink is the tieguanyin milk tea (no pearls). Service has always been good every time I've visited. For two people you can usually get a table without waiting.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Xinyi Branch
Author: Matthew Lee
Review:
This is supposed to be the 'best' bubble tea in Taiwan? I passed by this shop at the basement of the mall and was quite surprised it was empty.
I didn't know it was a restaurant thought it was just a shop specializing in selling teas. As I turned into the counter I saw the other section of the restaurant was rather crowded. I thought maybe the food was good and decided to have a look at the menu. Sadly, it didn't get my interest to try so I just decided to order a bubble tea to go. Ordered the pearl milk tea and had to wait for about 10 minutes before it was ready.
The original price of the big cup of pearl milk tea was 190 TWD but there was a discount so I paid 161 TWD for it. I think the drink was rather expensive in bubble tea standards.
Tried the tea it was just average, there was a tinge of the tea flavour and frankly my expectations were higher than this. The pearls were also nothing to shout about and was nothing different from a normal cup of bubble tea.
With the quality and the price, I think I might be able to find better teas elsewhere.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Xinyi Branch
Author: Kanit T
Review: Had meals here twice, small dishes here are quite nice especially the beancurd & enoki. Milk tea is a bit on the milkier side instead of a strong tea taste.

Name: 樺達奶茶 站前捷運店二店
Author: bad cop
Review: The well-known chain beverage store in the south specializes in its various tea drinks and milk tea with fresh milk. Although there are fewer ice cubes and sweetness options, this restriction ensures the uniqueness and consistency of the drink flavor.

Name: 樺達奶茶 站前捷運店二店
Author: Flora Huang
Review:
1. The location is in underground street B1. It is not the first floor as mentioned in the information. It is not easy to find.
2. I went here specifically to buy it, but the service attitude is really different from other branches. I used to go to the ones in Kaohsiung and Taoyuan.
3. The lid of the cup is not tight and it keeps leaking and dripping all over my hands⋯⋯

Name: 樺達奶茶 站前捷運店二店
Author: 汪吾瑜
Review:
Two cups of green milk.
As a loyal customer of Kaohsiung Huada, can you say something?
Even though it is more expensive to buy here than in Kaohsiung, the tea aroma is not strong enough and the milk taste is watery. When you bite into the pearls, it feels like it has been cooked and refrigerated for half an hour. If anyone wants to get to know Huada and drink delicious Huada (there are also cheaper Huada), just buy it in Kaohsiung! Kaohsiung Dayuan Mart or Yancheng Founder Store are both delicious, at least don’t buy them here. If there are Kaohsiung people who want to savor the taste of hometown, don’t buy it, you will be very disappointed😢

Editor’s addition: I haven’t encountered any attitude problems from the clerk, everything is fine~

Name: 樺達奶茶 站前捷運店二店
Author: 成天樂
Review:
The signature is Huada milk tea, which is made from Pu'er tea, black tea, and fresh milk (I just watched the news, so it's long-lasting milk?!). It has a smooth texture and a rich tea flavor.

However, the concentration of the tea soup seems to be slightly insufficient. After the ice cubes melt away, the tea taste fades, and the taste of milk tea with water is more obvious. Since a cup costs NT$70, there should be more balance in the proportion of tea!

As for the service attitude of the staff, it was not as described in the reviews. They just seemed quite tired. Maybe the head office could redeploy more manpower.

Name: 樺達奶茶 站前捷運店二店
Review: I bought a three-point Huada milk tea last night. I don’t know if the proportion is wrong. It tastes very watery and bland. It feels the same when I drink it with my family. I hope they can adjust it. The clerk’s attitude is very good.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Kiera Fahr
Review: It appears like all employees are preoccupied handling online orders and scarcely service the takeout line outside the store. Is there a type of marketing hunger that prevents business owners from recruiting more staff? Nonetheless, there are numerous bubble tea shops nearby with shorter wait times.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Dolphin
Review: My son prefer this place 👍👍👍

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Roger Lee
Review: One of the most classic places for bubble tea.  Pretty sure they changed their recipe to stop using Carnation sweetener though, which is disappointing.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Stephanie Ha
Review: Order a green milk tea, couldn't taste the tea, poor service. Very disappointed.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Juliet Pang
Review: Very poor service. Drink is as standard in Singapore.

Name: Share Tea Nanyang (Original Tea Store)
Author: Uhyon Chung
Review: This is the original Share Tea shop. It's a pretty small shop near the main train terminal in downtown Taipei city. It's in an area with a lot of little shops. I ordered the basic milk tea with boba. The taste is very similar to the one in US. The boba is slightly soggy similar to the ones in US. The tea came out very quickly and was generally pretty good.

Name: Share Tea Nanyang (Original Tea Store)
Author: Gabriel Fung
Review: Sharetea has become a world-class sensation. What better place to savour the experience than to take the pilgrimage back to the original Sharetea location. Here, memories are stirred of drinks sipped long ago, of dense and flavourful teas mixed with rich milky goodness, paired with chewy tapioca semi-sweet pearls. This was the birthplace of pearl milk teas worldwide. You can find Sharetea across the sea, but there is only one original Sharetea. If you are a bbt fan, you need to have one from the source of Sharetea goodness.

Name: Share Tea Nanyang (Original Tea Store)
Author: Paul Yang
Review:
Pearl Q coconut jelly 2.0
4/5

I didn’t know this is the original location of sharetea.  Pretty cool

Name: Share Tea Nanyang (Original Tea Store)
Author: Chiara
Review: The Fruit Tea 2.0 was delicious with big chunks of real fruit, they give you a fork so you can eat the fruit after drinking the tea

Name: Share Tea Nanyang (Original Tea Store)
Author: Jayne Bertilla “Bertie” Rubio
Review: Their black teas, oolong and fruit teas were great! One of the servers spoke English well

Name: Milksha Taipei Ximending
Author: Leo Chen
Review: This boba drink is extremely tasty, I really enjoy it, and I believe that every one should be able to drink it. The cost is not that expensive, about 80 dollars, though it is not cheap. However, for me, it is worth it. I still cannot forget the taste of the boba, and the milk tea. If my friends are coming to my house, I am going to take them there and let them enjoy the taste, too! Furthermore, not only I like the boba milk tea, even my mom, my dad, my grandma, my sister believe that it is one of their favorite drink on the planet! Therefore, why not spend 80 TWD of this wonderful, gorgeous, awesome drink!

Name: Milksha Taipei Ximending
Author: Andrew Ramirez
Review: When I get milk tea in America I always feel bloated but I don’t feel that with this place. This one of the best milk teas I’ve had. It tastes different than what I’m used to. It tastes fresh.

Name: Milksha Taipei Ximending
Author: Devanshi Bansal
Review: Very good milk tea (with boba). Staff also very fun and friendly. Loved it. Recommend 100%!

Name: Milksha Taipei Ximending
Author: Petrus Delport
Review:
Absolutely delicious and fantastic service!! Staff are friendly and very helpful towards international guests!! Even the prices are extremely decent, this all said without even getting to the tasty delights that are served at this phenomenal establishment!!

If you are ever in the area busy with touristing and you feel the need to quench your thirst, this is the place for you!!

Good to know as well that an English menu is available just for extra information.

Name: Milksha Taipei Ximending
Author: Anthony Angeles
Review: Very refreshing drink! Love the Taro! Thanks for the good service!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Michele Tofu
Review:
The drink was already finished but they didn’t give me at all, still keep me waiting for so long 🙄, in which I don’t understand why. I have to ask for 3 times to get a drink, but they didn’t care, all they do was fixing issues of their machine. It was some  kind of bad service ever in Boba tea Taiwan 🥲
🧋The taste is was so so goodbye!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Jackson Tan (Jackthehunter)
Review: 20yrs ago when I first visited Taiwan, this was my very first bubble tea and loved it till today! Finally 5th time in Taiwan again and the only 1 store in Ximending! 🫰😍

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Jerald Kng
Review: Always enjoyed the Pudding milk tea from 50 Lan, closes the latest out of the few bubble tea stores there, and had a queue

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Thanh Bình Trần
Review:
Excellent bubble tea with lots of choices. Only serves drinks. Compare the different milk tea shop here in Taipei, 50 Lan comes out a winner both on taste and cost. They offer a variety of tea and sweetness along with regular size...
We enjoyed Big Bubble Milk Tea and Milk Tea with Coconut Jelly. Lots of choices and good.
However the staff mostly can not use English so it is not easy for foreigner to order.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Hussein Al-kaf
Review: Not bad bubble tea place. I was probably thinking it would be better though. I got the best seller which was light oolong with bubbles.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: Mak Ken
Review: Ordered 日安茶厚奶加仙草，tastes like HK style milk tea, a perfect combination of milk and tea. Also the texture of 仙草is good, so suitable for drinking using the straw! The staff are nice:)

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: G Reyes
Review: First bubble tea place I’ve come across that has oatmilk! Suitable for vegans! I can finally enjoy the signature black tea with milk!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: T greensake
Review: Tried Brown Sugar Milk With Boba (NT75) on 15/11/22, was good. Note that this item is fixed on ice & sugar level.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: rchan
Review: Taro milk tea was 10/10

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Ningxia
Author: Ka Hei Ho (Kelvin)
Review: Personally the best taiwanese drink in Taipei. Recommend the black tea latte in milk based with boba and no sugar.

Name: Tea Tank
Author: kate obille
Review: Tea Tank is situated in the NTNU area and the crowd is mostly students and possibly tourists like us  The menu has English translations and the owner speaks good English as well. This is a take out only shop but there are shops here that offer food where you can take your tea. Better than the supposed famous boba tea in Ximending Night Market

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Gisse
Review: The best bubble tea I had in Taiwan! Must try the Golden lily oolong milk tea, I almost always came for one after class

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Wanderlust
Review: Not bad

Name: Tea Tank
Author: Yuting Hsu
Review:
The three cups of drinks with different flavors are all very good, and the business is so good that I am envious. Two hollow bricks and a standing sign are placed opposite, as if they are stone gandang, but they cannot stop the flow of people drinking tea.
"Shi Gandang, also known as Taishan Shi Gandang, stands in the streets, especially at T-shaped intersections and other places on the walls where feng shui rushes, which are known as evil positions. It is a stone tablet used to ward off evil spirits. The stone tablet is engraved with "Shi Gandang", or "Taishan Shigandang", and there are often bas-reliefs such as lion heads and tiger heads on the forehead of the stele. In many places, Shi Gandang is worshiped as a road god. (Excerpt from Wikipedia)"
The alleys are crowded and there is a lot of motorcycle traffic. The space to wait for freshly made drinks is already very small. The stone bricks and signboards placed by the shops across the street only add to my negative image. The neighbor across the street is not smart enough.
We have forgotten that mutual help and trust between neighbors is the key to mutual prosperity, sigh.

Name: Tea Tank
Author: 寶弟
Review:
I passed by by chance and read the good reviews, so I tried it. The sweetness suggestion given by the boss was just right. Every time I passed by Normal University, there was something delicious to drink.
The first time I drank peach iced tea, I thought it tasted much better than the peach drinks sold in some chain stores.
I also saw many people slowly approaching the store to buy. Sure enough, the high reviews are not undeserved👍
The store is closed on holidays! Don't make this trip in vain

Name: Chun Shui Tang Taipei Station Branch
Author: Porex Porex
Review:
Highly recommended for tourists to eat local Taiwanese food and drinks!
After deciding what to eat on the menu, you will need to pay for the food first on the front desk before eating just like fast food restaurants.
Handmade thin noodles with sesame oil are very good and cheap as well in my opinion. The pink guava lemon premium jasmine tea tastes more like a smoothie than a tea but it’s still amazing to try out.
In addition, spicy wontons with chilli oil are sweet rather than sour and spicy. The speed of preparation for dishes here was also efficient even though there were a large number of people eating.
To sum up, there are a lot more delicacies you can try to enjoy here and I would give this meal a 9.5 out of 10.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Taipei Station Branch
Author: Nicole Tan
Review:
Service is good.

There were 3 groups waiting when I arrived on a weekday around 8pm. There is a QR code to join the queue. Was seated in less than 15 mins.

Ordered the recommended siew mai. The taste is different from the Cantonese dim sum I'm used to. I thought it was rather average.

The braised beancurd had an interesting taste profile made up of five spices, mala, basil, coriander, spring onions, etc. I like the texture of the beancurd.

The bubble tea is their signature and a must-try. I noticed many locals having the drinks in the larger size. I like the taste - light, smooth, chewy, not too creamy, or too sweet.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Taipei Station Branch
Author: Tiffany Dy
Review: Our experience was so so... Quiet hassle if you are a foreign traveler who likes to try this restaurant and doesn't have a Line account. You need a Line account to be able to get a queue to dine in. The receptionist didn't even help us or accommodate for the booking of our dine in. I have high expectations for the beef noodles and it was just ok. Milk tea is good though, not too sweet and a good taste of the tea blend.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Taipei Station Branch
Author: k
Review:
This place is known for being the inventor of the beloved bubble tea. For takeout, you walk straight into the restaurant to the register. There was a 15% discount for ordering a medium. They take card/tap in addition to cash.

- Medium Bubble Tea (30% sugar, less ice): 161 NT after discount; 3/5 stars. I liked the smaller boba, but there wasn't much flavor to them, and the milk tea tasted average.
- Medium Puer Latte with Rose Salt: 187 NT after discount; 2/5 stars according to my friend.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Taipei Station Branch
Author: Kanto Toyoda
Review:
I had the beef noodles for the first time and had a great experience.
Not only the noodles but the pickles that came with the noodles tasted really nice when you put it into the soup.

Name: Kung Fu Tea Taipei Shuangcheng
Author: 陳彥良
Review: Good

Name: Kung Fu Tea Taipei Shuangcheng
Author: Noodle Yamamoto
Review:
[2024.6]
I ordered the ``Yo-Drinking Water Fruit Chao'', which is also the signature menu of this restaurant. The fruits inside are apple, willow orange, and red pomelo. What's interesting is that when I write Beniyu, I don't mean the Japanese yuzu, but rather the pink pomelo. Maybe it refers to pink grapefruit in Taiwan, but I'm not sure.

In any case, it seems that these fruits are supplemented with the highest quality seasonal green tea and high-fiber, low-calorie basil.

The taste is very delicious. The sweetness, aroma, and sourness of the various fruits and the bitterness of the tea are a perfect balance, and the pulp of the fruit is also added, which is my personal favorite. I really wish there were more drink stands like this in Japan.

Name: Kung Fu Tea Taipei Shuangcheng
Author: Stanley QQ
Review:
2024.08.22. ★★★★☆ First visit
》》Reroasted Guanyin Latte + Brown Sugar Boba 75》
I have no impression at all. I only drank in Taichung and wanted to drink again and check out this restaurant.
Not dissatisfied with the drinks

Name: Kung Fu Tea Taipei Shuangcheng
Author: LIENC CHO
Review:
During the Milk Tea Festival, it’s good to exchange for two drinks, but the business is very good and the business is slow.
Progress (13/47)

Name: Kung Fu Tea Taipei Shuangcheng
Author: H Emily
Review: The durian salsa I bought on 7/22 was very light and had no pulp. I have bought it many times. This time it only had a strong milk smell. It was made by a girl. I wonder if it is because of insufficient raw materials? ! It's not worth buying again at 110 a cup, and the service is not good!

Name: TRUEDAN Xinyi City Hall Shop
Address: No. 17-1號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Yui S.
Review: I had hot brown sugar milk tea with taro ball. So far the best milk tea I had for the trip. The sweetness was just right as I order half sweetness and the taro boba was yummy and chewy. I didn’t shake before popping the straw in so it was too sweet and the staff helped sealing the lid and shaking it again for me. The staff communicated well in english and was very helpful. The store was very cute and instagram worthy. Totally recommended!

Name: TRUEDAN Xinyi City Hall Shop
Address: No. 17-1號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Ann Wong
Review:
Very nice staff suggesting no added sugar for boba milk tea 🧋which is just the right sweetness! I like that the milk tea is quite strong (reminds me of Hong Kong milk tea just a bit lighter).
We also ordered the limited edition peach yogurt with peach favorites pearls with no added sugar, yummy!
Seating is nice and clean, quiet also. Will crave again!

Name: TRUEDAN Xinyi City Hall Shop
Address: No. 17-1號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Kenny Huang
Review: Location is rather busy because it's next to a train station entrance. Line is consistent but not too long. First time having pearls so soft and warm. Drinks are sweet from the pearls, so do ask for the lesser sugar option. There aren't a lot of spots to sit. I really enjoyed the drinks on a hot day.

Name: TRUEDAN Xinyi City Hall Shop
Address: No. 17-1號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Sophia D
Review: This was by far one of the best places i have been to get bubble tea. As a Chinese language student it is somewhat difficult to read menus that are in tradition Chinese, because I am learning simplified, but they had a menu that was in English. When I read reviews, one review said that they had oreo bubble tea, back home I alway got oreo Taro Bubble tea and the sound of it made my mouth water, I just had to try it. It was everything I thought and more! Not only did it taste amazing, but the "plating"/ how it was presented was really nice. With a giant oreo and oreo shavings on top, they even added a little decoration to the straw. My brother, who isn't a giant bubble tea fan, said he loved it and raved about it for the rest of the trip. When I went back the next day I oreded a black sugar melon pearl drink, to my surprise it was so good! I always make it a big deal to try things that are unique to the country I visit or a new dish, and I did not expect to like this, but it was so good! With a vanilla under tone and the soft balls/pearls, it was a drink I wished was bottomless. I highly reccomend going here. Even if you are not a big bubble tea fan, there are so many flavors to try, and this is a must go to!

Name: TRUEDAN Xinyi City Hall Shop
Address: No. 17-1號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Luu Thu Phuong
Review:
The boba is really sweet even the taro balls.
Highly recommend 0% sugar with boba. Try their milk foam, very nice 💓💓

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: Molly
Review: Good quality and fair price drinks.

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: 劉懶蟲
Review: The ingredients are real and the drinks are not too sweet. They use rock sugar and brown sugar, which is very healthy. The boss lady is also very kind. Highly recommended!

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: 李景文
Review: The Sicilian coffee is delicious, and the mung beans in the mung bean paste and milk are cooked by Ban Niang herself. They are lightly fragrant and not too sweet. Peanut thick slices and peanut granules, the ingredients are good and solid

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: Nara Fang
Review:
Second brush
After changing from plastic cups to paper cups, it may be that the quality of the paper cups I chose was not good. Tea started leaking from the bottom of the two cups I brought home. It was a disaster😰
-
The proprietress is very kind and the pearls are delicious. However, because the sweetness of their pearls is quite high, I suggest that friends who don’t like too sweet can choose sugar-free when ordering tea with pearls (although it will still be a bit sweet because the pearls are quite sweet). sweet)~
The thick slices are very thoughtfully cut into small pieces, which is very convenient to eat~

Name: 玉琪咖啡茶飲Coffee & Bubble Tea-北投市場.樂活名攤
Address: Huanggang Rd, 33號428攤（網球場旁D棟中繼市場
Author: S Y
Review:
I highly recommend everyone to drink the coffee brewed by Yuqi☕️
Yuqi is beautiful and kind. The black coffee today is definitely worth the money!
(I asked Yuqi if I could take photos ~ Yuqi said very kindly that it was OK. Many people took photos🤣🤣)

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: NP陈
Review: Had such a good experience here at Odd One Out. The space is beautiful. But most importantly, the tea is great. Such good quality. Came with my family and each tried something different. I got the champion milk tea which was delicious - the cream foam had outstanding flavour. Hubby got the East India ice blend (with the lemongrass and earl grey gelato) which was my favourite. My kids got the watermelon jade and watermelon pomelo sago. The gelato flavours were so unique and delicious. They were both so refreshing for the hot Taiwan heat. Will definitely try to come again before we leave.

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Wynnie Chan
Review: The seasonal Watermelon Jasmin tea is so delicious and refreshing!! So good!!! I tried the champion milk tea too.  Great quality of ingredients that you can taste.  Craving this more and more every day…

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Vicky Tip
Review: The taste of the tea is quite prominent. I was expecting the boba but they have only jelly here.  I love the color palette of the menu!

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Pimchanok P
Review:
Their taste deserves the crown !✨

I ordered Champion milk tea (their signature) on that day. Its heavenly cheese foam tastes amazing. The aroma of the tea is like an explosion in every sip! Smells soooo good! 🤤

If you happen to be around Songshan creative park, this tea spot is a definite must-visit. ⭐️✨ Enjoy the crown-worthy taste! 🥰🥰

Name: ODD ONE OUT Dunnan Shop
Address: No. 48號, Lane 187, Section 1, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Ron Ang
Review:
The bubble milk tea here is really awesome. They take pride in grinding the tea leaves, using the Mahlkonig grinder to grind the finest.
We've also tried the longan winter melon with the honey tapioca cubes and it is dope. Very refreshing drink and highly recommended!
The service is great too.
Will definitely come back again!

Name: 思茶MissingTea 台北錦州店
Author: Joe The Explorer (識食)
Review: Friendly staff and quality tea product. Remember to add on the chewy white/crystal jelly and bubbles!

Name: 思茶MissingTea 台北錦州店
Author: Nam Vaidhayakul
Review: Great place for your Boba fix.  I had the chew milk tea which was loaded with boba and this other chewy jelly.  It was the perfect texture and flavor and the staff was also very nice.

Name: 思茶MissingTea 台北錦州店
Author: Elaine Tai
Review:
Wendan Green Tea is really delicious🤤Highly recommended👍
Have 2 cups every day! ! !
Next, the grapefruit is gone...what should I do😂
Taro milk green taro has just the right sweetness👍
Honey passion green is delicious too👍

Name: 思茶MissingTea 台北錦州店
Author: Tracy
Review: Beipu Leicha tastes very good👍🏻 Zhenliu Double Enjoyment is delicious😋 The sweetness is only sugar-free/slightly sugary. The store clerk reminds you to shake it before drinking so that it will not settle~ There is a motorcycle parking space in front of the store, and the car can park May be less convenient.

Name: 思茶MissingTea 台北錦州店
Author: 慧慧
Review:
Booked this room for company afternoon tea today
The store clerk and delivery person who called me to confirm were all very nice! ☌ᴗ☌
I ordered Duoduo Peach Rice Noodles. It tastes great without sugar😍😍😍
The peach noodle cake is also delicious ~ TUTUI٩(ˊᗜˋ*)و

Name: TRUEDAN Daan Fuxing Shop
Author: Yiyi Lin (Elisa)
Review: My first bubble tea here in Taipei! Recommended by my local friend. I got the sugar bubble tea with less ice! The tapioca was really chewy and I must say the stuff is very welcoming! Highly recommended!

Name: TRUEDAN Daan Fuxing Shop
Author: Evelyn Limanjaya
Review:
One of the best tapioca pearl drink I've ever had. The menu was in Chinese so it's impossible for me to choose. Fortunately I have my Taiwan friend ordered it for me. My order was a fresh milk tapioca pearl.

The milk was fresh and creamy. The pearl was sweet and fragrant like honey. I recommend to order the drink to be less sweet because the pearl is already sweet.

Name: TRUEDAN Daan Fuxing Shop
Author: Jonathan Joo
Review: Brown sugar flavor is amazing! Tastes like the brown sugar is crystallizing in my mouth as I drink!

Name: TRUEDAN Daan Fuxing Shop
Author: Peter Neoh
Review: This is probably one the best bubble milk tea I had ever tasted. The tapioca pearls is definitely one of the best. I kept came back every evening in the past few days.

Name: TRUEDAN Daan Fuxing Shop
Author: John Huang
Review: Best pearl milk tea in Taiwan! So many other fantastic drinks to choose from.

Name: CoCo
Author: Aoife Casson
Review: A small takeaway bubble tea place with quick service and helpful staff. The menu has English as well as Chinese on it, and the lady was happy for me to just point at what I wanted.

Name: CoCo
Author: Oriane
Review: Really very very good. The staff is nice and one of the boys took the time to try to speak with me in English and slowly in Chinese as I try to learn. I recommend!

Name: CoCo
Author: Riya Chien
Review: i want to specially thanks 2 girls who worked on 18 Oct evening, i went the shop around 20:48 which already over their open hours, and i called to ask if it's possible to sell one drink to me since i was buying for a patient, they said yes withtout any hesitate, really appreciated their kindness and help though it was already closing time. thank you very much, high recommended shop to all

Name: CoCo
Author: Chiahsuan Chang
Review:
To whom I love,
We lover your service with lovely smile.

Je t'aime.

Name: CoCo
Author: 元䕒張
Review: nice one, they've got seats and its next to JianGuo flower market

Name: 50 Lan
Author: tsuki
Review: Tried their bestseller which is light oolong tea with bubble and coconut jelly at half sugar level. The toppings go well synergistically and the drink was not too sweet which I love. It is soo good!! Recommend to try!!!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Thien Dang
Review: This is one of the most famous milk tea shops in Taiwan, but I don't think it's anything special. but it's worth a try. The tea is very bland and lacks the bitter taste of tea. The staff works very quickly so you don't have to wait lon

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Tricia Loh
Review:
Staff was not friendly as he showed me displeasure when i ordered my drink at the counter.

They gave other customers their orders first when they came later than me. Will not recommend to go to this branch to patronize.

Name: 50 Lan
Author: SK C

Name: 50 Lan
Author: TzeThon Chua
Review:
Value for money.
Drinks were decent at a lower price. This brand can be found almost everywhere in Taipei. Many choices to choose from too.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Da'an
Author: 郝蕊蕊
Review: The decorations in the boba stand are adorable! The menu selection is also excellent, a variety of drinks, but not toooo many that I couldn’t make a decision 😩.

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Da'an
Author: Andrew Ramirez
Review: A ton of people order here so the wait time was a little longer but the milk tea was delicious. Worth a stop!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Da'an
Author: Xiao Jun Chew
Review: One of my newest favourite bubble tea place in Taiwan! Had the 棉被午茉莉 with the recommended sugar and ice levels by the amazing and absolutely patient staff Cheryl. Also got myself a new bubble tea cup with a rather new (to me at least) and innovative design together with the fragrance accessories, as seen on 滴妹’s YouTube channel. Glad to finally try 再睡五分鐘!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Da'an
Author: Ow Mei Ling
Review:
Mei was very helpful and sincere when telling me more on Nap Tea's merchandises.

It's heartwarming to have Nap Tea provide a washing set for the bottles we bought!

Name: Nap Tea Taipei Da'an
Author: Nicole Hui
Review: Best traditional boba I had in Taipei. We loved the fresh milk boba, which tasted like cereal milk from Milkbar in NYC. Milk is creamy and had milky sweetness. Boba is also sweetened with brown sugar and perfectly cooked, although I wish it had a slightly more chewy center. That's just a personal preference though.

Name: Cha for tea
Author: Malcolm S.
Review: Nice tea shop in the food court

Name: Cha for tea
Author: Eric Chiu
Review: This tea chain is located on the first basement floor of Sanchuang Park. The tea has a mellow aroma and the pearls are sweet and delicious. This time I ordered 913 milk tea (creamer, 30% sugar without ice) and 913 Tea King sugar-free with pearls. The milk tea has a strong milky aroma, is sweet and delicious, and the tea king green tea is mellow, paired with honey-flavored pearls, slightly sweet and chewy. Overall, the tea is delicious and the meal is served quickly.

Name: Cha for tea
Author: 小原兒
Review:
The price is already not cheap, but you still need to add a lot of water, so crazy and desperate? ! No tea flavor and very light
The key point is that fat girls have such a bad attitude that they won’t spend money anymore😡

Name: Cha for tea
Author: M
Review:
【Taro Fresh Milk Green】M, 100⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

There are no shortcomings except that it is expensive, but I think it is expensive because of my own lack of ability (?)

Name: Cha for tea
Author: mick米克
Review: The service staff are friendly and the Pearl QQ is delicious (delicious). I will buy it if I want to drink it.

Name: Oolong Tea Project
Author: Chomticha S.
Review: The best Milk tea ever! It is at Ximending night market. picked up only, no seats. "Cheese milk foam spring oolong tea" is one of the best ones! That's a good price, just 50 TWD / or around 55 Baht. (this quality and tasty in Thailand you will pay more than 150 baht) very impressive.

Name: Oolong Tea Project
Author: Flo G
Review:
This bustling bubble tea chain is in Wanhua close by Long Shan Temple vicinity.

Saw the good reviews and streaming customers, tried a cream cheese foam oolong roasted tea with bubble.

Overall an above average drink although we would prefer a stronger oolong tea flavour.

Prices are very reasonable.

Staff are courteous and helpful & advised that those with # indicated are signatures.

Recommend to try!

Name: Oolong Tea Project
Author: Max T Tran
Review: So far this is the best tea shop here in Taipei that we have tried. I ordered a Lemon Oolong tea. I recommend to do half sugar and less ice.

Name: Oolong Tea Project
Author: Esmonde Tan
Review: Randomly chanced upon this goated bubble tea store and was pleasantly blown away. It turned out to be the best oolong tea I had in Taipei. The tea was roasted well and the coffee jelly complemented the drink well too. Was pleasantly surprised that they have many other stores too.

Name: Oolong Tea Project
Author: Raisha W
Review:
One of the best Milk Tea in town!
Too sweet, so, order the 30% or 50%.
Ordered the dark oolong milk tea.
I personally love oolong tea, we can taste the tea!

Name: 大叔花茶舖（樂華店）
Author: 呂維倫
Review: The lavender milk tea is pretty good, I recommend the light sugar and ice for the first time. The tea doesn't taste very strong when you drink it, but it has a faint lavender aroma.

Name: 大叔花茶舖（樂華店）
Author: 汝汝汝
Review:
After drinking it for two years, the taste becomes weaker and weaker.
The most popular thing I order all the time is rose milk tea.
There used to be a separate tea bag in every cup
So it will get stronger and stronger as you drink it.
Now not only are there no tea bags
The floral aroma in the whole cup is very light
I can't taste the mint flavor at all.
Cutting corners very seriously
Very disappointed

Name: 大叔花茶舖（樂華店）
Author: David Wang
Review:
The price is affordable, because herbal tea has a natural feel. Although I know it is an illusion, I feel that drinking this drink is less harmful to the body 😂😆

This time I bought lavender milk tea, which is so smooth that you will drink it up without even realizing it. (You must drink it when you come to Lehua)

Name: 大叔花茶舖（樂華店）
Author: 廖苡晴
Review: To be honest, I don’t want to give it even one star. The service attitude of the store clerk is terrible and the food tastes terrible. I drank the whole glass in one sip and threw it away. Vomiting.

Name: 大叔花茶舖（樂華店）
Author: 明潔李
Review:
Has always been Uncle Hua Cao’s number one fan
Before it became crazy, I came here to buy it almost every day.
It’s been several years since I first opened the store and bought it now
I was really disappointed when I bought it recently.
It used to be that the boss and a senior employee took care of the store.
Quality and service are really good

But the service attitude of the current staff and the tea they make are really getting worse.
When new employees order food, it’s like trying to beat a wall.
I ordered lavender tea and they made me milk tea
If you drink creamer and milk powder, you will feel uncomfortable, so you can only take it and throw it away.
Then ask me again if ordering food twice is healthy xD
The original attitude of the waitress was that she didn't know how to greet you.
I keep turning a blind eye
But the male clerk I met today is really angry
Since the old employees seldom visit the store, they have reduced the frequency of shopping. After this time, they will probably only come once a month.
Woohoo, I hope you, boss, can carefully select your employees and take good care of the quality of your tea.
I drank lavender milk several times before
The taste of fresh milk is really weak
Or the flavor of chamomile is sometimes very weak
It's really a matter of luck when you come here to buy it. It's sad.

Name: CoCo都可 西門町店
Author: RNE
Review: The drink tastes good and is reasonably priced. Staff is not attentive as she messed up my order, doesn’t seem like she wants to work. When I corrected her, she neither admitted her fault nor apologised. Unfriendly attitude and not helpful.

Name: CoCo都可 西門町店
Author: Joanne
Review: I went to buy boba at 10pm and there were still many customers lining up, but I didn’t have to wait for too long. Thankfully they accept the easycard I won from Lucky Land. There was a bit of miscommunication regarding my orders, but the cashier was patient and never raised their voice at me ^^ The CoCo in Taipei is much better than the CoCo in Manila!

Name: CoCo都可 西門町店
Author: A M
Review: Paul Chen did an amazing job and served me very well. He is fluent in English and advised me well on the drinks. Highly recommend this store when in Ximen👍🏻

Name: CoCo都可 西門町店
Author: Layton Liew
Review: Tastefully delicious. 1/4 duck portion just nice for 2 pax

Name: CoCo都可 西門町店
Author: Keira Klemmick
Review: Decent tea, the fruit ones taste really good. I think most chains have overly sweet drinks, but at least you can adjust the level here.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station Taipei Da'an
Author: TingAn Wang
Review: Like it’s ice cream black tea!

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station Taipei Da'an
Author: eshan
Review: Close to hotel

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station Taipei Da'an
Author: 蘇劭耘
Review:
I bought a coffee cup and the clerk asked me if I wanted to put it directly inside.
It turns out that it means directly connected to the paper 😂

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station Taipei Da'an
Author: Eric Chiu
Review: The meal is served quickly, and the single-origin tea drinks have a mellow aroma. This time I ordered sugar-free oolong green tea with ice. The tea has a warm aroma and is a drink suitable for all seasons.

Name: Ching Shin Fu Chuan Tea Station Taipei Da'an
Author: chienhui kou
Review:
Visit again on 2024/03/08.
I wanted to buy peach jelly black tea before, but it was sold out. I came back today and was very happy to buy it. It’s 65 yuan a cup. It contains both jelly and peach pieces. It’s delicious~

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Christophertravelz
Review: One of the best Taiwanese teas of my life. Black Tea with Bourbon Vanilla Cream Milk Foam for the win! English menu available! 1/2 the price of something at Starbucks but I am addicted to the Hojicha latte :]

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Liam Lindemann
Review: Pretty good bubble tea. The mango smoothie (made with fresh mangoes a point) is also delicious.

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Michelle Qin
Review: We tried the winter melon tea with kumquat. Well balanced flavour is very refreshing.

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Vincent Co
Review: One of the best drink shop in Taipei, they use fresh ingredients like real kiwi, orange and tomatoes, and the cp 值 (price) is reasonable, try it if you’re in Ximen area

Name: Tea Water 茶水格格 西門店
Author: Ronald Wisznia
Review: Its ok

Name: MilkShop Taipei Nanyang
Author: SY Tan
Review:
I love their fresh milk black tea!

I had the plain 青茶 to start from. I like to start from the basic so if they got the basic right mean there is a standard.

Love it and their fresh milk black tea with black pearls! The taste of black tea was strong but not bitter and the milk is in perfect ratio not too creamy. A lot of places pearl can tend to be too soft not chewable but their pearl were on point

Name: MilkShop Taipei Nanyang
Author: lisan “Lis”
Review: 2nd time in Taiwan to try this. Those who love fresh milk should try this. I love the yam milk with real ham bites in it.

Name: MilkShop Taipei Nanyang
Author: H藍迪
Review: I think the quality is decreasing, the boba served there sometimes tasty sometimes tasteless. You have to wait for a cup of drink all the time. Take a try to see whether you get a high quality drink or not to see whether today is your lucky day or not. But seriously, if you are in a hurry, then don’t buy drink there, otherwise you’ll be late.

Name: MilkShop Taipei Nanyang
Author: M. Hsieh
Review: Taro milk is delicious, will try other ones.

Name: MilkShop Taipei Nanyang
Author: Ken Chen
Review: Ordered the Pearl red tea latte, tasted pretty good. The pearls are a bit on the hard side however.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 淡水北新店
Author: ruolan chen
Review: 38 Milk is delicious. I will buy it when I am not doing activities. A large cup is $60.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 淡水北新店
Author: Joyce Yang
Review:
I just consumed 2 cups of peach wine. I ordered over the phone to pick it up because I was ordering on the roadside (maybe it was a bit noisy). The meal was announced/the phone number was reported/the last name was also stated/three minutes after the notification The food was ready to be picked up (I thought the tone was a bit bad), so I hung up the phone. As soon as I got to the ordering counter, the male clerk said: Don’t order while riding your bike next time. I can’t hear your voice at all. Are you worried about my safety? In the end, I didn't confirm the meal with you... (the tone was bad), and I responded on the spot: I also think the tone of your phone call was not good (you can pick up the meal in three minutes), and I thought: you don't have a phone call to follow me either. Can you please speak louder? They definitely thought that I was talking on the phone while riding the bike, and finally we broke up with the male clerk. I took the drink and wanted to leave.
Male clerk: He took a tablet and asked to take a picture of my license plate number.
Me: What do you mean? Want to take a photo of something?
Male shop assistant: If you take a photo, you will be blacklisted. Please be careful.
Because I don’t want you to come to our store to spend money again
Me: With your attitude, you don’t need to take pictures, and I won’t shop in your store again. Don’t worry.

In short, the consumer dispute caused by a misunderstanding over a phone call, everyone is engaged in the service industry, and they all lost their minds. What your clerk said is also serious! Thank you for your hospitality, I wish you a prosperous business☺️

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 淡水北新店
Author: Candy Chen
Review: There happened to be a discount at the corner of the street today, and a message popped up when I paid for the first time. I felt that my payment should have been successful. The store did not confirm the transaction details with me, so I stupidly paid for the second time. As a result, I was dining nearby and found that the second payment was successful. Once the transaction was successful, I told the store that I just bought one cup and you didn't confirm it. I paid one more time and was scolded by the store. The failure to confirm the payment details was my problem, not the store's. I should be careful with my words next time. , I just hurried back to the store to ask them to refund the overpayment within less than 5 minutes of leaving. I was educated and trained. It turns out that "the customer is responsible for checking the transaction details, not the store". How do I remember? After scanning the QR code, the store will know whether the transaction has been credited to the account. We are just used to letting the store take another look at my transaction details. Alas, with my careless and easy-going nature, this is not a suitable place to buy.

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 淡水北新店
Author: QQ
Review:
It’s very Buddhist. There is no limit on the amount. Free delivery. The delivery service staff are very friendly. They also provide drink bags for events. The egg waffles are delicious.
Very satisfied with consumption
But I hope the pearls won’t be so sweet when soaked in them. Drinking without sugar is still super sweet, but biting into a pearl is as sweet as eating brown sugar cubes. Nowadays, people are paying attention to less sugar and less salt. I hope the boss can adjust the taste after seeing this. Thanks

Name: 功夫茶 KUNGFUTEA 淡水北新店
Author: 普洱拿鐵寶寶
Review:
The speed is really slow...Can't we do the waiting on site and the takeout equally? Why would you let people waiting in line wait until all takeaways are ready? Especially when you only have one cup on site.
But it’s good to be considerate of customers’ needs when taking meals.

Name: 麥吉machi machi 西門店
Author: Sin Er Tan
Review: Ordered cheese milk foam, is so good! Probably the best cheese milk foam I have ever drunk before!! The staff is friendly too! The atmosphere of the store is clean and quiet! But is a bit expensive compared to other drink stores, 80NTD for medium size with bubbles.

Name: 麥吉machi machi 西門店
Author: Pause On Life
Review: The tea selection is amazing, the staff is super friendly despite my lack of Mandarin knowledge and everything I tried so far was so so delicious 🤤

Name: 麥吉machi machi 西門店
Author: Laura Thessa
Review: Love the vibes, the theme, the taste. Unique and worth it!

Name: 麥吉machi machi 西門店
Author: Jack Siow
Review:
Delicious yet affordable drinks located XiMen 西门町, they offers wide range of drink from fresh brew tea, milk tea, latte, fruit juice, sparking.

I tried their fresh brew tea, it’s really refreshing and comes with strong tea aroma. Kind remind that you can always to request to adjust your sugar level and ice level.

Name: 麥吉machi machi 西門店
Author: Elaine
Review: fragrant milk tea! the menu was in chinese, but there was an english menu available online via QR code.

Name: Teaman SongShan
Author: Joseph Devera
Review:
I had the Brown Sugar Milk Tea to go and both my wife and I agreed it was very good milk tea. The tea was freshly brewed upon ordering and it really made a difference from the usual premade teas that a lot of shops use. They use non-dairy creamer for their drinks, which is up to you whether its a good or bad thing.

Edit: after spending 6 days in Taiwan and having at least 1 milk tea a day, I can say that the tea from this store was easily my favourite.

Name: Teaman SongShan
Author: Elisabeth Heckathorn
Review: Freshly brewed tea to order!  Then when I ordered no ice, he quickly blended it in the blender and then sifted out the ice.  Best bbt I’ve ever had

Name: Teaman SongShan
Author: Cynric Ho
Review: Tried the brown sugar milk tea, less ice, half sugar, one of the best ones I’ve had in my trip in Taipei. In comparison to the famous ones as well.

Name: Teaman SongShan
Author: Tyr 808
Review:
Quite possibly the best milk tea I've had so far in Taipei. They use a good ratio of milk to tea so it's creamy and not too watery, but they brew the tea strongly so you don't lose the nice tea flavor as well. Although no one wants a watery milk tea, I'm not a fan of the bubble milk and sugar drink that's become so popular, I like to be able to taste the tea in there as well and feel it's an important part of the flavor combination.

The bubbles or pearls are well prepared. I've been to some places that cook them sightly softer and with more of a brown sugar taste and I think I might prefer that better, but this place has pearls that have a nice chew to them and are all very consistent, none were over cooked or undercooked. To compare to pasta, these pearls were just slightly al dente, and that prevents that slimy feeling that overcooking creates.

All in all a perfect milk tea and it's so good that not only will I come back for more, but I'll probably even travel the distance to come back here next time rather than just order what's close to me.

Name: Teaman SongShan
Author: Saurav Kothari
Review: Lovely staff. Great tea and awesome sandwiches. Despite so many places that seek tea around this area I kept going back to Tea Man. Highly recommend trying their toasts.

Name: 一茶工房
Author: Chien Amanda
Review: I’ve tried August Osmanthus (tea olive) Oolong Tea NTD$60 八月桂花烏龍茶. It’s flavorful with nature tea scents. Would definitely come back to try more 🍵

Name: 一茶工房
Author: Zhiwei Fan
Review:
Ordered their No.1 Oolong Pearl Milk Tea.

Their pearls are extremely bad and tasteless.

Oolong tea was very bitter and lacked depth. Not a good tea by any standards.

Name: 一茶工房
Author: Marieke Burghoorn
Review: One of the best bubble tea and service, but always out of bubbles…

Name: 一茶工房
Author: Mings
Review:
🙂/🥹

Have if they’d provided other accompaniments aside from bubbles or agar. The tea itself was fragrant, would’ve been nice with a green tea jelly. Something less cloyingly sweet

Name: 一茶工房
Author: Best Foodie
Review:
Expensive but very diluted milk tea
Bubble is not good too
Tea is way too bitter
They might use bad tea or dip for too long
So sad and very bad taste

Name: 50 Lan
Author: s s
Review: Always good!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: 熊天翔
Review: 經典！ the one beverage you must have if you’re in Taiwan!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: СОНЦЕ W
Review: Good boba place!!!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Kate Chen
Review:
Asking for 2 cups...Both cups are wrong....
1 cup of micro-icing and half sugar....make it into micro-icing and remove the sugar
1 cup of Zhenbo Coconut... Sugar-free ice is used to make black tea base... But it is made into sugar-free slightly iced black tea. If I want to drink this kind of sugar-free tea... can't I just make it myself?

The point is: There is a ghost order in front of me? No one can order... In the end, I can only cancel the order...

The three clerks were all chatting there...not listening to the customers...
Super ridiculous!

Name: 50 Lan
Author: Vanessa Tseng
Review:
Ask Boba to give Pearl
Calling five cups, two cups is wrong
Don't know what you are doing
It's okay, don't call this store

Name: TRUEDAN Taipei Jinan Shop
Author: Michael Pratt
