Review: Im from the US and came here for some world famous bubble tea.  For whatever reason either my card and google pay weren't working or their machine wasn't working. But they ended up giving me a free drink and it was delicious! The bona was some of the most tender I have ever experienced and the tea was creamy and silky. Thanks for the great experience.

Name: TRUEDAN Taipei Jinan Shop
Author: #1 Food Lover
Review: The boba is soft, chewy and sweet. Paired with the fresh milk and richness of the cream it really is some of the best boba in Taipei. I got mine 70% sweet with less ice. They do tend to run a bit on the sweeter side

Name: TRUEDAN Taipei Jinan Shop
Author: cary Chen
Review: good

Name: TRUEDAN Taipei Jinan Shop
Author: 孫國哲
Review: Nice

Name: TRUEDAN Taipei Jinan Shop
Author: Chang B.
Review:
3.6⭐. A friend happened to know that there is a buy one get one free drink, and you can add pearls for a fee. This time I ordered a black tea latte. The taste was similar to other beverage shops, but it was cheaper due to events. I ordered two cups and used the cute portable cup holder to hold it. It is recommended that you put a cushion on it as it is made of paper and may break. The store clerk has a good attitude.
Supports multiple payment methods.
20240714

Name: 御私藏 Cozy Tea Loft大巨蛋門市
Author: Alex Delun
Review: great!

Name: 御私藏 Cozy Tea Loft大巨蛋門市
Author: baking paner
Review: my all time favorite❤️

Name: 御私藏 Cozy Tea Loft大巨蛋門市
Author: Jack Wang
Review: I thought it was very novel to see the store using automatic machines to make drinks. I bought the Blast Man Lemon Tea and I will buy it again.

Name: 御私藏 Cozy Tea Loft大巨蛋門市
Author: 徐羽君
Review: I saw dried meat pearl milk tea reported in the news and hesitated after DMing me, but finally bought a cup and took a sip. I was pleasantly surprised. It was fresh, sweet and delicious.

Name: 御私藏 Cozy Tea Loft大巨蛋門市
Author: A3504-徐瑜珮-臺中西屯附幼
Review: Everyone recommends their lemon tea and whole lychee tea, which is delicious but a little too sweet. I recommend ordering half sugar ❤️

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Jessica Donoho
Review: Not sure what all the bad reviews are about. We didn't have a coupon but we stopped by early morning. We were the only ones there but she was fast and we looked at the tea collection inside. I got pu-erh milk tea and it was delightful. She also spoke English well

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Reni Lim
Review: The $5 off voucher from the its neighbours is a trap. There is only 1 staff who will slowly make drinks. You can finish the food and drink is not ready yet. Not to mention the drinks are still expensive after the discount. Absolute tourist trap.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Christian J
Review: Absolutely horrible. Tricked into coming here from getting a $5 NTD coupom from the scallion pancake place to the right. The way the lady scrapes the last of the tapioca balls from a quite dirty looking container, coupled and unfriendly attitude. Big nope. Do not come here. The good news is they returned my money upon request. Well actually the head boss. We did it not the lady.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Jean Teo
Review: Had the pineapple and like juice. Very refreshing.

Name: 點點茶 Dian Dian Tea
Author: Artitaya Tanngern
Review: Ok but too expensive than what we got

Name: Kebuke Ripe Black Tea Taipei Kaifeng Branch
Author: Rafa Loves Travel
Review:
Nice milk tea.
They also have earl grey milk tea.

Name: Kebuke Ripe Black Tea Taipei Kaifeng Branch

Review: Good tea

Name: Kebuke Ripe Black Tea Taipei Kaifeng Branch

Review: Good

Name: Kebuke Ripe Black Tea Taipei Kaifeng Branch

Review: Nice

Name: Kebuke Ripe Black Tea Taipei Kaifeng Branch
Author: 馬小
Review: It's a decent franchise store. The staff's mood is average, not high or low, but they're not annoying either. It would be better if they smiled more.

Name: 樂法 Le Phare - 市府店
Address: Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd, 6號1樓
Author: Mariani tjio
Review:
best mango, try mango grape fruit yogurt with green tea jelly
good staff

Name: 樂法 Le Phare - 市府店
Address: Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd, 6號1樓

Name: 樂法 Le Phare - 市府店
Address: Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd, 6號1樓
Author: Ray Liu
Review: Good

Name: 樂法 Le Phare - 市府店
Address: Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd, 6號1樓
Author: Jason Hung
Review: Healthy and fashion choice of drinks to go. Varieties based on fresh apple juice.

Name: 樂法 Le Phare - 市府店
Address: Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd, 6號1樓
Author: Huyen Bui
Review: Good coffee

Name: 老派金魚Goldfish Bubbletea
Author: Gorawich K
Review:
Ordinary milk tea store. I went to this place because of the 4 stars review, but it was a huge disappointed and a big mistake. I ordered the most popular milk tea with bubbles and 100% sweetness, it was tasteless. I didn't know how can they got 4 stars review. The price was not reasonable at all. Recommend to try other shops.
-- updated 16 July after the owner replied--
For the rude replying from the owner, i think it is individual to comment and share their experience. You commented only the people who gave your shop a bad review and also you should not judge other people about their thoughts.

Name: 老派金魚Goldfish Bubbletea
Author: Max T Tran
Review: Drinks are so plain. Price is pretty expensive. I feel like they water down the tea and just add sugar in. Milk tea is not that great.

Name: 老派金魚Goldfish Bubbletea
Author: Charmaine Leow
Review: Got the black tea w bubbles. Their tea taste is nice and the pearls are nice too!! I enjoyed this cup.

Name: 老派金魚Goldfish Bubbletea
Author: sakura group
Review:
Nice bubble tea place. Its cheap at NTD30 - 60 per order.

Service is fast but not too friendly.

Name: 老派金魚Goldfish Bubbletea
Author: Hayley Tan
Review: Saw this shop as i walk around ximending, ordered their grapefruit green tea, its not bad, refreshing and nice!!

Name: Poppy Charming Drinks
Author: 劉宇凡
Review: It’s good to eat

Name: Poppy Charming Drinks
Author: Cheuk Yiu Tang
Review: Nice

Name: Poppy Charming Drinks
Author: Liam Mitchell
Review: Swag

Name: Poppy Charming Drinks
Author: Jenny Kuo
Review: Good

Name: Poppy Charming Drinks
Author: Lio Ju
Review: Pearls are rarely given +1. The pearls in this store are even less than those in nearby Wutonghao, Dezheng and Longjiao. The milk tea is not particularly delicious either.

Name: Hugdayday烈奶茶
Author: Vivian S.
Review: Great location and great drinks. Loved the mango grapefruit coconut milk drink, it was like a full meal with chunks of coconut jelly in the drink. The signature milk tea was alright, we got it as recommended but it tasted quite bitter.

Name: Hugdayday烈奶茶
Author: Nicole Hui
Review: Boba is super light and jelly like. Definitely one of the more unique bobas I had in Taiwan! Tea flavor was sufficient but not too overpowering. Milk tea was not watered down.

Name: Hugdayday烈奶茶
Author: Nathan Lara
Review: Green tea with fresh milk is great.  Very refreshing.  They do look very busy and popular. But my queue time wasn’t that long (around 5 minutes).  You can adjust the sugar level and ice level to your preference.  If you need a refreshing drink give this place a shot.👍

Name: Hugdayday烈奶茶
Author: Neptunethelovebird
Review: Oolong roasted bubble tea

Name: Hugdayday烈奶茶
Author: ocean LAI
Review: The sample on the counter was very dark brown, but the actual one I got was very light brown! It's said to be slightly sugary, but after one sip, it's super sweet and tastes nothing like tea! Consumers who like to drink strong milk tea should be careful! It’s bland and hard to drink! False advertising!

Name: 梅子兔飲料店
Author: Nicole
Review: Highly recommend Lohan's Tea shop. There are a variety of fresh bubble teas and fresh fruit smoothies from blended nectar. My husband got the Pearl Milk Boba Latte #3 and I got a passion fruit smoothie. Both were delicious and fresh. The one-woman operation is efficient and she clearly takes pride in her product. Great value. About 59 NTD per drink.

Name: 梅子兔飲料店
Author: Vanessa Gabriela
Review: I got the normal milk tea with pearl! It was my favourite bubble tea during my whole Taiwan trip, had to go back another time :))) The uncle working there was really nice too!

Name: 梅子兔飲料店
Author: C J
Review:
It's OK.

She was able to accommodate our request of no sugar and little ice.

Name: 梅子兔飲料店
Author: natasha sung
Review: The plum green tea, less sweet was the best drink I had during our Taiwan trip. It tasted hand made and refreshing.

Name: 梅子兔飲料店
Author: Mikko
Review: RECOMMENDED. My partner and I bought mango slush with pearl and milk tea with pearl. We both had a great experience with the one-person team running the bbt joint. Quick and a great communicator. The taste was exceptional. My partner and I would order from them again!

Name: 巴伯Q奶 Bubble tea 黑糖珍珠牛奶專賣店
Author: Amanda Da rosa
Review: I asked for soy milk and it was really good, I don’t know if the have English menu but you can just show a picture to the lady that she is gonna understand, they have 2 sizes the large and medium, I asked for the medium and I this it was enough, it was very good that boba is hot and soy milk is cold so it is a very sensorial drink, they ware pretty fãs to make and it’s worth every penny payed around nt$45

Name: 巴伯Q奶 Bubble tea 黑糖珍珠牛奶專賣店
Author: Jerry Yang (Jerry Yang)
Review: It should be the best “bubble with milk” after 陳三鼎 was closed in NTU shopping area. Plus, I may often consider to visit it because of the affordable price.

Name: 巴伯Q奶 Bubble tea 黑糖珍珠牛奶專賣店
Author: Ros Dolor
Review: For just NTD35, the brown sugar bubble milk tea is so delicious! The bubble is warm and chewy soft. The sweetness is just the right amount for my taste. 💕

Name: 巴伯Q奶 Bubble tea 黑糖珍珠牛奶專賣店
Author: Tatchaya
Review: I came here because the San Cheng Ding closed, and the bubble fresh milk here amazed me! It was so good!!

Name: 巴伯Q奶 Bubble tea 黑糖珍珠牛奶專賣店
Author: Lynn S
Review: Not bad and the price is more competitive compared to surroundings

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Bob Chau
Review:
SKA is a small and quaint neighborhood coffee shop that brews up a nice cup of java. The cappuccino is great and the ham and cheese sandwich is tasty. Jamie, the owner, is friendly and a super chill guy.

If you’re a real coffee lover, I highly recommended SKA Coffee for daily fix.

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Evgenia Martynova
Review: Delicious coffee and nice food. An owner is a great guy, thank you again for getting recommendations of hikes around Taipei for us and all the small talks! We keep going back to memories about this place!

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Benjamin “SEOux Indianer” Wingerter
Review: Space for 3-4 people but it’s worthstopping buy if you want a refreshing juice infused coffee at a hot day. Music good, individually made bagel 🥯 tasty, and good conversations in Spanish, mandarin or English. Muy bien, 謝謝

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Kenny Tran
Review: The flat white was sensational. It's always difficult to find good coffee away from home but ska coffee nailed it. Great atmosphere, must visit in Taipei!

Name: SKA Coffee
Author: Ramses Del Cura
Review: Super nice coffee shop! We were passing by and my daughters were hungry and we enjoy a hot ham and cheese croissant 🥐 with a chocolate milk. The owner great guy! For sure we will come back!

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Kevin Lin
Review:
I don’t know when this coffee shop opened on the top floor of the office. Come to the 7-11 on the 24th floor and stop by to taste the coffee.
Asang, who was cleaning up when he left, asked me, doesn’t your company already have coffee☕️? The black man's face looks like a question mark... You can tell if the company's coffee is good or not. "If there is always no one in front of the coffee machine, do you think it will be a fragrant coffee?"
In addition, you need to have the access control card of this building to enter and exit. Except for employees, you are visitors before you can reach the 24th floor.

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: YC
Review: I ordered a sparkling drink that cost nearly 100 yuan and was told that the sweetness could not be adjusted. I originally thought it was adjusted with boiled jam, but it turned out that "a lot of fructose syrup" was squeezed directly into it! I was told again not to squeeze in so much fructose, but the service staff also said that it was the boss's rule that no adjustments could be made!

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: CC Jin
Review: I ordered 8 cups of coffee on the morning of 6/14 and told the clerk that I would rush to deliver it to the conference room. The next customer ordered 1 cup. Then the clerk slowly made the coffee and gave it to the next customer before starting. My coffee was served too slowly, and I gave it to the next person first in front of the guests. This was not a good response.

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Candice Hui
Review: You should explain on Google that only employees of the commercial building can enter and use it, so that people will go there and waste time :(

Name: noco Coffee
Address: 24樓, No. 68號, Section 5 of Zhongxiao East RoadSection 5 of Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Lotus Huang
Review: The coffee is delicious and the landlady is attentive

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Earn S.
Review:
It’s located near Huashan Creative Park, this cafe is a convenient spot for me while waiting for my friends to go watch movie together. It also seems like a good place for working, with available charging spots.

I found the coffee reasonably priced and quite good. The brownie I tried was also nice.

However, the cafe is not very big and was quite crowded when I visited. Overall, a nice spot to grab a coffee and snack, especially if you're in the area.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Maxime Michel
Review:
Café

Filter coffee - 140
Apparently not good considering the price and the quantity.

Latte - 140
Not bad but once again the quantity is quite small.

All-in-all, the place looks good, it's modern and clean however it is pricey.
Maybe due to the location.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Pei
Review: Patronised on a weekday morning for quick fix. Cozy & minimalist. Sitting by the bar overlooking the busy roads ahead gave a feeling of world bustling by. It was healing. Sit back, relax and enjoy the coffee. I had Peru beans, it was fruity & nutty, truly recommended.

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Andrew Robertson
Review:
This place feels like an oasis, and with the traffic outside it gives a bit of Shibuya crossing vibes on a small scale.

Loved it, great coffee as well.

Thanks!

Name: Paper St. Coffee Company
Author: Mix
Review:
Drop by if you're interested in an Australian-style cafe within the heart of Taipei, just an intersection across Huashan 1914 Creative Park. 🌳⛰️🎨

If you're a fan of the flat white, be sure to choose the medium roast for an authentic taste of home down under. 🌏☕🦘

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Xjo Jo
Review: This tiny coffee shop has a great vibe. We only purchased coffee beans, but the barista was helpful and knowledgeable. We loved the creative underground café interior. Definitely visit if you have time!

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Everardo Ortiz
Review:
Delicious coffee. Great and knowledgeable barista. Amazing atmosphere in the basement. The cake was amazing especially the white chocolate matcha, the soft center was so delicious I couldn't stop eating it.

Knowledge of coffee and barista skills are very good. A must try for coffee connoisseurs and lovers.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: John
Review:
Ordered espresso + cappuccino combo and banana cake.

Great little cafe with very good coffee. Fantastic music selection. Good place to chill and enjoy peace and quiet.

Downsides - basement location (no natural light) and no toilet.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: cl noods
Review: I ordered really interesting coffee - Espresso + tonic water. It was really creative to enjoy coffee in a new way that I’ll definitely try once I’m back home.

Name: Instil Coffee Dimension
Address: 號地下, 2 Lane 78, Section 2, Fuxing S Rd
Author: S. T
Review:
This is a basement cafe so it can be a little dingy (just my personal preference for brighter cafes). The coffee was decent though I noticed coffee in Taiwan tends to be on the lighter side, so perhaps request for a double shot if you like your coffee stronger.

The staff seemed a little cold and unfriendly which was disappointing. I wanted to like this place. But unfortunately fell short for me.

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Andrew “Andy” Davis
Review: Great little neighborhood coffee shop. Small upstairs but offers downstairs seating which is quite expansive and larger than expected. Calm atmosphere with background music and industrial design theme. Coffee is good. Takes time to make but worth slowing things down to enjoy. Can recommend. Good options and snacks like scones and waffles are also available.

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Navaneetha Balaganesan
Review: Cozy and a nice place with amazing coffee. The basque cheesecake was awesome. Definitely try their Danish toast. Totally recommend

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Daniel H
Review: Not a place for pour over coffee. They have only 5-6 choices of beans. After I placed my order, made my payment and waited for 5 minutes, the staff came over to tell me that the beans ran out. Then when I picked another one of the same price, she said is out too. In the end, I had to pick something more expensive. I had to go and cancel my original credit card payment and redo the payment again. While doing that, just realised my butter toast was sitting there for awhile. Music is techno pop, 9-10 am in the morning. This place is ok, very neat and modern looking but the Taipei coffee scene is world class, there are tons of better establishments here and I don’t understand why they get average 4.9 stars while others are 4-4.5 stars. Some of those rated 4.3 stars places I been to are way much better. More cosy, more friendly. To come in and grab a cup of espresso or milk drink, this place look good. For a sit down to enjoy your pour over, go somewhere else

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Jiahui Tan
Review: The coffee here reminds me of the ones from Arabica %. It has a tinge of sweetness and the coffee is not bitter. My friend enjoyed her avocado coffee which she described as creamy with a tinge of coffee. The tiramisu and basque cheese were both delicious.

Name: Coffee Law
Address: Alley 40, Lane 181, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, 15號1樓
Author: Will Ang
Review:
Stopped by this place to get out of the rain and it's so good! Friendly baristas, a clean stainless steel interior decor and most importantly bomb drinks and dessert.

We had the iced latte with oat milk, good but not great, the Valrhona chocolate latte legit tastes like school truck Milo (Malaysians IYKYK) and the tiramisu was fluffy and pillowy.

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Monsicha Pongrujikorn
Review: Little hole in the wall coffee roaster that has home-roasted and imported blended coffees, they also make their own cold brew that takes 4 days to make. The cold brew was very nice but coffee is generally quite light in taste especially if had with milk. They do have oat milk.

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Sixian Lee
Review: Chanced upon this vibey place that specialises in coffee! Store owner was very friendly and could detect our Singaporean accent and struck a convo with us! The coffee was super smooth and to our taste

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Tom
Review:
Not sure if the guy had a bad day or what exactly happened here here but the reviews here do not reflect our experience in any way:

We ordered 1 oat milk cappucino and 1 matcha latte:
- when ordering he didnt ask whether we wanted to have them in his shop or take out, but instead served us plastic cups right away (ok, can happen)
- the beans were pre grinded (big red flag)
- the cappucino took him not even 30secs to make incl. foaming the milk and „latte art“. see for yourself how that turned out on the picture attached (spoiler: i had one sip and left it there)

- the matcha latte was so hot that it burned my tongue.

It felt like either we werent welcome or the guy had no clue how to run a coffee shop. would like to give more stars but it was a waste of money

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: Frank Lee
Review: Ideal for grab to go tho there are some tables for sitting yet it’s quite a small space I’d feel claustrophobic.  The cappuccino is good but on the light roast side so if you’re Italian or s am used to strong coffee then you might want to ask for double shots but I didn’t see that option on the menu.  Tho the price is very competitive

Name: 色咖啡(Color Coffee)
Author: NT Is the best
Review: Delicious coffee with the atmosphere so chilled. I think the owner roasted coffee beans by himself. I ordered iced americano the tase is very perfect !👌🏻

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Xin Yi Steph
Review: Toast set has a cut off timing better to go early :) simple breakfast toast to fuel the start of your day. Been here afew times, breakfast definitely has some 古早味. Visit them :)

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Wendy Cheng
Review:
A little underwhelmed...

What did I get
I got the americano, honey tea and some snacks from the front counter - almond cookies and this flour treat. The coffee was okay.. nothing particular. They did not have any non-dairy substitute, so I had to have it black. The cookies are really good, very tasty. The other snack was okay... it kept sticking to my teeth...

Environment
I ran into this place just walking around. I seems to be a small space and they have the line outside. There are markings on the floor. It was fairly quickly since it was a quick sit and drink.

Niceness of the staff...
Again, not a I have time to answer all your questions. They give you the menu and hope you figure it out. Don't ask for any suggestions.

Dollar
Relatively inexpensive.

Yes?
I would.

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Yi Ling
Review:
Came here from the hype and attracted by the displays of traditional snacks on the entrance. Before even entering, the aroma of roasted coffee wafted through the streets already.

We came at a non peak hour and were able to get a seat immediately. When we left during lunch hour, this place was so crowded we could not get out of the door easily...

However, we waited about 20 mins for our coffee when we only ordered 2. There was only 1 staff per section of the ground, such as the Brewer, waitress, roaster, and To-Go snacks. With orders piled up, the coffee brewer naturally had more load to carry than her speed could handle.

Some customers were very snappy as the waitress did not go over to take their orders as told.

Nonetheless, we tried 2 of their coffee:

☕️ Strong Blended Coffee
☕️ Charcoal Making
No point writing a customised review for each of them because they tasted so similar to me it was disappointing. I was expecting something stronger in flavours or a clear distinction in both. But it was really just watered-down coffee that carried a freshly brewed taste. For a price of NT 100, I would expect a taste that lives up to its price tag. We left immediately after drinking our coffee.
I rate: 1/5 🌟

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: joel tan
Review:
tldr: you have to look past their service (manned- by an senior “lady boss”), and you’ll find some really good coffee and food

Old school coffee house where you can get a really good coffee fix and respite on a hot day. Expresso was full-bodied in smell and taste, not sour. Chocolate cake is also very good. Latte was balanced.

Name: Fong Da Coffee
Author: Leslie Tang
Review: I had a basic breakfast set.  It was OK as in nothing to shot about.  I bought the coffee beans and they grind for me.  I strongly recommend the coffee beans and the aroma is fantastic.  I bought the "Manbo",  and "Dark Roast".  It taste so good.

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: DeltaX
Review: The cafe's contemporary design feels comfortable at first sight. The door has a fantastic design. The cafe It caters to the younger crowds in Taipei. I see many people having meetings, as the settings are conducive and straightforward—excellent motivational liners are on the side walls. The black Truffle moon was good, just not to my taste. The latter was remarkable. Service was excellent!

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Jamie Joseph
Review:
We were here on a Wednesday morning around 9am . And service is ok as there were 2 staff on duty . Coffee is good and we really love the cinnamon roll . They are so soft and delicious. Chocolate croissant is good too .
We spent almost an hour here enjoying our food and chit chatting . Highly recommended !

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Daniel Schreiber
Review:
This review is for the owners. Stop being so cheap and hire more staff to run your business. There was only 1 guy working and the poor guy was struggling to do his best keeping up with the orders. We sat here for over 15 minutes waiting for a coffee and watched him have to turn away over 10 guests because he told them they’d have to wait since he was the only one working.

Coffee is great, but be prepared to wait a long time unless the owners learn how to run a business.

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Olya A. D.
Review: There are different flavours of coffee which really taste good. Different types of desserts 🍨 . Do not expect too much from croissant because it is might not be freshly backed but still taste good. if you go in the morning probably you can enjoy freshly backed croissants. the place is recommended especially it seems a good place for work and study.

Name: Dreamers Coffee Roasters Zhongxiao Fuxing Shop
Address: No. 7號, Lane 135, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Dr. Sathiyalingam Kannaiyan
Review: Very nice place to have with friends.. well decorated interiors.. Taste of coffee taste good.. I love cappuccino.. quotes on the cups and on the wall are amazing.. busy shop right next to Starbucks. I loved dreamers coffee. I recommend to visit this shop in taipei

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Julia Chen
Review:
You can either have your coffee to-go or there's a few stools for sit-ins. Had a great Yirgacheffe coffee, will defs visit again :)

#士東市場 #單品咖啡 #日曬耶加雪菲

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Per van der Horst
Review: Definitely the best single origin espresso, macchiato and cappuccino in Taipei. My favorites are Sidamo and Yirgacheffe unwashed.

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Syrena C.
Review: good good

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: Yao
Review:
I ordered a single-origin latte at your store at 9 o'clock this morning. The barista who made the Italian style didn't seem to have enough experience; the light roasted beans, the milk was over 90 degrees, and the milk foam was too thick and not dense. I hope that the store can pay more attention to the workplace education part, rather than letting novices directly serve cups, which affects the customer's perception.
I'm also a barista and I hope you guys can keep up the good work.

Name: Coffee and Tea 天母精品咖啡
Address: 號 48 攤位, No. 100, Shidong Rd
Author: ching2 ching2
Review:
Specialty 70

Black, too sour.

Tasty ☀️☀️☀️
Visit again☀️

Name: Coffee in Space
Address: No. 6-3號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Matt Pelmear
Review: Great pourover and cappuccino, but I really loved the Earl Grey cheesecake! I had the Taiwan single origin pourover and it was light and well-rounded. There is indoor and outdoor seating, and great service (in either Chinese or English). I can't believe I didn't know about this place sooner... will definitely be back.

Name: Coffee in Space
Address: No. 6-3號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Jennifer Sun
Review: Loved it! Surprised it was empty when I came. I got the brown sugar latte with their pudding. It was nice and a great place for me to work

Name: Coffee in Space
Address: No. 6-3號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Mandii
Review: I came by the day before I leave Taiwan, and it definitely impressed me. The pour over I chose was Colombian Quindio, and it was amazing! So fruity, I love it! Very affordable (to me) since New York pour overs are expensive (⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠)

Name: Coffee in Space
Address: No. 6-3號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: EightNine (EightNine)
Review:
Wonderful coffee. The barista is very kind and meticulous in making drinks.

The ice drip with cream is amazing.

Name: Coffee in Space
Address: No. 6-3號, Lane 122, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd
Author: Hanmin Su
Review:
Awesome place. I really love the music that played in this space. Pretty nice.
And staff is nice and warm to customers.
Coffee is absolutely fabulous!
Can't offer more stars🤣
The only problem is there is no restroom inside..

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Johnson Chou
Review:
Arrived early and personally speaking, it was worth to wait.
Ordered hot-pressed tuna+ corn sandwich, inside has plenty of veggies, it’s good combination.
Try croissant with ham and egg, I liked sauces inside.
Finally the main character, tiramisu soufflé.  Very fluffy and well dressed ,texture and extra cookie crumbs, Perfect!  But, warmer is better.
Latte; a good choice of coffee bean, not bad.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Jonny so
Review:
Not too bad if compared to uk prices, customer service is good and shop unit is good. They sell Japanese style pancakes but this item will require pre order/ reserve.
430 ndt for 2 sandwiches with extras added and two milk teas.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: David Rotter
Review:
Amazing food and coffee in a hole-in-the-wall place in Taipei. Stupidly cheap prices and great food unfortunately lead to big crowds at times.

Highly recommend the single origin pour over coffee and their souffles!

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: Layne Mostyn
Review: Nice coffee shop, but prices seem to have increased significantly within the past 3 months, judging by others' photos. Minimum order policy also applies.

Name: Coffee Roaster
Author: VIVIAN HO
Review: Nice cozy small space. Iced Americano is great, not acidic. Heats up croissant before serving, plus point for the service.  It’s light and fluffy, not sinful. Great for light bite.

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Jeremy Ferre
Review: The brown sugar coffee latte was my favorite and I ordered this multiple times. I ordered a cinnamon one day and a basic scone another day. Both were delicious. The scone was perfect. The cinnamon roll was nice, not too sweet. Service, including English speaking, was wonderful. This is a cute place to visit.

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Konstantin Sevryukov
Review: I recently visited this cafe and ordered a cold mocha to go, and I was pleasantly impressed by its taste! The balance of flavors was perfect, making it one of the best mochas I've had in a long time. The coffee had a rich, robust flavor that paired perfectly with the smooth chocolate, creating a delightful and refreshing drink. The ambiance of the cafe is cozy and inviting, with a warm and friendly atmosphere that makes it an ideal spot to relax and unwind. Whether you're looking to grab a quick coffee to go or sit down and enjoy a meal, this place has something for everyone. The staff were attentive and courteous, ensuring a pleasant experience from start to finish. The menu offers a wide variety of options, from delicious coffee beverages to tasty food items, catering to all tastes and preferences. I highly recommend this cafe if you're craving a quality coffee to go or if you want to enjoy a leisurely meal in a comfortable setting. It's definitely a place worth visiting again and again!

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Joel. cs
Review: A small cozy cafe with great owner, I recommend the brown sugar latte, and will definitely try their curry next time. 😊😊😊❤️❤️❤️

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: Jie-Ting Jiang
Review: Visited here to get a warm meal in a cold winter day. Eventually, not only my stomach got warmed by the delicious dishes, but also my heart was warmed by the friendly staffs. It is just like a little reliable cafeteria in your neighborhood, where you can always take a little break and temporarily run away from annoying things to get recharged, which is rare in a fast paced city like Taipei.

Name: ä couple coffee
Author: wm H
Review: Hands down best coffee I've had in Taiwan.  Coffee has distinct berry and wine taste.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Edward Niedbalski
Review: Great coffee ☕ and polite staff, a great little place for a quick morning 🌄 coffee!  And best of all, they have functioning WiFi, unless the shop next door.  Definitely worth a cup!

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Alan Hellawell
Review: The hot cap has three shots: I love it strong. Tons of noise from the street but offers a nice, tiny refuge. Their bagged beans seem to be amongst the cheapest in town.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Michael Hildebrand
Review:
1. Staff messed up my very simple order
2. Staff did not give me change from the money I paid
3. Staff made the coffee for the person behind me in line, before even starting on mine. In fact, they waited a while before starting on mine.

When they finally gave me my coffee, they seemed angry at me, rather than apologetic for the above.

Shop is pretty small, not a lot of space to wait for your order. Coffee is good.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Cornelius Piros
Review: The price is affordable with cozy little place sharing with Dongmen 3 hostel. Got an hot chocolate, and it as delicious.  Got  Barista was nice and put a lot of care and attention into making the drink.

Name: TWO SHOTS COFFEE 東門店
Author: Ellis Koifman
Review: May not look like much but for three weeks I've been passing by this coffee place smelling their beans. Today I finally decided to go for it and wow. Not only is the coffee fantastic, they also have an exceptional selection. All of it at reasonable prices too. I don't drink coffee everyday, but when I do I know where I'll be coming.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Jin
Review:
Friendly barista that greeted me and was patient when taking my order. He also had no issues when I asked if I could take a few pictures. Good atmosphere and you can tell the shop cares about producing good coffee.

Good times. Hope this helped.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Ryan Covey
Review: Awesome A+ coffee. Can’t wait to try the cold brew. Very nice little cafe.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Frank Chun Yat Li
Review:
I had the hazelnut iced latte, flavour was great. Theres no AC but they had a fan and it was fine in terms of heat.

The decor is pretty hipster.. They have their own roaster right at the entrance.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Kevin Cameron
Review: Pretty good spro, roasting on premises.

Name: 口力口非自烘咖啡Kouli Coffee
Author: Samuel Tersigni
Review: Had a fantastic cappuccino here. Great coffee flavour, nice presentation, reasonable price. Only a few places to sit, but great for takeout.

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: yang mmsg
Review:
My wife and I had this during our last 2 days of the trip.

She love their coffee latte…
…and apple black tea for me.

I’m not too particular with coffee, but gosh their coffee is really something.

I tried lemon honey tea and apple black tea.

Like many other reviews, their apple black tea is heavenly!

The tea itself has a blend of sweetness and bitterness. And the apple cut dice makes the whole experience great and unique.

The business owners are really friendly, courteous and hospitable as well.

Must try!

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Andrew Robertson
Review:
After an early morning flight into a misty Taipei, next to my hotel was a small joint, still closed and Google said opening on Monday.

Turns out they ARE open on Saturday morning and provided me with a brown sugar latte and toasted cheese sandwich.

Cash only, which is normal for small shops, and the gent at the counter spoke English!

Loved it, check the photos it tastes as good as it looks and feels as cozy as the warm lights show.

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Alan Hellawell
Review: (June, 2024 update): much better cappuccino; may have changed the milk. (Old review: “Very nice barista. I think it’s the milk in the cappuccino that wasn’t great.”)

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Grace Magdalene Ong
Review: Great coffee or tea fix if you’re staying at the hotel next door or in the area! Service was excellent as well

Name: Bros Coffee
Author: Denise Lee
Review: Think they ran out of printed cups... Coffee is one of the better tasting cups around the area (the rest were more diluted/milky). Well-balanced and nutty. Ordered the latte and mocha.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Kerk Low
Review:
Was attracted by the interesting theme of this cafe.  The cafe was decently spacious especially in the context of costs of space in Taipei.
Coffee is average, but the decor is interesting.
If passing by, can drop by and check them out.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Kaeru Shu
Review: Near MRT(metro) ShiLin station, good place for a cup of coffee.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Ivan Luu
Review: I am a tourist and I happened to come in this coffee shop one day Jan 2024, the coffee was up to standard but what happened was we wanted to dine in coffees . We are 3 people but ordered only two coffees, the staff said you needed to order 3 coffee cause we are 3 people.you cannot dine in or sat on table unless you ordered 3.i did not understand what kind of service is this? However, I did not think I have been treated nicely in a way.i went so many places the whole world I have never came across this situation.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Valerie Huang
Review: The quality of drink and dessert matches to the prices👌, and if you wanna enjoy spacious seats, visit here during weekdays.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜士林店
Author: Jun Tang
Review: Average tasting coffee, good environment for work with outlets free to use. The only annoyance is that you’ll have to get water from downstairs. Wish they had water available upstairs too since guests are expected to serve themselves. Their bagels were whatever.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: I CHEN CHEN
Review: Excellent place for a good cup of coffee.  From espresso to hand pouring all very professional.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Order ice Americano and cold brew coffee. Both are all right. Coffee flavour is bitter.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Jenny Hsu
Review: Love this little gem and it’s one of the rare places in Taipei that actually does decent coffee.

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: Winnie Wu
Review: Very good coffee with a lot of care! And we also liked the waffle very much

Name: Twi A Coffee Roasters 錘子咖啡 (士東店)
Address: No. 11之1號, Lane 70, Section 2, Zhongcheng Rd
Author: 헤이썸머 HeySummer
Review: Server was kind, but the coffee didn't taste good. They changed cafelatte to a double shot because it tasted like just milk 🥲 Waffles are too sugary but crispy. I'm giving you two points because they were kind, but I don't want to visit anymore!!!

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Ken Wong
Review:
Stopped by for a pour over coffee and a Vietnamese style sandwich. Both were very good 👍.

Would stop by again for more delicious food.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: James Lo
Review: Solid breakfast sandwiches, make sure to add eggs! Drinks are great, besides coffee they have a good selection of teas and hot steam milky teas

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Jerry Yang (Jerry Yang)
Review: I tried the signature coffee “Flavored Latte with Banana”by using Uber eats, and felt not bad! I guess I may re-order due to its affordable price.

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: siva raj
Review: local taiwanese coffee outlet

Name: Banana Blue Coffee｜不限時咖啡廳｜大直店
Author: Tony
Review: Nice a big cup of hot latte in the cold winter with a chill atmosphere

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Georgin Lau
Review: We had the pour over which was extracted well. Simple place without much seating but good coffee overall. A little pricey for the hand pour in my personal opinion, I have had better ones at a slightly lower price.

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Aaron Neal
Review:
Asked for an americano but was advised their house black was the equivalent.  The cup drank very sour. Either that was by design and their style, or the brew was not done properly. Maybe their espresso drinks are good?
The space looks nice and comfortable though.

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Lindy Luu
Review: We just passed this cute little coffee shop today and decided we would go in for a coffee. The lovely barista who speaks perfect English suggested we try the oat milk cappuccino which was to our surprise amazingly good! The coffee beans are roasted out back and the taste is amazing. We will definitely be returning to this coffee shop soon! We highly recommend this to any coffee lovers out there!

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Pui Ngai Low
Review: A very memorable cup of iced latte for me. Flavour wise it was a perfectly balanced cup! Lemon tart was also very delicious! Staff provided good prompt and attentive service!! Craving for another cup already!

Name: NORMAL COFFEE 仁愛店
Author: Kelvin Yung
Review: Higher end coffee but lives up to the price. A spin-off from All Day Roasting Company. Shop has limited bar seating. Simplistic decor. They roast their own beans which is signature to their style and the reason why they're so good. Portions are smaller than expected, leaves you wanting more.

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Kevin Huang
Review: For those who’s heavily rely on americano, this place provides incredible coffee latte for you to shift to with no problem! Honestly, I’ve never had a latte with so many layers of taste, simply amazing. The pour over coffees are well known in this place as well, coffee beans are freshly roasted every single night with the Ray’s love! Strongly recommending this place without a doubt because you get a quality coffee at a extremely affordable price!

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Jethro Liou
Review: Ta already sets the bar high with its hand ground drip coffee with an excellent variety of beans to select but this time Ta has set the bar higher for take out. Just look at just minor details to ensure take out coffee doesn’t spill.

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Plang's World
Review: This place hold a special place in my heart during my 10 days Taiwan trip. Been here 4-5 times and they offer very good coffee for very affordable prices

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Anthony LI
Review: A simple yet sophisticated coffee place. Price is reasonable and the place is chilled and relaxed

Name: TA COFFEE (自家烘豆)
Address: No. 58號, Lane 295, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd
Author: Fawsya Al Badri
Review: Good Coffee, Nice and calm coffee shop vibes, & Excellent Coffee also count as cheap price with very friendly barista 😁 👍🏻

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Wow Haochi
Review: This cafe knows how to serve a toast! Bread was not sweet nor milky, thickness was generous but I would not mind paying a little more if they can add a layer of butter before the jam. Also they can try to serve french toast with this bread, I’m sure it will be perfect!

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Jennifer Kilborn
Review: My first time here, but maybe my new favorite coffee shop and place to study! Great drink and light meal menu at totally reasonable prices. The taro paste & pork floss croissant and rooibos milk tea with honey are super yum! The atmosphere is modern, lovely, cozy, and relaxing with great lighting, plenty of seating (1st & 2nd floor), wifi, some electrical sockets, and nice music for study (elevator-ish but not too loud). The weather is chilly right now, and the upstairs is perfectly warmed. So glad I discovered this place!

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Natalie Turner
Review: Really love the simple, yet delicious paninis and croissants. I also love the interior design of this cafe: lovely blue and off-white color pallet that gives a trendy and relaxing feel.

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Andrew Zhu
Review: Cool and spacious spot, but deducting a star as the Wi-Fi never works when I’m here. Likely requires an access point upgrade to be able to handle more simultaneous connections.

Name: Cozy Coffee
Author: Nathan Harburn
Review: The coffee here is very good, will definitely go again.

Name: Unicorn coffee
Author: Yulia Chin
Review: Small little gem with 2 tables within and a takeaway window on the outside. Very good quality coffee, house blend americano is especially fragrant. Went back to try one of their single origin latte, very good. A must-visit if you are around the area.

Name: Unicorn coffee
Author: Mark Huang
Review: Unicorn Coffee is a quiet and relaxing place where you can eliminate the hustle and bustle of working days. The coffee is excellent, and the owner is friendly and willing to share everything about coffee.

Name: Unicorn coffee
Author: Desnet Amane
Review: Good, amazing coffee. Very knowledgeable about their beans, and they usually have some samples of their selection on the counter.

Name: Unicorn coffee
Author: Warren Chan
Review: Very unique and tasty coffee. If you’re not sure what to order, the barista will make a recommendation based on your preference. We ordered a mocha and specialty latte, both are amazing. Definitely a hidden gem in Nangang.

Name: Unicorn coffee
Author: Ivan Nedrehagen
Review:
Found this little gem hidden not far from the Nangang Exhibition Center. It is the perfect getaway for one that is passionate about coffee.

The staff is friendly, very helpful, they will make sure that you get a coffee as you appreciate it.

The atmosphere is a bit quaint, worn furniture, the interior is run down.

The beans are roasted on premises, and the smell of beans are in the air, the sound of cracking coffee beans can be heard.

I will for sure return, this was a very pleasant experience.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Pote Pothongsunan
Review: Loves this place. Found it by accident while getting my breakfast food. I ordered the Ethiopia Sidamo drip coffee two days in a row. I would go back next time. It's a tiny place with a cool tiny (air conditioned) room to drink coffee. I hope you return next time I visit Taipei. Way better than Star$$.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Kamonwat Suksumek
Review: Really nice coffee. We had iced americano and double shots espresso. Lovely! The price with this quality is incredible! Staff are very lovely

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Mairin Elizabeth Blaauw
Review:
DELICIOUS COFFEE!!!
Open nice and early, great staff and a very relaxing environment. Our new favorite coffee shop in Taipei!! ❤️❤️❤️

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Jun-Wu Chen (Tong)
Review:
Atmosphere rating is biased, as I personally like hole in the wall kind of coffee place. 9 Days Coffee is totally such a place.

Had the specialty latte, which according to the barista, has a richer coffee taste. She was absolutely right. I loved the rich coffee taste, just how I like it.   Be sure to drop by if you are nearby, perhaps before or after a meal at the nearby Moon Moon Restaurant.

Name: 9 days coffee
Author: Trang Boos
Review:
They have good espresso, English menu.

I also got the blackberry latte, which was unique and very delicious, certainly something I hadn’t had elsewhere. There’s interior small seating space, very cozy, with just the bar and stools. The shop also provides internet/wifi but the space isn’t big enough to work all day in

Name: Dante Coffee
Author: Thomas Rando
Review: As far as food, dining experience and quality, this Dante is everything you have come to appreciate about the chain. What makes this Dante particularly good is the seating. On a beautiful warm day, sitting outside is extremely pleasant because of the location (not too much road noise, not too much sunlight, not too much foot traffic), and indoors the setup is so that you aren't too close to other people.

Name: Dante Coffee
Author: Chang Yi-Chun
Review: Coffee is good but the food is just okay. Comfy environment where you can charge your laptop and take a break

Name: Dante Coffee
Author: Rik De Busser
Review: I am not necessarily a big fan of Dante as a coffee chain, but this branch is an exception. It is in a pleasant location, with nice indoor and outdoor seating. It has a homely atmosphere, with comfort being clearly more important than glitz. The service is impeccable. Breakfast options are good. The coffee is Dante coffee, acceptable and cheap. On weekends, this is a popular place with the locals, so you might not find an empty table immediately.

Name: Dante Coffee
Author: R Szeto
Review: Simple and reasonablily priced food, but coffee is so so.... 😅

Name: Dante Coffee
Author: Jeng Taiwan
Review:
A little bit disappointed, Because we are Muslim,can’t eat pork, when we order the meal,the waiter
It’s not tell us that the meal contain pork!! But overall “good”

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Vicki Friedman
Review: Cutest little coffee shop. We were staying nearby and not thrilled with the breakfast buffet so went in search of good coffee and light breakfast. Adored this place. Fantastic couple with the cutest dog. Outstanding coffee and food. The whole package. Will be headed back tomorrow.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Jay Tseng
Review:
Quaint cafe near a serene green patch, with FASCINATING Japanese/Taiwanese rice burgers (飯糰, flavors include: braised tofu, shredded chicken, pork floss, etc) & AMAZING SAUCE (peanut butter, miso, grilled cheese...)

Space offering 6 seats only.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Naomi Ackerman
Review: Definitely the best cafe in the area! The owners are so friendly, the coffee is great, the food is very tasty (get the fish-shaped waffle with maple black sesame - it’s delicious), and everything is prepared with so much care. There is also a super cute cafe dog, Fu Mei, who welcomes all visitors 😍🌟💫 5* and can’t wait to come back again

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Ryan Axelson
Review: Best coffee around. Time and time again, I can't get enough of their coffee and service. They have an Indonesian Mandheling that is wonderful in a latte. I actually get an extra shot and that really makes the flavor and caffeine kick. It's absolutely coffee perfection.

Name: 馨福珈琲 Kaori Coffee
Address: Alley 20, Lane 123, Section 6, Minquan E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Alexander Tiffany
Review: Amazing cafe, great food and coffee, and lovely, kind owners. 10/10, I love it here! 😍

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Cris L
Review: Super cute cafe with spacious 2 floors for lots of seats! Great selection of salad, soup, drinks and bread. Great place to just chill! Would highly recommend checking it out

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Dru Lu
Review:
It’s nice to finally find a proper bakery in the area that also have plenty of space for dine in. The space is neutral tone and comfortable, with additional seatings upstairs.

Their cream fruitcake is delicate but dense, and very light on the sugar compared to the traditional ones from 紅葉. The tiramisu on the other hand have a similar profile to what you would expect elsewhere.

If you don’t find the cake you want on display, the staff can check for you in the back. Great service~

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Jimmy Jih
Review:
Freshly baked goods with good coffee and a clean large interior space.
Really enjoyed the lemon cream cheese bun and their take on the cinnamon roll (it's got bits of apple)!
There is no table service here. You'll need to put away your dishes after you are done.
Two floors but no escalator.
Electrical outlets, music is not too loud (a bit trebly; could use some equalization but that's just personal taste :P)
Looking forward to trying their other pastry offerings.

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: 柯亞緹
Review: The cream of the strawberry chiffon is fascinating—not cloying, but sweet with a hint of saltiness, like a taste of sea salt. If you are a lover of milk cap tea and prefer salty rather than sweet, this cake might be your type.

Name: Reeds Coffee & Bakery
Author: Anna Baatz
Review:
Newly opened, nice atmosphere, very friendly owners and staff~ counter staff guys so good looking and chill ;)
The kind of place you can stay for at a while and relax/work! Personal menu favorites  are the croissant ham and cheese sandwich with house made almond butter (!!!!! So good!! Which you can also purchase from them in packaged glass jars!) and their vegetable sandwich  with housemade cashew butter (both 90ntd!). Vanilla latte (140) uses real vanilla pod syrup and is solid! Lemon tart super tart flavored, not too sweet and delicious ~ The rose and cheese cream bread is yummy, and the green onion bread has a super fresh strong garlic flavor. Seems like more products will be developed~ excited to keep coming back and try new things:D

Now with expanded drinks menu~ fresh cream and fruit cake also refreshingly light and fluffy!

Name: First Hotel Dante Coffee Shop
Author: Jamie. P
Review: This coffee shop has been around for more than 10 years and they have reasonable priced food and drinks. Worth to visit once if you are around Taipei or New Taipei City.

Name: First Hotel Dante Coffee Shop
Author: Kitty Kitty
Review: Good value afternoon set. Comfortable seating. Iced pineapple tea is lovely. Waffles are chewy and filling, with acacia honey.

Name: First Hotel Dante Coffee Shop
Author: Aidan Lim
Review: Staff for this place is exceptionally rude. We purchased drinks and sat down for 3 minutes but they had this ruling about each person having one drink each. The waitress came to chase us out of the cafe. We explained to her that we were waiting for our uber to come and will leave in 5 minutes as our uber is coming in 5 minutes. To our horror, she started raising her voice at us and told us to get out of the cafe. I'm appalled by the reaction of the customer service. If you are going Dante first hotel outlet, go at your own risk.

Name: First Hotel Dante Coffee Shop
Author: Evelyn W
Review: Bit noisy. Not so clean. You can use laptop with free WiFi but charging is not allowed. All the power outlets are taped!!! Drink and food are ok.

Name: First Hotel Dante Coffee Shop
Author: Steve Lin
Review: I came here twice before. I like their delicious breakfast and spacious space. I would like to come back here, because my wife and I enjoyed having breakfast here.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Corey Wong
Review: Food potion is significantly smaller than Japan's. What a let down. The taste and atmosphere is good, albeit higher price and lower potion compared to original store in Japan.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Der Chuckmeister
Review: Great place to meet and chat over some simple meals and desserts.  Menu is not fancy but their coffee is good with a lot of selections.  Don’t expect latte or espresso here though as everything is Japanese style.  Usually come for the morning special with coffee and toast for only NTD100.  Mornings can get noisy especially if there are tables with kids.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: L W
Review: The drinks here are good, the staff members were friendly. The price is quite expensive, and the other guests here were entitled and annoying. It doesn’t usually concern me but I could overhear their conversations. During their breakfast time, they will give you free bread and sauce in addition to the drink.

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Foodie Pirate
Review: Although there is 2-hours time limit. The food is good, and excellent service. Price is on the expensive side but its acceptable since its in the expensive area. Who doesn’t like a cute boot glass?They have work station to this with laptop too. Tonkatsu sandwich is highly recommended. 👍🏼 IG:@foodiepirate

Name: Komeda‘s Coffee Taipei Bade
Author: Krisztina Gyimes
Review: Super comfy place with great service. Their coffee and ice cream dessert is pretty good 😊

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Big Lou
Review: Awesome coffee. The staff is awesome and friendly. Thank you for everything

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Leo Randy
Review: Excellent coffee shop in Dunhua S. Rd. The environment is extremely cozy and good for reading/meeting/relaxing. Highly recommended!

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: firework s
Review: A comfortable, spacious cafe. Enjoyed the cappuccino I ordered. Normally cinnamon isn't sprinkled on cappuccino in Taiwan, but I was asked if I'd like cinnamon. It was thoughtful of the barista to ask.

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Jack Tan
Review:
Pretty average.

1. Staff/barista all grumpy looking, no smile of any kind though the visit. Female staff that took our order has a really sour and lethargic look on her while tksing our order. Service was lack lustre and without enthusiasm.

2. Pourover and flat white order taste OK. Don't really like the mug used for the brew, as it resembles a large saucer with a tiny winy handle.

3. Slick and cool vibe with the typical cafe industrial interior, but lacks character.

Overall, it was an OK visit but there are better options especially on the service element.

Name: BOOM coffee roasters
Address: No. 16號, Lane 200, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd
Author: Hsueh-Shang Lu
Review:
hidden in the ally of Taipei city center south side,
great ambiance and great coffee taste!
reasonable price with comfortable decor,
I personally love their handmade desserts

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Ash P
Review: Cute little cafe/roaster around Memorial Hall 國立中正紀念堂 with a few seating available. I had iced latte which was nice and refreshing. My mum had the brown sugar milk tea which she really enjoyed. They have lovely illustrations drawn on each of their coffee cups. We sadly missed the presence of their furry boss, hopefully we can catch him next time!

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Randi Lee
Review:
Award-winning coffee beans, taste delicious, strongly recommended brown sugar latte
It’s a small takeout place with helpful & friendly staff

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Juliette RGD
Review:
Cute coffee shop with a large selection of coffees and teas! I tried the iced lemon coffee and found it so surprisingly delicious !
The staff was very kind and helpful.

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Matt J
Review: Excellent coffee. Taipei has a lot of chain coffee and also independent coffee places that do micro roasting, this is one you should definitely check out.

Name: TokiDoki Coffee Roastery
Address: Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, 115號 2號樓之1
Author: Tom W
Review: Came here a few times during my trip to Taipei, so glad I found it. Amazing coffee, and the cinnamon rolls were quality too!

Name: El Nativo coffee
Author: Joanne Lee
Review: New waffle flavor, delicious. The coffee is smooth and has great flavor.

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: NUTCHALI NAMCHAIBORISUT
Review: highly recommend an awesome taste of mulberry milk.The cafe interior and highly atmosphere is so great.I would like to suggest everybody to visit best place to chill out with friends and even with family. Excellent service and a  good working space spot

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Vassili B.
Review: Lovely little café to either sit quietly inside or enjoy the comfortable and big terrace. The coffee and toasts taste great and the banana bread was delicious!

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Paul Lo
Review: Only tried their hand crafted coffee and cinnamon rolls via Ubereats, great coffees and cakes, I can feel the focus and dedication they put into making the coffees, even from the delivery, I can only imagine even more amazing experience being there in the shop.

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Taro Sakurai
Review: Here was nice. Owner was nice and interior was cute. I saw hand drip equipment but I did not see the hand drip coffee on a menu so if they have hand drip coffee, I would like to try it next time. Try it ;)

Name: HITOKUCHI COFFEE
Author: Laura Hsiao
Review: I highly recommend everyone comes here having drinks here!!! We enjoyed our time in this cafe. Nice decoration and atmosphere!

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Yvonne Liu
Review: Nice local cafe with a fair price. It doesn’t have English menu and much choices, but all the standard coffee you can expect to get it here.

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Christian Keck
Review: Just a short stop before we start our little hike through the „five beasts“ of Taipeh. The coffee is delicious and furthermore we get some complementary snacks for our hiking. In total best and sweetest service ;)

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Taylor Herron
Review: One of my favorite coffee shops! The owner is friendly and puts a lot of care into his work. My two-year old and I go often - he loves the coconut toast. A great place to kill time and enjoy great coffee!

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Mason H
Review: A very affordable and roomy coffee shop. A pretty ideal place to sit down and read or work.

Name: NO.17 COFFEE
Author: Jojo Padilla
Review: Nice, hip coffee shop. Coffee's good too. No food though

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: Joel. cs
Review: its a bit on the expensive side of cafe, but hey they really have some good coffee here 👍👍👍 we got a free drip coffee aswell hahhaha thank you laoban ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: David Collins
Review:
Oh God, thank you for a real coffee
Best Coffee in Taiwan by far.
The black tea cheese cake is to Die for.

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: 유예진
Review:
Love the coffee here. Was having a bad day but feeling quite happy after having a coffee and the cute "enjoy your coffee" on the paper bag ♡
Thank you !

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: B L
Review: Seized my day with Bellissimo Coffee. So happy and enjoy the Aussie Latte and Banana Bread. Fantastic layout for takeaway or dine in. Probably the best Latte I had in Taiwan with Love ❤️

Name: Bellissimo Coffee Taiwan
Author: Mitchell Norrie
Review: I had a really delicious iced latte here with my girlfriend and we chatted with the manager the whole time who was so so nice! all of the staff was friendly, the drinks were great, and I'll be excited to return 😄

Name: Coffee and more
Author: Flap Jack
Review:
Coffee is really good, especially for 50NT. The barista is friendly. Nice but small interior, and a bench to sit outside and see the world go by.

Pretty perfect for me!

Name: Coffee and more
Author: Diego Chiu
Review: A tiny store which served excellent quality of coffee, I particularly recommend people to try their specialty coffees. I ordered the Americano + lemonade, which is also called Sicily coffee somewhere else, it was brilliant. But for those who wants to dine in, there's a very confined area for people to sit...round about 4 seats available, and the space's pretty tight, will be better for those who opt to take out.

Name: Coffee and more
Author: Eddie Wang
Review:
For a non-discerning but avid coffee drinker with religious morning caffeine intake routine, even the coffee selection at convenience stores in Taiwan put Starbucks to shame (especially when you factor in price).

So as I was making my way to the nearest 7-11, I stumbled upon Coffee & More tucked away in the quiet neighborhood of Datong district. Its subtle and unassuming outdoor exterior, merely a sign and bench, demarcates the majestic and inviting espresso machine visible through the window pane.

Seats are few inside, but perhaps it was never intended for tourists; the barista mentioned the store had opened in the thick of pandemic two years ago, presumably to cater to neighborhood locals when tourists were almost non-existent (given how strict border control was).  Now that the border has opened up, it's perfect for those seeking temporary refuge from the bustling dihua street tourist attraction a few blocks away.

As for the coffee itself, I would recommend their cold drip coffee!

Name: Coffee and more
Author: World Explorer
Review: This is a very cozy coffee shop hidden in the neighborhood. It’s a perfect place to take a break and recharge. It’s a one-person shop but everything is clean and well organized. The coffee is better than those chain coffee shops. It’s simple and relaxing.

Name: Coffee and more
Author: Joyce Tsai
Review: Nice

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Linda T
Review:
Another great hidden gem!

The coffee here is AMAZING. Brewed fresh, made with care, and taste delicious. I’m only visiting Taipei for a short amount of time and have returned to this coffee shop three separate times. If you enjoy black coffee, the single origin is highly recommended - one of the best blacks I’ve had, really smooth. If you enjoy flavored coffee, you can’t go wrong with any of the specialty drinks! It’s not overly sweet, just perfect 🤌

Pros:
- tasty coffee
- friendly staff!
- plays great music
- speedy wifi
- decent amount of seating
- 5/5 on cleanliness

Cons:
- no restroom; but there’s a store right down the street if needed

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Florian
Review: Do yourself a favour and try their coffee! The two baristas do a very good job creating your favourite coffee/tea drink (also with oat-milk). It's a very cute place to stop and relax or get some work done (WiFi and electricity outlets available). Student friendly prices - especially compared to most other cafes in the area. Went here a lot during my time at NTU and will remember it as one of my favourite cafes in Taipei ❤️

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Martin Manullang
Review: I love this place. They have a big window. Very comfy for work or having chit-chat with friends. They offer coffee and snacks as well—also a wide variety of single-origin coffee. The barista is friendly. They use fresh milk. The price is also reasonable, not cheap but also not expensive.

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: Rising Star
Review:
Awesome place to have coffee ☕
And they even have oat milk

Name: Coffee loopy
Address: No. 2號, Alley 2, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd
Author: J L
Review: Two fashionable guys in their mid 20s man the espresso machine. I highly recommend their sea salt caramel latte. One of the best I’ve had!

Name: Coffee Remus
Author: Amy Nguyen
Review: Limited seats but great atmosphere, pretty chill and comfy vibe. Friendly services with various coffee choices, also offering line payment. Brown sugar coffee had decent taste, wanna try the other options and the dessert next time. And the menu prices are super reasonable!

Name: Coffee Remus
Author: Nirel Omer Shaashua
Review: Excellent coffee place. Many different types of coffee which is obviously this places specialty. Had an ice drip coffee (two different types- both were excellent.

Name: Coffee Remus
Author: Tammy Liu
Review: A small, but cute cafe, next to a small local park.  It has personality and reasonably good coffee!

Name: Coffee Remus
Author: Kha-ai Nguyen
Review: Fabulous coffee at a cute cafe with window seats peeking into the nearby mini park. Takes international credit cards! Service was friendly and helpful.

Name: Coffee Remus
Author: Ellie Cheung
Review: Love the flat white here.  Very reasonably priced also.  The seating facing the adjacent park is relaxing.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Tim
Review:
First I have to say the coffee tastes very good. I like that you can choose between different blends and my iced latte with oat milk was good.

The attitude of one staff was a bit rude, I was confused where to order and where to receive my drink since it wasn’t sure…
The other one was friendly when I paid.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Raven Kwok
Review: Awesome coffees are served by professional staff. The boss is a brewing champion but super down-to-earth and friendly 🤎

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Cris L
Review: So pleasantly surprised by this coffee shop! The service is wonderful and nice, while the speciality bean coffee (I had the Brazilian beans) tasted delicious. The roast own coffee at the back and it’s a great working space! Would love to come back again!

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Josh Gold
Review:
We had a wonderful time at moonshine. We had their strawberry mocktail that contains their house blend espresso. Was very well balanced, cool and refreshing.

Also 2 comp filters. They were superbly made. Flavour profiles were spot on.
Highly recommend them for anyone who wants the best in a retail environment.

Name: Moonshine Coffee Roasters | 私釀咖啡商行 (敦南旗艦店)
Address: Lane 265, Section 2, Dunhua S Rd, 7號1樓
Author: Ka Yee Chin
Review:
Their coffee special is great, hand brew is quite decent, staffs and baristas are really friendly.

The space is spacious and interior is more industrial + cozy.

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Pamela Nguyen
Review: A great little cafe. Elsi was lovely.  Helped bring my stroller into the cafe. Exceptional service and coffee from when I first stepped in. They offered to play with my son so I could enjoy my coffee in peace. I also ended up buying quite a few of their coffees as presents for back home. A must visit for everyone

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Linus
Review:
Be careful of the steps when taking the seats at the back.

Coffee was good.

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Chloe Vuong
Review: We have very limited Chinese speaking capability and Elsie was super friendly, patient and helpful. The dark roast cappuccino with oat milk was just as good as our favourite coffee joints back in Melbourne. Perfect strength and quality oat milk. Thank you so much

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Mohammad Soltanieh-ha
Review: Great coffee and super friendly staff. I went there on my first day at Taiwan and was treated with a delicious (and free - thank you!) Cinnamon role. Highly recommend

Name: PAI coffee
Address: No. 1號, Alley 6, Lane 147, Section 2, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Phoebe Chang
Review:
Love this cozy place and vibe.
Best for a relaxing weekend afternoon to have a sip of coffee. Life is just great!

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Alvaro Lopez
Review:
If you’re passing by you might not even realize that this small shop offers a great selection of the finest quality specialty coffees. It is surprising the amount of high quality coffees, teas and snacks that a shop that easily can get lost in the busy streets of the business zone of Taipei.
I might be just an enthusiastic Coffee Aficionado, however a place like this really deserves a larger audience. If you like supporting local small businesses, fine coffees, fine designers tea, and snacking, this place is a MUST VISIT

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Good service.  I have only tried Americano, but it is fine.  Theb shop is more like mixture of Louisa and Cama.

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Andy Tsao
Review: Mocha coffee is great

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Tùng Nguyễn Sơn
Review: Firstly, idk about other drinks/cakes, the only thing i order is a cup of dripping coffee, ethiopia. This is the worst coffee i ever drink.

Name: Laoo's Coffee
Author: Lavinia
Review: There is no food at this unit. Coffee is only served on the go, very hot, doesn't compare with  the coffee they make in their bigger locations.

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Erica Lee
Review: i got the brown sugar coffee latte iced with oat milk and the balance of flavors was so good! i loved it, one of my favorite coffees. the apple tart and cinnamon roll were pretty good too. both had a lot of cinnamon and weren’t too sweet. we didn’t sit down inside but the vibes are nice inside and you can see them making the pastries.

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Sophia Severino
Review: Delicious  Oatmilk Latte uniquely flavored with ground roasted sesame! Strong yet subtle. Touch of sugar added to soften. Love the baristas here! Welcoming and expressive in explaining the menu! Today I am dining in for a Mother’s Day  treat of their Twin Brothers famous home made cinnamon roll! This is my second visit this week! Aesthetic ambiance and a chance to view the baker making the cinnamon rolls and cakes through the large glass window. Super fun and chill!

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Johannes
Review:
It's a nice place to have a coffee+ snack! 💯
The coffee was absolutely delicious (especially the special flavors!) and the chocolate was just amazing! 😍
Didn't try their pastries, but they looked as they wouldn't disappoint you 😋

Be aware that you'll have 90min. to enjoy your order until you have to leave (that's what we were told) - so it might be the wrong place for you, if you need to get some work done that requires longer than 90mins. 😅
Also the tables might be 🤏🏼 small for a good working session with your PC 😅

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Amy Loke
Review:
The milk used in the iced latte has a lower fat content. Also, the coffee is not strong enough. Hence, it leads to an unbalanced coffee overall. You can see from the colour of the coffee.

The cinnamon roll had too much cinnamon. Balance is off, too. The canale is nice.

Name: Twin Brothers Coffee
Author: Marcus Fong
Review:
Dropped by Twin Brothers for my AM coffee run. Good coffee and even better Cinnamon Roll! Like seriously, the Cinnamon Roll is to die for.

Please note, they only accept cash.

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Charlie Shay
Review: The ambiance and playlist gives off a really chill vibe - really does feel like the serenity under the deep blue. Their unique coffee and tea blend is worth the visit alone (I had the espresso earl grey Amber). The cheesecake is also worth checking out (I had the earl grey cheesecake - it felt very light for a cheesecake, and not too sweet).

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Andil Ong
Review:
- Such a cool concept for a store. You got the standard Americano, Latte but they have a lot of signature drinks where they convince drinks based on coffee or tea with various seasonal ingredients.

- Ordered:
1. Waterfall - Coffee with coffee foam and whipped cream on top. GIve it a few minutes and you understand why it’s called waterfall as the foam “falls” into the coffee under it.
2. Citrus Punch - Coffee with tonic water and lemon and other stuffs. Very refreshing on a hot day. Very acidic as well, that I didn’t like it on the first sip, but the more I drink it, the more refreshing it gets. It’s like drinking lemon soda with coffee
3. Osmanthus - Very light. It has jelly and lightly sweetened. Very easy to drink.
- Out of the three above, definitely enjoyed the Citrus Punch the most because the weather was so hot outside

- The place is so chill to work, chat and meet people.
- Definitely will come back again when I’m in the area

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Nicol Tan
Review:
The coffee is ok, could be better. Ordered latte and it costs 90 NTD, which is a good price.
Whisky chocolate cake is good, creamy, chocolate and whisky flavor well balanced, cheese not too rich, 140 NTD.
Service and atmosphere is immersing :)
It’s a good place to work or read a book and chill

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: 黃米雪
Review: Love their whisky cheesecake soft and silky alcohol taste not overpower. WiFi available decent sitting place. Only order americano smooth and well-rounded flavor. Not too bitter and acidity just nice. Service if great staff really know their menu gave a good recommendation. Might get crowded during lunchtime.

Name: Coffee Underwater
Author: Henry Christian
Review: Beautifully decorated cafe that serves a unique blend of coffee. The barista takes great pride in his concoction. We ordered two of their signatures drinks: Cucumber and Amber. The Cucumber coffee tastes refreshing (recommended to have it with ice). The Amber coffee is aromatic with a tinge of citrus flavour. We also shared a raw lemon cheese tart. It is light but delicious. We spent slightly more than 409NTD between the two of us. Bonus: There's WiFi and power plugs in the cafe if you need to do remote work here.

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Josephine Lee
Review: Tiny coffee place serving reasonably priced, out of this world coffee.  1st ordered their Americano, thinking it's my average morning dose.  Thoroughly surprise of it's multi-rich favour that's oddly addictive and like no other.  During my last Taipei week, ordered 2 different favours everyday.  All well blended, my favorite being Cucumber Americano, Sunkist Americano, Piccola, Sesame seed Latte...wish I'd more time to savor all which I'm sure will not disappoint me.

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: せなせな
Review: very excellent coffee, had their honey osmanthus latte, although osmanthus can be stronger, the drink itself was amazing and i enjoyed it thoroughly. adorable little shop too

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Catherine Tang
