Review: I have never been here before but my friend sent me a photo of her coffee and it made me laugh because I immediately recognized the lyrics. Then I looked through this cafe's photos and the owner has good taste in music from Taylor to 1975 to Justin Bieber :P

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Chris L
Review: The coffee was so good that I almost finished it before I remembered to take a pic. Excellent customer service from the hard-working laoban with a friendly personality. This is exactly what you want from a daily coffee shop. If I lived in Taipei, I’d be here every day. Jealous of those who can take advantage of this choice little spot and feel sorry for those who don't stop by.  Check it out!

Name: One Ok Coffee & Biscuit
Author: Vanillin Quan
Review: Indeed great coffee, I ordered Americano, it's Fruity and aromatic, yet not too acidic. Nice coffee!

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: sheena chee
Review: Nice and cosy cafe to chill. Service is good. They have a nice selection of expresso-based drip coffee so feel free to ask for explaination. For favourites you can try their famous gula melaka latte (黑糖拿铁). Their matcha latte is abit too light for my liking. You can try their matcha lava cake, this is nice.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: L HuiMING
Review: A quaint little cafe good for chilling with friends over weekends, or for dates, tried their signature matcha cake (抹茶甜甜圈）and the chocolate cake （巧克力甜甜圈），and the Taiwan honey cake (台湾蜂蜜蛋糕）. The matcha cake body is too dry and not fluffy enough for our liking, but the sauce is good,love the chocolate cake, it was perfect and a must try! The honey cake has a faint honey taste. We tried the matcha coffee and chocolate coffee, it was a little difficult to finish, but hard-core chocolate lovers who love thick thick chocolate will love it. I feel it was a bit  jelat (腻) towards the end. Still no trying :)

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: i . am . kenny
Review: Great ambience for chilling. Recommend having the  黑糖拿铁 and 抹茶蛋糕. Service is good too.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: Henry
Review: Nicely decored cafe with a unique interior color palette creates an ambiance suitable for conversation or study (if no kids are around). Personable staff. Reasonably priced drinks and light food.

Name: La Chaudière Coffee 樂初咖啡
Author: Joyce Yu
Review: The green tea donut was so delicious, staffs were  friendly!  Will definitely  come back  someday! Yum yum!

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Chi Ha
Review: The milk tea and latte were very bad. Super diluted and we didn’t even want to drink it. The toast was very underwhelming as well. Ended up with 219 TWD per pax.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Chris Bunch
Review: We went here a few times, and we loved it each time. It was quiet and the upstairs had a nice vibe. Our server was super friendly and spoke enough English to help us order. Our coffee was great (we just enjoy good black coffee), and they even brew a nice cup of natural, if that's your thing. The breakfast was simple and limited, but it was indeed tasty.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Suzanna Bunch
Review:
Best coffee place we found in Taipei, and they open early! We went for coffee and breakfast 3 days in a row. Awesome selection of very well brewed coffee and a perfect simple breakfast menu for the travelers who might need something familiar for breakfast.

Our waitress was so sweet and helpful to order from.  I highly recommend Nanmay Coffee!

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Ong C
Review: A very old coffee shop in Ximen have many good coffees. Breakfast here is very simple, toast, eggs, waffles only.

Name: Nanmay Coffee
Author: Andy Tse
Review:
As a tourist, I found this is a clean place and nice for a tea break.
Don't expect any top class brewed coffee and drinks.
My best choice was the egg and ham sandwich 🥪! 3 stars for the atmosphere is because of the slow free wifi.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Ordered iced latte and got discount to go. Latte is a bit light.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Terence Wong
Review:
As a straight guy, I find the simple things like a turkey, cheese and lettuce bagel w/ tea are all done on point.

Plastic cups aren't used unless you order takeout.

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Sirinnicha Chuemuangphan
Review:
Nicely staff. Good drinks. Softly comfy atmosphere.🥰 I try custard 🍮 and hot milk tea. 🧋 so good for this season. 😋
Suit for working space or reading .📖

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: Eric Khun
Review: Designed and comfortable cafe. Friendly service

Name: 繆克咖啡 MK coffee x 空間設計
Author: ian aegis
Review: Nice place;

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Po Chen
Review: Ok

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Ervin Lai
Review: Exactly what a coffee place should be all about. And thank goodness it opens early so that you can grab a cup on the way to work.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: A. M. Just
Review: I enjoy the coffee here.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: A ak
Review: Small place, very difficult to fit in but friendly service.

Name: N2-coffee Bike民生店
Address: No. 7之1號, Lane 80, Section 4, Minsheng E Rd
Author: Jimmy C
Review: Great dark roast iced americano and nitro coffee

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Ahmad Khalis
Review: Thank you Lesley for the warmth & stellar service. Appreciate your recommendations! Everything lived up to the 5🌟 google reviews! From the ambience to the cheesecake and toast, this quaint coffee nestled in the heart of the city is totally worth a visit. Looking forward to the next one! Thank you @fierytianjin , I’ll see you again soon!

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Anton Subert
Review: Excellent coffee. Many single origins to choose from. Card payment (apple pay) possible which is rarely the case in a non-chain coffee shop.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Anna D
Review: A tiny sidewalk spot /kiosk with really great coffees and bites. I had coldbrew with milk and a salmon/spinach quiche, both delicious.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: Peter Hunt
Review: Beautifully balanced coffee. Nice shady spot outside. Friendly staff and cute artwork.

Name: FIERY COFFEE 中山天津店
Address: No. 5-11號, Lane 83, Section 1, Zhongshan N Rd
Author: shawn ng
Review:
This place is low key fire man.
Grab me self a cuppa and Bolo bun during lunch. Great place to people watch, enjoy coffee. (Lunch time has higher foot traffic if u wanna people watch)

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Y “Yowie” T
Review:
Extremely cosy old school and characteristic bar. Older (20 year plus) songs are often on the playlist.

Great boutique coffee and alcoholic cocktails. In a quiet corner suburban location. Superb place to catch up with friends without loud music blasting in the background.

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: JINA SEO
Review: Very cute doggy says hi when you enter. I had BLT sandwich which was perfect except the bread was too crispy (I prefer soft). My coffee with medium-light-roasted beans were very good. You can choose roasting. If you are traveling this city, don’t go franchised coffee shop, go to local, extra-ordinary cafe!

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Bieb C
Review: Best coffee for both latte and drip coffee. But the part I don't understand is its neighbor, why can't they just celebrate and enjoy such fantastic coffee shop?!? Don't you know they have a great mixologist that serve awesome cocktail for really fair price?

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Rachel An
Review:
More than a coffee house, the owner was one of my favorite bartenders in Taipei (back in the old days).

It’s chill, cozy and a place where you can work, hang out and have a good cup/glass of something! Anything from a nice espresso, tea, gin& tonic to fancy cocktails, it’s available.

Haven’t tried the food yet, but I’m sure it’s awesome.

Name: Astar Coffee House
Address: No. 41, Alley 13, Lane 60, Section 3, Minquan E Rd
Author: Angela Hong
Review: Friendly staff and good interior. Bathroom has pads for those days when your uterus surprises you, which is very thoughtful. Didn’t try the food but enjoyed my coffee. Only one minor disappointment is the plastic straw. Really would prefer no straw or non-disposable. Oh also, AWESOME BLT!

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Alice Wang
Review:
Reservation only! Very difficult to get the reservation but totally worth it! Pay for the “ seat” fee which is 700 dollars per person, ( $350 upfront for the reservation fee can deduct beans purchase) can drink as much as you want! With one free toast ( 3 different flavors of choice, I chose yuzu butter flavor. It was great!)

Hidden at the valley, nice vibe! Great services! Can’t wait for the next time :)

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Hsiao Rain
Review:
It's a quiet but not serious shop with a really nice atmosphere. Although when I made the reservation, I had made a reservation for Lucky Trove (I must have remembered the name correctly🤔) coffee and cocktails, but I missed it because my body was undergoing treatment and I was unable to drink alcohol that day. I felt a little sorry for the store, but luckily Jin Wan directly said that he would drink it for me that day🤣

However, I still hope that after the treatment, I can drink Jinwan’s cocktail again and reminisce about Jinwan’s special cocktail at remember me late at night N years ago.

Let's talk about "Magpie". It is a cafe that is not out of the ordinary when you visit it. You can taste various coffees in peace and quiet. For me, it is the most direct way to choose the coffee beans I like. 😂I drank four kinds of drinks that day (it is really impossible to order four cups like this in ordinary cafes, so you can try what you want slowly). I also thank "Magpie" for its system of changing cups for coffee at no cost, and I was very satisfied with the take away that day. Got my favorite beans.

In addition, let’s talk about the desserts. It’s actually quite surprising. I thought that for a shop with strong coffee, the desserts would be relatively inferior. Quite unexpectedly, from toast, toast jam, Boston cake, handmade pudding. Not ordinary! ! It’s really only children who make choices. I want to try the lemon tart next time, but I don’t know how the tart crust performs?

This time I went alone, without taking NB to the office. I just enjoyed the aroma of coffee and desserts all afternoon. It was a place where I didn’t do anything and it was not obtrusive. The barista’s instructions were also very detailed, allowing me to choose the one I like smoothly. The taste of home.

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Eating Jeng
Review:
Awesome cafe that is completely reservation-only💯

Need to book online first
Deposit 350 yuan per person
In order to put an end to Oko, it is definitely worth the price.
You can check the box to reserve dessert when making a reservation
I highly recommend getting some desserts with coffee.
These are all choices that won’t step on thunder.

There are clear reservation and seating instructions on the website
After sitting down at the scene, the service staff will explain in detail
Bring hand towels and boiling water to welcome guests
The first step is to choose the flavor of the toast spread.
This time there is honey yuzu cheese or apple
There is also tea-flavored spread for an additional NT$30.

The first cup of coffee can be selected based on acidity
Or start tasting according to the barista’s recommendations
After drinking, take the empty cup to the bar to exchange for another cup.
Beans on display in the window
Here are the items available for selection today

Most of the customers who arrived first chose seats at the bar.
Like to be alone or want to concentrate on chatting with friends
The table and chair area is also very nice👍

Environment⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Meals⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Service⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
All scores are perfect and couldn’t be higher😎

The official website introduces it in great detail
Friends who are interested can go directly to have a look
The best coffee experience in recent days❤️

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Jason Hsieh
Review:
Drinking coffee for so many years and visiting so many stores
If you have some basic senses, you will know
How rare and rare it is to be able to drink coffee that clearly meets the flavor description in a coffee shop
I still remember that time I happened to come across 4 different Ethiopian washes on the bean list.
I drank 3 of them, one of which has a relatively higher unit price and a richer flavor description.
After drinking the 3 bottles, you can clearly see the difference in flavor and the taste matches the description.
Jin Wan’s authenticity and pursuit of flavor are really admirable
Professional specialty coffee staff
If you want to enhance your senses, go to Queye for coffee, you won’t be disappointed

Name: Secret Kasasagi Coffee Roasters by reservation only
Address: Alley 3, Lane 236, Section 5, Zhongxiao E Rd, 19號1樓
Author: Phoebe Liang
Review:
One of the few great coffee shops where you can clearly taste various flavors
Once you drink it, you can't go back.

You can also enjoy a variety of hand-brewed products if you go alone.
If you bring friends and family there, you can chat and discuss the flavor of coffee comfortably.

Single species change frequently, more than 100 beans a year
In addition to the single items, the special dishes and cakes are also great.
The coffee beans are strictly controlled and each one is full.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Earn S.
Review:
I've come here many times. It's not a fancy cafe and not suitable for sitting long because the shop is more of a grab-and-go spot. However, you can sit in front of the coffee bar to enjoy the peace in this small alley. I love the coffee here—good quality at a reasonable price. I also like the cute decoration with various Japanese models.

If you get a chance to come near Kunyang MRT, are not in a hurry, and want to sit and grab a good coffee, I recommend this place to slow down your life.

P.S. Please visit when the weather is nice; it will give you extra chill energy.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Dani Vitriolo
Review: It’s just the perfect depiction of a neighborhood cafe. So well designed

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Kevin Lai
Review: Great coffee in the neighborhood.

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: Shane Thorne
Review: Great coffee and design !!

Name: Goro Goro Coffee（外帶店、沒有內用座位）
Address: Alley 1, Lane 398, Section 6, Zhongxiao E Rd, 2號一樓
Author: pez lo

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Trâm Trần (Selena)
Review: Latte coffe is really good. The owner is friendly. Sitting outside this season is blessing

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Jeremiah Scholl
Review:
If you are looking for an out of the way tiny cafe with great coffee this is the place! I often stop in on my way to work in the morning. The owner is super nice and usually is playing chill classic jazz and whatnot in there.

The espresso coffees really are made perfect, and that’s what I drink. But they are more famous for fancy pour over coffee. So maybe check that out if you make a visit.

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: Wang Review
Review: Best peanut latte i ever had!  Nice and cozy atmosphere.  Kind barista. Such a really nice place to escape from a freezing cold wind outside.

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: James Tang
Review: Stayed near the area for about a month while wife was recovering in the birthing center nearby. Clean cafe with friendly staff. Good place to people watch. I don’t understand coffee much but owner was friendly (speaks English!) and went through the different types of coffee with me until I found one that I liked. Very nice experience overall. I visited regularly during my stay and would def come back when in the country again!

Name: PH Coffee 胖虎咖啡
Address: No. 4號, Lane 129, Section 2, Chang'an E Rd
Author: H G
Review: Very lovely coffee shop. Stop here for a real latte!

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Justin Wang
Review: A good space near hospital to spend time. Came in in the late afternoon and not too many customers. I ordered Americano and walnut pie, and coffee is a bit light.

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: tw
Review: still not open at 9am. are your hours wrong?

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Weiann WU
Review: Clean comfy good staff

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Grace C
Review: A very relaxing, cozy place. Coffee is good!

Name: Cuiqu Coffee奎克咖啡 台北石牌店
Author: Jay Chang
Review: Nice, clean and quiet shop. Coffee is decent. But your mileage may vary.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Bryan JW “Bra” Chua
Review:
Minimalistic cafe serving great lattes!

The hazelnut latte was better than most cafe chains and their TGY latte was amazing.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Amanda Hu
Review: There is an offline coffee on Fushun Street next to Minquan West Road Station. Although there are not many seats, there is tea and coffee. I ordered the Shizuoka matcha latte, which was thoughtfully made sugar-free. Very large cup, hot enough, rich matcha, price 85 yuan. In Taipei, I am really surprised by the good quality and good price! ! I hope the store's business will be prosperous. Will visit again when I'm nearby. Highly recommended.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: アリクス
Review: I was waiting for a friend at the nearby metro when it suddenly started raining and I found this coffee shop.I immediately went in and had an iced coffee latte.It was delicious.

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: summary0628
Review:
Pei Guo is so delicious!
Fluffy and crunchy! Awesome!

Name: Offline Coffee 登初咖啡
Author: Neo Kung
Review:
Beautifully decorated coffee shop!
Coffee latte is rich and delicious

If there is no invoice, a blank receipt will be given.
It is better to write it for the customer!

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Chiara
Review: super cute and cozy cafe with natural light and great working environment. Staff was super friendly and attentive

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Rachel Wallace
Review: Such a cute little place! Nuki cafe’s environment is so relaxed, perfect place to study or meet a friend for coffee. The lower level is more noisy than the upper level, so if your looking to enjoy the ambience and work upstairs is probably better. Food was tasty, and their green tea lemonade was so refreshing! Very unique. Also loved how cute all the dishes were. A bit on the spendier side, but worth it for the experience.

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Nikita Eden
Review: I love this place!! It’s such a chill vibe and has really nice relaxing music. It’s perfect for studying and the drinks are so good! there’s an upstairs with lots of extra seating, and some outlets if you need to charge devices. Bonus points for the cute kitties!

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Rémi Thorel
Review: Really cute café with a lot of seats and plugs. Coffee is really good and not too expensive. Big plus for the playlist, they had all the songs I love. Only minus is that there’s no wifi inside.

Name: NUKI Coffee
Author: Tzi Ling Chew
Review:
🍓CP value: Requires minimum purchase of one drink (it’s not cheap).
🍓Lovely ambience and dessert.
🍓 Service: Downside is that I wished the services were slightly warmer towards a newcomer; it doesn’t have that mom and pop friendly  vibe but that’s not necessarily a bad thing if all you’re looking for is a place to study.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Pno Ens
Review: Passing by this restaurant for so many times, I finally went in for the first time! What a surprising experience! The servers we’re all very prompt and courteous. The contemporary Japanese dishes were delicious and pleasant to enjoy! Will come again very soon 🔜. Highly recommended!

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Alpha Chen
Review: A typical Japanese Cafe chain restaurant. The meat sauce spaghetti tastes delicious. The meat sauce is a mix of pork and beef. The bread is soft and tasty. It’s a good restaurant for simple meal with coffee.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Jessica Kan
Review: The fried pumpkin cookies were really yummy and the salad dressing was amazing. The vibe in the restaurant was also really good, I really enjoyed it.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Eric C
Review:
Visited this place few days ago. Still in its soft opening period and certainly still need some improvement. Ordered the typical breakfast.
1. Did not asked us the option for butter or jelly.
2.  Brought us the wrong toast, but was quickly corrected.
3. Table for two tend to be a bit tight.
4. Free Wi-Fi available.

Name: 客美多咖啡 Komeda's Coffee 敦南信義加盟店
Author: Jeff Tan
Review:
Went here for a Saturday lunch, felt they were a bit understaffed.
Food itself was OK, portion size was decent, may be slightly on the expensive side for what it's worth.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Kate Shao
Review: Great coffee shop with cozy atmosphere. Awesome and impressive interior design. There were only three tables available but I just wait about 30 minutes on weekends. You can take away at the beautiful park nearby. I ordered blend of light hot Americano and it was nice but nothing special. The red bean cake was sickly sweet. Attentive staffs and reasonable price.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Justin Wang
Review: Came in Sunday morning. The people who taking photos are a bit annoying for people who just want to enjoy coffee.  Ordered brand of Shadow iced Americano which is a bit light for city roast. Be watch out if you ordered to go cannot sit exterior.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Elisabeth M
Review: Obsessed with their cold brew with cream! Love the aesthetic and pastry options here

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Sean Lin
Review: Multiple different flavors of coffee to choose. Not many seats, recommend to take away. It’s a nice grab-and-go coffee place nearby beautiful park.

Name: 鬧蟬咖啡Now Chance Coffee (Fuxing)
Author: Chi-Pei Tseng
Review: I got an iced oat latte and it was really good. You get a choice of the type of coffee bean you would like them to use. The vibe inside is also nice, but there are only 3 tables available and they are usually always taken. However there are nice parks nearby to take your coffee to. The baristas were super nice as well :)

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Annie Lima
Review:
Food: **** (I had the beef panini. It was okay. Nothing to write home about.)
Drinks: ***** (I had the mango passion fruit tea. It came warm and was delicious. It hit the spot on this cold, rainy day.)
Prices: *****
Variety of Menu Options Available: ***** As long as you only want carbs, there’s plenty of variety. It’s all cakes, croissants, paninis, bagels, danish toast, etc.
Variety of Non-Coffee Drink Options: **** There are several teas and some (noncaffeinated) fruit teas
English Menu? yes
Wi-Fi/Charging Ports Available? No! No outlets, either!
Pleasant Environment/Comfortable to Write In: *** It’s small, without a lot of seating options. The tables are a little awkward for computer use.
Customer Service: ****
Hours: 7 a.m. - 10 p.m. daily
What was the Restroom Like? They have no restroom! When I asked, they directed me to the 7-Eleven next door.

#CafeQuestLinkou

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Rolf Chen
Review:
20240810 first release:
Cooler bag provided with first purchase
Second purchase due to using 15% discount coupon
No cold storage bags are provided, so this fictitious event is recommended to be cancelled.
Bad experience from a repurchasing customer who bought three cakes in one week😅

The store manager is too entangled and persistent. It’s a pity. With such a good brand and coffee drinking environment, I hope the event can be optimized and adjusted to make people willing to repurchase such a great Yujin coffee shop~

20240811-Updated reply to industry information
It's really ridiculous that you want to control someone even if they give you one star. It seems that there are no 0.1 stars to give. It's really a pity.

The service of the female clerk in the evening on 8/8th was so good.
Why was the male store manager in the afternoon on 8/10 so funny?
It seems that this store can no longer be supported~

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Anna Chiang
Review: The space is not big, the seating arrangement is a bit messy, the cakes are ordinary, and the drinks are okay.

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: ⁎ S m A r T ⁎
Review:
If you buy bread, they will help you bake it. It will be delicious and you can eat it hot right away, which is a bonus.
But the raw milk Mont Blanc ordered that day was not that good. It tasted dry, with distinct grains (?), and the chocolate flavor was not noticeable. If you eat it with your eyes closed, you really don’t know what you are eating.

Name: Y.J COFFEE 玉津咖啡-林口文化店
Author: Landy Hung
Review:
An affordable coffee shop with rich and delicious coffee, and cakes that are top notch among affordable chain stores.
It’s a small store but it’s exquisite and comfortable. You can come here again.

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Ong C
Review: Small and cosy coffee roaster cafe in Keelung harbour town. They have few type of good local coffee available.

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Rayane Enaya FADEL
Review:
Very warm and friendly staff.
The coffee is excellent and inexpensive. It's a cosy little place to relax and enjoy a drink.
I highly recommend it if you're passing through.

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Jed
Review:
Friendly service, excellent coffee and a very chilled place to sit and savour. The shop is nestled in a lovely little alleyway. We visited twice during our short stay in Keelung. The owner also has a cute cat which made for a fun photo from outside :)

We've been travelling around East Asia for a few months now and still think this is the best coffee we've had!

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Jake Cherry
Review: I’ve been traveling around for a little over a year, and finding the great coffee shops where ever I can. This is certainly one of them! A small batch roaster in the heart of Keelung. What a pleasure to find this little unexpected gem. 5 stars guys 🙏

Name: Douyin coffee豆隱咖啡自家烘焙
Author: Stephen Mann
Review: Open earlier than other cafes. Good coffee.

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Dave
Review: Serious Coffee is a one man show run by a gentleman who is serious about his coffee and makes seriously exceptional coffee. At the same time, he is friendly and approachable and happy to share his deep knowledge of coffee. The espresso that he makes is stunning. The ambience is warm and relaxed. It is a perfect place for a chat, or to sit and read. On a hot day, try his Sicily coffee (espresso, soda water, a little syrup and citrus). It is much more textured and balanced than many others around the city (showcasing the quality of his roasting and his skill at pulling shots).

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Dharius Robinson
Review:
Very calm and relaxing place.
The barista is super helpful and passionate about his work and was happy to help and recommend certain beans etc... Even gave an extra portion of cold brew coffee as he said he wasn't satisfied with how the first one turned out (both tasted great to me though!)

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Tony 24p Yeh
Review: Great place for pour-over and expresso coffee. Nice hang-out spot to coffee enthusiasts. Limited items on the menu. This shop roasts it own beans.

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Rebecca Zhang
Review: Coffee is decent for a quick takeaway. The coffee-to-go price is cheaper. Wouldnt say it's impressive, but fair for the price and the area. Haven't tried their pour over coffee

Name: SERIOUS COFFEE 自家烘焙咖啡館-天母咖啡|那你願意，一輩子和我煮咖啡嗎?
Author: Arthur Chen
Review: This place is run by 2 young men with passion for coffee. If you are serious about your pullover coffee, this is a great place to come.

Name: TFH Café Restaurant
Author: ام اسيل
Review: A very open nice place where you can get a fresh air while you r having your coffee ... come guys enjoy the beauty of the place

Name: TFH Café Restaurant
Author: Zouhaif Belafli
Review: Maracana  it's one of my favorite places to have a good coffee time,  thanks for the best service

Name: TFH Café Restaurant
Author: Ilias Ferrouji
Review: The infrastructure is perfect but the staff is strange objects disappearing in the rooms opened packets of biscuits etc the gym is perfect I recommend but be careful with your belongings we did a couples massage which was supposed to last 2 hours and in the end it only lasted an hour without reimbursement, nothing bad (just empty words)

Name: TFH Café Restaurant
Author: Ettayeb Oussama
Review: Maracana city very good place, very good service, good quality coffee

Name: TFH Café Restaurant
Author: Amine Aithousseine
Review: High quality coffee, an upscale cafe, at a very reasonable price

Name: Studio 77 Café Marrakech
Author: faysal xasan
Review: Amazing place would definitely recommend this place for anyone 5 stars 💯

Name: Studio 77 Café Marrakech
Author: Houcine Nsr
Review: Top 👍

Name: Studio 77 Café Marrakech
Author: Karima Ramy
Review: A wonderful place to relax and have a shisha and coffee. You can order food. A pure and wonderful place. I loved. All comfort and treatment are very fine

Name: Studio 77 Café Marrakech
Author: ADEL ALJOHANI
Review: Honestly, it is a place that deserves all the best and the workers there are very, very respectful 🙏🏻

Name: Café Snack CTM
Address: JXGH+GR3, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: MrSiwat
Review: A convenient place to grab a bit to eat when passing through the CTM bus station in Marrakesh. Friendly staff and very clean on my visit. It was late at night when I was there, so maybe it's more hectic during the day and therefore less tidy but the staff were really helpful.

Name: Café Snack CTM
Address: JXGH+GR3, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Nyxioun De Lorak
Review: The place is OK. Do not expect to have a well cooked and hot meal because the food is from the fridge, so it is food thas been stored throughout the day?  I ordered a chicken plate and it had really good chicken.But everything else was very cold. I am not talking about the salad but about the spaghetti and the fries. The space is very nice. I think they are doing renovation soon. And it is also a very good place if you are waiting for your CTM. The waiters are very nice and friendly. They check on yo,  provide you with napkin, and are always around for your orders.Which is a very good plus for this space.

Name: Café Snack CTM
Address: JXGH+GR3, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Анна Архипова
Review: Terrible place. I wanted to order just orange juice and tea, stuff told me to move on to another place, because my place was only for food. They refused to serve me because I was sitting at the table “for food.” But no difference and no rules were written.

Name: Café Snack CTM
Address: JXGH+GR3, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Daan Donkers
Review: Be careful, they try to charge you more than you ordered. When asked for the bill he typed 180 on the calculator. When I asked him for the receipt he typed in again and it came to 166. I showed him the menu and calculated to 130. He tried to charge extra for the fries and even for the sugar that came with the coffee. You also have to pay seperately for the toilet.

Name: Café Snack CTM
Address: JXGH+GR3, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Antonia Torrieri
Review:
Tourists don't go there.
I was charged 40 diram for an espresso (that came with a little bottle of water and a piece of cake ,both which I never asked for) and 40 diram for a chicken sandwich. I asked why so much because not even in Europe prizes are so expensive and the waiter said it's because of Ramadan. I found it only an excuse to charge more like they always do. An advice: always ask first the cost and then buy it, I'm gona start to do it even for coffee :D

Name: Kasbah Café
Address: J286+R6J, Rue de La Kasbah, Marrakesh
Author: Jessica Faye
Review:
I absolutely love Kasbah Cafe. We went here a few times during our stay in Morocco. The owner always waves to us when we walk by and he’s such a nice guy. The rooftop is aesthetic and has an amazing view!

I love the carrot, orange, and ginger juice and also the chicken “poke” bowl! (For my fellow Americans it’s like a chicken rice bowl) It’s hard to find healthy food when you’re traveling and this one is really satisfying.

I would recommend this, it’s a great choice of a restaurant in Marrakech.

Name: Kasbah Café
Address: J286+R6J, Rue de La Kasbah, Marrakesh
Author: Arcângela Rocha
Review:
We were looking for a place to eat at 10pm and came across Kasbah Café. It was a very pleasant surprise!

I don't know the name of the waiter who served us, but he told me he is there every night. He was great! Not only we were kindly accommodated shortly before closing time, he was very welcoming and served us with a smile on his face. He recommended me the chicken pastilla and I loved it!

We returned there the next day for lunch as well and didn't regret. Good food and nice ambience.

Name: Kasbah Café
Address: J286+R6J, Rue de La Kasbah, Marrakesh
Author: Janet Shepherd
Review: Food was delicious sat up on the terrace watching the world go by in the street below.

Name: Kasbah Café
Address: J286+R6J, Rue de La Kasbah, Marrakesh
Author: Stuart
Review: Great welcoming owner and the service was good given how busy they were at the time.  They were open during Ramadan to service the tourists.  Pizza was wonderfully thin crust and tasty.  They were also able to handle our no-nuts allergy requests.  The mint tea was excellent and they served hot milk with the espresso. Not the cheapest place for a bite but worth the tourist premium.  Lots of foreigners there so you can chat with others visiting Marrakech.

Name: Kasbah Café
Address: J286+R6J, Rue de La Kasbah, Marrakesh
Author: Priyanka Patel
Review: Great food and atmosphere! Really enjoyed the tajine here.

Name: Café marrakech
Author: LAACHIR TV
Review: Good

Name: Café marrakech
Author: j m
Review: Good

Name: Café marrakech
Author: S H Hôtellerie de Prestige
Review:
The most surprising experience of my life as a customer..
Arrival at the beginning of the afternoon at this establishment with a friend: one of the most famous journalists in Marrakech in the company of two people from our family...everything went pleasantly well at the beginning...when it was time to pay for our drinks!
The ticket presented is a simple piece of paper written by hand!
Very surprised, I asked the waiter for a real ticket where VAT appears and which shows that the action is legal! The server refuses to provide us with one!
I ask to speak to the manager...a lady arrives very aggressive...we had a heated exchange with this lady who called us poorly educated and that she has no official tickets to provide us....I told her in my own words words that his behavior is despicable, on the one hand, we are customers and its duty to respect them.....the rest will be discussed at the Moroccan Tourism inspection.
Never again this place for me!

Name: Café marrakech
Author: mouad simou
Review: Best space for families and friends

Name: Café marrakech
Author: Miguel Angel Fernandez Ahijado
Review: Very good

Name: Café Mouassine
Author: Agata Nowak
Review: The crepe looks nice but it was much below average. Nothing worse than starting day with poor breakfast. The staff is just random people that don’t know anything about proper service.

Name: Café Mouassine
Author: Nate Bettini
Review:
Not fancy, but cute little place. While not particularly exceptional for anything, it is solid across the board.

Highly recommend for any casual meal in an authentic setting.

Name: Café Mouassine
Author: Liza
Review: Lovely place! Good coffee, nice food, friendly service

Name: Café Mouassine
Author: Jen
Review: Came 3 times in 10 days as we really loved the atmosphere

Name: Café Mouassine
Author: Amy Akers
Review: Cool, little cafe in the middle of the markets. Nice cool breeze. Great, I mean FANTASTIC iced and hot coffee. Superb kafta tajine for a snack. French fries are like American McDs - LOL - these guys would be millionaires in the states. The servers are not only nice like everywhere esle we've been but yhey are also cute too ;).

Name: Cafe Onila
Author: Rachid Chafik
Review: Good coffee

Name: Cafe Onila
Author: S.B.T GLOBALE SARL
Review: Tooop cafe

Name: Cafe Rouge
Address: Souq, Marrakech 40000, Morocco، 38 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: FELIPE ROMERO
Review: Lovely view but note great selection of  food. Good service and if u just want a tajin or couscous it's OK... Or tea and coffe

Name: Cafe Rouge
Address: Souq, Marrakech 40000, Morocco، 38 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: Carlos Pizarro del Valle
Review: Nice roof top with nice views of Koutoubia

Name: Cafe Rouge
Address: Souq, Marrakech 40000, Morocco، 38 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: Youssef Sabir
Review: Cozy little place especially with a roof top setup.

Name: Cafe Rouge
Address: Souq, Marrakech 40000, Morocco، 38 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: DesertBrise Travel
Review: amazing with lots of flavour, very impressive for a vegetarian restaurant.

Name: Cafe Rouge
Address: Souq, Marrakech 40000, Morocco، 38 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: chafiq bahra
Review: Good cafe, very sweet tea, order it without sugar.

Name: Mazel مزال Cafe
Author: Muhammad Safran
Review:
One of those restaurants who doesn’t rip up off tourist and very honest staff and great service.

Affordable prices, delicious food with limited but almost more than enough taste wise. Had lunch and dinner + takeaway from here.

Patanjia(Lamb Shank in pita bread) 4/5
Couscous (3.5)
Caesar Bowl (4/5)
Tajin (3.5/5)
Chicken Pita (3.5/5)

Loved all the food 5/5 can’t be anywhere so didn’t give.

Name: Mazel مزال Cafe
Author: Esme Ann
Review: A great spot for big falafel pitas!! The orangade and lemonade were also nice and refreshing. The tables look out onto a square of other restaurants - a good place to watch the world go by whilst you eat! Would return and recommend, especially if you’re looking for a relatively quick and filling meal.

Name: Mazel مزال Cafe
Author: STRIX
Review: Simply the best restaurant I've tried in Morocco. Everything is good, the food, the beverages and the service. I really recommend the chicken gyro the peach ice tea and the Caesar salad.

Name: Mazel مزال Cafe
Author: aysha
Review:
Every thing we order (food and drinks) were amazing. The service was welcoming and they were helpful with explaining the different of dishes. With the heat weather there were water mist which made the place cooler.
Ps. No parking (you need to search parking slots) to reach this place

Name: Mazel مزال Cafe
Author: Lena Albazie
Review:
We had planned to visit Mazel for falafels based on the Google reviews. It didn’t disappoint! We ordered the falafel pitas and they were delicious. And huge! The only negative we would say is it needed a little more seasoning (salt) but I guess that’s a personal preference. The service staff were kind and helpful and very quick! We also tried the lemonade, which was just as delicious. If I was in Tinsmith Square again, I would definitely go back again!

*I knocked off a star for atmosphere as there were street acrobats who put on a show with loud music, which was absolutely fine, but then they waked through the restaurant asking for tips which isn’t a great dining experience. I understand they all need to earn a living and appreciate that so it wasn’t the worst thing in the world, but it’s a little off-putting.

Name: Barista By living Room
Address: 1, IMMEUBLE BERNADETTE, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Alega Sgan
Review: We love this place, one of the bests of Marrakech 😊🤍

Name: Barista By living Room
Address: 1, IMMEUBLE BERNADETTE, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: rofayda afkir
Review: Best in town! Nice Food and Amazing atmosphere. I definetly recommend this place to Everyone!!!

Name: Barista By living Room
Address: 1, IMMEUBLE BERNADETTE, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Yassine El babaki
Review: Fantastic place to unwind and enjoy a relaxing evening. The ambiance is vibrant and inviting, with comfortable seating and a great selection of hookah flavors. The staff is very friendly and attentive, giving us a pleasant experience. The food was also excellent with my thanks for the chef. I surely recommend this place.

Name: Barista By living Room
Address: 1, IMMEUBLE BERNADETTE, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Jihane Mounah
Review:
Bad experience with the waitress she’s so angry and irresponsible
No respect
Don’t give time to costumers

Name: Barista By living Room
Address: 1, IMMEUBLE BERNADETTE, Rue Abou Bakr Seddiq, Marrakesh
Author: Ziggy Zagalo
Review:
A very nice place. One of the best coffee in Marrakech with the good Barista
And really sweet food.

Name: Cafe SNaCKs HiCHaM MRkCH
Author: Enrique G. Vázquez Páez
Review: nice place for a good fast food

Name: Cafe SNaCKs HiCHaM MRkCH
Author: ayoch kitchen
Review: For a good sandwich is the place to go

Name: Cafe SNaCKs HiCHaM MRkCH
Author: ayoub chalfi
Review: Good

Name: Cafe SNaCKs HiCHaM MRkCH
Author: rabie Saad
Review: It's a place to watch football matches and have coffee.

Name: Cafe SNaCKs HiCHaM MRkCH
Author: Gilles G
Review:
A small, unpretentious, but nice snack in a popular area of ​​Marrakech, if you are in the area!!!
The waitress, Beijing, I think, is very nice.....
The pizzas are good!!!!!
I'll tell you again......if you're lost....!!!!!  👍

Name: CAFE ARYA
Author: jaafar naciri
Review: Very cool place with an open space to the roundabout, you will like the place and enjoy coffee with sunset 🌇

Name: CAFE ARYA
Author: spacescan
Review: Nice coffee shop, terrace and garden.

Name: CAFE ARYA
Author: Akkad Ayoub
Review: Good

Name: CAFE ARYA
Author: Taoufik Abdelhadi ER-REBAIY
Review: Cool

Name: CAFE ARYA
Author: Horizon Horizon
Review: Expensive

Name: Café Des Épices
Author: BCL ADRIAN
Review: This place is very nice to have breakfast. The Moroccan breakfast is extremely nice and the food is amazing. I would highly recommend a visit here for breakfast lunch and/or tea or coffee. They gave seating both upstairs, on the street level, and also roof top. It is warm to eat here as there is no air conditioning but the environment and the food is with it even without air-conditioning. I would recommend to visit here. Bear in mind the small print they do charge 7% service fee additional to food cost.  It is quite expensive here nearly the same prices as you pay in Europe. But the food is worth it.

Name: Café Des Épices
Author: Caterina Bassano
Review: Great Moroccan food in a lovely rooftop space (the middle floor is also super nice). Great views over the Medina. The fish tagine was very tasty, and the hummus was delicious. We didn't book in advance but we went there early so it was quiet. It gets very busy especially around sunset hours, so service was a little slow. Reasonable prices!

Name: Café Des Épices
Author: Marlene Po
Review:
Very charming café situated at the small square where hats and baskets are sold .

But that's about it.

We ordered   Aish Burrito ( small portion for 60 DH ),  Vegetarian Sandwich ( again small portion for 70 DH... AND! VERY BLAND. Had to squeeze lots of lemon on  it.  Bread was hard.   Lentil salad was ho- hum, not much taste either.

In short, don't go here.

Overpriced, tasteless

Name: Café Des Épices
Author: Yousra
Review:
Had lunch here sadly came at a pick time, but still the view was great. Food was nice, morrocan tea.
Good touristic and prices are more expensive than the usual in the city. Friendly staff.

Name: Café Des Épices
Author: Ella Willoughby
Review: Great stop for a nice drink. We sat on the middle floor level as the top was too hot, but all the decor was very sleek and nice. The window looking onto the market was amazing to look at. We only had some fuzzy drinks but the food looked and smelt delicious.

Name: Riad Café Rouge in Marrakech
Address: Marrakech، 9 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: Restaurant marrakech
Review:
Best cafe in Marrakech
We went several times to Cafe Rouge. The food is really good for a fair price. They have a lot of juice options and the best morocco food. The staff is amazing. Aida, the manager is an amazing woman ready to help you with anything. Ahmed, one of the waiters, will make anything to guarantee that you are having a good time.

Name: Riad Café Rouge in Marrakech
Address: Marrakech، 9 Rue de la Bahia, Marrakesh
Author: kam kinmgg
Review:
Every day there is a new... acrylic hookah
Long length, size 14
Ceramic head
MYA cafe Rouge silicone hose

Name: Café Pizzeria for saisons
Author: Issam Ben Mohimd
Review: Nice place

Name: Café Pizzeria for saisons
Author: Mustapha Ait baaddi
Review: Good corner Good corner

Name: News Café
Address: 1 Angle Abou Baker Seddik et Omar Ben Khattab, Marrakesh
Author: Catarina Carvalho
Review: Absolutely amazing food and lovely service. If you’re staying for a longer time in Morocco you might find yourself in need to take a break from the local cuisine. This restaurant was great at providing just that experience, for a cheap price.

Name: News Café
Address: 1 Angle Abou Baker Seddik et Omar Ben Khattab, Marrakesh
Author: Prix
Review:
This is such a cozy and pretty place to eat.
For dinner from 20:00-22:00 they also have a live band playing and singing, which creates an intimate ambiance.
The food tastes good and the service is also fast.

Name: News Café
Address: 1 Angle Abou Baker Seddik et Omar Ben Khattab, Marrakesh
Author: Mouad OUAISSA (Mou3ad)
Review:
What a great place 😍
The food, the band, the staff and the atmosphere.. I can't say more than just Wonderful 💯, whenever I'm in Marrakech I'll visit this place again and again ..

Name: News Café
Address: 1 Angle Abou Baker Seddik et Omar Ben Khattab, Marrakesh
Author: Elisabeth Myers
Review:
This is a great cafe to have meetings and work, especially in the hot days of summer and early in the day before it gets busy.
The food is good and reasonably price and the staff is super nice.
Although there is a no-smoking section, because it's not closed off from the smoking section and the best wifi signal is right next to where you walk into it, it does occasionally get too smoky.  I would encourage management to discourage smokers from sitting right next to the no-smoking sign.

Name: News Café
Address: 1 Angle Abou Baker Seddik et Omar Ben Khattab, Marrakesh
Author: Aaron Croke
Review:
The food itself is good (unless you have any fries, they’re very undercooked), just don't expect what you ordered to turn up.
We've been here 3 times (lunch once and dinner twice) and each time we have been served the wrong food we ordered or just don't get anything at all!

The drinks quality varies a lot too, one day you will get a really good drink, the next time it'll be barely passable.

And if you are in the hotel next adjoining it like we are be prepared to be awake till the early hours in the morning with their awful live music blasting away. Every. Night. 🙃

Name: Café Guerrab
Address: jemma el fna، 39 Souk Ableuh, Marrakesh
Author: Nikoleta Nižnanská
Review: Really wonderful place, tasty food, beautiful roof terrace with chill atmosphere. We had skewers and tacos and both were delicious. Recommend to try mint tea here.

Name: Café Guerrab
Address: jemma el fna، 39 Souk Ableuh, Marrakesh
Author: Weronika Turowska
Review:
We had amazing time at Café Guerrab. Great service, nice views and the atmosphere on the roof terrace.
Delicious eggplant salad, tajine and desserts. We felt looked after - very homely, family atmosphere. Very genuine Moroccan experience
A must visit in Marrakesh!
Highly recommend :)

Name: Café Guerrab
Address: jemma el fna، 39 Souk Ableuh, Marrakesh
Author: Rayane Spirit
Review: I absolutely loved this place! great atmosphere, gorgeous view. The vibe is immaculate, and the food is amazing, so worth it!

Name: Café Guerrab
Address: jemma el fna، 39 Souk Ableuh, Marrakesh
Author: Akerke Jetygenova
Review: Beautiful place! Everything is so clean, very polite staff. I recommend it 💯. There is Moroccan food and regular food, super 👏🏻 hello, from Kazakhstan

Name: Café Guerrab
Address: jemma el fna، 39 Souk Ableuh, Marrakesh
Author: Emily Brown
Review: Gorgeous rooftop terrace nestled away from the busy souks. We had the corgette salad (SO DELICIOUS!), kebab tahini (delightful), and chicken skewers (yum). Food was served quick and can tell it’s made with love. Our waiter was great and very helpful. Would definitely recommend to a friend - gorgeous flavours and chilled vibes. Reasonably priced.

Name: Café Particolari
Author: HARMACHI Zakaria
Review: Good place calme in day time but it is crouded on nught time due to football events

Name: Café Particolari
Author: BELHARRADI youssef
Review:
A beautiful café in Aziziyat in the wonderful city of Marrakech its problem is the space to relieve the need without electricity but the quality of the coffee is not discussed God willing
A place I recommend visiting and enjoying

Name: Café Particolari
Author: Youssef Karim
Review: Very very poor service from the waitress. The place is good but the quality of service is very bad

Name: Café Particolari
Author: med morchid
Review:
The coffee was very good.
Very very poor service
The treatment was very bad from the waitress

Name: Café Particolari
Author: NAJIB LATIQUE
Review: A wonderful cafe in terms of quality, modern decor and a clean place. The service is respectable. Special thanks to the cafe owner.

Name: Café Carmel Marrakech
Author: Youcef London
Review: We just had a great breakfast here. We have been around to different breakfast places throughout Morocco and i would give Carmel the Best value for money and one of the best customer service. Great quality products, real fresh juices. Well done and keep it up Carmel! Chokran

Name: Café Carmel Marrakech
Author: Jojo Fofo
Review: Fantastic place - if you are at majorelle, choose this place because the food, the atmosphere and the prices are amazing. You will definitely enjoy the menu. There are lots of vegetarian options and packages for brunch. We ordered the “family” brunch and it was so much food and very filling.

Name: Café Carmel Marrakech
Author: Daniela G.
Review:
Very nice and decent restaurant.
We had breakfast there and although we came after the official breakfast time, we were still given the breakfast menu.

The service spoke a bit english, which was ok, but she still got our tea order wrong  and a part of the breakfast, but that was fine.

Very moderate pricing.

Name: Café Carmel Marrakech
Author: Zion Films
Review: I can't believe it after coming to Morocco for the 4th time in the last 4 years I am still finding new hidden gems to eat at. The service was excellent and the food was even better. The mocktails were all amazing and the main courses digest the right amount of flavor and spice. I'm definitely coming back later on tonight.

Name: Café Carmel Marrakech
Author: Gonçalo Pereira
Review:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (5/5)

“Very Nice price and food”

Café Carme is a hidden gem in the heart of Marrakech. From the moment you walk in, you’re welcomed by its cozy and stylish atmosphere, modern design with a little traditional Moroccan touches. It feels like the perfect blend of old and new.
The service is super attentive and the owner even offer us a Za'atar tea because we weren’t feeling well  doo to the street food in Medina
Highly recommend for anyone visiting Marrakech!

Name: Bla Bla Café Restaurant
Author: Brid McGrath
Review: We stayed at a local hotel the night before we had an early morning flight home. We walked to BlaBla to grab some food. Even though they did not start food until later that evening (coffee/drinks only at that time), they understood that our 2 year old was with us on a hot afternoon and offered to make us food. We ate a beautiful meatball tagine which was one of the nicest meals we had this holidays! Thank you for your kindness.

Name: Bla Bla Café Restaurant
Author: AtlasDesert MoroccoTours
Review: Bla Bla Café in Cherifia, Marrakech, is a delightful find. Despite its café setting, this place offers a taste of authentic Moroccan cuisine. The atmosphere is charming, blending modern comfort with Moroccan flair. The service is warm and welcoming, adding to the overall experience. Whether you're a local or a visitor, Bla Bla Café is a must-visit for a cozy meal or a relaxing cup of coffee in Cherifia, Marrakech. Best server El Jazira

Name: Bla Bla Café Restaurant
Author: Abdelilah Aouba
Review: I m sitting here about 1 hour ago no one did any move to ask me what I want and that’s fine what a wonderful country free WiFi free seats…

Name: Bla Bla Café Restaurant
Author: Yahya Elafez
Review: Always welcomed by the best Jazeera Hassan !!!

Name: Bla Bla Café Restaurant
Author: Toubkal Randonnées
Review: Nice cafe nice service

Name: Oasis café
Author: المغامرات الخطير
Review: It's beautiful 🥰❤️

Name: Oasis café
Author: Mourad ALAATCHANE
Review: It's too sad that the place is super cool with a really nice terrace, but the food isn't great at all. It's the second time I've been there and this time, I had spaghetti bolognese which had no taste and very little ground meat? It's really weird, I've never seen spaghetti bolognese like that in my life! If the creator 🇮🇹 of spaghetti bolognese saw this, he would be really disappointed.

Name: Oasis café
Author: Alessandro Graziano
Review: Nice cafe in a quiet area, large and clean. It is both a café and a restaurant, the terrace is cool, there are fans and the view is pleasant. Combo breakfast at 25 dirhams for cappuccino, orange juice and slice of cake.

Name: Oasis café
Author: Laura Jeunet

On them or on their table, or simply trying to put their outstanding bill on innocent customers who are under the influence of drug’s & alcohol.  They try to get their bill onto your table. My bill was 2480.  Despite me willingly ordering they are adamant on cheating me. Now that the girls didn’t work. The staff  are now throwing away, items I have purchased and not delivering on what I am being charged for. The staff are now Simply trying to trick me into ordering more. How disgusting. Name: Ni3ma Thon
Author: Kech Fat
Review: A very very wonderful shop

Name: Mozaik' Art, Coffee and Brunch
Author: Mark van Veggel
Review:
Very nice place to get away from the busy streets. Please not this place is inside a really small “mall” and it isn’t visible directly from the street.

Nice and cool due to the airconditioning.

Service was amazing, and the waiter and kitchen staff made sure everything was freshly made. Also described all the ingredients that were used and were really helpful changing a menu dish due to allergies.

Amazing place with one of the best simple lunches I had during my trip. Would recommend the Belinni Ice Tea, amazing!!!

Can’t go wrong with this place!

Name: Mozaik' Art, Coffee and Brunch
Author: Erica de Jong
Review: This was a great brunch spot for me and my 3 American friends. We each ordered coffee and breakfast and the total was ≈ $44 USD. Im a coffee snob and enjoyed the cappuccino for its price. The waiter Yassin was very kind and spoke English. I'd recommend this place for a leisurely brunch, not necessarily a quick bite. Hope this helps

Review: Great food and great environment, the staff was great and the food as well. The avocato toast was supreme. One of the best places for breakfast/brunch in Marraquech. Bachir and Yassine were amazing and helpfull, very kind, always checking if everything was great.

Name: Wanina Café et Restaurant
Address: Lot. 1 Chouiter 7-10, Magasin No3 Imm.D, Marrakesh
Author: Mark Slade
Review:
So having eaten at wanina's on friday evening 23/08/24 ( which was ok ) we learned that you had to pre-order a tagine 24 hours beforehand to be able to have one. Staying only 15 minutes walk away in a riad i attended waninas on saturday mornig. I arrived and explained to the english speaking waiter that i wished to order a tagine for sunday evening. I even wrote down that it would be at 8pm.
On arrival on sunday evening at 8pm we were seated and asked what we wanted ( food and drink ) by our english speaking waiter. My family ordered and i said that i had attended 24hrs  earlier and ordered my beef tagine. I was duely informed that there was no tagines. They had not done it. The staff are friendly enough, polite and do everything they can. I should advise any other non arabic speaking to trust in pre ordering food.

Name: Wanina Café et Restaurant

Review: Great place, food and amazing staff. Very good prices and reasonable quantities. Very nice option.

Review: Nice, clean and family friendly place to dine in although we decided to take out food. Some of the food was on the bland side but overall it was all good.

Name: Wanina Café et Restaurant
Address: Lot. 1 Chouiter 7-10, Magasin No3 Imm.D, Marrakesh
Author: akhi dot cf
Review: Expensive, no air conditioning, bad toilet aeration, unergonomic wood chair on exterior, confusing network access points, no humidifiers, opening hours not displayed

Name: Neta coffee shop
Author: Aimad Timeless
Review:
I used to frequent this coffee shop for its peaceful basement area, which was advertised as a "Stress-Free Zone" perfect for students and researchers. The initial setup was ideal, with the ground floor reserved for lively activities like watching matches, while the basement was intended to be a sanctuary of quietness.

However, my recent visits have been marred by a significant increase in noise, reminiscent of the commotion on the ground floor. It's clear that the current manager, who is not the original owner and designer of the cafe, prioritizes profit over the original vision of a serene environment.

The introduction of television screens in the basement to broadcast matches has disrupted the tranquil ambiance that once prevailed here. It's disheartening to see the very essence of this space, as a refuge for focused work and study, erode, all in the name of maximizing profits.

Moreover, the presence of bikes and guards in the basement is puzzling and disruptive. As a student and researcher, I expected a peaceful environment in which to concentrate, but the noise and unexpected distractions have made it impossible to do so. The tagline "Stress-Free Zone" no longer holds true for this area.

It's evident that the current management's priority is turning the cafe into a money-making venture rather than preserving its unique charm and utility for students and researchers. I hope the management can reconsider the purpose of the basement and restore it to the peaceful retreat it once was, keeping in mind the needs of the academic community. Until then, I'll be seeking out other locations for my study and research needs.

Name: Neta coffee shop
Author: Travel To enjoy your life
Review: Good place where you can enjoy your cafe time

Name: Neta coffee shop
Author: MaroOn Ghan
Review: Very chill and hospitable place , i like to drink my coffee there.

Name: Neta coffee shop
Author: ali yakoubi
Review: Wonderful place

Name: Neta coffee shop
Author: Samira Karem
Review: Very very beautiful  places  for breakfast  and coffee  afternoon 😋 😊

Name: Werandah Marrakech I Brunch Café & Restaurant
Author: Asya Rizova
Review: If I had 10 stars, I would give the restaurant 10 out of 10! Amazing experience - starting from the fact that they have an easy accessible menu one QR code away, followed by the professional service from the waiter that served us, the warmly baked bread, olives and butter that was served on the house, and the absolutely delicious and perfectly cooked food that we ordered. We recommend the shrimp spinach pasta and the beef fillet with truffle mashed potatoes. Incredible! I would recommend this restaurant to every single person who visits Marrakech!😍

Name: Werandah Marrakech I Brunch Café & Restaurant
Author: Sara Bekali
Review: I never left a review, but for this place I have to!! The service is impeccable. The staff is great, always so nice and caring. I went back five times in a row and tried almost everything on the menu, from the breakfast, to the brunch and even lunch and drinks and I can promise you that it is really the best restaurant ever! The food is delicious and you can never go wrong with any order, 100% recommended!! Thank you for your service, I had the best time with you!

Name: Werandah Marrakech I Brunch Café & Restaurant
Author: Henry Edwardi
Review: Amazing views from the Werandah in Marrakech We picked a sunny day during sunset, but this was a bonus! The seasonal menu of local produce was concise but offered a delight for most - all, I would suggest! All our dishes were well prepared, presented and, most importantly tasted sublime. Staff were spot on, knowledgeable & welcoming. Highly recommended from these happy diners! Thank u guys for all ur hosp ✅😇🤝🤝🤝

Name: Werandah Marrakech I Brunch Café & Restaurant
Author: nevil
Review: Verandah Restaurant was fantastic! The server [Ismail] was exceptional and handled all our requests effortlessly. We were craving a delicious brunch, and that's exactly what we got. The food was amazing, and we'll definitely be returning. I highly recommend this place to everyone!

Name: Werandah Marrakech I Brunch Café & Restaurant
Author: Daniela G.
Review:
Werandah is a welcome gem in Marrakesh.

Really nice and welcoming atmosphere, very good and forthcoming service and a big selection of delicious meals and drinks.

We were brought a small bread and olive platter while we waited on our tajines. We had a meatball tajine and a lemon chicken tajine- best we had so far!
Our server was great and so wonderfully friendly.
Prices are moderate and the portions are big.

We will definitely come again to try another dish.

Name: Le Cercle
Author: Hajar Noreddine
Review:
Nice pool place with very friendly and pleasant staff! We had Fatima as our waitress, she was amazing.

They have good coffee, the orange juice was freshly squeezed! And affordable prices.

Keep in mind smoking indoors here is allowed, so expect some smoke.

Other than that, I totally recommend!

Name: Le Cercle
Author: Ali BOUADDI
Review: "Le Cercle" stands out as one of the premier billiard halls in Marrakesh, offering an unparalleled experience for enthusiasts. The attentive and friendly staff, coupled with the quality of the coffee and meticulously maintained tables, combine to create an inviting and memorable atmosphere for all visitors. In addition, the clean and well-maintained toilets add to the overall positive impression of the establishment. The classic decor, with traditional billiard tables and cues, provides a touch of timeless elegance. Furthermore, the soft background music enhances the ambiance, allowing for comfortable conversation and creating a relaxing environment. Moreover, the skillful and engaging players partaking in snooker matches provide added entertainment, making every visit a truly enjoyable and immersive experience.

Name: Le Cercle
Author: Craig Coulter
Review: Good little pool hall, not bad prices, TVs to watch sport, would go again.

Name: Le Cercle
Author: Junaid
Review: Had a lovely time here. Great staff and excellent customer service, they went above and beyond.

Name: Le Cercle
Author: Krister
Review:
Good place, found out about this hidden gem one day before returning to London so disappointed. Would definitely recommend to go there if you’re 17-24. A lot of fun things to do like pool tables and 3 PlayStations or PS5s to play.

However, was asked to buy something if I wanted to stay there and continue with my pool game. It’s okay though.

Review: I recently visited City cafe and was very disappointed. Despite waiting for 20 minutes, no waiter came to take my order. Frustrated, I decided to leave. The cafe has potential, but they seriously need to improve their service.

Review:
The cafe is located opposite the Majorelle
garden and next to the house of YSL Museum.  The prices are reasonable, the menu is varied, excellent pastries and attentive, friendly staff.

The only negative is the state of the toilets, and it was only the morning...even though we don’t eat in the toilet, this room immediately calls into question the hygiene of the entire cafe (this is just my personal opinion).

Name: MyKawa
Author: Edvinas Underavicius
Review: I would say overpriced place for the quality of food you get. I would recommend to bisit this place only for coffee as this was really good, but food is 5 put 10. We were having beef and chicken kebabs, they were tasteless. Eat here if you very very hungry.

Name: MyKawa
Author: anna Jelena
Review: The food was very tasty, the waiters were really friendly and the atmosphere was also pretty nice. We would definitely go there again and we would recommend this place.

Name: MyKawa
Author: Hayes Weggeman
Review: I really enjoyed the spinach and cheese quiche here. The quiche was literally one of the best I have had. It was delicious. It comes with fries and a salad. This restaurant is right across the street from the Majorelle Gardens. To go to the gardens you buy your ticket online and wait for your time to enter. This restaurant is a perfect place to wait for your time to enter the gardens.

Name: MyKawa
Author: zahra williams
Review: Great convenient location, close to Le Jardin Majorelle. Service was great. Try the fresh juices.

Name: Oasis Café Targa
Author: Hak iM
Review: I like  the place and  specially the atmosphere !  i do pass by every  travel i do   from Agadir  passing by  Marrakech to  tangier!  id recommend  it !  but always  know that groceries price there  are always more expensive than  usual !

Name: Oasis Café Targa
Author: Abraham Ben
Review:
I would rate this station oasis café 4🌟
Fast and good service
The A/C was on in hot day
The prices are a little bit too high
The bread was perfect
The quantity wasn't enough comparing the price
I recommend to take a stop and fast meal in it

Name: Oasis Café Targa
Author: zohair maazi
Review:
Good place to get rest and eat some Moroccan dishes specially the amazigh breed Tafarnout.. there is a free parking and station gaz with a place for kids.
WC need more proprety.

Name: Oasis Café Targa
Author: Nyxioun De Lorak
Review:
This space has the best atmosphere ever. The calmness and serenity of the space were so good. The cafe is on the highway and gives you the option to eat the food that you brought with you outside for free. So, even if you do not feel like eating from their menu, you can just eat yours.

The staff are very nice and friendly. This is a family space, so expect weird looks if you are with your girlfriend or even wife and doing PDA.

The toilets are really bad. They need to clean and fix their toilets.

Name: Oasis Café Targa
Author: Nada Kimari
Review: For a quick bite and relaxing mid road it’s great. Basic breakfast selection but service is good.

Name: Corner Cafe
Author: Karin Lannon
Review: My son recommended this cafe to us, and we loved it, too. Our salad and falafel plate were fresh, delicious, and beautifully plated, and we really enjoyed the service from the owner, who chatted with us about blues music. The atmosphere is nice too, with a sunny yellow interior standing out from the shops around it.  Highly recommended!

Name: Corner Cafe
Author: Lisbeth Stewart
Review:
Great little cafe with indoor & outdoor seating.
Welcoming and professional service.
Delicious tea (I just had a mint tea, which was perfect!)
If you’re having a whole meal, they will close the doors and put the aircon on, which is marvellous on a hot day.

Name: Corner Cafe
Author: G Wells
Review: The best chicken tajin we had in Morocco. The owner was so nice too, made us feel so welcome and was proud of his restaurant.

Name: Corner Cafe
Author: Cleo Bird
Review: My partner and I had an absolutely lovely meal. The service and food were excellent. It was our first meal in Marrakech and it was a great way to start off our trip.

Name: Corner Cafe
Author: matilde finotti
Review:
Best kebab in town, confirmed! The owner
and his staff was super nice and the food was amazing. So much compliments to the chef and all!

Author: Marouane Sebti
Review: I recently visited Cactus Cafe and found the service to be excellent. The staff was friendly and attentive, making sure I felt welcome throughout my visit. They offered helpful menu suggestions and created a pleasant atmosphere. A great spot for a quick, enjoyable break!

Review: This place has a nice atmosphere and good food. The owner and staff are super nice and friendly, the service was excellent. All the food was great, and we highly recommend the yellow fruit smoothie bowl.

Address: N'15, magasin, complexe El habous, Bd Allal Al Fassi, Marrakesh

Review: Amazing food! Very yummy! We had the cheese burger and the Nutella banana crepe which were amazing. Our waiter was very kind and friendly. Beautiful design and interior. 😍 We’ll come again next time we’re in marrakesh! ☺️🌺

Address: N'15, magasin, complexe El habous, Bd Allal Al Fassi, Marrakesh
Author: Hajar Taoussi
Review: Great restaurant with a chill atmosphere. The whole experience for me was a 10/10, the Food was delicious with affordable prices. Special thanks to our lovely Server Karima. Also, it's great for studying or finishing up some work

Address: N'15, magasin, complexe El habous, Bd Allal Al Fassi, Marrakesh

Review: Nice place to eat after visiting Jardin Majorelle. We had a good variety of breakfast and enjoyed it very much. Karima was friendly and helpful!

Name: Boston Coffee Restaurant Marrakech
Address: N'15, magasin, complexe El habous, Bd Allal Al Fassi, Marrakesh
Author: rayan Aichoun
Review: Greeted bt the same lovely karima and served by a very kind gentlemen named Khalid, the food once again was 10/10 the first time was so nice I had to do it twice

Name: Café Restaurant Dar Touareg
Address: Jdad, Arset Maach, N° 30 Rue Touareg, Marrakech
Author: Sinjini Sikdar
Review: We booked a Marrakesh tour with a tour company and they took us to this restaurant for lunch (we had to pay for our lunch). They only gave us a fixed menu which included a choice between a salad and soup, a main dish, a plate of seasonal fruits, and tea with cookies. We had Tazlaft (lemon chicken tagine for main dish and soup) and Ouarzazate (chicken couscous for main dish and salad). The taste of the food was good but 1 fixed menu is a lot for 1 person. I would have preferred a menu with separate options for main dish, starters, etc. They accept credit cards with some extra fee. The prices of the dishes were on the higher side.

Name: Café Restaurant Dar Touareg
Address: Jdad, Arset Maach, N° 30 Rue Touareg, Marrakech
Author: Andrea Jorge
Review: Nice place for lunch! I'd enjoy it more if they had some fans on the rooftop because it gets really hot. They have set menus. We had one for 2 of us and it was enough.

Name: Café Restaurant Dar Touareg
Address: Jdad, Arset Maach, N° 30 Rue Touareg, Marrakech
Author: witchinator
Review:
Really nice potential here - location good, our server was fantastic.

But the place just wasn't clean, old food from previous customers on floor & table, and it had been empty bar one table when we arrived so plenty of time to clean up.

Food wasn't bad but was pretty disappointing after the glowing reviews on here. Not much seasoning or spices to be had except for the chilli olive paste!

Name: Café Restaurant Dar Touareg
Address: Jdad, Arset Maach, N° 30 Rue Touareg, Marrakech
Author: David Álvarez
Review: Tasty food in a traditional atmosphere. The menus are great, a lot of food. My favorite dishes are the kefta meatballs and the chicken couscous.

Name: Café Restaurant Dar Touareg
Address: Jdad, Arset Maach, N° 30 Rue Touareg, Marrakech
Author: Angeline Gulhaugen
Review:
Loved this place for a nice lunch.  The terrace on the very top is so lovely and shaded even when it's very hot out.  The prices are reasonable,  and the service was great. The Chicken and lemon tagine was great,  and the chicken pastilla was also really good.  I was so hungry after walking around all afternoon,  and when we left I was stuffed. The fruit for after dinner was such a lovely touch, and it was even presented in a pretty way. The bread and olives were so good too!

150 to 200 MAD per person. In fact,  I'm going there for dinner tonight too!

Review: A good café with a nice terrace especially in the evening.
